1.title: FR - We Are: The Brooklyn Saints - S01E01 - Welcome to the Saints Young Man
1.plot: The Saints coaches and staff prepare their players for a new season and instill in them the values of hard work and camaraderie.

1.title: FR - We Are: The Brooklyn Saints - S01E02 - My Brother's Keeper
1.plot: Coach Gawuala pours his heart into his team despite struggles off the field. Players, parents and coaches cope with the physical dangers of the sport.

1.title: FR - We Are: The Brooklyn Saints - S01E03 - Like Son, Like Father
1.plot: D-Lo tries to persevere through an emotional time. Kenan looks forward to a future beyond football. The 9U team gets ready for the trip to Florida.

1.title: FR - We Are: The Brooklyn Saints - S01E04 - Any Darn Day
1.plot: The 9U Saints head to Florida to strengthen their bond and play for a title. Kenan chooses his high school. Gawuala starts a new chapter in life.

meta.plot: A Brooklyn youth football program and its selfless coaches provide a safe haven for kids to compete and learn lessons that will take them far in life.

Après avoir obtenu son diplôme, Molly Yoder quitte ses parents pour l'Arizona. Tandis que Miguel devient la fierté de sa famille en devenant le premier diplômé des Hernandez. Seulement tous deux n'avaient pas prévu que leurs projets futurs prennent une telle direction quand Molly apprend à Miguel qu'elle attend un enfant de lui. Les Yoder et les Hernandez, que tout oppose, vont devoir apprendre à vivre ensemble....

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Dan Yoder and wife Caroline are happily anticipating an empty nest as their daughter Molly gets ready to head off to college. Molly has some interesting news for them, however, and when she announces that she and her secret boyfriend Junior Hernandez are going to have a baby, they have to adjust to a new reality and meet their new family – Miguel and Lisette. When these two very different families are thrown together, it’s obvious that Dan and Miguel have the most difficult time adjusting to their new situation, while Caroline and Lisette take a softer approach.

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E02 - Dan Finds Out
1.plot: Caroline heads to the doctor to confirm her suspicions but when she encounters Molly and Junior in the same waiting room, things get a little awkward. Then, as Joseph decides to invite his parents to the first sonogram, things get even more awkward. When Caroline later learns she is indeed pregnant, she struggles with the best way to break the news to Dan, who has been happily anticipating an empty nest. Meanwhile, Dan returns to Miguel’s boxing gym to get back into shape, and it doesn’t go well.

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E03 - The Big RV Adventure
1.plot: In a moment of wistfulness about his long lost freedom, Dan decides to purchase an RV for a little recreational family time. Caroline is not completely thrilled about the purchase and is most concerned about finding relief for her mounting nausea and intense appetite. Miguel and Lisette attend Demetrio’s Back to School Night and meet Demetrio’s sixth grade teacher Ana Nunez – who turns out to be an old flame of Miguel’s. Lisette, who is already feeling awkward about becoming a grandmother, is not happy to meet the gorgeous Ana. Meanwhile, Molly looks to her mother for advice on why Junior may be feeling less romantic now that she’s pregnant.

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E04 - Molly and Junior Find a Place
FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E05 - Halloween
1.plot: After landing a big client, Caroline eyes a promotion at work, but struggles to keep the pregnancy a secret until she can lock it in. Dan encourages Junior to lighten up a bit and have some fun so he considers rushing a fraternity on campus, which turns out to be Dan's old house. When Junior and Molly attend the Halloween costume party however, it becomes apparent that something has changed in the years since Dan was at school. Meanwhile, the Yoders entertain the Hernandez family for some Halloween trick-or-treating.

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E06 - Dan and Miguel Play Ball
1.plot: When Dan is short a player in his weekly basketball game, he invites Miguel to join but when Dan accidentally elbows Miguel in the mouth, the game goes from bad to worse. During the game, Lisette offers to take Caroline to her favorite Mexican restaurant for an amazing burrito but the ladies realize that they have differing opinions about the family drama surrounding them. Meanwhile, Molly is horrified to learn that the lab where Junior works is using animals for testing and it comes between them.

1.title: FR - Welcome to the Family - S01E07 - Lisette’s Abuela Visits
1.plot: A visit by Lisette’s grandmother Lita, draws Molly and Caroline into a Hernandez family web of lies, including the old woman’s belief that Miguel is a lawyer.

meta.plot: A group of friends set out on a road trip when an unexpected fourth passenger forces an abrupt change of plans.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Reporter Gerd Heidemann needs a real scoop, as he hasn't had a big story in a while. Konrad Kujau, not making enough selling fake memorabilia to old Nazis, desperately needs money and has the idea of forging Hitler’s diaries.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Kujau finally agrees to do business with Heidemann, and all it’s left is for Stern to approve payments. Hans admits his Nazi past, and Elisabeth helps him by destroying his file - unaware that she is photographed while doing it.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Kujau forges some letters to provide Heidemann with documents to verify the diaries. Leo Gold threatens Elisabeth to reveal her father’s guilty past, if she won’t provide him with information about the diaries.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Wishing to sell the international rights of the diaries, Stern approaches an American media mogul, who however has an agenda. Elisabeth, while trying to find out if Kujau is a fake, learns something upsetting about her father.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Elisabeth tells the editors of Stern that she believes the diaries are fake, so Bloom has no choice but to fire her. Kujau panics with the impending publication of the diaries, so he forces Heidemann to keep his identity a secret.

1.title: FR - Faking Hitler : L'arnaque du siècle - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Following the publication of the diaries, Stern continues to assert that they are real, but what will the examination prove? Moreover, will Elisabeth be able to win back her place in Stern?

meta.plot: En 1978, le journaliste allemand Gerd Heidemann s'allie à Konrad Kujau un faussaire désargenté, pour écrire de faux journaux intimes d'Hitler. Retour sur un scandale.

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E01 - There Is a Light
1.plot: Lonely Becky spends her life on Chloe's social media, always on the outside looking in, until a sudden tragedy pulls her in deeper than she ever dreamed possible

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E02 - Out of Reach
1.plot: Armed with her new alter ego Sasha, Becky makes herself indispensable to Livia. A party in Elliot's honour gives her the chance to get closer to Chloe's grief-stricken husband.

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E03 - The Holy Trinity
1.plot: Becky begins investigating the secrets which Chloe kept from Elliot, Livia and the rest of the friends, but an unexpected run-in with Richard leads to a painful conclusion.

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E04 - However Rotten
1.plot: As she embraces life as Sasha, Becky loses herself in the luxurious world Chloe left behind, but she is forced to face the ghosts from her past at Phil’s art exhibition.

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E05 - Grimy Friend
1.plot: New information causes Becky to look at everything with fresh eyes as she tries to untangle the threads Chloe left behind, while increasingly at risk of being discovered.

1.title: FR - Chloe - S01E06 - She Called Me
1.plot: Becky’s carefully constructed web of lies begins to crumble around her and it’s a race against time to discover the truth before Elliot’s political launch.

meta.plot: L'outsider Becky est obsédée par l'influenceuse Chloé - jusqu'à ce que la tragédie l'entraîne plus profondément qu'elle ne l'aurait jamais imaginé.
Retour dans la ville imaginaire de San Fransokyo, où l’imposant robot gonflable Baymax, compagnon de santé personnel, s’efforce d’accomplir sa mission : aider et soigner les gens.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E01 - Cass
1.plot: Cass meets her match in Baymax when an injury threatens to keep her from running the Lucky Cat Café.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E02 - Kiko
1.plot: Baymax urges a reluctant Kiko to ease her aches and face her fears.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E03 - Sofia
1.plot: Middle-school student Sofia faces some major life changes with Baymax’s unwavering support.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E04 - Mbita
1.plot: Mbita serves up a family favorite until an unexpected allergy and Baymax give him reason to change.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E05 - Yachi
1.plot: Hungry cat Yachi fiercely resists Baymax’s efforts to relieve him of an uncomfortable intrusion.

1.title: FR - Baymax ! - S01E06 - Baymax
1.plot: Baymax’s best patients come together in a frantic race to help the healthcare companion.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Struggling to figure out where he fits in, Dean decides to pursue his calling as "The Great Uniter" and attempts to organize the first integrated baseball game between his team and his friend Brad's team.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E02 - Green Eyed Monster
1.plot: While Dean reckons with his first taste of heartbreak and betrayal, the adults in his life are overly empathetic and assume his grief is from mourning current events.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E03 - The Club
1.plot: Dean stumbles upon some “racy literature” and shares it with friends at school. When he is caught by the school principal, Bill and Lillian navigate uncharted territory as parents and Dean learns that manhood isn’t all it’s cracked up to be.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E04 - The Workplace
1.plot: It’s “Take Your Son to Work Day” and Dean heads to band practice with Bill. But the “grown folks’ business” at the music studio prompts Lillian to have to pick up Dean. While at her office, Dean finally learns what his mom does while he’s at school all day, gaining a newfound respect for her career and ambition.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E05 - The Lock In
1.plot: Dean is reluctant to attend the annual church lock-in until Kim tells him it’s where she got her first kiss. He enlists his friends to help him pair up with Keisa, but his plans are thwarted when he instead gets paired up with the pastor’s daughter, Charlene.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E06 - Be Prepared
1.plot: When Coach Long and Bill take the boys on a camping trip as part of their newly formed scout troop, their starkly different approaches to the outdoors show Dean that his father isn’t good at everything. As a thunderstorm threatens an eerie quest through the woods, Bill leans into his expertise to save the day.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E07 - Independence Day
1.plot: As Kim’s campaign for a car coincides with the need to take Grandaddy Clisby’s keys away, Bill proposes a solution that is only pleasing to him: Kim can drive, so long as she takes her grandfather and Dean around town. Later on at the mall, Dean is worried about seeming uncool when Clisby ends up chaperoning him and his friends, but Clisby has a few crowd-pleasing tricks up his sleeve.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E08 - Science Fair
1.plot: After seeing Dean bullied by Michael after school Lillian goes to confront his parents and learns he needs more compassion than discipline. Much to Dean’s dismay, she takes Michael under her wing and helps him with his project for the science fair – an event where Dean typically excels

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E09 - Home For Christmas
1.plot: Dean can’t wait to spend Christmas with his older brother, Bruce, when he returns home from Vietnam. But adjusting to life back in Montgomery comes with unexpected challenges for Bruce, and the rest of the Williams family rely on their favorite holiday traditions to bring cheer

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E10 - Lads and Ladies and Us
1.plot: Bill and Lillian decide to join high society club Lads & Ladies as a way to introduce Kim and Dean to positive influences in the community. Bill, Kim and Dean fit right in, but things take a turn when Lillian is treated differently for being a working mom.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E11 - Brad Mitzvah
1.plot: Brad works through his nerves preparing for his bar mitzvah speech while Dean ends his friendship with Keisa when Charlene tells him he can’t be friends with other girls. Things come to a head when the whole group comes together to celebrate Brad’s bar mitzvah.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E12 - I'm With The Band
1.plot: When Dean loses his position as first chair saxophone in the school band, Bill lays the pressure on him to earn it back.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E13 - The Valentine’s Day Dance
1.plot: Dean’s plans to ask Keisa to the Valentine’s Day Dance are foiled when another boy asks her out first after a new makeover makes her the talk of the school. Meanwhile, Bill and Lillian make Kim sign up for a Big Sister program to have extracurricular activities for her college applications.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E14 - Country Dean
1.plot: The family spends spring break with Lillian's parents in the countryside, and Dean lies to his cousins about city life in Montgomery to impress them. Meanwhile, Lillian helps to settle a land dispute between her parents and their neighbors to impress her difficult-to-please mother.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E15 - Black Teacher
1.plot: When their teacher goes on maternity leave, Dean, Cory and Keisa are excited to be taught by Mr. Brady, the school’s first Black teacher. Mr. Brady encourages the students to try out for the Knowledge Bowl team where Dean faces some unexpected challenges

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E16 - The Sleepover
1.plot: When Dean learns that Corey’s dad, Coach Long, is in the doghouse, he struggles to keep this secret from his friend.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E17 - Jobs and Hangouts
1.plot: Kim is excited to start her new job as a waitress at the local diner, which Dean adopts as his local hangout. When Kim experiences drama with her friends, she finds unlikely allies in a tough coworker and her younger brother.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E18 - Goose Grease
1.plot: When Dean comes down with the chicken pox on his way to a hunting trip with Bill and Grandaddy Clisby, Lillian forces the three of them to quarantine together. Clisby pushes homemade remedies on them out of his mistrust of doctors, but he’s forced to reckon with this when Dean’s condition worsens.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E19 - Love & War
1.plot: Bruce returns home from Vietnam, and the family is shocked to find out he is dating an older woman with an 8-year-old son with whom he is eager to start his life. When they learn more about Bruce’s latest deployment, they begin to understand his survivors’ guilt and come together to support him.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E20 - Bill's New Gig
1.plot: Bill is excited to have made tenure at the university, only to find that his focus on career and family has cost him his spot in his band; Bruce adjusts to living at home.

1.title: FR - Les Années Coup de Cœur - S01E21 - Where No Dean Has Been Before
1.plot: Dean tries to impress Keisa's cool new boyfriend by inviting him and his friends to a party Kim is throwing while Bill and Lillian are away for the night; things get out of hand just as Bill and Lillian arrive home.

meta.plot: La série met en scène un adulte afro-américain qui se remémore sa jeunesse à Montgomery dans l'État d'Alabama à la fin des années 1960 avec en toile de fond le contexte historique de l'époque (guerre du Viêt Nam, festival de Woodstock, scandale du Watergate…)
Dans leur villa de rêve, trois générations d'une même famille jonglent entre les exigences de leur entreprise d'organisation de mariages et leurs problèmes personnels.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: At the Paixão villa, Rita interviews an eccentric couple ahead of their big day. Vanessa deals with life changes, and Daniel with a flurry of bad news.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The paparazzi-targeted wedding of a footballer to an influencer keeps the Paixão family busy. Daniel puts pressure on Vanessa to discuss their future.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The family prepares to stage a wedding within a reality show. Vanessa considers moving out. Joaquim shows Daniel his technique to relieve stress.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Vanessa spends time with Vasco, while Marco signs Daniel up for speed dating. A wedding where the future in-laws are bitter political rivals gets messy.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: In the 1990s, a young Vanessa becomes friends with two arts students — Vasco and Daniel — and an enduring love triangle soon forms.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The villa gears up for a themed family celebration. Joaquim worries about Luísa's worsening condition. Rita grapples with her feelings towards Armando.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: In 1968, Joaquim and Luísa meet under unusual circumstances. In the present, the Paixões mourn a death. Marco shares his romantic ideals with Filipe.

1.title: FR - Until Life Do Us Part - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: All is not well as the Paixões navigate grief and conflict. But with the business also at risk, it is up to Marco and Rita to come up with a bold plan.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E01 - Birth
1.plot: Expectant young couple Mehmet and Zeynep host some spoiled houseguests — while their most eagerly anticipated arrival is reluctant to emerge.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E02 - Right at This Moment
1.plot: Metin is born, and Zeynep and Mehmet struggle with the demands of parenting. But it's when the baby falls asleep that the drama really begins.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E03 - First Breakup
1.plot: Five-year-old Metin is brokenhearted and wants to talk things through with his ex-girlfriend. Back at home, his parents' relationship is also suffering.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E04 - 66
1.plot: Metin struggles at school, preferring to make music alone in his bedroom. Zeynep announces she's not in the mood to celebrate her birthday this year.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E05 - Plants & Friends
1.plot: While working as a DJ, Metin bumps into an old flame. His mother begs for an answer to the question that's been bothering her since the day he was born.

1.title: FR - A Round of Applause - S01E06 - The Return
1.plot: Frustrated by her marriage and let down by motherhood, Zeynep tells both men in her life how she feels — but neither gives her the reaction she wants.

meta.plot: Struggling with existential angst and longing for his past life in an orange, a man navigates his quirky family in this decades-spanning drama.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E01 - We are the same.
1.plot: New recruit Erling Haaland joins Manchester City and sets the tone for the 2022-23 season with his striking goalscoring feats.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E02 - We have to take responsibility.
1.plot: A victory in the season's first Manchester derby pits the Blues against rivals Arsenal in an exciting Premier League title race.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E03 - I want my warriors!
1.plot: Club manager Pep Guardiola drives up the pressure after City suffers a loss against Southampton, knocking them out of the EFL Cup.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E04 - We can beat them all.
1.plot: The Blues move within sight of the treble win as they advance to the quarterfinals of the UEFA Champions League and the FA Cup.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E05 - Do you want to play in the final?
1.plot: After clinching the title from Arsenal and winning the first-ever Manchester derby final, City secures the Premier League and FA Cup double.

1.title: FR - Together: Treble Winners - S01E06 - We're going to win.
1.plot: The Blues arrive in Istanbul to face Inter Milan in a hard-fought UEFA Champions League final and lock in the continental treble.

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire revient sur le triplé historique réalisé par les hommes en bleu du Manchester City FC lors d'une saison 2022-2023 extraordinaire.
From nature to nurture, this docuseries explores the groundbreaking science that reveals how infants discover life during their very first year.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E01 - Love
1.plot: The biology of bonding unravels to reveal how caregiving, social interaction and stress can physically change both parent and newborn.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E02 - First Food
1.plot: Proving babies truly are what they eat, researchers discuss how breast milk, iron and microbes can enrich, nourish and protect offspring.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E03 - Crawling
1.plot: From how they grow to how they go, three scientists find out that crawling is much more than just a transitional phase.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E04 - First Words
1.plot: Experts examine the rhythm and flow of language and explore how babies break down linguistic beats before they know how to speak.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E05 - Sleep
1.plot: Researchers delve into sleep, a dynamic time for babies, with studies on twitching, apps and naps.

1.title: FR - Babies - S01E06 - First Steps
1.plot: Scientists venture into the ways that walking changes a baby's world and unveil findings on neonatal reflexes, skeletal development and talking.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E01 - What Babies Know
2.plot: Challenging the notion of a blank slate, three studies explore how babies are born with expectations about everyday life.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E02 - Movement
2.plot: From curiosity to understanding: researchers unveil the surprising ways that infants learn how to anticipate and respond to the movements of others.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E03 - Senses
2.plot: Several experts make sense of how babies touch, taste and see as they embark on a sensory journey that will shape the rest of their lives.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E04 - Relationships
2.plot: A coy smile, a puppet show and a pointed finger lead to discoveries in how babies get along with others using humor, morality and shared experiences.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E05 - Nature and Nurture
2.plot: Resolving the debate of nature versus nurture, three scientists show how genetics and environment work together as infants discover who they are.

2.title: FR - Babies - S02E06 - Toddlers
2.plot: Researchers reveal the social skills that toddlers naturally possess, abilities that ultimately separate humans from all other species.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E01 - Sip Stop Hooray
1.plot: While Joey settles into a new domestic routine, Justine kick-starts her career with a wildly innovative debut product.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E02 - U Can't Crash This
1.plot: Justine scores an exclusive dinner invite, Skyler makes a major decision, and Veronica finds an unsettling surprise in her boyfriend’s apartment.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E03 - They Call Me Too Nice
1.plot: As Joey teaches Justine a crucial business lesson, Wes learns about the pitfalls of collaboration. Meanwhile, Daevon brushes up on his manners.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E04 - Yo! Bum Rush The Secret Show
1.plot: Arsenio encourages Joey to step back into the spotlight. Daevon struggles with an identity crisis. Justine tries a risky marketing strategy.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E05 - Please Hamper, Don't Hurt ‘Em
1.plot: The Washingtons take in a special guest, Joey attempts to teach Daevon a lesson, and Skyler prepares for her academic future.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E06 - Papa Said Log You Out
1.plot: When Joey shares some exciting news, Justine struggles with an internet troll. Veronica helps Skyler tackle an unexpected fear.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E07 - You Gots the Chills
1.plot: Veronica gets caught in a social media predicament, Joey confronts an old rival, and Justine hatches a plan to spend more time with Wes.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E08 - Follow the Leaker
1.plot: Justine and Joey clash over Veronica’s love life while Wes and Daevon team up for a special project. Skyler hosts an elaborate sleepover.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E09 - Pranksta's Paradise
1.plot: As Wes strikes up a new romance, Skyler seeks sisterly revenge. Joey and Justine help Malik with a baby-sitting debacle.

1.title: FR - All About the Washingtons - S01E10 - Snow Diggity
1.plot: An icy blizzard brings the kids together, Joey prepares for a new kind of gig, and Justine unpacks a family mystery.

meta.plot: L'icône du hip-hop MC Joe Speed quitte le show-business et trouve un nouveau rythme entre travail, vie sentimentale et quotidien familial chaotique.
Privés de sommeil durant 24 heures, les participants de ce jeu relèvent tant bien que mal des défis simples ou loufoques dans l'espoir de remporter un million de dollars.

1.title: FR - Awake: The Million Dollar Game - S01E01 - Don't Sleep!
1.plot: Everyone risks a headache in a brain freeze challenge before trying to quickly thread needles and break balloons filled with cash

meta.plot: Destiny forces three sisters to reunite 30 years after their last meeting. Having grown up in a commune founded by their father, today they lead lives marked by the traumas of their childhood.

2.title: FR - Sorcières - S02E01 - La vieille chaumiere
2.plot: In search of Michael, Joe makes a stunning discovery. Beth deals with the failure of her relationship and tries to make Phil see reason. Agnès lives dark days with the loss of her baby, Sophie's departure and the sale of Selvä.

2.title: FR - Sorcières - S02E02 - La fin d’un royaume
2.plot: Joe is stunned by everything she learns about her past. Mathis pushes Agnès to move forward in her grieving process. Nicolas is determined to find the commune at all costs. Laurent makes important revelations to the police about Gabrielle. Phil is seriously put in his place by Tom. Véronique is apprehensive about what will happen next and hopes for Daniel's support.

2.title: FR - Sorcières - S02E03 - L’heure des negociations
2.plot: A discovery puts the police on the trail of Fred, Marie-Ève ​​and Clovis. The three sisters reconnect for the first time since their altercation. Corinne reveals to Harlow her plan to end things with Gaétane. Agnès learns that New Brunswick social services have tracked down her mother. Miranda invites herself to Phil's for an evening of bubbles, pizza and discomfort.

2.title: FR - Sorcières - S02E04 - Retrouvailles et déchirures
2.plot: Fred, Marie-Ève ​​and Clovis make headlines. The intervention has greatly shaken Mario. Joe absolutely must talk to Luc. Beth and Phil have a frank discussion. Agnès confides in Mathis in all sincerity. Harlow and Corinne put their plan into action, while Manon receives a visit from Gaétane. The Sainte-Piété police make a discovery they no longer expected.

2.title: FR - Sorcières - S02E05 - Vue sur la commune
2.plot: The police search the town and make important discoveries. Martin is fascinated by Joe's past, who dares to make a rapprochement. Agnès receives a mysterious call that shakes her up. Beth and Phil prepare for Alistair's return home. A young entrepreneur named Solène Villeneuve arrives in Sainte-Piété. Marie-Ève ​​receives a moving proposal from Luc. Gaétane is rushed to hospital.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E01 - Fast Food to Fancy
1.plot: Hopefuls turn healthy leftovers like pork tenderloin and marinated veggies into cozy comfort fare, then revamp fast-food favorites into high-end eats.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E02 - Game Day Gourmet
1.plot: Game day appetizers morph into meals that score big points with the judges. The contestants must reimagine smoky barbecue takeout as a gourmet feast.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E03 - The Holidays!
1.plot: A festive meal means lots of leftovers. So how about glazed ham, apple pie and green bean casserole… on a sandwich? Later, Greek food gets a new life.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E04 - Pot Roast to French Toast
1.plot: The cooks serve up a spectacular breakfast using fancy date-night leftovers from the fridge, then wow the judges with fresh takes on Italian takeout.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E05 - Down-Home to Uptown
1.plot: Bacon-wrapped brats and blueberry cobbler get a second look as late-night snacks, and duck confit and cassoulet evolve into entirely different dishes.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E06 - Welcome to the Neighborhood
1.plot: Potluck castoffs return with a vengeance as sinful desserts before the challengers tackle chilled Chinese takeout, including egg rolls and chow mein.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E07 - Fiesta Feast
1.plot: The cooks use food from a children's party to make cocktails and an indulgent brunch. Mexican dishes are remade into gnocchi, dumplings and more.

1.title: FR - Best Leftovers Ever! - S01E08 - Bland to Flavor Bomb
1.plot: After creating a "flavor bomb" from notoriously bland foods like rice and toast, the competitors take on a new challenge: transforming Thai takeout.

meta.plot: Des pâtes délicieuses à base de frites de la veille ? Dans cette compétition culinaire, des cuisiniers chevronnés concoctent des plats gourmands à base de restes.

1.title: FR - Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner - S01E01 - Vancouver with Seth Rogen
1.plot: On a heady trip back to his hometown, Seth reminisces over dim sum with David. Later, the duo attempt a maze and meet octopus Ceph Rogen.

1.title: FR - Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner - S01E02 - Marrakesh with Chrissy Teigen
1.plot: After a sprawling breakfast and succulent lamb in the medina, Chrissy and David try their hand at creating tagines, then hump it through the desert.

1.title: FR - Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner - S01E03 - Los Angeles with Lena Waithe
1.plot: Saucy crawfish, deep-fried brownies, bowling alley chow and sneaker shopping are all on the menu as Lena and David share their trusty LA go-tos.

1.title: FR - Breakfast, Lunch & Dinner - S01E04 - Phnom Penh with Kate McKinnon
1.plot: Kate and David learn how Cambodia's tragic history has impacted its food culture, dig into durian and consider snackable tarantulas and cockroaches.

meta.plot: Chef David Chang takes his insatiable curiosity about food, culture and identity on the road, in the convivial company of fun-loving celebrity guests.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E01 - I Love The Way You Lie
1.plot: The game's first player, a Ph.D. candidate at Stanford, tries to outsmart the challengers. But will a science question lead to his fall?

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E02 - No Risk, No Reward
1.plot: More contestants chase after life-changing money, doing their best to tackle trivia on everything from Kevin Costner to Cinnabon.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E03 - It Pays to Play
1.plot: One competitor closes in on the million-dollar prize while another closes in on the realization that this game isn’t for them.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E04 - Is Any of This True?
1.plot: Notting Hill is famous for what type of festival? How did Buzz Aldrin get his name? What animal has the stinkiest farts? Do your best. Take a guess.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E05 - Weasel Words
1.plot: An attorney’s ability to stretch the truth is put to the test. Also, a dad presses his luck and hopes his poker face will help him win big money.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E06 - This Game Is Not Rocket Science
1.plot: This game isn't rocket science, but that doesn't make it easy. The topics range from the Ten Commandments to actors with dirty mouths.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E07 - Disarmingly Dishonest
1.plot: A convincing contestant inches toward the million-dollar prize, answering a bevy of baffling questions — often incorrectly

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E08 - I Can't Read Her
1.plot: Is she really smart or just really good at dishing b.s.? A self-proclaimed trivia nerd proves hard to read for the panel of human lie detectors.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E09 - Can You Find the Fraud?
1.plot: A real-life fraud detector joins the game, hoping to uncover whether a contestant knows her stuff — or if she's full of it.

1.title: FR - Bullsh*t The Gameshow - S01E10 - The Final Fib
1.plot: A new challenger mixes next-level bluffing with old-fashioned smarts to take the three panelists on a wild ride they won't soon forget.

meta.plot: Les concurrents doivent donner la bonne réponse à des questions difficiles. Et lorsqu'ils ne savent pas, une seule solution : mentir comme des arracheurs de dents.
Dans cette téléréalité, les Bernard, querelleurs au grand cœur, gèrent leur salon funéraire à petit budget tout en aidant les familles en deuil à faire leurs adieux.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E01 - Meet the Bernards
1.plot: As Ryan and his mother, Debbie, argue over who's the boss, Raegan gets a crash course in hearse duty, and Deja takes a stand.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E02 - Driving a Hard Bargain
1.plot: Kevin gives Ryan a lesson in the fine art of negotiation when the two head off to buy a new hearse. Meanwhile, Debbie puts her granddaughters to work.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E03 - Life After Death
1.plot: While Deja and Corey are at a prenatal appointment, Raegan, Ryan, Debbie, Kevin and Tavion pull out all the stops and plan a surprise baby shower.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E04 - New Kid on the Block
1.plot: Tavion steps up while Deja takes some time to bond with her newborn. Ryan and Debbie debate whether to expand the business.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E05 - Daddy Daughter Day
1.plot: Deja agrees — reluctantly — to go fishing with her dad. Debbie and her pal gossip like pros. Raegan encourages Kevin to learn new makeup techniques.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E06 - Lights, Camera, Distraction!
1.plot: The Bernards make an outrageous commercial as Debbie directs. Also, Ryan musters the courage to talk about the birds and the bees with Raegan.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E07 - Can't Hardly Date
1.plot: Deja and Raegan pressure Debbie to give online dating a try. Meanwhile, Kevin adds some excitement to Ryan's presentation about the mortuary business.

1.title: FR - Buried by the Bernards - S01E08 - Who's the Boss?
1.plot: Tired of her father and grandma's constant arguing, Deja brings in a mediator. Meanwhile, it's time for Raegan to finally pick a college.

meta.plot: Heidi Klum and Tim Gunn host designers who face challenges and assignments that will test their design skills and their abilities to run all aspects of a business.

1.title: FR  - Making the Cut - S01E01 - Heidi and Tim Are Back
1.plot: Heidi Klum and Tim Gunn welcome 12 designers to New York City and tell them to pack their bags because their first fashion show will be in front of the Eiffel tower in Paris. In their first assignment, the designers must create a two-look brand snapshot. One designer lets self-doubt get in her way, while another has to make a new dress from scratch with only a few hours remaining.

1.title: FR  - Making the Cut - S01E02 - Haute Couture
1.plot: Heidi and Tim meet up with the designers to give them their next assignment: a two-look, Haute-Couture inspired mini collection for a fashion show that will take place at the historic Musée Des Arts Décoratifs. As the fashion show draws near, an indecisive designer struggles to stay on track, while another designer attempts to push their creative boundaries.

1.title: FR  - Making the Cut - S01E03 - Collaboration
1.plot: In teams of two, the designers must blend their individual aesthetics into a three-look collection for a runway show on the banks of the River Seine. One designer struggles to overcome a teammate's mistake, while another pair of designers butt heads.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E01 - Getting Started
1.plot: In the first episode Gordon teaches how to cook with confidence. Recipes include delicious pork chops with sweet and sour peppers, and pan-fried scallops with crunchy apple salad, and Gordon shares a tip for keeping your knives sharp.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E02 - Keeping It Simple
1.plot: Gordon teaches how to keep it simple. Recipes include chilli beef lettuce wraps, and miso-poached salmon, and there's a guide to buying perfect fish.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E03 - Cooking with Chilli
1.plot: Gordon shows how to cook with chilli. Recipes include red mullet with sweet chilli sauce, classic jerk chicken, and a super simple spicy beef salad.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E04 - Cooking with Spice
1.plot: Gordon's cookery course continues as he shows how to cook with spices. Recipes include a gutsy slow-cooked fiery lamb, a curry-spiced sweetcorn soup, and a simple but delicious aromatic rice pudding.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E05 - Ultimate Food on a Budget
1.plot: Gordon shows how to make dream food on a budget. Recipes include sausage rice, roasted mackerel with garlic and paprika, and unforgettable lamb with fried bread.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E06 - More Ultimate Food on a Budget
1.plot: Gordon's cookery course continues as he shows how to cook more delicious food on a budget. Recipes include leek and gruyere rosti with fried eggs, a delicious apple crumble, and seriously impressive homemade gnocchi.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E07 - Stress-Free Cooking
1.plot: Gordon's cookery course tackles stress-free cooking. Recipes include sticky pork ribs, a spicy chutney, and an amazing chilli chicken with ginger and coriander that just gets better and better with time.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E08 - Making It Easy
1.plot: Gordon's course continues with meatballs in fragrant coconut broth and a fabulous alternative to a chocolate brownie: white chocolate blondies.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E09 - Real Fast Food
1.plot: Gordon shows how to make real fast food. Recipes include smoky pork sliders with homemade BBQ sauce, chicken stir-fry with rice noodles, and a fast noodle soup.

1.title: FR - Gordon Ramsay - Les Recettes du Chef 3 Etoiles - S01E10 - Street Food Classics
1.plot: Gordon demonstrates some home-cooked street food classics. Recipes include beef tacos with wasabi mayo, and flavour-packed chilli dogs, and there's a shopping guide to help you buy the finest chocolate.

meta.plot: Gordon Ramsay nous dévoile les secrets de ses petits plats mijotés, en cocotte ou au four. Pour nous mettre en appétit, il commence par des fabuleux travers de bœuf braisés, avant de nous guider dans le choix de l'aliment phare du mijotage : la viande. Mais la cuisson lente donne aussi de délicieux desserts !

Dix femmes et dix hommes ont été réunis pour leurs compatibilités amoureuses grâce à des études physiologiques et comportementales. Leur objectif ? Identifier les 10 couples parfaits. A la clé ? 200 000 euros à se partager. Chaque semaine, ils se présenteront deux par deux à la cérémonie des couples pour proposer leurs "10 couples" de la semaine. Suite à cette cérémonie, ils sauront combien de couples parfaits ils ont, mais sans savoir lesquels. Un seul moyen d'avoir la certitude qu'un couple est parfait, la love machine, ils y auront accès une fois par semaine, à la suite d'un rendez-vous. Entre amour et jeu, les candidats seront-ils capable de faire la part des choses ?
