meta.plot: Des propriétaires américains présentent des biens à vendre à quatre agents immobiliers chevronnés, dans l'espoir de faire la vente qui changera leur vie.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E01 - No Guts, No Glory
1.plot: Six recession-hit patriots from Oregon stake everything on mining and head north to Alaska to dig for gold and save themselves from financial ruin. The team of greenhorns beg, borrow and build all the equipment they need to mine for gold. Loaded with supplies, they leave their loved ones behind and drive from Oregon to southeast Alaska in a Klondike convoy.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E02 - Gold, Guns, and Bears
1.plot: The stakes get higher at the Porcupine Creek prospect as reality sets in about just how little time they have to get to their gold. The miners start to rebuild the mining ghost town but the bears aren't so keen on their new neighbors — and they let them know it.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E03 - Running Dirt
1.plot: The crew races to set up the mining plant and start running dirt. When the families arrive from Oregon and question the lack of gold — and master mechanic Harness becomes dangerously ill — the tension builds so high that Dorsey and Todd almost come to blows.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E04 - The Ultimate Price
1.plot: The team attempts to finally run potential pay dirt through the wash plant. But a visit from the Department of Fish and Game reveals a violation, jeopardizing their vital water supply to the mine. Then disaster strikes as Todd's daughter fights for her life.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E05 - The Pain Barrier
1.plot: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. Meanwhile, James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash. But hard work late into the night finally hits a pay streak.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E06 - Gold Fever
1.plot: The miners' futures are on the line at Porcupine Creek. After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule, and the Hoffmans have run out of money and deliver the crew an ultimatum: find $10,000 worth of gold in the next two days, or the families have to head home to Oregon. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E07 - Going For Broke
1.plot: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications. With the credit cards maxed out, he is forced to take desperate measures.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E08 - Bad Blood
1.plot: The crew remains in deep financial hole. Veteran miner "Dakota" Fred thinks he can turn things around and he cranks up production faster than ever before. But when things start falling apart, tensions mount and Harness can't keep his frustration in.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E09 - Bedrock or Bust
1.plot: Desperate to get to bedrock and large quantities of gold, Todd and Jack throw caution to the wind and dig deeper than ever before. With the brutal Alaskan winter threatening, they battle floods, cave-ins and equipment breakdowns.

1.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S01E10 - Never Say Die
1.plot: With the arctic winter looming, the crew races against the clock. Rain and thawing snow flood the mine and Jack puts his life on the line as the glory hole caves in around the massive 100,000 pound excavator.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E01 - Twist of Fate
2.plot: The Hoffmans have to find gold and fast. The crew arrives in Porcupine Creek reinvigorated and in record time, they are on the gold. But just they celebrate their best clean out ever, "Dakota Fred" returns and drops a bombshell on Todd, Jack and crew.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E02 - Virgin Ground
2.plot: The Hoffman crew heads north to the Klondike in a desperate bid to find a new claim and salvage their mining season. 16-year-old Parker Schnabel takes over the Big Nugget Mine, while Dakota Fred gets a new start at Porcupine Creek.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E03 - Family Feud
2.plot: Jack and Todd go head to head over how to set up their new claim. At Porcupine Creek, Dakota Fred rips out the wash plant and finds gold that he forced the Hoffmans to leave behind. At Big Nugget mine, Parker continues to hit pay dirt.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E04 - Slippery Slope
2.plot: The Hoffman crew confronts the permafrost that lies between them and the gold. As the Dakota Boys set up their new wash plant, Fred pushes his son too hard and Dustin storms off. Parker faces a breakdown that leaves his mining season at a stand still.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E05 - Drill or Die
2.plot: A crew rebellion forces Todd Hoffman to dig test holes on the claim. The tension mounts as they wait to see if they're sitting on a gold-rich paystreak or about to go bust. Then, Fred is forced to abandon mining as floods in North Dakota destroy his home.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E06 - Lovestruck
2.plot: The Hoffmans are finally on the gold, but a new love threatens to derail mechanic James Harness right when the crew needs him most. Desperate for pay dirt, Parker bulldozes a dangerous road up the side of a mountain and Fred returns to Porcupine Creek after facing the loss of his North Dakota home.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E07 - Gold At Last
2.plot: The Hoffmans realize they could be losing thousands of dollars of gold out of the end of their sluices and they are forced to tear apart the wash plant and rebuild. In his quest for virgin ground at Smith Creek, Parker turns into a lumberjack to get back on the gold.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E08 - On the Gold
2.plot: With the washplant prepped, the Hoffman crew finally has their first clean-out of the season. Back in Alaska, Dakota Fred works furiously to win his "more gold in a week" bet that he made with Jack. At Big Nugget, Parker clashes with his grandfather when John wants to shut down the wash plant.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E09 - Behind the Scenes
2.plot: In this special, exclusive behind the scenes footage capturing the production of Gold Rush is revealed. Four film crews spread over 600 miles, battle the wilderness in Alaska and the ...

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E10 - Dead in the Water
2.plot: Jack Hoffman's precious excavator gets stranded in the creek and requires emergency surgery in the wilderness. Meanwhile, the crew fine-tunes their wash plant which doubles their efficiency at finding gold. Parker does the work of two men until an argument with his mother threatens to shut him down.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E11 - Twenty Four Seven
2.plot: Short on time, the Hoffman Crew decides to run night and day in a struggle to get to the gold, while a federal mining inspector pays a surprise visit to both Fred and Parker. The inspector finds safety violations and both operations face closure.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E12 - Rock Bottom
2.plot: A broken excavator sidelines the Hoffman crew; Parker Schnabel returns the mine to his grandfather; efforts to reopen a mine beget a clash between the Dakota boys.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E13 - Bedrock Gold
2.plot: A key crew member calls it quits at Quartz Creek. Meanwhile, massive rocks break Dakota Fred's derocker and Parker reconsiders his future after smelting his 35oz season haul into a solid gold bar.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E14 - Man Down
2.plot: A heart attack has 91 year-old mining legend John Schnabel battling for for his life. The Hoffmans find a gold nugget that becomes a game-changer and Dakota Fred accomplishes what Jack Hoffman never managed to do at Porcupine creek.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E15 - In the Black
2.plot: The Hoffman crew risks its all to run through the night in a bid to finally break even for the season. Fred has to abandon his best paydirt yet when his excavator gets stuck in the pit. John Schnabel returns to the Big Nugget Mine after his heart attack.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E16 - Frozen Out
2.plot: The Hoffman crew battles frozen dirt and frozen pipes as they struggle to hit their goal of 100 oz. Parker makes a last ditch effort at Smith Creek Hill and the Dakota Boy's season may be over when Dustin smashes the side of the washplant.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E17 - Judgment Day
2.plot: The Hoffman crew is desperate to get 100 ounces, but Todd's decision to run the dozer on solid ice ends in disaster. The Big Nugget mine faces closure if Parker fails to hit a pay streak and Dakota Fred thinks he's finally found Jack Hoffman's glory hole.

2.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S02E18 - Revelations
2.plot: In never before seen footage, the miners unearth the sometimes ugly truth about their 2011 mining seasons. In a shocking development, one miner is kicked out of the Hoffman crew. The miners also disclose plans for next season.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E01 - The Long Road
3.plot: Relive the most heart pounding and heart breaking moments of Gold Rush as the Hoffman crew and their rivals Parker Schnabel and 'Dakota’ Fred fight Mother Nature, mining machines and each other to get gold out of the ground in the frozen North.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E02 - Million Dollar Season
3.plot: Loaded with bonus footage, production facts and tweets. Todd doubles down with two claims, twice the crew and twice the gear. Dakota Fred's glory hole is thought to contain millions in gold. Parker hires a new crew and sets his sights on new land.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E03 - The Wrong Claim
3.plot: Dave faces disaster when he finds his new claim is un-minable. Todd is thousands of dollars in the hole and the 1000 ounce goal looks impossible. The Dakota boys face the threat of historic floods and Parker desperately needs to secure new ground.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E04 - Secret Weapons
3.plot: Todd does a deal on a new gold-rich claim to get Dave's crew back in action.The Dakota boys hire new miners and one is quickly terminated. Todd junks his old wash plant, and replaces it with the new Super-Trommel, and Parker sets an unprecedented goal to get $40,000 worth of gold in his first week.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E05 - Battle of the Bridge
3.plot: Todd Receives a suprise visit from his investor; a broken-down bulldozer causes problems for Dave Turin's crew.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E06 - The Ultimatum
3.plot: Todd's chief investor demands to see 100 ounces of gold in the next three weeks, or he will pull the plug on the Klondike operation. At Indian River, Dave Turin is on the gold. Parker's crew goes into meltdown when he forces them to replace a bridge, while Fred attempts to make a precision part for the 270's track out of scrap metal.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E07 - Game Changer
3.plot: Parker sets a hefty goal; Dave's mine faces a potential shutdown.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E08 - Road To Gold
3.plot: Todd and his crew finally get to test the new Turbo Trommel. Dave pushes his crew to double their last clean out. The Dakota Boys receive a visit from an inspector with the power to shut down their mine and Parker brings in dynamite to blast a boulder.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E09 - Up Smith Creek
3.plot: Todd faces closure; Parker receives bad news from his grandfather.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E10 - Leprechaun Gold
3.plot: Parker finds out about the fate of his Grandpa. Todd has to rebuild his turbo trammel, Indian River faces a shutdown and the Dakota boys investigate whether the Glory Hole is truly an ancient waterfall.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E11 - Dozer Wars
3.plot: Todd and Dave go to war over the dozer they both need to keep mining and Todd banks on finding virgin ground beneath a pile of dredge tailings. Parker faces a crew rebellion and Dakota Fred attacks the Glory Hole with his secret weapon- the bedrock shark.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E12 - Pink Slip
3.plot: Parker hits bedrock at Emerson Trench; Todd shuts down the Quartz Creek operation; and Dave has a mishap with a bulldozer.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E13 - The Merger
3.plot: Todd forces his crew and Dave's crew to merge into one team. The Dakota Boys use their new equipment to get back down to the bottom of the Glory Hole. Parker risks his life to get paydirt from an abandoned mine site down a dangerous mountain road.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E14 - The Night Shift
3.plot: Tensions mount between the dayshift and nightshift as Todd pushes his men harder than ever. Parker battles his ancient washplant and the treacherous road from Discovery Claim while Dustin risks it all diving for hidden gold in the frozen glory hole water.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E15 - Bedrock Blowout
3.plot: Todd pushes the Big Red washplant to near breaking point on his best ground yet. Fred and Dustin battle to save a broken down excavator as water floods the glory hole and Parker faces his worst nightmare as the dangerous mine road claims its first victim.

3.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S03E16 - Redemption Road
3.plot: Out of Indian River paydirt, Todd comes up with a risky plan to hit his 1,000 ounce goal. A bad fall could put Fred out of the game, leaving Dustin to dig the glory hole. Parker worries his season is over but his grandpa is convinced he's near the motherlode.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E01 - Queen Of Diamonds
4.plot: The season premiere breaks ground in 3 countries. The Hoffman crew moves their operation to the hostile Guyana jungle. The Dakota boys need to find a safe route over thin ice. Parker is out of cash and must find gold – but Tony Beets has bad news for him.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E02 - Learning Curve
4.plot: Todd faces disaster when he discovers his claim has been mined out. The Dakota Boys fight over rival mining plans, with one plan high in the mountains, and the other deep in the hole. Parker ignores Tony Beets, but still manages to hit his first pay dirt.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E03 - In Too Deep
4.plot: The Hoffman crew battles the hostile jungle to get vital mining equipment to the claim. The Dakota Boys drill to find out whether the glory hole contains millions in gold. Parker is on the warpath when a new crew member throws out his gold.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E04 - Road from Hell
4.plot: The Hoffman crew attempts to set up their washplant, but the jungle fights them every step of the way. The Dakota Boys find their first bedrock gold in the glory hole. In the Klondike, Parker gets more gold out of Little Blue than the Hoffmans ever did.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E05 - Garnets or Gold
4.plot: Todd makes a shocking departure. Parker is forced to rebuild his wash plant after losing gold. The Dakota Boys finally hit the bottom of the Glory Hole.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E06 - Mutiny
4.plot: Todd returns to Guyana expecting 20 oz of gold but gets a shock. Parker faces a mutiny and seeks advice from Grandpa. The Dakota Boys expect a huge pay out from the glory hole but get a blow.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E07 - Paid in Full
4.plot: Todd makes a startling discovery while searching for new ground; Parker tries to stop Todd from repossessing his dozer; Fred prematurely gives up on his glory hole.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E08 - Jungle Boogie
4.plot: Todd switches to diamond mining; Dustin is stranded in the mountains during an electrical storm; Parker's wash plant is destroyed.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E09 - Ready to Roll
4.plot: Behind the scenes with the production crew

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E10 - Hope Creek
4.plot: Dave returns to the Hoffman crew and butts heads with Todd over their mining plan. The Dakota boys stake their future on a new cut; Parker gets a second chance at mining with one of the largest wash plants in the Klondike.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E11 - Blowout
4.plot: A tropical storm floods the Hoffman's operation; Dave must dive into the pit; Parker runs a washplant; the Dakota boys get a clean-up.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E12 - Death of a Dream
4.plot: Dave is forced to dive deep into the pit when a tropical storm floods the Hoffman's operation.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E13 - The Resurrection
4.plot: Todd faces eviction; Parker modifies his plant; Dustin gets real mining equipment to Cahoon Creek.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E14 - Fantasy Land
4.plot: Todd's claim owner forces a change of plans; Grandpa makes a radical suggestion while visiting Parker; Dustin fights to reach mountain gold.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E15 - Medevac
4.plot: An emergency in the jungle forces Todd to airlift one of his men to safety. Tony Beets becomes furious when he finds that Parker has moved his whole operation over the creek. The Dakota boys may be forced to abandon their hole.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E16 - Man on Wire
4.plot: Jack destroys the washplant forcing Dave to find a new way to run their dirt. Frozen pay disrupts Parker’s operation and threatens to end his season early. Dustin participates in a dangerous operation.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E17 - Day of Reckoning
4.plot: Todd’s claim owner arrives unannounced to take stock of the Hoffman’s operation. Dustin returns from the mountains just in time for the final clean up. Unwilling to admit defeat, Parker uses a new piece of equipment to thaw his frozen paydirt.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E18 - Go Big or Go Home
4.plot: Parker Schnabel refuses to give up. He's not satisfied with his gold total and is dead set on bringing home big gold to his beloved grandfather. Nothing is going to stop him, not even the Klondike winter.

4.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S04E19 - Grandpa's Last Wish
4.plot: 94 year old mining legend John Schnabel convinces his grandsons Parker and Payson to return to Big Nugget to work together deep into the winter to prove, once and for all, that there is big gold buried deep under Smith Creek.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E01 - New Blood
5.plot:
Returning for Season 5 is Parker, who proved himself in his rookie season mining the Klondike when he brought in over 1,000 ounces of gold worth $1.4 million. This time around, he's set a lofty goal to double his take.

Todd is also back after hitting rock bottom in the jungles of Guyana, South America, where he lost his land, most of his money, and ultimately his crew.

Finally, Tony aka "The Viking," and his team return after buying a $1 million, 75-year-old floating gold dredge he hopes will be his ticket to wealth.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E02 - From the Ashes
5.plot: Todd and Jack struggle alone at McKinnon creek, working with just their old 400 excavator and a left behind loader, while Thurber transports their wash plant from Guyana to the claim. Tony nearly crushes his son beneath a conveyor, and Parker is forced to mine a swamp.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E03 - Golden Boy
5.plot: Parker fights with the crew about running at night; Tony twists an important steel frame on the dredge; Todd, Jack and Thurber work on their first clean up.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E04 - Viking Ship
5.plot: Todd is forced to sell his gold to get the mining equipment he needs.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E05 - Hard Bargain
5.plot: Dave agrees to work with the Hoffman crew under a new agreement, where he's an equal owner, and brings in 6 new massive machines. Tony has a near miss while removing the heaviest part of the dredge and Parker fights with Rick when he opens up untested ground.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E06 - Cursed Cut
5.plot: Dave and Todd clash over how to mine frozen ground. Tony's daughter Monica gets stuck in a bad situation. Parker's hopes are drowned by multiple issues including a flooded cut.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E07 - Goldzilla
5.plot: Todd needs to find a 100 ounce down payment to make a big purchase. Parker spends a quarter of a million dollars on new equipment. Tony attempts to remove the wheelhouse from his 75 year old gold dredge.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E08 - Gold Blooded
5.plot: Parker goes for his best clean-up so far this season, Tony attempts to rip the trommel out of his 75 year old gold dredge and the Hoffman crew is stunned by the death of a former crew member.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E09 - Colossal Clean Up
5.plot: The Hoffmans overcome a lack of water to get a monster clean up. Tony finally gets his dredge on the way to its new home in Eureka Creek. Parker gets the biggest gold clean up in Gold Rush history.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E10 - Grandpa John
5.plot: This special explores the life of 94 year old mining legend John Schnabel. From the Kansas dustbowl, to his career on an Alaskan gold mine, Grandpa John continues to inspire his grandson Parker to follow in his footsteps.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E11 - Parker's Accident
5.plot: Parker's car is totaled in a head-on collision; rock trucks go head-to-head on a dangerous haul road; Tony starts to rebuild his dredge.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E12 - Ship of Fools
5.plot: Parker and his grandfather hunt for a new Klondike claim; Tony's operation stalls when the dredge crew runs out of bolts; Todd's crew discards paydirt.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E13 - Piles of Gold
5.plot: Todd and Dave disagree about how to mine, but reap large rewards; Tony and Parker go to war over bedrock gold; Minnie steals Tony's dredge crew.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E14 - Gold Road
5.plot: Logan has an accident with the rock truck; the Hoffman crew aims for a huge weigh-in; Parker finds his new cut frozen solid; Tony installs the heaviest part of his dredge.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E15 - Rogue Miner
5.plot: Todd and Dave get bulldozers stuck in deep mud; Parker breaks an excavator; Parker's crew struggles with frozen ground; Tony rushes to finish the dredge.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E16 - The Monster Lives
5.plot: Parker mines an island of paydirt; the Hoffman crew puts rock trucks out of commission; Tony finds an electrical problem.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E17 - Rivers of Gold
5.plot: Parker diverts a creek in order to mine a pile of gold in the riverbed; Tony's crew is upset over fitting the tailings conveyor; Jack is accused of sabotage.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E18 - Frozen Gold
5.plot: The Hoffmans' sluicebox is frozen; Tony tries to run his dredge, but discovers a lost part of his bucket line; equipment issues hinder Parker.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E19 - Hundreds of Ounces
5.plot: The Hoffman crew tries to reach their season goal; Tony tries to run the gold dredge, but finds himself shipwrecked; Parker makes a push to hit his goal.

5.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S05E20 - Freddy Dodge Returns
5.plot: Freddy and Derek Dodge search for gold in the Yukon wilderness; Freddy believes there is a hot spot around.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E01 - Blood, Sweat and Gold
6.plot: As a new mining season begins, Parker gets off to a disastrous start when he loses key crew and Tony orders him off his claim. Todd sets a massive goal for the season and Tony reveals big plans to expand his operation.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E02 - Gold Ship
6.plot: A major issue brings Tony's dredge operation to a halt; Grandpa John is rushed to the hospital.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E03 - Moving the Monster
6.plot: Todd encounters big issues as he attempts to move his 50 ton washplant. Tony's dredge finally starts producing gold. Parker piles on the pressure and it proves to be too much for one of his young crew members.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E04 - Grandpa's Golden Advice
6.plot: Todd's attempt to deal with a mountain of tailings pits him against his son Hunter. Tony's dredge takes a hit as he puts a rookie winchman in the hot seat. Parker seeks advice from his Grandpa as he struggles to save his season.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E05 - Jack's Gold Shack
6.plot: As Parker's frustration boils over, he must look at his own attitude; at Eureka Creek, Tony Beets gets hands-on with his creaking 1938 gold dredge.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E06 - Treasure Island
6.plot: Parker and his foreman Rick take a chance on a new cut. Todd searches for a fix so he can stop losing gold out of the sluicebox. Tony's crew hits a huge snag with the dredge.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E07 - Eldorado Dream
6.plot: Jack gets to chase his dream at ElDorado, the richest documented creek in North America. Parker's crew pushes hard in attempt to have Treasure Island live up to its name. Tony discovers his dredge is pouring gold out of its sluices.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E08 - Mammoth Channel
6.plot: The Hoffman crew uncovers a unique potential sign of good gold. Parker refuses to give up on Treasure Island and a fight between Tony and his crew spells the end for some of his crew.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E09 - Mammoth Gold
6.plot: Todd's crew unearths evidence of a massive prehistoric creature that may or may not lead to big gold. Tony is forced to rebuild his washplant and Parker opens the biggest cut of his life in an attempt to get more gold than his rival Todd.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E10 - Parker's 21st Birthday
6.plot: It's Parker's 21st birthday and Rick has an awesome surprise waiting for him aboard a party barge. Tony seeks for a new investment.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E11 - Captain Monica
6.plot: Monica covers Tony's dredging operation. Elsewhere, Parker attempts a large haul.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E12 - Crew War
6.plot: Parker's new mechanic sparks a mutiny; a drought shuts down Todd's operation; and Tony faces a major issue that could put him out of business.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E13 - Goldzilla Gold
6.plot: Hoffman deals with a feud between his day and night staff. Elsewhere, Tony and Gene have a disagreement about operations while Parker's wash plant is producing pay.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E14 - Million Dollar Mountain
6.plot: Tony makes a big purchase. Parker and Todd wager on who will get the most gold, leading to big changes on the claims.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E15 - Dead Even
6.plot: Parker pays his royalties for his 3000 ounce gold goal in advance. The dredge is stuck in his own tailings. Todd recovers his weekly loss by opening the roulette cut.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E16 - Golden Bombshell
6.plot: Parker is convinced to re-open his Fantasyland cut. The power on Tony's 75-year-old dredge is upped to speed up production. Todd's Roulette cut provides both rewards and problems.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E17 - Klondike Legend
6.plot: Tony Beets travels back to his roots in the Netherlands where he reveals details about his transformation from a farm boy to a Klondike mining legend. Cameras also follow him in his offseason home in the desert.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E18 - Oregon Gold
6.plot: Hoffman's looking for new mining ground in Oregon. Beets tries to find better ground for his dredge. Parker moves his washplant to other side of cut.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E19 - Frozen Pay
6.plot: Parker must divert a creek and mine; Tony breaks his dredge buckets; Todd doubles down with a second monster washplant.

6.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S06E20 - King of the Klondike
6.plot: As winter closes in, the race for gold intensifies; Todd runs two washplants; Tony tries to get his dredge out of the water before it freezes; Grandpa John checks in on Parker.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E01 - Miracle on the Mountain
7.plot: Todd Hoffman takes the biggest gamble and turns his back on guaranteed gold in the Klondike. Tony Beets expands his empire, buying a huge second dredge. Parker Schnabel starts his new season without his grandfather & mentor.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E02 - Eye in the Sky
7.plot: Todd Hoffman has his back against the wall when his new Oregon mine fails to deliver. Parker Schnabel’s new $600,000 washplant breaks down on its first start-up and Tony Beets takes to the sky to check up on his children.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E03 - Frankenstein Machinery
7.plot: Todd returns to the Klondike to collect Monster Red while Parker confronts tough negotiator Tony over royalties and receives a shock offer.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E04 - Mutiny
7.plot: Todd finally finds good gold at his new High Bar mine. Parker gives his foreman Rick his own operation and when Tony and Minnie decide to cut the dredge crew’s pay, a key crew member calls it quits.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E05 - Misery on the Mountain
7.plot: Todd battles to get the 50oz of gold he needs to keep his High Bar mine open. Tony brings all his children together to get his Paradise Hill claim up and running. Parker is furious at a series of human errors which cost him thousands of dollars.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E06 - No Crane, No Gain
7.plot: Todd Hoffman moves his entire operation and starts to run paydirt at a new mine. Parker Schnabel is flooded out and Tony Beets’ ancient dredge hits a record gold.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E07 - Watery Grave
7.plot: Tony arrives to find his million-dollar dredge in disaster. While Rick is at his grandpa’s funeral, Parker shuts him down by taking his equipment, and the Hoffmans discover that their wash-plant doesn’t work in their new mine.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E08 - Mega Barge & Kid Commando
7.plot: Todd Hoffman digs deeper than ever in a desperate search for gold. Tony Beets hauls a monster down the Yukon River. Parker Schnabel’s $600,000 wash-plant starts to shake itself apart.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E09 - Record Gold
7.plot: In this mega-packed episode, Tony Beets breaks records with the biggest gold haul in Gold Rush history. Parker Schnabel battles to save his dream washplant, and after seven weeks at the Buckland, Todd Hoffman’s finally on the gold.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E10 - Go Down Fighting
7.plot: Todd Hoffman hits rock bottom when, after seven seasons, a key crew member quits. Tony Beets transforms some rusty relics into a monster power barge, and a troubled Parker Schnabel misses his own birthday party.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E11 - Game Over
7.plot: With no paycheck for five weeks, Todd Hoffman’s close-knit team turn on each other. Parker’s gamble to run his washplant without protection from rocks proves costly. Tony builds a $10,000 mega-trailer to move his barge – but gets his measurements wr

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E12 - Abandonment
7.plot: Todd Hoffman’s crew has quit, and he desperately tries to keep mining with a skeleton team. Parker carelessly breaks his truck’s air hoses while transporting his washplant, and Tony Beets discovers his dredge is blowing gold out of the sluice

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E13 - Monster Machines
7.plot: The washplants featured on Gold Rush have trapped more than $18m worth of gold, but which monster machines have made the most or lost the most money?

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E14 - Lifeline
7.plot: The remnants of the Hoffman crew are at their lowest, but someone brings Todd good news. Tony Beets fires his barge captain, then runs aground up the mighty Yukon River. Rick Ness finally gets Parker Schnabel’s second operation up and running.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E15 - Parker vs. Rick
7.plot: Rick outperforms Parker on his new Indian River claim. Tony’s dredge suffers a catastrophic failure, threatening his season. Todd Hoffman’s skeleton crew finally sees good gold at their new mine in Colorado.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E16 - Excavator Down
7.plot: Todd Hoffman eats humble pie when he begs his old crew to return, Parker Schnabel loses an excavator in a swamp and Tony Beets gives his daughter Monica her own operation.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E17 - Double Trouble
7.plot: The Hoffman crew opens a second mine in Colorado, Parker Schnabel tries out a new mechanic who fails to get approval from Mitch. Tony Beets sets sail in a power-barge up the mighty Yukon river.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E18 - Cruelest Cut
7.plot: Parker Schnabel is forced to call his dad in to help his struggling operation, Todd Hoffman has the best clean-up of the season and Tony Beets’ daughter Monica starts bringing home the gold.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E19 - Miners vs. Beavers
7.plot: Todd's whole operation is brought to a halt; Parker's plant move turns into an excavator nightmare and a massive fix means Tony can finally get his broken dredge up and running.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E20 - Dredge vs. Washplant
7.plot: Todd finds monster nuggets on the top of a mountain, Parker and Rick struggle with a conveyor and Tony pits Monica against Kevin to see if the dredge is more efficient than a modern washplant.

7.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S07E21 - Viking Voyage
7.plot: Todd uses dynamite to blast monster boulders and get to the gold, Parker has to overcome a flood to get to a record gold count and Tony heads up the freezing Yukon River in his massive power barge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E01 - Wagers and Wars
8.plot: Parker and Todd go head to head as they lay down the exact same gold-weight goal for their season, whilst Tony Beets fires up his second ancient dredge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E02 - Blizzards and Bullets
8.plot: A rogue gunman fires shots at the Hoffman crew; frozen ground destroys Parker Schnabel's dozers; Tony Beets starts to tear apart his 500 ton dredge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E03 - The Viking vs. the Mechanic
8.plot: Todd interferes with son Hunter's wash-plant, pushing their relationship to a breaking point. Parker battles to maneuver a 150 foot super conveyor and Tony desperately needs dredge #1 to deliver gold but frozen ice may derail his plans.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E04 - The Curse of the Fairplay Mountains
8.plot: When Todd Hoffman's water supply gets ruled illegal, Freddy comes up with a plan to save the day. Tony undertakes a $600,000 upgrade of Dredge 1.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E05 - Son Dethrones Father
8.plot: While Parker Schnabel fights rising floodwaters to save his cut, Hunter Hoffman makes a bold decision shut down his operation and his father's.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E06 - Colorado Strikes Back
8.plot: Todd shuts down his operations to support Freddy Dodge as he pleads with the county commissioners to allow him to mine his claim; Kevin has bad news.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E07 - Inferno
8.plot: A massive forest fire tears through the Klondike toward Parker's claim, threatening to end his season; Tony desperately needs his barge to run.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E08 - The Mighty Uppercut
8.plot: Todd Hoffman suspects sabotage when the crew is hit by a water crisis; Parker Schnabel battles to move his monster wash-plant, "Sluicifer;" Tony Beets orders Monica to fire up her wash-plant, but a rookie mistake shuts them down.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E09 - Gold Bars and Hail Marys
8.plot: In Colorado, Todd's only hope for the season rests on a new claim, 'the jewellery box' - but has it already been mined out? And, Freddy drops a bombshell.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E10 - The Devil's Finger
8.plot: Parker Schnabel is halfway through the season, but nowhere near halfway his goal. Plus, Tony Beets is ready to barge the bucket line down the Yukon River.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E11 - The Holy Grail
8.plot: Todd discovers a historic mine site that could turn his season around; Tony mounts a massive operation to replace a 24-ton bucket line; Parker's parents arrive for his birthday bearing extraordinary gifts.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E12 - Eclipsed
8.plot: Todd's Colorado mine lies in the path of a rare solar eclipse, but he faces trouble with less than 800 ounces this season; Rick has bad news for Parker.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E13 - Lost Gold
8.plot: Hunter Hoffman makes a rookie mistake that causes dysfunction in the team. Tony Beets has to improvise to tear down his second dredge. Parker Schnabel risks damaging his washplant as he races to finish his last cut at Scribner Creek.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E14 - The Father, The Son & The Holy Roller
8.plot: Parker Schnabel's opens a brand-new cut, but his crew gets stuck in the mud. Todd tries to get Hunter back on the team to assemble a new wash-plant and Tony's stuck up the creek without a barge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E15 - Broken
8.plot: Parker Schnabel moves a massive wash plant on his own. Todd Hoffman races to set up his new trommel and faces a medical emergency, while Tony Beets' daughter makes a $200,000 mistake.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E16 - Of Monsters and Men
8.plot: Parker threatens to shut down Rick's Indian River operation after the production dives. Disaster strikes the Beets crew while Kevin is gone visiting his girlfriend. Todd's crew scours the mountainside for gold after he gives them a shocking ultimatum.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E17 - Gold Rush: Parker v Beets
8.plot: Parker Schnabel and Tony Beets are locked in a fierce battle for independence and supremacy. The deep rivalry between the gold-mining prodigy and the Kind of the Klondike has produced some of the series' most dramatic moments.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E18 - Planes, Cranes, and Virgin Claims
8.plot: Parker suspects Tony of sabotage on his new ground and confronts him. Todd's new washplant hits the noise limits for local regulations and they must find a bush fix to solve the problem. Tony Beets takes on his biggest challenge yet in tearing down his second dredge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E19 - King Kong
8.plot: Parker buys his first Klondike claim, but gets an unpleasant surprise when he test pans it. Todd uses chemical ingenuity to break a monster boulder apart that stands in his way to gold. Tony nearly loses a crew member as he is tearing down his second dredge.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E20 - Independence Day
8.plot: Tony's dredge teardown hits a wall when they attempt to remove the heaviest piece. Hunter Hoffman demands a change of mine site if they're going to have a future. Parker makes a bid for independence on his own claim, but Tony stands in the way.

8.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S08E21 - The Spoils of War
8.plot: Judgement day on Parker and Todd's 100-ounce bet; while Parker chases a record-breaking total, Todd desperately tries to keep his crew from falling apart. Tony struggles to get his dredge to Dawson before the Yukon River freezes over.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E01 - Declaration of Independence
9.plot: New mine boss Rick gathers together his crew of greenhorns & arrives in the Yukon ready to start his season. Parker and Tony face off over royalties and land access in a confrontation that threatens to end one of their seasons before it's even begun.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E02 - Smoked Out
9.plot: Rick faces mutiny from his crew of greenhorns. Parker visits his parents for advice and makes a decision affects the rest of his season. Tony's barge hits trouble on its way back to Dawson to finally begin the rebuild of his second monster dredge.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E03 - Gods and Monsters
9.plot: Rick hunts for a new washplant with his crew. With Parker's ground frozen he must find a way to mine the gold to pay his deposit to Tony. Tony orders son Kevin to train up a new dredgemaster, but a vital piece gets damaged and brings them to a halt.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E04 - Durt Reynolds
9.plot: Disaster strikes when Rick fires up his washplant for the first time. Parker tries a risky plan to keep the gold coming in and must decide on a new foreman to replace Rick. Tony must transport his tug Kid Commando to the dock for a crucial stability test.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E05 - The Return of Freddy Dodge
9.plot: Rick drafts a Gold Rush vet and former member of team Hoffman to save his season. Tony and Monica fire up their wash plant as they start to battle Parker to beat him to the gold.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E06 - Hoffman's Ghosts
9.plot: New mine boss Rick is buckling under debt and if he's going to prove himself to his crew he needs to get his first gold weigh; Parker attempts a treacherous river crossing; Tony Beets hits a snag removing a massive piece of his dredge.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E07 - Hazard Pay
9.plot: Parker hires a new driver that isn't as experienced as he claims. Elsewhere, one of Tony's dredges sinks into a pond, and he clashes with son Kevin over how to rescue it.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E08 - Stormageddon
9.plot: Heavy rainfall for several days causes problems for Parker and Rick. Elsewhere, Tony's second dredge upriver proves more difficult than expected.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E09 - Megamorphosis
9.plot: Parker battles to save his season when his biggest wash plant collapses. Rick makes a shocking discovery about his gold mining claim and turns to his dad for help. Tony races to finish dismantling his dredge but a crucial piece comes crashing down.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E10 - Father's Day
9.plot: Rick Ness and his father, Rick Senior, battle together to open a new cut; Parker struggles with mechanical breakdowns, and a crew member suffers a terrible injury; Tony races to dismantle the final sections of his million-dollar dredge.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E11 - The Resurrection
9.plot: The flu brings Parker's operation to its knees, and it's up to foreman Dean to keep the claim running; Rick's mechanic, Carl, behaves strangely and reveals shocking news; Tony hits rock bottom as his entire operation grinds to a halt.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E12 - The Devil's Deadline
9.plot: A desperate Rick is forced to ask Tony for help; Tony hauls the final piece of his million-dollar second dredge from Thistle Creek and prepares to rebuild it

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E13 - Sucker Punch
9.plot: Rick discovers he's been losing gold after Freddy Dodge points out a major flaw in his wash plant; with his excavator down, Parker risks moving his wash plant with a dozer.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E14 - Old School Heroes
9.plot: Parker leaves Brennan in charge of one section of the mine, with mixed results. Meanwhile, Rick damages his water pipe with some careless excavation work.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E15 - Wedding Bells & Emergency Operations
9.plot: The Beets family celebrates as Monica gets married; while Tony is happy for his daughter, he is also stressed to be taking time off while behind on his gold target.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E16 - Broken Bones
9.plot: Parker crashes a boat resulting in a terrible injury; frozen ground and machine failure threaten Rick’s season; Tony and his family finally rebuild his second dredge; the Dakota Boys discover a rich nugget trap.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E17 - Make It Rain
9.plot: Desperate Parker pushes wash plant Sluicifer beyond the limit; Tony attempts a dangerous crane operation

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E18 - Big Red Is Dead
9.plot: Parker closes in on his $7.2 million target, but wash plant Big Red runs out of pay dirt; Rick strives to reach his goal

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E19 - Cold War
9.plot: Parker's parents visit and offer help; Rick continues to battle frozen ground to reach his goal; shocking news forces Tony to make a drastic decision about his season

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E20 - Brace for Impact
9.plot: Tony races to finish his second dredge; Parker makes a risky move; Rick’s crew fights harder than ever to reach their goal; the Dakota Boys find a new mine site that has massive gold potential.

9.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S09E21 - Fire and Ice
9.plot: Rick desperately tries to get the last 27 ounces he needs to hit his target. Meanwhile, Tony finds out his dredge is short 30 buckets.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E01 - Crisis in the Klondike
10.plot: A crisis in the Klondike forces Tony, Parker and Rick to make massive gambles to strike it rich and must now hunt for gold on new grounds. The setback hits at the worst time as the price of gold spikes, which sparks a new gold rush to the area.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E02 - A New Rush Begins
10.plot: Parker bets millions on his crew sluicing in record time and is forced to make a decision when things don't go as planned. Rick rushes to fire up his washplant and find big nuggets. A showdown on the Indian River sends a Klondike legend scrambling.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E03 - The Nugget Hunter
10.plot: Rick and his dad fly high into Keno mountains on a treasure hunt for massive nuggets. Tony and Monica investigate a gold hot spot the old dredges may have missed. Parker makes a big decision about his crew that could determine the fate of his season.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E04 - Leave No Gold Behind
10.plot: Parker second guesses the ground he's mining and questions his new foremen. Tony Beets makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E05 - We're Gonna Need a Bigger Bucket
10.plot: Parker takes on a huge engineering challenge. Rick makes a major upgrade to his mining operation. Mike and Monica team up to open up more ground.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E06 - Monster Red Lives
10.plot: As Rick continues to search for big nuggets, he buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy as well as his season. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E07 - Motherlode Mountain
10.plot: The Beets discover what could be the motherlode. Rick faces an impossible decision: mine gold or put together his new washplant. Parker tests his new co-foreman with the claims most important machine.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E08 - Washplant Wars
10.plot: Rick races to get Monster Red running after losing his only way to mine gold. A dangerous storm shuts down Parker's operation. The Beets family push to get Monica's potentially gold-rich cut up and running.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E09 - No Time for Redemption
10.plot: Tensions rise when Parker introduces a new crewmember and a radical plan. The Beets run a crucial test that could make or break the season. Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury and Fred decodes a gold mystery.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E10 - When the Levee Breaks
10.plot: Rick's season hangs in the balance when an engineering disaster shuts him down. Parker sinks a ton of money into a new claim. Tony gets a third operation running.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E11 - Rise of the Machines
10.plot: Rick tries to outsmart a vital piece of equipment that has a mind of its own. Parker splurges on a brand new toy to get more gold. The Beets bring in a hired gun to turn around the season.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E12 - Million-Dollar Pay Day
10.plot: Parker gambles big and splits his crew in search of a massive score. Rick calls in a mining legend to save his season. The Beets move heaven and earth to get all three kids bringing in gold. The Dirt returns and the miners answer all the burning questions.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E13 - Nuggets or Bust
10.plot: Rick brings in a secret weapon in his hunt for big nuggets. Tony's confronted with a catastrophic issue at his settling pond. Parker makes a risky decision when he hires a friend with no mining experience to help the crew get ahead.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E14 - Cornered
10.plot: After pulling the plug on his operation, Rick is thrown a lifeline that will determine the rest of his mining season. Parker and Tony battle frozen paydirt.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E15 - And Then There Was One
10.plot: The mining season is nearly over, and Rick Ness and his crew are making up for lost time. Plus, Tony goes off the beaten track in his search for gold.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E16 - Parker Doubles Down
10.plot: Parker makes a big move to double his output and bring in more gold. The Beets' face catastrophe when their only remaining operation grinds to a halt. Just as Rick gets Monster Red dialed in, huge rocks threaten to shut him down for good.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E17 - Rebellion at Duncan Creek
10.plot: As the problems keep mounting up for Rick, tempers fray at Duncan Creek. Parker pushes his crew too hard as he attempts to keep two washplants fed.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E18 - Frozen Treasure
10.plot: Parker struggles to keep up his record-breaking pace, while a huge mistake threatens Rick's operation. Monica hopes the ground has thawed so she can hit gold.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E19 - Bring in the Big Guns
10.plot: Rick confronts his landowners. Parker searches for new ground. Tony makes a big purchase.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E20 - Rally in the Valley
10.plot: Rick hits a gold layer that may save his season. Parker's crew take big risks in Death Valley. Tony turns a corner.

10.title: FR - Alaska : la ruée vers l'or - S10E21 - Last Gold
10.plot: Nearing the end of his season, Parker closes in on a record gold total. Rick bets on a new piece of ground to finish his season with some more gold. Tony turns to Hunter Creek for one final score.

meta.plot: Des passionnés sont prêts à tout, et surtout à mener une sérieuse compétition, afin d'arriver à extraire et amasser la plus grande quantité d'or possible, au coeur de sites miniers parmi les plus riches en Amérique.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E01 - Free Willy’s
1.plot: In the diesel world, no one has more fun or builds bigger, badder trucks than Dieselsellerz. They turn a rusty 1948 Willy’s Jeep into a diesel-drinking monster for a new client & find the next giveaway truck at a gas station: a pristine LBZ Duramax.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E02 - Tows Before Bros...
1.plot: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to salvage their Duramax giveaway after it goes up in flames.  Heavy D ignores Redbeard’s strict budget restrictions to turn their company tow truck into a tricked out, lifted monster.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E03 - Hell Camino
1.plot: When The Muscle buys a battered El Camino to fix and flip, it might be too big a job for even the Dieselsellerz team to transform it. Heavy D and Diesel Dave find their next giveaway truck- a Ford F650 that’s a perfect platform for pure power.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E04 - Truck vs. Train
1.plot: Heavy D comes up with a plan to rid the world of minivans by making and selling a mini version of Dieselsellerz’ legendary MegaRam. The F650 giveaway reveal will stretch the power of diesel to the limit when the F650 tries to pull an entire train.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E05 - The Hole-y Grail
1.plot: A client asks Heavy D & his crew to turn his beat-up work truck into an off-road mobile service station. Heavy D searches for the next giveaway truck, & Diesel Dave finds the Holy Grail: a 2nd generation, quad cab Dodge with a 12-valve diesel engine.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E06 - From Sweden With Love
1.plot: The Dieselsellerz are cranking out their next giveaway: a quad cab Dodge with a 12-valve. When Black Rhino tools asks the guys for a show-stopping build for a trade show, they pull out all the stops- including importing a surprise from Sweden.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E07 - Abominable SnowRam
1.plot: The Dieselsellerz are pulling out all the stops to build a cool hybrid for their good friend and stunt driver Tanner Godfrey. Meanwhile, time is running out for Heavy D to find a show stopping build for the upcoming SEMA trade show in Vegas.

1.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S01E08 - Busting At The SEMA
1.plot: Last year the Dieselsellerz put their insane builds on the map when they debuted their legendary MegaRam at the SEMA trade show in Vegas. With less than two weeks to go, it’s all hands on deck to finish a 6-wheel drive F550 in time for the big show.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E01 - Callout Fallout
2.plot: When the frame on Heavy D's "quick flip" is unsalvageable, he decides to turn it into the ultimate mud truck. Chavis gets more than he bargained for when he's invited to bring his custom race truck to the Call Out Challenge truck competition.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E02 - There Will Be Mud
2.plot: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew work to finish their epic monster mud truck for the giveaway, and The Muscle scrambles to find a buyer for the flashy Denali he bought without Heavy D's permission.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E03 - Feed the Beast-Mode
2.plot: Sick of the ridicule on social media, Heavy D decides to finally finish the "Fail of the Year" UTV. And the gridiron comes to the garage when NFL legend Marshawn Lynch asks the guys to build him a Beastmode UTV.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E04 - Hummer Time
2.plot: When Redbeard challenges Heavy D to repurpose some old inventory, Heavy decides to marry a stretched 6 door F650 with a camper to create the ultimate expedition vehicle. And the guys buy a Hummer H1 from a mysterious mountain man.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E05 - Motors and Rotors
2.plot: Heavy D, Diesel Dave and the Dieselsellerz crew scramble to finish a six-door stretched F650 Expedition Camper for a big client. And Heavy D shocks the team with his latest flip- a diesel-powered experimental helicopter.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E06 - Truck Norris
2.plot: The Diesel Sellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. But before they get into the build, legend Chuck Norris comes to tap them for a truck for his latest project.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E07 - Epic Fail of the Year
2.plot: The Dieselsellerz pick up a vintage fire truck to transform into a tow truck that can carry everyone in the shop. And Heavy D is determined to finish the endless Fail of the Year UTV build.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E08 - Somersault
2.plot: Heavy D decides to test the physics abilities of the shop and build a somersaulting truck to use for viral videos. And The Muscle takes over a flip from Heavy D and turns a Dodge Ram into a badass modern pop-up camper.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E09 - Flippin' Diesel
2.plot: The Diesel Brothers are up against the clock for their SEMA build: a replica Ford Bronco made from an F350 and an Excursion; Heavy D brings in physics help to make his dream of a somersaulting truck come true.

2.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S02E10 - Good Bros and Goodbyes
2.plot: The Dieselsellerz SEMA build hits a snag, and the guys scramble to find a replacement. They decide to rebuild and give away their most iconic build: The Megaram.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E01 - Race Against the Machine
FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E02 - 3 Axles and a Baby
FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E03 - Snow Job
3.plot: The Dieselsellerz are pulling out all the stops to completely rebuild the Super Six for a client; Heavy D faces a challenge when his neighbor asks him to turn a 5-ton military truck into a snow-demolishing plow.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E04 - Clash of the Titan
3.plot: The Dieselsellerz are pulling out all the stops to build a new giveaway: a Nissan Titan with a near-zero emission Cummins engine; Heavy D fulfills his lifelong dream to drive a truck in Monster Jam.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E05 - Wham, Bam, C10 Slam
FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E06 - Thunder or Lightning
3.plot: For the Dieselsellerz giveaway, Thunder vs. Lightning, two lifted F450s compete and the winner decides which one to take home; the guys continue turning a busted '69 Chevy C10 into a diesel low rider for a millionaire client.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E07 - Not So Easy Rider
3.plot: The guys face a huge challenge when a big dollar collector asks them to slam a 1969 Chevy C10; Heavy D and the guys are off to bike week at Sturgis to check out a one-of-a-kind hydrostatic diesel motorcycle.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E08 - Bros to the Rescue!
3.plot: The guys build an amphibious Sisu Nasu for the local sheriff; the next work truck giveaway: a Dodge 5500 with all the bells and whistles.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E09 - Hurricanes, Trucks and Snowmobiles
3.plot: Heavy D adds a second truck to their latest giveaway and comes up with a stunt to promote it: a race across a lake on snowmobiles. Then, the guys head to Houston with giant diesel trucks and supplies to help Hurricane Harvey victims.

3.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E10 -
FR - Diesel Brothers - S03E11 -

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E01 - Big Bro Bus
4.plot: A new client asks for the biggest build yet: a monster school bus capable of driving over sand and water. Later, the Muscle brings in his own client build for a gym buddy, a Raptor-style F250.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E02 - School Is in Session
4.plot: A new client asks for a monster school bus capable of driving over sand and water; Redbeard discovers the Mello Yello racecar from the "Days of Thunder" movie and finds the perfect buyer for it.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E03 - 2 Wheel Drive
4.plot: A client asks Heavy D and his crew to turn a Ford F550 into a tough 6x6 farm truck that's also a rolling showcase for biodiesel fuel; Heavy D uses the power of physics to drive a truck on just two wheels.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E04 - Yo Soy Diesel
4.plot: A client asks Heavy D to turn a Ford F550 into a tough 6x6 farm truck that's also a showcase for biodiesel fuel; the guys make their dreams come true when they build the first diesel Monster Jam truck.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E05 - Diesel Defender
4.plot: Major league pitcher Jacob deGrom needs his OBS Ford revamped. The guys convert a British Land Rover defender from right hand drive to left hand drive.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E06 - De-Ice Ice Baby
4.plot: The guys pull out all the stops on a build for their lawyer Cole-converting a rare Land Rover Defender from right hand drive to left hand drive. And Heavy D tries to get more money to the shop by parting out a military airplane de-icer.

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E07 - Yes Way, Jose
4.plot: The Diesel Brothers give a truck overhaul to a local dad who was harassed at a campsite when his F350 broke down. And the guys put together the shop's first-ever diesel Motorcycle, with a Magneto!

4.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S04E08 - Tuff Truck Takedown
4.plot: After Chet and Tyson of Goon Garage challenge the guys to a Tuff Truck race, Sparks Motors rebuilds a wasp-infested old Jeep, and the Goons rebuild a water-logged Blazer.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E01 - Soar Like a Diesel
5.plot: Heavy D and the crew transform a rundown Canadian logging truck into a maxed out, custom semi to transport their builds cross country. And Diesel Dave and the Muscle go head to head building two ultimate Diesel Daily Drivers for their next truck giveaway.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E02 - Diesel Dave is my Co-Pilot
5.plot: While the shop finishes the semi build, Heavy D moves full steam ahead with his plan to attempt a death-defying stunt in the Brodozer. To complement the jump, Heavy D plans a live giveaway inspired by one of their most popular builds, the US Duramax.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E03 - Now Departing: Diesel Air
5.plot: Heavy D buys a busted one-of-a-kind rock crawler and gives it the Sparks Motors treatment for a quick flip. Meanwhile, a friend commissions a 1,000 gallon fuel truck and two custom diesel-powered fertilizer spreaders for his helicopter business.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E04 - Raising Heli
5.plot: Heavy D attempts to salvage a wrecked overland camper from Europe he bought at auction; the team races to complete a 1,000-gallon fuel truck and two custom diesel-powered fertilizer spreaders for a helicopter operation.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E05 - Failure to Launch
5.plot: Heavy D continues trying to salvage a wrecked overland camper from Europe, hoping for a big payday; Sam designs a hub-centric, diesel-powered bicycle with spare and salvaged parts from the shop.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E06 - When Trucks Fly
5.plot: Professional off-road racer RJ Anderson enlists Heavy D to trick out his brand new Ford Raptor and add some serious towing capacity; the Diesel Brothers challenge the Goons Garage and Welder Up to a Tuff Truck rematch in Mesquite, Nev.

5.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S05E07 - Prepare for Liftoff
5.plot: The Diesel Brothers continue transforming their junkyard Bronco into an off-road beast for the Tuff Truck rematch against the Goons and Welder Up. Meanwhile, Heavy D customizes a brand new UTV so his friend can break a world record at the live event.

6.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S06E01 - Diesel Brothers Vs. The World
6.plot: The Diesel Brothers are back and this season premiere is bigger than ever. Get ready for a crazy night featuring an epic Blazer build, a wild race against a Lamborghini and a record breaking stunt - plus a huge announcement with the Dirty Mudder Truckers.

6.title: FR - Diesel Brothers - S06E02 - Blazer of Glory
6.plot: The Diesel Brothers complete their transformation on an old K5 Blazer and square body truck bed into the ultimate diesel-powered party on wheels. Meanwhile, Diesel Dave convinces Heavy D to give his El Camino what she needs to get back on the road.

meta.plot: Following the team at Dieselsellerz as they trick out trucks, work hard and play harder in the process. In the world of diesel vehicles, no one has more fun or builds bigger, badder trucks than Heavy D, Diesel Dave and their crew. Their mega builds and awesome truck giveaways are the stuff of diesel legend.
Dans cette série de téléréalité, des couples surmontent les obstacles pour célébrer leur amour avec un mariage surprise de rêve conçu en quelques jours par trois experts.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E01 - I Do-Over
1.plot: Marcus hopes to surprise Tiffany with her ideal wedding redo after a year of loss. With the trio's help, their event brims with happiness and healing.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E02 - Instant Family
1.plot: No clowns. Just a stunning gown — and a fun carnival-themed wedding — for a pregnant bride. That's Michael's wish for Alex and their growing brood.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E03 - Second Chances
1.plot: Hardship and heartbreak couldn't extinguish Nikko and Amber's love. Will they get another shot to wed their way — with tacos, dancing and a '90s vibe?

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E04 - Love at Any Age
1.plot: It took a long time for old-school lovebirds Mattie and Melvin to reconnect. Now they'll be together forever — if they can open up to each other.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E05 - Kindergarten Crush
1.plot: After a lifetime of building dreams from nothing, Joe longs to make it official with childhood bestie Kerry at a lavish Roaring '20s-style wedding.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E06 - In Sickness and in Health
1.plot: An online match leads to love for Jason and Jonathan. Now, after beating back cancer, they want a Christmas-inspired marriage — and more.

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E07 - Cinderella Wedding
1.plot: After struggling her whole life, Essie stood by Bruce when he was injured in a farming accident. Can he give her the fairy-tale wedding she deserves?

1.title: FR - Dis-lui oui - S01E08 - Me and My Guy
1.plot: Their love was undeniable, but Randy grapples with family judgment and being out and proud. Will Skyler get to throw him a bold, beautiful wedding?

meta.plot: Milan, 2030 : Diana Cavalieri est une agente double pour l'agence secrète Citadel, qui a infiltré Manticore, agence rivale qui a détruit Citadel il y a huit ans. Piégée derrière les lignes ennemies, Diana a l'opportunité de quitter l'agence à jamais, mais hésite à se fier à un allié inattendu : l'héritier de Manticore Italie, Edo Zani.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E01 - Split in Two
1.plot: 2030: in a gray and hyper-controlled Milan, Diana and Luca are sent on a mission to Lugano to spy on the exchange of a powerful weapon. Not far away, Edo Zani, Manticore Italy's heir, has to respond to an unexpected proposal from the head of Manticore France, Cecile. In the flashbacks, Diana investigates her parents' suspicious deaths when she meets Gabriele, a mysterious Citadel agent.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E02 - War
1.plot: Diana and Edo form a secret agreement and make their first move, but they underestimate Cecile's fierce reaction. While Manticore Italy is under attack, Ettore Zani has to step in to stop a war from breaking out. In the flashbacks, Diana completes her training with Gabriele and becomes a Citadel agent.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E03 - Together
1.plot: Ettore sends Edo and Diana to Sicily on a sensitive mission that threatens their alliance. However, under the Mediterranean sun, the two discover they are connected by much more than their objectives. Eight years earlier, Diana infiltrates Manticore and carries out her first mission.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E04 - The Zanis
1.plot: Diana is captured and struggles desperately to survive while Ettore has to make a hard decision in order to restore Manticore Italy's power, as memories resurface of the day when his relationship with Edo was shattered forever.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E05 - Attack
1.plot: Edo leads a group of agents in an attack on the Manticore France's headquarters in Paris. Just as Diana is about to get her hands on the weapon, she is forced to decide which side she is on, as she had to do eight years earlier, the night Citadel was destroyed.

1.title: FR - Citadel : Diana - S01E06 - Jupiter
1.plot: As Diana ponders her choice, Edo works on a powerful new weapon. Ettore tries to get closer to his son, playing one last, surprise card. In a flashback, the Zanis mourn Enrico while Diana realizes she's the last living Citadel agent.

1.title: FR - Une amie dévouée - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Following the devastating terrorist attacks in Paris, Chris seeks solace by joining a support group for survivors. However, as she becomes more involved, her mother begins to question her true motives.

meta.plot: La nuit du 13 novembre 2015, Christelle, comme le reste du pays est sous le choc. Le lendemain, elle prend contact en ligne avec plusieurs victimes directes ou collatérales et quand l’idée de créer une association de victimes prend forme, Christelle en devient la pierre angulaire. Mais elle vit dans le mensonge.

1.title: FR - Can I Tell You A Secret? - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: Three women start getting mocking messages from strangers on social media. No matter how much they block, report and ignore, the DMs keep on coming.

1.title: FR - Can I Tell You A Secret? - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: The women's voices are finally heard, and a suspect is called in for questioning — but with so little evidence, will he ever be brought to justice?

meta.plot: Trois femmes voient leurs vies bouleversées quand un harceleur infiltre leurs comptes sur les réseaux sociaux. Et elles ne représentent qu'une fraction de ses nombreuses victimes.

1.title: FR - Escape, 21 jours pour disparaître - S01E01 -
FR - Escape, 21 jours pour disparaître - S01E02 -

meta.plot: Onze participants se mettent dans la peau de fugitifs pendant 21 jours, durant lesquels ils vont devoir disparaître des écrans radars sur tout le territoire français. Une équipe d'experts sera à leur recherche. Pour les trois premiers binômes, le compte à rebours est lancé. Ils ont deux heures pour fuir avant que le commandant Caupenne et ses équipes d'experts se lancent à leur poursuite.
La série suit le célèbre dresseur de chiens d'Oakland, Jas Leverette, alors qu'il dirige l'un des meilleurs centres de dressage de chiens en Californie.

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E01 - Lady Macbeth
1.plot: Once living on the street, a three-legged pit bull now shows aggression with her new owner's friends. Can intense training give her a second chance?

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E02 - Diesel
1.plot: Adopted as a puppy, an excitable shepherd-husky mix longs for pack leadership and engagement — which raises deep-seated issues for an Oakland couple.

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E03 - Nino
1.plot: Even the sharpest protection dog can use regular refresher training. Jas visits boxer Andre Berto and his family to work with their beloved canine.

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E04 - Heaven
1.plot: This angelic-looking yet devilishly unpredictable Maltipoo means everything to a young boy. Jas teaches him to take the lead with the pampered pooch.

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E05 - Blue
1.plot: A couple who've both lost loved ones look to Jas for help in taking control of their rebellious pit bull puppy and turning his dominant energy around.

1.title: FR - Canine Academy - S01E06 - Lost And Found Dogs
1.plot: Jas extends a hand to a big, beleaguered rescue in the Mojave Desert and introduces a rehabbed hound to NFL player Marshawn Lynch and his goddaughter.

meta.plot: Familles nombreuses : la vie en XXL est un nouveau docu-réalité qui suit le quotidien exceptionnel desept familles nombreuses.Au départ ils avaient 1 enfant, puis un 2ème, un 3ème et la famille n'a cessé de s'agrandir...
