meta.plot: La designer Genevieve Gorder et l'expert immobilier Peter Lorimer expliquent aux propriétaires comment transformer leurs locations en biens spectaculaires rentables.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E01 - Seattle Houseboat
1.plot: A married couple's floating vacation rental goes from a claustrophobic money pit to a romantic waterfront retreat with a rooftop deck.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E02 - Malibu Beach House
1.plot: A widow's weathered seaside bungalow becomes a dazzling oceanfront villa with luxurious views and high-end amenities.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E03 - Austin Pool Pad
1.plot: A struggling property with a headstrong owner isn't turning a profit despite a pool, a charming exterior and the perfect location.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E04 - Brooklyn Brownstone
1.plot: A big and affordable Bed-Stuy rental caters to crowds. But it falls short on layout and design -- and connecting its guests to local attractions.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E05 - Paso Robles Wine Country Cottage
1.plot: A couple turns their dated vineyard cottage into an upmarket rental for destination weddings, unique experiences and elegant outdoor living.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E06 - Hudson River Carriage House
1.plot: A vacant carriage house with vintage charm is a blank canvas for business opportunity -- and an interior designer's dream.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E07 - Palm Springs Time Machine
1.plot: A colorful couple goes all-in on outrageous 1970s decor to turn their one-of-a-kind vacation rental into an upscale desert jewel.

1.title: FR - Venez chez moi, j'ai relooké ma maison - S01E08 - DC Firehouse
1.plot: A historic firehouse in the nation's capital gets a family-friendly makeover that honors its roots -- and its ties to the local community.

meta.plot: Roman Compte, un exilé cubain, est le directeur du tristement célèbre Mutiny Hotel, le centre de la scène de la cocaïne à Miami de la fin des années 1970 et du début des années 1980. Hôtel et discothèque, The Mutiny est le lieu de prédilection des gros joueurs, des narcos, des mannequins et des célébrités.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E01 - The Mutiny
1.plot: Roman Compte, general manager of Miami's wildly popular Mutiny Club, is forced by the DEA to spy on his estranged older brother Nestor Cabal, the city's biggest importer of cocaine.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E02 - The Orishas
1.plot: Nestor rallies Roman to attempt a daring rescue of Chucho, Nestor's right-hand man, from a local hospital. But if Chucho wakes up from his coma, he'll reveal Roman's secrets.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E03 - Día de los Muertos
1.plot: Roman spies on a Colombian guest at The Mutiny and uncovers a plot to kill Nestor and other prominent cocaine distributors, which would allow a new and dangerous Colombian cartel to take over Miami.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E04 - The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
1.plot: After a failed assassination attempt, Yolanda Guerra arrives from Colombia to take matters into her own hands. When she discovers Roman saved Nestor's life, the Colombians target Roman's family.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E05 - We're at War
1.plot: Roman moves his family to the safety of Nestor's mansion. They use a peace meeting with Yolanda and Don Henao as an opportunity to take them out and end the Colombian threat.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E06 - Homeland or Death
1.plot: Roman and Nestor are at the edge of a bloody war with the Colombians and accept the help of a corrupt Congressman to secure the import of the biggest shipment of coke ever to hit Miami's shores.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E07 - Estela
1.plot: Roman seeks owner Burton Greenberg's help with a landing spot for the cocaine. Zulio works with a corrupt banker to return Henao and Yolanda to the negotiating table. Nestor reveals a secret.

1.title: FR - Hotel Cocaine - S01E08 - The Price
1.plot: Roman and Nestor appeal to agent Zulio for help getting back Valeria. When the biggest coke shipment of all time arrives in Miami, they turn to an old friend for help.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E01 - Japanese Katana
1.plot: In this explosive new series, four bladesmiths will compete for $10,000 and the title of Forged in Fire champion. Across three grueling rounds, competitors design and forge deadly edged-weapons of war. Their work will be put to the test, and those that fail will be sent home. In the final round, the two remaining bladesmiths must forge one of the most iconic weapons from history; the Japanese Katana. Their swords will be pushed to the absolute limit…the final test will determine which is stronger; their Katanas or a speeding bullet?

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E02 - Chakram
1.plot: Four bladesmiths must forge a weapon using only reclaimed metal. With the clock winding down, two of the competitors are dramatically forced to improvise, and one almost doesn't make it through the round at all.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E03 - Viking Battle Axe
1.plot: The bladesmiths must transform a steel "train spring" into a weapon of their choosing. Only two competitors will move on and are given just five days to forge a legendary Viking Battle Axe. After a barbaric round of testing from the judges, only one man will be left standing.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E04 - Katar
1.plot: For this week's challenge the competitors create their signature blade by using the Hada technique--a traditional process that involves forging multiple layers of steel together. The pressure mounts as one of the smiths is pushed to his absolute breaking point.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E05 - Crusader Sword
1.plot: The forge heats up as our four bladesmiths struggle create a special Japanese hardening technique on their signature blades. After a difficult first round of testing, the remaining two bladesmiths head home with just five days to forge the legendary Crusader Sword.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E06 - The Elizabethan Rapier
1.plot: The forge heats up as the bladesmiths must use an age-old technique to create their signature weapons. But will their swords make the cut when the judges put them through a battery of tests? Two finalists head to their home forges to make one of history's most notorious weapons, the rapier, a sharply pointed sword that can kill with just one thrust.Source: History Channel

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E07 - The Roman Gladius
1.plot: A steel ball bearing ends up being transformed into a weapon. The finalists have to create a historically important blade called a Roman Gladius.

1.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S01E08 - The Moro Kris
1.plot: The bladesmiths must forge a signature weapon using everyday steel objects like ball bearings and shovels as their only source material. One contestant puts finishing his weapon before his own safety in a heated race to the finish. Only two competitors will move on and are given just five days to forge the mystical Moro Kris Sword--a distinctive blade that dates all the way back to 300 BC.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E01 - The War Hammer
2.plot: Our bladesmiths must choose wisely as they are asked to dumpster dive for the right steel to be turned into a hardened blade of their choosing. Will these blades hold up after a tough round of testing? Only two will move on to forge a War Hammer. After five days at their home forges, the smiths return hammers in hand to pound their way to victory. But in the end only one will nail the competition and be crowned the Forged in Fire champion.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E02 - Khopesh
2.plot: This week our bladesmiths are given a "twisted" challenge when they are asked to forge a weapon from cable steel. The competition slowly unravels as they handle this difficult steel. After two rounds only two are left to return home and forge an Egyptian Khopesh. Back at the forge their iconic weapons are put through their paces but only one can be crowned Forged In Fire champion.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E03 - The Scottish Claymore
2.plot: Four blade smiths face one of the most grueling challenges in Forged in Fire history when the electricity and power tools are taken away from them and they must forge a blade with just fire and their bare hands. They'll have just five days to create the iconic Scottish Claymore, the legendary weapon of William Wallace.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E04 - Spiked Shield
2.plot: Three is the magic number as our blade smiths are asked to forge three or more metals into a blade of their signature style. Despite pain and failure, two move on to the final round returning home to forge a legendary spiked shield. After a punishing round of testing only one emerges to be crowned the Forged in Fire Champion.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E05 - Viking Sword
2.plot: Four bladesmiths salvage material from a car and forge a blade, and then have five days to create a Viking sword.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E06 - Nepalese Kukri
2.plot: Four different types of metal are shaped into deadly weapons, and then bladesmiths forge a machete-like Nepalese kukri.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E07 - The Shotel
2.plot: Four bladesmiths face the unpredictable challenge of taking high carbon steel and wrought iron and forging these two conflicting materials into a fully functional weapon. After a formidable round of testing, only two will move on to the final round where they'll have just five days to create one of the most beautifully designed blades in history, the Ethiopian Shotel. Will this uniquely shaped blade throw them a curveball or will one be able to hook themselves the title of Forged in Fire champion?

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E08 - The Cutlass
2.plot: The bladesmiths have to convert some failed blades from last season into fully-functional weapons.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E09 - Khanda
2.plot: The bladesmiths need to create a weapon in their signature style from a large pile of mixed metal that is welded together.

2.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S02E10 - Tabar
2.plot: Four bladesmiths must take an ordinary garden lawnmower and using its metal to bend and shape to their will, create one of their signature blades. When the other contestants are mowed down in the competition, two will make it to the final round where they must create a Tabar, a deadly battle axe from Southern Asia. After a series of grueling tests, only one will survive the cut to be named the Forged in Fire champion.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E01 - Champion Edition / Scottish Claymore
3.plot: Season 3 begins with the return of four champions who are charged with making a high-carbon-steel inlay. Then, two finalists are challenged to forge a Scottish Claymore, which has stumped previous contestants.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E02 - Fan Favorites / Hook Sword
3.plot: Four former contestants, back in the Forge by popular demand, return for a second shot at victory and redemption in an all new challenge full of unexpected twists. Competition gets heated right away when they are forced to make their signature style blades with materials from a surprising source. After two rounds of grueling competition, only two smiths are left to take on the final challenge of recreating a weapon they've never seen before: The Hook Sword. This complex weapon gives both fan favorites a run for their money, but only one will hook the crown and take home $10,000.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E03 - Butterfly Swords
3.plot: Four new contestants must choose wisely as they try to craft a blade of their signature style from a pile of tools, both old and new. Then the stakes are doubled when, for the first time ever, they must forge not one, but two swords in the final round. Crafting Chinese Butterfly Swords, our final two bladesmiths face twice the work, and twice the pressure, in their attempt to claim the title of Forged in Fire champion.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E04 - The Falcata
3.plot: Four bladesmiths must create a blade out of high carbon steel while also forging the hammer they'll use to make it. After an extraordinary round of testing, only two move on to the final round where they'll have just five days to create a weapon known for its deadly prowess against armored soldiers--the Falcata. Will the blade's unique handle shape leave them open to a devastating blow, or will one smith be able to slice their way to the $10,000?

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E05 - Kora Sword
3.plot: Four new bladesmiths step up to the challenge of forging blades using pieces of steel harvested from some monstrous power tools. While some smiths excel under the pressure, others are pushed to the limits of exhaustion in the heat of the Forge. After a vigorous round of testing, the final two go toe-to-toe in creating a sacrificial sword from history which could reportedly cut a sheep in half with one swing. After a formidable battle in the finale, only one will earn the title Forged in Fire Champion and take home $10,000.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E06 - Hunga Munga
3.plot: Four new bladesmiths have their creativity put to the test when they are tasked with making a serrated blade out of only the tools from the table in front of them. They must harvest enough steel to forge the blade, but without melting down a crucial tool they might need later. Then, the final two bladesmiths attempt to forge a Hunga Munga--a behemoth weapon where all four edges must maintain peak performance when put through the judges' gauntlet. Which bladesmith will prove worthy of a check for $10,000 and the title of Forged in Fire Champion?

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E07 - The Boar Spear
3.plot: Four bladesmiths must use the steel from a suit of armor to create a signature blade. After a tense round of testing, only two move on to the final round where they'll have just five days to create a weapon historically used for both combat and hunting--the boar spear.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E08 - Xiphos Sword
3.plot: When a group of new bladesmiths enter the forge, they're met with a challenge they never saw coming. They must grab the steel they'll use to make their blades from an imposing piece of construction equipment. This isn't the kind of scrap metal they're used to harvesting and just pulling the right type of steel proves to be a bigger task than any of them anticipate. After an intense round of testing, two remaining smiths face off to recreate a classic Greek sword used in close quarters combat. With a $10,000 prize on the line, both smiths turn out impressive blades for a final round of testing, but the Gods will choose only one to be crowned Forged in Fire Champion.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E09 - The Pandat
3.plot: Four blade smiths must salvage steel from a junkyard to create a signature blade using a hand-cranked coal forge.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E10 - Zulu Iklwa
3.plot: Four new bladesmiths are put to the test when they must forge a bayonet blade and engineer it to attach to a rifle. After a round of grueling tests on their bayonets, the final two bladesmiths are sent home to spend five days forging the legendary African blade, the Zulu Iklwa. Will both bladesmiths fall, or will one stand a cut above to be crowned the Forged in Fire champion?

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E11 - Champions Edition / The Pata
3.plot: Over the course of three seasons, 26 bladesmiths have been crowned Forged in Fire champion. Tonight, prior winners return to prove who among them is the best of the best by forging a blade using canoe damascus. After two high octane rounds of competition, the two remaining champions will move to the final round where they must create a weapon known for its unique mechanics and deadly double-edged blade--the Pata. With $10,000 and their reputation on the line, which smith will survive the judges' brutal testing to once again be crowned Forged in Fire champion?

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E12 - The Zweihander
3.plot: Four competitors must forge weld blades for friction folders from tiny cubes of steel. After hammering through the testing, two smiths will return home where they will forge a German Zweihander. Due to its long length and use on the battlefield, they take their Zweihanders outside the forge to be tested, where only one will be crowned Forged in Fire Champion.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E13 - Cavalry Saber
3.plot: Four new bladesmiths face the unprecedented challenge of forging the barrel of a gun into a lethal knife. After a round of brutal testing, the final two bladesmiths return home where they have five days to forge one of the most legendary blades in combat history, the Cavalry Saber.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E14 - The Naginata
3.plot: Four blade smiths must create a signature blade using a randomly chosen mystery technique. After a brutal round of testing, only two will return to their home forges where they will reproduce a Japanese Naginata. Famous for its long length and use in martial arts, the smiths take their Naginatas outside the forge to be tested. Only one will survive and be crowned Forged in Fire Champion.

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E15 - The Haladie
3.plot: For the first time ever, four bladesmiths must use high carbon steel to forge a hatchet. After an intense round of testing, only two can chop their way to the final round where they'll have just five days to create an ancient Indian weapon used to both stab and slice. Will the double-edged Haladie wound both of the finalists, or can one be singled out and crowned Forged in Fire champion?

3.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S03E16 - Redemption / Viking Sword
3.plot: Four previously eliminated bladesmiths return to the forge for a shot at redemption, but they face a challenge that will make their climb to the top more difficult than they imagined. After two rounds of competition with shocking eliminations, the two remaining smiths face off to recreate a sword known for its devastating strength--the Viking sword. With $10,000 on the line, which smith will survive a grueling round of testing and finally be crowned Forged in Fire champion?

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E01 - Judges Pick
4.plot: The judges pick past bladesmiths to represent them; first, the smiths must use steel from N.Y.C. streets to forge signature blades. In the final round, the competitors have five days to forge a sword that originated in West Africa, the Ida.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E02 - Deer Horn Knives
4.plot: Four bladesmiths tee up for a never-before seen challenge, harvesting steel from a vintage golf club to forge signature blades. In the final round, the remaining smiths must forge a pair of iconic double bladed weapons with two times the edge.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E03 - The Katzbalger
4.plot: For the first time ever, the competitors are challenged with creating not one, but two blades in the first round. After a grueling second round, the two remaining smiths have just five days to create an iconic 15th century combat sword–the Katzbalger.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E04 - Makraka
4.plot: Four bladesmiths face a new twist in the first round when they learn they can’t forge any blade in their own style, they must forge a karambit, a curved knife that resembles a claw. The final two competitors have five days to forge one of the deadliest weapons in African history–the Makraka.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E05 - Fans' Choice
4.plot: Chosen by fans, four bladesmiths return for a second shot at victory. The smiths must use their best forging techniques to make a signature blade using barbed wire; the final two smiths craft a historical Filipino weapon of war, the Panabas.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E06 - Akrafena
4.plot: Bladesmiths are tasked with forging a Kukri, the signature blade of master smith and judge, Jason Knight. After two rounds of mishaps and mischief, two smiths forge ahead in the final challenge to reproduce a distinctive African sword, the Akrafena.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E07 - Talwar
4.plot: A new group of competitors face the unknown when they are tasked with using odd shapes of mystery steel to forge a blade in their signature style. All four smiths fight to the finish amidst painful injuries and setbacks, but only two make it through to the final round. With just five days to recreate the sacred but lethal Talwar sword, which smith will defy all odds to claim the title of Forged In Fire Champion and $10,000 prize?

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E08 - The Cinquedea
4.plot: Four bladesmiths are welcomed to the forge with a curveball–they must utilize questionable steel from mining tools to forge a blade in their signature style. Ultimately, two smiths survive to forge an intricately designed and deadly Italian sword–the Cinquedea.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E09 - The Charay
4.plot: The competitors must demonstrate edged-weapon mastery when they are tasked with turning salvaged junkyard steel into a weapon. Two forge ahead to the final round to recreate the legendary Charay sword.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E10 - Sword Breaker Redemption
4.plot: Four competitors return to the forge for a second chance; they must forge their signature blades using recycled steel from a jackhammer. Then, the finalists must recreate a distinctive 16th-century blade called the Sword Breaker.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E11 - Master & Apprentice
4.plot: Masters compete alongside their apprentices as they take turns on the forge floor, fusing their skills to forge a cleaver using the arduous jellyroll technique; in the final round, the smiths must forge a deadly Congolese chopper, the Nzappa Zap.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E12 - Ngombe Ngulu
4.plot: Four bladesmiths must forge blades from a giant elevator cable; two finalists return home to recreate the African Ngombe Ngulu, known as the executioner's sword.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E13 - The Shamshir
4.plot: Four competing bladesmiths are tasked with forging a bowie knife that will require a d-guard in the second round; only two manage to make it through to the final round where they must recreate a deadly saber called the Shamshir.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E14 - The Kachin Dao
4.plot: Smiths must use steel from old nautical equipment to forge-weld their signature blades, while being forced to do it using a metal inlay technique; then, the two finalists have just five days to forge the Kachin Dao, a deadly headhunting sword.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E15 - The Gladiators' Scissor
4.plot: With a variety of steels to choose from, the smiths are forced to create a canister Damascus billet from which they must forge a dagger; only two enter the final round where they must recreate an ancient Roman weapon known as the Scissor.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E16 - The Kampilan
4.plot: Four bladesmiths head to a scrap yard to create their signature blades using harvested metal and a coal forge; in the final round, the smiths must re-create a fearsome battle weapon known as the kampilan.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E17 - The Kpinga
4.plot: The smiths are forced to layer a complex Damascus pattern into their signature-style blades; broken blades fall throughout two challenges and an unforgiving round; finalists must recreate a three-bladed African throwing knife called the Kpinga.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E18 - The Yatagan
4.plot: The competition shifts into high gear when the smiths are tasked with turning the rusted steel from a 1971 Mercury Cougar into their signature blades in just three hours; the finalists must create an elite military weapon known as the Yatagan.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E19 - International Championship / The Spadroon
4.plot: Four of the top smiths from around the world compete in an international championship; two smiths return home empty handed, while two go on to recreate the Spadroon, a weapon that transcends borders, in their efforts to bring home the title.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E20 - Tabar-Shishpar
4.plot: Smiths are asked to forge blades from pipe wrenches; two competitors advance to the final round during which they must recreate a rare axe-mace hybrid known as the Tabar-Shishpar.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E21 - Ultimate Champions Edition
4.plot: Five returning champions must earn a spot at one of the four anvils; the four remaining smiths are given cubes to forge blades in the infamous canister Damascus challenge; then, the finalists return to their home forges to recreate the Tai Chi sword.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E22 - Knights Templar
4.plot: Four brave smiths are thrown for a loop when they must forge together rusty chain mail and high quality steel to produce Knights Templar Crusader Daggers in Round 1.

4.title: FR - Forged in Fire - S04E23 - Viking Edition
4.plot: Four brave competitors march into a dry moat where they must resurrect old swords and forge them into a Viking Seax, using the time-tested coal forge. With hammers in full swing and multiple obstacles in their path, the smiths exhaust every ounce of their strength to produce weapons fit to withstand any test imaginable. In the final challenge, the remaining two smiths voyage home to recreate a pair of deadly Viking War Axes in their final fight for the coveted title of Forged In Fire champion.

meta.plot: Competitors re-create weapons from historical periods ranging from Japanese katanas to medieval broadswords to ancient throwing blades. Each entry is judged on its artistry as well as its functionality and accuracy.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E01 - Qualifier 1: Ready to Launch
1.plot: The amped-up drivers get their first experience on the course, but not everyone has what it takes to dominate behind the wheel.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E02 - Qualifier 2: Roll the Dice
1.plot: A millionaire with a Lamborghini, a truck driver in a stock Mustang and a slew of other racers in tricked-out rides push each other to new extremes

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E03 - Qualifier 3: Enter the Assassin
1.plot: The qualifying rounds continue with the craziest obstacle yet and six new racers. The standout is a 21-year-old nicknamed the Baby-Faced Assassin.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E04 - Qualifier 4: Go Hard or Go Home
1.plot: The qualifying rounds continue with the craziest obstacle yet and six new racers. The standout is a 21-year-old nicknamed the Baby-Faced Assassin.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E05 - Knockout 1: Head to Head
1.plot: As the knockout round begins, the drivers must prove themselves on a newly redesigned course. But not everyone's car survives the chaos.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E06 - Knockout 2: Checkers or Wreckers
1.plot: A new obstacle humbles the racers -- even one indomitable driver. Another contestant's overconfidence proves costly on the track.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E07 - Knockout 3: Track Is Hot
1.plot: With the competition down to eight drivers, the track designers crank up the difficulty with a new obstacle that turns out to be alarmingly dangerous.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E08 - Wild Card: A Chance at Redemption
1.plot: A few old favorites return to the course for a series of head-to-head battles. The prize: a second chance at glory.

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E09 - Semifinal: Last Chance
1.plot: The course is downright diabolical. The margin for error is thinner than ever. The finale is nearly here. Go, drivers, go!

1.title: FR - Hyperdrive - S01E10 - Finale: The Monster
1.plot: It all comes down to this. The top six drivers race through nine obstacles to determine the ultimate champion on four wheels.

meta.plot: Elite street racers from around the world test their limits in supercharged custom cars on the biggest, baddest automotive obstacle course ever built.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E01 - Unusual Suspects
1.plot: Sheriff Jamey Noel sends seven volunteer civilians into jail to serve as undercover inmates.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E02 - First Timers
1.plot: Sheriff Jamey Noel's program is underway. Zac, a Marine, Tami, a police officer, Robert, a teacher, and Barbra, a stay-at-home mom, are the first participants in. Will they make it through the first 24 hours inside?

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E03 - Cell Shock
1.plot: Sheriff Jamey Noel adds two more members to his undercover team, Isaiah and Maryum. Undercover inmates try to adjust and fit in, while some question their decisions to be there.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E04 - Fight Face
1.plot: The final participant enters the experiment and Isaiah and Zac fears their covers have been blown; Zac searches for illegal drug use in C-pod; and Tami clashes with another inmate.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E05 - Friends Without Benefits
1.plot: Zac is called into court; Barbra abandons a friendship with Tami; and Jeff becomes a target after several mistakes.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E07 - Pod Drama
1.plot: Undercover program is put as risk when Jeff is attacked.; Zac and Isaiah move to the D-pod wing and Robert returns to general population. Tami's wife makes a surprise visit and Barbara feels betrayed.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E08 - Shakedown
1.plot: Men's D-pod wing drug activity leads to CERT raid, tensions mount as the halfway point approaches and women's F-pod experiences an outbreak of a contagious rash.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E09 - Alone for the Holidays
1.plot: Thanksgiving presents new opportunities and challenges for the six remaining participants, and one of them is pushed to a breaking point.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E10 - Institutionalized
1.plot: As the participants near the end of their time in jail, tension in F-Pod pushes one woman over the edge and compromises the program, while both men in D-Pod struggle to avoid criminal activity that may have serious consequences.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E11 - 11th Hour
1.plot: The five remaining participants try to finish up their final days inside jail as pressure builds within the pods.

1.title: FR - 60 Jours en prison - S01E12 - Exodus
1.plot: Three participants remain and one suffers a meltdown when a woman in F-Pod is released. Elsewhere: D-Pod sees a power struggle with a constant threat of violence.

meta.plot: Sept personnes volontaires vont être incarcérées dans la prison du comté de Clark, dans l'état de l'Indiana. Dans cette expérience, ils vont tenter de vivre aux côtés des autres prisonniers, auxquels ils ne doivent à aucun moment dévoiler leur identité afin de gagner leur confiance. Ils vont devoir être vigilant à chaque instant de leur détention. Et dans le même temps, ils vont servir d'informateurs dans le but d'évaluer les conditions d'incarcération et comprendre les rouages de l'actuel système pénitentiaire américain.

meta.plot: Dwayne Johnson redefines the athletic competition, giving exceptional men and women from all walks of life the chance to test their physical strength and mental fortitude for the chance to battle on Mount Olympus in hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E01 - Let The Titan Games Begin: Trials 1
1.plot: In Dwayne Johnson's athletic competition, exceptional men and women from all walks of life battle head-to-head in tests of physical strength and mental fortitude in hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E02 - The Titan Games Trials 2
1.plot: Dwayne Johnson invites eight competitors to test themselves on the most insane physical challenges ever - including one that's 30 feet above the ground - in the hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E03 - The Titan Games Trials 3
1.plot: Dwayne Johnson invites eight competitors to test themselves on the most insane physical challenges ever - including one that's 30 feet above the ground - in the hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E04 - The Titan Games Trials 4
1.plot: Dwayne Johnson invites eight competitors to test themselves on the most insane physical challenges ever - including one that's 30 feet above the ground - in the hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E05 - The Titan Games Trials 5
1.plot: Competitors battle opponents in head-to-head challenges designed by Dwayne Johnson, continuing to push their bodies to the limit in hopes of advancing to Mount Olympus and becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E06 - The Titan Games Trials 6
1.plot: Competitors battle opponents in head-to-head challenges designed by Dwayne Johnson, continuing to push their bodies to the limit in hopes of advancing to Mount Olympus and becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E07 - The Titan Games Trials 7
1.plot: Dwayne Johnson invites eight competitors to test themselves on the most insane physical challenges ever - including one that's 30 feet above the ground - in the hopes of becoming a Titan.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E08 - The Battle of the Titans
1.plot: The field of 64 athletes has been narrowed down to 16 elite Titans, who compete head-to-head for the chance to advance to the final and compete in the ultimate test on Mount Olympus.

1.title: FR - The Titan Games - S01E09 - The Titan Games Championship
1.plot: The field of 64 athletes has been narrowed down to eight elite Titans, who compete on Mount Olympus to determine the one man and one woman who will become the ultimate Titans.

2.title: FR - The Titan Games - S02E01 - The Titan Games Premiere
2.plot: The Central division faces off in a best-of-three competition; the winning male and female competitor each battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus: NFL Iron Man legend and Pro-Bowler Joe Thomas and boxing world champion Claressa Shields.

2.title: FR - The Titan Games - S02E02 - Central Regionals 2: The Rock Meets Doc Thor
2.plot: The competition continues with the Central division battling in head-to-head challenges; the winning male will face reigning Titan and NFL great Joe Thomas, and the winning female will challenge reigning Titan Chantae McMillan on Mt. Olympus.

2.title: FR - The Titan Games - S02E03 - Central Regional Finals
2.plot: Top Central division competitors face off in three-way battles with the winners advancing to a head-to-head challenge; the last athletes standing must defeat reigning Titans Joe Thomas and Dani Speegle on Mt. Olympus to advance to the championship.

2.title: FR - The Titan Games - S02E04 - West Region Premiere: NFL's Victor Cruz and Stuntwoman Jessie Graff
2.plot: The Western region begins with four new competitors vying for their chance to compete on Mt. Olympus; the winning male and female each battle a Pro-Athlete Titan on Mt. Olympus: NFL great Victor Cruz and American Ninja Warrior star Jessie Graff.

2.title: FR - The Titan Games - S02E05 - West Region 2: The True Meaning of a Titan
2.plot: The competition continues with athletes pushing themselves to the limit by battling in head-to-head challenges; in the Western division battles, Exodus Rogers goes up against Mitch Harrison, while Kelly Stone takes on Margaux Alvarez.

meta.plot: Sur une plage de Thaïlande, douze jeunes, plutôt habitués au confort moderne et aux boîtes de nuit, affrontent la nature et leurs peurs. Leur objectif : obtenir le titre de «meilleur aventurier», décerné à celui des candidats qui aura surmonté toutes les épreuves du jeu.

1.plot: Qualification for the FIFA World Cup brings pressure to some of the biggest names in football. Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang prepares Gabon to take on Mo Salah's Egypt in a crucial match.

1.plot: Luka Modric returns to the Croatia squad after injury, while the Lebanon team prepares for a rare home fixture.

1.title: FR - Captains - S01E04 - Tell the Man to put on his Shirt
1.plot: Vanuatu travel to Qatar for an Oceania qualification event postponed due to Covid-19. Aubameyang must help a team-mate with a crisis of confidence.

1.title: FR - Captains - S01E05 - Everyone wants me to be a Superhero
1.plot: Must win games for Brazil, Croatia and Lebanon as the pressure to get to the FIFA World Cup ramps up. Modric mentors the new crop of internationals coming through the squad.

1.title: FR - Captains - S01E06 - What if we don’t Qualify?
1.plot: Crunch time for Croatia. Papa Aubameyang steps up and a new coach tries to revitalise the Jamaica side.

meta.plot: Six captains from six different confederations attempt to qualify for the 2022 World Cup in Qatar.

meta.plot: Quand ils découvrent qu'un complot mondial met en danger les dinosaures… et leur propre existence, les membres de la Colo du Crétacé se retrouvent pour élucider le mystère.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E01 - Aftershock
1.plot: Years after escaping the dangers of Isla Nublar, Darius and friends are living among dinosaurs again — all while processing a devastating loss.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E02 - Rest Stop
1.plot: A frightening chase fuels Ben's theory that the Nublar Six are being hunted... but by whom? Darius agrees to go to Texas.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E03 - Down on the Ranch
1.plot: Uninvited guests disrupt a happy reunion on Sammy's ranch. A mysterious map contains a cryptic clue from Brooklynn — but what does it mean?

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E04 - Brothers
1.plot: The crew arrives in Colorado to warn Kenji, who's still punishing Darius about the past. Sammy and Ben leave the group to go look for Yaz.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E05 - Halfway Home
1.plot: Ben and Sammy make a pit stop for snacks at King Dino's Prehistoric Playland. Kenji confronts his father, who gives him an ultimatum.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E06 - Free Fall
1.plot: A surprised Yaz welcomes Sammy and Ben to a protected island and gives them a tour. But is it really a "dinosaur-free zone" — or too good to be true?

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E07 - That Night
1.plot: It's a night of revelations for Kenji and Darius when a mysterious stranger tells them everything he knows. Meanwhile for the others, it's sink or swim.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E08 - The Drop
1.plot: Ben, Yaz and Sammy search for answers at the DPW — and find an old friend. Darius and Kenji make a shocking discovery on Brooklynn's phone.

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E09 - Into the Fog
1.plot: Following trucks through foggy weather, the friends arrive at a warehouse packed with dinosaurs. It's a huge operation... but who's behind it?

1.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S01E10 - The End of the Beginning
1.plot: Confusion, chaos — and a deadly confrontation. The Camp Fam's so close to solving the mystery. But first, they'll have to fight for their lives.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E01 - Batten Down the Hatches
2.plot: Stowed away aboard a ship stacked with dinosaurs, the Camp Cretaceous crew stays hidden from danger — until stormy weather forces a change in plans.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E02 - The Marooned Five
2.plot: On dry land, the gang meets a family of farmers with unusual livestock. But where in the world could they be? Ben searches for signal to confirm a hunch.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E03 - Cl3v3rGr186
2.plot: A series of flashbacks reveals what happened in the days leading up to Brooklynn's violent attack — and the events that occurred immediately after.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E04 - The Adjustment
2.plot: Brooklynn goes undercover to gather important intel about the broker. Back in Senegal, Aminata and Darius urge Zayna out of her comfort zone.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E05 - Troubled Waters
2.plot: Zayna leads her new friends upriver through unsettling waters. After weeks of tracking her target in Dubai, Brooklynn comes face to face with danger.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E06 - Up the River
2.plot: Kenji's behavior sparks concern when the friends run into trouble on the river. Brooklynn's ready to do whatever it takes to keep the Camp Fam safe.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E07 - All Night Long
2.plot: The friends are forced to turn back in the dark of night when they realize they've left Yaz behind... but she's definitely not alone.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E08 - Lab Partners (1)
2.plot: The Camp Fam follows a hidden river bend to a chicken farm crawling with secrets. Separated from the group, Ben and Kenji look for Bumpy's egg.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E09 - Lab Partners (2)
2.plot: Familiar events play out from a different perspective as Brooklynn makes moves to protect her friends from inside the belly of the beast.

2.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S02E10 - Reunion
2.plot: Broken trust. Betrayal. Disbelief. Emotions run high for the Nublar Six as they reunite under extraordinary circumstances. But where will they go from here?

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E01 - Excess Baggage
3.plot: Still reeling from the shock of seeing Brooklynn, Darius and the gang encounter a familiar face who may offer answers — or put the group in more danger.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E02 - Villa Paradiso
3.plot: After landing in Italy, Ben leads the way to a safe location. Darius tries to distract Kenji from worrying about Bumpy's egg.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E03 - The Queen's Court
3.plot: Brooklynn and Santos head to Malta to meet their new partner. Back in Italy, the friends investigate the origins of a mysterious feather.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E04 - Fire in the Piazza
3.plot: With a dinosaur on the loose, the Camp Fam crew pulls together to find it. Elsewhere, Santos wonders whether her allies can be trusted.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E05 - Boiling Over
3.plot: While Brooklynn looks for friends in Malta's black market, a divided Camp Fam debates whether to track her down — or stay behind.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E06 - Undercover
3.plot: The gang breaks into groups to pull off a complicated mission. A run-in at the catacombs leaves Brooklynn questioning her goals… and her methods.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E07 - Decisions, Decisions
3.plot: It's time to pick a side. Brooklynn turns to old friends to help take Santos down. Meanwhile, a roadblock puts some of the others in serious danger.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E08 - No Escape
3.plot: While Ben, Darius and Yaz wait for backup, Sammy, Kenji and Gia follow a trail of feathers back toward town. Brooklynn makes an unusual alliance.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E09 - Active Pursuit
3.plot: Split up and battling separate dangers, the Nublar Six rush to complete their mission and set things right. The trickiest part? Staying alive.

3.title: FR - Jurassic World : La théorie du chaos - S03E10 - Morituri Te Salutant
3.plot: Dinosaur chaos hits the streets of Malta, sending everyone into survival mode. In the end, a deadly standoff has fateful consequences.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E01 - Blame It on the Train, Owlette
1.plot: When the new Fairground Flyer Train goes missing from the fair, Owlette will need to learn that a little patience goes a long way to get it back.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E02 - Catboy's Cloudy Crisis
1.plot: Catboy attempts to save summer from Luna Girl.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E03 - Owlette and the Flash Flip Trip
1.plot: Romeo erases all the stories from books.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E04 - Catboy and the Pogo-Dozer
1.plot: Romeo uses boxing gloves to break into a museum and steal a jet pack.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E05 - Gekko and the Super Ninjalinos
1.plot: Night Ninja steals sports equipment.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E06 - Owlette's Terrible Pterodactyl Trouble
1.plot: Romeo takes a pterodactyl model from a dinosaur exhibit and turns it into a flying robot.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E07 - Catboy and the Shrinker
1.plot: Romeo and Night Ninja try to shrink PJ Masks.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E08 - Owlette and the Moonball
1.plot: Luna Girl's Moon-Ball sucked up all the toys so she can keep them to herself.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E09 - Catboy and the Butterfly Brigade
1.plot: Zoo visitors are leaving the butterfly gardens because the butterflies are gone. The PJ Masks try to get the butterflies back home.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E10 - Owlette the Winner
1.plot: Luna Girl took the whistle for her two moth teams to get every toy in the toy shop.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E11 - Speak Up, Gekko!
1.plot: Romeo plans to steal all of the PJ Masks' voices so he can blame them for his crimes.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E12 - Catboy and Master Fang's Sword
1.plot: Night Ninja steals Master Fang's sword.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E13 - Catboy VS. Robo-Cat
1.plot: Romeo controls robot duplicates of Owlette and Gekko that he calls "Robo-Owl" and "Robo-Gekko" while the real Gregg and Amaya are locked in hanging cages.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E14 - Owlette and the Giving Owl
1.plot: Owlette's prized 'Giving Owl' statue is stolen by Luna Girl! Can Owlette learn the gift of giving to save Catboy and Gekko?

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E15 - Catboy and the Great Birthday Cake Rescue
1.plot: Gekko's birthday party is ruined when Night Ninja steals everything.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E16 - Gekko and the Snore-A-Saurus
1.plot: Luna Girl turns a sleepwalking Cameron into her own private puppet.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E17 - Looking After Gekko
1.plot: Night Ninja steals the school bus and converts it into his very own super vehicle.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E18 - Catboy and the Teeny Weeny Ninjalino
1.plot: A super small Ninjalino is discovered at headquarters.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E19 - Catboy's Tricky Ticket
1.plot: Catboy must decide which of his two best friends to take to a concert.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E20 - Gekko and the Missing Gekko-Mobile
1.plot: Gekko loses the Gekko-Mobile just when it's needed most.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E21 - Catboy's Flying Fiasco
1.plot: Catboy gets a scooter from an unknown aunt.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E22 - Gekko's Stay at Home Sneezes
1.plot: Gekko gets the sneezes and his friends want him to rest inside HQ.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E23 - Gekko Saves Christmas
1.plot: The Christmas lights and decorations were stolen from the tree on Christmas Eve. Gekko must learn to ride Luna Girl's Luna Board to save Christmas.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E24 - Gekko's Nice Ice Plan
1.plot: Romeo freezes the whole city with his La-Boggan. Gekko has a plan to save the day.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E25 - Gekko and the Mighty Moon Problem
1.plot: Romeo stole the observatory's telescope for use with his space laser. He wants to carve a picture of himself on the moon.

1.title: FR - PJ Masks - S01E26 - Clumsy Catboy
1.plot: By day, Greg and Amaya get ready to show their volcano project, but they notice that Connor was very clumsy and almost wreck their project. They notice that Connor wasn't that only one that's clumsy. By night, it was Romeo that was making everyone in the city clumsy. Gekko and Owlette tried to get Catboy to admit that he's clumsy but he won't. Gekko and Owlette got surprised that Romeo said Catboy was the first one to be zapped on the night before. Now, Gekko and Owlette got zapped with Romeo's machine, and both are very clumsy. The PJ Masks think of a plan to stop Romeo by using their clumsiness.

2.title: FR - PJ Masks - S02E01 - Moonfizzle Balls
FR - PJ Masks - S02E02 - Soccer Ninjalinos
2.plot:
27b	"Soccer Ninjalinos"	Christian De Vita	Tim Bain	Christian Kuntz	January 15, 2018	1.13[29]

At day time, the kids are practicing their soccer skills until they noticed a toy store nearby has sticky splats all over it. At night, Night Ninja and his Ninjalinos are playing their own style of soccer and plan to splat the entire city. When Owlette's feet are stuck in a splat ball, she still wants to play despite her disabled feet but that only makes the mission harder.

2.title: FR - PJ Masks - S02E03 - Lionel - Saurus
2.plot:
28a	"Lionel - Saurus"	Christian De Vita	Jonah Stroh	Jean-François Galataud	January 19, 2018	0.77[30]

The kids are having a picnic in the park while Greg is playing with his pet Lionel until they noticed that Lionel has mysteriously disappeared. At night, it turns out Romeo was feeding Lionel some green pet treats that makes him big and calls him Lionel-Saurus though he also has some red treats that makes him shrink. He also mentions that making the treats took 365 nights which is odd. Unfortunately, Gekko keeps on being defensive on his favorite pet despite Lionel's big size which not only makes the mission harder, but nearly endangered both the PJ masks and the city.

Vehicle: Owl-Glider

Hero Revelation: What's best for your pet. Don't judge what they look like.

2.title: FR - PJ Masks - S02E04 - Catboy's Cuddly
2.plot:
28b	"Catboy's Cuddly"	Christian De Vita	Gerard Foster	Eric Dragon	January 19, 2018	0.77[30]

At day time, the kids are going to school with their cuddly pets though Connor knows they're too old already to have those until they noticed that Cameron's sister is upset that she has a talking Romeo doll instead of her own cuddly which makes the kids suspicious. At night, Romeo and Robot were stealing all the cuddly dolls and plan to transform them into cuddly Romeo dolls. But Catboy wasn't the only who feels ashamed for hiding his cuddly from his teammates, even Owlette and Gekko are also ashamed because their cuddly dolls are stolen so they must stop Romeo at all costs despite being kids.

Vehicle: Owl-Glider

Hero Revelation: Don't feel ashamed for what you have.

2.title: FR - PJ Masks - S02E05 - Night of the Cat
2.plot: N/A

2.title: FR - PJ Masks - S02E06 - Catboy Does It Again
2.plot: Catboy hears of a way to increase his cat power and enlists Gekko and Owlette to help; Catboy falls prey to a Romeo remote that rewinds all action, making the night last forever.

meta.plot: Connor, Greg and Amaya are normal kids by day, but at night they activate their bracelets, which link into their pajamas and give them fantastic super powers, turning them into their alternate identities: The PJ Masks. The team consists of Catboy (Connor), Gekko (Greg) and Owelette (Amaya). Together, they go on adventures, solve mysteries, and learn valuable lessons.

Une compétition de surf à Brizan, dans les Landes. D’un coup, une vague venant d’un arcus stagnant surgit, et les surfeurs disparaissent. De longues heures plus tard, ils refont surface comme par magie. Symptôme du dérèglement climatique ou révolte de la nature, cet événement tragique va bouleverser la vie des habitants de cette paisible station balnéaire.

meta.plot: Neuf challengers sont abandonnés sur une île tropicale isolée, sans carte ni outils, à des kilomètres de la civilisation. Par équipes de trois, ils doivent nager vers différents écosystèmes de la même île - une plage brûlée par le soleil, une mangrove tortueuse et une jungle dense - pour entamer leur propre voyage de survie.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E01 - Lord of the Sand Flies
1.plot: On a deserted island, survivalists are marooned with no map or tools.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E02 - The Barehanded Killer Is Back
1.plot: Two teams score food wins but must process the kills without knives.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E03 - Time to be a Badass
1.plot: Heather needs to move camp, but the grueling trek could break Andrew.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E04 - Trading One Hell for Another
1.plot: Heather, Andrew and Patrick scavenge debris to make fire; Candice secures a protein win; Bulent and Na'im butt heads when their pig snare fails, and Kerra is caught in the middle; a survivalist is medically evacuated off the island.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E05 - I'm Done, I'm Done, I'm Done
1.plot: Medics intervene when a survivalist consumes toxic fruit.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E06 - Hell, Hogs and High Water
1.plot: After an emotional reunion, Na'im vows to get Rachel to day 21; a group must migrate through a croc-infested swamp; Bulent finally comes nose-to-snout with the elusive pig he's been hunting; a survivalist is forced out of the challenge.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E07 - Crash and Burning Up
1.plot: Bulent struggles with uninvited guests and scrambles to protect his huge meat win; a water migration tests Na'im, Kerra and Justin's raft -- and a mysterious fever puts their challenge at risk; the groups join forces to push north for extraction.

1.title: FR - Retour à l'instinct primaire : les naufragés - S01E08 - Brawl Out
1.plot: To be rescued, the remaining castaways must hike across jagged, volcanic rock and crumbling cliffs, build a large signal fire, and construct a raft from driftwood and debris; an explosive fight between Na'im and Patrick threatens extraction.

meta.plot: Les participants se lancent le défi de tenir trois semaines sur un site naturel sauvage, loin de la civilisation, sans le moindre vêtement.

FR - Blood Sisters - S01E01 - It's a Bloody Affair
1.plot: During their lavish engagement party, Sarah and Kola's relationship hangs in a balance. Later, Sarah and Kemi get caught in a precarious situation.

1.title: FR - Blood Sisters - S01E02 - Run Sisters Run
1.plot: With Kola missing, his family clashes over how to move forward. Meanwhile, Sarah and Kemi desperately search for a solution to their growing problem.

1.title: FR - Blood Sisters - S01E03 - The Hunt
1.plot: As Kola’s family mourns, Sarah and Kemi go into hiding until trouble finds them. With new evidence in tow, detective Joe chases a lead of his own.

1.title: FR - Blood Sisters - S01E04 - The Catch
1.plot: Personal agendas and painful truths come to light when Sarah and Kemi fight through another deadly situation and land in the crosshairs of a family feud.

meta.plot: Connected by a dangerous secret, best friends Sarah and Kemi are forced to flee after a wealthy groom disappears at his own engagement party.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E01 - The Silent Roar
1.plot: On a remote island in the Pacific, Will Smith descends into the heart of an active volcano to investigate sounds beyond human hearing. Will discovers that everything on our planet creates its own unique sound—even if we can’t always hear it.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E02 - Descent into Darkness
1.plot: In a deep-water submersible, Will Smith descends 3,300 feet to the bottom of the ocean, where even fewer people have gone than outer space. Along the way down, Will and explorer Diva Amon investigate how color is used in the natural world.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E03 - Mind of the Swarm
1.plot: Thirty years ago, Will Smith was mesmerized by a photo of the incredible wildebeest migration across the Serengeti in a National Geographic magazine. Now he visits those same wildebeests and discovers an amazing survival strategy.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E04 - Power of Scent
1.plot: On the trail of tiger sharks in the Pacific, Will explores the power of smell. For humans, the sense of smell triggers deep memories and emotions, but it has an even more vital function in the animal world.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E05 - Speed of Life
1.plot: Will explores the Namibia Desert, where both the landscape and time seem to have stood still for over 50 million years. Will discovers that humans can only see a small sliver of what’s moving around us because everything on the planet is happening either too fast or too slow for us to perceive.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue sur Terre - S01E06 - Beyond Fear
1.plot: For Will’s final journey, an ultimate challenge. He and polar explorer Dwayne Fields are dropped by helicopter in the middle of an Icelandic glacier.

meta.plot: Bienvenue sur Terre raconte comment Will Smith a accompagné les plus grands explorateurs contemporains et s’est retrouvé aux premières loges pour assister à quelques-uns des phénomènes naturels les plus extraordinaires : volcans en éruption silencieuse, déserts qui s’étendent subrepticement, essaims dotés d’une volonté propre, etc...

1.plot: The Christmas lights and decorations were stolen from the tree on Christmas Eve. Gekko must learn to ride Luna Girl's Luna Board to save Christmas.

1.plot: Romeo freezes the whole city with his La-Boggan. Gekko has a plan to save the day.

1.plot: Romeo stole the observatory's telescope for use with his space laser. He wants to carve a picture of himself on the moon.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E26 - Clumsy Catboy
1.plot: By day, Greg and Amaya get ready to show their volcano project, but they notice that Connor was very clumsy and almost wreck their project. They notice that Connor wasn't that only one that's clumsy. By night, it was Romeo that was making everyone in the city clumsy. Gekko and Owlette tried to get Catboy to admit that he's clumsy but he won't. Gekko and Owlette got surprised that Romeo said Catboy was the first one to be zapped on the night before. Now, Gekko and Owlette got zapped with Romeo's machine, and both are very clumsy. The PJ Masks think of a plan to stop Romeo by using their clumsiness.

1.plot: The playground equipment was stolen by Robot because Romeo made a new robot called Robette. Robot was jealous.

1.plot: A bird invades the HQ. Luna Girl reveals she is going to turn HQ into a giant Luna Magnet.

1.plot: PJ Masks see Ninjalinos stealing school buses. Night Ninja makes his HQ out of the stolen school buses.

1.plot: Romeo wants to take over the town with his latest invention - the 'Big Box of Bad'.

1.plot: Romeo steals the inside of the PJ Masks remote control helicopter for his new remote to control people.

1.plot: The PJ Masks work to stop Nigh Ninja from destroying the museum.

1.plot: Romeo uses his Anti-Gravity Maching to try to send the HQ to the moon.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E34 - Catboy's Two Wheeled Wonder
1.plot: Romeo steals cars and the PJ Masks Super-Vehicles.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E35 - Catboy's Great Gig
1.plot: Night Ninja steals the school's instruments. He wants to use them for his own concert.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E36 - Owlette's New Move
1.plot: Romeo wants to take over the world by using his three machines: his Robot, his La-Boggan and his Track-A-Whacker.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E37 - Supersonic Owlette
1.plot: Romeo broke into HQ. He says he needs to know how to bring up the PJ Picture Player "in peace", so he teleported the PJ Masks outside of HQ.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E38 - Catboy and the Sticky Splat Slingshot
1.plot: The PJ Masks find out that Night Ninja is doing his biggest, baddest night-time villain move ever: the Sticky Splat Slingshot. Catboy, however, wants the mission to be his biggest save yet.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E39 - Owlette of a Kind
1.plot: Romeo steals Owlette's powers and turns himself, Catboy and Gekko into fliers.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E40 - Beat the Drum, Catboy
1.plot: Night Ninja plans to turn Catboy's daytime parade into the Night Ninja Parade Spectacular.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E41 - Catboy Squared
1.plot: When Greg doesn't take care of Cameron's mini-car, it goes missing!

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E42 - Gekko's Super Gekko Sense
1.plot: Night Ninja challenges the PJ Masks to a game of Capture the Flag with the PJ Mask headquarters as the prize.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E43 - Owlette and the Owletteenies
1.plot: Romeo's multiplying machine accidentally makes Catboy copies.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E44 - Gekko's Blame Campaign
1.plot: By day, Connor and Amaya were at the Cafe, then Greg showed up, telling Connor and Amaya about the car Cameron let him borrow for the day.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E45 - Owlette and the Moonflower
1.plot: By day, the trio are working on sunflowers for the sunflower competition. Connor and Greg notice that Amaya's flower isn't so healthy, and they give her advice.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E46 - Slowpoke Gekko
1.plot: In the day, the trio discovers slow moving people and animals. As the PJ Masks, they discover that Romeo invented a slow motion ray so everyone will be too slow to stop him from conquering the world. But Gekko keeps getting distracted, causing him to be hit by the slow motion ray. He comes up with a plan for Catboy and Owlette to distract Romeo, while he slowly makes his way to destroy the slow motion machine.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E47 - Catboy and the Lunar Dome
1.plot: At day, Connor is trying a new dance move called The Tornado except he messed up and ended up being laughed by the kids. Then, while Connor, Amaya, and Greg are walking back to their school, one of Luna Girl's moths gave the kids an invitation to her party, but they soon become suspicious of her plan and the trio transforms later at night. Luna Girl appears with the speakers and streamers for the party. She states that the PJ masks aren't really guests, but they are victims of her Lunar Dome, and traps them. Luckily, the dome doesn't cover the whole HQ since it's only in a half circle so the PJ masks suggest that digging underground is the only way out. Unfortunately, an embarrassed Catboy thinks of other ideas despite Owlette and Gekko telling him that the Super Tornado is the only key to escaping the dome. When Greg, Connor and Amaya were in the library reading books, Greg found a book about the strongest athletes in the world that won many medals and trophies.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E48 - Gekko and the Rock of All Power
1.plot: Greg wondered if he could win at least one medal to declare him being strong. By the time they went out of the library, they saw lamposts being bent. By night, they saw Night Ninja chasing a rock called the Rock of All Power. Amaya heard about the rock in her Kung Fu book that whoever breaks the rock will be awarded with a medal. Gekko was so tempted to break the rock to get the medal since he has the power of strength instead of protecting his friends and their HQ. But while he tries to stop the rock, he breaks it, not meaning to. He says that he felt stronger than ever, and that true strength comes from caring for your friends. That is the best strength.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E49 - Super-Sized Gekko!
1.plot: Luna Girl steals parade floats!

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E50 - Take to the Skies, Owlette
1.plot: The three friends are excited for the loop-the-loop airplane show, but two adults tell them it's been cancelled because the planes were stolen.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E51 - Slow Down Catboy
1.plot: Connor, Greg, and Amaya are preparing for a school race, but the trophy was stolen. In the night, they find out Night Ninja took the trophy. He proposes a race between himself and Catboy, with Luna Girl as the referee. What she really wants is the trophy for herself. Catboy keeps messing up because he kept going to fast in each competition. Owlette and Gekko try to convince him to take his time, as slow and steady wins the race. Finally, he comes up with a plan and offers one last race with the two villains. This time he slows down and wins the race, with the other two competetants losing. The PJ Masks return the trophy to where it belonged.

1.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S01E52 - Gekko's Special Rock
1.plot: Greg accidentally leaves his rock at the museum. He and his friends go back to get it, only to discover all the magnetic rocks are gone. By night, they find that Luna Girl stole the rocks for her Luna magnet to pick up bigger things, like vehicles. She uses them to try and destroy things, including the PJ Masks. But instead of trying to get the mission done, Gekko tries to go after his rock, and that causes the heroes to struggle to get the mission to a success. His friends tell him that's it's not important like the mission is, and he sacrifices his rock to stop Luna Girl.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E01 - Moonfizzle Balls
FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E02 - Soccer Ninjalinos
2.plot:
27b	"Soccer Ninjalinos"	Christian De Vita	Tim Bain	Christian Kuntz	January 15, 2018	1.13[29]

At day time, the kids are practicing their soccer skills until they noticed a toy store nearby has sticky splats all over it. At night, Night Ninja and his Ninjalinos are playing their own style of soccer and plan to splat the entire city. When Owlette's feet are stuck in a splat ball, she still wants to play despite her disabled feet but that only makes the mission harder.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E03 - Lionel - Saurus
2.plot:
28a	"Lionel - Saurus"	Christian De Vita	Jonah Stroh	Jean-François Galataud	January 19, 2018	0.77[30]

The kids are having a picnic in the park while Greg is playing with his pet Lionel until they noticed that Lionel has mysteriously disappeared. At night, it turns out Romeo was feeding Lionel some green pet treats that makes him big and calls him Lionel-Saurus though he also has some red treats that makes him shrink. He also mentions that making the treats took 365 nights which is odd. Unfortunately, Gekko keeps on being defensive on his favorite pet despite Lionel's big size which not only makes the mission harder, but nearly endangered both the PJ masks and the city.

Vehicle: Owl-Glider

Hero Revelation: What's best for your pet. Don't judge what they look like.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E04 - Catboy's Cuddly
2.plot:
28b	"Catboy's Cuddly"	Christian De Vita	Gerard Foster	Eric Dragon	January 19, 2018	0.77[30]

At day time, the kids are going to school with their cuddly pets though Connor knows they're too old already to have those until they noticed that Cameron's sister is upset that she has a talking Romeo doll instead of her own cuddly which makes the kids suspicious. At night, Romeo and Robot were stealing all the cuddly dolls and plan to transform them into cuddly Romeo dolls. But Catboy wasn't the only who feels ashamed for hiding his cuddly from his teammates, even Owlette and Gekko are also ashamed because their cuddly dolls are stolen so they must stop Romeo at all costs despite being kids.

Vehicle: Owl-Glider

Hero Revelation: Don't feel ashamed for what you have.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E05 - Night of the Cat
2.plot: N/A

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E06 - Catboy Does It Again
2.plot: Catboy hears of a way to increase his cat power and enlists Gekko and Owlette to help; Catboy falls prey to a Romeo remote that rewinds all action, making the night last forever.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E07 - Terrible Two-Some
FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E08 - Owlette’s Luna Trouble

FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E31 - Wolfy Mountain

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E32 - Romeo's Crystal Clear Plan
2.plot: Romeo steals the Moon Crystal, but the PJ Masks are convinced Luna Girl is the culprit.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E33 - Nobody's Sidekick
2.plot: Romeo tricks Armadylan into thinking he's turned into a good guy.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E34 - Armadylan Menace
2.plot: Night Ninja convinces Armadylan that the PJ Masks stole all the new Flossy Flash comics.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E35 - Power Pondweed
2.plot: Gekko's powers increase during an underwater mission.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E36 - Owlette Comes Clean
2.plot: While trying to stop Luna Girl, Owlette breaks an observatory's telescope lens and blames her nemesis.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E37 - Halloween Tricksters (1)
2.plot: The PJ Masks have to protect the trick-or-treaters and their goodie bags on Halloween.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E38 - Halloween Tricksters (2)
2.plot: The PJ Masks have to protect the trick-or-treaters and their goodie bags on Halloween.

2.plot: The Wolfies get into HQ and transform it into their den.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E40 - The Good Wolfy
2.plot: While the Wolfies run amok, Gekko doubts he has what it takes to be good, and Kevin isn't sure he wants to be mean.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E41 - The Wolfy Plan
2.plot: Rip tries to gather feathers from Owlette's wings to let the Wolfies fly.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E42 - The Lizard Theft
2.plot: After skeletons are stolen from the museum, the PJ Masks think the Wolfies are the culprits.

2.title: FR - Les Pyjamasques - S02E43 - PJ Dylan
2.plot: After stopping an asteroid from crashing into the city, Armadylan thinks he's one of the PJ Masks.

2.plot: Romeo tries to use Armadylan's powers to improve his lab.
