meta.plot: A six ans, Sacha, Amaya et Greg vont à l’école comme tous les enfants. Mais ça, c’est seulement la journée… Car la nuit, nos petits justiciers pas vraiment comme les autres enfilent des pyjamas magiques, et au lieu d’aller se coucher se transforment en super-héros pour régler les tracas. Faites place à Yoyo, rapide comme l’éclair et bondissant comme un chat ; Bibou à la vue perçante, qui vole comme un oiseau ; et Gluglu aux méga muscles, capable de se suspendre au plafond comme un gecko ! Ensemble, ils forment un formidable trio prêt à accomplir toutes les missions. Les Pyjamasques ont un nouveau défi. Les soucis, ils les règlent la nuit !
Follow the lives of the Roy family as they contemplate their future once their aging father begins to step back from the media and entertainment conglomerate they control.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E01 - Celebration
1.plot: On his 80th birthday, media magnate Logan Roy, whose imminent retirement was thought to be a given, shocks his family by announcing he's staying on indefinitely as CEO of Waystar/Royco. The news shatters his son Kendall, the heir apparent who's in the midst of negotiating the purchase of a digital-media venture founded by a slick operator named Lawrence.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E02 - Sh*t Show at the F**k Factory
1.plot: Logan's incapacitation sets off a heated succession debate among his children, as the Board rushes to inform the media about leadership contingencies before the stock market opens. Greg is tasked to retrieve some important items from the Roy apartment. Kendall makes an impassioned final plea to keep Waystar/Royco in the family, and receives some sobering news.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E03 - Lifeboats
1.plot: With Waystar's stock plunging to dangerous lows, Kendall is confronted with a major crisis involving a secret bank debt. Upset with Marcia for pulling rank in the Roy apartment, Shiv decides to enlist an old paramour to conduct a background check on Logan's third wife. Kendall and Roman attend their first big meeting in their new roles, as do Tom and Greg.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E04 - Sad Sack Wasp Trap
1.plot: With the company’s annual foundation gala fundraiser approaching, and his dad out of the picture, Kendall polishes up his speech while enlisting an on-air personality from the Waystar’s ATV Networks to accompany him. Shiv tries to minimize damage from a sordid photo that threatens a client's political future. Tom inherits a “virus” from his predecessor.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E05 - I Went to Market
1.plot: After hearing Logan’s plan to expand in to local TV, Kendall begins to plot a vote of no confidence against his father. Greg drives his ornery grandfather Ewan from Canada to New York for a Thanksgiving reunion with Logan. Tom grows increasingly concerned about the terms of his prenuptial agreement with Shiv, and recruits Greg for a clandestine task.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E06 - Which Side Are You On?
1.plot: With the vote of no confidence against Logan approaching, Roman attempts to sway a neutral board member, while Kendall frantically shores up his “yea” votes. Logan arrives in Washington to meet with the president, but worries he's been snubbed after a last-minute cancellation. After successfully thwarting a potential scandal, Tom introduces Greg to fine dining.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E07 - Austerlitz
1.plot: In an effort to fix his public image, Logan agrees to a family therapy session at Connor’s New Mexico ranch that Logan intends to double as a publicity stunt. While lying low, Kendall spends some time with the locals and finds his sobriety tested. Shiv considers putting herself in a precarious situation when Nate pushes her to join a potential presidential candidate’s team.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E08 - Prague
1.plot: Tom has a bachelor’s party to remember. Kendall eyes a new business opportunity with a pair of idealistic entrepreneurs. Roman looks to land a deal for local TV stations with his father’s longtime nemesis. Logan tasks Greg to act as Kendall’s babysitter during Tom’s party. Shiv and Gil get ambushed during a TV interview on a Waystar network.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E09 - Pre-Nuptial
1.plot: The Roys assemble at an English castle to prepare for Shiv and Tom’s wedding. The children reunite with their mother Caroline, who is every bit as acerbic as Logan. As guests mingle and clash, Kendall learns from Stewy and Sandy that their plot for a hostile takeover of Waystar has been fast-tracked in order to catch Logan off guard.

1.title: FR - Succession - S01E10 - Nobody Is Ever Missing
1.plot: Amidst the revelry of Tom and Shiv's wedding, Logan and his team find themselves in defense mode as word of the Waystar takeover bid spreads. Kendall finds an escape outlet as the situation becomes supercharged, while Tom parlays his new wife's candor into the removal of an unwanted guest. Season One Finale.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E01 - The Summer Palace
2.plot: Kendall tries to make amends with his dad for his takeover attempt betrayal. Logan receives some unvarnished advice from his banker about the next best move for Waystar Royco. As Tom maneuvers for a new position in the company, Shiv tries to determine whether Logan is playing mind games regarding his successor.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E02 - Vaulter
2.plot: Roman and Kendall do a “routine health check” of a new media brand to help Vaulter to determine the future of the company. Tom tasks Greg with sniffing out waste at ATN, as Greg wonders if the divisive media outlet is the right fit for him. Connor and Willa host a soiree to mark their return to New York. Shiv brings Tom in the loop about her future at Waystar and with Gil’s campaign.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E03 - Hunting
2.plot: Logan informs his management team of his plan to make another attempt to acquire a rival media company. Greg worries his meeting with a Logan biographer puts his standing with the family at risk. Connor's presidential announcement irritates Logan.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E04 - Safe Room
2.plot: Roman begins a six-week management training program. Connor and Willa attend the funeral of a family friend with a complicated past. Logan and Kendall arrange a covert meeting with PGM CEO Rhea Jarrell. Controversy surrounds a star anchor.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E05 - Tern Haven
2.plot: Logan attempts to solidify his buyout of PGM at a weekend retreat at the Pierce family home, where Shiv, Roman and Connor veer from their carefully orchestrated roles. As the Pierces question whether an alliance with Waystar Royco will tarnish their legacy, Kendall makes his case to Naomi Pierce during a drug-filled night.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E06 - Argestes
2.plot: As Logan looks to finalize a deal to buy the Pierce family's papers and TV stations at a media & banking retreat, a threat to the deal arises from an unexpected quarter. Tom worries about ATN's new slogan after learning some distressing news from Greg. Kendall, Shiv and Roman fail to see eye to eye on how to handle damage control ahead of a panel featuring the Roys.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E07 - Return
2.plot: The Roys head to the UK, where Roman and Shiv try to strike a deal with their mother and Logan and Kendall face the consequences of their last visit.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E08 - Dundee
2.plot: The entire Roy clan travels to Logan's hometown of Dundee, Scotland, for a celebration of Logan's 50 years in the business. Kendall becomes enamored with Jennifer, an actress in Willa's play. A former employee proves difficult to silence.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E09 - DC
2.plot: Logan, Kendall, Gerri and Tom testify before Congress. Shiv speaks candidly to Kira, a victim who is set to be a key witness. In Turkey, Roman's business pitch takes a chilling turn.

2.title: FR - Succession - S02E10 - This Is Not for Tears
2.plot: Logan weighs whether a member of the family, or a top lieutenant, will need to be sacrificed to salvage the company's tarnished reputation. Roman shares his hesitations about a new source of financing, as Kendall suggests a familiar alternative. Season Two Finale.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E01 - Secession
3.plot: Following his bombshell presser, a righteous Kendall scrambles to find a base of operations, while Logan's team searches for safe harbor.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E02 - Mass in Time of War
3.plot: Kendall tries to get his siblings, as well as Stewy and Sandi, on his side. Fearing his legal situation, Greg asks Ewan for help.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E03 - The Disruption
3.plot: With the DOJ at the door, Logan summons his arsenal, while Tom makes a potentially life changing offer. Kendall becomes obsessed with his own takedown.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E04 - Lion in the Meadow
3.plot: Logan and Kendall have their first meeting together with Josh, a major investor worried about their family feud.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E05 - Retired Janitors of Idaho
3.plot: Kendall and the Waystar team find themselves working together at the annual shareholders’ meeting, where Logan’s health takes a turn.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E06 - What It Takes
3.plot: Logan and team head to Virginia for a conservative political conference, where Roman finds out surprising news about his mother.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E07 - Too Much Birthday
3.plot: At Kendall’s lavish birthday bash, Shiv and Roman try to arrange a meeting with Lukas Matsson, a tech mogul who recently snubbed Logan.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E08 - Chiantishire
3.plot: At a luxe family wedding in Italy, Roman airs suspicions, Gerri draws a line, and the Waystar team grows concerned about rogue tweets.

3.title: FR - Succession - S03E09 - All the Bells Say
3.plot: Matsson’s vision for the GoJo-Waystar relationship leads Shiv and Roman to manage the fallout, while Logan weighs his options.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E01 - The Munsters
4.plot: As Kendall, Shiv, and Roman hone their pitch for potential investors in LA, a call from Tom shifts the siblings' focus towards one of their dad's long-coveted companies. Back in NY, Greg's uninvited plus-one raises questions at Logan's birthday party, Connor considers throwing a gargantuan sum at his campaign, and Tom seeks assurances from Logan.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E02 - Rehearsal
4.plot: After Shiv discovers that Tom is following Logan’s playbook, she, Kendall, and Roman consider backing Sandi and Stewy’s aggressive play on the Matsson deal. Meanwhile, Logan gives an impromptu pep talk to the ATN newsroom… and outsources a tricky conversation with Kerry. Later, Connor tries to make the most of his rehearsal dinner when Willa goes AWOL.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E03 - Connor's Wedding
4.plot: Before heading to Europe to meet with Matsson face-to-face, Logan tasks Roman with implementing an unsavory first step in his strategic refocus. Meanwhile, Connor fixates on minutia at his wedding.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E04 - Honeymoon States
4.plot: As Roman, Kendall and Shiv navigate a misstep with Matsson, the Waystar team discusses a pivotal recommendation to the board ahead of the GoJo sale. Angling for position, Kendall seeks support from Stewy and Hugo.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E05 - Kill List
4.plot: After being summoned to Norway for a GoJo team-building retreat, Waystar's old guard grows increasingly concerned over the trip's true purpose. Later, when Matsson makes a play for ATN, Shiv, Kendall and Roman consider whether to fight for Logan's crown jewel.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E06 - Living+
4.plot: Ahead of a crucial new product launch on Investor Day, Shiv weighs a business proposal from Matsson, while Kendall and Roman call an impromptu meeting to flip the script on their latest interaction with the tech billionaire. Later, the brothers each try to match Logan’s tempestuous style, with varying results.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E07 - Tailgate Party
4.plot: Hoping to work the angles on the GoJo deal, Kendall and Roman ask Shiv to invite a political insider to Logan’s annual pre-election day party. Later, Connor considers whether to adjust his ambitions after receiving intel from the Mencken team, while Kendall and Roman catch wind of a potentially fortuitous scandal.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E08 - America Decides
4.plot: On election night, Tom tries to manage an increasingly chaotic newsroom, while Kendall, Shiv, and Roman spar over the consequences of the result – for themselves, the company, and the country.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E09 - Church and State
4.plot: As the family girds themselves for an emotional funeral, Kendall finds himself at odds with Rava… and inopportune news from Jess. Later, Shiv tries to reposition herself within a new political landscape, as Kendall rallies supporters to his side.

4.title: FR - Succession - S04E10 - With Open Eyes
4.plot: Ahead of the final board vote on the Waystar-GoJo deal, Kendall and Shiv try to shore up their opposing interests...and get a fix on the whereabouts of a physically and emotionally bruised Roman.

meta.plot: Amy and Raquel attempt to navigate their way through the choppy waters of their early twenties whilst simultaneously kicking the ass of some seriously gnarly demons. What could possibly go wrong?

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E01 - A Very Trippy Horse
1.plot: Amy must act when she discovers her best mate is harbouring a mean-mouthed, hell-raised demon.

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E02 - A Pine Fresh Scent
1.plot: As if burying your best friend wasn't enough for one night. Amy and Raquel's exorcism attempt has put them firmly on Callum's radar.

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E03 - Shave the Cat
1.plot: What do you do when your best friend returns from the dead as a bloodsucking revenant? If you're Amy and Raquel, you take her captive...

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E04 - Penguin or Cow?
1.plot: How far would you go to protect the ones you love? Amy finds out as she and Raquel prepare to rescue Suzanne from Callum's evil clutches.

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E05 - Downward Facing Dog
1.plot: Raquel starts to fall for Harry, but Amy doesn't trust him. A flyer she finds in his wallet leads her to a discovery about Callum's plan.

1.title: FR - Crazyhead - S01E06 - Beaver with a Chainsaw
1.plot: Amy and Raquel go into hiding for Halloween, after a bottle of vodka and a game of Jenga it becomes apparent that they cannot trust even their closest allies. Amy faces her biggest challenge yet and it is Raquel.

meta.plot: Une femme encore hantée par son internement en école disciplinaire dénonce les faits de corruption et de maltraitance dans l'industrie des adolescents perturbés.

1.title: FR - The Program: Cons, Cults and Kidnapping - S01E01 - Where the F**k Am I?
1.plot: Former students of the Academy at Ivy Ridge return to the now-shuttered school and reflect on the horrors they endured during their time in the program.

1.title: FR - The Program: Cons, Cults and Kidnapping - S01E02 - Mind Control
1.plot: Daily life at Ivy Ridge included cultlike tactics, a rules system with excessive punishments and family reps incentivized to keep teens in the program.

1.title: FR - The Program: Cons, Cults and Kidnapping - S01E03 - Follow the Money
1.plot: With programs around the globe and exorbitant tuition, money was rolling in — but where was it going? A trail of dodgy dealings leads to the top.

meta.plot: En 2012, une vague de meurtres effroyables secoue le monde de la nuit à Berlin. Le tueur n'a jamais été inquiété... jusqu'à ce que l'une de ses cibles survive.

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer - S01E01 - A Mysterious Death
1.plot: A body in the darkroom of a gay bar puts Berlin police on the trail of a killer who poisons and robs his targets — but is he only in it for the money?

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer - S01E02 - A Serial Killer in Berlin
1.plot: With Berlin's gay nightclub scene reeling from the murder, the investigation into the killer's identity reopens a previously closed case.

1.title: FR - Crime Scene Berlin: Nightlife Killer - S01E03 - The Lust to Kill
1.plot: As the body count rises, a break in the investigation brings the killer's dark past into focus as the police close in on him.

meta.plot: Le secret du neuvième chevron est dévoilé et une équipe est envoyée pour explorer l'autre côté de cet horizon : un gigantesque vaisseau appelé le Destiny. Créée par les "Anciens" des millions d'années plus tôt, cette expérience sous forme de navire ne peut être contrôlée. Le Destiny doit exécuter sa mission originelle : traverser l'univers et rencontrer de nouvelles formes de vie.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E01 - Air (1)
1.plot: When Icarus Base is attacked, it's inhabitants are forced to flee through the Stargate. The base was created on a distant planet to take advantage of a powerful energy supply located there. Their goal is to try and determine the purpose of the mysterious ninth symbol of the Stargate which they have never been able to lock in. In going through the Stargate, they are transported not to Earth but onto an very old, apparently uninhabited but huge spacecraft. With the group's commander injured, Lt. Scott and the chief scientist, Dr. Nicholas Rush lead the exploration of the craft. Several areas of the ship have been damaged but it is basically functional. They are able to learn that they are in fact billions of light years from Earth.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E02 - Air (2)
1.plot: The survivors arrive on an uninhabited ship floating billions of light years away from Earth. Panic spreads throughout the group and Col. Young, who was severely injured during the escape, transfers command to Lt. Matthew Scott, before lapsing into unconsciousness. Teams led by Dr. Rush and Sgt. Greer try to make sense of the situation, while Lt. Tamara Johansen, a medic who was days away from leaving the program, is thrust into the role of chief medical officer.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E03 - Air (3)
1.plot: With the air supply failing on the Destiny, a team disembarks to a desert-like planet in search of the mineral needed to scrub the ship’s air of carbon dioxide. After testing numerous sand samples without success, and with their window of opportunity closing fast, the group opts to split into two to cover more ground, despite the unbearable heat.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E04 - Darkness
1.plot: The Destiny suffers a power crisis, putting the lives of the stranded crew in jeopardy and forcing them to consider abandoning the ship.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E05 - Light
1.plot: With the ship on a collision course, the crew must decide who will stay and who will flee on the shuttle to try and find a habitable planet.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E06 - Water
1.plot: Severe rationing can't save the Destiny's dwindling water supply, forcing Colonel Young and Lieutenant Scott to seek out drinkable water on a deadly ice planet.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E07 - Earth
1.plot: With the situation onboard the Destiny dire, General O'Neill and Home World Command orders Col. Young to execute a high risk plan concocted by the I.O.A. scientists which, in theory, could return the crew to earth.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E08 - Time
1.plot: Visiting a newly discovered jungle planet, the crew is amazed to recover a Kino by the gate. Downloading the Kino data, Eli discovers video of the team, which appears to have been shot during an earlier visit. The mystery of the video’s origin becomes a secondary concern as members of the team start falling ill.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E09 - Life
1.plot: Aboard Destiny, Dr. Rush supervises the exploration of new areas of the ship. Looking for resources to make their everyday lives easier, the crew stumbles upon a piece of Ancient technology that carries the promise of a way home. While somewhat familiar with the find, Dr. Rush can’t guarantee the safety of using it, bringing him and Col. Young to a standoff on what to do.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E10 - Justice
1.plot: Everyone is shocked when a member of the crew is found dead from a gunshot wound. While at first glance it appears to be suicide, the gun is nowhere to be found. The crew is confined to quarters while a search is performed and when the gun shows up in Col. Young’s quarters, he becomes the number one suspect.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E11 - Space (1)
1.plot: A snafu with the communications stones lands Col. Young's consciousness in an unknown being, resulting in a standoff between the Destiny and an alien vessel and the abduction of Chloe.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E12 - Divided (2)
1.plot: Dr. Nicholas Rush and Chloe suffer nightmares following their ordeal on the alien vessel, and Rush suspects that a tracking device may have been placed on the ship's hull. Later, a splinter group on Destiny executes a coup with life-threatening consequences.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E13 - Faith
1.plot: Now firmly in control again, Col. Young and the other military personnel try to find a way to live with the civilians who tried to take control of the ship. When the Destiny prematurely drops out of FTL due to a computer glitch, they find both a sun and an Earth-like planet that should not be there. Rush concludes that the entire system was created by an alien race that is far beyond their imaginations. With the ship malfunctioning and a month's worth of repairs before it can jump again, several of the military and civilians decide to spend time on the planet. Hard feelings from the mutiny persist and it's an opportunity for everyone to mend fences. When the time comes to return to the Destiny, several of them decide they want to stay on the planet. Young is prepared to let them stay, but he imposes severe conditions.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E14 - Human
1.plot: Dr. Rush relives his past life by sitting in the alien chair in an attempt to download critical data. A university professor, his wife's cancer returns and he is recruited by Dr. Daniel Jackson for what will be called the Icarus project. He's avoiding dealing with his wife's situation and throws himself into his work. In his dream-like state, he's trying to make sense of all the information he is accumulating. Back on the ship, the Destiny drops out of FTL and some of the crew investigate the planet below. They find an ancient archaeological site but are trapped when part of the site caves in. Digging them out is a slow process and the next jump is quickly approaching.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E15 - Lost
1.plot: Still trapped on the planet after the Destiny has jumped, Lt. Scott, Sgt. Greer, Chloe and Eli try to find a way out of the underground maze. After one is caught in another cave in, the remaining three make their way to a gate but must jump blindly from planet to planet hoping to pick up a signal from the Destiny before it jumps. On board the ship, Col. Young decides to send out a search party. The clock is ticking down and the next jump will take them into an inter-galactic void forever leaving their friends behind. TJ meanwhile decides the time has come to tell Col. Young that she is pregnant with his child.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E16 - Sabotage
1.plot: The Destiny has jumped into hyperspace and is now traveling through an inter-galactic void. They've also been unable to locate Eli, Chloe and Scott who have been left behind. Dr. Rush has calculated that based on their current energy consumption, the Destiny has insufficient fuel to reach the next galaxy and they are doomed to die. The engines suddenly fail however and they arrange for an expert, Amanda Perry, to come on board via the communication stones and help them out. Perry and Rush have known each other for many years but as a quadriplegic, is experiencing what life has to offer. On Earth, Camile Wray's consciousness has been transferred to Perry's body and is wheelchair bound.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E17 - Pain
1.plot: Lt. Tamara Johansen tries to track down what is causing the crew to hallucinate.

1.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S01E18 - Subversion
1.plot: Earth's Stargate Program isn't the only group in the Milky Way that's interested in the Ancients' Destiny. What's worse, this long-time foe may have a spy among those closest to the Icarus project.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E01 - Intervention (3)
2.plot: Everett and the crew continue their efforts to save Destiny while holding off the Lucian Alliance invaders.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E02 - Aftermath
2.plot: Desperate for food and water, Rush directs the ship to a planet that has been locked out of Destiny's controls. Young and Wray clash over what to do with the Alliance prisoners.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E03 - Awakening
2.plot: The crew encounters a ship remarkably similar to Destiny, which may hold the key to their returning home.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E04 - Pathogen
2.plot: Chloe behaves in a bizarre way, prompting a search of her quarters, where Lt. Scott finds a journal penned in an alien language. Elsewhere, Eli copes with his mother's medical condition.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E05 - Cloverdale
2.plot: When Scott's team explores a new planet, a plant-like organism infects the lieutenant, causing him to hallucinate a life back on Earth where he is getting married.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E06 - Trial and Error
2.plot: Young is plagued by mysterious dreams where Destiny is destroyed by alien attackers no matter what he does.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E07 - The Greater Good
2.plot: Rush and Young investigate an abandoned alien craft which is just outside the Destiny. While they do this, the crew onboard the ship find the bridge and discover that Rush is responsible for the countdown clock not activating when the ship emerges from FTL.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E08 - Malice
2.plot: Simeon makes his escape from Destiny, sending Nicholas Rush on a vengeful mission. But Young and Greer attempt to retrieve Simeon unharmed.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E09 - Visitation
2.plot: Members of the crew left behind in another galaxy make a shocking return to Destiny.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E10 - Resurgence (1)
2.plot: The crew's new-found control over Destiny's flight path introduces new risks when they find themselves in the middle of a war between two races.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E11 - Deliverance (2)
2.plot: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the Aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E12 - Twin Destinies
2.plot: Rush travels back in time to avert a disaster, meeting a past version of himself.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E13 - Alliances
2.plot: Camille and Sgt. Greer are trapped when Homeworld Command comes under attack.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E14 - Hope
2.plot: Chloe's body is taken over by another consciousness. Meanwhile, Dr. Volker is stricken with a mysterious illness.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E15 - Seizure
2.plot: Rush slips into a coma in the neural interface chair, and Amanda connects with him in the ship’s matrix, but Ginn informs Eli of a problem with that scenario. Elsewhere, Dr. Rodney McKay’s plan to dial the ninth chevron address hits a snag.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E16 - The Hunt
2.plot: An alien creature attacks an exploration team from Destiny, taking two crew members captive.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E17 - Common Descent (1)
2.plot: Destiny comes upon a colony where the people claim their civilization was founded two thousand years earlier ... by Destiny's crew.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E18 - Epilogue (2)
2.plot: While attempting to return a group of colonists to their home, the crew finds that the planet is on the verge of seismic destruction.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E19 - Blockade
2.plot: The Destiny needs to be refueled but every time they come out of FTL the drones seem to be waiting for them. It's not obvious how the drones know they're there but it doesn't matter a great deal since they only have one more try before running out of fuel completely. Eli suggests they go through a blue supergiant star, though the heat it creates might destroy the ship. They have little choice so Col. Young evacuates everyone to the only planet available with the exception of Eli and Rush. Lisa also stays behind to collect some of the medicinal herbs they've grown only to be trapped just as the Destiny goes through the star. On the planet, Young and the others find evidence of a destroyed civilization - and the drones.

2.title: FR - Stargate Universe - S02E20 - Gauntlet
2.plot: Eli and Rush have found a way to identify the location of drone mother ships using the Destiny's long range sensors. The bad news is that the Drones seems to be awaiting them at every possible stop along Destiny's path. They find a temporary solution to neutralize the mother ships but realize that they cannot engage in a major battle every time they need to re-supply. Eli suggest that they use the stasis pods for the crew and jump to the next galaxy, a trip that will take three years. All goes well until they realize that one of the pods has been damaged and one person will have to stay behind in the hopes of fixing the unit in the short time available or die.

meta.plot: Coaches with championship résumés share their personal rules for success in sports and life in this reflective and inspiring documentary series.

1.title: FR - The Playbook - S01E01 - Doc Rivers: A Coach's Rules for Life
1.plot: NBA coach Doc Rivers shares the unifying philosophy that inspired Boston's championship team and discusses his response to Donald Sterling's racism.

1.title: FR - The Playbook - S01E02 - Jill Ellis: A Coach's Rules for Life
1.plot: Soccer coach Jill Ellis touches on two World Cup titles, talks about supporting her players and tells an important story about being true to herself.

1.title: FR - The Playbook - S01E03 - José Mourinho: A Coach's Rules for Life
1.plot: A deep passion for competition propels soccer manager José Mourinho, who details his battles with the media and methods for motivating winning teams.

1.title: FR - The Playbook - S01E04 - Patrick Mouratoglou: A Coach's Rules for Life
1.plot: Tennis coach Patrick Mouratoglou reflects on his success with Serena Williams and reveals his strategy for players who tank.

1.title: FR - The Playbook - S01E05 - Dawn Staley: A Coach's Rules for Life
1.plot: Basketball coach Dawn Staley talks about breaking into a male-dominated sport, challenging comfort zones and building a winning team in South Carolina.

meta.plot: Un scandale éclate au Brésil pendant l'enquête sur la corruption d'un gouvernement en collusion avec des sociétés immobilières et pétrolières. Inspiré de faits réels.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E01 - Jet Wash
1.plot: Police officer Marco Ruffo's family is threatened as he attempts to take down money-laundering criminal Roberto Ibrahim.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E02 - Halvah
1.plot: Ten years later, Verena continues her investigation into Ibrahim and the currency dealers who work with him.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E03 - Cool Winds from the South
1.plot: While the team works hard to pull off an operation involving multiple targets, important evidence goes missing.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E04 - False Wall
1.plot: Guilhome gets assistance from a surprising source. Verena goes after João Pedro as Judge Rigo weighs a momentous decision.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E05 - Red Eyes
1.plot: Verena feels like she can't trust anybody anymore. Ibrahim's wife is angered by what he has been doing in jail.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E06 - They Knew It All
1.plot: The team pursues charges against João Pedro's family in an effort to get him to talk. A leak threatens to dismantle the entire operation.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E07 - One Last Breath
1.plot: Club 13 rushes to secure an agreement with the attorney general. A sewage leak opens Ruffo's eyes to small-scale corruption's parallels to Jet Wash.

1.title: FR - The Mechanism - S01E08 - Doomsday
1.plot: Verena receives devastating personal news. Ruffo re-evaluates his priorities. Dimas and Claudio find out the fate of the "Doomsday" operation.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E01 - Where Does the Mud Come From?
2.plot: Ruffo gets a valuable piece of info from the secretary of the 13th contractor, Ricardo Bretch. Verena and Guilhome find themselves under investigation.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E02 - Del Este
2.plot: Vander's illegal wiretap pays off. When Ibrahim's new venture gets off to a bad start, his money-hungry wife makes a fatal error.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E03 - Addicts
2.plot: Ruffo gets a surprise when he visits his wife at the ranch, and later makes a deal with Maria Tereza, who is followed home after picking up her son.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E04 - The Great Illusionist
2.plot: Disciplined as ever, Bretch gets to work on a plan and gives his wife instructions. To find Ibrahim, Ruffo follows another trail Luz Maria has left.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E05 - Friendship Bridge
2.plot: Following the cigarette lead, Ruffo heads to Paraguay. When Guilhome learns Ruffo is pursuing Ibrahim alone, he sets out to find him and bring him back.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E06 - Requiem
2.plot: Verena finds herself at Ibrahim's mercy. When Eva is unable to convince Bretch to talk before Ibrahim does, she calls a political ally for help.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E07 - The Ends and the Means
2.plot: When Tom Carvalho tells Verena and the DA's office about shady deals involving former President Gino, Rigo issues orders that ignite a public firestorm.

2.title: FR - The Mechanism - S02E08 - Dirty Canasta
2.plot: Rigo is unable to ignore the new wiretap recording. The prospect of Thames becoming president spurs Verena to find a way to break Bretch's silence.

meta.plot: Suite au décès de son fils, un pharmacien de Louisiane ne recule devant rien pour dénoncer la corruption endémique au cœur de la crise des opioïdes.

1.title: FR - The Pharmacist - S01E01 - Justice for Danny
1.plot: When his son is murdered in New Orleans, Dan launches a relentless and lonely search for the killer. As hope fades, he uncovers a miraculous lead.

1.title: FR - The Pharmacist - S01E02 - A Mission from God
1.plot: The murder trial brings cold comfort. Trying to resume a normal life, Dan returns to work at the pharmacy and makes an alarming discovery.

1.title: FR - The Pharmacist - S01E03 - Dope Dealers with White Lab Coats
1.plot: Dan's investigation into a corrupt doctor reveals some of big pharma's worst sins. Meanwhile, overdoses in town see a terrifying spike.

1.title: FR - The Pharmacist - S01E04 - Tunnel of Hope
1.plot: Dan's smoking gun is a breakthrough for a major DEA case, but solving one problem creates another. A chapter closed, Danny's family moves forward.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E01 - Set Yourself on Fire
1.plot: Alvey and Lisa are struggling to keep Navy Street afloat. Their best hope is Alvey's son Nate, an up and coming fighter. Jay, Alvey's other son, is on the outs with his father. When Lisa's ex and former MMA champ, Ryan, shows up, complications arise.there is no overview

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E02 - Glass Eye
1.plot: Lisa lays out the reality of their finances while Alvey tries to convince her his plan for Ryan is the solution. Ryan adjusts to life in a halfway house.Jay professes his desire to fight again, but Alvey refuses to help until he sees more dedication.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E03 - Piece of Plastic
1.plot: Ryan settles into a new job with fellow ex-cons while Alvey meets with Ryan's parole officer. Nate begins physical therapy. Keith is taunted by Michael. Ryan learns of Keith's past. Jay offers Christina a way out.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E04 - Flowers
1.plot: Christina wants a fresh start. Jay has other ideas on how to save her. Alvey is on edge after potential investors send unwelcome gifts to the gym. Lisa reveals she's going to help Jay. Nate finally speaks with Detective Gaines about his case.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E05 - Eat Your Own Cooking
1.plot: Alvey fantasizes about revenge and questions his self control; Lisa's father comes to town; Nate's love life heats up; Keith and Ryan struggle with loneliness during Family Day at the halfway house; Alvey advises Lisa to forgive Ryan.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E06 - Please Refrain from Crying
1.plot: Ryan pleads with his father for forgiveness. Michael bullies Keith. Christina spends time with Nate, and opens up to him about her youth.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E07 - Animator/Annihilator
1.plot: Tensions run high between Lisa and Alvey after Christina shows up at Navy St. Garo tries to find out how Ryan's training is coming along. Jay, building off the recent win, asks Garo to give him a chance. Christina wrestles with her emotions.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E08 - The Gentle Slope
1.plot: Ryan and Alvey are in the spotlight at the King Beast promotional event. Alvey counsels Christina on getting professional help for her addiction. Lisa sees a lawyer looking for advice. Jay searches for Hector & Carlos.

1.title: FR - Kingdom - S01E09 - Cut Day
1.plot: It's cut day for Ryan and Jay. With the weigh-in only hours away, the two struggle through the agony of cutting weight while Lisa tries to reach Alvey. Nate, determined to get back into the ring quickly, asks Mac for help.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E01 - New Money
2.plot: Ryan contends with illness on the day of his title defense, Jay's opponent presents him with an unexpected challenge, and Lisa recruits a new fighter. Alvey oversees it all while opening up a new gym.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E02 - Simulations
2.plot: Alvey deals with Ryan's reckless decisions and Lisa introduces her newest fighter, Alicia, to Navy St. Nate gears up for his return to the cage. Jay meets a photographer, Laura, who presents professional and personal opportunities.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E03 - Broken or Missing
2.plot: Keith is released from jail and moves back in with Ryan, Jay is given an intriguing offer by Garo, and Nate has his first fight back since he was brutally assaulted.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E04 - Be First
2.plot: Nate finds his problems compounded after his loss and Jay spins out of control in his pursuit of Laura. Lisa explores what her future will look like when her baby arrives.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E05 - Happy Hour
2.plot: Ryan heads to his dad's house to check on him, where a new relationship seems possible. Jay agrees to Alvey's plan for a new direction and Nate eyes a quick return to the cage.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E06 - Pink at Night
2.plot: Jay tracks down his competition for Laura, while Christina eyes a career change. Lisa cuts a deal with Garo, presenting Jay with an unexpected opportunity.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E07 - The Demon Had A Spell
2.plot: Alvey and Nate head off to a low-rent fight in Fresno, Jay grows feral as he deals with his weight cut and breakup with Laura, and Lisa hatches a plan to resurrect Ryan's image.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E08 - Smoker
2.plot: Alvey and Lisa open Navy St. up for a showcase, inviting sponsors into the gym to see Alicia in action. Ryan and Jay, knowing this could be their last opportunity to evade Alvey's attention, enjoy a cheat day.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E09 - Living Down
2.plot: Christina searches for new living arrangements, Lisa realizes Alvey's home may not be the place for her, and Ryan and Jay cut weight as their respective title fights loom.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E10 - Traveling Alone
2.plot: Ryan defends his lightweight title, while Nate and Jay discover Christina in a bad spot. Alvey gets a call from an old friend, and Lisa makes a final decision regarding her future.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E11 - Lay and Pray
2.plot: As Jay and Ryan promote their upcoming championship bout, Alvey is on the receiving end of tragic news. But all attention shifts to Alicia as she preps for her first professional fight as a member of Navy St.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E12 - No Fault
2.plot: Alicia is surprised by the arrival of a family member. Ryan heads to the doctor after his drunken brawl places his championship match in doubt. Nate picks up a new job, one full of unexpected demands.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E13 - Woke Up Lonely
2.plot: The day of Jay and Ryan's fight sees everyone taking on new roles: Nate cornering Jay, Alicia and Ava hosting the afterparty, and Alvey taking a step back. But before any of that can happen, Ryan still has to be convinced that he's ready to fight.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E14 - Do Not Disturb
2.plot: Alicia receives an offer that Alvey believes looks more promising than it is. Jay and Ava celebrate his lightweight championship, retreating into each other. Alvey must make amends for a past accident.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E15 - Take Pills
2.plot: Jay and Ava's plans are completely upended when an unexpected visitor comes looking for Christina. Ryan breaks up Alicia's living situation while questions about why he lost his championship fight swirl.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E16 - Halos
2.plot: Nate returns to the cage looking for an end to his losing streak and to prove to Alvey and everyone else that he's still a viable fighter. Mac brings something into Navy St. that threatens the gym's operations.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E17 - Help Wanted
2.plot: Lisa returns to Los Angeles, but she's unsure of what life is waiting for her there. Ryan demonstrates his dominance of the gym while Nate attempts to drag Jay away from his new life with Ava.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E18 - Cut Man
2.plot: Alicia faces the biggest challenge of her career in a fight that promises to vault her to new heights if she can secure the victory. Alvey must contend with how Lisa's return impacts his relationship with Roxanne.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E19 - Late to Leave
2.plot: Alicia makes a career defining decision that will alter her relationships with everyone in the gym. Keith presents a challenge to Ryan, reminding him just how unstable his roommate can be.

2.title: FR - Kingdom - S02E20 - No Sharp Objects
2.plot: The rematch between Jay and Ryan for Jay's lightweight title belt could not come at a worse time for a reeling Jay. Alvey rescues an old friend from a bad spot.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E01 - Wolf Tickets
3.plot: Nate looks to prove himself in the cage, and Ryan defends his title. Jay seeks balance in his new life. With plans to take King Beast to the next level, Garo presents Alvey with a lucrative offer.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E02 - Ritual
3.plot: Lisa hires help at Navy St. so Alvey can focus on training. Jay struggles to adjust to working life, while Garo tries to woo Ryan back to King Beast. Christina makes the best of a new situation, and Alvey forges a deeper bond with Nate.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E03 - Thank You, Boys
3.plot: While Alvey deals with a health scare, Lisa proves her worth as a manager. A gift from Ryan presents complications for Jay and Amy, and Jay takes Ryan on a real estate tour. Lisa goes on a date.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E04 - Headhunter
3.plot: Dom's relationship with Ryan creates problems with Alvey and Lisa. Nate tries to make peace when Jay causes tension at home. Alvey gets a surprise from his past.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E05 - Please Give
3.plot: Dom pushes boundaries at the gym, while Christina takes charge of Kayla and the girls. Jay continues to struggle with Amy and work. Lisa gets Nate a fight on short notice, and Ryan takes a break from training.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E06 - All Talk
3.plot: Ryan deals with the consequences of his actions while Nate helps Alvey with press for his fight. Dom gets closer to Ryan, and Jay and Mac look for a party. Nate takes on a tough opponent.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E07 - Platinum Level
3.plot: Ryan checks in with Keith while Alvey looks for a distraction from his pain. A new boss moves in with Christina. Jay gets back in the gym, and Lisa considers a tempting offer.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E08 - Old Pueblo
3.plot: An unexpected trip makes Alvey reassess his relationship with his sons. Cody puts Christina in a tough position with Kayla. Ryan questions Lisa's judgment about Dom, and Lisa makes a decision.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E09 - Cactus
3.plot: Dom dishes on Navy St. and forces Lisa to make an unexpected move. Alvey tries to connect with his mother while bonding with Nate and Jay in the desert.

3.title: FR - Kingdom - S03E10 - Lie Down in the Light
3.plot: Alvey's comeback fight couldn't come at a worse time as Navy St. comes to grips with tragedy. Roles are reversed when Ryan coaches Alvey, and Lisa begins a new chapter.

meta.plot: Kingdom est un drame familial dont l'action se déroule dans le quartier de Venice à Los Angeles. La série sombre et violente suit une famille qui évolue dans le milieu du mixed martial arts. On y suit leurs addictions et leurs relations tumultueuses.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E01 - Olivia Measures Up
1.plot: In the series opener of this cartoon about an adventurous young pig with a vivid imagination, Olivia tries to stop her little brother from growing.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E02 - Olivia Plays Hotel
1.plot: Olivia transforms her home into a make-believe hotel and entertains her friends at the establishment.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E03 - Olivia's Ice Spectacular
1.plot: The ice-skating show Olivia wants to see gets canceled, so she stages her own show in her backyard.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E04 - Olivia's Snow Day
1.plot: When school is closed because of snowfall, Olivia pretends to be a reporter and investigates a story about the abominable snowman.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E05 - Olivia's Magic Act
1.plot: Olivia performs magic tricks, including one where she makes herself disappear.

1.title: FR - Olivia - S01E06 - Olivia and the School Concert
1.plot: Olivia helps Ian overcome his stage fright so he can perform his celery song at the school concert.

meta.plot: Cinq années ont passé pour Olivia Alessandri. Réconciliée avec son passé tourmenté, elle a ouvert un cabinet d’avocat à Nice avec un credo : défendre les causes perdues ! Ce qu’elle a fait pour elle-même quelques années plus tôt, elle le fait maintenant pour les autres.

Un prisonnier dans le couloir de la mort aux États-Unis, un vicaire dans une paisible ville anglaise et un professeur de mathématiques pris au piège dans une cave se croisent de la manière la plus inattendue.

1.title: FR - Inside Man - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The lives of a prisoner on death row, a journalist looking for a story, a vicar in a sleepy English town and a maths tutor trapped in a cellar intertwine in a deadly way.

1.title: FR - Inside Man - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Condemned prisoner Jefferson Grieff has a mission for journalist Beth Davenport, and vicar Harry Watling faces an impossible choice.

1.title: FR - Inside Man - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Harry’s dilemma worsens, the fate of his family hangs in the balance - but he’s determined to do the right thing. Meanwhile, Beth Davenport meets one of Jefferson Grieff’s helpers in the outside world, who delivers a chilling warning. In the cellar, Janice’s desperation grows.

1.title: FR - Inside Man - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As events spiral out of control, Jefferson Grieff prepares to face execution - and time is also running out for Janice Fife in the cellar. An increasingly desperate Harry Watling struggles to do the right thing - but can he stay on the side of the angels and still keep his wife and son safe?

meta.plot: Suite à la disparition de leur fille, les Klatt décident de prendre les choses en main et élaborent un plan insensé : espionner le voisinage. Les apprentis espions vont mettre au jour une kyrielle de secrets stupéfiants.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E01 - The Klatts
1.plot: When their missing daughter's shirt turns up in a neighborhood donation bin, Carlotta and Dedo come up with a wild idea to find her.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E02 - The Hessels
1.plot: Dedo clumsily breaks into the home of a teacher from Wanda's school. Ole discovers what his parents are doing and makes a suggestion.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E03 - The Roths
1.plot: After a session at her therapist's house, Carlotta spots something suspicious. Detective Rauch gets a troubling update on the case.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E04 - The Vinsons
1.plot: Carlotta forms a bond with Lucie Vinson, Wanda's schoolmate. Dedo and Ole stumble upon a new clue.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E05 - The Novaks
1.plot: Dedo's secret is exposed. Ole attends Games World and meets Chris, who gives him hopeful news about Wanda.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E06 - The Küchlers
1.plot: Carlotta and Dedo find themselves in a scary situation, and it forces them to confront their problems.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E07 - The King
1.plot: The Klatts forge a plan to cover their tracks after Detective Rauch suspects the homes in their neighborhood are bugged.

1.title: FR - Where's Wanda? - S01E08 - Wandafest
1.plot: With the festival underway, the Klatts set out on their mission—and make a shocking discovery.

meta.plot: Due to a rare phenomenon, a woman finds herself pregnant with twins by two men. Over time, she strives to keep her family united — and her secrets hidden.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E01 - More Than I Ever Wanted
1.plot: After uncovering Tomás' betrayal, Liana attends a party with her best friend Débora, but the night ends with a sinister — and life-changing — twist.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E02 - Eyes Wide Open
1.plot: While Tomás celebrates Liana's pregnancy, her crisis deepens amid tangled family secrets. Sílvia receives life-altering news about Inácio's health.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E03 - A Love Divided
1.plot: When Tomás learns the truth about the twins, Liana faces a tough decision about their future while keeping the secret from their family.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E04 - In Pieces
1.plot: After the twins' birth, Tomás visits Betina's house. Oscar's bar activities are disrupted by an anonymous complaint that has serious repercussions.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E05 - Tough Choices
1.plot: After a tumultuous period, Oscar decides to leave Brazil. Norma moves in with Liana and Tomás, and the boys develop a passion for futsal.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E06 - The Writing on the Wall
1.plot: Tomás apologizes for his harshness to Marcos and Mateus. Vicente proposes to Sílvia, and Liana faces her past as Oscar makes a shocking decision.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E07 - Secrets and Shadows
1.plot: After Oscar hires Inácio to DJ at his bar, Liana feels cornered as he grows dangerously close to her family, prompting Tomás to intervene.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E08 - Uncomfortable Truths
1.plot: Tomás confronts Oscar, who sets conditions to leave the family alone. The twins' birthday spirals into chaos when an unexpected visitor crashes the party.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E09 - Never Again
1.plot: Tensions peak as Oscar, with Cláudia's help, seeks the truth through a DNA test. The results culminate in a dramatic showdown at Liana's home.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E10 - Picking Up the Pieces
1.plot: Tomás faces the consequences of his confrontation with Oscar. As life moves on, Liana and the boys navigate new beginnings and old pains.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E11 - The Truth Will Set You Free
1.plot: Tomás gains respect preaching in prison, while Marcos and Mateus face bullying over their father's past. The tension escalates into a fight at school.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E12 - Love and Fear
1.plot: Tomás exits prison, showing startling indifference to his family. Meanwhile, a visit to Júlia's house by the boys takes an unforeseen turn.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E13 - Settling Scores
1.plot: Family secrets unravel as Marcos questions his paternity, leading to an escape. A meeting at Débora's bar ends in confusion.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E14 - The Truth Hurts
1.plot: Family tensions escalate as Tomás publicly reveals long-held secrets. Meanwhile, Marcos grapples with his identity, leading to a risky decision.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E15 - Can Lies Heal?
1.plot: Marcos awakens from a coma with fragmented memories, sparking family dilemmas as he struggles to reconnect with his past.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E16 - Cause and Effect
1.plot: As Marcos fully recovers his past, tensions rise, prompting Liana to have a difficult conversation. Meanwhile, Inácio and Bia share happy news.

1.title: FR - Desperate Lies - S01E17 - My Other Half
1.plot: Liana reveals a painful truth to Marcos, sparking emotional healing. As new chapters begin for some, Tomás' unresolved conflicts dangerously resurface.

meta.plot: Après la perte tragique de son épouse, un pédopsychiatre rencontre un jeune garçon perturbé qui semble présenter un lien troublant avec le passé du médecin.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E01 - The Imposter
1.plot: Dr. Eli Adler is a child psychiatrist haunted by his wife Lynn's death. One day, eight-year-old Noah shows up with inexplicable knowledge of Eli's life.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E02 - The Scientist
1.plot: After Noah's school outburst, Eli becomes more involved in his treatment, uncovering eerie drawings and chilling parallels to his own trauma.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E03 - The Liar
1.plot: Battling his demons and unresolved grief over Lynn's death, Eli grapples with his connection to Noah but reaches a breakthrough.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E04 - Symbols and Signs
1.plot: Unsettling connections between Lynn's secret project and Noah's drawings are discovered. Eli is forced to confront his skepticism.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E05 - Folie à Deux
1.plot: Noah's condition escalates at the hospital, leaving Denise desperate for answers. Eli finds recordings of Lynn's ex, Benjamin.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E06 - Fever Dream
1.plot: In a tense meeting, Eli explains his unorthodox method of treating Noah.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E07 - The Power of Belief
1.plot: To prevent Noah's transfer, Eli conducts a risky therapy session—and makes a startling revelation.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E08 - When We Dead Awaken
1.plot: When Eli discovers photos of a mysterious farmhouse, he sets out to find it.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E09 - And the Darkness Was Called Night
1.plot: Denise pleads for Eli's insight into Noah's condition. Eli aims to solve the puzzle of his connection with Noah.

1.title: FR - Before - S01E10 - Before
1.plot: Eli races against time to save Noah.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E01 - I
1.plot: To my son, Jonathan.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E02 - II
1.plot: Do you ever think of me?

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E03 - III
1.plot: Destiny doesn't ask permission.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E04 - IV
1.plot: I wanted him to die.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E05 - V
1.plot: I had to tell the world the truth.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E06 - VI
1.plot: Only death is irrevocable.

1.title: FR - Disclaimer - S01E07 - VII
1.plot: It's time for my voice to be heard.

meta.plot: Quand un intrigant roman apparaît au chevet d’une journaliste qui a construit sa carrière sur la révélation des transgressions, celle-ci réalise avec horreur qu’elle est un des personnages clés d’une histoire depuis longtemps enterrée, celle qui expose son plus sombre secret.

Lorsque la plus grande ferme d'élevage au monde se retrouve sans successeur, un conflit de générations menace de déchirer la famille Lawson. Sentant que cette dynastie autrefois florissante est en déclin, les factions rivales les plus puissantes de l'outback australien (barons de l'élevage, gangsters du désert, anciens du monde indigène et mineurs milliardaires) commencent à fourbir leurs armes.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Daniel's absence at the cattle station triggers hostility in the Lawson family. Graham tries to take the reins, and Emily seeks comfort elsewhere.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Graham runs for federation president and seeks Colin's support — but the pressure pushes him to drink. Emily turns to Hank for help finding Marshall.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Nolan is caught in a rift with the Indigenous community. Sandra proposes deals, and a risky job drives a wedge between Marshall and Rich.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The discovery of Daniel's saddle sparks new questions as Graham unravels. Marshall and Sharnie find solace in each other. Susie forges her own path.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Amid an uneasy truce, the Lawson family takes on an immense cattle muster. But sabotage — and tragedy — lead to devastating uncertainty.

1.title: FR - Territory - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Emily debates her future at Marianne Station. Lachie makes an explosive revelation about Sandra's motives, leading to a dangerous shootout.

meta.plot: Dans cette histoire qui se déroule dans la ville fictive de Kamurocho, deux époques se croisent : 1995 et 2005. En 1995, quatre amis désireux d'échapper aux contraintes de leurs vies à l'orphelinat plongent dans le monde des yakuzas de Kamurocho. En 2005, leur amitié s'est détériorée et les tensions entre le clan Tojo et l'alliance Omi sont à leur comble.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E01 - Departure／Return
1.plot: In 1995, eager to escape their restrictive lives, Kiryu and his friends plan a heist at a local arcade. However, the arcade is under the control of the Doujima Family, a powerful yakuza organization that rules Kamurocho. Meanwhile, in 2005, with Kiryu set to be released from prison, he learns from Detective Date that his friends are in danger and he decides to return to Kamurocho to protect them.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E02 - Ambition／Desire
1.plot: 1995. Kazama, who runs the Sunflower orphanage, had hoped that Kiryu, Nishiki, Yumi, and Miho would lead honest lives. However, contrary to his wishes, the four are ultimately plunged into the underworld of the yakuza. Meanwhile, in 2005, tensions between the Omi Alliance and the Tojo Clan are at a boiling point over a 10 billion yen heist.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E03 - Brothers／Sisters
1.plot: 1995. The Doujima Family closes in on Edgar's younger sister, who was entrusted with the official seal necessary for selling his land. Meanwhile, Yumi travels to Osaka in search of her estranged older sister. At the same time, the battle over Edgar's seal escalates. In 2005, Aiko disappears, leaving her daughter Haruka behind. Kiryu and Yumi decide to protect Haruka, but they soon make a discovery.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E04 - Betrayal／Promise
1.plot: In 1995, an overworked Miho falls seriously ill. Nishiki, deeply concerned for his sister, finds himself at the mercy of Doujima's scheme that exploits his vulnerability. In 2005, while Kiryu and Yumi continue their search for Aiko in Osaka, they encounter Chairman Goda of the Omi Alliance, who forces them to promise to return the 10 billion yen by midnight the next day.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E05 - Despair／Hope
1.plot: In 2005, Kazama meets with Chairman Goda of the Omi Alliance in an effort to prevent a war with the Tojo Clan. The unresolved conflict between Kiryu and Nishiki from ten years ago resurfaces, once again driving a wedge between them. In 1995, Kiryu, who had been on a winning streak in underground fighting to fund Miho's surgery, finally reaches the pinnacle with a high-stakes title fight.

1.title: FR - Like a Dragon : Yakuza - S01E06 - Fate／Showdown
1.plot: 1995. The bond between Kiryu, Nishiki, Yumi, and Miho, who had been there for each other like family, tragically falls apart. 2005. Can Kiryu prevent a war between the Tojo Clan and the Omi Alliance? How will Kiryu and Nishiki resolve their 10-year-old conflict? And what is the true identity of the Shinjuku Devil? With rising tensions, they face the final battle in Kamurocho.

meta.plot: Quand Kimmy Diore est kidnappée en plein jour, l’onde de choc dépasse son cercle familial car il ne s’agit pas d’une petite fille de six ans comme les autres : Kimmy est une star de YouTube dont les vidéos sont suivies par des millions de spectateurs. Pour la sauver, Sara Roussel doit plonger dans ce monde dont elle ignore tout, aussi fascinant que terrifiant. Elle entre dans l’intimité des Diore et dévoile peu à peu des secrets qui résonnent avec les siens.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E01 - The Disappearance
1.plot: Mélanie Diore has turned her six-year-old daughter Kimmy into an Internet star thanks to her "Happy Recess" channel and its millions of followers. When the child influencer is kidnapped, Sara Roussel finds herself in charge of the investigation. She must dive into a world she knows nothing about, and into the family that seems to have a lot to hide.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E02 - The Knight
1.plot: After receiving a message from the kidnapper accompanied by a recording of Kimmy's voice, Mélanie publicly reveals her daughter's abduction. In the midst of a media storm, the police continue their investigation. The Diores may have millions of fans, but they also have their share of haters, and the kidnapper could be among them.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E03 - Mothers and Daughters
1.plot: The investigation continues. Could the kidnapper be David Bouthier, the former reality TV star who shares a mysterious past with Mélanie Diore? Or Valentin Lavalle, the misogynist released by the police? As media pressure mounts for the Diore family, the arrival of Mélanie's mother Isabelle adds fuel to the fire. As Bruno pulls away, Mélanie turns to Sara for help. The two women grow closer.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E04 - Skidding
1.plot: Bruno is arrested following David Bouthier's revelations. Mélanie becomes convinced of the guilt of her rival Fabrice Perrot, who is profiting from Kimmy's disappearance. Sara follows this trail while Malik explores the pedophile angle. But the clock is ticking, the police are in a rut, and Sara loses her footing. Back home, Bruno discovers an SD card with terrifying contents in Sammy's room.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E05 - Memory Card
1.plot: Sara wakes up in the police station and finds Bruno and Sammy who have come to give her the SD card. Sara refuses to believe the images she sees. Following the previous day's slip-up, Mélanie complains to Salomé, who pulls Sara off the case. Nonetheless, Sara delves into Mélanie's past and makes a discovery that points her in the direction of Kimmy's kidnapper.

1.title: FR - Les Enfants sont rois - S01E06 - White Zone
1.plot: Baptiste and Sara find Kimmy's cuddly toy and no longer have any doubt as to the kidnapper's identity. While Baptiste warns the rest of the group, Sara sets off alone for the Ardennes to look for Kimmy. On the spot, the local gendarmerie organizes a search party. In custody, Mélanie grows impatient.

1.title: FR - Diagnosis - S01E01 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E02 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E03 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E04 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E05 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E06 -
FR - Diagnosis - S01E07 -
FR - The Most Hated Man on the Internet - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When her daughter's private phots and information are posted online, a justice-seeking mother takes swift action against the site and its popular owner.

1.title: FR - The Most Hated Man on the Internet - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Charlotte Laws connects with a reporter, and a national TV interview makes Hunter Moore a target, drawing attention from the FBI and an entrepreneur.

1.title: FR - The Most Hated Man on the Internet - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The FBI works to confirm a conspiracy.  Charlotte finds an ally in a hacker group.  After an arrest is made, one victim seizes the chance to speak up.

meta.plot: Une mère se lance dans une lutte acharnée pour faire tomber le monstre à l'origine d'un site de porno-vengeance où apparaissent des photos compromettantes de sa fille.

1.title: FR - Drug Lords - S01E01 - Pablo Escobar
1.plot: Colombian drug lord Pablo Escobar leads a horrific war against his own country until a team of politicians and police end his reign of terror.

1.title: FR - Drug Lords - S01E02 - The Cali Cartel
1.plot: Gilberto and Miguel Rodríguez Orejuela use violence and guile to turn the Cali Cartel into a $7 billion-per-year criminal operation.

1.title: FR - Drug Lords - S01E03 - Frank Lucas & The Country Boys: Heroin Kings of New York
1.plot: Frank Lucas does whatever it takes to become -- and remain -- the heroin king of New York. Meanwhile, three dedicated cops vow to bring him down.

1.title: FR - Drug Lords - S01E04 - The Pettingill Clan: Australia’s Heroin Dynasty
1.plot: A mother and her sadistic boys rule the Australian underworld until the eldest son's addiction hastens the family's downfall.

2.title: FR - Drug Lords - S02E01 - El Chapo
2.plot: After idolizing drug lords as a child, Joaquín "El Chapo" Guzmán becomes one of history's most notorious kingpins, known for his audacious escapes.

2.title: FR - Drug Lords - S02E02 - Jemeker Thompson: Crack Queen of L.A
2.plot: Once the undisputed crack queen of LA, Jemeker Thompson speaks about her unorthodox reign and how her maternal instinct led to her downfall.

2.title: FR - Drug Lords - S02E03 - Christopher Coke: Jamaica’s Narco Prince
2.plot: Driven by an all-consuming desire for power, Jamaica's Christopher Coke considers himself a modern-day Robin Hood -- until authorities take him down.

2.title: FR - Drug Lords - S02E04 - Klaas Bruinsma: Europe’s Hash King
2.plot: Thought by many to be a pushover due to his boyish looks and wealthy upbringing, Klaas Bruinsma proves himself a sadistic and sinister drug lord.

meta.plot: Découvrez l'histoire des barons de la drogue les plus malfamés, de leurs monstrueux hommes de main, ainsi que des hommes et des femmes qui ont juré leur perte.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E01 - New Beginnings
1.plot: As the Habs kick off their 2023-24 season, the team’s management advocates patience with the rebuild process. But expectations are high.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E02 - Opening Night
1.plot: For the home opener, the Canadiens host the Blackhawks and Connor Bedard. And a look at one of the main architects of the rebuild.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E03 - Playing For Dads
1.plot: A serious injury sidelines a key player for the entire season, and the Bruins put a damper on the Habs’ father-son road trip.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E04 - A Turning Point
1.plot: On the road, the Habs find themselves at a turning point in the season. Montreal fans and media react to the team’s latest off-ice deal.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E05 - A Legend Returns
1.plot: At mid-season, the Habs organization is intently focused on the future, while the return of a legend from the past has the city abuzz.

1.title: FR - La reconstruction: au Coeur des Canadiens de Montréal - S01E06 - Tough Choices
1.plot: An early trade shocks the Montreal hockey world. After a tough loss in New York, Jeff Gorton and Kent Hughes gear up for the trade deadline.

meta.plot: LA RECONSTRUCTION : AU COEUR DES CANADIENS DE MONTRÉAL suit le quotidien d’une transformation en profondeur qui s’amorce en 2023-2024.

Paris, 2001. M6 lance sa nouvelle émission Loft Story. Isabelle, Raphaël, Karim et leurs équipes ont moins de 4 mois pour mettre le show à l’antenne. Un pari fou pour ces jeunes producteurs prêt à tout pour se faire une place dans la cour des grands. Ils sont les premiers sur le terrain de la « real tv » et doivent tout inventer. Culte est une série fiction inspirée de faits réels.

1.title: FR - Culte - S01E01 - The Outsiders
FR - Culte - S01E02 - The Trailblazers
FR - Culte - S01E03 - The Amateurs
FR - Culte - S01E04 - The Scumbags
FR - Culte - S01E05 - The Liable Ones
FR - Culte - S01E06 - The Insiders

meta.plot: En 2017, l'Espagne est frappée par deux attaques terroristes commises par de jeunes membres de sa communauté. Que s'est-il passé ? Cette série percutante mène l'enquête.

1.title: FR - 800 mètres - S01E01 - A Group of Friends
1.plot: Chilling footage details how the young perpetrators were radicalized to become part of a terrorist movement and the planning of the attacks.

1.title: FR - 800 mètres - S01E02 - Something Happened on La Rambla
1.plot: The emotional testimonies of survivors, victims' relatives and first responders chronicle the events that unfolded on that tragic day on La Rambla.

1.title: FR - 800 mètres - S01E03 - Two Hours Later
1.plot: Police officers recount the search for the van driver and the next attack in Cambrils. The interviewees recall the peace protest held after the attacks.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E01 - First Tastes
1.plot: Torn between her dreams and her father's expectations, Amy arrives in Italy for an art program and meets a charming chef who gives her a new perspective.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E02 - Carne e Ossa
1.plot: Amy and Lino build a life together in Los Angeles while living in Amy's sister's apartment. A Thanksgiving family feast brings tensions to the table.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E03 - A Villa. A Broom. A Cake.
1.plot: Amid family drama on both sides, Amy and Lino celebrate a new chapter in the same place where their love story began.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E04 - Bitter Almonds
1.plot: Back in Los Angeles, Amy reaches a crossroads in her career and Lino seizes an opportunity — until devastating news brings their pursuits to a halt.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E05 - Bread and Brine
1.plot: Amy, Lino and their families are forced to face uncomfortable truths, make difficult decisions and heal old wounds.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E06 - Heirlooms
1.plot: Amy and Lino find a new source of joy and soon take on a series of unforeseen challenges.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E07 - Between the Fire and the Pan
1.plot: Amy and Idalia find support and strength in their family and try to prepare for what's to come.

1.title: FR - Le Goût de vivre - S01E08 - Aftertastes
1.plot: In Sicily, family ties usher in new beginnings as the next chapter in Amy and Lino's love story unfolds.

meta.plot: Amahle Wheeler, surnommée "Amy", une étudiante américaine qui tombe sous le charme de Lino, un chef sicilien, pendant ses études en Italie. Les deux amoureux doivent affronter des obstacles qu'ils n'avaient pas imaginés, notamment leur différence de culture, et savourent les nombreux moments de joie et de légèreté qui émaillent les périodes plus graves de la vie. Mais lorsque Lino est confronté à la maladie et que l'avenir du couple est menacé, leurs familles s'unissent par-delà les frontières, d'une façon qu'elles n'auraient jamais pu soupçonner, prouvant que l'amour est plus fort que tout.

Version japonaise de "Modern Love", cette série anthologique se déroulant à Tokyo dépeint l'amour sous différentes formes : l'amour oublié, entre mère et fils et l'amour qui transcende les frontières, ...

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E01 - Nursing My Son, and Other Grievances
1.plot: Mari Takada, a career woman, is raising children with her partner, Sayaka Kono. Balancing work and child-rearing, Mari believes the only connection she has with her son is through nursing and struggles to breast pump. But one day, she has to leave him with her mother, Mako (Meiko Kaji), due to a business trip, which triggers a change in Mari's stressed mind.

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E02 - What I Learned From Sleeping With Married Men
1.plot: Kana Sato is a university biology teacher. She and Keisuke, a writer, are recently divorced. She spends her days on a dating app meeting married men and has a series of affairs. Struggling with a sexless marriage, Kana engages in casual relationships to learn more about sex and love. Hearing these men’s true feelings, Kana must face what she was hiding from herself.

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E03 - How My Worst Date Ever Became My Best
1.plot: Natsuko Kurata, a curator, has been divorced for three years. Natsuko is over 60 and thinks that love isn't for her anymore. But her friend Kaoru recommends an app and she goes on a date. Kosuke Hayami, a kind man, meets her at a café in Harajuku. They talk about their pasts and Natsuko tells him about the worst date she ever had. Hayami was smiling until...

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E04 - My Hibernating Wife
1.plot: Kengo and Mai have been married for three years. Mai used to work as a designer, suffers from depression due to issues at work. Nevertheless, Kengo tries his best to bring back Mai's smile, supporting her even though she can no longer work and showing her love as he usually does. Mai's spirit begins to improve thanks to Kengo's devotion, but what kind of future awaits them?

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E05 - For 13 Days, I Believed Him
1.plot: Momoko Shinohara, a TV reporter, feels that she has failed in love. She meets Yoji Suzuki one day. The two spend more and more time together. They stay at Momoko's house and go camping in the mountains. Although they have only known each other a short time, Yoji becomes Momoko's citadel. However, Yoji has a secret he is keeping from Momoko.

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E06 - He Saved His Last Lesson for Me
1.plot: Emma is a British woman in Los Angeles trying to save money for a trip. While giving online lessons to international students, a Japanese man named Mamoru joins her class. Emma is shaken by a question from Mamoru. Feeling stuck in her life and unhappy with her ex-boyfriend, Emma finds new joy with Mamoru, but one day he suddenly tells her, "This is my last lesson."

1.title: FR - Modern Love Tokyo - S01E07 - He's Playing Our Song
1.plot: Tamami is stuck in her job and life. One day, she hears a song from her youth and her mind goes back 15 years. In high school, the reserved Tamami meets Rin, who plays the piano. Through their shared love of music the two become friends, but drift apart. Now in her thirties, she discovers that Rin has become a musician when she posts a picture on social media.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E01 - Wolf and Eagle
1.plot: Cherusci tribal chief Segimer bristles at the increasing demands of new governor Varus. Secret lovers Thusnelda and Folkwin deal Rome a symbolic blow.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E02 - Vengeance
1.plot: The theft of the standard provokes a crisis, reuniting Roman officer Ari with his father Segimer, and childhood friends Folkwin and Thusnelda.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E03 - On the Edge
1.plot: Ari commands troops ordered by Varus to hunt down and kill Folkwin, whose family and home village are put in danger for his act of defiance.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E04 - A New Reik
1.plot: Ari embraces his new role with the Cherusci but his shift of allegiances runs deeper than Varus knows. Thusnelda and Folkwin rally a rival tribe.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E05 - Treason
1.plot: Ari and Thusnelda forge a political marriage and begin uniting the fractious Germanic tribes. Folkwin is believed dead but has actually been enslaved.

1.title: FR - Barbares - S01E06 - The Battle
1.plot: Ari leads Varus and three Roman legions into the Teutoburg Forest — and into history. Thusnelda makes a bloody sacrifice to preserve the alliance.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E01 - New Legions
2.plot: Ari suspects the Romans of rebuilding their forces, so he seeks the help of an eastern tribal chief, Marbod. Ari’s brother, Flavus, arrives in Germania.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E02 - Captured
2.plot: A friend comes to Thusnelda’s aid when she infiltrates the Roman camp. Without Ari knowing, Marbod meets with Tiberius in a bid to secure peace.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E03 - Fathers
2.plot: Germanicus accuses Flavus of being a traitor. Ari brings Gaius to the village and then seeks revenge against Marbod. Thusnelda is angry at Ari for lying.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E04 - The Oath
2.plot: Tiberius requires a test of Marbod's loyalty. Flavus proposes an offer to Germanicus. The tribal chiefs gather to name Marbod king but tragedy strikes.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E05 - Doomed
2.plot: Marbod confronts Tiberius and demands justice. Thusnelda and Folkwin set out on a mission. Gaius hides out in the forest and makes a shocking discovery.

2.title: FR - Barbares - S02E06 - The Price
2.plot: The tribes prepare to attack the Roman camp before ships with reinforcements arrive. Segestes approaches Tiberius with a treacherous proposal.

meta.plot: Les hésitations d'un officier romain déchiré entre l'empire puissant qui l'a éduqué et sa tribu d'origine vont provoquer un conflit qui entrera dans l'Histoire.
Cette série de crimes réels montre comment des innocents ont été condamnés sur la base de techniques douteuses telles que l'ADN de contact ou les chiens de cadavres.

1.title: FR - Exhibit A - S01E01 - Video Forensics
1.plot: A Texas man is convicted of robbery when forensic experts see what they want to see in the analysis of store surveillance footage.

1.title: FR - Exhibit A - S01E02 - Blood Spatter
1.plot: The limits of forensic science are exposed when flawed blood spatter evidence leads to the conviction of a Texas woman for the murder of her husband

1.title: FR - Exhibit A - S01E03 - Cadaver Dogs
1.plot: Assumptions pass for facts when Detroit police misuse cadaver dogs to build a murder case against a man whose daughter has disappeared

1.title: FR - Exhibit A - S01E04 - Touch DNA
1.plot: In Brooklyn, an innocent man faces assault charges thanks to statistical DNA testing that that relies on deduction rather than proof

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E01 - The Peep Job
1.plot: Five boys newly enrolled in a formerly all-girls school, already having difficulty connecting with the girl students, run afoul of the school’s "Underground Student Council" and face strict disciplinary measures.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E02 - The Man Who Viewed Too Much
1.plot: Hana is embarrassed when Kiyoshi sees her in a compromising position. Kiyoshi becomes desperate to keep his date with Chiyo, and searches for a way to get out of prison in time to meet her. Gakuto has plans of his own.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E03 - A Mighty Spurt
1.plot: With Meiko’s attention divided between two groups, Kiyoshi is able to widen the escape hole enough to let him through in time for his date. An already-suspicious Shingo gets an eyeful of more than he bargained for.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E04 - Take Me Out to the Sumoland
