1.plot: After committing a heinous offense against Mari, Gakuto receives a drastic punishment from Meiko. Kiyoshi and Gakuto work desperately to break Kiyoshi out of the prison by having him impersonate a girl.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E05 - The School’s Number One Most Treacherous Man
1.plot: Kiyoshi returns from his breakout, but must face the music with Gakuto and the others when the truth comes to light. Chiyo reconsiders her reaction to Kiyoshi, and decides to give him a second chance.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E06 - Vengeance is Hana’s
1.plot: Mari introduces the DTO plan to Hana, and they begin plotting ways to drive the boys out of school. Shingo leads the others boys in shunning Kiyoshi, but Meiko has plans to drive an even deeper wedge between them.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E07 - Meiko’s Delicious Restaurant
1.plot: Shingo, on furlough from the prison, meets a girl named Anzu at the arcade in town. When Gakuto turns to his Guan Yu figurine for guidance, the tip of his sword falls off, starting a chain of events with momentous consequences.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E08 - The Diary of Andre
1.plot: Andre suffers a mental collapse when he goes for a week without receiving any discipline. Shingo takes Anzu to the movies, but finds his expectations betrayed. The Underground Student Council moves forward with their DTO project.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E09 - Full of Bodily Fluids
1.plot: Shingo realizes that he saw emails regarding DTO on the computer in the corrections office, which if recovered by the boys, would prove that they were set up. The boys plot to break into the corrections office.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E10 - It’s a Bum-derful Life
1.plot: The boys are resigned to their upcoming expulsions, and spirits are low, until Gakuto, suffering a bout of temporary insanity, devises one last strategy to get them out of their predicament, if they can just buy enough time to pull it off.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E11 - Eryngii Brockovich
1.plot: Given a one-day reprieve, the boys must again execute a plan to get inside the corrections office, but the Underground Student Council won’t make it easy for them. Hana has a personal score that she wishes to settle with Kiyoshi.

1.title: FR - Prison School - S01E12 - Good Morning, Prison!
1.plot: Hana continues pressing Kiyoshi in order to exact her revenge, but Kiyoshi employs an adaptation of a classical military strategy to counter her. Once all the boys are locked into their cells for the night, will they be able to complete their plan?

meta.plot: There was a time when the Hachimitsu Private Academy was a revered and elite all-girls' boarding school on the outskirts of Tokyo but a recent policy revision is allowing boys into the student body. On his first day, Kiyoshi Fujino discovers that he's one of only five boys enrolled at the school. Completely overwhelmed by the thousands of girls on campus, the few boys find that their situation is less than ideal.
Amelia s'apprête à intégrer l'une des familles les plus riches de Nantucket jusqu'à ce qu'un décès brutal compromette la noce... et fasse de chacun un suspect.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E01 - Happy Wedding Eve
1.plot: Wedding guests arrive on Nantucket for the lavish rehearsal dinner at the Winbury estate, but the nuptials take a tragic turn when a body is discovered.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E02 - She Would Never Do That
1.plot: While police search Summerland for clues, Greer's swift attempt to control the narrative makes Amelia uneasy. A wedding guest tries to leave the island.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E03 - The Perfect Family
1.plot: Greer works to keep up appearances for a magazine interview. Abby shares a scandalous secret. Amelia says the quiet part out loud during a family dinner.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E04 - Someone Could Get Hurt
1.plot: Tough questions from Detective Henry deepen Amelia's suspicions. Greer receives a mysterious call. Tensions rise and tempers flare among the Winburys.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E05 - Never Gonna Give You Up
1.plot: As Tag's movements at the party come under scrutiny, Amelia asks some questions of her own. Greer's efforts to throw the perfect book launch go awry.

1.title: FR - Un couple parfait - S01E06 - That Feels Better
1.plot: A twist in the police investigation plunges the Winbury family further into crisis. As long-buried secrets emerge, so does the truth about what happened.

meta.plot: Trois voleurs attaquent un bus et trouvent la mort. Tous les passagers donnent la même version : un homme au visage caché les a sauvés. Plus l'enquête avance, plus la frontière entre héros et criminel s'estompe.

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E01 - Three Dead on a Bus
FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E02 - Pact of Silence
FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E03 - The Justice
1.plot: Garza and Quirós finally get a lead as a tenacious television reporter begins looking into the bus vigilante dubbed “El Justiciero.”

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E04 - Face-to-Face
1.plot: The police are ready to arrest the man they believe to be the vigilante—until a new witness comes forward with shocking information.

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E05 - Theater
1.plot: Matías' account of events pushes Garza to drastic measures in search of the truth.

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E06 - A Difficult Decision
1.plot: Elisa breaks under pressure, and what she tells Garza and Quirós changes everything—but it's not enough to force Commissioner Jordan's hand.

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E07 - Free Again
1.plot: Weeks go by and the media frenzy around the case quiets at last. Garza gets an unexpected visit from two of the passengers.

1.title: FR - Tu ferais pareil - S01E08 - The Truth
1.plot: Armed with the truth, Garza takes matters into his own hands.

1.title: FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E01 - Kim
1.plot: One death occurs during an educational measure with juvenile offenders in the Alps.

1.title: FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E02 - Ron
1.plot: The young people are faced with a difficult decision: give up or flee?

1.title: FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E03 - Marvin & Jessica
FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E04 - Justin
FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E05 - Lindi
FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E06 - Rebecca
FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E07 - Can
FR - La montagne aux secrets - S01E08 - Restart

meta.plot: Au milieu d'un paysage infranchissable au pied des Alpes, un jeune groupe de grands délinquants suit un programme éducatif expérientiel destiné à les réhabiliter. Tout à coup, un membre du programme meurt de mort violente. Personne ne sait exactement ce qui s'est passé et les jeunes font face à une décision difficile. Devraient-ils attendre que les autorités récupèrent le corps et enquêtent sur le crime ? Ou s'échapper et prendre leur destin en main ? Le groupe n'a pas grand-chose en commun les uns avec les autres, bien qu'une chose les unit; Tous ont eu de très mauvaises expériences avec les autorités et ne s'attendent pas à être traités équitablement. Comme ils ne savent pas qui est l'agresseur, ils n'ont qu'une seule option : fuir. En haut des montagnes, en haut des plus hauts sommets des Alpes. Cela semble sans espoir jusqu'à ce qu'ils tombent sur un système de grottes complexe où ils peuvent trouver un abri contre le vent, les intempéries et leurs poursuivants.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E01 - A Place Called Heritage
1.plot: Alliances and loyalties are tested as Joe Sandoval assesses the future of his family-run Sonoma Valley wine business. Just a few hundred miles south but a world away, Carlos Rincón and sisters Juana and Rosa Sánchez cross the U.S. border from Mexico in search of a better life.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E02 - La Madrugada (Day Break)
1.plot: Joe faces different challenges as Mateo threatens to expose his past while Margaret conspires to obstruct his future. Carmen supports Veronica in a time of need, and Lettie is no longer able to ignore Junior’s misbehavior. Meanwhile, Carlos, Juana and Billy find time for a little fun while adjusting to their new lives.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E03 - La Lucha (The Struggle)
1.plot: Margaret has an offer for Carmen. Meanwhile, Joe hires a new general manager, and Veronica is put in a tricky situation.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E04 - El Regalo (The Gift)
1.plot: Father Ramos’ return to Sonoma makes waves throughout the Sandoval family, while Lettie and Joe hit a rough patch. Margaret is excited to be invited to Carmen’s 25th birthday party much to everyone else’s dismay. Young Lettie, Joe and Billy leave town on an important mission.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E05 - Los Rivales (Rivals)
1.plot: Joe reluctantly accepts Father Ramos’ help. Lettie spends the day with Daniela, while Mateo finds an unexpected business partner in Carmen. Veronica uncovers more about Michael. Young Joe and Billy encounter a visitor from their past

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E06 - El Cuchicheo (The Whispering)
1.plot: Joe’s award ceremony is interrupted, and Mateo makes an important decision. Meanwhile in the past, Billy and Lettie try to keep their relationship a secret.

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E07 - El Mejor de los Tiempos (The Best of Times)
1.plot: Veronica and Joe enter a tough labor contract negotiation with the new labor union lawyer. Carmen teams up with a powerful publicist to throw a tasting event, and Antonio learns more about Joe’s past. Young Lettie and young Margaret find themselves forever bonded by a traumatic event .

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E08 - La Verdad Te Hara Libre (The Truth Will Set You Free)
1.plot: Joe’s determination to investigate a murder scares Lettie, and Antonio makes a shocking realization. Meanwhile in the past, Marta helps Lettie and Margaret cover up a secret

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E09 - La Cosecha (The Harvest)
1.plot: It’s harvest time and Joe finds himself in a standoff with the labor union, while Mateo and Carmen scramble to pick from the harvest for their labels. Veronica and Antonio weigh offers from Margaret, and Lettie makes a major decision. Young Joe strikes a deal on behalf of his fellow workers

1.title: FR - Promised Land - S01E10 - La Tierrra Prometida (The Promised Land)
1.plot: In the midst of a battle between Margaret and his own kids, Joe makes a shocking realization. Meanwhile in the past, Joe finally finds a way to defeat Honeycroft, and Lettie makes a tough decision

meta.plot: Un drame épique couvrant plusieurs générations sur deux familles Latinx en lice pour la richesse et le pouvoir dans la vallée de Sonoma en Californie.

1.title: FR - Platonique - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Platonique - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Platonique - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Platonique - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Platonique - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Platonique - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Platonique - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Platonique - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Platonique - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Platonique - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Malheureux en couple, Yann et Elsa quittent leurs conjoints respectifs pur s’installer ensemble en toute amitié, bien sûr… A 35 ans, les 2 meilleurs amis se retrouvent en coloc. Un agréable retour en arrière ? Oui, les semaines paires . Car les semaines impaires… leurs gamins débarquent. Entre célibat retrouvé et famille-amitié, Yann et Elsa espèrent trouver l’équilibre parfait. Mais peut-on vraiment faire famille entre amis ?
De 1962 à 1976, la carrière télévisuelle de la cheffe cuisinière américaine Julia Child qui rend accessible la préparation de grands plats français auprès des téléspectateurs américains.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E01 - Omelette
1.plot: In 1962, cookbook author Julia Child boldly pitches a groundbreaking television series centered on demonstrations for the home cook – despite pushback from male station executives and her own husband.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E02 - Coq Au Vin
1.plot: Facing mounting pressure from station executives, Julia struggles to figure out how to present a complicated recipe. Later, on-set flubs threaten the future of the show – and Julia’s career.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E03 - Beef Bourguignon
1.plot: When the show goes overbudget, Julia doubles down on her efforts to continue making her dream a reality. As Paul contends with his fearsome father-in-law, Alice struggles with her new assignment.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E04 - Petit Fours
1.plot: As WGBH reaps the rewards of their new star’s efforts, a jealous rival threatens the station’s burgeoning success. While Julia struggles with the price of fame, Paul begins to accept defeat, and Alice changes tack.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E05 - Crêpes Suzette
1.plot: In San Francisco, Julia tests the waters of her newfound celebrity status alongside celebrated chef James Beard, leaving a brooding Paul to question the true cost of his wife’s fame.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E06 - Breads
1.plot: While Paul and Judith experiment with baking, Julia tackles a different kind of “bread.” As a sleep-deprived Russ tasks Alice with even more work, the future of Avis’s position on the show is called into question.

1.title: FR - Julia - S01E07 - Foie Gras
1.plot: While in New York, Julia and the show receive both accolades and criticism. As Avis forges an unlikely friendship with Paul, Alice finds an unexpected connection of her own.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E01 - Loup en Croûte
2.plot: In France, Julia butts heads with Simca while working on volume two of their cookbook. In Boston, Alice faces pressure to find the network’s next hit.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E02 - Fried Chicken
2.plot: After failing to see eye-to-eye with Simca, Julia proposes a culinary showdown. Meanwhile, Alice and Avis each face new romantic possibilities.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E03 - Pressed Duck
2.plot: Left to her own devices in Paris, Avis bonds with a prominent existentialist, while Julia turns to her friends at Le Cordon Bleu for help with an impossible recipe. As WGBH experiences a shake-up, Alice goes through a trial of her own.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E04 - Chocolate Mousse
2.plot: After returning to Boston, Julia finds herself at odds with her new director and Avis's new beau. Later, a run-in with an old colleague finds Julia fielding questions from the FBI.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E05 - Bûche De Noël
2.plot: While preparing for an interview with Life magazine, Julia is thrown by a surprise visit from Paul’s domineering twin brother, Charles.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E06 - Chartwinkerie
2.plot: While WGBH prepares for their annual fundraiser, Julia receives an offer from a network with the funds to take The French Chef to the next level.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E07 - Shrimp & Grits
2.plot: After receiving an invitation from the White House, the WGBH crew travels down to the nation’s capital for a chance to film inside the President’s own kitchen. Back in Boston, Paul finds himself at the beck and call of various friends in need.

2.title: FR - Julia - S02E08 - Lobster Américaine
2.plot: When the FBO descends on WGBH, Julia uses her experience in wartime espionage to keep the crew safe from accusations of 'un-American conduct'.

meta.plot: Un magicien installé dans un parc d'attractions à l'abandon fait disparaître les malheurs d'une ado désabusée et réapparaître un petit espoir malgré la cruauté de sa vie.

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E01 - Do you... believe in magic?
1.plot: Yoon Ah-yi’s silent scream for help is answered by Ri-eul, who appears before her during a time of need and makes her wonder: is he really a magician?

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E02 - Don't let me dream any longer
1.plot: Set on exposing Ri-eul's secrets, Baek Ha-na enters the theme park with a camera and captures Ah-yi inside. Na Il-deung asks Ah-yi on a study date.

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E03 - Merry-go-round
1.plot: Il-deung and Ah-yi make a deal to try to make each other's lives easier. Suspicious about Ri-eul, Il-deung secretly follows Ah-yi to her magic lessons.

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E04 - Becoming an adult
1.plot: Il-deung begins questioning his path. Ha-na discovers shocking footage in the hidden camera from Ri-eul's room. Ah-yi finds comfort from the future.

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E05 - Curse of asphalt
1.plot: Ha-na infuriates Ri-eul by snooping for evidence in his room. The police ask Ah-yi questions about a caped person of interest.

1.title: FR - The Sound of Magic - S01E06 - The last performance
1.plot: Through a longtime friend, Ah-yi and Il-deung learn of Ryu Min-hyuk's pained past. The magician disappears from the interrogation room.

meta.plot: Pendant des millénaires, le royaume virtuel d’Everrealm a été une terre magique d’une beauté inégalée. Hélas, celui-ci est aujourd’hui menacé par une sorcière maléfique. En désespoir de cause, les nobles Destins font appel à huit adolescents venus d’un autre monde - les Paladins - pour remporter une série d’épreuves permettant de sauver cet univers fantastique de l’emprise du mal. Le salut du royaume dépend entièrement d’eux. S’ils se surpassent et font preuve d’héroïsme, le bien triomphera. S’ils échouent, tout sera perdu. A jamais !

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E01 - Strangers Arrive
1.plot: The Paladins learn their quest: restore the Divine Crown before Everealm falls to Tavora.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E02 - The Weight of the World
1.plot: The Paladins must blind Tavora’s flying spies and reclaim the Dragior’s Gem of Strength.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E03 - A Mysterious Gift
1.plot: Tavora secrets a magic mirror into Oraa, revealing the heirs and the Paladins’ quest.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E04 - A Castle Divided
1.plot: The heirs are divided, Dravus is tempted, and the Paladins face their final gem keeper.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E05 - Chaos
1.plot: The Paladins seek keys to the King Stone as Tavora turns Dravus, seizing the Divine Crown.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E06 - Betrayal from Within
1.plot: The heirs are divided, and faith in the Paladins is shaken as Dravus and Tavora sow chaos.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E07 - A Light in the Darkness
1.plot: Heirs and Paladins rally to rescue Cedric from Dark Legion as the Quest hangs in balance.

1.title: FR - Le tournoi d’Everrealm - S01E08 - The One True Hero
1.plot: The One True Hero emerges to face off against Tavora for the future of Everealm.

meta.plot: Une femme doit lutter contre la négligence des institutions de l'État et le harcèlement des médias après la disparition de sa sœur.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E01 - These Things Don't Happen Here
1.plot: After a woman disappears from her home, her husband alerts the police, a lawyer gets interested in the case, and her sister leads a search in the area.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E02 - If You Vanished, What Would They Say About You?
1.plot: The police receive an anonymous letter. Pizarro carries out his own investigation with the help of two associates and offers his services to the family.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E03 - The House Across the Street
1.plot: The media descend upon the Montes family's home. Mario draws suspicion when inconsistencies between his declaration and Verónica's call log are found.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E04 - Day 42
1.plot: Mario points out Cecilia and her husband as suspects. Braulio and Nora lose hope in the investigation. A discovery unearths the authorities' negligence.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E05 - I Don't Believe What They Say
1.plot: After sharing the forensic report's conclusion with Cecilia, Pizarro and his team deepen their research. Years later, a new lead reopens the case.

1.title: FR - 42 jours d'obscurité - S01E06 - Still In the Dark
1.plot: A confession reignites the family's hope to get justice, but the lack of evidence threatens to hurt the case. Kari asks her dad a painful question.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E01 - SONNIE'S EDGE
1.plot: In the underground world of "beastie" fights, Sonnie is unbeatable -- as long as she keeps her edge.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E02 - THREE ROBOTS
1.plot: Long after the fall of humanity, three robots embark on a sightseeing tour of a post-apocalyptic city.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E03 - THE WITNESS
1.plot: After seeing a brutal murder, a woman flees from the killer through the streets of a surreal city.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E04 - SUITS
1.plot: A community of farmers use their homemade mechs to defend their families from an alien invasion.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E05 - SUCKER OF SOULS
1.plot: Unleashed by an archaeological dig, a bloodthirsty demon battles a team of mercenaries armed with... cats?

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E06 - WHEN THE YOGURT TOOK OVER
1.plot: After scientists accidentally breed super-intelligent yogurt, it soon hungers for world domination.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E07 - BEYOND THE AQUILA RIFT
1.plot: Awakening after traveling light years off course, a ship's crew struggles to discover just how far they've come.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E08 - GOOD HUNTING
1.plot: The son of a spirit hunter forges a bond with a shape-shifting huli jing.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E09 - THE DUMP
1.plot: Ugly Dave calls the garbage dump home, and he's not about to let some city slicker take it away from him.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E10 - SHAPE-SHIFTERS
1.plot: Deep in Afghanistan, two Marines with supernatural powers face a threat from one of their own kind.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E11 - HELPING HAND
1.plot: Stranded in orbit, an astronaut must choose between life and limb before her oxygen runs out.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E12 - FISH NIGHT
1.plot: After their car breaks down in the desert, two salesmen take a dreamlike voyage to the dawn of time.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E13 - LUCKY 13
1.plot: After the drop-ship Lucky 13 lost two crews, no pilot would fly her... but rookies don't get a choice.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E14 - ZIMA BLUE
1.plot: The renowned artist Zima recounts his mysterious past and rise to fame before unveiling his final work.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E15 - BLINDSPOT
1.plot: A gang of cyborg thieves stage a high-speed heist of a heavily armored convoy.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E16 - ICE AGE
1.plot: A young couple moves into an apartment and finds a lost civilization inside their antique freezer.

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E17 - ALTERNATE HISTORIES
1.plot: Want to see Hitler die in a variety of comically fantastic ways? Now you can. Welcome to Multiversity!

1.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S01E18 - THE SECRET WAR
1.plot: Elite units of the Red Army fight an unholy evil deep in the ancient forests of Siberia.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E01 - Automated Customer Service
2.plot: If your home-cleaning unit is attempting to murder you, please press 3.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E02 - Ice
2.plot: Two brothers far from home join genetically "modded" locals in a deadly race.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E03 - Pop Squad
2.plot: A cop charged with fighting the scourge of overpopulation is haunted by the human toll of his work.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E04 - Snow in the Desert
2.plot: Every bounty hunter in the galaxy wants a piece of Snow.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E05 - The Tall Grass
2.plot: During a journey across the prairie, a man becomes transfixed by distant, ghostly lights.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E06 - All Through the House
2.plot: On Christmas Eve, two kids tiptoe downstairs to catch a glimpse of Santa. A twisted tale for adults only.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E07 - Life Hutch
2.plot: After crash-landing on a craggy planet, a pilot makes his way to shelter, only to face a threat within.

2.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S02E08 - The Drowned Giant
2.plot: The body of a colossal young man washes ashore and becomes an object of fascination for the locals.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E01 - Three Robots: Exit Strategies
3.plot: Three robots walk into the post-apocalypse… and take a whirlwind tour of humankind's last attempts to save itself.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E02 - Bad Travelling
3.plot: Release the Thanapod! A ship’s crew member sailing an alien ocean strikes a deal with a ravenous monster of the deep.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E03 - The Very Pulse of the Machine
3.plot: When an exploratory mission to a Jovian moon ends in disaster, the lone survivor must begin a perilous but mind-expanding journey.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E04 - Night of the Mini Dead
3.plot: A bit of unholy cemetery sex ends badly, kicking off a worldwide zombie plague. It’s the cutest apocalypse you’ll ever see.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E05 - Kill Team Kill
3.plot: US Special Forces are trained to neutralize any threat — even a cybernetic killing machine created by the CIA. Their secret weapon? A sense of humor.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E06 - Swarm
3.plot: Two human scientists study the secrets of an ancient alien entity — but soon learn the horrible price of survival in a hostile universe.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E07 - Mason's Rats
3.plot: Welcome to the Ratpocalypse! Farmer Mason knows he has a real pest problem when they start shooting back. Bloody hell!

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E08 - In Vaulted Halls Entombed
3.plot: Modern warfare meets elder gods. A special forces squad on a hostage rescue mission finds themselves trapped in a prison containing an age-old evil.

3.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S03E09 - Jibaro
3.plot: A deaf knight and a siren of myth become entwined in a deadly dance. A fatal attraction infused with blood, death and treasure.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E01 - Can't Stop
4.plot: Turn up your stereo and tune into a Red Hot Chili Peppers concert that's unlike any other — with a few strings attached.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E02 - Close Encounters of the Mini Kind
4.plot: They came in peace. But when their first encounter with Earthlings goes awry, these extra-tiny extraterrestrials are ready for vengeance.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E03 - Spider Rose
4.plot: At the edge of the galaxy, a grieving woman dreams of revenge. Can an adorable newcomer help her destroy her enemies — without destroying her humanity?

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E04 - 400 Boys
4.plot: Are they gods? Are they giants? All this band of survivors knows is that they're deadly — and they'll have to set aside their own turf war to stop them.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E05 - The Other Large Thing
4.plot: This furry revolutionary has plans for world domination. All he needs is a henchman with opposable thumbs.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E06 - Golgotha
4.plot: A mysterious race of aquatic aliens has arrived on Earth. They don't want to be taken to our leaders.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E07 - The Screaming of the Tyrannosaur
4.plot: In an orbital arena, gladiators and dinosaurs compete in a deadly race — and face a terrifying new opponent.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E08 - How Zeke Got Religion
4.plot: On a perilous mission into hostile territory, the crew of a World War II bomber encounters an unholy enemy.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E09 - Smart Appliances, Stupid Owners
4.plot: From thermostats to toothbrushes to toilets, these ultra-modern appliances have something to say about their hapless owners.

4.title: FR - Love, Death & Robots - S04E10 - For He Can Creep
4.plot: London, 1757. Satan battles a cat for the soul of a poet whose verse could give him dominion over the earth.

meta.plot: Créatures terrifiantes, méchantes surprises et comédie noire convergent dans cette anthologie d’animation pour adulte présentée par Tim Miller et David Fincher. Une collection de courts métrages animés en tous genres: science fiction, fantasy, horreur et comédie.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E01 - The Haunting (1)
1.plot: When a lawyer collapses in a courtroom, Raphaëlle and Astrid start an investigation which leads them to a house filled with supernatural phenomena.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E02 - The Haunting (2)
1.plot: Raphaëlle and Astrid take an interest in a former resident of the mysterious house, a woman who murdered her entire family there 24 years ago.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E03 - Missing Link
1.plot: A Natural History Museum employee is found dead at the foot of a dinosaur skeleton. Not a drop of water on the horizon and yet, the victim drowned.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E04 - Locked Room
1.plot: When a famous writer is found dead, the duo starts an investigation on the trail of a tragic fire that could be the source of a Machiavellian revenge.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E05 - Fulcanelli
1.plot: Astrid and Raphaëlle find out that the dead body discovered after the collapse of an underground gallery is that of an 80 year-old alchemist.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E06 - The Man Who Never Was
1.plot: When a man collapses on a bus, possibly killed by an extremely contagious disease, the duo ends up confronting the leader of an eco-terrorist group.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E07 - Dead and Company
1.plot: After the president of an autistic association dies mysteriously, a new corpse is found. Though officially deceased days earlier, he is a suspect.

1.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S01E08 - Invisible
1.plot: A woman is murdered, but the main suspect was in prison at the time of the events. The duo quickly realizes that it is the work of a serial killer.

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E01 - Starling
2.plot: A famous lawyer is shot dead in front of twelve witnesses who have seen nothing, heard nothing: are they accomplices to the murder or victims of an incredible mystification... Through a neurologist with mentalist talents, Astrid and Raphaëlle will direct their investigation to a magician, former television star. By digging into the victim's past, they will eventually understand that magic was the starting point of his success but also of a terrible personal drama.

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E02 - Irezumi
2.plot: The Japanese owner of an art gallery is found dead in a spa. Killed with a sword, he would have cut off his little finger as a sign of penance before dying as a yakuza would. Astrid and Raphaëlle go in search of a killer with a huge tattoo on his back. They will gradually realize that a family story is the key to murder.

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E03 - The Fermi Paradox
2.plot: A man is killed in an ultra-secure factory from which the main suspect inexplicably managed to escape. Astrid and Raphaëlle are about to leave the crime scene, when it appears before their eyes, in a flash. Could she have been the victim of an alien abduction as suggested by the first elements of the investigation or is another much more tangible reality behind this crime?

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E04 - High Point
2.plot: A trainee is found dead in the huge organ of the Maison de la Radio. Astrid and Raphaëlle investigate the very heart of the instrument and meet an organist prodigy and her cantankerous old teacher. Things get tough when a second lifeless body is found near the organ. The modus operandi is the same... A track is beginning to emerge: what if it was the music that kills?

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E05 - Circe
2.plot: A young woman is found dead in a forest. Her body is partially burned and it seems that strange rituals were performed at the crime scene. Disturbing detail: she gave birth just hours before her death and the baby's whereabouts are unknown. Astrid and Raphaëlle find themselves on the trail of a feminist association: Circé. Was this young woman killed because of her commitment? Is the murder related to an obscure practice of witchcraft or to the baby she was carrying?

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E06 - Golem
2.plot: One of the associates of a high-tech company is murdered. The crime scene suggests that this Orthodox Jew may have been a victim of the Golem, a mythical clay creature obeying the orders of its creator. This directs the investigation towards an artificial intelligence project with disturbing realism. While their first suspect sinks into madness, Astrid and Raphaëlle will discover that taking oneself for God is never without consequences.

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E07 - The Book
2.plot: At an auction, the auctioneer presents a precious ancient manuscript, the Corpus Hermeticum, before having a fit of delirium and then collapsing, dead. Apparently, he was poisoned, and in panic, the priceless book was replaced by a fake. Astrid and Raphaëlle will be interested in this object that would contain absolute knowledge and that arouses the wildest desires.

2.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S02E08 - In Custody
2.plot: An armed woman enters the criminal documentation and takes everyone hostage. Accused of killing her godfather to Alcoholics Anonymous, she absolutely wants to prove her innocence. She is desperate, alone against all... Astrid and Raphaëlle, will play the clock and try to piece together the puzzle of this story to restore the truth.

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E01 - Overall Plan
3.plot: A renowned astrophysicist is found struck down even though no storm had occurred at the time of his death. Social networks take over the case and cry conspiracy when we learn that the victim was about to divulge a state secret.

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E02 - Memento Mori
3.plot: Father Louis Desforges is found stabbed to death in a monastery. Astrid and Raphaëlle discover that the man, who lived under a false identity, bore stigmata.

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E03 - Natifs
3.plot: A young woman under the influence of a powerful drug is found unconscious, with a weapon with her that was used to commit a crime twenty years earlier in a small Native American community from Canada. Who is this young woman and how did the weapon end up in her hands?

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E04 - The Open Room
3.plot: A murderer interned in a psychiatric hospital is found dead in his room. The first clues seem to rule out the theory of an accident. Astrid and Raphaëlle embark on a difficult investigation. They are still unaware that this murder is the work of an organized gang operating from inside the hospital.

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E05 - Témoin
3.plot: Consultant criminalist, Astrid Nielsen, who is also autistic, helps Commander Raphaëlle Coste solve criminal investigations. With conspiracy theory followers or a Native American community, in places as varied as a monastery or a psychiatric hospital, the two women combine their talents to solve these cases. Furthermore, Astrid could well lift the veil on an already old mystery, which her father had already tried to elucidate, but without success. The series, a real audience success in France, is also broadcast in around twenty countries, in Europe, Latin America, the United States and even Japan.

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E07 - The Flowers of Evil
3.plot: A biologist passionate about research into plant intelligence is found lifeless in a tropical greenhouse. His death immediately gave rise to the most fanciful speculations. Could the tragedy be connected to the research laboratory from which the victim had resigned abruptly a few years earlier? Astrid and Raphaëlle both lead the investigation...

3.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S03E08 - A basement
3.plot: Two police officers discover a homeless man dead, beaten, in the abandoned building where he lived. Astrid and Raphaëlle immediately go there. At the crime scene, Astrid notes an intriguing detail: the victim is wearing a very clean suit, without any trace of blood. This enigma is quickly resolved: another homeless man, who shared the same squat, is arrested. He admits to having put the costume on him to attract the attention of the police. According to him, three other homeless people were killed in the same way without the police launching an investigation. Astrid, like Raphaëlle, is determined to stop the killer, but she does not know how much this investigation will weigh on her emotional stability...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E01 - The Eye of the Dragon
4.plot: A diamond of exceptional quality must be exhibited in Paris. But on the day it opened to the public, the head of security was found dead, his skull horribly shattered. The magnificent gem has also mysteriously disappeared. Astrid and Raphaëlle are put on the investigation...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E02 - 1001 Nights
4.plot: The body of a man of Iranian origin is found charred in his home. Spontaneous combustion or diabolical crime? Astrid and Raphaëlle quickly discover that he was living under a false identity….

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E03 - 10,000 meters
4.plot: A serial killer repatriated by plane under Raphaëlle's supervision dies during the flight, the victim of a mysterious decompression accident. Helped by Astrid on the phone, Raphaëlle finds proof that it is an assassination and that the culprit is among the passengers...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E05 - The Fool's Sacrifice
4.plot: During a prestigious chess tournament, one of the favorite players collapses in the middle of a match, struck down by poison! Astrid and Raphaëlle then realize that they are at the heart of a bloody, life-size game of chess...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E06 - The Passenger of Time
4.plot: A famous environmental activist is murdered in public by a young woman, who is immediately arrested. Things get tougher for our heroines when the criminal claims to come from the future...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E07 - Back Again
4.plot: The heir of a rich Breton family is found dead in a bar. Problem: he already died two years ago! Raphaëlle and Astrid travel to Brittany to uncover the darkest secrets of this illustrious family...

4.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S04E08 - Guilty
4.plot: Raphaëlle is found, with amnesia, at the wheel of an accident car, the body of a man shot to death beside her. Guilty or innocent? It will take all the talent of Astrid and Nicolas to help him untangle the tortuous thread of events...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E01 - We only die once
5.plot: A woman without stories is found dead on a bench in a park, victim of a sting poisoned by the venom of an exotic snake. Astrid and Raphaëlle embark on the case and soon find themselves on the trail of a dangerous mafia hitman who had not been talked about for years. Why did he come out of the shadows again? Did this woman die by accident or was she involved in illegal activities? The two investigators have a hard time to get the truth out in the open. As always, Astrid's extraordinary sagacity is of great help to Raphaëlle...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E02 - But it's for so long
5.plot: Astrid and Raphaëlle will have to walk on eggs when they find themselves in spite of themselves involved in a very sensitive diplomatic affair. The two investigators will deal with the French and American secret services...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E03 - Mandala
5.plot: Maxime Rivière, a friend of Commissioner Bachert, is the victim of a recurring nightmare concerning the murder of the Tibetan monk. Astrid makes the connection with the unsolved murder of the llama Tulku Lingpa, on May 20, 1996, in a monastery in Île-de-France. On their way there, the commissioner, who turns out to be a Buddhist, Raphaëlle, Astrid and Nicolas discover disturbing elements that question the guilt of the perpetrator of the murder, a drug addict who was prowling in the nearby forest. According to Raphaëlle, the crime was committed inside the monastery.

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E04 - The last of the Aztecs
5.plot: Philippe Desmond, 65, is found dead at home, victim of an Aztec ritual sacrifice. The heart of this former archaeologist turned treasure hunter was extracted from his rib cage and then placed in a sacred urn.  Raphaëlle and Astrid then go in search of the victim's adopted son, Necalli Cantu, a young Mexican living hidden in a forest. Questioned, the latter reveals to Raphaëlle that his father had found the Eldorado, the mythical land of South America supposed to be full of gold. According to him, he was killed because of his discovery ...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E05 - The baptism of the dead
5.plot: A man belonging to the Mormon community is found murdered in a temple. Astrid and Raphaëlle soon discover that the murder strangely resembles that of Joseph Smith, founding father and prophet of the community...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E06 - Wolf are you there?
5.plot: A new victim of the formidable serial killer "the Werewolf" is found under a Parisian bridge on a full moon night. Our two heroines quickly orient their investigation on the trail of an enigmatic voodoo ritual...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E07 - We finish the jockeys well
5.plot: A racehorse belonging to a prestigious stable is found stabbed dead. The case gets tougher for the two investigators when another crime is suddenly perpetrated...

5.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S05E08 - A wedding and four funerals
5.plot: On a film set, a famous actor is accidentally killed by a blank bullet. Astrid and Raphaëlle soon discover that it is indeed a murder and that it could only be orchestrated by a real crime expert ...

6.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E01 - Raphaëlle's Death
6.plot: Raphaëlle finds herself in the emergency room, between life and death, while a famous ghost-hunting YouTuber is found dead at home, crushed by a mysterious force.  Between paranormal experiences and high-end scams, the investigation gradually leads to the trail of a mysterious medium nicknamed Odin. How is he connected to this sinister affair? And above all, how will Raphaëlle get out of it?

6.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E02 - The Boarding School
6.plot: Raphaëlle has emerged from her coma, but her legs remain paralyzed.  The investigation into Odin leads Astrid and Nicolas Perran to investigate a strange boarding school, Overlook College. While investigating within its walls, the investigators soon discover that the suspicious death of a student at the school is curiously linked to that of their first victim. He may not have succumbed to meningitis, but may have been poisoned...

6.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E03 - The Cursed Boli
6.plot: A bloody African statuette is found near the lifeless body of Adrien Dorval, a 65-year-old retired engineer who had opened a pottery workshop. The medical examiner notes that the victim's torso was slashed post-mortem.  Strangely enough, the statuette is not the murder weapon. Adrien Dorval was actually killed with a clay roller found in a trash can near the crime scene.  The investigation gradually puts Astrid and Raphaëlle on the trail of a Machiavellian revenge. The police officer and the librarian are in for a surprise.  Raphaëlle also fears being shelved.

6.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E04 - The Theory of Everything
6.plot: The body of a prominent mathematics professor is found in the trunk of a car.  Our two heroines gradually focus their research on a revolutionary mathematical theory that arouses everyone's desire.

6.title: FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E05 - Episode 5
FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E06 - Episode 6
FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E07 - Episode 7
FR - Astrid et Raphaëlle - S06E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Lorsque le commandant Raphaëlle Coste s'adresse au service des archives judiciaires de la police pour une de ses enquêtes, elle ne se doute pas qu'elle va rencontrer une jeune femme aussi brillante que déroutante, mémoire vivante des enquêtes criminelles, Astrid, 30 ans, signe particulier : autiste Asperger.

Séparées et déconnectées, quatre femmes dans la quarantaine se réunissent pour avoir une chance de retrouver leur gloire et de retrouver l'allure qu'elles avaient en tant que Nasty Bitches, leur groupe des années 90 qui a fait d'elles des légendes dans le monde du hip-hop.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E01 - 1999
1.plot: Estranged and out-of-touch, four women in their 40s reunite for a chance to recapture their fame and regain the swagger they had as the Nasty Bitches—their ‘90s group that made them legends in the hip-hop world.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E02 - Heart of Queens
1.plot: While Brianna deals with the shattering truths of her marriage, Jill risks losing the safe community she has built for herself when she decides it is time to stop living a lie and comes clean about who she really is. Meanwhile, after a fateful meeting with Cam’ron, Naomi struggles with finally putting herself first

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E03 - Who You Calling A Bitch?
1.plot: After a bad concert review, the women come to terms with the fact that their old image and music no longer serve them; and while Naomi struggles to maintain creative control, Brianna argues for a more collaborative group effort. Meanwhile, Eric takes Valeria out to dinner and dancing in hopes of inspiring her creativity. Later, Naomi gets a second chance to prove herself to JoJo

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E04 - Ain't No Sunshine
1.plot: Brianna faces some unexpected emotions and circumstances in her home life, but she finds support amongst her Queens. Meanwhile, Jill continues to struggle with her romantic relationships, and Naomi grapples with the truth behind the identity of JoJo’s father.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E05 - Do Anything For Clout
1.plot: As Brianna deals with a painful reminder of Jeff’s infidelity, the group hopes a performance at the American Music Awards will solidify their comeback. Meanwhile, after completing treatment at a rehab facility for her addiction issues, Lauren struggles to identify with her alter ego, Lil Muffin.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E07 - Who Shot Ya
1.plot: Jill comes clean with the ladies after being invited to collaborate on a track with Wyclef Jean. In addition, Valeria suffers a heart-wrenching betrayal and Eric makes a promise to Jadakiss that he may not be able to keep

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E08 - God’s Plan
1.plot: When tragedy strikes the group, the ladies take a moment to reflect on the beginning stages of their friendship in the early ‘90s when a young Brianna, Naomi and Jill first met. Inseparable and determined to make their musical dreams a reality, the girls recognize their common goal of solidifying the decades-long bond that carries through to present-day

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E09 - Bars
1.plot: Valeria makes an impulsive decision about her future that stuns the women; and while Lauren deals with an overzealous fan turned up-and-coming rapper, Naomi comes face-to-face with her old rival, Zadie aka Lady Z.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E10 - Nasty Girl Records
1.plot: Putting old rivalries aside, the ladies embark on a new career venture with Zadie, aka “Lady Z.” Meanwhile, Jill faces her past while standing up to her disapproving father and Naomi encourages Zadie to demand justice

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E11 - I'm A Slave 4 U
1.plot: While Eric and Naomi are conflicted on what is best for JoJo’s future as it relates to the entertainment industry, Jill attempts to help a young troubled actor struggling against an overbearing parent. Elsewhere, Valeria fights for an opportunity to lean into her Puerto Rican heritage

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E12 - Let the Past Be the Past
1.plot: Valeria’s career as a single artist takes off, and Muffin motivates Jill to get back into the recording booth. Meanwhile, Eric confronts his ex-wife to help save the future of Nasty Girl Records.

1.title: FR - Queens - S01E13 - 2022
1.plot: As the Queens prepare to be inducted into the Hip Hop Hall of Fame, they cannot help but notice the void Brianna’s absence from the group has left. Meanwhile, Naomi is waylaid when an old beau questions JoJo’s paternity. Elsewhere, Valeria gets ready to embark on her solo tour and she wonders if she really is ready to go at it alone.

meta.plot: Un officier des opérations spéciales déchu lutte pour s'adapter à son nouveau poste d'agent de sécurité, jusqu'au jour où il trouve le moyen de résoudre ses problèmes d'argent.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a panic attack leaves his team vulnerable, Oskar is faced with starting his entire life over.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Oskar presents his sister with a peace offering. An attempt to kick off his dating life leaves him feeling vulnerable once again.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Sylwek hesitantly helps Oskar pick up a few covert supplies for his next operation, while struggling to conceal the truth from his wife.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Just as everything seems to be coming together, Oskar finds a recording device in his home. The pressure to pursue a new target is now vital.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Under attack, the entire family finds themselves trapped — with Marta's unborn child at the centre of the danger.

1.title: FR - Relève-toi ! - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Now in hospital, Marta wakes up alone, wondering where her husband is. Elsewhere, Oskar and Sylwek must finally face their enemies head-on.

meta.plot: De jeunes amis survivent dans la rue, en puisant parmi leur groupe l'espoir et la résilience qui leur permettent de rêver d'un avenir différent... jusqu'à ce que la tragédie frappe.

1.title: FR - Les Innocents de la Candelária - S01E01 - DOUGLAS
1.plot: Douglas attends a traumatic burial, which leads him on a quest to honor the deceased and planning an improbable heist with his friends.

1.title: FR - Les Innocents de la Candelária - S01E02 - SEVEN
1.plot: On Seven's birthday, he leads a chocolate factory heist, navigates complex relationships and plans his future amid growing tensions in Candelária.

1.title: FR - Les Innocents de la Candelária - S01E03 - POPCORN
1.plot: Popcorn sees a high-profile wedding as an opportunity to find her mother. Meanwhile, tensions rise as the police surround the church.

meta.plot: Quand un avocat de la mafia suit un cours de pleine conscience pour mieux équilibrer travail et vie privée, il découvre de nouvelles stratégies d'adaptation étonnantes, dont le meurtre.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E01 - Breathing
1.plot: After taking mindfulness lessons, defense lawyer Björn finds a new way to deal with his main client: a violent crime boss who demands too much of him.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E02 - Happiness
1.plot: Björn figures out how to mindfully dispose of a body while navigating the suspicions of his family, the police and Dragan's underlings.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E03 - Fear
1.plot: As he gets back to his routine to avoid any appearance of guilt, Björn discovers a couple of loose ends he needs to deal with.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E04 - Shamelessness
1.plot: Katharina asks for Björn's help in securing a day care center for Emily. Toni suspects Björn isn't being truthful about Dragan's whereabouts.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E05 - Panic
1.plot: Nicole investigates a series of explosive clues. After being kidnapped by a rival crime boss, Björn sets out to expose Toni's plan.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E06 - Brainstorming
1.plot: It would be easier to just murder everyone, but Björn decides on a more practical solution. Nicole questions Emily about her trip to the lake.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E07 - Anger
1.plot: Caught between Toni and the police, Björn looks for a way to kill two birds with one stone. Boris makes a final demand to see Dragan.

1.title: FR - Les Meurtres zen - S01E08 - Death
1.plot: Björn enacts a risky plan to deal with Boris and get Nicole off his back, and it's important to be mindful of every detail.

1.title: FR - Into the Fire : La fille perdue - S01E01 - Part 1
1.plot: Cathy learns of the disappearance of her birth daughter, Aundria, in 2010. A search for answers leads to a shocking suspect.

1.title: FR - Into the Fire : La fille perdue - S01E02 - Part 2
1.plot: In the wake of a surprise arrest in another long-standing cold case, Cathy inches closer to uncovering her daughter's fate.

meta.plot: Dans ce documentaire en deux parties, une mère met tout en œuvre pour élucider le mystère qui entoure la disparition de la fille qu'elle avait confiée à l'adoption en 1989.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E01 - The Crash
1.plot: After a fight with her sister Becca, Alma gets in a car accident and sees something mysterious.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E02 - The Hospital
1.plot: While recovering in the hospital from her car accident, Alma talks with her dead father, who has a confusing and compelling request.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E03 - Handheld Blackjack
1.plot: Alma begins her training with her dad, and tries to get a grip on her new reality.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E04 - Moving the Keys
1.plot: Alma progresses through training with her dad, and continues to uncover information about his death.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E05 - Alone in This (You Have Me)
1.plot: Alma realizes Sam has been lying to her and they get into a fight.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E06 - Prayers and Visions
1.plot: Camila helps out at the church, and accompanies Becca on a food tasting with Reed’s family.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E07 - The Wedding
1.plot: Alma attends Becca and Reed’s wedding while continuing to investigate her father's murder.

1.title: FR - Undone - S01E08 - That Halloween Night
1.plot: Alma goes back to the Halloween night Jacob died and tries to change the past.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E01 - The Cave
2.plot: Alma questions her identity.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E02 - The Painting
2.plot: Alma pushes her family to look at themeselves.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E03 - Mexico
2.plot: Alma and Becca go to Mexico!

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E04 - Reflections
2.plot: Alma and Becca discover something about the past.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E05 - Lungs
2.plot: Alma and Becca meet a stranger.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E06 - Help Me
2.plot: Alma calls for help.

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E07 - Rectify
2.plot: Where are we?! What's happening?!

2.title: FR - Undone - S02E08 - We All Love Each Other
2.plot: All is well, or is it?

meta.plot: Après un accident de la route qui a failli lui coûter la vie, Alma se découvre un nouveau rapport au temps et se sert de cette nouvelle capacité pour découvrir la vérité sur la mort de son père.

Alors qu'elle peine à s’adapter à une industrie en constante évolution, la petite agence londonienne Nightingale Hart est touchée par une tragédie qui bouscule le quotidien des agents et des assistants. La situation est d'autant plus tendue que leurs clients, des acteurs célèbres, requièrent une attention constante.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The agents of Nightingale Hart navigate their clients' careers in the bustling world of London's entertainment industry. Dan struggles with delivering bad news while an unexpected arrival throws Jonathan off balance.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Reeling from a devastating loss, the agents cope in different ways as tensions flare over how to move forward. Jonathan and Rebecca find themselves at odds over a mix-up involving A-list clients.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Change is in the air while a potential takeover looms over Nightingale Hart. Meanwhile, the agents face personal turmoil as professional pressures mounts, while an unlikely source of inspiration rescues an A-lister from a disastrous opening night.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While relationships bloom out of the office, the agents find art doesn't always imitate life as an intimacy coordinator is called onto a project. Misunderstandings abound both on camera and off.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Cultures clash as Americans invade the office. Dan and Rebecca race to win a new client while Misha's attempt to gain public interest for a project leads to unexpected reactions.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Relationships all over the office reach breaking points due to unspecified boundaries, while Jonathan must manage those of a married acting couple client.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Rebecca must deal with a crisis involving one of her clients, who is a working mother, while Jonathan and Dan’s personal lives collapse around them.

1.title: FR - Ten Percent - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Personal pressures reach a boiling point, while professionally, the American boss plans to visit London, where a high-profile client is expected to be landing a massive franchise role.

meta.plot: Les aventures du professeur Wolfe Kinteh, enquêteur de scènes de crime dans le nord de l'Angleterre.

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Following the brilliant forensic scientist Professor Wolfe Kinteh, as he pieces together the mysteries behind crimes in the North East.

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With a missing person's life on the line, Wolfe and Maggy face a race against time to retrieve evidence from a scene that could explode at any moment.

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: On a billionaire's sprawling country estate, Wolfe and the team are confronted with a bizarre mystery that might require some unconventional thinking...

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Wolfe and co are up to their neck in it in Manchester's sewers, where a colossal fatberg holds the remains of a seemingly sadistic ritual killing.

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After attending a fire at a mosque, Wolfe discovers the body of the local Imam - who was apparently murdered before the blaze began.

1.title: FR - Wolfe - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: In the series finale, Wolfe gathers his team to re-open an old case that's very personal to them. Will they be prepared for the truth?

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Canadian reporter Ken Scarborough seeks out a hard-hitting story to save his job. Meanwhile, a new face is asked to join a centuries-old secret society.

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the Meadows draws near, professor Clark attempts a scientific breakthrough, a guest investigates Jason's death, and Ken endures a painful test.

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: At Pentaverate headquarters, a billionaire high roller arrives amid news of another death. Ken embeds with the guards and is sent on a risky mission.

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: To retrieve the Parce Clavem, Ken heads to Dubrovnik, where a tricky challenge awaits. Later, a mysterious man and a helicopter ride upend Ken’s plans.

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After Patty's smarts prove invaluable, the Pentaverate races to the Meadows to stop a diabolical plan, while Ken and Reilly are taken hostage on a jet.

1.title: FR - The Pentaverate - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: At the Meadows, Ken strips down before rallying the guards into action. Can he stop the Pentaverate from falling into nefarious hands?

meta.plot: Une société secrète qui influe sur l'histoire depuis des siècles doit affronter une grave menace venue de l'intérieur. Le salut viendra-t-il d'un journaliste canadien ?

1.title: FR - Fightworld - S01E01 - Mexico: La Pistola y El Corazon
1.plot: Actor Frank Grillo visits Mexico City, where he meets Julio César Chávez, speaks with aspiring boxers and learns the one rule of Mexican boxing.

1.title: FR - Fightworld - S01E02 - Thailand: Fortunate Son
1.plot: In Thailand, Grillo sees firsthand why muay thai is known as "the art of eight limbs." Later, he visits a true titan of the sport.

1.title: FR - Fightworld - S01E03 - Myanmar: Crossroads
1.plot: Fighters from around the world travel to Myanmar for the World Lethwei Championship. Also, Grillo trains with an elite fighter.

1.title: FR - Fightworld - S01E04 - Senegal: If I Should Fall From Grace with God
1.plot: Grillo -- along with countless passionate fans -- gets caught up in the pageantry as two highly respected Senegalese wrestlers prepare to battle.

1.title: FR - Fightworld - S01E05 - Israel: Masters of War
1.plot: In Israel, Grillo receives a lesson on Krav Maga, a unique style of hand-to-hand combat used by citizens and military forces alike.

meta.plot: L'acteur Frank Grillo parcourt le monde et parle aux combattants professionnels ou amateurs de toutes cultures et traditions.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E01 - Beauty
1.plot: After Giovanna overhears her father’s comment comparing her to his estranged sister, the teen travels to a rough part of Naples to meet her aunt.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E02 - Resemblance
1.plot: Giovanna accompanies Vittoria to Enzo’s grave and learns about their family’s falling out. A conversation about passion awakens something in Giovanna.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E03 - Bitterness
1.plot: Giovanna’s friends clash with Vittoria on a visit to the slums. The bracelet Vittoria gifted Giovanna as a baby turns up in an unexpected place.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E04 - Loneliness
1.plot: A secret gets out and unravels two families. Giovanna fails out of school and has her first sexual encounter. Vittoria demands her bracelet back.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E05 - Love
1.plot: Giovanna’s interest in a charming young religious scholar rankles her worldly father. It also irritates Vittoria, who is wary of the teen's intentions.

1.title: FR - The Lying Life of Adults - S01E06 - Truth
1.plot: On a trip to Milan to visit Roberto, Giovanna wrestles with wanting to be seen as the scholar’s equal or something else.

meta.plot: Naples, années 1990. Giovanna Trada est une jeune fille née dans une famille aisée de Naples, fille de deux enseignants, Andrea et Nella, qui affronte le passage de l'enfance à l'adolescence en passant par une phase de rébellion. Elle lit beaucoup, est capable et intelligente, mais son équilibre commence à vaciller, ses résultats scolaires baissent et elle prend progressivement l'apparence de sa tante Vittoria, la sœur de son père dont le visage est censuré sur toutes les photos de famille. Giovanna est intriguée par la figure mystérieuse de sa tante, au point de vouloir la rencontrer. Un dimanche, elles se retrouvent dans un quartier mal famé de Naples en compagnie du père de Giovanna et un lien fort se crée entre elles. Vittoria accompagne sa nièce dans un voyage introspectif fait d'amour sentimental et charnel, d'amitiés établies et de problèmes familiaux, jusqu'à la résolution de la recherche de l'identité d'une petite fille qui commence à entrer dans son monde de femme.

Cette série documentaire fait découvrir l’environnement de travail et la vie quotidienne de créateurs et d’animateurs de talent. Chaque épisode est l’occasion pour un artiste - aux parcours et aux motivations très variés - de montrer comment dessiner un personnage qu’il a contribué à créer ou qui lui a donné envie d’intégrer le studio. Cette expérience exclusive permettra aux abonnés, quel que soit leur âge, de mieux comprendre comment ces célèbres personnages prennent vie et quel élan leur a insufflé les hommes et les femmes qui les ont conçus ou animés.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E01 - The Emperor's New Groove | Kuzco
1.plot: Gabby Capili’s path to Disney Animation began at a young age when she saw her first Disney film in a theater with her father, The Emperor’s New Groove. As Gabby teaches us how to draw her favorite character from the film, “Kuzco,” she also shares the importance of following your instincts and being free to letting life guide you where you belong.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E02 - Frozen | Olaf
1.plot: While teaching us to draw one of Disney Animation’s most beloved characters, “Olaf” from the Frozen films, Hyun Min Lee shares the joyful wonder of the character and how she channeled the loss of her mother into being a guiding light in her career in animation.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E03 - Aladdin | The Genie
1.plot: Legendary Disney animator Eric Goldberg guides us through the steps of drawing his most iconic character creation, “The Genie” from Aladdin while learning along the way the levels to which Robin Williams impacted the character and its animation.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E04 - Peter Pan | Captain Hook
1.plot: Growing up in South Korea, Disney animator and character designer Jin Kim was always fascinated by the villains of Disney’s films. As Jin teaches us to draw Peter Pan’s “Captain Hook” we learn that his journey to America and working at Disney almost never happened because of his colorblindness.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E05 - Encanto | Mirabel
1.plot: Disney Animation story artist Samantha Vilfort teaches us how to draw one of the studio’s newest characters, “Mirabel,” from the hit film Encanto. Through her story we learn that her connection to Mirabel’s struggle of being different from everyone else in her family hits close to home.

1.title: FR - Esquisses - S01E06 - The Lion King | Simba
1.plot: Storied Disney animator Mark Henn teaches us how to draw one of his favorite character designs, “Simba” from The Lion King. Through Mark’s story, we learn the importance of never giving up on your dreams, even in the face of rejection.

meta.plot: Rebecka Martinsson est née à Kiruna, une petite ville minière aux portes de la nature sauvage située 145 km au-delà du cercle polaire arctique, dans le Grand Nord de la Suède. Elle en est partie pour suivre ses études de droit et commencer une carrière d'avocate dans un grand cabinet, mais elle ne s'y épanouit pas pleinement et décide de rentrer à Kiruna, où elle est accueillie avec méfiance par les gens du coin. Jusqu'à ce qu'elle se retrouve embarquée dans la traque d'un mystérieux tueur...

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E01 - The Blood Spilt: Part 1
1.plot: When a friend from her childhood passes away, Rebecka returns to her home in the outskirts of Kiruna. But as it turns out, everything is not what it seems.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E02 - The Blood Spilt: Part 2
1.plot: When Rebecka think she's getting closer to solve the murder mystery, she has to go further into the shadows of her childhood past that she has struggled hard to leave behind. At the same time she is beginning to doubt as to where she belongs.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E03 - The Black Path: Part 1
1.plot: Still recovering from a psychological breakdown after her encounter with Mildred's murderer, Rebecka takes a job as a public prosecutor in Kiruna. Meanwhile, Mella investigates the death of an unidentified young woman found in an ice-fishing trailer and asks Rebecka for help.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E04 - The Black Path: Part 2
1.plot: After her unconventional methods get her fired, Rebecka sinks into another deep depression. But a shocking revelation about one of the mining owners puts her back on the case.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E05 - Until Thy Wrath Be Past: Part 1
1.plot: Mella leads an investigation into the drowning of a young diver trapped under ice for a whole winter. But the water in her lungs doesn't match the river in which she was found.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E06 - Until Thy Wrath Be Past: Part 2
1.plot: The discovery of another body and the unearthing of an old Nazi airplane near the mountain lake provide Mella and Rebecka more clues to the truth. Rebecka has misgivings about her life with Mans as she grows closer to police dog handler Krister.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E07 - The Second Deadly Sin: Part 1
1.plot: Rebecka plans her move back to Stockholm but reconsiders when she and Krister discover the body of a woman brutally murdered. The only witness is the victim's young grandson, now alone and too traumatized to speak.

1.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S01E08 - The Second Deadly Sin: Part 2
1.plot: Despite resigning, Rebecka continues investigating the case, focusing on the victim's father, who was eaten by a bear. Meanwhile, Mella and her team discover the murder weapon in the barn of one of the victim's lovers.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E01 - The Reindeer Worker: Part 1
2.plot: The police station in Kiruna receives an odd alarm. A quad bike has been seen dragging a reindeer to death and then dumping it on Jon Åppa's farm. Rebecka takes up the case, but von Post warns that the issue may be sensitive.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E02 - The Reindeer Worker: Part 2
2.plot: Krister's right to be involved in the investigation is being questioned, while the violent revenge campaigns in the Sami village are escalating. When the events are traced to an old family feud, no one is left free of suspicion.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E03 - The House Foundation: Part 1
2.plot: When the Bolagshotellet is demolished as part of the relocation of Kiruna, the body is found after Linn who disappeared 16 years earlier. Sven-Erik has never been able to drop the case and now sees his chance to prove that Linn's ex-husband, Jesper, is the killer.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E04 - The House Foundation: Part 2
2.plot: Rebecka and Sven-Erik struggle to find sufficient evidence against Jesper. At the same time, Rebecka has come across her own investigation file from the social and is now closer to her own story than ever before.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E05 - The Lie: Part 1
2.plot: When a young man dies of an overdose, the police do everything to stop the spread of drugs among the youth of the area. Rebecka is in Stockholm and in Kiruna the case quickly becomes personal for Anna Maria Mella and Tommy.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E06 - The Lie: Part 2
2.plot: Rebecka returns to Kiruna and her crippling colleagues. Mella is struggling to be a good mother to her daughter who has now escaped. Tommy struggles to be a good cop, but carries a secret that risks stealing everything.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E07 - The Warning Triangle: Part 1
2.plot: The body of a woman is discovered in her car, and in the back seat there's a frozen infant; signs of trauma points to foul play.

2.title: FR - Rebecka Martinsson - S02E08 - The Warning Triangle: Part 2
2.plot: With a main suspect in custody, Rebecka takes the liberty to interrogate him; a faux-pas that gets her removed from the case.

meta.plot: Hannah Bradford, une ado transgenre, rentre au collège après avoir subi un harcèlement à l’école primaire. La rentrée est toujours une étape un peu angoissante, encore plus quand on est la petite nouvelle. Hannah va devoir affronter les défis du quotidien et accepter ses vulnérabilités afin de vivre pleinement sa vie d'adolescente.

1.title: FR - Premier jour - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Hannah Bradford, a 12 year-old transgender girl, is nervous about starting at a new school. It doesn't take her long to make friends and she discovers the first day of high school is difficult for everyone.

1.title: FR - Premier jour - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Hannah feels left out when it appears she's the only one not sleeping over at Jasmine's party. With Olivia's help, Hannah decides to make the most of the time she is there and has a better night than she expected.

1.title: FR - Premier jour - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After being outed on social media, Hannah withdraws from those closest to her. It isn't until Olivia and Natalie pay her a visit that Hannah remembers how much her friends mean to her and she decides to return to school.

1.title: FR - Premier jour - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: At school camp, Hannah's friends throw her a surprise birthday party and at the end of the night she finds herself around a campfire fielding questions about being transgender. As the crowd grows, so does her confidence.

meta.plot: La disparition d'un jeune homme peu après la mort de son ami sème le trouble chez les habitants d'une banlieue aisée de Varsovie en révélant leurs secrets et mensonges.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When Adam begins to act suspiciously after the death of his best friend, Anna installs spyware on his phone to find out what’s troubling him.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After Adam and Anna seemingly disappear without a trace, the police find the body of a middle-aged woman where the teenager was last seen.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Kaja looks for Adam around Warsaw with her friends, Anna visits the location where Igor’s body was found.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Even after Adam texts Kaja to let her know he's going to be back soon, she continues to search for him — and ends up in a dangerous situation.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After CBŚP officials question Anna in connection to trafficking prescription drugs, she receives disturbing news about her son.

1.title: FR - Sans un mot - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As Błazej and Gajos plot to frame Guru for everything, Adam's parents track down the location of the burner phones their son had been using.

meta.plot: Deux jeunes femmes célèbrent leur union dans la campagne suédoise, entourées de leurs proches. Enivrée de bonheur, Grace, la mère de l’une, vit une brève liaison dont les conséquences lui échappent... Signée Colin Nutley ("Under the Sun", "Such is Life"), une tragi-comédie pleine de rebondissements, grand succès lors de sa diffusion en Suède.

1.title: FR - Une si belle famille - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Two families gather in the Swedish countryside to see Sunny and Meja marry, but everything is not quite as planned. Ten minutes of unrestrained folly on the wedding day creates life-saving consequences for everyone involved.

1.title: FR - Une si belle famille - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The passionate madness of the wedding party results in secrets and bad conscience when Grace is faced with the toughest decision of his life. At the same time, Meja and Sunny shake both of their families when they reveal their plans for the future.

1.title: FR - Une si belle famille - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After an unexpected death everything is put on its tip and Grace has to manage on her own. Dizzying truths come to the surface when the funeral once again gathers the families in a clash they are about to forget.

1.title: FR - Une si belle famille - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After the dramatic accident, everyone now knows about Grace's secret. The truth is painful and the wear and tear of the family is inevitable. Will they be reconciled after the shocking news, or are some betrayals too difficult to forgive?

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In Brussels, first-generation Moroccan immigrant and funerary business owner Omar retires, leaving his right-hand daughter and rebellious son in charge.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E02 - Barking Dogs
1.plot: Convinced that his idea is the future of the business, Ismael sets out to do some marketing with JB. Meanwhile, Omar keeps a big secret from his family.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E03 - Death of a Promise
1.plot: Ismael's one-off burial suddenly becomes the firm's specialty, so along with Nadia they prepare for the next one — a challenging, high-profile service.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E04 - He Who Digs a Well
1.plot: To buy Vanessa's silence and save the project, Ismael and JB get crafty and think out of the box. A miserable Rachid faces criticism from the community.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E05 - Palace Street
1.plot: Business booms and the firm gets nominated for an award, so Ismael sets out to secure funds for an expansion amid clashes with Rachid over customers.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E06 - Concession F24
1.plot: A tragic event ends Omar's trip and his return sets off a series of revelations and clashes complicating Ismael's situation. Brahim's truth gets out.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E07 - Diwan Awards
1.plot: Ahead of the Diwan Awards, Nadia scrambles to save the business and seeks Ismael's help. The arrival of an unannounced guest stirs up some family drama.

1.title: FR - La Bonne Terre - S01E08 - Nejma
1.plot: A furious Ismael heads out on a risky mission to Tangiers, his Moroccan hometown, putting family ties and the business at stake.

meta.plot: Pour relancer l'entreprise familiale, un jeune entrepreneur élabore un plan osé et risqué visant à importer de la terre du Maroc pour inhumer les morts de sa communauté.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After attracting the interest of a mysterious professor as the result of her first exam, Alex receives an invitation to join a unique group of students.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Alex initially wants nothing to do with Professor Zawadzki's group but reconsiders when a horrifying demon begins following her.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When members of the group realize Alex is the demon's target, they take turns keeping watch over her. But they forget she's not the only one in danger.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As the giant Winter Spas roams around Cracow and leaves frozen bodies in his wake, Alex visits her grandmother in hopes of learning more about her past.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Following Hvor's orders, Winter Spas spreads madness, disease and death throughout the streets of Cracow, creating chaos at the university's hospital.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: To reconnect with her mother, Alex tries to induce a lucid dream. But she soon learns that the answers she seeks aren't in her fantasy.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Alex returns from the underworld, bringing a protective deity with her. Hvor uses the professor's sick son to turn him against the group.

1.title: FR - Les Monstres de Cracovie - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: After the tragic events at the Barbican, Alex and the members of the group resolve to perform an old Slavic ritual to stop Hvor once and for all.

meta.plot: Une jeune femme hantée par son passé rejoint un mystérieux professeur et son groupe d'étudiants surdoués pour analyser des phénomènes paranormaux et combattre des démons.

1.title: FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E02 - Episode 2
