FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Neuf Mecs - S01E09 - Episode 9

meta.plot: Une journée dans la vie de neuf hommes qui habitent le même immeuble parisien. Simon a décidé de présenter sa fiancée à sa mère qui est persuadée qu’il est gay ; Martin, parfaitement bilingue, fait semblant d’avoir besoin de cours d’anglais car il est amoureux de sa prof ; Thomas, l’ostéopathe du rez-de-chaussée, bloque sur son divorce et se bloque le dos; Victor, guitariste, vit mal sa rupture avec Valentine ; et puis il y a Raf, Gustave, Nabil, Olivier et Patrick...

Une mère célibataire à la volonté forte entreprend de récupérer le nom de sa famille et d'avoir un impact avec sa ligne de soins capillaires révolutionnaire, mais découvre un sombre secret sur le passé de sa propre mère qui va bouleverser son monde.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E01 - Reparations
1.plot: Angela Vaughn, her daughter and her aunt are thrown into a world of wealth and glamour.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E02 - My Mother, Myself
1.plot: Angela uncovers a devastating secret about her mother. Leah attempts to unseat Teddy as the head of Franklin. Raymond is determined to get his company back. Chaos erupts for the Duponts at the Black Diamond Ball.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E03 - Hot Links & Red Drinks
1.plot: Angela wants to make Nikki the face of Eve's Crown and forces Leah's hand about the incubator program. Raymond confronts Teddy about getting his company back. Piggy is confronted by her past.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E04 - Crabs in a Gold-Plated Barrel
1.plot: Angela deals with the tabloids chasing her after her paternity secret is revealed. Angela's best friend arrives to help her with the grand opening of the Eve's Crown flagship store. Teddy confides in Leah; Nikki and Taylor get closer.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E05 - The Miseducation of the Negro
1.plot: Angela asks Tyrique for a favor. Angela also tries to get Nikki accepted into the Oak Bluffs Cotillion. Raymond confides in Olivia. Leah is shocked by Lauren's behavior. Teddy's condition worsens.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E06 - For Colored Boys...
1.plot: Teddy tries to connect with Angela and Nikki. Meanwhile, Olivia confronts Alex, who, in turn, drops a bombshell on Leah about her former marriage to Raymond. Then, Tyrique discovers a shocking secret about his own father’s past.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E07 - Fathers, Daughters, Sisters
1.plot: The family gathers around Teddy after his latest health crisis, as Angela and Leah bond over their newfound common enemy Alex, who makes a move to win back Raymond. Meanwhile, Tyrique looks to Aunt Piggy for answers about his father.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E08 - Sistervention
1.plot: Angela holds a "sistervention" for Leah, whose marriage to Raymond is still on the rocks. Meanwhile, Teddy's birthday celebration includes trying to one-up Alex and keep Raymond at bay, and Nikki and Nate attempt to bond. Then, Tyrique's jealousy grows as Angela gets closer to Nate

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E09 - Twice as Hard, Twice as Good
1.plot: Leah and Teddy deliver devastating news to Angela. Meanwhile, Piggy confesses some of the secrets from her past to Angela and a confrontation leads to Raymond's life changing. Then, Angela takes steps to secure her and Eve's Crown's future.

1.title: FR - Our Kind of People - S01E10 - Just Desserts
FR - Our Kind of People - S01E11 - It Is Not Light That We Need, But Fire
FR - Our Kind of People - S01E12 - Kiss It Up to God
FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jan Michelsen is investigating the disappearance of a young woman called Julie Vinding from a Copenhagen suburb. Six months later, Jan is the only one who believes that she is still alive.  Jan finds a ten-year-old case from the same neighbourhood where a 17-year-old girl, Natasha, disappeared on her way home from a party. Jan discovers the remains of Natasha in a lake. She was murdered. Suspecting a link between the two crimes, Jan brings in an expert on serial killers, Louise Bergstein.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jan and Louise’s investigation into Natasha’s death leads them to suspect Anders Kjeldsen, a man who has been arrested before for violent crimes including rape. Trapped in a basement, Emma tries to comfort a traumatised Julie, but soon needs comforting herself.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Jan and Louise find an unsolved murder case in Sweden that has similarities with Natasha's, although this one has an unusual signature: the victim's ring finger was cut off. Louise doesn't believe that the murder has been committed by Anders Kjeldsen.  Meanwhile, on a farm that Anders Kjeldsen stayed at as a child, the police make a gruesome discovery. Stine is forced to help Anders with the women in the basement, who are planning to escape.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Louise realises that Anders Kjeldsen does not kill alone but has a partner who is the dominant of the two. In the basement, Emma tries to persuade Stine to help her to escape.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The public appeal for information on Anders Kjeldsen leads to the identification of the third victim from the farm and an explanation of how all the women met their killer. Louise suspects he has a female accomplice.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Stine Velin is taken into police custody, but insists that she is also one of Anders Kjeldsen’s victims and does not know where either Anders or Emma are.

1.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Jan and Louise find Anders Kjeldsen. Louise fears that Stine’s family is in danger and places them in a safe house.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Five years ago, Alice Ejbye's 18-year-old son Markus was murdered by a serial killer who was never found. Alice is now seriously ill and asks criminal profiler, Louise Bergstein, the daughter of her best friend, to help solve the case. At the same time, elsewhere on Funen, a man named Peter Vinge receives a fatal message from his wife Masja.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: A young man has been found in the woods, tortured and stabbed to death. Profiler Louise Bergstein and the head of the investigation Karina Horup try to find evidence for whether the murder can be attributed to a serial killer who, after a five-year hiatus, may now be active again. They slowly work their way towards the killer's highly unusual motive. Meanwhile, Peter Vinge struggles with being a single parent to his son, Johannes, and looks for his next victim.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Louise Bergstein and Karina Hørup discover that the serial killer has a claimed a new victim, William Fjeldby, who was kidnapped and abducted in his own car. William's father, multimillionaire Gorm Fjeldby, clings to the hope that his son has been kidnapped for a ransom and is therefore still alive. As the police search for William, Peter Vinge tries to celebrate Johannes's birthday without Masja. It dawns on Johannes that his father is hiding something from him.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Alice Ejbye receives some bad news from the doctor. At the same time, despite two new victims, the police have yet to find the man who killed her son Markus. Desperate, Alice posts a video on social media offering a reward which has consequences for her relationship with Louise. The police are inundated with information from people who are after the reward, and Karina and Louise struggle to determine whether there is anything useful among all the information. Peter takes his frustration out on his next victim.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Seven weeks after Alice's death, Louise is in mourning and wants to go home as Karina issues her with an ultimatum regarding the case. Alice's death raises a new suspicion which takes the investigation in a new direction. Peter Vinge focuses on his work at a local sawmill, where he receives an unexpected offer from Leif. At the same time, Peter is in conflict with Johannes who remains in a stage of teenage revolt against his father.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Louise Bergstein continues to assist the investigation to find the serial killer, who now has six brutal murders to his name. With Karina Hørup, Louise returns to the first victims in an attempt to find out where they may have met their killer. Peter notices that the police are closer to him than ever before, and at the same time happens to meet Louise again.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Unaware of who he really is, Louise gets far too close to Peter. But the terrible truth lurks beneath the surface. Karina tries to find new evidence for the investigation on her own, and an earlier clue resurfaces, moving the case forward. Peter sorts his life out and gives Johannes a message that his son has a hard time coming to terms with.

2.title: FR - Le Tueur de l'ombre - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: The police take Johannes to the station, and Louise fears that the truth about her and Peter Vinge will be revealed. Meanwhile, Peter meets his ex-wife Masja, who has returned from Singapore without notice in order to set things straight. Karina, Søren and Torben desperately try to find Peter before he can claim another victim.

meta.plot: Collaboratrice de la police danoise, la profileuse Louise Bergstein traque les tueurs en série. Thriller danois haletant aussi noir qu’efficace, la série « Le tueur et son ombre » nous embarque dans l’âme des psychopathes, et les tréfonds de la société danoise.

Les Cimes, petite station de ski dans la région des Dents du Midi. C'est la fin de saison, les vacanciers partent, la neige fond… et dévoile l’horreur au grand jour : le cadavre d’une femme assassinée dans une mise en scène intrigante et macabre. C’est la capitaine suisse Sterenn Peiry qui est chargée de l’affaire, bientôt épaulée par l'enquêteur français Lyes Bouaouni qui lui révèle qu’un autre corps a été retrouvé dans un état similaire de l’autre côté de la frontière. Alors que le mystère s'épaissit, l'enquêtrice découvre que son fils a tué accidentellement sa petite amie en voiture. La vie de Sterenn bascule : jusqu'où ira-t-elle pour protéger son fils ?

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E01 - Retour aux Cimes
1.plot: Melting snow reveals a woman's body. Her murder seems to have macabre aspects. Sterenn Peiry is put in charge of the case but crosses ethical boundaries to help her son, Jérémy.

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E02 - Modus operandi
1.plot: Sterenn covers up for Jérémy. She also continues her investigation, together with French detective Lyes Bouaouni. Mélinda's absence is noticed.

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E03 - Instinct maternel
1.plot: The noose is tightening around Sterenn's secret. Lyes questions Jérémy. Sterenn uncovers the link between the serial killer's victims.

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E04 - La traque
1.plot: A race against the clock begins when the serial killer resorts to kidnapping. Sterenn tries to convince the killer to spare his victim's life. Where will this end?

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E05 - Le pacte, partie 1
1.plot: Sterenn has only hours left to honour the pact if she wants to save her son. Lyes is convinced that Mélinda is not one of the serial killer's victims. So who killed her?

1.title: FR - Hors saison - S01E06 - Le pacte, partie 2
1.plot: Lyes convinces the Swiss police that Sterenn is involved in a cover-up. Sterenn and Jérémy are both arrested, but the pact is still to be fulfilled.

meta.plot: Luke Roman est à la tête d'une agence immobilière spécialisée dans les propriétés "métaphysiques", également appelées "maisons hantées". Luke peut non seulement sentir la présence qui habite la maison, mais il peut aussi négocier avec elle.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The Roman Agency welcomes a new agent, as well as a new client with a connection to Luke's past.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E02 - The Harvey
1.plot: A little boy's "imaginary friend" interferes with his parents' plans to sell their house and move.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E03 - For Sale by Owner
1.plot: A lovely lake cabin may be haunted or the owner may be faking; a horror novelist seeks inspiration.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E04 - A House Is Not a Home
1.plot: The Roman Agency takes on a haunted master-planned subdivision and a troubled house by the sea.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E05 - Ft. Ghost Child
1.plot: When a rap star rents a client's recording studio, a tragic secret is revealed in the playback.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E06 - Roman's Six
1.plot: The Roman Agency steps in when the visitors to a competitor's Open House are murdered one by one.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E07 - Quarantine
1.plot: The team locks down in the office to isolate and destroy a murderous demon that followed them home.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E08 - Baba O'Reilly
1.plot: As Luke considers quitting paranormal clients, he encounters a house that changes his perspective.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E09 - White Wedding
1.plot: The team is hired by the mother-of the bride to sell a cursed family lodge.

1.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S01E10 - The House Always Wins
1.plot: The Donovan house takes center stage as it has sent Nick to the hospital and trapped August somewhere inside.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E01 - Trust the Process
2.plot: Luke struggles to handle an engaged property; Susan falls in love with a home with a special power.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E02 - Truth in Advertising
2.plot: Luke deals with a film crew at a client's property, while Susan investigates a strange seaside B&B.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E03 - The Butler Didn't
2.plot: When a client is held hostage by a ghost, The Roman Agency must hurry to save him.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E04 - I Put a Spell on You
2.plot: Luke spars with a homeowner during negotiations as Zooey takes on her first sales call.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E05 - Art & Science
2.plot: Luke must improvise when a client's home traps her inside; August pays a visit to his past.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E06 - Set Your Flag on Fire
2.plot: A neighborly conflict draws the agency into a feud; Phil's sister arrives to settle the family will.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E07 - Gods & Monsters
2.plot: Luke helps a client confront the monster under his childhood bed; a new agent joins the Agency.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E08 - Let Sleeping Dogs Lie
2.plot: Luke reconnects with his estranged mother. Zooey investigates Susan's disappearance.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E09 - Dearly Departed
2.plot: The Agency must guide a ghost into the light. Meanwhile, Susan is found.

2.title: FR - SurrealEstate - S02E10 - Letting Go
2.plot: A changed Susan returns to the Agency. Luke must use his regained powers to save the team.

meta.plot: Carrie est une mystérieuse guerrière qui s'est échappée d'une colonie de type culte qui protège le monde des monstres cachés derrière une porte secrète dans les bois.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E01 - The Guardian
1.plot: When a mysterious teen takes refuge in West Pine, a child's otherworldly disappearance strikes fear into the residents of this small mining community.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E02 - The Door in the Woods
1.plot: As the Hypnotist hunts for more victims, a dangerous figure from Carrie's past threatens to shatter her new friends' trust in her. Carrie sets aside dreams of escape to save Nolan's missing family before it's too late.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E03 - The Lure
1.plot: As Carrie confronts her brutal past, the three teens hunt the Hypnotist into the darkest pocket of West Pine -- risking their lives to try to stop the violent demon.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E04 - Cracks
1.plot: A horrifying discovery deep in the mine could lead to dire consequences for West Pine. Nolan reveals a secret. The teens' investigation leads to drunken, music-filled mayhem in the woods.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E05 - One Door Closes
1.plot: Carrie squares off against her ruthless former mentor. Nolan wrestles with an unwelcome change. Tasha lands face-to-face with evil itself.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E06 - Vast Gehenna
1.plot: Desperate for information on how to close the tear, Carrie returns to the land of nightmares and faces off against the girl she once betrayed. Tasha fights for her life as she's stalked by a relentless monster.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E07 - Weapon Against the Shadow
1.plot: An alarming truth about the Bloodherd sets Carrie and Tasha in action, fighting to save their loved ones from the corrupting influence of Gehenna.

1.title: FR - The Girl in the Woods - S01E08 - Angel of the Dawn
1.plot: With the fate of the town resting on their shoulders, Carrie and Tasha must escape the pursuit of armed disciples, rescue Nolan from the belly of the beast and close the tear before it's too late.

meta.plot: 5ème siècle, Rome envahit l'Irlande. Après l'assassinat de son père et le massacre de son village, le jeune Conor se venge des assassins et devient le leader de la seule île Celte à résister aux Romains.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Conor and Claire, two star-crossed lovers from warring families, are separated when the young man's kingdom is mysteriously annihilated in a fire on the eve of his brother's wedding. In the aftermath, Conor joins forces with a band of former slaves in order to stand and fight for what he believes is right and just.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E02 - Projector
1.plot: Conor faces Vorgeen, a rival chieftan, when the two are both after the same powder that has magical properties.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E03 - The Chosen
1.plot: Conor and crew witness the choosing of the new Druid King, a six year old boy, named Glas, and must help the boy assume his throne.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E04 - Banshee
1.plot: Conor, in the middle of convincing a tribe to join his own, encounters a mysterious woman who many suspect is a Banshee, the legendary herald of death. Problems arise when the woman foretells the death of a child in the tribe, causing chaos.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E05 - Doyle's Solution
1.plot: Conor and Fergus encounter a man named Doyle, who has garnered a following among the young and homeless, and Fergus is shocked to discover his abandoned daughter, Molly, is one of Doyle's loyal followers. While Conor fights for his land and to free the children from Doyle's grasp, Fergus tries to reclaim his lost daughter.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E06 - Red Boot
1.plot: Caitlin comes into the possession of a stolen Roman scroll showing the way to the Rock Tower, and her and Conor must fight to keep it out of the hands of Red Boot.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E07 - The Spear of Destiny
1.plot: Conor finds the spear of tormented Longinus, who used it to kill Christ and the spear has a powerful affect on Conor, one that could be dangerous to all.

1.title: FR - Roar - S01E08 - The Eternal
1.plot: When Longinus goes mad, Conor is forced into a symbolic marriage, with Fergus's daughter Molly, in order to stop Longinus from destroying the world.

meta.plot: Alors qu’une petite fille d’à peine douze ans disparaît, Diego, huit ans, manifeste d’étranges visions qui alertent le capitaine de gendarmerie chargé de l’enquête, Romain, et surtout sa compagne, Sarah, une jeune psychologue. Et si ce que voit ou dessine Diego était lié à cette disparition ?

1.title: FR - Visions - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Visions - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Visions - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Visions - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Visions - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Visions - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Lorsque la femme d'un millionnaire disparaît, la police doit faire face à la frénésie des médias et à des indics véreux pour découvrir la vérité. Inspiré de faits réels.

1.title: FR - The Lorenskog Disappearance - S01E01 - The Investigators
1.plot: Forced to conduct a covert investigation into the vanishing, Jorunn Lakke must keep the case out of the media to avoid fatal consequences.

1.title: FR - The Lorenskog Disappearance - S01E02 - The Journalists
1.plot: Two journalists track down an estranged friend of Anne-Elisabeth and Tom, who recounts a complicated past and an unusual prenuptial agreement.

1.title: FR - The Lorenskog Disappearance - S01E03 - The Lawyers
1.plot: The Hagen family's legal team maneuvers an aggressive investigation and phony ransom calls as the police change their hypothesis.

1.title: FR - The Lorenskog Disappearance - S01E04 - The Journalists (2)
1.plot: The media's portrayal of the case gets criticized while alternative theories materialize online. A compelling witness gets taken in for questioning.

1.title: FR - The Lorenskog Disappearance - S01E05 - The Informants
1.plot: Police informants come out of the woodwork with damning claims against Anne-Elisabeth's husband. But can they be trusted?

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E01 - It’s Summertime
1.plot: Renowned Mexican wakeboarder Steffi arrives at a remote Argentine resort to compete in a revived competition... and she's looking to uncover a secret.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E02 - Memories of Sky Vibes
1.plot: A pair of famous twins arrive at Cielo Grande. Steffi finds old photos that raise new questions. Luz and her friends sing while restoring Sky Vibes.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E03 - Friend Zone
1.plot: The twins' manager threatens to leave as the staff worries about Cielo's future. Julian discusses his crush on Luz, who has eyes for someone else.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E04 - New Competition
1.plot: Juan attempts to win Steffi over, with Ian's help. The Cielo Grande crew makes final preparations for Sky Vibes. A new competitor joins the ranks.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E05 - Who’s That Girl?
1.plot: Julian attempts to calm Steffi's nerves after the arrival of her rival Natasha rattles her. Luz launches Sky Vibes, but opening night hits a snag.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E06 - Date Night
1.plot: The identity of the girl in the photograph that Steffi found is revealed. Nati confesses she has a crush on someone. Luz and Tony go on a date.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E07 - Unexpected Trouble
1.plot: When one of the wakeboarders is injured during training, Luz makes a startling discovery. Steffi speaks to her father about his past.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E08 - Bird Leaves the Nest
1.plot: Luz and Steffi join forces to try to solve the mystery surrounding their past. Back at the resort, the crew practices a new "friend zone" song.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E09 - Truth or Dare?
1.plot: Steffi and Luz peel back multiple layers of deception when they confront Ron and Cynthia. Julian leads a meditation the night before the competition.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E10 - Summer Crush!
1.plot: It's finally the day of the Summer Crush competition, and Natasha and Steffi face off for the trophy as their friends and family watch.

1.title: FR - L'Été à Cielo Grande - S01E11 - Save Cielo
1.plot: The friends sing and perform in the "Save Cielo" fundraiser to help the resort pay its bills. Steffi has a heartfelt conversation with her father.

meta.plot: En relançant sa compétition de wakeboard, un hôtel reculé d'Argentine éveille l'intérêt de Steffi, une athlète mexicaine bien décidée à percer un secret de famille.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The bucolic tranquility of Greylock, New Hampshire, is upended when a massive vein of an incredibly valuable mineral is discovered under the town.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E02 - Power
1.plot: Sarah is faced with her first major challenge as a leader when Greylock's power is shut off. Bella pushes boundaries with her dad when it comes to spending time with Tyler and Sarah.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E03 - The Lines Between Us
1.plot: When the governor of New Hampshire closes Greylock's borders, Sarah calls on Bella, Tyler and Maya to help her solve the problem. Corinne pushes Danny to reveal a secret that he's been keeping from everyone.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E04 - In Us We Trust
1.plot: When Sarah discovers that everyone in Greylock is being charged foreign transaction fees, she enlists her friends to help her create own currency. Grover shares with Danny what really happened to Corinne after he left.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E05 - The Criminals it Deserves
1.plot: With Lydon's workers causing problems, Sarah drafts an executive order to help protect Greylock's residents. Grover introduces Danny to a new friend, but they have more in common than Danny realizes. Maya feels abandoned.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E06 - A Show of Hands
1.plot: After a damaging magazine article is written about Sarah, she realizes that it's time for Greylock to create a more representative government. With an election open to anyone, Danny, Maya, AJ, and Corinne take a shot at the four available seats.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E07 - Sanctuary
1.plot: Greylock's fledgling congress must decide their immigration policy now that new people want to immigrate. Sarah and Danny face someone from their past and have different reactions to the visitor.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E08 - The Perfect Conditions for Disaster
1.plot: After an unexpected snowstorm leaves Greylock stranded with no plows, Sarah and the town come up with a creative plan to clear the roads. During the storm, Sarah gets two unexpected guests and tries to figure out how to navigate both circumstances.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E09 - Sons and Daughters
1.plot: When Corrine confides in Sarah about what happened with Danny, Corinne also admits that she needs Sarah's help with something she has always questioned. Sarah confronts Danny about what happened, leaving Danny to make a decision about his future.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E10 - From Simple Sources
1.plot: Greylock is threatened with a massive flood as unseasonably warm weather melts the snow from the recent blizzard. Knowing Greylock will be underwater in hours, Sarah must ask for help from the last person she wants to rely on—Paul.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E11 - Pledge Allegiance
1.plot: Sarah and Paul start to make headway in their relationship. Ellen surprises everyone by coming home earlier than expected. Danny accidentally makes things harder for Corinne, leaving her with a tough choice about some of the people in her life.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E12 - Two Imposters
1.plot: When Danny shares good news about Greylock's finances, Sarah winds up in a debate that traps her between her two closest friends. Corinne is trying to right her wrongs, but she can't catch a break, especially after Sarah drops a major bombshell. Meanwhile, Bella and Tyler get creative with each of their school projects, which helps Sarah and Grover in ways they didn't realize they needed.

1.title: FR - The Republic of Sarah - S01E13 - The Last Rabbit
1.plot: Sarah is offered a chance for international recognition of Greylock but the price may be too high. Danny offers to help Corinne with her legal woes but she asks him for something unexpected.

meta.plot: Confrontée à la destruction de sa ville par une société minière cupide, l'enseignante rebelle du secondaire Sarah Cooper utilise une obscure faille cartographique pour déclarer son indépendance. Maintenant, Sarah doit diriger un jeune groupe d'inadaptés alors qu'ils tentent de créer leur propre pays à partir de zéro.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E01 - LUX
1.plot: Esther cannot reach her husband after a great loss. She decides to look for him. Evi is assigned a murder case, which is linked to the suspected human trafficking couple Sylvia and Ingmar. Sylvia is offered a deal to testify against Ingmar, but declines. In the evening she receives one of her regular customers: Eric. Due to a misunderstanding, things get out of hand and Eric flees.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E02 - Maman
1.plot: Esther reports Eric's missing. She finds out that Eric is cheating on her from photos of him and a woman with a specific tattoo, which she finds on her father's computer. Evi gets drunk at her twins' party and this leads to a big confrontation with Gust. Ingmar brings Imana to Amsterdam, where he has a fight with his rival Elarbi. Sylvia finds out that she is pregnant.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E03 - "E"
1.plot: Sylvia lies that she had an abortion. She is confronted by the police with a photo of Ingmar, Petra and their child. Imana is brought back mutilated by Elarbi and wants to escape. Ingmar plots revenge on Elarbi. Evi goes to stay with Sam because Gust has kicked her out of the house. Esther finds out that the family business is almost bankrupt and Veronqiue is not the woman with the tattoo from Eric's photos. Everything becomes too much for her during a performance.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E04 - Kashmir
1.plot: The body in the Scheldt turns out to be Eric's. Esther turns out not to be pregnant and is told not to use Eric's seed now that he is dead. Veronique confesses that she saw Eric at Tropicana and Evi and Sam are going to investigate further. They inform Esther about his visit to the club. Sylvia makes an appointment with the police. Esther decides to go to Tropicana herself. She finds herself in a dire situation and when she runs off, she recognizes Sylvia by her tattoo.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E05 - Tropicana
1.plot: Esther is questioned by Evi and Sam about Eric's death. Esther insists she has nothing to do with it. Then she contacts Sylvia, who does not want to hear about it. Sylvia has enough on her mind betraying Ingmar. Together with the police, she makes a plan how they can catch Ingmar in the act. Evi and Gust seem to get closer to each other and for a moment they seem like a real family again, but Evi can't handle it anyway.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E06 - Dearest Mother
1.plot: Esther tries in vain to contact Sylvia again and gives her a business card. Evi and Sam question Sylvia again. Sylvia complains about Esther harassing her. Evi follows Veronique, they arrive at Eric's funeral. Sam finds out that Veronique has an alibi. The police action is ready to begin when Sylvia warns Ingmar at the last minute and flees. Esther is shocked by an unexpected visit.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E07 - Peacock Eye
1.plot: Esther does not know what to do with Sylvia and gives her money for a hotel. Esther becomes intimate with Jeroen when she confides in him. Evi is honest with Gust that she doesn't want to be a mother, which Gust doesn't understand at all. The research now focuses on Ingmar and Sylvia and Evi works together with Anna and Kamiel. Ingmar finds out about Sylvia's whereabouts and flees back to Esther. Sylvia makes Esther a very strange proposal ...

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E08 - Our House
1.plot: Evi and Sam help the human trafficking department with a large-scale raid on the bungalow park of Ingmar. Evi concludes that Sylvia is now the main suspect in Eric's case. Evi informs Esther and Esther confronts Sylvia. Sylvia does not understand and tells Esther what she thinks happened on that night. She tries to convince Esther to buy the baby. Evi suspects that Sylvia is with Esther and decides to observe them. Ingmar has apparently also received this information.

1.title: FR - Red Light - S01E10 - Awake
1.plot: A confrontation ensues between Ingmar and the women. It finally becomes clear who is responsible for Eric's death. Esther and Sylvia struggle to flee, while Evi goes after Ingmar and his henchmen. Esther and Sylvia go to Spain, where Eric is said to have a house where Sylvia is safe. Meanwhile, Evi is faced with betrayal from someone close to her.

meta.plot: Trois femmes se retrouvent empêtrées dans le monde de la traite des êtres humains et de la prostitution lorsque le mari d'Esther disparaît soudainement. Venant d'univers complètement différents, les vies de ces femmes s'entremêlent. Elles découvrent qu'elles ont besoin les unes des autres pour échapper aux situations difficiles dans lesquelles elles se trouvent.
Amenée à traiter des cas complexes, une juge concilie son aversion pour les cas de délinquance juvénile avec ses convictions en matière de justice.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Arriving at juvenile court, Sim Eun-seok meets the compassionate Cha Tae-ju. The details of a murder case involving an underage killer don't add up.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Eun-seok's unorthodox methods in dealing with the suspected accomplice ruffle feathers. Contradictory accusations fly in a heated trial.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The search for the truth behind a teenager's injuries leads to painful and hidden revelations. Meanwhile, the case is personal for Tae-ju.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A troubling call puts a youth counseling instructor under the judges' microscope. The girls inside her recovery home back up the claims.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Eun-seok and Tae-ju set out to locate the missing girls before harm comes to them. The whistleblower's surprising identity is revealed.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Students from privileged backgrounds are caught in a scandal that attracts national attention. Kang Won-jung hides a career-sabotaging secret.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Eun-seok expects Won-jung to do the right thing, and pushes back against his actions in court. When he demands hard evidence, she digs in deeper.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Investigating an underage traffic accident case despite Eun-seok's reservations, Tae-ju discovers a key missing piece. They clash with Na Geun-hee.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Eun-seok fixates on one of the accused perpetrators in a brutal sexual assault case. Tae-ju gains insight into her personal history.

1.title: FR - Juvenile Justice - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Efforts to locate the ringleader of the runaway gang places Eun-seok in grave danger. Geun-hee faces a confrontation about her principles.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E01 - Chapter 1: It Was Murder, She Said!
1.plot: Forty years after he appeared in the sky to save humanity, Marvelous Man makes a televised address that shocks the world — and his Guardians of Justice.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E02 - Chapter 2: A Mentally Shattered Megalomaniac
1.plot: As crime and chaos spin out of control, Knight Hawk starts to investigate the "god killer" bullet and Marvelous Man's mysterious demise.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E03 - Chapter 3: Anubis and How I Learned to Love the Nuke
1.plot: Anubis terrorists leave a gruesome trail of destruction while power-hungry world leaders move toward nuclear war. The Guardians suffer painful losses.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E04 - Chapter 4: You Can Own the Word "Justice"
1.plot: As the public loses faith, Knight Hawk's interrogations uncover more of the Guardians' buried secrets. Sparks fly between the Speed and Awesome Man.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E05 - Chapter 5: When Guardians Fall in Love
1.plot: A visit to Golden Goddess' lair leaves Knight Hawk undone. Motion Blur comes forward with shocking information about the "god killer" bullet.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E06 - Chapter 6: Shame Is a Lower Vibration than Anger
1.plot: Knight Hawk finds out more about Marvelous Man's secret life — and the truth about his death. The Mellow Devil drug ravages the streets.

1.title: FR - The Guardians of Justice - S01E07 - Chapter 7: Proximity to Power Corrupts More than Power Itself
1.plot: Armed with the truth, the Speed races to stop a catastrophe. Knight Hawk and Awesome Man face terrible choices for "the greater good."

meta.plot: Quand ils ne peuvent plus compter sur leur chef, qui semblait pourtant invincible, des super-héros en crise sont confrontés au mal qui ronge le monde… et leurs vies.

Fisk est une série un peu "déjantée" avec des épisodes d'une trentaine de minutes.

Elle raconte les déboires d'Helen Tudor-Fisk, une avocate contractuelle qui n'est pas douée pour les relations humaines.

1.title: FR - Fisk - S01E01 - Portrait of a Lady
1.plot: On her first day at Gruber and Gruber, Helen consults with Ruth O'Malley who want the 'vasectomy clause' enforced in her mother's will. The clause states that Ruth's brother will only inherit his share if he has a vasectomy.

1.title: FR - Fisk - S01E02 - Cremains of the Day
1.plot: Helen mediates a case about division of cremains, between a bereaved daughter and the new, much younger partner of her dead father. She also has an awkward family lunch at Dad and Viktor's house.

1.title: FR - Fisk - S01E03 - Taken
1.plot: Helen meets with a woman who is demanding power of attorney over her mother, and attends her ex-husband William's writers' festival run by literary interlocutor Lindy Baxter-Smythe.

1.title: FR - Fisk - S01E04 - Dead Man Texting
1.plot: The office is a-buzz because their favourite temp Peggy is coming in to help out with a deceased estate. Helen doesn't understand what's so fun about Fun Peggy, but everyone else, including George, thinks she's 'a hoot'.

meta.plot: Alice vit le bonheur ordinaire d’une mère de famille quand tout bascule : l’homme de sa vie, Thomas, le père de son enfant, est soupçonné d’être Antoine Durieux-Jelosse, l’homme qui a défrayé la chronique pour avoir disparu après avoir tué toute sa famille quinze ans auparavant. Depuis tout ce temps, la commandante Sophie Lancelle n’a jamais arrêté de chercher cet homme ayant commis l’impensable et elle est prête à tout pour le retrouver. Entre ces deux femmes que tout oppose, un homme crie son innocence.

1.title: FR - La Part du soupçon - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - La Part du soupçon - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Dans le cadre d'un projet de cambriolage d'une villa de luxe, l'adolescent Ralf accepte d'être le chauffeur de la fuite. La maison appartient à un couple heureux et prospère, Helen Möhring, son mari et leurs trois adolescents. Alors que Ralf attend à l'extérieur, l'un des agresseurs confronte Helen, qui se surprend à imaginer jusqu'où elle est prête à aller pour protéger sa famille. Alors que le cauchemar d'Helen ne fait que commencer, Ralf est entraîné dans le monde criminel, essayant de comprendre ce qui s'est exactement passé dans la maison. Sous son apparence propre se cache une atmosphère trouble. Les destins de Ralf et d'Helen sont liés à jamais.

1.title: FR - Lieve Mama - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Lieve Mama - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Lieve Mama - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Lieve Mama - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Lieve Mama - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Lieve Mama - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Dans une communauté balnéaire danoise, Hvide Sande. Le détective allemand Thomas et la flic danoise Helene sont désignés pour travailler ensemble sur une enquête criminelle. Tous les deux célibataires, ils sont contraints de jouer un couple afin de mener à bien leur recherche bien qu'ils arrivent difficilement à se supporter dans une même pièce.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E01 - Warm Welcome
1.plot: In a town where distrust for the police runs rampant, two detectives go undercover as a married couple to try and solve the year-old case involving the murder of a German surfer.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E02 - The Witness
1.plot: Detectives Helene and Thomas are quickly thrust into their undercover roles as a married couple. The pair get acquainted with the town's most prominent personalities and begin to stitch together clues.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E03 - The Wall of Love
1.plot: Helene and Thomas's cover is put to the test during a double date with a prominent local couple. As new leads come in, the detectives take unexpected risks and break laws in the pursuit of clues.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E04 - The Nighthawk
1.plot: As the investigation grows, so does the body count. Just as Thomas makes a break in the case, an explosive argument between him and Helene threatens to jeopardize the entire investigation.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E05 - Ghosts of the Past
1.plot: The positive identification of the murder weapon leads Thomas down a rabbit hole of World War II memorabilia collectors. While Thomas's pursuit turns up solid leads in the case, it also leads him straight into danger.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E06 - The Nazi Card
1.plot: The investigation has fallen off track, and Thomas is back in Germany. Helene has bigger things to worry about. A criminal she put behind bars has been released and is out for blood — Helene's blood.

1.title: FR - White Sands - S01E07 - Below the Surface
1.plot: The detectives' leads are drying up. The pair moves their investigation from land to the depths of the sea to investigate a shipwreck from 60 years ago.

meta.plot: Depuis une rupture douloureuse, Alice reste désespérément célibataire. Mais un gourou charismatique expert en astrologie la pousse à chercher l'âme sœur dans les étoiles.

1.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S01E01 - Aries
1.plot: When her ex gets engaged to another woman, Alice is devastated. Then she meets Tio, a passionate astrologer, and begins looking for love in a new way.

1.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S01E02 - Taurus
1.plot: Against the guidance of Tio, Alice goes on a date with an Aries. Later, she crosses paths with a Taurus and takes an enchanting ride through the city.

1.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S01E03 - Gemini
1.plot: Alice's fascination with astrology leads to a long-overdue career opportunity. Sparks fly when Alice meets a seductive Gemini on set.

1.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S01E04 - Cancer
1.plot: A passionate fling leaves Alice unsatisfied and she has a falling out with Tio. The runaway success of Alice's show comes with lots of complications.

1.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S01E05 - Leo
1.plot: While nursing Alice back to health, Tio and Paola compare notes on her love life. Alice has chemistry with a colleague and inquires about his star sign.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E01 - Libra
2.plot: After a two-week cooling-off period, Alice and Davide try to navigate working together. But things get awkward when Barbara attends an office party.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E02 - Scorpio
2.plot: To try and vent her anger at Davide, Alice goes on a paintball date with a charming Scorpio. Meanwhile, Carlo proves to be an annoying houseguest.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E03 - Sagittarius
2.plot: Using the book Tio gave her, Alice reads her own horoscope for the first time. But the day throws out several curveballs she couldn't see coming.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E04 - Capricorn
2.plot: In a twist of fate, Alice ends up on a work trip to Paris with Davide. She follows Tio's rules to avoid temptation, but the stars have other plans.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E05 - Aquarius
2.plot: Paola finds a solution to her pregnancy worries, while Tio gives an interview about his thoughts on everlasting love. Barbara invites Alice to dinner.

2.title: FR - Guide astrologique des cœurs brisés - S02E06 - Pisces
2.plot: As Alice considers a big life change, she learns that Davide has made one of his own. Are they a match made in heaven, or will love tear them apart?

meta.plot: Une représentation amusante et honnête de deux détectives radicalement différentes au début de la quarantaine à la suite du détective Guns and Gangs Sam et du détective Narcotics Kelly, qui sont de jour en jour de véritables héros d'action à leur manière: habiles, coriaces, déterminées et impitoyables. Mais la nuit, ils sont tous les deux aux prises avec la solitude, des familles dysfonctionnelles, des vies amoureuses foirées et le sentiment que leurs ambitions professionnelles ne correspondent peut-être pas totalement à leurs besoins personnels.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E01 - Bananas
1.plot: After a failed drug bust, Sam and Kelly discover they’re after the same dealer, forcing them to team up to take down a major Stockwood player.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E02 - Dealz
1.plot: Sam calls on Kelly’s undercover skills when she gets a lead on a gun-dealing dollar store. But when Kelly’s cover is blown, Sam’s forced to get out of her comfort zone to expose the supplier.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E03 - Nuts
1.plot: With an informant's life on the line, Kelly enlists Sam's help in raiding a Stockwood stash house.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E04 - Feathers
1.plot: Sam gets Kelly's help for a high-stakes sting to get them closer to catching the Bowen Brothers, but Kelly is put in danger when Sam's power play takes an unexpected turn.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E05 - Kids
1.plot: Kelly enlists Elliot's help to investigate an MDMA dealer in his school. Meanwhile, when Sam's investigation into a father's missing guns takes a turn, she's surprised by who gets caught in the crossfire...

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E06 - Guns
1.plot: When a cooler full of guns puts Sam and Kelly on the trail of 77 more black-market firearms, the pair find themselves in a life or “death-trap” situation.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E07 - Ritz
1.plot: With Sam's promotion on the line, Sam and Kelly stake out an autobody shop, hoping to reel in Stockwood's last big fish, Randy Bowen.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E08 - Flowers
1.plot: Tracking the source of a new MDMA brings Sam and Kelly into the unlikely world of flower deliveries, as they narrow in on a new Stockwood player.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E09 - Gliders
1.plot: In the aftermath of their shocking discovery, Sam & Kelly embark on a border-crossing mission to take down the new Stockwood boss.

1.title: FR - Pretty Hard Cases - S01E10 - Jellybeans
1.plot: Sam and Kelly are forced to team up with the enemy in order to take down an even bigger threat. When their undercover sting takes a dangerous turn, Sam and Kelly must give their best performances yet in order to escape with their lives.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E01 - Imaginary Friends
1.plot: Young Dylan arrives at his relatives' home needing a place to live, but his streetwise swagger upends the conservative Wilson household.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E02 - Street Smart
1.plot: Yasmine’s celebrity client DJ Khaled visits, presenting Dylan with a golden opportunity to prove his rap credentials and score a record deal.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E03 - Chasing That Dream
1.plot: Dylan has trouble adjusting to the Wilson family’s rules, leading to confrontation with his uncle that makes him feel unwanted.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E04 - Plain Faces
1.plot: Dylan doesn’t want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E05 - The Enforcer
1.plot: On his first day at school, Dylan starts a classroom protest over having to wear uniforms.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E06 - Speechless
1.plot: The kids help Myles plan Yasmine’s big dinner at the house for her boss. While Myles struggles to write a speech in honor of his wife, the kids throw out the catered food and plan their own menu.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E07 - Flowers
1.plot: After failing to get approval to go to the school dance, Rebecca tells her date that she can’t go because her grandmother has died, a lie that leads to a series of misunderstandings within the family.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E08 - In Too Deep
1.plot: As Myles and Yasmine sort out the truth behind a lie that spun out control, Dylan helps them plan payback on Rebecca before she gets home.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E09 - Mother May I
1.plot: Dylan writes a serious rap about his mom, prompting Martin to read his diary to find out if he’s doing ok. Dylan catches him in the act, triggering an escalating run of each family member invading the others’ privacy.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E10 - Teachable Moments
1.plot: Rebecca is being bullied online, prompting Dylan to encourage Martin to respond to some of the posts. His posts are not anonymous, however, and the family must deal with the fallout.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E11 - Natural Beauty
1.plot: Dylan tries to help Charlie with his homework, but his unconventional style of doing his homework comes to a head with Dylan gets into a rap battle with their teacher.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E12 - Special Delivery
1.plot: Rebecca is babysitting Charlie and Dylan, but when a deliveryman arrives with a package from Dylan’s mom, Rebecca and Dylan fight over the rule about not opening the door.

1.title: FR - Tyler Perry's Young Dylan - S01E13 - The Rap Game
1.plot: The family can't get any peace while Dylan plays the drums all day and night, and everyone tries to convince him that he needs to give up his new instrument for good.

meta.plot: La grand-mère du jeune Dylan décide de l'envoyer vivre indéfiniment avec la famille de son fils aisé. Le ménage de la famille Wilson est bientôt renversé alors que les modes de vie s'affrontent entre l'aspirant star du hip-hop et ses cousins ​​à lacets droits.

Dans les années soixante de Londres, la jeune juive Vivien Epstein suit son amant dans le danger et lorsqu'il est pris entre la vie et la mort, elle se retrouve sous couverture avec les fascistes, non seulement pour lui mais pour le bien de son pays.

1.title: FR - Ridley Road - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In 1960s London, Vivien, a young Jewish hairdresser, discovers the 62 Group – an intelligence-gathering underground movement trying to stop the rise of the far right.

1.title: FR - Ridley Road - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Vivien meets Colin Jordan, who takes her into the heart of the National Socialist Movement. She takes a huge risk but manages to find out what happened to Jack.

1.title: FR - Ridley Road - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Vivien is introduced to Colin Jordan's wife, dedicated Nazi occultist Francoise Dior. The fascists plan a deadly attack, and the 62 Group do everything they can and stop them.

1.title: FR - Ridley Road - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Vivien is trapped amongst the National Socialists. With time running out Vivien risks everything to make one last attempt to sabotage the fascists without being caught.

1.title: FR - Catching Killers - S01E01 - Body Count: The Green River Killer
1.plot: The unsolved murders of women around Green River near Seattle haunt investigators for decades — until crime scene science finally catches up.

1.title: FR - Catching Killers - S01E02 - Manhunter: Aileen Wuornos
1.plot: A serial killer’s deadly road trip through Florida in 1990 leaves several men dead and spurs investigators to go undercover for an unexpected suspect.

1.title: FR - Catching Killers - S01E03 - True Lies (1): The Happy Face Killer
1.plot: Odd suspects, questionable confessions and ever-shifting stories confuse detectives in the hunt for a young Oregon woman's killer in the early 1990s.

1.title: FR - Catching Killers - S01E04 - True Lies (2): The Happy Face Killer
1.plot: A consequential letter surfaces with stirring claims and upends the seemingly closed case, calling into question the guilt of the convicted criminals.

2.title: FR - Catching Killers - S02E01 - Bind. Torture. Kill: BTK
2.plot: A terrifying Kansas serial killer reemerges after 30 years. Using DNA technology and help from the media, investigators race to prevent another murder.

2.title: FR - Catching Killers - S02E02 - Thrill Kills: The Phoenix Serial Shooter
2.plot: A serial shooter targets random pedestrians on the Phoenix streets, leading detectives on a desperate hunt for a criminal driven to kill for sport.

2.title: FR - Catching Killers - S02E03 - Missing Men (1): The Toronto Village Killer
2.plot: After multiple gay men sharing similar features go missing in Toronto, detectives follow an international tip with horrific claims of cannibalism.

2.title: FR - Catching Killers - S02E04 - Missing Men (2): The Toronto Village Killer
2.plot: As more men vanish, a fresh task force assembles. New surveillance footage and recovered computer files provide a final chance to identify the killer.

meta.plot: Dans cette série de crimes réels, les enquêteurs chargés de célèbres affaires de tueurs en série révèlent les détails poignants et glaçants de leur incroyable travail.

1.title: FR - Derby Girl - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Derby Girl - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Derby Girl - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Derby Girl - S01E04 - Episode 4

FR - Derby Girl - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Derby Girl - S01E10 - Episode 10

FR - Derby Girl - S02E02 - Episode 2
