FR - Derby Girl - S02E07 - Episode 7

meta.plot: Lola Bouvier, 25 ans, star déchue du patinage artistique à l’égo surdimensionné, décide de devenir «la plus grande championne de Roller Derby de tous les temps» en intégrant, malgré elle, une des plus mauvaises équipes de l’hexagone : les Cannibal Licornes.

1.title: FR - Le bonheur - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le bonheur - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le bonheur - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le bonheur - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: François Plante (Charette), qui est enseignant, décide de tout plaquer pour déménager à la campagne où il souhaite écrire un roman. Au bout du rouleau, il est en quête d’un équilibre qui pourrait rimer avec «sainte paix», mais parfois, quand l’on souhaite appliquer une recette toute faite et idéalisée, on provoque un sacré bordel.
Après un événement bouleversant, Ola part à la découverte d'elle-même tout en essayant d'élever deux enfants et de joindre les deux bouts.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E01 - Take Me Back
1.plot: Years after her marriage, Ola believes she has it all, including a loving husband and two great kids. But a sudden revelation shatters her world.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E02 - Bills to Pay
1.plot: Ola grapples with her new reality, and Hisham makes an impulsive buy. At a dinner hosted by their friends, awkward silence turns into a fruitful talk.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E03 - A Fish in the Sea
1.plot: With the business up and running, Nesrine urges Ola to live a little. Hisham's secret is publicly exposed, further complicating the family dynamic.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E04 - 40 is the New 40
1.plot: Soheir enjoys her new star status. Ahead of her 40th birthday, Ola seeks Adam's help with revamping her marketing strategy — and her bucket list.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E05 - No Men, No Cry
1.plot: Hisham backs out of taking Nadia and Salim to camp, so Ola steps in, leaving Nesrine and Montasser in charge of an important pitch to investors.

1.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S01E06 - The Good Ex-wife
1.plot: Following a serious scare, a conflicted Ola must dig deep to make a huge decision, one that might not necessarily please everyone around her.

2.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S02E01 - Enough "Not Enough"
2.plot: When Ola's supplier passes away, she's forced to do business with his stubborn son, Karim — if only he weren't so handsome.

2.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S02E02 - Back to Square One
2.plot: Ola promises her daughter that she won't let anything distract her from important moments — until she's locked into an embarrassing situation with Karim.

2.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S02E03 - Second Second Chance?
2.plot: The kids' uncle Hazem shows up for a surprise visit without any plans to leave… seemingly ever. Ola tries to get him back on his feet.

2.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S02E04 - It's a Family Affair!
2.plot: Ola's company has a big photoshoot and she needs to impress her new business partner. Enter her brother, kids, and overeager mother.

2.title: FR - Ola cherche sa voie - S02E06 - All Is Not Well That Ends Well
2.plot: Returning from a business trip full of unexpected revelations, Ola learns that things were not so quiet back home. What else might she discover now?

meta.plot: Invité par son ami et mentor Peter Solomon, Robert Langdon, un jeune professeur de Harvard, se rend à Washington pour un séminaire sur le symbolisme dans l'architecture de la capitale américaine. Lorsque Peter est enlevé, son disciple est contacté par le ravisseur, qui lui demande de résoudre une série d'énigmes. Langdon est aidé par Katherine, la fille de Peter, mais se méfie de la CIA, qui est également impliquée. L'universitaire découvre peu à peu une conspiration à l'échelle mondiale. Les thèmes favoris de Dan Brown sont à l'oeuvre dans cette série qui présente une des premières aventures du célèbre Robert Langdon.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E01 - As Above, So Below
1.plot: Young professor Robert Langdon is pulled into a complex mystery when his mentor is kidnapped.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E02 - The Araf
1.plot: Robert and Katherine get help from an old friend while trying to decipher the most recent clue.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E03 - Murmuration
1.plot: With the CIA on their trail, Robert and Katherine turn to Nuñez for help; Sato interrogates Bellamy.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E04 - L'Enfant Orientation
1.plot: Forced to split up, Langdon follows the next clue while Katherine joins Sato to find her father.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E05 - Melencolia I
1.plot: Langdon must reunite with Katherine and team up with Sato while Nuñez follows a hunch.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E06 - Diophantine Pseudonym
1.plot: Mal'akh pressures Langdon and Peter to decipher the clues. Katherine, Nuñez and Sato try to regroup.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E07 - Noögenesis
1.plot: Mal'akh sheds light on Zach's final days in prison. Langdon and Katherine face their shared past.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E08 - Cascade
1.plot: Katherine and Langdon persuade Isabel to protect herself. Peter reconnects with Leviathan members.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E09 - Order Eight
1.plot: Langdon, Katherine, Nuñez and Peter partner with Sato and the CIA to spring a trap for Mal'akh.

1.title: FR - Le Symbole Perdu - S01E10 - Resonance
1.plot: As Mal'akh's plan culminates, Peter and Langdon wrestle over the sacrifice needed to save Katherine.

meta.plot: Deux sœurs adolescentes découvrent que leurs parents sont des monstres...

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E01 - The Red Lake
1.plot: A sinister tragedy rocks the small town of Feria and leaves sisters Eva and Sofía stunned and questioning what they know about their parents.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E02 - Babylon
1.plot: While searching for answers about her mother's whereabouts, Sofía is introduced to a new world. The townspeople of Feria begin to turn on the sisters.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E03 - Offering
1.plot: The details surrounding Father Ezcaray's murder confound Guillén. Sofía sinks deeper into her new life. Eva's interview takes a supernatural turn.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E04 - The Temple
1.plot: In 1975 Elena struggles to fight what her father wants her to do ritualistically, with what she sees as her future. The 90s come with fresh challenges.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E05 - The God of Fire
1.plot: Estrella researches Gnosticism to learn more about the Cult of Light, which leads her to a discovery. Chisco expresses his concerns about Sofía to Eva.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E06 - Bloody Feria
1.plot: The sisters are sent a covert message, resulting in a clandestine meeting. Sofía makes a choice between the cult and Eva.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E07 - The Apocalypse According to Pablo
1.plot: Guillén is consistently frustrated as he interviews members of the cult in his search for answers. Pablo speaks candidly with his daughters.

1.title: FR - Feria: L'éclat des ténèbres - S01E08 - The Solitary King
1.plot: The Cult of Light and its demons do everything in their power to get Sofía to open the fifth seal. Guillén has a revelation.

meta.plot: Un groupe d'enquêteurs de la police suit des événements surnaturels en Nouvelle-Zélande. L'équipe se penche sur des cas de possession démoniaque, de maisons hantées et de vols de banques de sang.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E01 - Demon Girl
1.plot: Officers Minogue and O'Leary bring in what appears to be a projectile-vomiting drunk teenager. Sergeant Maaka delves deeper and invites the officers to join his Paranormal Unit.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E02 - Cop Circles
1.plot: Minogue and O'Leary travel to the rural outskirts to investigate photographic evidence of a cow up a tree. Maaka suspects alien activity and sure enough, the two cops soon discover evidence.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E03 - Things That Do The Bump In The Night
1.plot: Minogue and O'Leary attend a noise complaint at what appears to be a 70s-themed party in Kandallah. But when they pull the plug on the record player, everyone disappears.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E04 - The She Wolf of Kurimarama Street
1.plot: Responding to a callout from a freaked out pizza delivery guy who was attacked by a big dog wearing jeans, Minogue and O'Leary soon discover that a werewolf is on the loose in Lower Hutt.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E05 - A Normal Night
1.plot: Minogue and O'Leary encounter a series of incidents including a plastic bag mistaken for a ghost, some creepy clowns, some sort of ritual sacrifice, and a theft from the hospital blood bank.

1.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S01E06 - Zombie Cops
1.plot: Fellow officers Donovan and Laupepe become infected by a zombie. Minogue and O'Leary must catch them before they get to Courtenay Place on a Friday night and start the zombie apocalypse.

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E01 - Taniwha
2.plot: Minogue and O'Leary head for the ocean when ten anglers disappear from around Wellington Harbour in mysterious circumstances.

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E02 - Fear the Briannas
2.plot: Minogue and O'Leary go back to school when three teen witches start threatening students at a local girls' high school. But they soon learn their teasing can be just as damaging as their magical powers.

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E03 - Mt Vic Hooters
2.plot: Minogue and O'Leary unwittingly free the ghost of an old fashioned cop from the 1930s. Can they stop him before he shuts every pub in Wellington for being open after 6pm closing time?

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E04 - Copy Cops
2.plot: The discovery of a dead policeman that looks exactly like Minogue leads the cops to a creepy motel in the country full of exact copies of themselves. Although some of them aren't that exact.

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E05 - Haunted Nissan
2.plot: Minogue and O'Leary pull over a driverless 80s boy racer car only to discover it's haunted by the lovelorn ghost of the original owner. He's looking for his old girlfriend from 1989, but how will he react when he finds out she's moved on?

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E06 - Mobots
2.plot: Out of date phones start forming into robots and terrorising the neighbourhood! Game of snake anyone?

2.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S02E07 - Christmas Special
2.plot: Minogue and O'Leary go out on a busy Christmas Eve Patrol. They find the Devil at a mall, deal with an interdimensional vortex at a barbecue, a discover a violent doll rampaging through a house.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E01 - Invisible Fiend
3.plot: After getting called out to a mysterious home invasion with no visible signs of entry, Minogue and O'Leary manage to arrest an invisible entity and bring it in for questioning.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E02 - Te Maero
3.plot: After finding footage of a camper being abducted by a large hairy creature, the cops decide to head for the bush.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E03 - Fear Factory
3.plot: The cops’ worst nightmares are realised when they encounter a shapeshifter who turns into the thing you fear the most.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E04 - The Sevens Ghosts
3.plot: Minogue and O'Leary go searching for a group of ghostly rugby fans dressed as Where's Wally.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E05 - Revengers
3.plot: A meteor strike gives superpowers to a Neighbourhood Watch group who decide to take the law into their own hands; it's up to Minogue and O'Leary to take the law back.

3.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S03E06 - Fatberg
3.plot: When a large, congealed blob of fat in the Wellington sewers becomes sentient, Minogue and O'Leary go underground to confront the monster.

4.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S04E01 - Bird Woman
4.plot: Minogue and O'Leary tackle a half bird/half human that's been stealing shiny objects from around Wellington including the 'W' from the Wellington sign.

4.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S04E03 - The Coolening
4.plot: After giving a talk at a high school, Minogue and O'Leary confiscate a haunted leather jacket that makes whoever wears it cool; something neither Minogue nor O'Leary are used to.

4.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S04E04 - Skeleton Crew
4.plot: When workmen disturb a Pakeha burial ground underneath the police station, an annoying old Caucasian ghost possesses Sarge who then menaces his own officers.

4.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S04E05 - Who The Hell?
4.plot: On a typical night patrol, Minogue and O'Leary get to the bottom of a series of mysterious curses while Officer Parker gets a new partner.

4.title: FR - Wellington Paranormal - S04E06 - Time Cop
4.plot: It's the final episode ever! Minogue and O'Leary go back in time to the 90s but on returning, discover they've created an apocalyptic new timeline where Sarge was never a cop.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E01 - Arrival
1.plot: Dr. Nancy Jaax has one of the most dangerous jobs in the world handling deadly viruses; after a lab accident, she is faced with a possible Ebola outbreak on U.S. soil.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E02 - Cell H
1.plot: Dr. Nancy Jaax and her lab partner, Dr. Peter Jahrling, must take matters into their own hands to determine the source of the virus before it spreads; Dr. Jaax convinces an employee to hand over samples from infected monkeys.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E03 - Charlie Foxtrot
1.plot: When representatives from varying agencies disagree on how to handle Dr. Nancy Jaax's discovery, she realizes there are few protocols in place for containing a deadly virus on U.S. soil; an employee at the monkey research facility falls ill.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E04 - Expendable
1.plot: An employee at the monkey research facility falls ill, causing Dr. Nancy Jaax to fear the virus has spread to the human population; Jerry Jaax searches for a way to protect his wife; Dr. Wade Carter is obsessed with exposing the dangers of Ebola.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E05 - Quarantine
1.plot: Dr. Nancy Jaax works tirelessly to find out why the virus is behaving differently than expected in human victims; unforeseen dangers arise at the research facility; Jaax is forced to make a choice between her family and her duty to her country.

1.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S01E06 - Hidden
1.plot: A volatile situation inside the research facility comes to a head; Dr. Jaax steps up, but exhaustion threatens the precision needed to sterilize the threat; the press arrives, and neighbors become aware of the danger next door.

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E01 - Noble Eagle
2.plot: In Florida, a man mysteriously falls ill and dies. Special Agent Matthew Ryker suspects an anthrax attack - how many others have been infected?

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E02 - Hell's Chimney
2.plot: Ryker’s investigation moves to New York as another case of anthrax occurs. Bruce Ivins begins having suspicions of his coworkers.

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E03 - Neither Rain Nor Sleet...
2.plot: An attack on Capitol Hill sends Ryker and his team to a mail facility that’s become a hot spot for anthrax infections.

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E04 - Dream Boldly, Live Fully
2.plot: The FBI learns more about Bruce Ivins’ peculiar past behaviors after an old colleague raises red flags. Ryker and Dani trace the origin of the letters.

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E05 - Stentor Roeselii
2.plot: All eyes shift to “Mr. Z.” As they start to zero in on a suspect, Ryker and Dani get new assignments - but that won’t stop them from chasing their lead.

2.title: FR - The Hot Zone - S02E06 - RMR-1029
2.plot: With two suspects in question, Ryker’s own beliefs about the case are tested.

meta.plot: La terrifiante histoire vraie des origines du virus Ebola, un virus mortel et hautement infectieux né dans les forêts humides d'Afrique Centrale. En 1989, il apparaît soudainement aux Etats-Unis chez un chimpanzé d'un laboratoire de Washington DC. Aucun remède n'est alors connu. Une équipe va tenter d'empêcher le virus de se propager jusque dans la population...

Julie, 36 ans, larguée, sans enfants, au chômage, coche toutes les cases de la parfaite looseuse. Mais un coup de téléphone va tout changer. Au bout du fil, Max lui fait une sublime demande en mariage. Elle est extatique jusqu’au moment où elle comprend que le téléphone qu’elle serre frénétiquement n’est pas le sien...

1.title: FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - L'Amour (presque) parfait - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: La chronique du divorce du Duc et de la Duchesse d'Argyll, l'une des affaires judiciaires les plus notoires du XXème siècle. Célèbre pour son charisme, sa beauté et son style, Margaret, duchesse d'Argyll, a fait la une des journaux lors d'un divorce marqué par des accusations de falsification, de vol, de violence, de consommation de drogue, d'enregistrement secret, de corruption et d'une photo polaroid explicite, le tout sous le feu des projecteurs des médias britanniques des années 1960.

1.title: FR - A Very British Scandal - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Heiress Margaret Sweeny is in the midst of a divorce when she meets the dashing (and married) Ian Campbell, future Duke of Argyll.

1.title: FR - A Very British Scandal - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Putting aside gnawing doubts about her marriage, Margaret continues with her plan to secure her claim to Inveraray Castle.

1.title: FR - A Very British Scandal - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Battlelines are drawn as the Duke and Duchess of Argyll enter into a bloody separation, all played out in the white-hot glare of a ravenous press.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Inspired by a news story, Phileas Fogg is goaded into betting that he can circle the globe in just 80 days, despite never having been abroad before.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Fogg's self-respect is shattered by an arrogant widower's ridicule, worrying Abigail and Passepartout even before a disaster strikes.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Stuck on Yemen’s west coast, foolhardy Fogg decides on a dangerous desert crossing, leaving Abigail Fix in a place where even a fellow Englishwoman proves hostile.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In remote India, Fogg grumpily waits for a wedding to be over, but the groom is grabbed by the army. Passepartout is torn about potentially sabotaging the trip, while Miss Fix’s self-belief has been shaken.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Passepartout's knowledge of Hong Kong proves useful when Fogg’s finances are blocked. However, there is a high price to be paid. Abigail’s latest article could humiliate Phileas at a party in his honour.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Pacific castaways, Passepartout attempts to atone for his treachery, and Abigail is apologetic, but Phileas remains stubborn as revelations and regrets drive wedges between them. The Reform Club hears the distressing news that Fogg and ‘Fix’ are lost at sea.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Racing through the Rockies, Fogg unwillingly lets a laconic lawman and his prisoner share the chartered stagecoach, unaware the captive’s cronies are in hot pursuit, leading to a violent showdown before sundown.

1.title: FR - Le Tour du monde en 80 jours - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: An irresistible reunion, deadly dockside danger and regrettable red tape mean Phileas Fogg faces failure while his companions ponder parting from each other.

meta.plot: Londres, 1872. Phileas Fogg, gentleman anglais, prend ce pari insensé : faire le tour du monde en 80 jours. Il s'alloue les services de Jean Passepartout, un serveur français débrouillard. Ensemble, ils embarquent pour un voyage semé d'embûches, suivis de près par une jeune journaliste, Abigail Fix Fortescue.

Un des plus grands producteurs d'ectasy au monde, le Néerlandais Ferry Bouman, mène une petite vie tranquille dans sa villa à la frontière de la Belgique et des Pays-Bas. Mais les choses commencent à se compliquer pour lui le jour où deux agents sous couverture débarquent sur son territoire pour tenter d'infiltrer son réseau et le stopper...

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E01 - Camping Zonnedauw
1.plot: After embarking on their undercover assignment, agents Bob and Kim clash over how to initiate contact with their target and new neighbor, Ferry Bouman.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E02 - Highly Sensitive
1.plot: Attempts to make inroads with Ferry hit a roadblock when Bob antagonizes a member of his crew and a secondary operation spins out of control.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E03 - Italian Designer Drugs
1.plot: When Bob's temper endangers the mission, he works to spin the situation to his advantage. Kim reaches out to Danielle over a personal matter.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E04 - Legio Patria Nostra
1.plot: Trust issues crop up everywhere as John questions Ferry's faith in Bob, Ferry worries about Jurgen's loyalty, and Bob lets his wife down yet again.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E05 - Across the Border
1.plot: Bob sets out to pick up Ferry's merchandise but runs into trouble along the way. Back home, his concerned colleagues debate over whether to intervene.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E06 - Sirens
1.plot: A drug deal with a new associate leaves Ferry and John on edge. Bob and Kim feel the effects of their forced closeness. Danielle breaks into her stash.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E07 - That Cop's Face
1.plot: Ferry's close call sends John and Bob hunting for the person responsible. Meanwhile, Kim toys with Danielle's affections to help the case.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E08 - Nouveau Monde
1.plot: The tension between Bob and John comes to a head during a drug negotiation in France disguised as a couples' getaway. Kim ups the ante with Danielle.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E09 - Rock Bottom
1.plot: Unable to let the case go, Bob figures out another way to lure Ferry, but Kim feels uneasy once the targets are identified.

1.title: FR - Undercover - S01E10 - Showtime
1.plot: Amid what should be a happy occasion, Bob sets a drug buy in motion with Ferry's blessing. Back at the campsite, Danielle gets a bad feeling about Kim.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E01 - El Dorado
2.plot: Bob Lemmens tracks down some arms dealers.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E02 - Pentagon
2.plot: The Berger brothers quickly reveal their true nature.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E03 - Soldiers of Love
2.plot: As Bob stews over a setback in the case, his daughter brushes up against his past, and the Bergers attempt to salvage a lucrative business deal.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E04 - Trojan Horse Power
2.plot: The lure of a fresh start leaves Nathalie feeling conflicted and vulnerable, while Bob pushes for a breakthrough in the case before his time runs out.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E05 - Revolution
2.plot: Bob tries to make a deal with Laurent and JP Berger.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E06 - Victor
2.plot: Bob's attempt to use JP's past against him becomes a game of cat and mouse, Laurent's doubts about Nathalie boil over and Ferry issues an ultimatum.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E07 - Enrichochet
2.plot: When Nathalie's run-in with Laurent leaves Bob's case hanging by a thread, he bends the rules to the breaking point to motivate JP to make a deal.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E08 - Roadblock
2.plot: Pushed to the brink by everything he's done in pursuit of Ferry and the Bergers, Bob races to contain and cover up his various deceptions.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E09 - Reconstruction
2.plot: With Ferry's court date fast approaching, Bob faces the truth and considers the consequences of his actions. Laurent tries to tell JP what he knows.

2.title: FR - Undercover - S02E10 - War
2.plot: As the case comes down to the wire, Bob scrambles to protect Nathalie while JP takes steps to exact retribution on Laurent's behalf.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E01 - Evil Eye
3.plot: Bob receives an offer from a former colleague that could solve all his problems — or cost him everything. Ferry makes a bumpy reentry into his old life.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E02 - Festival Shop Super Sales
3.plot: Animosity seethes between Bob and Ferry as they figure out the rules of their new venture. Questions of loyalty and trust trouble the Bulut family.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E03 - Trust Issues
3.plot: Leyla's cautious approach to business means Bob and Ferry must pass her tests to gain her trust. Timur faces a painful reckoning with his family.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E04 - All-in Resort
3.plot: As Bob and Ferry's problems in Turkey escalate, Patrick scrambles to cut a dangerous deal and Timur tries to sow suspicion between Leyla and Serkan.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E05 - Rat in the Kitchen
3.plot: Unsure who to trust, Peter reaches out to a former ally for help. Serkan's suspicions deepen. A distraught Danielle demands the truth from Ferry.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E06 - Pater Familias
3.plot: Tensions rise at Leyla and Serkan's family celebration as Bob and Ferry try to close the deal while a wary Timur digs for more information.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E07 - Total Loss
3.plot: With Timur stirring the pot, Serkan comes to a decision about the deal — and Leyla. Bob's uneasy arrangement with Ferry comes to a crashing halt.

3.title: FR - Undercover - S03E08 - Showdown
3.plot: Betrayals run deep as Ferry earns some quick cash, Leyla plots an escape and Bob realizes what he'll need to do to keep his growing family safe.

1.title: FR - Les Hautes Herbes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A couple fosters a child after his mother is hospitalized and Eve questions Mounir's disappearance.

1.title: FR - Les Hautes Herbes - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Maud offers to help Eve search for Mounir, while Jules witnesses an act of infidelity.

1.title: FR - Les Hautes Herbes - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Eve finds a clue to Mounir's disappearance, while Glenn reveals a shocking secret to Jules.

meta.plot: L’été, Jules, 10 ans, est accueilli, à la campagne, par un jeune couple, car sa mère a été accidentée. Comment trouver sa place dans un village dont les habitants sont secoués par de profonds antagonismes ; comment ne pas craindre ce qui se cache derrière les hautes herbes ?

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E01 - The Secret Plan
1.plot: Two years after a breakup, Elsa is still obsessed with her ex. But when she meets dreamy schoolteacher Jules, her outlook on life begins to change.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E02 - The Sloppy Plan
1.plot: After learning the truth, Milou tries to steer Elsa away from Jules, while Charlotte ups the ante by orchestrating a magical second date.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E03 - The Booty Plan
1.plot: Elsa comes unglued when she discovers her friends have been hiding big news from her. Milou has a change of heart about Charlotte's scheme.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E04 - The Love Plan
1.plot: Elsa navigates a dizzying swirl of emotions after her night with Jules. Matthieu makes a confession. Antoine springs a surprise on Milou.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E05 - The Party Plan
1.plot: Simmering tensions, unexpected guests and romantic rivalries lead to mayhem at Elsa's 30th birthday party.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E06 - The Lame Plan
1.plot: Anaïs drops in for a visit as Elsa wrestles with growing doubts about Jules. A moment of reckoning pushes longtime friendships to the breaking point.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E07 - The Solo Plan
1.plot: As a shell-shocked Elsa takes stock of her life, Jules and Max vie for her attention. Matthieu helps Charlotte with a new business idea.

1.title: FR - Plan cœur - S01E08 - The Exit Plan
1.plot: Milou goes into labor, Elsa prepares to embark on a new adventure, and Jules realizes he may have one last chance to turn things around.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E01 - The Homecoming Plan
2.plot: After a blissful four months, Elsa announces her return to Paris. But she has mixed feelings about reconnecting with the old gang.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E02 - The Llama Plan
2.plot: Milou and Charlotte give Max a makeover, Julio catches a big break with his music, and Elsa stumbles deeper into a double life.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E03 - The Backup Plan
2.plot: When Elsa's lies come back to bite her, she vows to tell her friends the truth. But a surprise bachelor party upends everyone's day.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E04 - The Pick-Up Plan
2.plot: Elsa begs her friends for forgiveness, Milou dips her toe into a confusing new world, and Charlotte finds her business on the brink of disaster.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E05 - The After Plan
2.plot: After the city announces the winner of the barge contract, Elsa drops another bombshell. Meanwhile, a rendezvous turns into a wake-up call for Julio.

2.title: FR - Plan cœur - S02E06 - The Love Plan
2.plot: A sudden revelation brings the whole gang together for a day of celebration, mischief and romantic mayhem.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E01 - The Wrong Plan
3.plot: As Elsa channels all her energy into getting pregnant, Charlotte helps Max run for office, and Milou contends with the loneliness of country life.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E02 - The War Plan
3.plot: On a group outing, Elsa and Charlotte begin to play nice — but they each have ulterior motives. Antoine tries to sabotage the sale of the house.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E03 - The High and Dry Plan
3.plot: While Elsa and Julio adjust to an awkward living arrangement, Charlotte begins to see Max in a new light, and Milou lands a job with a celebrity.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E04 - The Worst Plan
3.plot: Charlotte decides it's time to rethink her priorities, Elsa embarks on fertility treatments, and Milou wrestles with doubts about the pregnancy.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E05 - The Sorority Plan
3.plot: At the country house, Charlotte and Milou try to help Max overcome his alpha male instincts. Difficult news leads Elsa to a turning point.

3.title: FR - Plan cœur - S03E06 - The Final Plan
3.plot: Two years later, Elsa and friends look back on the moments that changed the course of their lives — and brought them closer than ever.

meta.plot: Alors qu’Elsa, parisienne, n’arrive pas à oublier son ex, sa meilleure amie embauche en secret un escort boy pour l’aider à passer à autre chose. Mais le plan marche un peu trop bien ...
Seeking revenge on the girl she blames for her brother's death, a Kitzbühel waitress infiltrates the glitzy world of a group of wealthy Munich teens.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E01 - Countdown
1.plot: On New Year's Eve, Lisi works at a posh party hosted by Vanessa, the rich girl she holds responsible for her brother's tragic death a year earlier.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E02 - Mousetrap
1.plot: At a champagne-soaked brunch, Lisi learns a scandalous secret — and scores an invite for a spa day. Kosh tries to get back into Vanessa's good graces.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E03 - Off Track
1.plot: Lisi goes to a snowy photo shoot with Vanessa. Dominik faces pressure to figure out his future. On a downward spiral, Kosh winds up at Hans' farm.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E04 - Thaw
1.plot: Lisi tricks Vanessa into filming an angry rant for a fake audition. With Hans' support, Kosh vows to change his ways. Dominik and Lisi grow closer.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E05 - Avalanches
1.plot: Reeling from revelations about his family, Hans urges Lisi to leak the video. Tensions erupt at Regine's fashion show — with explosive consequences.

1.title: FR - Kitz - S01E06 - Ashes
1.plot: As the friends face the aftermath of a harrowing night, Lisi navigates a tricky situation — and comes to a startling realization about the past.

meta.plot: Nikhil Katira est un infirmier psychiatrique travaillant à Wakefield, un établissement perché au bord des spectaculaires Blue Mountains d'Australie. Il y a un problème - tandis que ses patients s'améliorent, il empire.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: James is a running his finance business from the ward, Ivy is running from the screaming baby she can't bond with and when a song gets stuck in Nik's head, it triggers deeply buried memories he doesn't understand.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Raff's Loyalty to Genevieve is seriously tested when her sexual desire runs rampant. Kareena's attraction to Nik is reawakened. And Nik inadvertently injures Tessa when he steps in to protect Linda

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Nik searches for the ring that once belonged to his mother, memories of a catastrophic flood in India invade his consciousness, and we discover this is the ring he once used to propose to Kareena.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Kareena suggests that distressing phenomenon Nik's experiencing - that he's observing himself from outside of his own body - could be related to trauma from his past and we learn the person who died was a family member.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: James suffers a catastrophic loss of identity, Tessa discovers her mother has disposed of all her belongings, and when Nik's mother comes to stay, memories of his baby brother plague him.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: High on his successful application for the job, and with Come on Eileen finally out of his head. Nik's job application is successful and his desire for Kareena evolves into an invitation.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: In the lead up to Renuka's wedding, Nik realises the details around his brother's death don't add up and while he continues to care for his patients, his grip on his own sanity is slipping.

1.title: FR - Wakefield - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Ejected from his sister's wedding, rapidly unravelling, Nik returns to Wakefield where his obsession over a missing puzzle piece culminates in his total recall of the horrifying truth of his past.

meta.plot: Susan et Christopher Edwards ont tué les parents de Susan, les ont enterré dans leur jardin et ont vidé leurs comptes en banque. Leur crime ne sera découvert que dix ans plus tard.

1.title: FR - Landscapers - S01E01 - Episode One
1.plot: The building blocks of Christopher and Susan Edwards’ carefully reconstructed life begin to collapse after a single phone call.

1.title: FR - Landscapers - S01E02 - Episode Two
1.plot: As the investigation into the Mansfield double murder continues, Susan and Chris's past is revealed and secrets emerge.

1.title: FR - Landscapers - S01E03 - Episode Three
1.plot: Christopher opens up about his past as the couple's relationship with Susan's parents comes under the spotlight. Lancing and Wilkie have a breakthrough.

1.title: FR - Landscapers - S01E04 - Episode Four
1.plot: Truth and fantasy clash as Susan and Christopher Edwards face trial. Meeting for the first time since their arrest, old doubts and new regrets test their love.

meta.plot: Ils sont beaux, ils s'aiment et la vie leur appartient. Jusqu'au drame. Un matin, le corps d'Alex est retrouvé en bas d'une falaise. L'enquête conduit à un suicide. La vie de Sarah s'écroule. De retour à Lyon, celle-ci ne comprend toujours pas ce qui a poussé son mari à commettre l'irréparable. Jusqu'à ce qu'elle retrouve une lettre d'amour adressée à son mari par une certaine Inès, une lettre passionnée envoyée d'Ardèche. Sarah prend alors la décision de retrouver cette femme. C'est peut-être sa seule chance de comprendre...

1.title: FR - Les secrets - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les secrets - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les secrets - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les secrets - S01E04 -
FR - Les secrets - S01E05 -
FR - Les secrets - S01E06 -

meta.plot: Sami, jeune étudiant, est accusé du meurtre d'une femme qu'il a rencontré en soirée. Isabelle, une avocate fantasque, va accepter de le défendre...

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Sami, 19, a wise student, steals his father's taxi to leave for the evening. As he is on his way, a young woman, Gloria, bursts into the car. They go to her house, and everything is linked. Alcohol. Drugs. Sex. Sami collapses. When he regains consciousness, Gloria is next to him, dead. Sami is arrested. It is Jeff, a cop on the verge of retirement, who inherits the business. When Sami has to get a lawyer, he appoints Isabelle, a specialist in petty crimes. Is Sami guilty? Innocent? Between the cop and the lawyer, old intimate enemies, the confrontation begins.

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Sami discovers prison, a child in a world of adults, a lamb in a world of wolves. At the same time, Jeff continues his investigation and learns that Sami had been lying for months and never had his exams. He also discovers his taste for violent porn. Her parents are devastated. Do they really know their son? Isabelle discovers that the victim had argued with a young man in a bar before getting into Sami's taxi.

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The descent into hell continues for Sami. The trail of the argument in the bar is cut short. However, it highlights the complex personality of Gloria, a heavy drug user, to the great astonishment of her parents. Isabelle, joined by Leïla, a young idealistic lawyer, continues to move heaven and earth to defend her client. Unfortunately, Sami, between despair and fear, gets closer to Anis, the boss, and agrees to bring cocaine balls into the visiting room.

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Isabelle and Leïla continue to look for other avenues to sow doubt in the minds of the jurors. But Isabelle is discouraged. Jeff might be right. Sami is lost. Despite Leïla's protests, she is on the verge of giving up. Especially since Sami, tattooed, shaved, muscular, has become a real jailbird and no longer has anything of the wise student he was.

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The trial at the Assizes begins. But Sami sank. Drugged, tattooed, shaved head, he looks anything but innocent. And if Isabelle and Leïla manage to win the support of the jurors on the first day, Sami's appearance on the second day quickly turns into a disaster. All seems lost.

1.title: FR - Une si longue nuit - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Two days before the end of the trial, Jeff is suddenly seized with scruples: what if Isabelle was right? What if Sami was innocent after all? To get to the bottom of it, he decides to dig into Gloria's past. And what he finds is beyond comprehension.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Nora takes her first steps toward financial independence in an attempt to move out of her dad's house.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E02 - Atlantic City
1.plot: Nora and Grandma go to Atlantic City, where Nora gambles and runs into an old acquaintance on the boardwalk, and Grandma and her friends battle to use a casino power outlet.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E03 - Savage Valley
1.plot: Nora takes a job at a real estate office and becomes a hyper-competent assistant with a little help from Adderall, alienating her online gaming friends in the process.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E04 - Paperwork
1.plot: Nora has difficulties cashing a check at her bank. She later joins focus groups to make some extra money.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E05 - Not Today
1.plot: Nora impulsively dyes her hair after a fight with her dad, and Wally goes to a single-parent support group meeting.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E06 - Vagarina
1.plot: After Nora suffers a vaginal injury, she’s tapped by a DJ to record her chronic queefing for his new track.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E07 - Grandma Loves Nora
1.plot: Nora competes with Edmund for their grandmother's affection, and Wally creates an Instagram account to impress his crush.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E08 - Grandma & Chill
1.plot: Grandma tells Nora the story of how she met her husband in the style of a Korean drama.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E09 - Launch Party
1.plot: Edmund and Nora prepare to launch their app, and Wally’s dinner date goes terribly awry.

1.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S01E10 - China
1.plot: After Scrubr gets acquired by a company overseas, Nora moves to China. Back in Queens, Grandma befriends an injured pigeon.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E01 - Never Too Old
2.plot: After a starry-eyed look at her future, Nora trains a new CBD store employee. Grandma's newly diagnosed perfect bill of health leads to a face-off. Daniel catches Nora by surprise.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E02 - Stop! Nora Time
2.plot: After getting an MRI during an earthquake, Nora time travels to the iPod-filled world of 2003, where she sets out to warn her younger self about the mistakes she's going to make.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E03 - Charlie's Angels
2.plot: After Nora and Melanie reunite with a high school friend, they realize New York City isn't what it used to be. Grandma braces herself for a visit from her rich cousin Rosalind.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E04 - Edmund's Back
2.plot: Despite many setbacks and creepy auditions, Nora stands by Edmund's newfound acting career. Wally panics after discovering that Brenda's online dating profile is still active.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E05 - Don't F**k With Grandmas
2.plot: Grandma and her gal pals band together to take down a scammer targeting the elderly.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E06 - Nora Meets Brenda
2.plot: Nora fears that her maniacal imaginary friend is taking things too far when he helps her plot revenge against Wally’s sweet-natured girlfriend Brenda during a weekend trip to the country.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E09 - The Simple Life
2.plot: Edmund embraces life in Los Angeles, Grandma teaches Brenda about Chinese cuisine and traditions, and Nora does some soul searching when her car breaks down in New Mexico.

2.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S02E10 - Home
2.plot: Nora embraces her new life in New Mexico, but a distressing letter from home makes her reevaluate the future, and Grandma deals with loneliness during coronavirus lockdowns.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E01 - Nightmares
3.plot: Nora tries therapy after having weird dreams, Grandma goes to Brooklyn for a distant cousin’s funeral, Wally’s proposal to Brenda doesn’t go as planned, and Edmund enjoys his newfound fame.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E02 - Too Hot to Survive
3.plot: Nora signs up for a survival reality show to get rich quick and prove Wally wrong, and Wally uses his extra time at home to micromanage Grandma's life.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E03 - Love & Order
3.plot: Nora grows insecure as Edmund relishes in his success as a series regular on "Love & Order," Wally tries to land a new IT job, and Edmund discovers something new about his ancestry.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E04 - þetta reddast
3.plot: While accompanying Edmund on a trip to Iceland to track down his long-lost relatives, Nora meets a wise elfin woman.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E05 - Bad Grandma
3.plot: Nora is alarmed when Grandma transforms into a ruthless drug kingpin, Edmund and the gym bros surprise Wally with a bachelor party, and Brenda discovers her fiancé's big secret.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E06 - Carfished
3.plot: Grandma pushes Wally to make a grand romantic gesture to win back Brenda, and Nora gets a mystical glimpse of what her life could have been.

3.title: FR - Awkwafina is Nora From Queens - S03E07 - Nora Is Awkwafina from Queens
3.plot: Nora gains a new perspective on life after meeting Awkwafina, Wally and Brenda make amends, and Edmund unexpectedly finds love.

meta.plot: Nora Lum a vingt ans et vit dans le Queens. Elle aimerait que sa vie soit meilleure mais difficile d'évoluer en cohabitant sous le même toit avec son père et sa grand-mère.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E01 - Ulysses
1.plot: The first manned mission to Mars is now approaching the red planet. The crew includes top-flight scientists and a young female psychiatrist, responsible for their mental health. But just as they are about to land, something goes wrong.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E02 - Mars
1.plot: To save their stricken craft a sub-team seeks salvage, but the trio’s discovery of a body means a surprisingly harsh reception on their return.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E03 - Survivor
1.plot: Vladimir is not all he appears to be as natural disaster threatens the entire mission.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E04 - Stone
1.plot: The crew has a sobering encounter with potential rescuers, and Jeanne tries to hypnotize the enigmatic Komarov.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E05 - Alliance
1.plot: Jeanne is shaken after the failed attempt to hypnotize Komarov enduring memory flashbacks from long ago. Gemma Williams from the Zillion 2 mission arrives and tries to reassure the Ulysse's crew about Goldstein's intentions. Meanwhile, Gramat and Yann find out that Meyer knows a lot more about the mysterious discoveries on Mars than he admits.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E06 - Irène
1.plot: Is Komarov the 'unicorn' Earth-bound billionaire Goldstein hunts? As Jeanne leaves the spaceship to reach Thaumasia, Gramat tries a desperate gambit to regain the initiative on Mars, following her with Gemma as a hostage. Zillion's soldiers arrive to seize Komarov but Alessandra does not let them in. Yann is now alone against all.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E07 - Fault
1.plot: Caught in a predicament, Jeanne is overwhelmed by the memories of her father. In Moscow in the 1960s, Vladimir Komarov is told that the Soyouz mission is doomed to failure. Meanwhile, the crew of Odysseus are encountering more and more problems with the Americans.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E08 - Phoenix
1.plot: Jeanne, Simon and Gemma enter the excavated mountain discovering underground monuments and traces of a past life. Inside the ship, the crew members are under the threat of Doisneau and Wayne. Suddenly Irene wakes up.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E09 - Volodia
1.plot: Jeanne and Simon discover Komarov on the mysterious glacier who reveals what his mission is while Jeanne learns more about what is required of her, becoming the Z2 crew’s prime target. On the ship, Wayne is now alone against the crew of Ulysses while Alessandra tries to convince him to spare their lives - desperate measures take a terrible toll.

1.title: FR - Missions - S01E10 - Thunderstorm
1.plot: The survivors race for Zillion 2, but neither Gemma nor Goldstein (her boss on Earth) have rescue in mind. Simon decides to try anything to join Zillion 2 before the storm falls on them but Gemma refuses to take them with her; Meyer tries to convince her with the unexpected help of Jeanne. The mission is far from over…

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E01 - Dawn
2.plot: A child faces a disturbing rite of passage in a strange community living off the beaten track.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E02 - Returns
2.plot: Two new crew members discover each other while organizing a new mission to Mars at the Meyer Space Center.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E03 - Evolution
2.plot: While the space ship approaches Mars, Alessandra has new visions. In her community, Jeanne is facing the consequences of Atar's death.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E04 - Passage
2.plot: Jeanne encounters a mysterious man who seems to know her well while the Nausicaa mission is about to land on Mars.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E05 - Replicas
2.plot: The crew follow Jeanne's footsteps.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E06 - Alice
2.plot: Komarov tells Jeanne that Ivan Goldstein did not lie to her. Once on the other side of the portal, the crew does not know how to react to Alice's revelations. The other side of the portal.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E07 - Fury
2.plot: Crew members discover traces of life in a strange forest; William Meyer decides to send Sam back to the spaceship.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E08 - Others
2.plot: Meyer realizes it was a mistake to bring his daughter with him; Alan tells Sam to search for Alessandra.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E09 - Architects
2.plot: Sam and Alan raise questions about the origin of the portal; Jeanne is determined to return to Earth, but must search for someone first.

2.title: FR - Missions - S02E10 - Singularity

3.title: FR - Missions - S03E02 - Samuel
3.plot: A provocative encounter revives traumatic memories for Peter, who seeks to exercise control over Sam’s situation, but fate intervenes.

3.title: FR - Missions - S03E03 - The Key
3.plot: With new-found knowledge, Peter tracks down some familiar faces, until he meets his match and a deadly threat.

3.title: FR - Missions - S03E04 - Dark Clouds
3.plot: Alice discovers uncomfortable genetic facts, causing emotional confrontations, while Sam’s cause of death is revealed, along with another mystery.

3.title: FR - Missions - S03E05 - Empty-Handed
3.plot: A violent encounter lends urgency to Peter’s quest, while Jeanne’s mistrust increases, despite the reassurances of a companion.

meta.plot: La première mission habitée vers Mars, financée par un milliardaire philanthrope et l’ESA, est en approche de la planète rouge après 10 mois de voyage. À bord, des scientifiques et des astronautes de haut niveau ainsi qu'une jeune psy, chargée de superviser la sécurité mentale de cette mission historique. Mais, à quelques heures de la plus attendue procédure d’atterrissage de tous les temps, une autre mission, portée par une gigantesque multinationale de l’informatique et la NASA, dotée d’un vaisseau à propulsion plasma plus moderne et plus rapide, leur est passée devant avant de perdre le contact. Ceux qui pensaient être les premiers à marcher sur Mars deviennent donc, malgré eux, une mission de sauvetage de leurs concurrents.

1.title: FR - Björnstad - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: On a mission to rejuvenate the struggling community's ice hockey program, recently retired pro player Peter Andersson relocates his family to Beartown for a fresh start. But when the elite squad he was promised proves to be anything but, Peter switches his focus to the junior team, aggravating local tensions and reigniting his troubled past with star player Kevin Erdahl's father, Mats.

1.title: FR - Björnstad - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: With the finals rapidly approaching, Peter pushes his team and coaching staff to their limits. Meanwhile, as Maya attempts to work through the assault, Kevin does everything he can to forget. Later, Peter must choose between his family and the big game.

1.title: FR - Björnstad - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While Maya and Kevin provide their statements to the police, the junior team is forced to take on the final without their coach and star player. Meanwhile, news of the allegation threatens to tear Beartown apart, and later, Amat grapples with a loaded offer.

1.title: FR - Björnstad - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The entire hockey community gathers for an emergency meeting to decide Peter's future with the program. Facing increased hostility from the town and harassment at school, Maya reaches her breaking point. Later, after the police close their investigation, Maya and Kevin square off in a chilling confrontation. Season Finale.

meta.plot: Le hockey est la dernière lueur d’espoir pour la ville de Beartown de regagner une certaine dynamique. Une lourde responsabilité pour Peter, le nouvel entraîneur de l'équipe junior, et Kevin, l'étoile montante. Au milieu de cette effervescence, un acte violent sème le trouble au sein de la communauté...
Le cas non résolu de deux filles disparues de la ville pyrénéenne de Monteperdido il y a cinq ans est rouvert lorsque l'une d'elles réapparaît.

meta.plot: Laurie, Nathan et leur mère, Stéphanie, trouvent refuge en pleine nuit dans une maison d’hébergement pour femmes victimes de violence conjugale. C’est entre ces murs que les enfants devront apprendre à vivre au quotidien avec des inconnus. Et bientôt, Stéphanie aura à faire des choix déchirants.

FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Summer 1948: The D-Mark is introduced, delighting sisters Ulla, Gundel and Margot. A new phase of post-war life begins for the three sisters.

1.title: FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Ulla is accepted to medical school in Tubingen. Gundel’s father refuses to let her run the family company and Gundel seeks revenge on Ulla.

1.title: FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Eduard Wolf is on trial for war crimes. Ulla wants to prove his innocence. Until further notice, Gundel will run the family business.

1.title: FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The old feelings between Ulla and Tommy flare up again in East Berlin. But there is too much division between them.

1.title: FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Margot marries Bocker. As the new managing director of United Metal Works, he wants to have ammunition manufactured.

1.title: FR - Nos années miraculeuses - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: After almost a week in which no one has heard from Bocker, he suddenly appears again. He makes accusations that Margot betrayed him.

meta.plot: L'histoire de la famille Wolf dans l'Allemagne des années 40 et 50. Alors qu'Eduard Wolf est jugé pour crimes de guerre, Ulla tente de prouver son innocence. Pendant ce temps, Gundel reprend la gestion de l'entreprise familiale.

1.title: FR - Anne Boleyn - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The queen consort is pregnant and convinced she will bear Henry VIII a male heir, with their first-born Elizabeth being overlooked for the throne, but the king has his eye on Jane Seymour, one of Anne's ladies-in-waiting.

1.title: FR - Anne Boleyn - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Anne Boleyn's position at court is in serious jeopardy and her new mission is to secure her daughter's right to the throne. However, Cromwell has other ideas.

1.title: FR - Anne Boleyn - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Anne Boleyn is accused of treason and adultery and stands trial. However, she is prejudged as Cromwell bribes and blackmails her ladies into testifying against Anne.

meta.plot: Biopic qui retrace les derniers mois d'Anne Boleyn, la seconde épouse du roi Henri VIII, en réimaginant sa lutte avec la société patriarcale de l'Angleterre des Tudor, son désir d'assurer un avenir à sa fille, Elizabeth, et la réalité brutale de son échec à fournir à son mari un héritier mâle.

Angela Black mène une vie apparemment idyllique avec deux beaux fils et un mari charmant et travailleur tout en couvrant le fait qu'elle est victime de violence domestique. Jusqu'au jour où Angela est approchée par Ed - un enquêteur privé - et il met en pièces sa vie domestique déjà tendue.

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Angela seems like a happy mum of two, but she is hiding something: her seemingly charming husband, Olivier, is in fact violent and manipulative.

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: After Ed's claims about her husband confirm her worst fears, Angela is left reeling and struggles to keep up the facade with Olivier and the boys, while Ed wants her to join forces with him to take action.

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Now that Angela has agreed to Ed's plan preparations can begin, and she carries out her day on autopilot, readying herself for the big night. But will she be able to go through with it?

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Adjusting to her new life, Angela's therapy sessions bring up memories from her past, and it's revealed how long Olivier's abuse has been going on. Angela starts to question her experiences, she can't let go of everything Ed told her.

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Now that Angela has seen Theo, she focuses on uncovering Olivier's manipulation and getting back custody of her children. She realises that she can't go back to the person she was before and tries to recover the old Angela.

1.title: FR - Angela Black - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Angela struggles to find proof of what Olivier and Theo did to her, and must use every bit of her strength, cunning and intelligence to beat her husband once and for all and ensure that she and her boys are protected from him.

meta.plot: Désignée pour être jurée dans un procès criminel, Inès, une infirmière de 40 ans, contribue à faire condamner l’accusé, un homme au passé violent. A l’issue du procès elle est prise d’un terrible doute : et si elle venait d’envoyer un innocent derrière les barreaux ?

1.title: FR - L'Homme que j'ai condamné - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - L'Homme que j'ai condamné - S01E02 - Episode 2

FR - L'Homme que j'ai condamné - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Sept étudiants tentent de rester unis et préparer leur rentrée universitaire malgré un événement tragique qui est arrivé à leur résidence. Entre Alex, Cédric et Yasmine, trio polyamoureux, Yandou, Sénégalaise nouvellement arrivée au Québec, Béthanie, jeune femme émancipée dissimulant un lourd secret, Myriam, qui dénonce les injustices, et Taylor, hanté par ses erreurs du passé, les liens se tissent comme ceux d’une famille choisie. Leur quotidien baigné de complicité mais aussi du stress relié aux études supérieures se mêle à leurs amours multiples et à leurs prises de parole contre les abus. Ces jeunes adultes rayonnent par leur unicité et par leur désir de vouloir former un clan solide contre vents et marées!

meta.plot: Cinq individus qui ne connaissent pas se réveillent chacun dans une cellule croyant qu’ils n’ont rien en commun. Rapidement, ils réalisent qu’ils sont épiés, écoutés et qu’ils sont devenus les pions d’un jeu dangereux.
Les vacances de Noël d'une ado et de sa famille virent au cauchemar lorsqu'ils découvrent une ancienne menace qui plane sur l'île où ils séjournent.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E01 - Aarmand Island
1.plot: Josefine and her family arrive on the rustic, remote island of Årmandsø for their holiday break, but things get off to a bumpy — and bizarre — start.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E02 - Creature from the Woods
1.plot: While Josefine tries to help the wounded baby creature she found, her family's trip into the forest to find a Christmas tree ruffles some feathers.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E03 - The Secret
1.plot: Josefine grows suspicious when Karen invites her family for a visit and begins to question just how big of a secret the people of Årmandsø are hiding.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E04 - Beyond the Fence
1.plot: Josefine's family searches for her after she follows Kee-Ko into the forest, where the lurking terror that resides there will soon be revealed.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E05 - The Outbreak
1.plot: With the forest's security perimeter severely damaged, the elves begin to roam the island freely, armed with a thirst for blood — and revenge.

1.title: FR - Lutins - S01E06 - The Sacrifice
1.plot: After Karen takes a drastic and dire step to try and appease the elves, everyone else must band together to save Josefine — and themselves.

meta.plot: À la fois un thriller percutant et un drame sur l'entrée dans l'âge adulte, Hanna suit le périple d'une extraordinaire jeune fille élevée dans la forêt qui tente d'échapper à la traque incessante d'un agent de la CIA en mission officieuse et essaie de découvrir la vérité derrière son identité.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E01 - Forest
1.plot: In a covert Romanian facility, Erik Heller evades security to rescue baby Hanna. 15 years on, father and daughter live deep in the Polish forest. Erik has trained Hanna to be an incredible killer and hunter. Yet, keen to grow beyond the boundaries of her isolated world, she begins to venture away from home. This attracts the attention of CIA agent Marissa Wiegler, who has hunted Hanna since birth.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E02 - Friend
1.plot: Following her capture by Marissa's men, Hanna must fight to escape from the Moroccan CIA facility and join Erik in Berlin. Along the way, she meets Sophie, a British teenager on holiday with her family, who gives Hanna her first proper taste of the real world and the thrill of adolescence. Yet despite this glimpse at normality, the threat of Marissa and her operatives is never far behind.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E03 - City
1.plot: Hanna and Erik are reunited in Berlin, where they hide out with his old army friends and she learns more about her father's past. However, Hanna continues to long for the normal life she glimpsed with Sophie and becomes increasingly frustrated at the restrictions her own father imposes on her. Sensing Marissa is closing in on them, Erik and his friends begin to prepare for an attack.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E04 - Father
1.plot: Erik is holding Marissa prisoner, trying to negotiate a deal to get him and Hanna safely out of Berlin. Meanwhile Hanna hides out with Dieter and his family. Desperate to know more about what her father is up to, Hanna discovers a huge secret in her own past. As an escape plan begins to form, Marissa attempts to make her own.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E05 - Town
1.plot: Still reeling from her revelations about Erik, Hanna hides out in suburban London with Sophie, who is keeping her new friend secret from her parents. Sophie persuades Hanna to attend a school party where Hanna experiences the thrill of a teenage crush for the first time. Meanwhile, Erik's friends desperately try to save him from the life-threatening injuries he sustained fleeing capture.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E06 - Mother
1.plot: Sophie and Hanna's relationship begins to turn sour over their shared interest in Anton. In the fallout from this argument, Marissa arrives at Sophie's house pretending to be Hanna's mother. Hanna finds herself torn between endangering Sophie and her family, or giving up her own freedom and going with Marissa. Meanwhile, a captured Erik is brutally interrogated by Sawyer and his men.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E07 - Road
1.plot: Realising that Hanna will no longer accept anything but the full truth, Erik takes her back to Romania so she can learn more about her past. Meanwhile, Marissa begins to sense that Sawyer has not been telling her the full truth about Utrax.

1.title: FR - Hanna - S01E08 - Utrax
1.plot: When Erik reveals to Hanna the truth about Utrax, she is determined to take action. Meanwhile, Marissa attempts to find out from Sawyer what has really been going on at the facility.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E01 - Safe
2.plot: As Hanna hides Clara in the vast forests of Northern Romania, the remaining trainees are transferred to an educational facility called The Meadows, where they are assigned new identities. Marissa sets about finding Clara by posing as her mother online, luring her to a hotel in Bucharest, where she is ambushed and captured by Utrax. Hanna follows and is reunited with Marissa.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E02 - The Trial
2.plot: Marissa and Hanna return to Paris, whilst Clara is introduced into the fold at The Meadows - but her rebellious nature causes problems, and Terri is tasked with persuading her to rejoin the programme. Pursuing Carla, Hanna finds the pharmaceutical company behind the Utrax medical implants and takes part in a drug trial, where she discovers that the drugs are bound for the trainees at The Meadows.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E03 - To The Meadows
2.plot: Hanna returns to Passway and follows Dumont and the drugs out of the city, aware that they will lead her to The Meadows. Marissa discovers that Sonia is in Belgium and reaches Hanna just in time, killing Sonia in the process. Hanna arrives at The Meadows, ready to save Clara, but is shocked to discover that Terri’s plans to get through to Clara have worked, and she appears to have settled in.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E04 - Welcome Mia
2.plot: Marissa joins Hanna at The Meadows, assuring her that she is on her side by arranging an escape plan for that evening. Hanna convinces Clara to join them, but the familial community of The Meadows proves too comforting for her, and she betrays Hanna, putting the power back in Carmichael’s hands. Meanwhile, CIA operative Mannion finds The Meadows, but there is no sign of Hanna or Marissa…

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E05 - A Way To Grieve
2.plot: Marissa is imprisoned in The Meadows whilst Hanna is encouraged to embrace her new identity as Mia Wolff. But doing so requires grieving for Erik, which Terri helps accelerate. Marissa escapes and convinces Hanna to leave, only for Clara to get in their way. Clara shoots Marissa and tells Carmichael that Hanna did it to stop Marissa from kidnapping her. Hanna is accepted back into The Meadows.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E06 - You're With Us Now
2.plot: Hanna and Jules are sent on their first mission - to kill a journalist in London planning to meet with a military lawyer intent on exposing Utrax’s secrets - whilst Sandy and Clara fly to Barcelona to recover the evidence. Hanna attempts to back out and joins forces with Mannion in an attempt to save Nicola’s life, but Jules and Leo are one step ahead. The consequences are disastrous.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E07 - Tacitus
2.plot: Hanna arrives in Barcelona, intent on saving Gelder and persuading Clara to leave Utrax. Hanna tells Clara the name and whereabouts of her mother, leaving her conflicted. Sandy has earnt Gelder’s daughter Kat’s trust and is furious when Clara backs out of killing them. She kills Gelder whilst Hanna and Clara escape with Kat. Marissa is tasked with finding Hanna by Mannion’s colleague, Grant.

2.title: FR - Hanna - S02E08 - The List
2.plot: Following Gelder’s murder, Carmichael arrives in Barcelona whilst Hanna, Clara and Kat hide in a hillside villa. Hanna returns to the hotel and recovers Gelder’s target list, helped out by Marissa, who follows Carmichael to the villa and blackmails him into bringing his fellow Utrax leaders to justice. Hanna allows Clara to reunite with her mother before returning to Marissa to help destroy Utrax.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E01 - Résistance
3.plot: Hanna returns to The Meadows with her cover as a loyal Utrax trainee intact thanks to John Carmichael, who leads the trainee program but has been coerced by Marissa to help. As the trainees prepare for their first missions, Marissa contacts a CIA analyst in Vienna who is on the target list, and uses him for information. While in Paris, Hanna meets her target Abbas, a charismatic young activist.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E02 - Grape Vines and Orange Trees
3.plot: Unable to forget Abbas, Hanna breaks protocol and visits him at his safehouse. While Marissa’s world is shattered when she recognizes The Chairman from Hanna’s photo. As Hanna and Marissa plan to sabotage the next assassination, a small mistake raises suspicion. Hanna intercepts the Utrax agent sent to investigate, but Carmichael is outed as a traitor which leads to Hanna and Marissa being ambushed.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E03 - Nadiya
3.plot: Hanna and Marissa move quickly now that they’ve been exposed. They plan to head to Vienna, believing it’s the headquarters of Pioneer and home of the assassination program but Hanna first goes in search of Abbas. Marissa continues on to Vienna. Both are unaware they are heading into a trap.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E04 - Look Me In the Eye
3.plot: Hanna and Marissa break into Pioneer headquarters and discover the frightening truth behind the assassination list and how it’s made. While inside, Marissa confronts Evans (aka The Chairman), leaving Hanna to escape with the evidence to bring down the program.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E05 - Eyeliner
3.plot: Hanna and Marissa have nearly lost. Hanna is held captive by Evans while the evidence that Marissa has to bring down the program turns out to be encrypted and unusable. When Hanna tries to escape she finds what could be the key to bringing down Pioneer, but Evans’ brutal interrogation might break Hanna before she can use it.

3.title: FR - Hanna - S03E06 - Do Not Sleep
3.plot: Hanna and Marissa return to Pioneer headquarters as prisoners but with a mission to unlock the evidence they need to bring down the program. When they realize that Abbas and his daughter are in danger they race off to rescue them. In the forests outside Vienna, Hanna must save Abbas while Marissa confronts Evans one last time.

meta.plot: Désireux de soigner tous les patients, même ceux en dehors du système, Daniel Milton, un brillant chirurgien, prend des risques considérables pour installer une clinique dans une partie abandonnée du métro londonien, près de la station Temple. Très vite, il se retrouve confronté à de multiples personnes en situation de détresse.

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A surgeon's morals are tested after he sets up an illicit clinic beneath London.

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The clinic's secrecy falls into jeopardy when Daniel puts Beth's ex-colleague Anna in an impossible position.

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Daniel finds he's moving far away from the man he thought he was, as dealing with London's most dangerous people brings big problem

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Things grow complicated between Daniel and Anna as they battle to save someone they love. Lee takes a risk that endangers them all

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Daniel's descent reaches new depths as he enters the world of organ trading. As police and gangsters close in, Jamie makes an error.

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Hall and Moloney get a break in their hunt for Jamie. Daniel faces the ultimate question - how far will he go for someone he loves?

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Daniel crosses a line from which he can never return. Lee's forced to make a big decision about the clinic. But will it be too late?

1.title: FR - Temple - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: As Mercy and Keith close in, Daniel, Lee and Anna discover just how far they'll go to save themselves.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: As Beth awakens from her coma, Daniel's world continues to close in, as the police - and his wife - look for answers.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: A desperate Daniel and Lee deal with a dangerous medical fixer. Beth decides to pursue her research. Eve's horror at Daniel's duplicity is offset by an amazing discovery.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Daniel is summoned by Gubby, Anna crosses a moral line, and Beth makes a horrifying realisation. Lee has an epiphany after meeting Eve.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Daniel is confronted with the consequences of his actions; Lee's horizons widen when he meets Eve's friend, Ash; Anna is determined to get results at any cost.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Daniel discovers the price of defying Gubby; Lee and Ash go on a reconnaissance mission; Anna's reckless behavior comes to a head.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Daniel and Anna decide to go on a road trip that has the capacity to change the course of their lives forever.

2.title: FR - Temple - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Daniel refuses to let his daughter pay for his mistakes; Lee and Ash prepare to change the world; Anna is surprised by what she finds at the pharma company.

meta.plot: Riccardo et Giulia, respectivement 11 et 13 ans, se retrouvent à déménager à Castelcorvo avec leur tante Margherita : là-bas ils rencontrent Matteo et Betta, deux jeunes marginalisés à cause de leurs propension à accumuler les bêtises. Mais Castelcorvo n'est pas un lieu si paisible qu'il n'y paraît et rapidement les enfants comprennent qu'il est un lieu emprunt de magie. Dans ce contexte, le groupe décide de devenir les Chevaliers de Castelcorvo afin de sauver les enfants kidnappés par la redoutable Stria.

1.title: FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E07 - Episode 7

FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E10 - Episode 10

FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E12 - Episode 12

FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E14 - Episode 14
FR - Les chevaliers de Castelcorvo - S01E15 - Episode 15

FR - The Trigger - S01E02 - Episode 2
