FR - The Trigger - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Comme à chaque fin de saison de la Ligue 1, la grande famille du foot français fête ses héros : sourires, selfies, récompenses – c’est la soirée des Trophées UNFP. Tout bascule quand devant les caméras, Fodé Thiam, la star du Racing, assène un violent coup de tête à son entraineur et le traite de « sale toubab ».« Toubab », cela signifie « blanc » en Wolof. Sidération : la tempête médiatique peut commencer.

Un seul hôpital dans le monde est capable de traiter, sous le même toit, des patients souffrant d'Ebola, des prisonniers enfermés au sein de l'établissement de haute sécurité de Rikers, et le président des États-Unis : l'hôpital Bellevue. Un haut lieu médical qui va être bouleversé par l'arrivée à sa tête d'un nouveau directeur, bien décidé à faire bouger les choses au sein de cette institution de Manhattan. Mais ses batailles seront multiples, puisqu'il doit également lutter au quotidien contre le cancer qui le ronge...

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Dr. Max Goodwin shakes up the status quo on his first day as medical director of New Amsterdam, the oldest public hospital in the United States, while simultaneously dealing with his own personal and health issues.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E02 - Rituals
1.plot: Max navigates his diagnosis while Dr. Sharpe encourages him to make a plan. Meanwhile, Dr. Bloom encourages Reynolds to take a chance and Dr. Kapoor and Iggy work together to help a child.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E03 - Every Last Minute
1.plot: Reynolds begins to build his department as Dr. Sharpe battles skepticism from a patient's parents. Meanwhile, Max helps Bloom find a solution for a pregnant patient in a tough spot, all the while continuing to avoid the reality of his diagnosis.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E04 - Boundaries
1.plot: Max creates chaos when he volunteers New Amsterdam to take over for a short-staffed neighboring hospital; Frome has a crisis of conscience about the funding for a hospital garden; an eager resident learns a secret about Bloom.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E05 - Cavitation
1.plot: A visiting journalist picks at the hospital's flaws while shadowing Max; Bloom and Reynolds have a major disagreement after Bloom makes a call against protocol; Kapoor confronts issues from his past.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E06 - Anthropocene
1.plot: Max faces the pressure of his first fundraising gala at the hospital; Frome struggles to break difficult news to his daughter; Bloom and Reynolds deal with the fallout of their argument; Kapoor and Sharpe work to help a sick father and son.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E07 - Domino Effect
1.plot: With a big domino transplant procedure on the line, Max must decide if he can be present in the hospital while also dealing with his illness. Meanwhile, a bond with a patient makes Bloom consider her personal life and Iggy makes progress on a long-standing case.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E08 - Three Dots
1.plot: A patient's treatment plan takes an unexpected turn when Max gets overly invested. Meanwhile, Reynolds celebrates his birthday with some help from the hospital and Kapoor grapples with a case that hits close to home.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E09 - As Long As It Takes
1.plot: Max convinces Dr. Sharpe to take a risk on his course of treatment and Bloom grapples with a difficult conversation. Meanwhile, Dr. Kapoor considers helping his son in a big way after some advice from a friend.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E10 - Six or Seven Minutes
1.plot: As Max fights for his life, New Amsterdam is in full swing with a pertinent heart surgery that is not covered by insurance and a potential nurses walk out. As the team feels Max's absence and the doctors find out that they may have to treat one of their own, Sharpe must finally come clean about Max's condition.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E11 - A Seat at the Table
1.plot: Reynolds confronts a difficult episode from his past. Max distracts himself from chemotherapy by taking on the case of a frequent-flyer patient. Frome helps a young man suffering from severe delusions. Sharpe worries about Bloom's attempt to detox.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E12 - Anima Sola
1.plot: Tensions are high in the hospital as Bloom is overruled on a diagnosis. Meanwhile, Iggy notices that something may be amiss with one of the hospital's most respected surgeons.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E13 - The Blues
1.plot: Max continues to work to solve underlying problems within the hospital despite his continuing struggles with treatment. Meanwhile, Reynolds makes the choice to do a costly surgery to determine an elusive diagnosis and Bloom must face her personal demons head-on.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E14 - The Forsaken
1.plot: Sharpe struggles when a case hits too close to home. Frome uncovers a patient's surprising past. Reynolds makes progress in his personal life after some difficult news.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E15 - Croaklahoma
1.plot: Max bonds with the patients undergoing chemo with him, but a conversation leads him to struggle with his reality. Meanwhile, Reynolds has difficulty handling a personal matter regarding a patient's family and Iggy struggles with a realization regarding his daughter.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E16 - King of Swords
1.plot: When a history-making blizzard hits New York, Max and his staff must work together to keep the patients safe with few resources, even if it means taking to the streets of the city and braving the storm.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E17 - Sanctuary
1.plot: As the doctors continue to weather the storm without power, Max relies on an unlikely source to get the lights back on. Reynolds must get creative as he continues to work to save Hugh with very few resources.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E18 - Five Miles West
1.plot: Reynolds struggles to help a young cystic fibrosis patient with curious symptoms. Kapoor finally comes face-to-face with Ella after their awkward encounter. Sharpe takes a major step in her personal life.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E19 - Happy Place
1.plot: When a NYPD officer is hit by a car in the line of duty, the hospital is turn upside down trying to save her. Meanwhile, Kapoor and Iggy work with a patient struggling with a previous surgery.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E20 - Preventable
1.plot: Max is forced to reckon with his diagnosis in a new way as things become more difficult for him. Meanwhile, Reynolds is forced to address what could have gone wrong in a recent surgery.

1.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S01E21 - This is Not the End
1.plot: Max goes head-to-head with hospital administration when he comes up with a new plan for patients without insurance. Iggy struggles with an accusation brought against him. Sharpe navigates her role as deputy medical director.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E01 - Your Turn
2.plot: Max works to find a new normal three months after the accident and the birth of his daughter. Kapoor grapples with the stigma of aging. Iggy has a successful day that inspires a life-changing idea. Reynolds deals with an unreliable new intern.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E02 - The Big Picture
2.plot: Max invokes a hospital-wide census in effort to get to know the staff of New Amsterdam on a deeper level. Reynolds takes a leap of faith that lands him in hot water, and Dr. Castro extends her treatment plan to more patients in the hospital.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E03 - Replacement
2.plot: Max takes a chance on a new assistant and goes toe-to-toe with the board on a new plan; Iggy struggles to figure out what is causing a unit-wide illness; Kapoor receives some shocking news.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E04 - The Denominator
2.plot: When Iggy and Kapoor discover a patient might be suffering from lead poisoning, they are forced to take on the city. Meanwhile, Max's unsolicited attempts to help a patient backfires.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E05 - The Karman Line
2.plot: When Sharpe has a case that hits close to home, she and Max team up to make things right for the patient. Meanwhile, Iggy and Bloom are forced to make a tough call on a unique situation.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E06 - Righteous Right Hand
2.plot: When a group of women on a retreat end up in the ED, Max gets some troubling information that could put a patient in jeopardy. Meanwhile, Sharpe and Kapoor work together to mend fences between two feuding sisters.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E07 - Good Soldiers
2.plot: When Kapoor introduces a patient to Iggy's PTSD group, a creative treatment plan causes turmoil. Sharpe discovers a long-kept secret regarding a patient.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E08 - What the Heart Wants
2.plot: Sharpe lands in hot water when she goes out on a limb for a patient. Max's grief comes to a head. Bloom takes a major step in her recovery.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E09 - The Island
2.plot: When an inmate comes in with an entirely preventable illness, Max, Sharpe, and Iggy head directly to the source - Rikers Island. Meanwhile, Bloom struggles with her recovery, and Reynolds gets news that could change his life.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E10 - Code Silver
2.plot: With the hospital on lockdown after the Rikers patients escape, Sharpe and Max find themselves in a situation that could cost them their lives; Bloom must put aside her pain to help a patient; Iggy is forced to face his marriage's issues.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E11 - Hiding Behind My Smile
2.plot: Max and Luna make friends in an unexpected place as Max struggles with the realities of being a single father. Meanwhile, Kapoor takes a big step in order to help his family.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E12 - 14 Years, 2 Months, 8 Days
2.plot: Sharpe has an important realization that will affect her career. Meanwhile, Max and Reynolds take on uncharted waters when a young patient comes to New Amsterdam with symptoms of a heart attack.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E13 - In the Graveyard
2.plot: The doctors stop at nothing to help their patients, following a shocking realization that prompts a change in the hospital. Meanwhile, Reynolds must make an important decision in his career.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E14 - Sabbath
2.plot: Max races against the clock to rearrange the budget when faced with employees going unpaid, while Kapoor is presented with a device that's the future of medicine. Meanwhile, Iggy goes against the norms to prove a diagnosis and Bloom gets an unexpected visitor.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E15 - Double Blind
2.plot: When tasked with turning the opioid epidemic around, Max shuts down the ED and proposes a massive change. Meanwhile, Sharpe goes great lengths to prove a point.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E16 - Perspectives
2.plot: Max, Bloom and Reynolds frantically recount a patient's past encounter that could throw them into a massive lawsuit. Meanwhile, Iggy confronts a local middle school about its teaching policies, and Kapoor lets his superstitions take over.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E17 - Liftoff
2.plot: Max searches for a solution to crowdfunding after his eye-opening appearance in a viral "Go Fund Me" video. Reynolds takes his last laps at the hospital while Kapoor helps a former pilot deal with his life as a paraplegic.

2.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S02E18 - Matter of Seconds
2.plot: When multiple patients throughout the hospital begin to show similar, alarming symptoms, Sharpe and Bloom scramble to figure out the root of the issue. Iggy tries to create peace for a divorced couple in a dangerous situation and Kapoor experiences a flirtatious encounter. Meanwhile, Max meets a child with a rare muscular disease and desperately tries to get him into the only clinical trial in the country that could extend his life.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E01 - The New Normal
3.plot: New Amsterdam is still reeling from the pandemic as a plane crash lands in the East River. When investigators come to interrogate the flight crew, Iggy fights against the clock to help the pilot uncover the truth. Max tracks down scarce medication after one of his own contracts COVID.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E02 - Essential Workers
3.plot: Max is forced to face the heartbreaking consequences of one of his policies. Bloom comes to a startling realization about Iggy.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E03 - Safe Enough
3.plot: Max resists an idea that could bring New Amsterdam more revenue. Iggy pushes back on the new telemedicine system. Sharpe uncovers a startling trend while treating a beloved former patient.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E04 - This Is All I Need
3.plot: Max journeys to Connecticut to bring Luna back to New York, but second-guesses his instincts when he sees her with her grandparents. Bloom takes action to ensure her staff feel safe at work while Reynolds takes a backseat in the cardiac unit. Sharpe struggles to lean on Dr. Cassian Shin while dealing with a family emergency.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E05 - Blood, Sweat & Tears
3.plot: When Sharpe notices the hospital's blood supply is running dangerously low, Max concocts a plan to get New Amsterdam out of trouble. Reynolds realizes he has a thing or two to learn from Bloom while making peace with his new position. Iggy helps a patient face their inner demons.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E06 - Why Not Yesterday
3.plot: Max is on a mission to fix systemic racism at New Amsterdam. Bloom treats a patient who reminds her that things aren't as they seem. Sharpe is overwhelmed while tending to a family matter. Reynolds tries to keep his composure while treating a father and son.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E07 - The Legend of Howie Cournemeyer
3.plot: It's National HIV Testing Day and Max has offered free care to all HIV+ patients who come to New Amsterdam. Bloom and Reynolds butt heads over their opposing bedside manners. Iggy eagerly awaits the return of a friend. Sharpe discovers that she may need more hands on with her niece.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E08 - Catch
3.plot: Max is forced to examine the inequities in child labor for women of color. Bloom must deal with an overcrowded ED. Sharpe helps Dr. Agnes Kao with a gut-wrenching diagnosis. Reynolds finds himself experiencing something new on the job.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E09 - Disconnected
3.plot: Max is on a mission to deliver free broadband access. Reynolds treats a young girl with a gunshot wound. Sharpe gives difficult news to a long-time patient. Iggy is immensely proud of his patient's success but worries that he may be getting too close.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E10 - Radical
3.plot: Max reckons with New Amsterdam's past. Bloom and Reynolds treat a patient in an unconventional relationship. Sharpe decides to take a stricter approach to parenting her frustrated teenage niece. Iggy tries to connect with a patient desperate to have gastric bypass surgery.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E11 - Pressure Drop
3.plot: Max implements sweeping changes to hospital sustainability practices. Bloom returns from vacation. Reynolds treats a young patient with deadly heat stroke. Iggy discovers a dangerous situation with a former patient.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E12 - Things Fall Apart
3.plot: A burst pipe plunges the ED into chaos. Iggy counsels two stressed out parents about their child. Gwen and Calvin have some devastating news for Max.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E13 - Fight Time
3.plot: Sharpe offers help to a reluctant Mina. Max is faced with a tough decision about Luna. Bloom and Casey treat a patient who has been hiding a lifelong secret. Iggy finds himself in a very dangerous predicament. Reynolds treats a young heart transplant patient with astonishing symptoms.

3.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S03E14 - Death Begins in Radiology
3.plot: Reynolds receives a dramatic offer. Max scours the hospital after he misplaces his wedding ring. Iggy contemplates a serious life change. Bloom learns some potentially life-changing news about Leyla.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E01 - More Joy
4.plot: Max and Sharpe wake up to a new, more personal dynamic. Iggy calls upon an old contact to help with an explosive situation at the hospital. Bloom begins a tricky dynamic with her new Emergency Department residents. Reynolds finds himself in an awkward position with Dr. Baptiste and his wife, Dr. Lyn Malvo.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E02 - We're in This Together
4.plot: Max and Sharpe go public with their relationship at the hospital. The team struggles to handle an overcrowded and understaffed ICU. Iggy's overly critical feedback alienates his residents.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E03 - Same as It Ever Was
4.plot: Max advises a young student at a science fair but encounters legal complications with her brilliant invention. Bloom encourages Dr. Shinwari to be more aggressive in the ED. Iggy gets a lesson in humility. Brantley has a surprise for the staff.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E04 - Seed Money
4.plot: Max struggles with a new fiscal reality at the hospital. Dr. Sharpe is on a mission to provide follow-up cancer screenings for patients before it’s too late. Bloom grapples with Dr. Shinwari’s new overnight schedule. Reynolds has an interesting conversation with Dr. Malvo about their future.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E05 - This Be the Verse
4.plot: Dr. Fuentes continues her quest to remake the hospital in her vision. Max goes the extra mile to help a patient in need. Dr. Sharpe and Iggy find themselves at odds over a very serious issue. Reynolds discovers the importance of personal obligations. Bloom comes to a shocking realization about her mother.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E06 - Laughter and Hope and A Sock In the Eye
4.plot: Dr. Reynolds and Dr. Malvo have a heart-to-heart with Dr. Baptiste. Max learns a little more about Sharpe when someone from her past resurfaces. Iggy plays referee between two young patients and their families. Dr. Wilder reconsiders Max’s offer to join the staff.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E07 - Harmony
4.plot: Max and Bloom are shocked when a deadly ambulance crash reveals a dangerous plan. Dr. Fuentes pressures Iggy to take on patients. Sharpe realizes her own cost-cutting has adversely affected her department. Reynolds, Baptiste and Malvo strive to reach an accord.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E08 - Paid in Full
4.plot: Max is faced with a wrenching decision when New Amsterdam falls prey to a massive ransomware attack.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E09 - In A Strange Land
4.plot: Max takes drastic measures to help several undocumented immigrants after a fire destroys the church where had sought refuge; Sharpe and Malvo assist a patient with a life threatening condition; Reynolds is conflicted about his new position.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E10 - Death Is The Rule. Life Is The Exception
4.plot: As Max and Dr. Sharpe prepare to depart for London, a deadly superbug hits the hospital and draws them back in. Leyla confronts Bloom about the secret she has been hiding. Iggy digs deep to help two grieving parents confront the reality that their son is gone.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E11 - Talkin' Bout a Revolution
4.plot: Max and Helen settle happily into their new life in London. Dr. Fuentes takes over as medical director with disastrous effects. Bloom helps a patient who thinks he’s cursed. Iggy develops a plan to get his psych patients gainfully employed.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E12 - The Crossover
4.plot: Helen takes the reins at NHS Hampstead Hospital while Max gets creative to help a patient in need. Reynolds reaches a decision about Dr. Malvo. Iggy and Bloom help their patients understand the underlying cause of their stress. Dr. Wilder employs more unconventional techniques.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E13 - Family
4.plot: Max and Helen adjust to sharing their lives and problems, including the challenge of Helen's mother. Bloom and Reynolds treat a family after their horrific car accident lands them in the ED. Iggy and Trevor reach a new understanding in their business relationship.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E14 - ...Unto The Breach
4.plot: As the team gathers to mourn the loss of someone dear, Max and Helen realize the extent to which New Amsterdam has changed since they left. Bloom struggles with a big decision while Reynolds decides to take his concerns for his patients to a new level. Dr. Fuentes once again reminds the New Amsterdam team who is in control.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E15 - Two Doors
4.plot: Max formulates a bold plan to help New Amsterdam before it’s too late. Reynolds and Dr. Fuentes fight over the best way to handle a risky surgery. Dr. Wilder asks Dr. Castries for help with a patient with terminal cancer. Iggy helps a father and son deal with vastly different views on a shared trauma.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E16 - All Night Long
4.plot: The New Amsterdam team goes out for a night of karaoke and drinking, but must face the consequences at work the next day. Iggy helps a mysterious patient confront a past trauma. Reynolds and Dr Malvo discuss their future. Leyla gives Lauren some bad news.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E17 - Unfinished Business
4.plot: The New Amsterdam team continues to deal with the consequences of their big night out. Max and Helen discuss options for their future. Martin finally learns Iggy's secret. Bloom helps Leyla avoid a life-changing situation. Reynolds and Dr. Malvo define their relationship going forward.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E18 - No Ifs, Ands Or Buts
4.plot: Max orchestrates a plan to get Dr. Fuentes terminated from New Amsterdam once and for all. Helen confronts her medical complication. Iggy helps two patients deal with a breakup, which forces him to consider his own marriage. Bloom and Dr. Castries reach an understanding.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E19 - Truth Be Told
4.plot: Max discovers a fatal flaw in Dr. Fuentes' scheme to purchase the UMI medical clinic, which could be her ultimate undoing. Bloom treats two high school students for life-threatening injuries and uncovers a dangerous situation. Reynolds helps a brother and sister confront a family crisis.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E20 - Rise
4.plot: Max discovers the extent to which Dr. Fuentes' cuts are severely damaging New Amsterdam and decides it's now or never. Iggy takes an unconventional approach to reach a young patient in need. Reynolds and Wilder perform a risky, life-saving surgery on unborn twins.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E21 - Castles Made Of Sand
4.plot: When an elder care facilitate shuts down, New Amsterdam is forced to intake many new patients. Max struggles with his decision to head back to London. Reynolds takes his personal frustrations out on his department with near disastrous results. Iggy's work causes him to reflect on his marriage and personal life.

4.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S04E22 - I'll Be Your Shelter
4.plot: As a monster hurricane approaches New York, Bloom and the team scramble to put preparations in place. Max and Helen make plans for an intimate New York wedding as she returns from London. Iggy and Martin reach a crossroads. Reynolds finally makes contact with his father.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E01 - TBD
5.plot: Bloom, Iggy and Reynolds rally around Max as he deals with the fallout from Helen’s decision. Bloom gives extra space to Leyla, but she’s in for a surprise. Reynolds and Wilder help a young terminal patient realize his dream to star in a Bollywood show. Iggy has a breakthrough with a challenging patient.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E02 - Hook, Line and Sinker
5.plot: Max tests a bold new cost-saving program that could help both New Amsterdam and its neediest patients. Wilder struggles with a patient’s decision to refuse life-saving surgery. Reynolds comes to an important realization about his father’s behaviors. Iggy takes the leap into online dating.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E03 - Big Day
5.plot: An explosion at a wedding ceremony sends a stream of injured partygoers into New Amsterdam. While Max and Dr. Wilder scramble to find a rare blood type to save the groom, Reynolds and Bloom treat a couple with bizarre injuries. While helping a young girl out of a catatonic state, Iggy learns the truth about the wedding.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E04 - Heal Thyself
5.plot: Max mandates a personal health day for the staff at New Amsterdam and meets with surprising resistance. Reynolds finds himself intrigued by a persuasive new member of the staff. Bloom struggles with job stress after being taken off an essential medication. Iggy goes on his first date. Max convinces Wilder to get much needed surgery.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E05 - Grabby Hands
5.plot: Max endeavors to save a nurse who has become the subject of a dangerous malpractice probe. Reynolds goes the extra mile to help a group of patients who are being poisoned in their own building. Bloom makes a startling admission to her sister.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E06 - Give Me a Sign
5.plot: Max goes on a mission to make New York safer. Iggy helps a family come to terms with their deaf child’s inability to communicate.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E07 - Maybe Tomorrow
5.plot: The New Amsterdam staff grapple with the aftermath of the recent Supreme Court decision on abortion rights. Wilder counsels a woman whose pregnancy puts her life in danger. At Brantley's urging, Max endeavors to find a healthcare solution for out-of-state patients. Bloom reveals monumental news to Reynolds.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E08 - All the World's a Stage...
5.plot: Max discovers a revenue-generating department at the hospital that has serious legal implications. Iggy discovers a janitor with otherworldly talents. Reynolds treats a truly inspirational patient and makes plans for his father. Wilder's young patient teaches her not to jump to conclusions in diagnosing.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E09 - The Empty Spaces
5.plot: Reynolds gets creative to help a prospective mother in need. Max takes a chance with Wilder and learns a hard truth. Bloom treats a young brother and sister in dire straits. Iggy reaches a decision about Martin.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E10 - Don't Do This for Me
5.plot: Reynolds finds himself caught between a chance for love and an opportunity to spend precious time with his father. Realizing the consequences of her actions, Bloom makes an unexpected move forward with her sister. Max helps an ICU intern struggling with the loss of a patient. Dr. Wilder receives an offer that forces her to choose between her community and her career.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E11 - Falling
5.plot: When Helen Sharpe unexpectedly returns to New York, Max escapes to the wilderness on a corporate retreat with Bloom, Dr. Wilder and Iggy. Fun soon turns into catastrophe that threatens a life. Reynolds agrees to perform a risky surgery on a medical school colleague's young son only to be faced with unexpected challenges outside his control.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E12 - Right Place
5.plot: Max and Wilder face a dilemma over approvals for a revolutionary cancer drug as Max learns a secret about his own bout with cancer. Reynolds goes the extra mile to correct a dire medical situation. Iggy tries desperately to help a woman in need, but finds the system is working against him.

5.title: FR - New Amsterdam - S05E13 - How Can I Help?
5.plot: In the series finale, everyone's story reaches a surprising yet inevitable conclusion.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Nothing is going well in Joseph's life. His marriage to Marie is running out of steam: it is obvious that he is no longer attracted to his wife who is in despair. At work, it's not better. Oppressed by a tyrannical boss, Joseph spends his days in front of his computer, alone and jaded, selling labels. The only person who seems to want to bond with him is Jacques, the company computer scientist, a clumsy nerd who is harassed by his colleagues. But one evening, after having received a couple of friends at their home, Joseph suddenly had a severe stomach ache.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Joseph goes to a gold buyer who estimates his turd at ... 30,000 euros.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: While shopping, Joseph bumps into his upset friend Sylvie. She suspects her husband Stéphane is having an affair.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Joseph is now sure that his wife is cheating on him with Stéphane but prefers to feign ignorance. The gold buyer turns out to be a thug and begins to take a closer interest in Joseph, who has decided to hide his gold turds rather than sell them to him.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Gilles, Joseph's father, tells him that he used to lay gold in the past too! Joseph immediately understands that his mother was cheating on his father who never suspected anything. Marie begins to suspect Joseph to know about her affair with Stéphane.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Nothing goes for Joseph: he realizes that one of his productions is missing of its hiding place and then suspects Marie.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Between Joseph and Marie, the atmosphere is more relaxed since the truth is known. As everything seems to be going better, his marriage comes back to life and he is ready to buy his company, Joseph is kidnapped by Gino, driven by a spirit of revenge after the death of his father, the gold buyer.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Gino still threatens Joseph to get his turds back, while Marie breaks up with Stéphane.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Joseph and Marie find themselves prisoners in Gino's cellar, who intends to sleep with Marie so that Joseph can lay eggs.

1.title: FR - Or de lui - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: At the head of his new company, Joseph tries to find a solution to reimburse the tax authorities. To help, Jacques invests his mother's inheritance. Gino then offers to help ...

meta.plot: Un VRP d’une petite PME de banlieue dont la morne vie se résume à : métro-boulot et mariage raté, découvre un jour un stupéfiant pouvoir : il pond de l’or.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E01 - Willy MacIsaac
1.plot: Marcie faces off against a former colleague in her defence of Willy, a working poor dad accused of drunk driving. Pam hits Colleen's bureaucratic red tape when she volunteers to represent a disinherited friend. Marcie struggles to overcome her anger at the pastor who she believes helped drive her aunt to suicide.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E02 - Renee Joy
1.plot: An activist lawyer jeopardizes the future of Marcie's musically gifted teen client in the name of “the greater good.” Doug's defence of a lawyer accused of defrauding his community of millions dredges up his past at the Eskasoni reserve. Marcie and Carson struggle to keep their jobs from coming between them.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E03 - Taisir Ahmed
1.plot: Marcie races to find her client after he's snatched off the street by law enforcement. Pam scrambles to track down a new home for her pregnant client after her arguments against an eviction leads to the building being condemned. Marcie's work-place dating advice to Leah falls on deaf ears.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E04 - Delroy Nelson
1.plot: Marcie goes to extremes to protect her client after his plea deal is taken away. Reggie re-evaluates his marriage. Colleen and Gregor uses Doug as a pawn in their political games. Carson is caught in a lie.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E05 - Nikki LeBlanc
1.plot: Marcie's defence takes a turn. Doug represents Sam in a discrimination hearing. Colleen is accidentally outed.

1.title: FR - Diggstown - S01E06 - Kim Bond
1.plot: Marcie fights to help a mother regain custody of her infant son. Doug represents Colleen's former manny. Avery gets in the way of Marcie and Carson's rekindled relationship.

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E01 - Vince Hu
2.plot: Marcie takes on the case of a dismissed police officer who killed a local woman during a high-speed chase through the streets of North Preston; Pam fights for a single mother charged with prostitution and fraud.

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E02 - Cheryl Battiste
2.plot: Marcie's patience is tested when an Indigenous girl accused of murder refuses a deal that will afford her a more lenient sentence. Iris butts heads with Reggie when he fails to notice a client being blatantly racist, and Pam has an unexpected scare.

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E03 - Willy MacIsaac Redux
2.plot: Marcie's previous client Willie MacIsaac resurfaces, this time charged with the murder of his ex-wife, Gloria; Doug fights for a nurse accused of stealing from his elderly patient who has fallen into a coma.

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E04 - Tanya Ianova
2.plot: Marcie defends trans woman, Tanya Ianova, when she is charged in a seafood stealing scheme masterminded by her boss, but the efforts to clear Tanya's name may lead to her deportation.

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E05 - Vi Bayley
2.plot: Marcie defends a hair salon owner who is charged in connection with the assault of a gang member; Doug's relationship with a former client place him and Pam in the crosshairs of a misconduct complain

2.title: FR - Diggstown - S02E06 - Dani Ewing
2.plot: Marcie defends Dani Ewing, a white female facing arson and hate crime charges after homes in a predominantly black suburb are set on fire; Reggie mediates between Velma and Austin when they end up on opposite sides of a land ownership dispute.

meta.plot: Marcie Diggs, une grande avocate d'entreprise reconsidère ses priorités après que sa tante bien-aimée se soit suicidée. Elle décide de travailler comme aide juridique au sein d'une clinique, à Dartmouth, en Nouvelle-Écosse.

Procureure à Genève, Anne Dupraz vient de tirer sur Gilles Sarreti, le propriétaire d’une pizzeria. Alors que l’homme est entre la vie et la mort à l’hôpital, l’affaire sidère les collègues de la magistrate, à commencer par Antoine Dupraz, son ex-mari, procureur général, pour qui ce geste demeure incompréhensible. Interrogée par la procureure Carla Meier, récemment nommée, Anne refuse de s’expliquer. Quelques semaines plus tôt, un doigt de femme avait été découvert dans la cuisine de l’établissement, mobilisant les inspecteurs Jasna Shaqiri et Thomas Hoffman. Au fil des auditions, Anne finit par révéler qu’elle s’est prostituée à Paris, de 19 à 24 ans, sous le nom de Sacha pour le compte de Sarreti, qui s’appelle en réalité Philippe Teissier. Elle avoue également avoir participé à l’enquête sur lui, en toute illégalité. C’est ainsi qu’elle a approché Mila, une jeune prostituée roumaine, qui lui a confié avoir vu l’assassin de Larissa, une travailleuse du sexe disparue...

1.title: FR - Sacha - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Prosecutor Anne Dupraz is in police custody after shooting a man and leaving him hovering between life and death.

1.title: FR - Sacha - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Anne is suspected of lying and premeditating her act to prevent her victim from revealing her past. Will Anne tell the truth?

1.title: FR - Sacha - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Anne reveals shocking information about her youth and admits that she participated in the investigation of Tessier.

1.title: FR - Sacha - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Just when Carla is starting to believe Anne, ballistics analysis reveals damning new evidence, which undermines Anne's story.

1.title: FR - Sacha - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Anne is released to await trial, despite the prosecutors' doubts. Anne must face the truth about her actions and finds help from an unexpected source.

meta.plot: Une soirée de concert qui s’annonçait magique pour une bande de jeunes adultes encore candides prend une tournure tragique dans «Chaos». Une seconde, on chante en chœur «Le monde est chill» avec la star de l’heure, INVO (Simon Morin, qui s’en sort très bien dans son premier rôle à l’écran). La suivante, deux bombes explosent dans la grande salle Santorini (en réalité le Théâtre Rialto, à Montréal), causant morts, blessures et innombrables séquelles physiques et psychologiques à ceux et celles qui y étaient.

FR - Chaos - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Welcome to Paradise. Party, fidelity, and survival. Play with everyone, but trust no one - because who knows whether tactics or friendship will win out in the end?

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Olivia and Emil welcome a completely changed Paradise when ten hopeful participants move in and try their luck.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The game begins in earnest, and power changes hands. But there will also be time to get to know each other a little better when there are speed dates.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Three of the participants get the opportunity to secure a seat at the Partner Ceremony, but this requires that they have their speaking skills in order.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: You have to fight for your cause when the very first partner ceremony takes place. And with the new rules, all those who have not secured a seat are in danger.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Life is full of important choices and dilemmas, and this is also the case at Paradise, when the participants are exposed to all kinds of temptations. And then a new resident moves in.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: One person in a partnership has to make a very important decision that also has a big impact on their partner.

1.title: FR - Paradise - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Friendships are put to the test as contestants are faced with difficult questions and dilemmas as the very first Pandoras is held.

meta.plot: Une épidémie mystérieuse a décimé toute la population mâle de la Terre ! Toute sauf un jeune homme, appelé Yorick Brown, et son singe, Esperluette. Pourchassés par des groupements de femmes aux intérêts divers, Yorick et Esperluette partent sur les routes dévastées des États-Unis, sous la protection de la mystérieuse et mortelle Agent 355.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E01 - The Day Before
1.plot: On the eve of the worst crisis in human history, Congresswoman Jennifer Brown clashes with the President. Her children Yorick and Hero reach an emotional crossroads. None of them know their lives are about to change forever.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E02 - Would the World Be Kind
1.plot: After a mass casualty event wipes out every creature with a Y chromosome, President Jennifer Brown responds to the crisis. Yorick fears he may be the only survivor. Hero attempts to right a wrong.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E03 - Neil
1.plot: With Jennifer and Yorick reunited, Agent 355 pitches a plan for what comes next. The dead President's daughter, Kimberly, circles Jennifer's secret. Meanwhile, Nora Brady and her daughter Mack say goodbye to home.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E04 - Karen and Benji
1.plot: On Jennifer's orders, Yorick and Agent 355 search for a geneticist who can unravel the mystery of how he survived. Meanwhile, Hero and Sam encounter a dangerous group of women.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E05 - Mann Hunt
1.plot: Yorick and Agent 355 search for Dr. Allison Mann in war-torn Boston. Back in D.C., Jennifer hides the truth about Yorick from her political rivals.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E06 - Weird Al is Dead
1.plot: Yorick, Agent 355 and Dr. Mann hit a snag on their way to San Francisco. As the search for 355 heats up, Jennifer clashes with former cabinet secretary Regina Oliver, who has her eyes on the presidency. Hero is seduced by a charismatic leader, Roxanne, as Sam and Nora grapple with their place in a dangerous group of survivors.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E07 - My Mother Saw a Monkey
1.plot: Kimberly uncovers a secret. 355 and Allison reach an understanding. Yorick stumbles upon a mysterious town where things are not what they seem.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E08 - Ready. Aim. Fire.
1.plot: Tensions at the PriceMax spiral out of control. Hero and Sam pass the point of no return. Nora uncovers dangerous secrets.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E09 - Peppers
1.plot: As tensions at the Pentagon come to a head, Jennifer faces a threat. The Amazons hit the road.

1.title: FR - Y : Le dernier homme - S01E10 - Victoria
1.plot: As the Amazons close in on Marrisville, Nora reaches a breaking point. Yorick makes a new connection while 355 faces her past.

1.title: FR - La Cage - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Just as he is about to give up on his dreams, a young MMA amateur makes unexpected waves when an enraged pro fighter bursts into his gym.

1.title: FR - La Cage - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Taylor trains in Canada, Ibrahim comes under increasing pressure to accept his call out. Taylor's mother and her partner make a loaded request.

1.title: FR - La Cage - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In desperate need of money, Taylor signs up for an intense KSW tournament in Poland, facing much heavier opponents and putting his career on the line.

1.title: FR - La Cage - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Ignoring the warning signs, Taylor prepares for the ultimate rematch against a pumped-up Ibrahim, while Niko rides high on his friend's newfound fame.

1.title: FR - La Cage - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Desperate to avenge Boss, Taylor heads to Mexico to train but struggles to get back into the cage — until a fighting legend steps in to help.

meta.plot: Rêvant de passer pro, un jeune combattant peine à se faire remarquer quand un combat inattendu lui offre la chance de sa vie, et un adversaire de taille dans la cage.

FR - Où est Marta ? - S01E01 - No signal
1.plot: Marta's family and friends describe the night she went missing and the subsequent search that ensued as they grew suspicious of her ex, Miguel.

1.title: FR - Où est Marta ? - S01E02 - Network of deception
1.plot: The search for Marta's body continues as Miguel and the other suspects change their versions of what happened the night she was killed.

1.title: FR - Où est Marta ? - S01E03 - No further questions, your honor?
1.plot: The suspects stand trial for Marta's murder and the ensuing coverup. Her parents explain their desire to find her body. Plus, new evidence is analyzed.

meta.plot: Teenager Marta del Castillo's disappearance made headlines in Spain. Family, friends, police and more weigh in on a case that is still unresolved.

Sophie Cross, brillante avocate, et Arthur Leclercq, son fils de 5 ans, profitent d’une belle journée d’été dans les dunes de la mer du Nord. Quelques secondes d’absence de Sophie suffisent pour que son fils disparaisse. Les semaines passent mais l’enquête piétine. Arthur a- t-il vraiment été enlevé ?

1.title: FR - Sophie Cross - S01E01 - Devilish plan
1.plot: Lawyer Sophie Cross and her husband Thomas Leclercq look at crime with different eyes. While he is responsible for the investigation as the head of the local police, she fights as a criminal defense lawyer with all legal means for her clients - regardless of the question of guilt or justice. When their six-year-old son Arthur disappears without a trace while playing in the dunes in a brief unsupervised moment, a nightmare begins for the two of them.

1.title: FR - Sophie Cross - S01E02 - Deadly Truth
1.plot: The teacher Claude Lemaire was slain after a parents' evening. Sophie Cross is commissioned by chief investigator Deville to examine the victim's private life with her colleagues Amina Dequesne and Fred Fontaine.

1.title: FR - Sophie Cross - S01E03 - Bloody business
1.plot: A new lead in the search for her missing son and a puzzling murder case that calls into question the good reputation of the police - Sophie Cross has to prove herself several times as a new investigator.

2.title: FR - Sophie Cross - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Sophie Cross - S02E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Suzanne Brunet n'arrive pas à se résoudre. Sa fille Julie a disparu il y a huit ans, mais Suzanne la cherche toujours, partout. Julie aurait 25 ans aujourd'hui. Est-elle toujours en vie ? Ce qui lui est arrivé?

1.title: FR - Mon ange - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Julie Castro has been missing for over 8 years. Stubborn and resilient, her mother Suzanne searches in vain for a sign of life. While visiting a patient, she distinguishes Julie's face in the photo of a recent demonstration that appeared in a newspaper in a small town located in Haute-Loire. Going in search of her, Suzanne discovers a community where no one has ever heard of Julie.

1.title: FR - Mon ange - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Following the discovery of Anaïs' body, suspicion falls on Suzanne. For her, the disappearance of Julie has a direct link with the murder of Anaïs. Gabrielle Varan, a young police captain, is in charge of the investigation.

1.title: FR - Mon ange - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Suzanne tries to get Stéphanie to talk so that she reveals to her where her daughter is being held prisoner. So close to the goal, Suzanne could commit the irreparable to get her hands on her daughter.

meta.plot: Autour de J.C. on retrouve les apôtres Pierre, Simon et Judas, ainsi que Marie, Marie-Madeleine, Ponce Pilate, Jean-le-Baptiste. Personnages caricaturaux et scènes courtes, chaque épisode aborde avec légèreté et humour les grandes histoires autour de la vie de JC.

FR - Fire Chasers - S01E01 - The New Normal
1.plot: In California, authorities study environmental changes that fuel increasingly fierce wildfires, and a group of inmates train to become firefighters.

1.title: FR - Fire Chasers - S01E02 - After Burn
1.plot: Firefighters enter a smoke-filled canyon to combat a deadly blaze. Turning their lives around, two inmates join firefighting crews.

1.title: FR - Fire Chasers - S01E03 - Keep These Jackasses Wet
1.plot: Homeowners sift through the wreckage left behind by a fire. Rookies face tough training challenges. A veteran firefighter recalls a tragedy.

1.title: FR - Fire Chasers - S01E04 - The Art of Destruction
1.plot: Rookies get their first taste of going toe-to-toe with the flames. An inmate-firefighter starts her new life, and a fire's detritus becomes artwork.

meta.plot: Fire Chasers est une série documentaire originale de langue anglaise 2017 produite par Leonardo DiCaprio et dirigée par Molly Mayock, illustrant les dangers de la lutte contre les incendies en explorant la saison des incendies en Californie en 2016

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire propose une incursion dans la vie de cette famille plus grande que nature. Tara et Pascal, deux trentenaires allumés et un brin perfectionnistes sont les parents de 10 enfants. Chaque épisode offre un regard intime et drôle sur la vie d'un foyer où le quotidien n'est jamais banal.
Les conditions de détention des prisonniers au sein du système pénal britannique moderne, vu à travers les yeux de deux hommes très différents, l'un est écroué, l'autre est un gardien.

1.title: FR - Time - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Mark Cobden is sent to prison and has to learn quickly how to survive. When an inmate identifies prison officer Eric McNally’s weakness, he faces an impossible choice.

1.title: FR - Time - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Mark is being bullied by fellow inmate Johnno. Does he tell the prison officers and be labelled a grass or risk the attacks becoming more and more violent? Eric’s son is attacked.

1.title: FR - Time - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Mark suffers a tragic personal loss and is given the chance to leave prison for a day. Eric is forced to take greater risks to protect his family. But where will he draw the line?

1.title: FR - Time - S01E04 -

2.title: FR - Time - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Struggling single mother Orla finds herself in a desperate situation after being sent to Carlingford prison. There, she meets Kelsey, a young heroin addict, and Abi, a tough lifer.

2.title: FR - Time - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Six months on, Orla finds herself back in prison. Desperate for her kids, how far will she go to take action? Meanwhile, Abi considers revenge, and Kelsey plans for her future.

2.title: FR - Time - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Abi and Kelsey bond after the birth of Kelsey’s baby, Orla faces the consequences of her actions, and intense pressure builds in the prison.

2.title: FR - Time - S02E04 -

meta.plot: Rafal est psychologue dans une prison polonaise où il soigne de dangereux criminels. Un soir, l’un d’entre eux réussit à s’évader. Le lendemain matin, un adolescent est retrouvé mort et Gabi, la fille de Rafal, a disparu. Rafal est persuadé que le crime et la disparition sont liés à l’évasion du prisonnier. Il va tout mettre en œuvre pour retrouver sa fille.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Emil Knapik's fellow inmates die after taking drugs; Emil is taken to the hospital, but he escapes; Rafał with his daughters, Hania and Gabi, is to visit Germany with his wife, Magda, but Hania refuses to accompany him.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Investigator Danka Schulze, Rafał's former girlfriend, comes to the Wejman's house and asks him about Emil Knapik; prison guards organise a manhunt for Emil; Rafał is busy looking for his daughter, Gabi.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Emil goes to the hospital; police search for Ariel's killer, Gabi's boyfriend; Rafał's wife presses him to report his daughter's disappearance.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The police find Gabi's clothes on the barge, along with a lot of blood and drugs; Rafał does not believe that his daughter could have committed suicide.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Investigators ponder the possibility that Gabi may actually be a victim, and the crime scene a staged one. Commander Artur Zawisza discovers Krzysiek Ryszka under the influence of synthetic drugs and threatens him.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: At the penitentiary, Krzysiek Ryszka sells designer drugs to Chudy, Emil Knapik's cellmate. Two inmates die instantly, and Emil is taken to the hospital. The next day, after Rafal's visit, Piotrek confronts his brother.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The search party manages to find Gabrysia's shoe on the cliff. The discovery does not herald good news for the Wejman family. There is a quarrel between Piotr Ryszka and Krzysiek Ryszka.

1.title: FR - Klangor - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: After having spoken to Emil, Rafał comes to Danka Schulze and attempts to convince her of his hypothesis.

meta.plot: Deux détectives n'ayant rien en commun doivent travailler ensemble. L'inspectrice en chef McDonald et le timide Dodds se lient d'amitié et créent un partenariat divertissant et efficace en s'attaquant à des affaires déroutantes.

1.title: FR - McDonald et Dodds - S01E01 - The Fall of the House of Crockett
1.plot: When a man is shot in the deserted mansion of one of Bath's most prominent industrialists, newly arrived DCI McDonald and DS Dodds unravel a tangled web of lies.

1.title: FR - McDonald et Dodds - S01E02 - Wilderness of Mirrors
1.plot: The chalk-and-cheese detective duo are called to a private clinic where a wealthy patient has been killed. However, their investigation is made all the more difficult by the complex relationships of the victim's former fellow residents.

meta.plot: Lia Haddock, une journaliste de la radio américaine, tente de percer le mystère autour de la disparition de plus 300 personnes au sein d'un centre de recherche en neuroscience dans le Tennessee.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E01 - I Have Heard the Future
1.plot: American Public Radio journalist Lia Haddock reckons with the 15 year old mystery: What happened to the people of Limetown?

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E02 - Redacted
1.plot: Lia embarks on the first interview in recorded history with a survivor from Limetown.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E03 - Rake
1.plot: Lia and Mark visit Rake, Wyoming in search of the next Limetown survivor, but they're not prepared for the horrors they find.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E04 - Napoleon
1.plot: The second known survivor from Limetown reveals the saga of animal testing in the community.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E05 - Signals
1.plot: Lia finds herself in a secret bunker in order to interview the mysterious financier behind Limetown.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E06 - A Simple Life
1.plot: Famed neuroscientist Max Finlayson divulges the purpose of the doomed research facility.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E07 - Acceptable Loss
1.plot: After an unexpected visit, Lia questions whether or not to continue the investigation.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E08 - Scarecrow
1.plot: Limetown survivor Deirdre Wells reveals what incited The Panic.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E09 - Apples and Oranges
1.plot: An unknown survivor sends Lia a disturbing video file with a promise that she has all the answers.

1.title: FR - Limetown - S01E10 - Answers
1.plot: Season Finale. Lia receives all the answers she’s been seeking.

meta.plot: Dans cette série, Colin Kaepernick raconte sa quête d'excellence malgré les obstacles que constituent les différences de couleur, de classe et de culture.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E01 - Cornrows
1.plot: Inspired by his basketball idol, eighth grader Colin embraces his individuality and hip-hop culture in a way that startles his parents and coaches.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E02 - Quarterbackin'
1.plot: With dreams of being a high school varsity quarterback, Colin learns the hard way that talent isn't the only thing he'll need to prosper on the field.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E03 - Road Trip
1.plot: While traveling with his parents to baseball tournaments, Colin experiences a series of events that challenge his view about his place in the world.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E04 - The Decision
1.plot: In his junior year of high school, Colin is besieged by college baseball offers — and opinions. But he considers holding out for a future in football.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E05 - Crystal
1.plot: Colin works up the courage to ask his crush to the homecoming dance as his mother tries to intervene and his friends challenge his standard of beauty.

1.title: FR - Colin en noir et blanc - S01E06 - Dear Colin
1.plot: In his senior year, Colin awaits an acceptance letter and the chance to play college football as his journey of perseverance leads to a profound lesson.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Tired of being passed over for promotion at her law firm, Joanna Hanley returns to her hometown to defend a drug company.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E02 - The Ties That Bind
1.plot: A fish out of water in a town that's as foreign as it is familiar, Joanna battles with questions over her family's hasty departure when she was a teenager and attempts to convince the locals that she has in fact switched sides.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E03 - Still Waters
1.plot: Joanna uses her esteem as partner at CTS to convince a hydrologist to test Millwood's soil. With reluctant permission from the mayor, Joanna and Billy narrow their list of suspects to a handful of industrial sites in the community.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E04 - Family Ties
1.plot: Joanna and Billy are convinced that the local steel mill and its owner Ben Matheson are responsible for the barrels. A shocking revelation in Joanna's personal life leads her to question everything her father had told her.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E05 - Witch Hunt
1.plot: The sick girls and their families are faced with the mill employees who are worried about losing their jobs.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E06 - Devil in the Desert
1.plot: As threats against her and Billy escalate, Joanna hopes that a neuropsychologist will prove that the girls were poisoned.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E07 - Ducks on the Pond
1.plot: Stuck in Millwood without a case and no firm to return to, Joanna is at loose ends on what to do next until a whistleblower comes forward.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E09 - Home to Roost
1.plot: Joanna faces the one person who can help her defeat her father.

1.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S01E10 - Cause in Fact
1.plot: After being reinstated, Joanna plays her trump card, but it's not enough to elicit a settlement.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E01 - Salesman, Cheats and Liars
2.plot: Joanna Chang is living a new life at a new firm with a new name when she's assigned a case of a brilliant young Internet privacy activist who will turn everything in her new life upside down. Meanwhile, back in Millwood, Billy Crawford is dealing with the aftermath of the Matheson Steel lawsuit.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E02 - The Rabbit Hole
2.plot: Joanna is dealing with the aftermath of a serious and dangerous invasion of her privacy, while in Millwood, Billy entertains his brother Shane’s idea to save the town.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E03 - The Milk of Human Kindness
2.plot: Joanna struggles to control the narrative of Noah's case when Lovand starts a smear campaign against him. Billy and Gerrilynn wait for an answer in their civil suit, when an unexpected visitor turns up in Millwood with an offer.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E04 - Guilt by Association
2.plot: Back in Millwood after learning of a death of someone close to her, Joanna won't get a moment to mourn, as the overzealous police are already zeroing in on Gerrilynn Spence. Joanna and Billy team up to halt a rush to judgment.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E06 - Manic Street Preacher
2.plot: Joanna struggles at work and with Luna's upcoming trial while dealing with her grief. Billy finds evidence that may provide an alternate theory.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E07 - Never Face the Hangman
2.plot: On the eve of Luna's trial, Joanna reaches out to an old client when she discovers a new piece of evidence that will lead her to the identity of the real killer. Billy attempts to get help for Shane but is forced to make an agonizing choice.

2.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S02E08 - The Right Road
2.plot: As Luna's trial starts, Joanna and Billy defend against an avalanche of evidence. With things not looking good, Joanna risks everything by putting an unexpected witness on the stand.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E01 - Crawford Chang
3.plot: Joanna and Billy face a verdict in their first case, but when they return to Millwood for a high school reunion, an old friend from Joanna's past suffers a devastating loss that forces Joanna to face long-buried demons from her past

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E02 - Wherever You Go
3.plot: Joanna is reeling from the sudden apprehension of Kodie's children by Millwood Family Services.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E03 - No Fathers and Sons
3.plot: After losing at the custody hearing, Joanna is desperate to help Kodie.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E04 - Desperate Measures
3.plot: With no hope left in the judicial system, Kodie snatches her kids and goes on the run.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E05 - Crisis of Faith
3.plot: With more potential cases of wrongful child apprehensions, Joanna and Billy investigate.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E06 - It Takes a Village
3.plot: Joanna reluctantly agrees to try to put together a class-action suit.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E07 - Name Your Ghosts
3.plot: Coming off the loss of class certification, Joanna and Billy decide to go after ClearDawn alone, turning to the only lead they have - an unreliable whistleblower.

3.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S03E08 - Shelter from the Storm
3.plot: Joanna and Billy head to trial against ClearDawn labs while still desperately searching for a way to expose the fraudulent science used to wrongfully apprehend children. Season finale.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E01 - River City
4.plot: With Millwood divided over a proposed mining project, lawyer and new mother Joanna Chang (Kristin Kreuk) takes on the case of a landowner whose farm is standing in the way of the mine.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E02 - Breaking Points
4.plot: Joanna (Kristin Kreuk) searches for her client's long-lost daughter to protect her client's legal interests and keep the case alive.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E03 - From Out the Gloomy Rack
4.plot: Joanna becomes the target of a mysterious criminal investigation. Luna rushes back to Millwood to aid her sister. Beckbie helps Kip deal with a personal problem. Taylor makes a shocking discovery as she continues her investigation.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E04 - Scorched Earth
4.plot: Joanna races to find evidence to dismiss the charges against her before her end-of-day hearing. Billy's search for a lead in the case has personal consequences.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E05 - Spirits in the Material World
4.plot: Joanna and Billy, struggling to deal with the demands of being new parents, are blindsided when their injunction against the mine is overturned.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E06 - The Homecoming
4.plot: As Joanna and Billy scramble to keep their case alive, the evidence they uncover begins to point to a shocking conclusion about the mine.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E07 - Where the Shadows Lie Waiting...
4.plot: With one day left before the disciplinary hearing, Joanna and Billy set out to finish the case against the mine.

4.title: FR - Seule contre tous - S04E08 - Standing by Peaceful Waters
4.plot: With her abrupt departure from her preliminary hearing and her legal career seemingly over, Joanna begins to chart a new path for the future outside the law.

meta.plot: Brillante avocate, Joanna Hanley retourne dans sa ville natale pour reprendre un dossier sur des jeunes filles mystérieusement malades.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E01 - Welcome to Matheson
1.plot: After the Lockes move into Keyhouse, Bode makes a new acquaintance — and a startling discovery. Tyler and Kinsey try to start over at a new high school.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E02 - Trapper / Keeper
1.plot: While Nina uncovers details about Rendell's past, Kinsey helps out the Savini Squad, Tyler falls in with a bad crowd, and Bode finds another key.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E03 - Head Games
1.plot: Locating a powerful new key sends Bode's spirit soaring. Tyler's simmering rage boils over. Kinsey realizes just how much her fear is holding her back.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E04 - The Keepers of the Keys
1.plot: Sporting a new hairdo and attitude, Kinsey takes a chance with Scot by sharing what's going on inside her head. Tyler tries to impress his crush.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E05 - Family Tree
1.plot: Kinsey uses a key to seek vengeance on a school bully. A troubled Nina finds a sympathetic ear. A long-buried memory casts Rendell in a new light.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E06 - The Black Door
1.plot: Kinsey explores the sea cave with the Savini Squad in tow, Nina confronts Ellie over Joe, and Tyler sabotages his relationship with Jackie.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E07 - Dissection
1.plot: The Locke family faces their worst nightmare when the person responsible for shattering their lives resurfaces and demands one of the keys.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E08 - Ray of F**king Sunshine
1.plot: Tyler and Kinsey feel torn when they figure out why Nina is acting strangely. Bode meets Rufus and Ellie's houseguest. Dodge zeroes in on the Omega Key.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E09 - Echoes
1.plot: As pieces begin to click into place for the Locke siblings, Ellie opens up about her connection to Dodge, and Kinsey comes clean with her friends.

1.title: FR - Locke & Key - S01E10 - Crown of Shadows
1.plot: The battle over the Omega Key leads to decisions that can't be undone — and a dangerous door that promises plenty of trouble ahead.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E01 - The Premiere
2.plot: Gabe forges an unholy alliance with Eden. Kinsey prepares for the premiere of the Savini Squad's horror film. Duncan arrives at Keyhouse with big news.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E02 - The Head and the Heart
2.plot: Tyler grows concerned over Jackie's memory loss, Gabe probes the Lockes for information about the keys, and Nina meets a mansplainer at her new job.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E03 - Small World
2.plot: Amid Duncan's unease over a new houseguest, Gabe tries to drive a wedge between Kinsey and Scot, Bode finds an unusual key, and Nina bonds with Josh.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E04 - Forget Me Not
2.plot: With Duncan's emotional state deteriorating, Gabe confronts one of the Lockes, Tyler surprises Jackie on her birthday, and Kinsey faces up to her fears.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E05 - Past is Prologue
2.plot: Gabe insinuates himself into Tyler's search for the Memory Key as Kinsey resolves to find out what's going on with Eden. Bode visits an old friend.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E06 - The Maze
2.plot: At the annual Winterfest celebration, Kinsey tries to play it cool around Gabe while a key found by Bode and Duncan may offer a way to take down Dodge.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E07 - Best Laid Plans
2.plot: Kinsey puts her acting skills to the test when the Lockes and their friends set a magical trap at Keyhouse. Josh fumes over his missing artifact.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E08 - Irons in the Fire
2.plot: As the origins of the Locke family magic come to light, Tyler and Kinsey look to protect their loved ones from Gabe's expanding collection of pawns.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E09 - Alpha & Omega
2.plot: While Tyler works on a way to help Jackie, Gabe gives Kinsey a deadline to meet his demands, Eden manipulates Josh, and a shaken Nina reaches out.

2.title: FR - Locke & Key - S02E10 - Cliffhanger
2.plot: Escalating threats and a devastating loss lead the Lockes into a ferocious showdown with Dodge. Back at Keyhouse, Bode confronts a shocking visitor.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E01 - The Snow Globe
3.plot: A mysterious snow globe unleashes a double dose of trouble at Keyhouse, leaving Bode out in the cold as Kinsey and Nina try to retrieve a stolen key.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E02 - Wedding Crashers
3.plot: Duncan's wedding day brings a welcome surprise — and provides the perfect opportunity for uninvited guests to search the house. Bode discovers a new key.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E03 - Five Minutes Past
3.plot: Bode looks for the key that will let him see his dad, Nina confronts bad memories, and Kinsey gathers with the Savinis for an emotional send-off.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E04 - Deep Cover
3.plot: Bode's sudden attitude change worries his family and friends, Tyler catches up with a co-worker, and Gideon forms an unholy alliance.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E05 - Siege
3.plot: Suspicions about Bode's behavior come to a head after an unsettling discovery, while Gideon's patience runs out in his plot to possess the keys.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E06 - Free Bird
3.plot: Gideon's henchman grabs leverage to use against the Lockes as Tyler and Kinsey look for a way to help Bode, who's devising a clever plan of his own.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E07 - Curtain
3.plot: Gideon forces Ellie to take him to the missing key, putting an old classmate's life on the line. Nina and Bode attempt to unlock the Harlequin Chest.

3.title: FR - Locke & Key - S03E08 - Farewell
3.plot: With Gideon hell-bent on acquiring the Creation Key, the Lockes race to stop him, leading to a vicious clash — and a decision that changes everything.

meta.plot: Après le meurtre de leur père, trois frères et sœurs emménagent dans une maison aux clés magiques dans cette série adaptée des BD de Joe Hill et Gabriel Rodríguez.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Skeletal remains are found in a gravel mine outside of a small town. Three seemingly exemplary women, Elisabet, Karlotta, and Anna Sigga, are all shaken to their core.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: It is revealed that the bones belong to their childhood friend Hanna and her death was no accident.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Elisabet pressures the women to stay silent and distance themselves from the investigation as their personal lives begin to unravel.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A funeral is held for Hanna forcing the women to return home. Whilst there, Karlotta digs up something from their past which could incriminate them all.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: New information reveals lies and cover ups in the original investigation pushing Elisabet over the edge, but her efforts to silence Anna Sigga backfire. Meanwhile Karlotta succumbs to her addiction.

1.title: FR - Sisterhood - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Anna Sigga and Karlotta are determined to make amends in very different ways. Elisabet, now on her own, attempts one last time to deny her involvement.

meta.plot: Une jeune fille de quatorze ans disparaît sans laisser de trace au tournant du millénaire. Vingt-cinq ans plus tard, son corps est découvert et trois amis doivent faire face à l'horreur de leur passé.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E01 - New Year, New Plans
1.plot: Julia, her new roomie Jason and their friends prepare to submit their school project ideas. But the new, test-obsessed headmaster Agnes has other plans.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E02 - Lacisum
1.plot: The Misfits get sneakily creative under the watchful eye of Agnes as they recruit other squads for their musical and try to find a place to practice.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E04 - Hard to Get
1.plot: After someone working with Agnes sabotages the rehearsal by destroying props and changing the script, Julia and the others start to suspect each other.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E05 - BFF
1.plot: Julia is tempted by dreams of fame while Nick struggles to be honest. Meanwhile, the musical takes another hit, and the girls confront their suspect.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E06 - Tomorrow, Everything Will Be Different
1.plot: The Misfits come together to solve the mystery of the saboteur while Julia and Magenta make the choice between their dreams and their friends.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E07 - The Show Must Go On
1.plot: The Misfits' excitement for the musical is dampened by betrayal and hurt feelings. In an additional setback, 10 students are forced to leave campus.

1.title: FR - High School Girls : La série - S01E08 - Musical Education
1.plot: It's showtime! With everyone separated, the quiz show begins with Agnes on top. But the Misfits don't intend to back down.

meta.plot: L'année de folie de la bande commence mal : la nouvelle proviseure décide d'annuler la comédie musicale qu'ils préparaient. Julia doit sauver la situation.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Candela, an unconventional judge with character, is sent to the remotest possible posting, El Hierro, an island that is full of peculiar characteristics, where she doesn’t quite fit in. As soon as she arrives, she must face a murder case. The victim is Fran, a young man who was going to get married on that very day. Everything seems to suggest the culprit is Díaz, Fran’s boss and father of the bride, a shady local businessman who had served sentence for murder as a young man.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Candela must decide if Díaz is kept in pretrial custody. Against the criterium of her team, and of the whole island, he is released on bail, although he won’t be allowed to leave the island and he will be closely monitored. In any case, it’s an extremely unpopular decision, compounded by Díaz’s determination to find the real culprit by himself. Candela, at odds with her own team, needs someone by her side to rely on, someone who also knows the ropes of the island. She takes a new controversial decision – she includes Reyes, a local police officer, in the investigation team.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The investigation brings to light the dark side of Fran’s life: he had established contact with some mysterious person in Holland, and he had an affair with an unknown lover. Did Fran die because he was involved in some shady business? Or was it a crime of passion? Both Candela and Díaz make progress in their respective investigations, carried out independently. Díaz believes Fran used his contacts from the milieu of a dangerous drug smuggler. And Candela makes an uncomfortable discovery – Fran’s mysterious lover is someone very close to her.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: During a clandestine trip out of the island, Díaz discovers that Fran, just before he died, was trying to sell some valuable merchandise. He doesn’t know what kind of merchandise. And above all, he doesn’t know who was the partner from El Hierro who cooperated with him in the operation. This mysterious partner could be the murderer, because he is trying to get something from Fran’s environment (he broke into his and his mother’s houses…) Meanwhile, Candela feels the police investigation is progressing too slowly. The only person she trusts is Reyes. And in fact, the local police officer does discover (and us with her) who the murderer is. But she won’t live to tell the tale.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The murderer, upon being found out, kills Reyes. From that moment on, he faces the difficulty of getting rid of the body in an island like El Hierro, where it is difficult to vanish without trace. Especially after the disappearance of the local police officer gives rise to a public outcry. There is a reaction in the island. Police forces, civil defense services and volunteers start a desperate search. The most likely scenario is that the murderer Reyes was investigating is back in action. Candela is devastated; she feels guilty because she is the one who enlisted Reyes for an investigation that strictly speaking was not part of her work duties.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Reyes hasn’t been found, but the search operation leads to tracing down a sunk boat which will provide new clues. The boat was used for smuggling African diamonds, and was found by Fran in a diving excursion. Diamonds are the shady business he was involved in. Candela cannot accept defeat in the search for Reyes, or the slowing down in the speed of the investigation as a result of the Descent, a religious festivity that paralyzes the island every four years. Desperate, she tries to get Díaz’s cooperation, who is also vent on finding the real culprit. The murderer feels the investigation is closing down on him. He considers fleeing, but he hasn’t found the diamonds hidden by Fran yet. And he diverts attention to everyone’s ideal false culprit – Díaz.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Díaz avoids being arrested by desperately fleeing. But leaving the island without being found out is impossible, especially with a police operation that shut up firmly the few available exit routes from the island. Finally, Díaz gets caught. And the island sighs, relieved – they will be able to celebrate their Descent in peace. Only three people in the island seem anxious: Díaz himself, who knows that someone has planted false evidence to frame him; Candela, who has a hunch there must be something wrong; and the murderer, who got the police off his back, but who continues looking for the diamonds that are at the root of his whole adventure. In the middle of the Descent festivities, the murderer discovers the location of the diamonds.

1.title: FR - Hierro - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: The murderer, taking advantage of the chaotic situation during the Descent, manages to get hold of the diamonds. But now he must face a new obstacle – the drug smuggler whose help Fran had enlisted has been following him, and he wants to take the diamonds himself. Meanwhile, Candela and Díaz go over their investigations together, and find the key to identify the murderer. They trace him down when he is on his way out of the island. They have caught him. But he is not prepared to surrender.

meta.plot: Mutée à El Hierro, l’île la plus éloignée de l’archipel des Canaries, la juge Candela se retrouve confrontée au meurtre d’un jeune local, assassiné la veille de son mariage avec la fille de Diaz, un riche entrepreneur à la réputation sulfureuse. Ce dernier devient rapidement le principal suspect du crime. Bien que mus par des intérêts diamétralement opposés, Candela et Diaz ont un objectif commun : découvrir le véritable assassin.

1.title: FR - Alexandra Ehle - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Alexandra Ehle - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Alexandra Ehle - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Alexandra Ehle - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Alexandra Ehle - S01E05 -

FR - Alexandra Ehle - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - Alexandra Ehle - S02E03 - Episode 3

FR - Alexandra Ehle - S03E02 - Episode 2
