meta.plot:
Alexandra Ehle est médecin légiste à l'IML de Bordeaux. Brillante, fantasque et libre, elle évolue dans cet univers avec une aisance déconcertante. Elle s'est donné une mission : rendre aux morts leur intégrité physique, mais aussi  "humaine", leur rendre justice. Alors, elle mène ses propres enquêtes, en dépit des recommandations de son équipe et des mises en garde d'Antoine Doisneau, commandant de la PJ, qu elle prend un malin plaisir à devancer...

Alex est assistée par le jeune Théo Durrel, fraîchement débarqué à l’IML. Pas insensible à son charme, il fait tout pour la satisfaire, mais il n’est pas franchement à l’aise dans cet univers. Alex et Théo vont former un duo aussi improbable qu’efficace, et tant pis s’ils doivent faire fi des règles de droit élémentaires…

1.title: FR - The North Water - S01E01 - Behold the Man
1.plot: Patrick Sumner, hoping to escape the horrors of his past, finds himself on an ill-fated journey to the arctic that throws him into the path of brutish harpooner Henry Drax.

1.title: FR - The North Water - S01E02 - We Men Are Wretched Things
1.plot: Sumner's adventure turns into a nightmare when one of the crew is murdered. There's no proof, but Sumner can't escape a feeling that Henry Drax is the true culprit.

1.title: FR - The North Water - S01E03 - Homo Homini Lupus
1.plot: A discovery by Sumner sends Drax into a murderous rage. Cavendish proves crucial in Baxter and Brownlee's plan. An arctic storm rages and threatens the safety of the ship's crew.

1.title: FR - The North Water - S01E04 - The Devils of the Earth
1.plot: Drax has a daring opportunity to escape, but must convince Cavendish to help him. Otto's vision coming to life, Sumner hunts a bear, but strays too far into icy oblivion.

1.title: FR - The North Water - S01E05 - To Live Is to Suffer
1.plot: After healing in a missionary cabin, Sumner returns to Hull to demand money from Baxter to start a new life. Can he outrun his demons, and has he really seen the last of Henry Drax?

meta.plot: Henry Drax est un meurtrier brutal résidant sur les banquises de l’Arctique. Patrick Sumner, un médecin de l'armée en disgrâce part en expédition, dans l'espoir d'échapper aux horreurs de son passé. Sumner se retrouve alors à bord du même navire que Drax. Il va devoir lutter pour sa survie.

1.title: FR - Des liens trop étroits - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A forensic psychiatrist is assigned to assess the sanity of a woman accused of committing a despicable crime.

1.title: FR - Des liens trop étroits - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Unearthing some surprising revelations, Emma becomes increasingly sympathetic to Connie's plight.

1.title: FR - Des liens trop étroits - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Emma learns to truth behind Connie's actions and confronts her own demons, but it may not be enough to convince a jury the Connie is no longer a danger to society.

meta.plot: Une psychiatre, Emma Robinson, est envoyée auprès d'une suspecte, Connie, ayant commis un crime odieux. L'accusée déclare n'avoir aucun souvenir de la scène de meurtre. Le médecin doit réaliser une expertise psychiatrique afin de juger sa responsabilité dans cette affaire criminelle.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E01 - Leave Them Kids Alone
1.plot: When 14-year-old activist Veronica Vanderhall is suspended from school, her parents send her to Miss Genevieve’s School for Difficult Girls, which claims to have an impeccable record for rehabilitating complicated girls with a "streak".

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E02 - Parents Are from Mars, Kids Are from Venus
1.plot: Jack and Ronald, 14-year-old best friends, swear their parents get weirder every day. But their embarrassment turns to shock when boys stumble into the adults’ game night and discover their parents dressed in ornate robes, chanting and levitating objects.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E03 - Which Witch
1.plot: As the only witch at her high school, Fiona has learned that the safest way to navigate her teen years is to blend in. She’s over the moon that her secret crush, Emilio, has asked her to the homecoming dance.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E04 - My Monster
1.plot: Outwardly, Olivia appears to be handling her parents’ recent divorce quite well; but inside, she’s anxious and overwhelmed. It doesn’t help that her family’s new place, her mother’s childhood home, has squeaky floorboards, flickering lights and a seriously creepy vibe.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E05 - Unfiltered
1.plot: Lily Renton, the smart yet plain star of her high school’s Quiz Bowl team, often compares herself to celebrities and admires the popular girls at school. Just once, she wishes someone would think of her as beautiful, rather than smart.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E06 - We’ve Got Spirits, Yes We Do
1.plot: Fourteen-year old Ella should be excited about her class field trip to thelegendary Fox Theatre. Unfortunately, her ex-best friend, Zoe, is also going. At the theatre, a tour guide tells the tale of a 1938 fire that claimed the lives of an acting troupe in rehearsal.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E07 - Standing Up for Yourself
1.plot: The idyllic town of Larkinville is tormented by 13-year-old Trevor Larkin, a bully with a menacing scar and massive build. Trevor is particularly pumped when a new student, aka an ideal target, arrives to school.

1.title: FR - De l'autre côté - S01E08 - The Treehouse
1.plot: It’s been nearly a year since Sam’s dad passed away, and after saving up his money, Sam just became the proud owner of his late father’s favorite comic in mint condition. That is, until the neighborhood bully snatches it and tosses it in a puddle.

meta.plot: Une série anthologique en huit épisodes dont les histoires vous étonneront et vous feront réfléchir en vous faisant passer de l’autre côté de la réalité. Dans chaque épisode, vous rencontrerez de nouveaux personnages en pleine découverte d’eux-mêmes ; suivez-les dans leurs aventures pleines de surprises, tandis qu'ils plongent dans les mondes fantastiques des sorcières, des extraterrestres, des fantômes et des univers parallèles.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E01 - Is it a person or a ghost?
1.plot: The one-of-a-kind prototype of Holo falls into Han So-yeon's solitary life, eager to help with anything she needs — if she will allow him.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E02 - I'll help you by your side.
1.plot: Seeing she has a crush on her co-worker, Holo offers to be So-yeon's dating coach. Ko Nan-do monitors their growing bond from his lab.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E03 - What the hell is that woman?
1.plot: Nan-do moves in next door to So-yeon, convinced that being with her has broken Holo, and determined to do whatever it takes to fix him.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E04 - He said he would be by my side.
1.plot: Conflicted about her feelings, So-yeon tries to distance herself from Holo. Baek Chan-sung sends his men after her glasses.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E05 - I only see you.
1.plot: When So-yeon wakes up in the hospital, something's changed about how she sees Holo. He and Ko Yoo-jin urge Nan-do to reveal himself to her.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E06 - I want to be with Holo, and I want to hold hands.
1.plot: So-yeon realizes that loving Holo means certain relationship norms are out of their reach. Nan-do deals with unwanted attention from the police.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E07 - You can't leave her alone in hacking, intrusion.
1.plot: In danger from those attempting to steal the prototype, So-yeon agrees to stay at the lab. Nan-do puts on his best impression of Holo.

1.title: FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E08 - Can I take out the Holo trapped in the room?
FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E09 - Can the three of us be good friends?
FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E10 - There is nothing I can do.
FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E11 - Wherever you go, Holo.
FR - Holo, mon amour - S01E12 - So-yeon recalls the most fearful moment in her life.

meta.plot: Han So Yeon souffre de prosopagnosie ce qui la rend incapable de reconnaître les visages. C'est pour cette raison qu'elle reste à distance des autres, même si elle excelle dans son travail. Un jour, elle devient testeuse bêta pour l'hologramme Holo, la création de Go Nan Do. S'il a la même apparence physique que lui, sa personnalité est totalement différente. Tous trois, au contact les uns des autres, prendront conscience de choses qu'ils ignoraient jusqu'à présent...

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E01 - Wonder
1.plot: Marvel at the wonders of Star Wars through ambient and iconic sounds that fill the galaxy.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E02 - Excitement
1.plot: Embrace a galaxy of excitement through turbulent chases, suspenseful duels, and cacophonous battles.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E03 - The Dark Side
1.plot: Listen to the dark side of the Force as it's used by Sith and other dark warriors.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E04 - The Light Side
1.plot: Listen to the light side of the Force as it's used by Jedi and other Force-sensitives of the galaxy.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E05 - Beeps
1.plot: Witness the many different droids beeping about in a galaxy far, far away.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E06 - Connections
1.plot: Experience the harmonious connections of Star Wars through love, friendship, and alliance.

1.title: FR - Star Wars : Galaxie sonore - S01E07 - Oddities
1.plot: Encounter aliens and creatures that inhabit the galaxy and fill it with ambient sounds.

meta.plot: "Star Wars : Galaxie Sonore" explore l’ambiance d’une galaxie très, très lointaine à travers des thèmes tels que l’émerveillement, l’excitation, l’étrangeté et bien plus. Plongez dans le vrombissement de Coruscant à l’heure dorée, écoutez le côté lumineux de la Force quand Rey entend d’anciens Jedi et assistez aux fracas des duels au sabre laser. Ressentez la nostalgie sonore de Star Wars tout au long de la franchise.
Chelsea l'intello réalise qu'elle a beaucoup à apprendre en matière de bonheur quand elle se voit contrainte d'emménager avec sa pétulante sœur et ses trois colocataires.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E01 - Guess what?! Claire’s sister is coming!
1.plot: Über-intellectual Chelsea reconnects with her sister Claire in California, not knowing her brief stay may turn into something a bit more long-term.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E02 - Get this! Chelsea got a package!
1.plot: Chelsea refuses to get off the couch and snap out of her funk, much to her new roommates' rising frustration.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E03 - Did you hear?! Chelsea ran into Margot!
1.plot: After bumping into her archrival from high school, Chelsea tries to pretend she's the picture of success with some help from her roomies.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E04 - Check this, Mama! It’s a Laura Dern party!
1.plot: An alarming tarot card reading from Solana puts Grant on high alert. Meanwhile, Jayden's hotly anticipated Laura Dern party has an uninvited guest.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E05 - Yikes! Grant asked Chelsea for a favor!
1.plot: Eager to know if Claire likes him, Grant asks a reluctant Chelsea to do a little investigating. Solana searches for a macho Mr. Right.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E06 - Here’s the tea! Jayden found a pottery twunk!
1.plot: Jayden has eyes for a guy in his pottery class. Meanwhile, Solana pushes Chelsea to enter the wonderful world of online dating.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E07 - Guys! It’s a Cody Briggs night!
1.plot: Eager to be part of her roommates' inside joke, Chelsea goes on a mission to learn a little more about a previous tenant.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E08 - OMG! Jayden’s mom is back!
1.plot: Jayden confronts his mother about her online trolling. Meanwhile, Claire worries that Solana doesn't like her new boyfriend.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E09 - Seriously though! Chelsea has writer’s block!
1.plot: Chelsea starts exercising in hopes of breaking through writer's block. Jayden and Claire investigate Solana's suddenly strange behavior.

1.title: FR - Pretty Smart - S01E10 - I mean... just watch!
1.plot: Things come to a head between Chelsea, Grant and Claire. Worried he's addicted to his phone, Solana puts Jayden on a digital cleanse.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E01 - Forever and a Dog
1.plot: When uptight Deputy Marshal Scott Turner inherits Hooch, a giant unruly dog, his new pet destroys his apartment and seems dead set on destroying his career. Scott is desperate to get rid of Hooch, who seems to behave for everyone but him. But when a witness under Marshal protection is kidnapped, he realizes that the dog he never wanted may turn out to be the key to saving the day.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E02 - A Good Day To Dog Hard
1.plot: Scott and Hooch babysit a diplomat's daughter and wind up saving the Olympic Committee.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E03 - Diamonds are Furever
1.plot: Scott tracks down a notorious fugitive jewel thief while Hooch gets obsessed with a squeaky toy.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E04 - In The Line of Fur
1.plot: To impress his ex-girlfriend, Scott and Hooch must protect a grumpy judge from a mob assassin.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E05 - Road To Smell Dorado
1.plot: Scott, Hooch and Xavier get stuck searching for a fugitive in the quirky small town of El Dorado.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E06 - The Fur-gitive
1.plot: Scott hunts for a dangerous fugitive in the woods; Hooch discovers the suspect has a secret.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E07 - To Serve and Pawtect
1.plot: Scott works security for a beloved Senator, while Hooch becomes a viral sensation.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E08 - Arf Appreciation
1.plot: Scott must prove his dog's innocence when Hooch is accused of damaging a valuable painting.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E09 - Witness Pup-tection
1.plot: To stop a deadly assassin, Scott and Hooch must bond with a young witness with autism.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E10 - Lost and Hound
1.plot: When Erica's beloved dog Angel is taken, Scott, Xavier and Jessica must track her down.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E11 - Hooch Machina
1.plot: Scott's future with Hooch is threatened when an investigation of a robotics lab goes wrong.

1.title: FR - Turner & Hooch - S01E12 - Bite Club
1.plot: On the heels of getting captured in episode 111, Scott is desperate to escape and reunite with Hooch. With no way out, he realizes his only hope is to team up with Nuke, an angry pit bull who badly needs a friend. Laura rounds up every person and every dog she can find to rescue her brother, stop Walton, and pull off a daring rescue before it's too late.

meta.plot: Un marshal hérite d'un chien indiscipliné qui l'aide à résoudre des crimes et un mystère familial.

1.title: FR - De l'amour dans l'air - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - De l'amour dans l'air - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Huit histoires reliées entre elles et ancrées dans l'amour sur fond de pandémie.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E01 - Chapter One
1.plot: As the first day of high school approaches, Monse returns from writing camp to find that Ruby and Jamal are on the outs with Cesar.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E02 - Chapter Two
1.plot: An attempted intervention on Cesar's behalf doesn't go quite as planned. Meanwhile, Ruby experiences love at first sight with a friend of the family.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E03 - Chapter Three
1.plot: As Cesar sinks deeper into Oscar's unsafe world, the group deals with the emotional turmoil of attending their first high school dance.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E04 - Chapter Four
1.plot: On Halloween, Jamal persuades the crew to trick-or-treat in swanky Brentwood, where he hopes to uncover clues to a local mystery.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E05 - Chapter Five
1.plot: Self-confessed blabbermouth Jamal gives Cesar a time limit to tell Ruby about what happened with Olivia, but a police lockdown complicates matters.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E06 - Chapter Six
1.plot: As secrets get revealed, the core friend group begins to fracture. Amid the upheaval, Jamal's lies about football finally catch up with him.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E07 - Chapter Seven
1.plot: Ruby becomes obsessed with planning the perfect quinceañera for Olivia, while Jamal finds an oddball ally in his quest to solve the RollerWorld riddle.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E08 - Chapter Eight
1.plot: Cesar spends quality time with Oscar, Monse finagles a baby-sitting job, Jamal edges closer to the truth, and Olivia experiences a fashion crisis.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E09 - Chapter Nine
1.plot: With Cesar's future on the line, Jamal, Monse and Ruby end up in a frantic search around town to find the one thing that might save him.

1.title: FR - On My Block - S01E10 - Chapter Ten
1.plot: Partners switch on more than the dance floor at Olivia's quinceañera, but an act of mercy could cost the friends everything they hold dear.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E01 - Chapter Eleven
2.plot: On New Year's Eve, Monse makes a promise that leaves Cesar at loose ends, Jamal keeps an eye on the money, and Ruby's brother returns with a surprise.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E02 - Chapter Twelve
2.plot: While Jamal, Monse and Cesar search for the missing stash, Ruby's grief progresses into anger, leading him to lash out at a dangerous acquaintance.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E03 - Chapter Thirteen
2.plot: An increasingly anxious Jamal pays a price for unearthing the money. Monse finds a way to help Cesar, and Ruby sends Jasmine on an impossible errand.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E04 - Chapter Fourteen
2.plot: Cesar and Jamal make strange bedfellows, Jasmine helps Ruby find a date for the Valentine's Day dance, and Monse receives a heartbreaking ultimatum.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E05 - Chapter Fifteen
2.plot: An attempt to raise Ruby's spirits works a little too well. Cesar gets advice about Monse. Jamal urges Ruby's grandmother to seek medical care.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E06 - Chapter Sixteen
2.plot: Unsure about accepting Julia's offer, Monse invites Ruby and Jamal over to help her figure things out, but their visit doesn't quite go as planned.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E07 - Chapter Seventeen
2.plot: Baby shower preparations bring out the worst in Ruby's mom. Guilty consciences plague Mario and Cesar, and Jamal worries that the money may be cursed.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E08 - Chapter Eighteen
2.plot: As an old enemy returns to the neighborhood, the friends zero in on a solution to both their dirty money problem and Cesar's unstable living situation.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E09 - Chapter Nineteen
2.plot: With Cesar's options dwindling, he takes drastic measures, prompting his worried friends to put their own Hail Mary plan into motion.

2.title: FR - On My Block - S02E10 - Chapter Twenty
2.plot: Cesar meets his fate head-on, but friendship lines are drawn when he tries to put things right with Monse, who comes to a decision about her future. Title details

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E01 - Chapter Twenty-One
3.plot: After being snatched off the street, Monse, Jamal, Ruby and Cesar come face to face with their kidnapper, who makes them an offer they can't refuse.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E02 - Chapter Twenty-Two
3.plot: The group's new mission brings out Jamal's control issues. Oscar seethes when Cesar bonds with their unexpected house guest. Jasmine makes over Monse.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E03 - Chapter Twenty-Three
3.plot: Jamal gets up close and personal with his suspected stalker. Ruby's moneymaking scheme violates health codes. Monse overindulges with Jasmine.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E04 - Chapter Twenty-Four
3.plot: As the crew narrows down the list of suspects, Cesar asks Monse out on a real date, Ruby stresses over a growing attraction, and Jamal seeks sex advice.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E05 - Chapter Twenty-Five
3.plot: While supporting Monse through a crisis, Jamal zeroes in on a new lead, and Ruby loses his cool. Meanwhile, Oscar tries to negotiate with Cuchillos.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E06 - Chapter Twenty-Six
3.plot: When an old mixtape provides a major clue, the crew infiltrates a music video shoot, where confessions are made, lips are locked, and secrets revealed.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E07 - Chapter Twenty-Seven
3.plot: After realizing Cuchillos's endgame, the group puts a desperate - and dangerous - plan into motion that tests the limits of their loyalty and friendship.

3.title: FR - On My Block - S03E08 - Chapter Twenty-Eight
3.plot: A fraught hike into the woods and a startling discovery pushes the crew toward some difficult decisions that will change their friendship - and future.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E01 - Chapter Twenty-Nine
4.plot: When Jamal muscles in on Ruby's dream of being senior class president, Jasmine goes on the offensive. Oscar warns Cesar of the dangers that lie ahead.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E02 - Chapter Thirty
4.plot: Jamal reconnects with an old friend after the class election turns ugly. Ruby feels smothered by Jasmine's attentions, and Cesar sends Oscar a message.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E03 - Chapter Thirty-One
4.plot: Back in Freeridge for the holidays, Monse receives a rude reminder about why she left. Ruby and Jasmine turn to their friends for relationship advice.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E04 - Chapter Thirty-Two
4.plot: A long-buried secret lands the four friends in hot water. After confronting Monse over a butt dial, Jamal makes an unexpected connection.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E05 - Chapter Thirty-Three
4.plot: Ruby obsesses over Jasmine's mystery man, Cesar deals with dissension in the ranks, and the arrival of sinister-looking letters worries everyone.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E06 - Chapter Thirty-Four
4.plot: With emotions running high, Ruby, Jamal and Monse come clean as Cesar contemplates revenge. Jasmine, meanwhile, prioritizes self-care.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E07 - Chapter Thirty-Five
4.plot: Monse, Jamal and Ruby help Cesar with a grim task during an emotional day that sees relationships change, secrets divulged and decisions made.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E08 - Chapter Thirty-Six
4.plot: After a wild night, Jamal wakes with a fuzzy memory, Monse jumps to the wrong conclusion about Cesar, and Ruby decides to get something off his chest.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E09 - Chapter Thirty-Seven
4.plot: With the prom fast approaching, Jamal searches for the perfect theme and Ruby stresses over finding the perfect date. Abuelita fesses up.

4.title: FR - On My Block - S04E10 - The Final Chapter
4.plot: As Jamal tries to figure out who's following him and Ruby's prom preparations go awry, the friends come together for a final celebration.

meta.plot: Dans un quartier difficile de Los Angeles, l'amitié de quatre ados futés et drôles est mise à l'épreuve quand ils rentrent au lycée.

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E01 - My revenge is done
1.plot: October 16, 1984. The body of Grégory Villemin, 4 years old, is found drowned in Vologne. As journalists flock, the gendarmes follow the trail of a mysterious "Crow"

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E02 - The pack
1.plot: A suspect is arrested, under the eyes of the raging journalists. This arrest sows trouble in the Villemin family. For their part, the gendarmes question the sister-in-law of the suspect...

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E03 - The post office girls
1.plot: While the gendarmes believe they have the culprit in the person of Bernard Laroche, their witness retracts. But an unexpected testimony quickly brings out a new thesis...

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E04 - The abyss of chimeras
1.plot: Sesmat is replaced at the head of the investigation by Corazzi, who is convinced of Christine's guilt. Feeling let down by everyone, Jean-Marie plans to take justice into his own hands...

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E05 - Sublime, necessarily sublime
1.plot: The noose tightens around Christine, while Jean-Marie faces the consequences of his act. The case becomes even more publicized when Marguerite Duras publishes an article.

1.title: FR - Une affaire française - S01E06 - France's most hated woman
1.plot: Christine, imprisoned and pregnant, begins a hunger strike. She then publishes a book to defend herself, while Judge Lambert plays his last cards to finally solve the case.

meta.plot: Une affaire française est une collection anthologique de mini-séries inspirées de grandes affaires criminelles qui ont bouleversé le pays et divisé l'opinion publique.

1.title: FR - L'Imposture - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After the murder of a young mother in London, there's a climate of fear, and catching her killer becomes a national obsession. So police devise a controversial honeytrap fronted by a female officer.

1.title: FR - L'Imposture - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The undercover operation gains momentum as prime suspect Colin Stagg starts to fall for covert officer 'Lizzie James'. But when the honeytrap is compromised, Detective Inspector Pedder must act fast.

1.title: FR - L'Imposture - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Covert officer 'Lizzie' meets suspect Colin Stagg face-to-face and attempts to earn his trust. But as the weeks pass, the pressure she's under starts to take its toll.

1.title: FR - L'Imposture - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: While Colin Stagg is on remand in prison, another horrific murder occurs with some clear similarities. Is Stagg in fact an entirely innocent man?

meta.plot: Afin de résoudre le meurtre de Rachel Nickell poignardée puis violée en 1992, une femme officier mène une enquête sous couverture afin de confondre le tueur présumé. Sous le nom de "Lizzie James", elle va devenir l’appât sexuel de celui qui va lui faire vivre l’expérience la plus dangereuse de sa carrière.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E01 - Of Mice and Men
1.plot: A burned-out attorney gets a second chance for redemption when he agrees to pursue a wrongful death lawsuit against the biggest client of his former law firm.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E02 - Pride and Prejudice
1.plot: Billy scrambles to get his wrongful death lawsuit into court by any means necessary.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E03 - Game On
1.plot: The judge gives Billy only a day to make a compelling offer of proof before he dismisses the lawsuit.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E04 - It's Donald
1.plot: The beginning of discovery unearths a startling new piece of evidence that threatens to unravel Billy's entire theory of the case.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E05 - Cover Your Ass
1.plot: As both sides begin their depositions, more secrets start to come to the surface, threatening to destroy everyone involved.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E06 - Line of Fire
1.plot: Billy has to go to great lengths to secure his physical evidence's safety and preserve his witnesses' credibility.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E07 - Beauty and the Beast
1.plot: With danger mounting around every corner, Billy has to decide whether to head directly to trial or take his chances with a continuance.

1.title: FR - Goliath - S01E08 - Citizens United
1.plot: The trial concludes as former partners and old friends have their final showdown in court.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E01 - La Mano
2.plot: Billy McBride is reluctantly pulled back into criminal defense when his friend's 16- year-old son is arrested for a double murder.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E02 - Politics
2.plot: After a brutal loss, Billy decides to formally take on Julio Suarez's defense but, before he can go back to court, he must get his team back together.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E03 - Fresh Flowers
2.plot: When Billy learns the name of the real shooter, he has to turn to the FBI to help him bring his elusive suspect in for questioning.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E04 - Alo
2.plot: Billy tries a risky strategy to suppress the prosecution's two key pieces of evidence, hoping he can clear Julio's name before trial even begins.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E05 - Who's Gabriel
2.plot: Billy finally gets a witness who can exonerate Julio, but he won't talk unless Billy can convince the prosecutor to give him a deal.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E06 - Two Cinderellas
2.plot: Believing his client will soon be a free man, Billy joins Marisol for a romantic weekend in Mexico, only for his case to fall apart at home.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E07 - Diablo Verde
2.plot: Held hostage by strangers and with no memory of how he got there, Billy has to make a harrowing escape from Mexico.

2.title: FR - Goliath - S02E08 - Tongue Tied
2.plot: On the night of the mayoral election, Billy and his team race to take down the people responsible before they become an unstoppable Goliath.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E01 - The Subsidence Adventure
3.plot: The unexpected death of an old friend takes Billy McBride to California’s Central Valley, where a record drought has made water more valuable than human life.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E02 - Happiness from the Ground Up
3.plot: Billy’s investigation into the Central Valley’s water problem threatens the launch of Diana Blackwood’s almond-based lifestyle brand.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E03 - Good Morning, Central Valley
3.plot: As Billy and Patty begin a class action lawsuit against the corporate farmers, the Blackwoods start dealing with everyone who gets in their way, including Billy.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E04 - Full Circle
3.plot: Flashing back to before the events of the season, Billy has a drunken weekend at the Rising Sun Hotel and Casino, crossing paths with the Blackwoods and their scheme to steal water.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E05 - Argus 2: Battledome
3.plot: As Billy and Patty make their first appearance in court, their class action is threatened when they walk into traps set for them by the Blackwoods.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E06 - Fer-De-Lance
3.plot: Billy and Patty grill the Blackwoods in their depositions, shining a light on their complicated relationship and how they obtained ownership of the county’s water supply.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E07 - Conscious Uncoupling
3.plot: Billy puts Wade Blackwood on the stand and under oath, forcing him to admit every detail of his scheme to steal the state’s water.

3.title: FR - Goliath - S03E08 - Joy Division
3.plot: As Billy and Patty close in on the Blackwoods, Wade tries to cover up their crimes while Diana makes one final, desperate play, regardless who gets in her way.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E01 - Hadleyville
4.plot: Billy returns to his Big Law roots after Patty takes a job at a prestigious white-shoe law firm in San Francisco. Together, they try to take down one of America’s most insidious Goliaths: the opioid industry.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E02 - The Pain Killer
4.plot: Patty finds herself on the hook for Billy’s behavior as he digs deeper into the case.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E03 - Signed, William Hamilton McBride
4.plot: As Billy and Sam grow closer, he discovers that the opioid industry is keeping bigger secrets than he ever imagined.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E04 - Forcibly Removed
4.plot: Billy goes to extremes to keep the case alive, and Sam questions whether bringing him on board was a good idea after all.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E05 - Spilt Milk
4.plot: As Billy faces repercussions from his conduct, he is forced into a truce with an old adversary.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E06 - Rundleworks
4.plot: Billy and Patty take measures to protect a witness, while the partners at Margolis & True scramble to strengthen their case.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E07 - Lawyer Trickery Bullshit
4.plot: When Patty calls a surprise witness to the stand, the defense does everything they can to undermine the witness’s credibility.

4.title: FR - Goliath - S04E08 - It's Time
4.plot: In a final showdown with George Zax, Billy and Patty seek justice for the victims of the opioid epidemic, no holds barred.

meta.plot: Autrefois puissant avocat, Billy McBride est maintenant épuisé et désenchanté, passant plus de temps dans les bars que dans les salles d'audience. Quand il accepte à contrecœur de reprendre un procès sur une mort suspecte contre le plus grand cabinet d'avocat " Cooperman & McBride",  qu'il a aidé à créer, Billy et son semblant d'équipe découvrent une vaste conspiration mortelle, les opposant tous dans un procès de vie ou de mort contre le Goliath ultime.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E01 - The Amulet
1.plot: On Willa Ward’s twelfth birthday, she inherits a beautiful charm necklace that belonged to her mother, who was a witch.  She soon learns 2 bad witches, Wilma and Wanda are after her locket so they can have ultimate power, and she alongside her best friends Scout and Lily turn into cats to escape.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E02 - If the Hat Fits...
1.plot: The girls cross paths with a curious monkey as their journey for answers about the amulet continues. Meanwhile, Wilma and Wanda work to keep up.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E03 - Mrs. Winklepinkle, Substitute Teacher
1.plot: Willa finds the courage to cast spells, resulting in a cuddly surprise… and a hairy disaster. At school, a strange substitute asks about the amulet.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E04 - Adventures in Kittysitting
1.plot: Lucy, Scout and Willa team up for a not-so-normal night of babysitting, complete with a familiar warlock and a total cat-astrophe.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E05 - The Upside Down Classroom
1.plot: Determined to make more of her potion, Willa enrolls in science club — for better or worse. Elsewhere, Willa’s dad faces off with Wilma and Wanda.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E06 - Which Witch Is Which?
1.plot: An unlikely friend guides the girls to a portal, but they also have pumpkin patch plans. Can they cast the right spell to be in both places at once?

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E07 - Winnifred the Wise
1.plot: As a “witch-buster” teams up with a “witch-storian,” Wilma and Wanda recruit new, nosey help, and Willa, Scout and Lucy meet an enchanting mentor.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E08 - The Legend of the Witches of Winding Way
1.plot: Halloween arrives as the thrilling chase for the amulet continues. Willa learns more about her mother. The Witches of Winding Way prepare a wicked plan.

1.title: FR - Chabracadabra - S01E09 - The Halloween Howl
1.plot: Wilma and Wanda wreak havoc on the town, but new words of wisdom restore hope for Willa and the crew. Who will win in a battle of good and evil?

meta.plot: Pour ses 12 ans, Willa Ward reçoit un cadeau miaou-gnifique qui lui ouvre les portes d'un univers de sorcellerie et d'animaux bavards, à explorer avec ses amies !

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E01 - Death in the Cemetery
1.plot: When a retired detective from the Jacksonville Sheriff's Office, is found beaten and shot in a local cemetery, it will take covert surveillance and an undercover sting to bring his killer to justice.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E02 - An Evil Affair
1.plot: At first, the fatal shooting of Linda Marie Brown seems like an open-and-shut case because her teenage stepdaughter, Cinnamon, is found comatose nearby clutching a suicide note.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E03 - Murder on the Trail
1.plot: The partially clothed and badly beaten body of a teenage girl is found hidden near a popular hiking trail.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E04 - Scorned in Sin City
1.plot: A multimillionaire real estate mogul has been missing for three weeks when a bullet-riddled skull is found in the Nevada desert; Las Vegas homicide detectives quickly discover that the missing man is no angel.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E05 - The Preacher's Secret
1.plot: When a women is found in a pool of blood on the bedroom floor, investigators learn just a few months before her death, the FBI had warned the victim someone had tried to hire a hit man on the 'dark' web to kill her. But there's more to this story.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E06 - House of Terror
1.plot: A couple is found bludgeoned to death in bed, and investigators learn the woman's toddler has witnessed the entire thing.

1.title: FR - Le mur des indices - S01E07 - Dead End Alley
1.plot: After a lawyer is found brutally beaten and stomped to death in an alley, detectives are faced with a daunting puzzle that includes theories about prostitution, clandestine groups and contract killing.

meta.plot: Comment les détectives parviennent-ils à reconstituer et à visualiser leurs enquêtes? Cette série captivante vous invite à vous glisser dans la peau d’un détective qui affiche tout sur un mur. Serez-vous en mesure de rassembler tous les indices?

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In Milan, in 1506, Leonardo da Vinci is arrested on charges of having poisoned Caterina da Cremona. After declaring his innocence to Stefano Giraldi, an official of the Podestà, Leonardo recalls his days as an apprentice in the workshop of Andrea del Verrocchio, where he first met the model Caterina.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Leonardo's achievements are recognized and his reputation grows, one risky decision could destroy everything he has worked for. When an unforeseen situation further undermines his reputation as an artist, he sets his sights on the Duchy of Milan and leaves Florence.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Leonardo moves to Milan, determined to obtain the patronage of the Regent Duke Ludovico Sforza. When reality proves to be less attractive than expected and Leonardo is asked to devote himself to a great theatrical performance instead of a painting, it is a new encounter that helps him to free his imagination, allowing him to see in the theatrical production a great opportunity.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Ludovico asks Leonardo to create an equestrian statue in honor of his father, it stimulates his ambition even more, and the artist strives to exceed the expectations placed on him. While working on the work, Da Vinci places his trust in a person everyone would judge unreliable: Salaì, a resourceful young thief.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Following the death of Ludovico's wife, Leonardo is assigned a new commission but struggles to deal with his inner turmoil; after taking on board some wise words from Fr. Luca Pacioli, Leonardo seeks assistance.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Returning to Florence, an uninspired Leonardo accepts to paint the portrait that will become the Mona Lisa; after failing to repair his relationship with Caterina, Leonardo goes to Imola, where he receives much praise from his employer.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Having found Caterina, Leonardo continues his work, but is frustrated by the growing success of a younger artist, Michelangelo Buonarroti. Putting his feelings aside, Leonardo allows himself to be persuaded to accept a new commission.

1.title: FR - Leonardo - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: With time running out, Stefano races to save Leonardo and finally discovers the truth behind his biggest kept secret; armed with the facts but lacking the evidence, an unexpected revelation leaves Stefano turning to an unlikely source for help.

meta.plot: Né à Vinci, en Toscane, Leonardo est devenu un génie inégalé dont les travaux ont renversé l’ordre établi et sont une source d’inspiration encore aujourd’hui. La série cherche à résoudre l’énigme qu’est cet homme aussi extraordinaire qu’incroyablement contemporain, dans une démarche nouvelle et inédite.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E01 - Chapter I
1.plot: As college radio host Samantha White leads the outcry over a blackface party on campus, a revelation about her love life puts her in an awkward spot.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E02 - Chapter II
1.plot: Buoyed by his front-page story on the party, shy reporter Lionel begins to come out of his shell and embrace his true identity.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E04 - Chapter IV
1.plot: As Coco gears up for an exclusive soiree, a fight with Sam stirs up memories of their friendship -- and the differences that drove them apart.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E05 - Chapter V
1.plot: Friends drag Reggie out on the town to stop him from brooding over the revolution and Sam's new beau. But the night takes a harrowing turn.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E06 - Chapter VI
1.plot: Shell-shocked, Sam and company plan a protest against the campus police, while Reggie finds his own way to process the ordeal.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E07 - Chapter VII
1.plot: Picking up on the chemistry between Sam and Reggie, Gabe obsesses over the state of his relationship -- and makes a startling confession to Joelle.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E08 - Chapter VIII
1.plot: To show just how pervasive Winchester's race problems are, Lionel sets out to write a feature on Troy and makes some unexpected discoveries.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E09 - Chapter IX
1.plot: Coco jumps at the chance to join Troy at a party for wealthy donors, but the evening leaves her questioning his priorities.

1.title: FR - Dear White People - S01E10 - Chapter X
1.plot: With tensions running high before the town hall, Sam tries to patch up her relationship, Coco steals Troy's thunder, and Lionel makes a bold move.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E01 - Chapter I
2.plot: In the wake of the town hall protest, Sam finds herself at the center of an alt-right backlash and goes to war with a social media troll.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E02 - Chapter II
2.plot: Still haunted by flashbacks to the house party, Reggie bounces from therapy to Bible study to drinking as he seeks an outlet for his pent-up emotions.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E03 - Chapter III
2.plot: While party-hopping on Pride Night, Lionel struggles to make small talk with strangers and decipher mixed signals from Silvio.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E04 - Chapter IV
2.plot: With her political capital on the rise, Coco sets her sights on a new role. But a startling discovery forces her to rethink her future at Winchester.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E05 - Chapter V
2.plot: Tired of living in Sam's shadow, Joelle strikes up a flirtation with a student outside the A-P circle who treats her like a queen.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E07 - Chapter VII
2.plot: After bombing at a stand-up comedy set, Troy sets out on a shroom-fueled quest to find his true voice, connecting with friends and exes along the way.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E08 - Chapter VIII
2.plot: Gabe finally gets a chance to interview Sam for his documentary, but they both have trouble sticking to their promise not to make things personal.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E09 - Chapter IX
2.plot: A family emergency draws Sam home, where she wrestles with feelings of guilt and stumbles across a piece of Winchester history.

2.title: FR - Dear White People - S02E10 - Chapter X
2.plot: As the campus braces for Rikki Carter's speech, Sam and Lionel piece together the clues they've gathered on the secret society known as Order of X.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E01 - Chapter I
3.plot: With Sam, Lionel and the rest of the crew caught up in their own priorities, Al suddenly feels like the only one fighting for change at Winchester.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E02 - Chapter II
3.plot: While Brooke chases a story on a controversial filmmaker-in-residence, am tries to bluff her way through a big pitch, and Lionel goes on the prowl.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E03 - Chapter III
3.plot: After landing his first cover story in Pastiche, Troy makes an unsettling discovery. Money troubles prompt Gabe to join a campus labor movement.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E04 - Chapter IV
3.plot: After landing his first cover story in Pastiche, Troy makes an unsettling discovery. Money troubles prompt Gabe to join a campus labor movement.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E05 - Chapter V
3.plot: On Parents Weekend, Coco sets out to win a recommendation from the toughest professor on campus -- while contending with an unexpected visitor.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E06 - Chapter VI
3.plot: Troy leads an insurrection at Pastiche, Gade takes a dubious step to raise money for his film, and Reggie makes some improvements to Moses's app.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E07 - Chapter VII
3.plot: As Chester's popularity soars, Lionel tries to convince D'unte and friends that he's ready for the gay "deep end". Sam gets a chance to meet her idol.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E08 - Chapter VIII
3.plot: A sexual assault allegation stirs up fierce debate at Armstrong-Parker House and drives Joelle and Reggie even farther apart.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E09 - Chapter IX
3.plot: Brooke takes a new approach with Muffy, a guilt-stricken Gabe tries to make up for his mistake, and Troy woos an investor for his new magazine.

3.title: FR - Dear White People - S03E10 - Chapter X
3.plot: A bombshell story in the debut issue of Fried Chichanery leads to a moment of reckoning. Sam and Lionel learn there's more to the Order than they knew.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E01 - Chapter I
4.plot: On the first day of senior year, the campus is abuzz with Career Day plans and news that AP House will be producing Winchester's historic Varsity Show.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E02 - Chapter II
4.plot: As Reggie considers a sweet job offer, Joelle seizes a chance to blend faith and science, and Troy makes his pitch to the Black Caucus.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E03 - Chapter III
4.plot: Facing pressure from the Order to make the Varsity Show a hit, Troy finds unexpected inspiration at his mother's gallery opening.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E04 - Chapter IV
4.plot: On "Big House," Coco resists producers' efforts to pit her against Eva. Iesha calls out Sam on her own radio show. Gabe receives a fraught job offer.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E05 - Chapter V
4.plot: Al offers to help Troy and friends wrest control of the Varsity Show back from Miss Bernadette. Reggie strikes up a new friendship.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E06 - Chapter VI
4.plot: As Sam heads to Houston for a fateful trip with Lionel and Michael, Reggie and Joelle are trapped in a stairwell during a campus lockdown.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E07 - Chapter VII
4.plot: Under new direction, the Varsity Show begins to take on a different form. A party thrown by Joelle's sister brings simmering tensions to the surface.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E08 - Chapter VIII
4.plot: Troy's frustrations with his mom take a toll on his dating life. Joelle wrestles with an ethical dilemma. Coco devises a plan to take on Muffy.

4.title: FR - Dear White People - S04E10 - Chapter X
4.plot: Opening night of the Varsity Show yields big surprises and a sobering encounter. In the future, the friends’ reunion takes an emotional turn.

meta.plot: Des étudiants noirs font face aux affronts quotidiens et aux décisions polémiques d'une prestigieuse fac américaine pas aussi "post-raciale" qu'elle ne le paraît.
Set in South Jamaica, Queens, in 1991, this prequel to "Power" revolves around the coming of age of Kanan Stark.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E01 - BACK IN THE DAY
1.plot: It's 1991 in South Jamaica, Queens, and 15-year-old Kanan Stark is eager to join his family's growing drug business, led by his mother, "Raquel Raq" Thomas.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E02 - REAPING AND SOWING
1.plot: After a rival crew member is killed, Raq does whatever is necessary to get the target off Kanan's back.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E03 - STICK AND MOVE
1.plot: Still reeling from a shocking death, Kanan pushes his way into the drug game with Marvin’s help while Raq plots to take down her competition.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E04 - DON'T SLEEP
1.plot: All bets are off when a police raid clears out Raq's competition. Promises are broken, secrets are revealed, and revenge is swift.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E05 - CHOOSE YOUR BATTLES
1.plot: Eager to transform her business after the stash house is hit, Raq overhauls her operation. Meanwhile, Kanan is detained after a fight with Scrappy.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E06 - LEVEL UP
1.plot: Lou's new artist showcase becomes the nexus of the rivalry between Raq and Unique. At the same time, Kanan cooks up a drug-selling scheme with Marvin.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E07 - STAY IN YOUR LANE
1.plot: Kanan and Marvin's side hustle goes awry. Raq seeks revenge for the attack on Scrappy. Jukebox suffers a devastating blow.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E08 - THE COST OF BUSINESS
1.plot: Kanan struggles with a harsh truth after word gets back to Raq that hes behind the bad crack on the streets. Jukebox learns the troubling facts behind Nicoles death. Lou finds himself caught in a crossfire.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E09 - LOYAL TO THE END
1.plot: As Lou recovers in the hospital, Marvin seeks revenge. Feeling the pressure, Raq turns to Kanan to take out the biggest threat to their family.

1.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S01E10 - PAID IN FULL
1.plot: As the situation in the neighborhood turns dire, Raq scrambles to get Kanan out of harm’s way.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E01 - THE MORE THINGS CHANGE
2.plot: Kanan returns to Queens where Raq is trying to mend the many fractures in the Thomas family. As Raq expands her empire, Kanan doubts his future in the drug game. Meanwhile, Detective Howard is released from the hospital.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E02 - MIND YOUR BUSINESS
2.plot: Raq learns she may have a snitch and tasks Marvin with confirming the rumor. Lou brings in a potential new artist, but he and Crown disagree. Kanan helps Famous sell mix tapes. Jukebox tracks down her estranged mother.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E03 - SLEEPING DOGS
2.plot: A surprise encounter with Howard leaves Kanan rattled. Raq tries to expand into new territory, but when an associate and valuables go missing, she is reunited with an old adversary. Lou continues to butt heads with Crown.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E04 - PAY THE TOLL
2.plot: Kanan and Jukebox search for answers in family matters. When Raq’s push into new territory is stalled, she proposes a meeting. Crown helps Famous get settled. Still investigating Howard’s shooting, Burke questions Unique.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E05 - WHAT HAPPENS IN THE CATSKILLS
2.plot: Raq focuses on mother-son bonding with Kanan in the Catskills, but they’re interrupted when business follows them. Crown disrespects Lou, bringing their simmering beef to a boil. Burke digs into Howard’s personal life.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E06 - IT’S A BUSINESS, MAN
2.plot: Raq assures everyone they need to follow orders and keep working as planned. Kanan takes on more responsibility but things go wrong when he runs into neighborhood kids. Lou feels the pressure in his partnership with Crown.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E07 - NO LOVE LOST
2.plot: Raq searches for a new home. Lou finds himself on the other side of his partner's unpaid debts. Burke gains traction in her investigation on Howard. A botched agreement with Marvin and an associate threatens everything.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E08 - A HOUSE IS NOT A HOME
2.plot: The rift between Raq and Kanan grows and Kanan seeks comfort elsewhere. Marvin lays low, waiting for the consequences of his actions to blow over. Raq sees dark clouds on the horizon.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E09 - ANTI-TRUST
2.plot: With his living situation threatened, Famous reaches out to Lou as a last-ditch effort. Raq receives a new business proposal and must eliminate a threat. Burke closes in on what really happened in Baisley Park.

2.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S02E10 - IF Y’DON’T KNOW, NOW Y’KNOW
2.plot: Decidedly his own man, Kanan strays further from his mother and sets up shop on his own on the corners of South Jamaica. Worried about retaliation, Raq questions Unique. Lou's rift with Raq grows when he makes a discovery.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E01 - HOME SWEET HOME
3.plot: Raq makes a life-changing decision in the aftermath of the Mafia’s ambush, but its too little, too late for Kanan, as he looks to pave his own path free of his mother’s lies.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E02 - FLIPMODE
3.plot: Raq continues her farewell tour with one last job for the Mafia while Kanan dives further into the drug game with an innovative business idea. Howard faces a new threat at the precinct.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E03 - OPEN FOR BUSINESS
3.plot: As paranoia sets in for Raq and Howard over the Task Force, Kanan and Famous launch their weed delivery business, Jukebox prepares for her audition, and Ronnie grows impatient with Unique.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E04 - IN SHEEP'S CLOTHING
3.plot: New business ventures take shape for the Thomas family, but the outlook is bleaker for the Mathis brothers as Ronnie’s patience runs out. Raq makes a risky move for Kanan’s obedience.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E05 - BROTHERS AND KEEPERS
3.plot: Tension between Ronnie and Unique comes to a head while Kanan clashes with both Raq and Famous. Juke bonds with her bandmate, and Lou works to revitalize Cafe Vous. Howard’s attempt to manipulate the Task Force backfires.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E06 - INTO THE DARKNESS
3.plot: Dangerous secrets are revealed as Famous unburdens himself to Kanan, and Raq finally tries to make amends with Lou. Marvin struggles with his role as stage dad, and Howard attempts to get closer to the Task Force.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E07 - WHERE ALL ARE GUILTY
3.plot: Lou’s drinking creates a problem for the whole family when Shantel goes looking for justice. Kanan assimilates into Ronnie’s crew, and Raq formulates a new plan for Unique’s former heroin operation.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E08 - RECKONINGS
3.plot: As a despondent Lou becomes a liability for the family, Raq and Marvin work to get the new heroin operation up and running amidst new competition from Kanan and Ronnie.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E09 - HOME TO ROOST
3.plot: Ronnie and Kanan’s feud with Raq intensifies as Marvin desperately searches for Lou. Famous and Jukebox both find themselves at potential turning points in their music careers.

3.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S03E10 - MADE YOU LOOK
3.plot: Desperation sets in as Howard tries to evade the Task Force and Ronnie goes on the attack, leaving Raq and Kanan to make some fateful choices. Ronnie changes his identity.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E01 - Gangstas Don't Die
4.plot: Unique endures a painful recovery fueled by hate and vengeance, as other untold narratives unfold around him, filling in the gaps leading up to the deadly showdown in the season three finale by revisiting events through other perspectives.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E02 - It's All Love
4.plot: With the Federal Task Force seemingly behind them, Kanan and Raq navigate a new business relationship just as Unique begins to plot his quest for revenge. Meanwhile, Lou considers a new music opportunity, Marvin goes too far on a side-job for Stefano and Juke tries to adjust to life in the Army.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E03
4.plot: As paranoia sets in for Raq and Howard over the Task Force, Kanan and Famous launch their weed delivery business, Jukebox prepares for her audition, and Ronnie grows impatient with Unique.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E04 - The Way We Were
4.plot: Unique forms an unlikely alliance in his vendetta against Raq, who inches closer to a new drug enterprise. Kanan takes advice from Snaps and Pop, while Jukebox's new friendship leads to a violent encounter.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E05 - The Nail That Sticks Up
4.plot: Raq and Marvin navigate a dwindling supply of product, while Lou and Imani scout artists together. Joyce's condition worsens. Famous's mother desperately tries to find him.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E06 - The Price of Fame
4.plot: Raq tries to overcome Marvin's poor judgement. Kanan recruits Jukebox to help him to get justice for his friend. Unique assembles the final pieces of his plan.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E07 - Allow Me to Re-Introduce Myself
4.plot: Unique and his soldiers assume control of the corners in Queens, leaving Raq and Marvin in desperate need of more answers and more product. Kanan searches for a missing O-Cee.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E08 - Street Struck
4.plot: Raq goes on the offensive as Marvin and Lou attempt to contain the escalating situations. Jukebox joins the search for O-Cee, while Kanan looks into his theory on what happened to Famous.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E09 - It's About That Time
4.plot: Kanan, suspicious of Raq's involvement, investigates Krystal's disappearance. Raq faces fallout from Unique's retaliation and Marvin's mistake. Jukebox revisits her past, and Lou embraces his new path.

4.title: FR - Power Book III: Raising Kanan - S04E10 - Gimme The Weight
4.plot: A devastated Kanan furiously searches for answers and revenge. Raq attempts to stave off the collapse of her business as she and Lou prepare for a possible war with Unique.

meta.plot: Cinq jeunes infirmiers travaillant dans un hôpital de Toronto ont choisi de dédier leur vie à aider les autres, en oubliant parfois de prendre soin d'eux...

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E01 - Incoming
1.plot: Keon assists a patient who goes into early labour. Naz cares for a victim of the terrorist van attack and helps his mother make a difficult decision. Meanwhile, Wolf tries to reunite missing fingers with their owner.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E02 - Undisclosed Conditions
1.plot: Wolf is assigned to a patient that has lost hope that she will receive a life-saving lung transplant in time. Keon confides in a former football friend about a traumatic incident. Naz is assigned as Sinead's assistant.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E03 - Friday Night Legend
1.plot: Grace to is forced to confront her own past trauma when she encounters a patient whose diagnosis proves to be elusive.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E04 - Chrysalis
1.plot: Grace mediates between a patient's partner and son while adjusting to the unwanted arrival of the new hospital CEO.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E05 - What Size Are Your Feet?
1.plot: Keon gets hazed by Nurse Molly, then gets off on the wrong foot with a patient in handcuffs. Wolf suddenly finds himself under serious financial pressure and considers taking desperate measures.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E06 - Risky Behaviour
1.plot: When Naz realizes her patient has a more serious condition than anyone realized, Naz forms a special bond with the patient's cousin. An over-exhausted and under-slept Wolf struggles on the job and draws Damien's wrath.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E07 - Lifeboat
1.plot: Ashley and Caro explore past relationships. Keon grapples with Molly's attempts to sideline him. Naz tries to balance her emotional connection to a patient with his medical needs. Wolf is forced to leave his comfort zone and care for a newborn baby.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E08 - Achilles Heel
1.plot: Ashley receives an ultra-religious patient who is willing to put himself at peril to appease God, forcing Ashley to reconsider her own religious past. Naz supports a pregnant patient through the hardest decision of her life.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E09 - Mirror Box
1.plot: Keon finds himself supporting his patient's fiancée when a swift recovery has an unexpected side effect. Naz treats a former Olympian whose rare condition requires creative solutions. Wolf helps a frequent flyer with hearing loss.

1.title: FR - Nurses - S01E10 - Lady Business
1.plot: Under pressure to steal more drugs, Wolf is forced into an ethical dilemma in which he is turned against his patient. While trying to protect her patient before a major surgery, Ash is forced to confront Sinead about her drinking problems.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E01 - A Thousand Battles
2.plot: A hospital is a battlefield, as our 5 favorite nurses attack another season. But there's a new general in town - nurse manager Kate Faulkner, who's going to give them all a run for their money.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E02 - Chaos Magnet
2.plot: An Amber Alert rings out at St. Mary's, but unbeknownst to the nurses the perpetrator and the abducted child are in the hospital.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E03 - Night Moves
2.plot: Hospitals are no stranger to the things that keep us up at night or the secrets we keep, as the strange gets stranger on the night shift at St Mary's.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E04 - It's Showtime
2.plot: A high-profile surgical case brings Grace and Ashley into conflict over whether or not the surgeon is capable of performing the surgery.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E05 - Code Orange
2.plot: When a tragic accident at a concert suddenly puts St Mary's in a Code Orange, our nurses will realise how important it is to have someone in your corner, because no one should be alone.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E06 - Ghosts
2.plot: Ghosts from the past make a day at St Mary's especially trying for our nurses as they're each confronted by people or things they tried to leave behind.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E07 - Prima Facie
2.plot: It's Nursing Week and St Mary's nurses and patients alike are confronted by the fact that everyone has a hidden side, and that nothing can be taken at face value.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E08 - Best Day Ever
2.plot: Assigned to the Burn Unit, Naz and Grace are pushed to their limits as Nurses - and friends - when they disagree over how to deal with a critically burned patient who's in danger of losing his will to live.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E09 - The Wish Factory
2.plot: With uncertainty in their personal lives and a pandemic on the horizon, our nurses each deal with people longing for wishes to come true for their health or their loved ones, but they're wishes that may not be in the power of a nurse to grant.

2.title: FR - Nurses - S02E10 - Struck
2.plot: With both patients and the whole Healthcare system on the brink of tragic events, the St Mary's nursing team must put their own struggles aside to help those with everything on the line.

meta.plot: Été 2007, Finlande. Alors que les Kurtti passent leurs vacances annuelles dans leurs cabanes, Tommi, 2 ans, est tué d’un coup de feu. Elias, un voisin de 12 ans, est tenu pour responsable de sa mort. Été 2019, Grèce. 12 ans plus tard, la famille reçoit une lettre anonyme menaçante. Dans la station grecque où ils séjournent, ils tombent sur un homme qui ressemble à Elias, dans la chambre 301. Est-ce vraiment lui ?

1.title: FR - L'homme de la chambre 301 - S01E01 - Letter
1.plot: Risto and Seppo Kurtti receive a threatening letter that takes them back to nightmare from 12 years before. In 2007, Kurtti family has gathered at a summer cottage to celebrate Midsummer. The neighbor's lonely son Elias spies on them.

1.title: FR - L'homme de la chambre 301 - S01E02 - Midsummer
1.plot: Risto receives a new threat message while on a holiday in Greece. An unknown young couple takes Kalle to climbing. In Finland, Seppo meets Elias' father. In 2007, Midsummer celebration will end sadly.

1.title: FR - L'homme de la chambre 301 - S01E03 - Boyfriend
1.plot: Frightened Seppo comes to Greece. Risto believes Leon is  actually Elias. Anna and Tytti have a mysterious company in a party.  In 2007, everyone awakes to Midsummer's Day  in intense atmosphere. Elias has an argument about the knife with his father.

1.title: FR - L'homme de la chambre 301 - S01E04 - Accident
1.plot: Leo takes Kalle to climbing again. Concerned Mikko goes after him. In 2007, Seppo losts his 2-year old son while suffering of a hangover. Elias is accused of the accident.

1.title: FR - L'homme de la chambre 301 - S01E06 - Shotgun
1.plot: Seppo returns to Finland in a hurry. Tytti and Anna have gone missing.  Tragedy happens in Greece, but who is to blame in the end?

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Newlyweds Rio and Mike drop everything (including their jobs and overbearing mother-in-law) to make the move from big city New York to rural Nebraska in search of a simpler life. They soon realize that becoming farmers isn’t as easy as they planned as they are faced with unexpected challenges.

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E02 - The Chicken and the Goat
1.plot: After weeks of researching soil revitalization and coming up with a wonderful plan to make their farm successful, Rio and Mike are forced to find a new strategy when the weather forecast is not in their favor. As Mike tries to focus on addressing the dead soil, Rio attempts to connect with new neighbors at the Bowman's potluck but ends up spicing up her romantic relationship with Mike instead.

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E03 - The Return of Short Shorts
1.plot: Mike attempts to fit in with the Coffee Boys in order to get rid of his old nickname, “Short Shorts,” by trying to prove to them that he’s a “true farmer.” Meanwhile, Rio finally gets Constance to open up to her, and she discovers that Constance has a liking for Rudy.

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E04 - Predators
1.plot: Rio is having trouble adjusting to social and cultural differences between New York and Nebraska, resulting in a few awkward encounters. Through their wild chase to catch an unwanted predator that is after their chickens, Mike and Rio soon convince Rudy and Beau to step out of their comfort zones by getting them to express their feelings.

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E05 - In Hot Water
1.plot: In order to afford a new water heater, Rio and Mike must come up with ways to make money since Mike refuses to let Rio's mom, Donna, pay for it. Mike decides to sell their chickens' eggs at the local farmers market; and Rio tries to find new clients for therapy, but the town doesn't seem to want their business.

1.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S01E06 - The Estonian Method
1.plot: Mike and Rio enter the "best hen" competition at the county fair with their prized chicken Priyanka in order to prove themselves to the community. Meanwhile, romantic sparks fly between Rudy and Constance, only to be halted by a run-in with someone from Rudy's past; and Kay and Beau struggle with some marital issues.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E01 - 459
2.plot: Mike and Rio host the big event of college football season: the town’s Huskers kickoff party. But no one in Bucksnort believes they can pull it off. They might be right when Rio loses Portia, the pig that’s been selected for the lucky pig race. Beau and Kay frantically try to hide the fact that they’ve split up, with mixed results.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E02 - Phase Two
2.plot: Mike and Rio attempt to reignite their love life, after getting pressure about it from Beau; Constance and Rudy grapple with how to unveil their relationship to Constance's son.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E03 - Omaha
2.plot: The ladies head to Omaha for their annual exams, but the trip quickly goes off the rails; Kay is jealous of Beau's new dating profile; Mike, Rudy and Beau bond when an accident leaves them stranded in a tree.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E04 - Bang For Your Buck
2.plot: Mike decides to get back into journalism by reinvigorating the town newspaper.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E05 - Scare Night
2.plot: Mike and Rio first met on Halloween years ago, so now Mike loves to commemorate the holiday by scaring the wits out of Rio all night. Unbeknownst to Mike, Rio actually hates the scares but is afraid to tell Mike. When Rio turns the tables on Mike and tries to scare him into ending Scare Night, Mike gets bitten by a bat and the night escalates from there.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E06 - The Visit
2.plot: Donna springs a last-minute trip to Nebraska on Mike and Rio, which she claims is to relax, but Mike and Rio soon find out she has other plans in mind when she steps into competitive mode to get them to participate in the harvest. Meanwhile, Constance's son Brandon is driving her crazy working at the store, so she pawns him off on Rudy.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E07 - Six Out of Six
2.plot: Mike and Rio are at odds with each other when they consider having a kid of their own; and they soon get a taste of the parenting life when they are forced to take care of Portia’s six piglets. Meanwhile, Kay and Beau may have found common ground during the annual Euchre tournament party

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E08 - The Grisham Gals
2.plot: Rio tries to help Kay get over her jealousy of her sister Stacey who is in town visiting, but soon finds herself jealous of Kay's near-perfect sister when she learns that Mike and Stacey used to date. Meanwhile, Rudy and Constance want to take their releationship to the next Level.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E09 - Goose Glazing Time
2.plot: Mike and Rio are thrilled about having their first Christmas alone as a married couple, but a wrench is thrown into their romanticized holiday plans as they are interrupted by crisis after crisis; Kay invites Beau home for Christmas.

2.title: FR - Bless This Mess - S02E10 - Bad Seed
2.plot: Mike and Rio must decide what seed to start growing on their farm; Rio tries to get Beau and Kay's relationship to set sail; Jacob shadows Constance for a school project, making Rudy a nervous wreck while they discuss catching criminals.

meta.plot: Le projet d'un couple de jeunes mariés de quitter la grande ville pour une vie plus calme dans le Nebraska ne se déroule pas comme prévu.
Espagne, 1981 : Quand un commando armé braque une banque et retient des centaines d'otages, une journaliste veut découvrir le véritable motif de l'attaque avant les autorités.

1.title: FR - Opération Banco Central - S01E01 - Everybody Down!
1.plot: Three months after a failed coup d'état, armed men storm Barcelona's Central Bank, taking hundreds hostage. A young journalist is the first on the scene.

1.title: FR - Opération Banco Central - S01E02 - Off-the-record
1.plot: Maider defies Isabel's orders and butts heads with Berni. Number 1's plan hits a wall as conflicting theories about the attackers' identities emerge.

1.title: FR - Opération Banco Central - S01E03 - Ticktock, Ticktock
1.plot: Isabel takes a risk and publishes Maider's hypothesis. Following a new lead, the police make headway and the Civil Guard presses for armed intervention.

1.title: FR - Opération Banco Central - S01E04 - Number 1
1.plot: As tensions reach boiling point inside the bank, Number 1's past comes to the fore. After raiding a suspect's home, Paco gives Maider a valuable tip.

1.title: FR - Opération Banco Central - S01E05 - Moment of Truth
1.plot: The siege reaches a tense climax. As the government releases an official version of events, Maider fights to uncover the full truth, no matter the cost.

1.title: FR - Une mère parfaite - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Une mère parfaite - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: À Berlin, la vie paisible et bourgeoise d'Hélène Berg bascule à la suite d'un appel téléphonique. Sa fille, Anya, étudiante à Paris, est la principale suspecte dans une affaire de meurtre. Convaincue de son innocence, Hélène prend le premier vol pour se rendre au côté de sa fille. Sur place, elle mène sa propre enquête, aidée de Vincent, un avocat français, mais aussi son amour de jeunesse qu'elle n'avait pas revu depuis vingt ans. Mais au fur et à mesure qu'ils progressent dans leurs recherches, Hélène et Vincent découvrent des preuves compromettantes à l'encontre d'Anya. Le doute s'insinue : et si c’était vrai, et si sa fille était coupable ?

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E01 - Hero Complex
1.plot: Washington, D.C. Detective Alex Cross is called to solve the case when a Black Lives Matter activist is killed in cold blood.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E02 - Ride the White Horsey
1.plot: Emir Goodspeed's murder spreads like wildfire through D.C., catching others in its burn, while D.C.-powerbroker Ed Ramsey seduces his next victim: an art aficionado named Shannon Witmer.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E03 - The Good Book
1.plot: Cross raids a home connected to Emir's murder. The suspect escapes, but leaves behind a piece of evidence so unique, it limits the list of suspects to an elite D.C. few.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E04 - Masks
1.plot: With Cross hot on his heels, Ed Ramsey sets up a new locale to perform his kills, as the Cross family continues to be tormented by a mysterious someone connected to Deirdre Nolan.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E05 - What Happens at Ramsey's
1.plot: Cross and Elle dine at Ed Ramsey's house for his annual birthday soiree. But the night's twists take a dark turn, when Cross realizes that Ramsey's next victim is in the house.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E06 - A Bang, Not a Whimper
1.plot: A fresh lead sends Cross to Philly with his son Damon. Along the way, father and son reconnect through the shared grief over Maria's death.

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E07 - Happy Birthday
1.plot: Cross closes in on Ed Ramsey as the clock desperately ticks down to the moment when Shannon Witmer is set to die. Will Cross make it in time?

1.title: FR - Cross - S01E08 - You Had Me at Motherfucker
1.plot: Cross realizes that his attempt to protect his family has put them in more danger. He races against time to rescue the people he loves.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E01 - Harrow
2.plot: When billionaire Lance Durand's life is threatened, Alex Cross is called into action. But to find the killer, Cross must discover why someone would want to murder the man that feeds America.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E02 - Scatter
2.plot: A break in the investigation brings the team to Chicago, following the man with the haunting grin from surveillance footage. Meanwhile, Kayla's personal mission encounters a tragedy.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E03 - Feed
2.plot: After finding clues in the subway, Cross' team tracks the suspect to Texas where they must work with Homeland Security to uncover another criminal enterprise.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E04 - Harden
2.plot: Two vigilantes meet in a Florida hotel room, and plans are hatched to exact justice. But when their connection endangers both their lives, an impossible decision is made: only one can live.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E05 - Climb
2.plot: A breakthrough brings Cross and Kayla to the remaining vigilante. She'll turn herself in, if Cross meets her at a specific place. But Kayla warns it may be a trap.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E06 - Gather
2.plot: Cross decodes the evidence to learn the vigilante is killing people in a specific order. He rushes to save the next person on the list, before it's too late.

2.title: FR - Cross - S02E07 - Winnow
2.plot: Those on the kill list are rushed to a military base. There, the tightly-packed billionaires turn on each other. Then one reveals a secret that could turn this case on it's head.

meta.plot: Alex Cross, inspecteur de la criminelle de Washington, est confronté à un tueur en série sadique. Lui et son partenaire, John Sampson, traquent ce tueur et une menace issue du passé de Cross apparaît avec de mauvaises intentions.

L’histoire d’Etienne Lantier, enrôlé aux mines de Montsou. Il rencontre les Maheu et tombe amoureux de leur fille Catherine. Celle-ci est courtisée par Chaval, un ouvrier brutal. Quand la Compagnie des Mines baisse les salaires, Etienne, déjà révolté par cette misère, s’insurge. Rêvant de justice, il pousse à la grève. Les semaines s’écoulent, les grévistes affamés luttent, mais victimes d'une répression violente, se résignent à travailler.

1.title: FR - Germinal - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Germinal - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Germinal - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Germinal - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Germinal - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Germinal - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - The Pembrokeshire Murders - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Detective Superintendent Steve Wilkins reinvestigates one of Pembrokeshire's most notorious unsolved crimes, known locally as the Coastal Path Murders.

1.title: FR - The Pembrokeshire Murders - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With Cooper's second parole hearing looming closer, Detective Steve Wilkins and his team face Cooper head-on in three days of interviews.

1.title: FR - The Pembrokeshire Murders - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A long-awaited forensic breakthrough gives Detective Steve Wilkins and his team the ammunition they need to finally arrest and prosecute John Cooper.

meta.plot: Detective superintendent reopens two unsolved murder cases from the 1980s. Forensic methods link the crimes to a string of burglaries. Steve's team has to find more evidence before the perpetrator is released from prison.
