FR - J'ai menti - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot:
Audrey Barreyre, 35 ans, est l’unique rescapée d’un tueur en série qui a sévi dans la région de Biarritz seize ans plus tôt.

Son passé ressurgit brutalement lorsqu’une jeune fille de 17 ans est retrouvée assassinée sur la côte basque en 2019. Rien ne relie ce meurtre au tueur de l’époque, et pourtant, Audrey en est certaine : il est de retour.

Pour le prouver, elle va devoir affronter son passé et ses mensonges.

Car la nuit de son agression, elle a menti.

Sur tout.

À tout le monde…

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Jamie, Pip and the Hiro Valley women honour and celebrate V Day, marking eight years since the virus wiped out all men in the country.

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The mysterious man survives his injuries, but Alex, Jamie and Pip all have very different plans for him.

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Alex gets to know her prisoner, Pip pushes down her feelings, and Jamie makes a choice that costs the women dearly.

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: After the raid on their farm, the women set out to find more male survivors.

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Pip and Alex must put aside their differences to save their friends from the Bounty Hunter.

1.title: FR - Creamerie - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Pip races to rescue her friends and Bobby from the Wellness regime, but a figure from the past arrives to turn their world upside down.

meta.plot: Creamerie se déroule dans un avenir post-apocalyptique où un fléau viral a anéanti 99% des hommes, et la Terre est devenue une planète dirigée par et pour les femmes. Il y aura de quoi rire quand trois femmes kiwi-asiatiques qui dirigent une ferme laitière se rencontrent - choc, horreur - un homme!
La mission d'un jeune soldat préposé à la chasse aux déserteurs révèle la dure réalité vécue par les appelés pendant leur service militaire obligatoire.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E01 - A Man Holding Flowers
1.plot: An Jun-ho's keen eye earns him a position in the Deserter Pursuit unit. On his first mission with Park Sung-woo, things don't go quite as planned.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E02 - Daydream
1.plot: Discharged from the hospital, Han Ho-yeol returns to the base and partners up with Jun-ho to search for a soldier last spotted at a subway station.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E03 - That Woman
1.plot: Jun-ho and Ho-yeol assist with a mission while on break. In an attempt to gain intel, the two go undercover to befriend a deserter's girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E04 - The Monty Hall Problem
1.plot: Relentless hazing shifts Cho Suk-bong's once-warm personality. Riddled with responsibilities, an enlistee jumps the fence at the dead of night.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E05 - Military Dog
1.plot: Suk-bong is pushed over the edge. During their investigation, the D.P. duo learns of events that unfolded at Hwang Jang-soo's discharge.

1.title: FR - Deserter Pursuit - S01E06 - Onlookers
1.plot: When a chase after a deserter turns into a manhunt for a criminal at large, Jun-ho and Ho-yeol rush to find him before armed men bring him down.

meta.plot: En quittant Seattle pour s'installer dans une petite ville de Géorgie, les McKellan se retrouvent confrontés au mode de vie traditionnel de leur famille.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E01 - Remember How This All Started?
1.plot: The McKellans head to a family reunion at M'Dear and Grandpa's house, where Moz, Cocoa and the kids consider a simpler life away from city comforts.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E02 - Remember Charlie Wilson?
1.plot: While cleaning out the attic, Mazzi and Shaka find M'Dear's private mementos from a famous singer -- a discovery that stirs up drama with Grandpa.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E03 - Remember Vacation Bible School?
1.plot: When Moz gifts the kids go-karts, Cocoa is less than thrilled. Jade uses an app to try and outsmart M'Dear, an undisputed "Bible champion."

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E04 - Remember When I Lost My Sister?
1.plot: Cocoa's unconventional beliefs shock M'Dear's Bible-study group. Jade uses sisterly bonding for quality time with Drew -- until she forgets about Ami.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E05 - Remember Grace Under Fire?
1.plot: The family's religious role model, Auntie Grace, reveals her secret passion. When a kitchen fire erupts, Moz teaches the kids the importance of honesty.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E06 - Remember That Crazy Road Trip?
1.plot: The McKellans recall a cross-country move to Georgia that was packed with misadventure, from a weird proposal and a creepy ritual to a frisky raccoon.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E07 - Remember the First Day of School?
1.plot: As the kids start a new school year, Jade takes a stand against a strict dress code, Mazzi opts to redo fourth grade and Shaka eyes a potential crush.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E08 - Remember Macho Mazzi?
1.plot: When Jade competes in a pageant, she recruits a former beauty queen to be her coach. Meanwhile, Mazzi tests his "macho" abilities to impress Moz.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E09 - Remember Black Elvis?
1.plot: After M'Dear shares the family's rich history with the kids, Moz and Cocoa are inspired to carry on the tradition.

1.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S01E10 - Remember When Our Boys Became Men?
1.plot: M'Dear introduces Jade to a new boy, and Mazzi and Shaka find a job to earn extra money. But an encounter with a cop soon has the family on edge.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E01 - Remember Mazzi's First Love?
2.plot: Mazzi and Uncle Daniel set their sights on the same woman. M'Dear becomes obsessed with bingo. An injured Moz considers a return to football.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E02 - Remember When Jade Broke a Nail?
2.plot: A heartbroken Jade joins Shaka's dojo while Mazzi learns to strike back at a bully. Moz looks to repair Cocoa's car on his own, but M'Dear interferes.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E03 - Remember When Cocoa Was a Housewife?
2.plot: Before Moz and Cocoa say "I do" again, Shaka is tasked with keeping the ring, Cocoa confronts her mother and Daniel makes a sacrifice.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E04 - Remember When M'Dear Changed History?
2.plot: When a historic hotel is on the verge of being demolished, M"Dear chains herself in protest and recalls meeting various icons.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E05 - Remember the False Idol?
2.plot: Shaka deals with rejection. A risqué sculpture of Moz and Cocoa drives M'Dear mad. Jade learns her history after receiving her DNA test results.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E06 - Remember When Shaka Did the Robot?
2.plot: Jade gives M'Dear a stylish makeover. Moz and Cocoa stress about funds when Shaka gets into a gifted science program.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E07 - Remember When the Glass Passed?
2.plot: With Principal Glass' untimely passing, the McKellans teach the kids about the circle of life. Mark Curry guest stars in his final episode.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E08 - Remember When Cocoa Found Her Calling?
2.plot: M'Dear takes over Cocoa's Zumba ministry to win a bet. A classmate makes racially insensitive comments when Jade wins a fashion contest.

2.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S02E09 - Remember When the Trick Wasn’t a Treat?

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E01 - Remember When the Skye Fell?
3.plot: The family steps up when Cocoa goes into labor while Moz and Grandpa race back home from Miami. At the hospital, complications arise.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E02 - Remember the New Additon to the Family?
3.plot: A popular rapper asks M'Dear and Jade to sing on his new track. When Aunt Maureen and Tyson visit, the McKellans learn they've been having a tough time.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E03 - Remember Stompin' the Yard?
3.plot: A lovesick Jade makes a plan to surprise her boyfriend. But her solo trip soon turns into a college tour at an HBCU with M'Dear, Mazzi and Tyson.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E04 - Remember the Homecoming Queen?
3.plot: Jeb receives life-changing news that brings the family together. Meanwhile, Tyson's loyalties are divided when Jade runs for homecoming queen.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E05 - Remember When Elvis Broke Jesus?
3.plot: Mazzi and Tyson plot to throw a secret party at the church. While working as Moz's assistant, Jade takes on more than she can handle.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E06 - Remember When the Raccoon Crashed the Wedding?
3.plot: The eve before Maybelle's wedding brings chaos for the whole family as the men take on a pesky critter and the ladies settle disputes of their own.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E07 - Remember When Mazzi Almost Lost It?
3.plot: Mazzi feels pressure to take his relationship to the next level. Jade learns the truth about Tyson's girlfriend. Moz and Cocoa enter a salsa competition.

3.title: FR - Bienvenue chez Mamilia - S03E08 - Remember When Jade Walked in M'Dear's Shoes?
3.plot: When an uninspired Jade clashes with M'Dear, a shocking moment forces both of them to experience life from a new perspective.

meta.plot: La vie d'un homme bascule lorsque sa femme adorée meurt dans un mystérieux accident de voiture à Tel-Aviv.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E01 - Hit & Run
1.plot: As his American wife departs for a dance audition in New York, Israeli tour guide Segev finds his world thrown into chaos by a sudden tragedy.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E02 - Love & Loss
1.plot: Segev begins to question the nature of the accident as more clues emerge to Danielle's mystery caller and the car's driver.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E03 - Friends & Foes
1.plot: In New York, two old friends from the Mexico days help Segev track down the elusive Isaac. The Wexlers host a memorial service at their home.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E04 - Breaking & Entering
1.plot: A visit to the New York dance company sends Segev on a desperate search for clues to his wife's past. In Israel, Assaf is interrogated by his captors.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E05 - Flesh & Blood
1.plot: Tali identifies the man from Segev's wedding video, the police close in on Ron, and Naomi seeks intel from a New York Times reporter.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E06 - Hide & Seek
1.plot: Segev spots a familiar face at JFK and sets out in pursuit. Meanwhile, Tali gets in trouble at work, and Naomi brokers a meeting with the CIA.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E07 - Part & Parcel
1.plot: While reeling from another painful blow, Segev stumbles on secret messages from his wife. Tali learns the truth about why Danielle was targeted.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E08 - Prose & Cons
1.plot: Naomi races to get her story to press in time to save Segev. Tali asks Assaf for help with the Omer situation. Detective Newkirk has an epiphany.

1.title: FR - Hit & Run - S01E09 - Search & Destroy
1.plot: As Naomi decodes the message in the notebook, Tali urges Shira to leave the country. Segev finds himself caught between two powerful forces.

meta.plot: Une anthologie horrifique qui explore la terreur aux États-Unis.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E01 - DAY 1
1.plot: Welcome to Compton.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E02 - DAY 3
1.plot: Henry goes to work. Ruby goes to school. Lucky and Gracie go to the hardware store. Lucky bakes a pie.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E03 - DAY 4
1.plot: Henry surprises the girls. Lucky goes to Hazel’s. Betty makes an impression. Lucky takes the bus.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E04 - DAY 6
1.plot: Lucky visits Helen. Henry gets good news. Ruby and Doris share a secret. Lucky meets Ella Mae.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E05 - COVENANT I.
1.plot: Helen goes to work. The Emorys leave North Carolina.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E06 - DAY 7: MORNING
1.plot: Lucky does Gracie’s hair. Henry has a beer with a new friend. Ruby tries out. Betty phones a friend.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E07 - DAY 7: NIGHT
1.plot: Henry goes for a walk. Betty visits George. Hazel visits Lucky. Henry makes a discovery.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E08 - DAY 9
1.plot: Marty and Earl have a chat. George makes chicken dinner. Henry and the girls come home.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E09 - COVENANT II.
1.plot: Welcome to Eidolon.

1.title: FR - Eux - S01E10 - DAY 10
1.plot: The house on Palmer Drive.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E01 - Are You Scared?
2.plot: LAPD Homicide Detective Dawn Reeve investigates a gruesome murder in a foster home. It already feels like she’s bringing her case home with her. Meanwhile, Edmund Gaines, a struggling actor, pursues a new role… and a new friend.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E02 - The Devil Himself Visited This Place
2.plot: Dawn’s investigation unearths a gruesome discovery. Kel is woken by a strange broadcast. Edmund gets his first taste of attention.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E03 - The Man With the Red Hair
2.plot: Dawn gets her first description of the killer. Edmund has a big audition.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E04 - Happy Birthday, Sweet Boy
2.plot: Dawn discovers a shocking family secret. Edmund surprises someone from his past, sending him on a dangerous spiral.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E05 - Luke 8:17
2.plot: A shocking phone call sends Edmund past the point of no return. Dawn follows an unexpected lead that brings her closer than ever to the killer.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E06 - Would You Like to Play a Game?
2.plot: Dawn becomes the target of her own investigation. The killer sets his sights on Kel.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E07 - One of Us Is Gonna Die Tonight
2.plot: Evil comes home to roost.

2.title: FR - Eux - S02E08 - The Box
2.plot: Will Dawn discover the truth in time to stop the killer… or become his final victim?

meta.plot: Dans la tourmente de la Seconde Guerre mondiale, la princesse héritière norvégienne en exil Märtha transcende ses obligations de princesse et de mère pour devenir une figure influente de la politique mondiale, faisant tout ce qu'elle peut pour influencer la décision du président Roosevelt d'entrer en guerre et d’y mettre fin.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E01 - The Attack
1.plot: Norwegian Crown Princess Martha and her husband Prince Olav visit U.S. President Franklin Roosevelt in 1939. A year later they must flee the Nazi invasion of their country.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E02 - Thronefall
1.plot: Martha and her children take refuge in Sweden, but a Nazi threat still looms.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E04 - Fire and Water
1.plot: Martha is pressured to exploit her friendship with the president.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E05 - Empty Promises
1.plot: Martha uses dinner-table tactics to help Norway. The president gets on dangerous ground.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E06 - The Storm
1.plot: As America enters the war, people grow suspicious of Martha’s ties to the president.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E07 - The Gift
1.plot: A Nazi agent slips through the cracks. Martha travels to England and gets a shock.

1.title: FR - Atlantic Crossing - S01E08 - Homeland
1.plot: The president’s health takes a bad turn. Olav faces rocky relations with Martha.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E01 - Hydra
1.plot: Marianne and Axel travel to the Greek island of Hydra. Leonard leaves Montreal in search of fortune on the same island.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E02 - In Love
1.plot: Marianne is pregnant with Axel's child and travels back to Norway to say goodbye to her dying father. Leonard is in love from afar.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E03 - First Kiss
1.plot: Axel leaves Marianne and his son to go on a sailing trip with his mistress. Marianne finds comfort in Leonard.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E04 - Oslo
1.plot: Marianne needs to travel back to Norway and Leonard comes along. The road trip through Europe brings them closer together, but Leonard quickly becomes restless in Oslo.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E05 - The Cohen Family
1.plot: Marianne is reunited with Leonard in Montreal, but struggles to adapt to the city. Leonard becomes evasive when she delivers big news.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E06 - The Return to Hydra
1.plot: Leonard collapses after an intense period of writing. To save his career, he must go to Montreal to promote the book, with or without Marianne.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E07 - Chelsea Hotel
1.plot: Leonard goes to New York and experiences a fateful meeting at the Chelsea Hotel. Marianne feels abandoned at Hydra and seeks solace elsewhere.

1.title: FR - À Marianne de Leonard - S01E08 - So Long, Leonard
1.plot: Leonard secures a record deal, but the substance abuse continues. Marianne goes to New York to help him.

meta.plot: À MARIANNE DE LEONARD raconte l’histoire d’amour légendaire du chanteur et poète canadien Leonard Cohen et d'une femme norvégienne extraordinaire, Marianne Ihlen. C’est l’histoire intime de deux personnes solitaires qui tombent amoureuses l’une de l’autre dans une période de leur vie où elles tentent de comprendre qui elles sont et quelle est leur place dans le monde.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E01 - Something Wrong
1.plot: After an incident at his school, Kama is forced to move Jaś to a school for kids with special needs.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E02 - Online
1.plot: When Ula broadcasts Kama's newfound situation to her followers, it prompts a myriad of unwanted opinions from friends and family.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E03 - The Challenges
1.plot: Kama grows frustrated when a field trip reveals flaws in Wonderful Harbor's schooling system, prompting an unlikely alliance.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E04 - Failure
1.plot: With a new injury, Kama finds it harder than ever to stay on top of her parental duties. Hela's Birthday party pushes the parents to breaking point.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E05 - #protest
1.plot: Tatiana finally has a tough conversation with her husband, while Ula organises a protest on behalf of the students.

1.title: FR - Les Mères pingouins - S01E06 - Knockout
1.plot: Ula discovers who her anonymous donor is, just as Wonderful Harbor makes a devastating announcement.

meta.plot: Quand son fils de sept ans change d'école, une combattante de MMA comprend que le combat le plus difficile ne l'attend pas dans l'octogone, mais dans son quotidien de mère.

1.title: FR - Secrets de famille - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When recently-widowed Vivien announces her love for a new man, Mark, it throws her family of adult children into chaos.

1.title: FR - Secrets de famille - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Vivien shocks her children by announcing she plans to sell their childhood home and go travelling with Mark. Each of the three siblings also has personal problems of their own to contend with - Helen's actions at work are beginning to have an impact on her marriage, Jake is shocked to discover that Leila might be moving on, and Natalie's affair starts to threaten her physical safety

1.title: FR - Secrets de famille - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The children's ongoing distrust starts to put a strain on Vivien and Mark's relationship. Meanwhile, Natalie struggles deal with her situation with Tony, and Jake turns to Stella for advice. Later, Jake unearths a darkly disturbing secret about Mark's past.

meta.plot: Chair et sang est l'histoire moderne de trois frères et sœurs adultes - Helen, Jake et Natalie - qui sont jetés dans le désarroi lorsque leur mère Vivien, récemment veuve, déclare qu'elle est amoureuse d'un nouvel homme.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E01 - Bool Hunt
1.plot: Lisey Landon begins to face repressed realities about her late husband, novelist Scott Landon, two years after his death.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E02 - Blood Bool
1.plot: Lisey calls Professor Dashmiel to warn him about Jim Dooley, who is already close at hand.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E03 - Under the Yum-Yum Tree
1.plot: The bool hunt leads Lisey to a moment from her past, when Scott shared a confession about his family and traumatic childhood.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E04 - Jim Dandy
1.plot: After a terrifying experience, Lisey opens up the gates of her memory to find answers in Scott’s world of Boo’ya Moon.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E05 - The Good Brother
1.plot: Scott takes Lisey back to when she first learned about Boo'ya Moon and reveals the horrifying truth about his family's past.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E06 - Now You Must Be Still
1.plot: With Darla's help, Lisey sets out to rescue Amanda so the three sisters can unite to take on Jim Dooley.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E07 - No Light, No Spark
1.plot: Two years after Scott’s death, Lisey must again confront mortality. But this time, she has a plan—and it involves Boo’ya Moon.

1.title: FR - Histoire de Lisey - S01E08 - Lisey's Story
1.plot: Lisey faces Dooley and discovers Scott’s final gift to her.

meta.plot: Deux ans le décès de son époux, Lisey, à la suite d'une série d’événements, doit faire face à certaines réalités de son mari qu’elle avait occultées...

Un homme pris entre deux mondes et deux cultures. Un noble, un héros, un mercenaire, un vassal, mais aussi un homme qui aurait pu être roi. El Cid avait des siècles d'avance sur son temps et a été transcendé par sa propre légende.

1.title: FR - Le Cid - S01E01 - The Conspiracy
1.plot: It’s the mid-11th Century. Ruy es a young man who has just been named squire to Prince Sancho, King Fernando of León’s eldest son. One night he discovers that someone he loves is involved in a conspiracy to overthrow the King. From then on, Ruy is caught between his loyalty to duty and to his heart.

1.title: FR - Le Cid - S01E02 - The Ordeal
1.plot: Flaín is wants the man who upset the conspiracy. Rodrigo knows it was his grandson, which is why he intends to send him off to Vivar. On the other hand, Ruy resists leaving the King at the expense of Flaín, as he sees the only solution being to end the Count of León’s life. When it looks like everything is about to kick off, the Navarre troops turn up at the border and declare war against León.

1.title: FR - Le Cid - S01E03 - Baraka
1.plot: Fernando sends his son, Sancho, with a small army to Zaragoza to confront his brother, Ramiro, the King of Aragon. Before leaving with Sancho, Ruy reveals to the King that Flaín tried to kill him. Fernando starts to investigate who betrayed him. Meanwhile, Ruy leaves León ignorant to the fact Flaín sent a hitman within the troop to kill him.

1.title: FR - Le Cid - S01E04 - Champion
1.plot: The Castile tropos with Sancho and Ruy fight an outnumbered battle against the Aragonese. When all seems lost, the outcome seems totally unexpected. In León, Fernando discovered who was conspiring against him.

1.title: FR - Le Cid - S01E05 - Atonement
1.plot: After Fernando’s subsequent illness, Sancho and his troops return to León. Ruy tells his grandfather that Flaín sent someone to kill him. Rodrigo knows his grandson’s life is in danger. Flaín, on the other hand, doesn’t give up on his mission to conspire against the dying King and decides to attempt seizing power before his death. He is unaware that Urraca still has a card to play.

2.title: FR - Le Cid - S02E01 - Promises and Temptations
2.plot: After the assassination of Flaín, the Count of Leon, many point at Ruy as the culprit. Meanwhile, the one from Vivar is forced to go back to Zaragoza, where he was sentenced to death for having lain with Amina, the Emir’s daughter. In Leon, Urraca finds out that Jimena and Ruy are in love, and schemes a plan to gain benefit from this information.

2.title: FR - Le Cid - S02E02 - The Burden of Duty
2.plot: Alfonso, following Urraca’s advice, has one last tempting card up his sleeve to get Ruy to stay in Leon by his side: breaking off Jimena’s betrothal to Orduño and blessing her marriage to Ruy. Ruy will get everything he wants, but in exchange he will have to betray Sancho. Meanwhile, the Arabs, who are looking to destabilize the Christian kingdoms, tell Sancha that the King was poisoned.

2.title: FR - Le Cid - S02E03 - Wind of War
2.plot: After Sancha’s death, the war between the three brothers is imminent. Sancho sets out to attack Galicia, but in order to do that he must pass through Leon. Alfonso can’t decide whether to leverage that moment and attack him or to let him through. Meanwhile, Ruy struggles with the passion between him and Amina, and the pain that Jimena’s betrothal to Orduño is causing him.

2.title: FR - Le Cid - S02E04 - Ambush
2.plot: After Ruy’s decisive intervention in the battle, Sancho of Castile takes Galicia from his brother García. But this does not bring peace to the Iberian Peninsula. On the contrary: the final battle between Leon and Castile is approaching. Meanwhile, Ruy is forced to betray Amina.

2.title: FR - Le Cid - S02E05 - The Path of Hate
2.plot: Sancho has decided to execute his brother Alfonso and the rest of Leonese nobles who support him, including Orduño. As soon as Alfonso is dead, Sancho will be crowned King of Leon, and as a reward for his services, he offers Ruy the title of Count when Orduño is executed. He can finally get everything he has dreamed of: nobility, lands… and Jimena. But there is something Ruy isn’t counting on.

meta.plot: Vendeuses de talent ou viles arnaqueuses ? Wanna Marchi et Stefania Nobile sont devenues les reines incontestées du téléachat italien… puis elles ont dépassé les bornes.

1.title: FR - Fortune Seller: A TV Scam - S01E01 - Tummy Melter
1.plot: She came from nothing and married young. With a cheating husband and no money to her name, Marchi has to get creative to support her family.

1.title: FR - Fortune Seller: A TV Scam - S01E02 - Devils
1.plot: Her shop was burned. Her daughter was threatened. But with some help, Marchi rebuilds her empire. However, allegations of unsavory practices swirled.

1.title: FR - Fortune Seller: A TV Scam - S01E03 - Magician
1.plot: Marchi is now selling fortune itself, and people believe her — until some journalists look to expose her. But is there more to the investigation

1.title: FR - Fortune Seller: A TV Scam - S01E04 - Evil
1.plot: The empire crumbles and Marchi is arrested for fraud and extortion. The trial becomes a national spectacle as victims testify about the hurt she caused.

meta.plot: Une météorite se dirige vers l'Europe... Que feriez-vous s'il ne vous restait que huit jours à vivre avant son impact sur la Terre ? Alors que le monde sombre dans l'anarchie, ces huit derniers jours sont racontés à travers les yeux d'une famille berlinoise qui tente de survivre au chaos.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E01 - Panic
1.plot: Asteroid "Horus" is due to impact the earth in 8 days. Chaos breaks out in Germany, Family Steiner wants to flee the country.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E02 - Separation
1.plot: The Steiners have been separated. Uli and Jonas are heading for Russia, Susanne and Leonie are returning to Berlin. Herrmann is fighting for flight tickets to the USA.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E03 - Belief
1.plot: The trajectory of Horus has changed but Uli can't turn around without Jonas. Back in Berlin, Leonie and Nora are experiencing an end of time party.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E04 - Hope
1.plot: Uli and Jonas return to Berlin where survival appears possible again. The government announces a fair lottery for the distribution of bunker spots.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E05 - War
1.plot: Petra exposing government actions causes riots and the Steiner's joy over getting a space in a bunker doesn't last long. Meanwhiile, a growing amount of followers find their last hope in Robin.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E06 - Desperation
1.plot: The Steiners returned home, all attempts to save themselves have been futile. With the end approaching, Susanne and Uli end up in a severe fight.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E07 - Absolution
1.plot: Susanne tries one last attempt to save her children. She is willing to do whatever it takes. Herrmann vows his love to Marion.

1.title: FR - 8 Jours - S01E08 - Peace
1.plot: Finale: The last day of the world as we know it. Herrmann tries to change their destiny once again. Is a miracle possible?

meta.plot: Daryl washes ashore in France and struggles to piece together how he got there and why. The series tracks his journey across a broken but resilient France as he hopes to find a way back home. As he makes the journey, though, the connections he forms along the way complicate his ultimate plan.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E01 - L'âme Perdue
1.plot: Daryl Dixon's arrival in France puts a young boy under the care of nuns in danger.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E02 - Alouette
1.plot: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent, and Sylvie face trouble on the road. Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared. Laurent struggles to fit in.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E03 - Paris sera toujours Paris
1.plot: The group arrives in Paris, where Isabelle confronts her past while growing closer to Daryl. Codron seeks help from the leader of a growing nationalist movement called Pouvoir, putting the Union of Hope and Laurent under dangerous scrutiny.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E04 - La Dame de Fer
1.plot: Daryl and Isabelle must negotiate with Quinn, the proprietor of the underground Demimonde club - the last vestige of art and expression in Paris.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E05 - Deux Amours
1.plot: Daryl faces old demons, recalling the circumstances that landed him in France. Isabelle's sacrifice forces her to consider drastic measures. Genet commences a celebration for the people of Paris.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S01E06 - Coming Home
1.plot: Genet solidifies her base of power. Before Daryl can return to America, he has a job to do.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E01 - The Book of Carol: La gentillesse des étrangers
2.plot: Carol maps a path toward Daryl. Daryl, Isabelle, and Laurent define their roles at the Nest.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E02 - The Book of Carol: Moulin Rouge
2.plot: Carol and Ash take an unexpected detour. Daryl and Isabelle uncover a new threat at the Nest.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E03 - The Book of Carol: L'invisible
2.plot: Carol hunts for information. Daryl and Isabelle race to save one of their own. Pouvoir regroups.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E04 - The Book of Carol: Le Paradis Pour Toi
2.plot: All hope feels lost amidst Genet's attack on the Nest.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E05 - The Book of Carol: Vouloir, C'est Pouvoir
2.plot: A new faction of survivors hunt down Laurent. Carol's lies come to a head.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S02E06 - The Book of Carol: Au Revoir Les Enfants
2.plot: An exit strategy is charted from France.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E01 - Costa Da Morte
3.plot: A chance encounter provides a potential way home; Daryl makes a tough decision.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E02 - La Ofrenda
3.plot: Shipwrecked in Spain, Daryl and Carol seek refuge in a peaceful village.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E03 - El Sacrificio
3.plot: Daryl focuses on getting home while Carol gets more invested in Solaz.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E04 - La Justicia Fronteriza
3.plot: Daryl and Carol disagree on how to move forward.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E05 - Limbo
3.plot: Carol helps Antonio and Roberto while Daryl journeys into the desert in search of someone.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E06 - Contrabando
3.plot: Daryl and Paz in Barcelona; Carol and Antonio face the fallout of Solaz.

3.title: FR - The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon - S03E07 - Solaz del Mar
3.plot: Our heroes fight to protect the people they love.

meta.plot: Seiya and the Knights of the Zodiac rise again to protect the reincarnation of the goddess Athena, but a dark prophecy hangs over them all.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E01 - SEIYA
1.plot: After exhibiting special powers, Seiya is approached by the enigmatic Alman Kido, who urges him to fulfill his destiny and become a Bronze Knight.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E02 - Burn Your Cosmo
1.plot: Seiya obtains the Pegasus Armor with ease, but to be a true Knight of Athena, he must first prove himself in the Galaxian Wars tournament.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E03 - Enter the Dragon
1.plot: Believing in the dark prophecy, Magnus confronts Lady Sienna. Seiya faces his toughest opponent yet: Dragon Long.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E04 - Nebula Chain
1.plot: Reluctant to fight, Andromeda Shaun takes a defensive approach against Unicorn Jab using her Nebula Chain. Meanwhile, Vander's army attacks.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E05 - The Black Knights
1.plot: Seiya takes down a helicopter to retrieve the stolen Gold Armor from Phoenix Nero, only to be confronted by Vander's Black Knights.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E06 - Phoenix Rising
1.plot: Phoenix Nero has built up his overwhelming power with hate. To stop him, the Bronze Knights must combine their strength to reclaim the Gold Armor.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E07 - The Silver Knights
FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E08 - The Rising Tide
FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E09 - To Fight for Athena
FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E10 - The Challenge
FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E11 - The Prophecy
1.plot: Graad assembles his own Black Knights to protect mankind from the gods. When his forces abduct Sienna, the Bronze Knights set out to rescue her.

1.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S01E12 - One War Ends, Another Begins
1.plot: The Bronze Knights face Graad's upgraded Black Knights. Though Seiya and the others gain the upper hand, Graad proves to be a formidable foe.

2.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S02E01 - The Twelve Houses
2.plot: Athena is attacked by a godslayer arrow and Seiya and company must fight against the Gold Knights to save her.

2.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S02E02 - The Seventh Sense
2.plot: Seiya faces Aldebaran in the House of Taurus to go ahead and save Athena, but his rival is really powerful.

2.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S02E03 - Andromeda Island
2.plot: While Seiya and the others have trouble dealing with Gemini, the action also takes place on Andromeda Island.

2.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S02E04 - Cold Hearted
2.plot: Shun confronts the Gemini Gold Knight while Hyoga mysteriously reappears before Camus, his former master.

2.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S02E05 - The Land of the Dead
2.plot: Shiryu goes ahead and arrives at the House of Cancer, where his corresponding Gold Knight is waiting for him ready to kill him.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E01 - The Cygnus and the Scorpion
3.plot: Seiya and his friends arrive at the House of Scorpio and engage in a deadly battle with the Gold Knight, Milo.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E02 - Jab's Courage
3.plot: Former rivals of the Bronze Knights, Jabu and the others come together to help the goddess Athena.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E03 - Return to the Land of the Dead
3.plot: Although there are four hours left before the god-killing arrow pierces her heart, Saori is on the brink of death. Meanwhile, Seiya meets Cleo, a mysterious woman who learns about Saori's crisis.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E04 - Aiolos's Last Word
3.plot: Seiya and the other Bronze Knights encounter an unexpected enemy, Aiolos, the Gold Knight of Sagittarius. The four end up being transported to their respective training camps...

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E05 - A Leap of Faith
3.plot: Just as they pass through the House of Capricorn, Dragon Shiryu becomes separated from Seiya and his companions as a huge crack tears through the earth...

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E06 - Absolute Zero
3.plot: Hyoga confronts his master, the Gold Knight of Aquarius, Camus, and challenges him to a battle for his life.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E07 - Demon Roses
3.plot: Shun and Seiya arrive at the House of Pisces. There, Shun tells Seiya to move on, while he faces Aphrodite, the Gold Knight who killed his master Daedalus.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E08 - Andromeda's Sacrifice
3.plot: In the House of Pisces, Andromeda Shaun continues her life-and-death battle against her master’s killer, Gold Knight Aphrodite. In the midst of the struggle, Shaun flashes back to the events in her past that molded her and made her who she is.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E09 - Death Match in the Grand Master’s Chambers
3.plot: Seiya is near-death, downed by the deadly Demon Roses. He must find a way to stay alive and survive as he nears his goal - to reach the Grand Master.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E10 - The Man with Two Faces
3.plot: As the final flame on the clock tower is about to burn out, Seiya confronts the Grand Master and discovers his shocking true identity. In the face of the Grand Master’s overwhelming power, Seiya must dig deep if he hopes for any chance of victory.

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E11 - The Face of the Grand Master
3.plot: Phoenix Nero returns to join the battle against the Grand Master. The two battle as more secrets are revealed about the Grand Master’s fate. But as both Sienna and Seiya lie near-death, is it all too little too late?

3.title: FR - Saint Seiya : Les Chevaliers Du Zodiaque - S03E12 - To Save Athena!
3.plot: At the top of Sanctuary, time has almost run out and the epic battle is nearly ended. Now the fate of the universe hangs in the balance as Seiya makes one final desperate attempt to save Saori.
