meta.plot: Un homme accepte une offre d'emploi dans une ferme biologique très prospère à Jordnära. Il s'agit d'une communauté idyllique et fermée au reste du monde. L'homme en question se rend vite compte que le mode de vie des résidents est peu conventionnel.

1.title: FR - Partisan - S01E01 - Johnny Be Good
FR - Partisan - S01E02 - Tinnitus
FR - Partisan - S01E03 - Jaune du Doubs
FR - Partisan - S01E04 - Missing People
FR - Partisan - S01E05 - Ashes to ashes, dust to dust
FR - Run the World - S01E01 - Phenomenal Women
1.plot: Failed novelist Ella McFair starts her first day at HotTeaDigest dot com and enlists her friends to help her cover her first assignment.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E02 - Because... ADOS
1.plot: Renee updates Ella and Sondi on the status of her troubled marriage while Whitney struggles to balance work and her pending nuptials.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E03 - What a Co-inky-dick
1.plot: The girls throw Ella a karaoke party for her 32nd birthday where uninvited guests cause Whitney and Ella to spiral.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E04 - I Love Harlem
1.plot: Whitney, Ella, Sondi and Renee brunch, shop, drink and dance in Harlem on a perfect uptown Saturday.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E05 - Plus Ones
1.plot: Sondi and Matthew host a party for their academic peers; chaos ensues at Whitney's final bridal dress fitting

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E06 - My Therapist Says...
1.plot: Whitney, Sondi, Ella and Renee attend therapy with a savvy, blunt, upper-west side therapist, Dr. Nancy Josephson.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E07 - What You Wish For
1.plot: Ella makes a career choice that has startling repercussions in her personal life. Renee makes a big decision for her career.

1.title: FR - Run the World - S01E08 - Almost, Lady, Almost!
1.plot: Ella, Renee, Sondi and Hope get wild and crazy at Whitney's bachelorette party, but the bride is nowhere to be found.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E01 - A Dream Deferred
2.plot: Whitney anxiously awaits the fate of her relationship, while Sondi and Renee are reminded by Ella that it’s never a bad time to choose yourself.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E02 - Honeymoon's Over
2.plot: With the respective stresses of starting her own agency and adapting to Naomi's presence, Renee and Sondi enlist the help of Hope to snap Whitney out of her sadness spiral and moving on with her life after Ola.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E03 - Back to Business
2.plot: The ladies focus on their careers as Renee starts her solo agency, Whitney returns to work and Sondi gets an opportunity to shine at school.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E04 - My New Therapist Says...
2.plot: Sondi, Whitney and Renee visit their new therapist, Dr. Monica Mitchell, who helps them process the crossroads they have reached in their lives and relationships.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E05 - Homecoming
2.plot: Renee, Sondi and Whitney look to move on with the next chapters in their lives as “single” women, when they are shocked by the untimely passing of Renee’s grandmother.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E06 - A New Hope
2.plot: Hope surprises the ladies by announcing that she’s getting married in two days to an artist she met in Tulum. Whitney questions her best friend’s spontaneous decision, while Renee is reminded of her past love for Jason.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E07 - A Rage in Harlem
2.plot: Whitney throws a housewarming party, as she attempts her first relationship after Ola. Sondi can’t avoid her ex and Renee wants to get hers back.

2.title: FR - Run the World - S02E08 - No Regrets
2.plot: Renee, Whitney and Sondi attend the listening party for Jason’s band, determined to push forward with no regrets.

meta.plot: Un groupe de meilleures amies afro-américaines d’une trentaine d’années, intelligentes, drôles, dynamiques et farouchement loyales vivent, travaillent et s’éclatent à Harlem. Alors qu’elles rêvent de conquérir le monde, elles font face à des hauts et des bas dans leur carrière, font de nouvelles rencontres et connaissent des peines de coeur qui vont les amener à se poser des questions sur leur vie : qui sont-elles et où vont-elles ?

1.title: FR - Et si c'était mon fils ? - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A woman on the edge seeks her missing son. Jodie believes a teenager she has seen is her son who has been missing for nine years, and she begins a plan to get him back.

1.title: FR - Et si c'était mon fils ? - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Jodie uses a private lesson gives Daniel to quiz him about his past. Jodie's family urge her to accept that her son is dead. An incident at school gets them looking deeper into Jodie's background.

1.title: FR - Et si c'était mon fils ? - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With the confusion around Daniel's identity increasing every second, secrets start to unearth, and it seems someone close will stop at nothing to protect themselves and stop Jodie's hunt for the truth from taking them down.

meta.plot: Lorsque le fils de Jodie Walsh, âgé de 4 ans, disparait lors d’un pique-nique au bord du lac, il est présumé noyé. Son corps n’a jamais été retrouvé. Pourtant 9 ans plus tard, lorsque Jodie aperçoit un adolescent sur le chemin de l’école, elle en est convaincue, c’est lui ! La vie qu’elle a minutieusement reconstruite pendant tant d’années est ébranlée mais elle est prête à tout pour prouver qu’elle a raison. Va-t-elle convaincre la police et sa propre famille que l’homme qui s’occupe actuellement du garçon n’est pas son père mais son ravisseur ?
Quand une tragédie survient dans un centre de football pour jeunes, des familles endeuillées exigent des réponses, et la justice, de la part de l'équipe la plus populaire du Brésil.

1.title: FR - From Dreams to Tragedy: The Fire that Shook Brazilian Football - S01E01 - The Dream
1.plot: Joining a big team was a dream come true. But a few nights before an incident at a training center, there were clues that something wasn't right.

1.title: FR - From Dreams to Tragedy: The Fire that Shook Brazilian Football - S01E02 - The Nightmare
1.plot: As the tragedy interrupts dreams and investigators dive into Vulture's Nest, the victims' families face their worst nightmare.

1.title: FR - From Dreams to Tragedy: The Fire that Shook Brazilian Football - S01E03 - The Awakening
1.plot: Years later, families revisit places of significance, journalists and lawyers dig into the case and surviving victims share their stories.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E01 - The Essential Ingredient
1.plot: Almost two years after a devastating loss, the Duke of Castamar hosts a big party. An agoraphobic Clara is forced to prove herself at her new job.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E02 - The Night of the King
1.plot: When the king goes missing during the party, Diego and his friends search for him. Meanwhile, Clara makes an unexpected discovery she must keep secret.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E03 - Credo Ut Intelligam
1.plot: Amelia has shocking news for Enrique. The queen asks Melquíades to covertly find an important document. A fire threatens Rosalia's future at Castamar.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E04 - Fly Away
1.plot: Singer Carlo Broschi is invited to perform a concert at Castamar. Diego meets a young woman and Clara gets jealous. During the party, tragedy strikes.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E05 - The Decision
1.plot: Diego, feeling conflicted about his night with Amelia, turns to an old friend for advice. Clara's guilt engulfs her. Gabriel is distrustful of Enrique.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E06 - Where No Light Shines
1.plot: Diego and Amelia celebrate their news but Gabriel voices his suspicions. Sol waits for her wish to be fulfilled. Enrique remembers a failed plan.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E07 - So We Are Not Erased
1.plot: When Clara is found unconscious, Diego insists on staying by her bedside, no matter the social implications. Amelia, however, won't be deterred.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E08 - What Is Not to Be
1.plot: Diego helps Clara search for evidence of her condemned father's innocence. Enrique plots to frame Francisco. Amelia asks Elisa for a favor.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E09 - The Truth
1.plot: Amelia faces a serious complication with her pregnancy and turns to an unexpected source for help. Alfredo searches for a missing Gabriel.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E10 - What Really Matters
1.plot: After a wounded Alfredo reports back to Castamar, Diego desperately looks for his brother. Úrsula is tormented by someone from her past.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E11 - Lub-dub
1.plot: Diego resorts to kidnapping in an attempt to find Enrique so he can seek vengeance. Amelia acts as Gabriel's caretaker and tries to lift his spirits.

1.title: FR - La cocinera de Castamar - S01E12 - A Place for Everyone
1.plot: The day of Diego and Amelia's wedding — and Clara's father's execution — brings multiple last-minute surprises for everyone at Castamar.

meta.plot: Située au début du XVIIIe siècle à Madrid, l'intrigue suit l'histoire d'amour entre une cuisinière agoraphobe et un noble veuf.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E01 - Second Contact
1.plot: Ensign Tendi has her first day of work on Starfleet's USS Cerritos, where she meets fellow support crew members. Boimler is tasked with a secret special assignment. Rutherford attempts to keep his dating life intact while a disaster strikes the ship.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E02 - Envoys
1.plot: Ensigns Boimler and Mariner embark on a shuttle mission to a Klingon compound while Ensigns Tendi and Rutherford spend time together back on the USS Cerritos.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E03 - Temporal Edict
1.plot: A new work protocol eliminating "buffer time" has the Lower Decks crew running ragged as they try to keep up with their tightened schedules. Ensign Mariner and Commander Ransom's mutual lack of respect comes to a head during an away mission.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E04 - Moist Vessel
1.plot: Captain Freeman seeks the ultimate payback after Mariner blatantly disrespects her in front of the crew. A well-meaning Tendi accidentally messes up a Lieutenant's attempt at spiritual ascension and tries to make it right.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E05 - Cupid's Errant Arrow
1.plot: Ensign Boimler welcomes his girlfriend Barb onto the USS Cerritos, much to Ensign Mariner’s dismay — while Ensigns Ruthford and Tendi have starship envy when the Cerritos rendezvous with the more-advanced USS Vancouver.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E06 - Terminal Provocations
1.plot: The lovable but awkward Ensign Fletcher makes work difficult for Mariner and Boimler. Rutherford introduces Tendi to a holodeck training program he created.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E07 - Much Ado About Boimler
1.plot: Mariner tries to impress her best friend from Starfleet Academy who is now a visiting Captain. Boimler is sent to a Starfleet medical ship after a transporter accident puts him “out of phase.”

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E08 - Veritas
1.plot: Mariner, Boimler, Tendi and Rutherford are caught off guard when aliens force them to testify about a series of seemingly unrelated events.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E09 - Crisis Point
1.plot: Mariner repurposes Boimler's holodeck program to cast herself as the villain in a Lower Decks style movie.

1.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S01E10 - No Small Parts
1.plot: The USS Cerritos encounters a familiar enemy. Tendi helps a struggling recruit find her footing.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E01 - Strange Energies
2.plot: Approximately three months after the events of the season one finale, the U.S.S. Cerritos is dispatched on a mission where it ends up in a sci-fi event resulting in "strange energy," which Commander Ransom inadvertently absorbs.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E02 - Kayshon, His Eyes Open
2.plot: Our Lower Deckers have trouble bonding with Ensign Jet Manhaver, who has been assigned Boimler’s bunk and shift duties. Meanwhile, we get a glimpse of Boimler’s life on the U.S.S. Titan, which is more intense than he thought it would be.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E03 - We'll Always Have Tom Paris
2.plot: Assigned a special task by Dr. T'Ana, Tendi enlists Mariner for help. On the U.S.S. Cerritos, Rutherford is consumed by a bridge crew mystery.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E04 - Mugato, Gumato
2.plot: The U.S.S. Cerritos is dispatched to a planet to investigate an unexplained sighting of a dangerous Mugato.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E05 - An Embarrassment of Dooplers
2.plot: Mariner and Boimler try to track down the location of a legendary Starfleet party while the bridge crew deals with an insecure alien diplomat.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E06 - The Spy Humongous
2.plot: Anomaly consolidation day on the U.S.S. Cerritos leaves the Lower Deckers with mixed emotions. Captain Freeman attempts to negotiate peace on the Pakled home world.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E07 - Where Pleasant Fountains Lie
2.plot: Mariner and Boimler are stranded on an uninhabited planet with a sentient computer. On the Cerritos, Lt. Commander Billups must prove his engineering abilities to an old adversary.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E08 - I, Excretus
2.plot: A consultant arrives on the U.S.S. Cerritos to run drills that require the lower deckers and bridge crew to swap duties.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E09 - wej Duj
2.plot: Boimler tries to find a friend from the bridge, while the crew of the USS Cerritos has free time during a long warp trip.

2.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S02E10 - First First Contact
2.plot: In the season two finale, the U.S.S. Cerritos is tasked to aid another class starship on a first contact mission.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E01 - Grounded
3.plot: Mariner enlists her friends on a rogue mission to exonerate her mother, as Captain Freeman faces a military tribunal for the destruction of Pakled Planet.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E02 - The Least Dangerous Game
3.plot: On a tropical paradise planet, Mariner questions Commander Ransom on how he structures his away team. Boimler makes a bold career decision.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E03 - Mining the Mind's Mines
3.plot: On a remote science outpost, stone orbs are bringing fantasies to life. Tendi starts her first day as a Senior Science Officer Trainee.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E04 - Room for Growth
3.plot: Mariner, Boimler and Tendi clash with their arch-rivals: Delta Shift. The Cerritos engineers go on mandatory relaxation leave.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E05 - Reflections
3.plot: Mariner and Boimler work the Starfleet recruitment booth at an alien job fair, Rutherford challenges himself.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E06 - Hear All, Trust Nothing
3.plot: The Cerritos crew unexpectedly spends a day on Deep Space Nine.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E07 - A Mathematically Perfect Redemption
3.plot: A wayward Starfleet ensign struggles to find a path to redemption.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E08 - Crisis Point 2: Paradoxus
3.plot: Boimler's holodeck movie sequel tries to live up to the original.

3.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S03E10 - The Stars at Night
3.plot: The Cerritos crew must prove their worth in a mission race.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E01 - Twovix
4.plot: The Cerritos ensigns must assist a caretaker on the voyage of a historically significant starship.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E02 - I Have No Bones Yet I Must Flee
4.plot: Mariner tries to get demoted, Rutherford tries to get promoted, and Boimler makes a big move.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E03 - In the Cradle of Vexilon
4.plot: Boimler leads his first away mission on an alien megastructure.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E04 - Something Borrowed, Something Green
4.plot: Tendi is summoned back to Orion for a wedding.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E05 - Empathalogical Fallacies
4.plot: A trio of Betazoids cause chaos on the Cerritos.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E06 - Parth Ferengi's Heart Place
4.plot: The Cerritos visits the Ferengi homeworld.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E07 - A Few Badgeys More
4.plot: Three computerized villains return to cause problems for the Cerritos crew.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E08 - Caves
4.plot: The Lower Deckers go on a classic cave mission.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E09 - The Inner Fight (1)
4.plot: Captain Freeman assigns the Lower Deckers an overly safe mission to try and keep a self-destructive Mariner out of danger.

4.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S04E10 - Old Friends, New Planets (2)
4.plot: Mariner faces her past.

5.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S05E01 - Dos Cerritos
5.plot: A spatial anomaly forces the Cerritos crew to face their own faces. Tendi pirates.

5.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S05E02 - Shades of Green
5.plot: Tendi races to stop a conflict while Boimler & Mariner race to stop capitalists.

5.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S05E03 - The Best Exotic Nanite Hotel
5.plot: The Lower Deckers hunt nanites on a resort...in space?!

5.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S05E04 - A Farewell to Farms
5.plot: Dr. Migleemo cooks up some hot dishes while Mariner prefers hers served cold.

5.title: FR - Star Trek : Lower Decks - S05E05 - Star Base 80?!
5.plot: Ransom uses too much disinfectant gel while Mariner gets paranoid about curses.

meta.plot:
Suivez les aventures de l'équipage du vaisseau le plus insignifiant de la flotte Starfleet.

En 2380, à bord de l'U.S.S. Cerritos, Mariner, Boimler, Rutherford et Tendi s'efforcent d'accomplir leur devoir, tout en poursuivant leur vie, même lorsqu'ils sont secoués par une multitude d'anomalies...

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E01 - Here She Is At Last
1.plot: Mia arrives at camp ready to take her place as Queen Bee, but is challenged by mysterious new arrival, Amber. Their instant rivalry causes tension and things take a sinister turn.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E02 - Take Back Control
1.plot: After the disturbing antics at the picnic, Mia's determined to get herself or Amber sent home.  Foiled at first, she tries a new approach. Meanwhile, a new threat lurks in the woods.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E03 - To Become A Queen
1.plot: When the ballot opens for Midsummer Queen, Mia spots an opportunity to dethrone Amber by forming a new alliance. Out in the woods, friendship blossoms for Alex.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E04 - Capture The King
1.plot: As the Midsummer Party rages on, things take a dark turn. Sparks fly, tears are spilled and more than one heart is broken before the night is through.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E05 - In For The Kill
1.plot: Alex & Petal delve deeper into the island and uncover a new mystery. Mia attempts to move on from her rivalry with Amber only to learn just how powerful Amber truly is.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E06 - Far From Home
1.plot: Harry faces a steep challenge, and finds support in Petal. Mia and Alex reach out for help and end up getting a message from an unlikely source.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E07 - Nothing Can Survive Alone
1.plot: Amber lands her cruellest blow yet to Mia. She celebrates in her cabin with a select few but things soon spin out of control. Alex & Petal grow closer.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E08 - All That's Left Of Us
1.plot: Dev makes a timely discovery that leads him to ask dangerous questions. Mia, Alex and Harry unearth a potential way to stop Amber - if they can figure out what it means.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E09 - Who You Used To Be
1.plot: Mia, Alex and Harry must decide whether or not to trust a potential new ally who could provide them with vital information. Kayleigh learns the true cost of Amber’s favour.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E10 - Poison
1.plot: Harry makes a rash decision that puts him in Amber’s crosshairs. Dev reflects on recent events and comes to a disturbing conclusion. Someone unexpected joins Amber’s inner circle.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E11 - What You Left Behind
1.plot: Tensions with Amber reach breaking point and an innocent pays the price. As Amber sleeps, nightmares become reality and a shocking truth is revealed that changes everything.

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E12 - Run, Mia, Run
1.plot: Mia makes a final attempt to leave the island and escape Amber, who has more acolytes than ever. Mia turns to Luka for help, leading to some heart-breaking consequences

1.title: FR - The A List - S01E13 - The Last Dove
1.plot: As her allies start to fall, Mia goes to face Amber head on, believing her own surrender will ensure their escape. But Amber has one last surprise.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E01 - A Second Chance
2.plot: Safe at home, Mia recovers from her camp trauma — until she receives an unexpected message. Elsewhere, others work to escape a high-security facility.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E02 - You Don't Remember Me
2.plot: Mia, Petal and Harry officially start their journey with a new ally. In isolation, Midge makes a surprising connection. Amber keeps everyone guessing.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E03 - Two Birds, One Stone
2.plot: As the journey continues, Mia faces a major decision and holds Petal’s fate in her hands. Meanwhile, Midge navigates her new not-so-normal.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E04 - We Were Never Friends
2.plot: Past meets present as Midge reminds Mia of their history as friends… and enemies. Jenna and Fitz search for Harry and uncover a chilling secret.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E05 - We Deserve Each Other
2.plot: Midge addresses the group, sparking a new wave of skepticism. Alex, Petal and Kayleigh examine Dr. Shore's records. Mia and Luka forge a new bond.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E06 - Because of Who I Am
2.plot: After Alex dives deeper into her research, the group prepares a new plan of action. Mia and Luka revisit their pasts. Amber connects with a visitor.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E07 - Save Them
2.plot: Tensions mount as Mia, Amber and Midge meet again. Elsewhere, Dev crosses paths — and exchanges words — with Luka. Sam serves as a voice of reason.

2.title: FR - The A List - S02E08 - Who We Really Are
2.plot: As Midge’s power grows stronger than ever, Mia and the group stage a dark and daring mission in hopes of stopping her once and for all.

meta.plot: Un groupe d'adolescents débarque sur une île paradisiaque. Mais très vite, des secrets inavoués transforment les vacances de rêve en cauchemar.
Pour cette danseuse jonglant entre un travail sans avenir, ses obligations familiales et des amours compliquées, le hip-hop sera la porte de sortie de son township.

1.title: FR - Jiva! - S01E01 - Dala What You Must
1.plot: In Umlazi, Ntombi is torn between family duties and her dream of winning the Jiva Loxion dance competition. Will past tragedy stand in her way?

1.title: FR - Jiva! - S01E02 - The Trollies
1.plot: After bringing two frenemies on board, Ntombi struggles to complete her dance crew. Political scandal threatens to upend Vuyiswa's cushy lifestyle.

1.title: FR - Jiva! - S01E03 - Flash Round
1.plot: Vuyiswa's flakiness starts to get on Ntombi's nerves. Later at the club, the Trollies must impress the judges during a flash round — or be eliminated.

1.title: FR - Jiva! - S01E04 - Fix Your Crown
1.plot: Ntombi wrestles with guilt over her mom's accident. Short of options, Vuvu calls on an old friend. Nathi tries to smooth things over with Ntombi.

1.title: FR - Jiva! - S01E05 - Fetch Your Life
1.plot: Ntombi connects with Bheki, while Menzi surprises Vuvu. With the best pantsulas and bhengas on display at the finals, can the Trollies hold their own?

meta.plot: It’s the first day of the 1963 school year at Voltaire High! And for the first time, girls and boys will mingle. This first year of coeducation is full of surprises, both for teachers and students.

1.title: FR - Mixte - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Mixte - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Mixte - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Mixte - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Mixte - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Mixte - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Mixte - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Mixte - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Alors qu'une apocalypse zombie marque le début d'une sombre époque, de parfaits inconnus font équipe pour trouver la force de survivre et retrouver leurs proches.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E01 - Human Flow
1.plot: At the onset of a zombie apocalypse, chaos descends as Rose loses her family, Ryan tries to get his bearings, and a desperate man finds a new guise.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E02 - Drive
1.plot: William, Sun and Barbara try to drive to the stadium, but it's tougher than they thought: They're blocked by both living marauders and roving undead.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E03 - Summer School
1.plot: Rose, Spears, Ryan and Lance find a refuge. Learning they're not alone, they're schooled on the dangers of following the heart rather than the head.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E04 - Alone
1.plot: Forced to fend for themselves, the survivors that were left behind must improvise and look out for both the dead and the living.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E05 - Diner
1.plot: Trapped in an abandoned diner, William and Sun must decide whether they can depend on the survivors from the truck as their alliance is tested.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E06 - Heist
1.plot: The desperate yet determined group undertakes a daring hit on a weapons stash, but the pandemonium threatens to swallow them up.

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E07 - The Tunnel
1.plot: Soldiers arrive with both plans and promises. But questions remain as a survivor makes a bold move. Who can you trust? Where do your loyalties lie?

1.title: FR - Black Summer - S01E08 - The Stadium
1.plot: As the group approaches the stadium, everything goes sideways. The survivors blast through their bullets -- and their options.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E01 - The Cold
2.plot: Life — and death — spins savagely out of control. Familiar faces scramble to survive the brutality, and wrenching betrayal lurks around every corner.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E02 - Prelude
2.plot: No good deed goes unpunished in a zombie apocalypse: The tables turn for Rose, Sun, Spears and Anna. The winter brings snow — and fresh horrors.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E04 - Cold War
2.plot: An outgunned Rose must make a life-and-death decision. The war comes home when dangerous groups converge on a haven, catching Sun in the crossfire.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E05 - White Horse
2.plot: Hungry, hurt and alone, Spears encounters a talkative stranger who claims to know him. A mysterious rider on a pale horse passes in the wilderness.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E06 - Currency
2.plot: Treasure brings out the worst in everyone, but trust is the most precious commodity in this wasteland. Rose grasps at straws, and Sun risks it all.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E07 - The Lodge
2.plot: A refuge with hot water, food and all the comforts of civilization feels too good to be true. Rose oversleeps as fear grows and a visitor checks in.

2.title: FR - Black Summer - S02E08 - The Plane
2.plot: Time for takeoff. Out at the airstrip, old allies reconnect, new cohorts seize the opportunity, and escape seems tantalizingly within reach.

meta.plot: Helen Nilsonn, jeune fille de dix ans disparaît après s'être rendue chez des amis. A Horby, dans le comté de Malmöhus en Suède c'est la mobilisation générale, Habitants forces de police et armée se lancent à sa recherche.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: 10-year-old Helén Nilsson disappears on Easter 1989 in the small community of Hörby. It's a chilly evening and Helén will meet two classmates at the discount store a few minutes' walk from home, but the young friends never meet. Six days after the disappearance, Helén's wounded body is found, raped and strangled. Detective Commissioner Pelle Åkesson wants to work with the investigation but is abruptly rejected by her boss. When Helen's mother shows up at the police station and asks Pelle to take on the case, he promises to find Helen's killer.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The Helen investigation is on fire and Pelle Åkesson is following the investigation's dwindling existence. Two women are found murdered and night walking groups begin patrolling the streets in Kristianstad. Pelle and his team interrogate suspects and follow up on clues, but power struggles and political games complicate the investigation. Pelle's new colleague Monica Olhed's interrogation methods are starting to be discussed at the police station and a night walker catches Pelle's attention and is taken in for questioning.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The unsolved murder of Helén Nilsson continues to torment Pelle. To move on, he begins to dig into the murder of the prostitute Jannica Ekblad. The investigation leads them to a new suspect, a man called the Pig. Pelle wants to investigate the murders in parallel, but this leads to a conflict with his boss which has major consequences.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Pelle is back from sick leave and given an office in the police station's basement. He secretly begins to go through the Helen case and the group that can solve the murder reappears, now the hunt begins in earnest.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Pelle secretly and against his boss's will sends DNA from Helen to a lab in Birmingham for analysis. Now Pelle is in a hurry. This is the last chance before the investigation will be closed forever. The prosecutor gives Pelle the go-ahead to explore a number of DNA suspects.

1.title: FR - The Hunt For A killer - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: 15 years have passed since Helen disappeared. Pelle decides to tear down the cottage Ulf Olsson lived in when he disappeared. It is newly renovated but when they break up the floorboards they find traces of blood. But further technical evidence is needed for the prosecutor to prosecute.

meta.plot: Malcolm Bright est un criminologue reconnu, qui connaît la façon de penser des tueurs et comprend le fonctionnement de leur esprit. Pourquoi ? Parce que son père était l'un des pires tueurs en série : Le Chirurgien. Grâce à son génie tordu, le jeune homme aide la police de New York à résoudre des crimes.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Bright deals with the repercussions of seeing his father for the first time in years.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E02 - Annihilator
1.plot: As Bright slips into the mind of a serial killer, he must deal with the repercussions of seeing his father for the first time in years.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E03 - Fear Response
1.plot: A drug-induced homicide forces Malcolm to rethink his fears. Gil, Jessica and Ainsley catch wind that Malcolm has been seeing his father again.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E04 - Designer Complicity
1.plot: As Malcolm's childhood memories surface, he realizes his father's killing spree may not have been a surprise to everyone in the family. Malcolm, Gil, Dani and JT hunt for a stalker with a creepy eye for design.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E05 - The Trip
1.plot: Malcolm searches the depths of his mind to unravel the mystery of the girl in the box. When the NYPD investigates a homicide and assumes it is linked to a drug cartel, Malcolm discovers a secret about Dani's past that draws them closer together.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E06 - All Souls and Sadists
1.plot: When Bright uncovers a photo of himself and Martin from when he was a kid, he is forced to focus on the repressed memories from his childhood psyche. Jessica and Malcolm agree they must put a stop to Ainsley's idea.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E07 - Q&A
1.plot: Bright's quest for answers about his childhood leads him to a junkyard, where he's bombarded with gunshots. Ainsley's exclusive interview with Martin takes an unexpected turn, forcing her to team up with Bright.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E08 - Family Friend
1.plot: Malcolm realizes the suspect in the "Junkyard Killer" case may have a connection to his father.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E09 - Pied-A-Terre
1.plot: When Martin is locked away in solitary confinement and the FBI takes over the Junkyard Killer case, Malcolm uses his spare time as an excuse to try out a “normal” lifestyle.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E10 - Silent Night
1.plot: Knowing that the “Junkyard Killer” was in cahoots with his father, Malcolm goes against the FBI’s wishes and continues to investigate. His findings reconnect him with a disgruntled ex-detective who was once heavily involved in the search for “The Surgeon,” delivering them both into danger.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E11 - Alone Time
1.plot: The FBI and NYPD band together to save Malcolm from the "Junkyard Killer," aka John Watkins, who reveals shocking details about his involvement in the camping trip memories that have been plaguing his psyche. Meanwhile, as Gil looks for answers from The Surgeon, Ainsley and Jessica search through their memories of the past, hoping to find some sort of clue as to where Malcolm could be hidden.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E12 - Internal Affairs
1.plot: Following a mysterious and catastrophic incident in the precinct, Bright faces an internal affairs review as Gil and the team worry about his mental health.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E13 - Wait & Hope
1.plot: Malcolm takes a detour from his mandated vacation time when he finds out a killer on the loose is mimicking homicides from one his favorite children's books, "The Count of Monte Cristo." With added help from a very excited Martin Whitly, the NYPD trace the case back to a high society family planning one of the biggest weddings of the season, so Malcolm and Dani get dressed up to attend the event and track down their culprit.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E14 - Eye of the Needle
1.plot: Jessica continues to search for more information on the "Girl in the Box," but is confronted by the "Carousel Killer," who has a very public vendetta against the Whitlys. While the NYPD investigates families tied to Martin's victims, it's ultimately up to Malcolm and Jessica to track down the tip-line caller, turned killer, who is blackmailing her. Meanwhile, Ainsley receives a big promotion at work, but quickly realizes she may never escape the high demand for serial killer reports.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E15 - Death's Door
1.plot: When a body is found professionally preserved and embalmed, the NYPD teams up with Edrisa to go undercover at a convention of funeral directors. While there, they discover their top suspects - morticians Tilda and Dev - who used to be in business with the victim. Then, enter the mind of a serial killer as Martin revisits his past through a series of hallucinations.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E16 - The Job
1.plot: When a motorcycle gang robbery turns into a murder, Malcolm and team are called to the scene to investigate. While he's working on a profile, he runs into an old friend from boarding school, licensed insurance investigator Vijay (guest star Dhruv Singh). Together they work to uncover the identity of the murderer and his accomplices who stole millions in watches. Meanwhile, Martin blackmails Jessica, exchanging his silence about who stabbed him for more quality time with his son.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E17 - Stranger Beside You
1.plot: The NYPD dives into a case surrounding a famous mommy blogger, whose husband was mysteriously stabbed just days after their baby was born. Meanwhile, Bright finds his way back to Eve, but can't shake his paranoia that there's more to her than meets the eye. To help ease his nerves, Ainsley helps him do some investigating and uncovers a secret she has been keeping.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E18 - Scheherazade
1.plot: When an up-and-coming ballet dancer is mysteriously poisoned, the NYPD dives deep into the rigorous world of dance. Meanwhile, Jessica reunites with an old friend, socialite Nicholas Endicott, and Bright and Eve turn to Martin for answers regarding the girl in the box.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E19 - The Professionals
1.plot: After a catastrophic turn of events, Malcolm and Ainsley are convinced there's more to Nicholas Endicott than meets the eye. Their only hope just might be an impromptu Whitly family reunion.

1.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S01E20 - Like Father...
1.plot: Malcolm continues to unravel as the mystery of the girl in the box comes to a head. As Nicholas Endicott's (guest star Dermot Mulroney) true colors continue to show, the Whitlys must decide to what lengths they are willing to go in order to take him down

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E01 - It’s All in the Execution
2.plot: Bright finds his personal life in disarray after his sister's shocking actions. Now, he has to "take care" of her and protect his mother, Jessica, from a secret that could tear the family apart all over again. To distract himself, Malcolm takes on a new case and must find the killer behind a recent beheading in the city... and the only person he can turn to for help with the case is his father. Meanwhile, Martin returns to Claremont to a surprise new roommate and JT faces discrimination while on the job.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E02 - Speak of the Devil
2.plot: When a priest is found murdered in his place of worship, Bright grapples with its effect on his own trauma.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E03 - Alma Mater
2.plot: When the headmaster of Bright's alma mater is found murdered, he is forced to face a troubling secret from his past. Meanwhile, Jessica struggles with her decision to end things with Gil, Martin grows closer to Friar Pete and JT eagerly anticipates the birth of his baby.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E04 - Take Your Father to Work Day
2.plot: Martin is delighted when a murder at Claremont Psychiatric brings the NYPD into his territory, allowing him direct involvement with one of Malcolm's cases. While working the same job, Ainsley's suspicion grows when she feels Malcolm may be hiding something from her. All the while, Malcolm and Ainsley must dodge their mother, who's wondering why they got rid of her favorite rug.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E05 - Bad Manners
2.plot: Malcolm and Ainsley both race to find the killer in the so-called "Debutante Slayings," but Ainsley's persistence has Malcolm worried about what her actual motive might be. While Martin is thrilled to see his daughter's passion in the field, Jessica suggests she and Ainsley take a vacation. Meanwhile, JT meets with his union rep to decide if he should file an official complaint against the cop who discriminated against him.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E06 - Head Case
2.plot: The team investigates the murder of an architect who was tasked with renovating a supposedly haunted hotel.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E07 - Face Value
2.plot: Malcolm focuses on a case in which a famous plastic surgeon is murdered; Martin gets a new job working in the infirmary with Dr. Vivian Capshaw; Jessica is surprised to learn her younger sister is in town.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E08 - Ouroboros
2.plot: When world-famous Europol profiler Simon Hoxley shows up in New York and claims that Major Crimes' current case is connected to the discovery of Endicott's body overseas, Bright fears he and Ainsley's secret is about to be exposed. Meanwhile, Martin gets to know Dr. Vivian Capshaw.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E09 - The Killabustas
2.plot: Despite Gil's fatherly concerns, Bright throws himself into a new case involving an escalating killer that has Edrisa's online vigilante group, known as the "Killabustas," trying to stop him. Meanwhile, Jessica realizes that she must dive deep into her past traumas in order to write a book and may need Gil's help to do it. Then, Martin's relationship with Dr. Capshaw intensifies.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E10 - Exit Strategy
2.plot: As Malcolm distances himself from Martin, Jessica does the opposite, diving head-first into the past for the sake of her tell-all book. Meanwhile, Martin is desperate to get in touch with his son ahead of his imminent plans, as Dr. Vivian Capshaw grows increasingly suspicious. Meanwhile, the NYPD investigates a crime of passion.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E11 - You Can Run...
2.plot: After a terrifying incident at Claremont, Malcolm is in a race against time to track down multiple killers. The NYPD realizes someone close to home might be the key to finding them.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E12 - Sun and Fun
2.plot: As the search intensifies for a serial killer on the run, so does Malcolm's tenacity, causing U.S. Marshal Emily Ruiz to kick him off the case. However, Malcolm doesn't back down that easily.

2.title: FR - Prodigal Son - S02E13 - The Last Weekend
2.plot: The search for a serial killer known as "The Woodsman" might help the NYPD find one of their own.

meta.plot: 10 000 ans avant l'ascension de Paul Atreides, les Sœurs Harkonnen combattent des forces qui menacent l'avenir de l'humanité et établissent la secte légendaire connue sous le nom de Bene Gesserit.

1.title: FR - Dune : Prophecy - S01E01 - The Hidden Hand
1.plot: On Wallach IX, young Valya Harkonnen promises Mother Superior Raquella that she'll protect the Sisterhood by putting one of their own on the Imperial Throne. Thirty years later, Valya faces a threat to her long-awaited plan.

1.title: FR - Dune : Prophecy - S01E02 - Two Wolves
1.plot: After receiving word about events on Salusa Secundus, Valya brings Theodosia to the Imperial House to help manage the situation. Meanwhile, a reluctant Tula enlists Lila for a vital mission.

1.title: FR - Dune : Prophecy - S01E03 - Sisterhood Above All
1.plot: Following a tragedy, young Tula worries about being accepted despite her family name, while a skeptical Valya struggles with the decision to take the Sisterhood vow. Years later, Valya receives a message that confirms her suspicions.

1.title: FR - Dune : Prophecy - S01E04 - Twice Born
1.plot: As Tula attempts to understand the acolytes' shared dream, Valya sets her plan in motion to redeem House Harkonnen ahead of the Landsraad.

1.title: FR - Dune: Prophecy - S01E05 - In Blood, Truth
1.plot: While Tula tries to keep her secret project from being discovered by the other Sisters, Desmond goes on a warpath to root out insurgents.

1.title: FR - Dune: Prophecy - S01E06 - The High-Handed Enemy
1.plot: As Tula contends with his true identity, Valya's maneuvering leads her into an epic confrontation with an increasingly powerful Desmond.

meta.plot: C’est dur d’être Iris. Comme tout le monde, Iris a une tête. Seulement sa tête... n’est pas exactement comme celle de tout le monde. Et sa bouche non plus, qui dit des choses que les autres bouches ne disent pas. Son petit-ami, sa cousine, un caviste, un gardien de musée... La liste de ceux qu’elle pousse à bout s’allonge chaque jour. Mais finalement, la première à en pâtir, c’est Iris. Et l’amour ? Quand on ne fait rien comme les autres, on le trouve loin des clichés...

1.title: FR - Iris - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Iris - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Iris - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Iris - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Iris - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Iris - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Coyotes - S01E01 - The Siren
1.plot: Soon after the Coyotes arrive for Scouts summer camp, Kevin ventures to the nearby village where he meets Marie, then makes the discovery of his life.

1.title: FR - Coyotes - S01E02 - The Corpse
1.plot: To protect his find, Kevin takes some drastic action, roping in Ferret to help. As Marc continues his search for Toni, officer Martine grows suspicious.

1.title: FR - Coyotes - S01E03 - The Oath
1.plot: Now that the rest of the Coyotes are in on Kevin's secret, the group sneaks off to Antwerp to pawn their treasure, but a violent encounter rattles them.

1.title: FR - Coyotes - S01E04 - Confessions
1.plot: The Coyotes return to camp to deal with Kevin's betrayal. Mrs. Kartash sends Amine to sort out the mess in Warnaffe. Meanwhile, Marie is interrogated.

1.title: FR - Coyotes - S01E05 - The Break
1.plot: Dona and Freddo ambush Kevin to demand answers about Toni. Amine finally catches up with Marc, who's forced to propose a deal to protect himself.

1.title: FR - Coyotes - S01E06 - The Deal
1.plot: The Coyotes clash with Dob and conspire on what to tell Martine. Amine and Marc arrange an exchange with Father Julek, setting up a deadly confrontation.

meta.plot: Une troupe de scouts débarque à Warnaffe pour leur grand camp d'été. Parmi eux, le dernier venu de la patrouille des Coyotes, Kevin, un garçon rebelle et solitaire. Dès le premier soir, il part pour trouver de quoi fumer dans le village voisin. Il y rencontre Marie qui est la recherche de Toni, son ex, dont elle n'est plus amoureuse et dont elle n'a plus de nouvelles. C'est le coup de foudre entre elle et Kevin. Marie lui donne un acide et ils passent la nuit au bord d'un lac dans une carrière. Le lendemain, toujours sous l'effet de la drogue, Kevin plonge dans le lac, découvre une grotte, une sirène et des diamants. Ce qu'il ne sait pas c'est que ces diamants ont été volés à Moyersoen, un douanier véreux. Kevin confie sa trouvaille à Furet, son meilleur pote dans la troupe, qui insiste pour qu'ils retournent voir qui était cette sirène. Après avoir caché les diamants, ils retournent dans la grotte et découvrent le cadavre d'un jeune homme.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: An ordinary morning in a small town in Israel is shattered by unicorn mask-wearing assassins who kill four students and terrorize the local community.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Detective Davidi is convinced the four arrested Palestinians are innocent and that the murderers are among the students. Tom makes a "safe" list.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Davidi is partnered with Morag, a younger investigator. Davidi breaks the rules but discovers the Black Space app and receives a chilling message.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A video is posted on Black Space explaining the massacre and making more threats. Davidi arrests two boys but their complicated stories offer no clues.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Davidi and Morag find evidence at the burnt tree behind the high school and at one of the students' homes. Davidi's eye gets worse.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Omer stumbles on a video that had been deleted from Black Space. Tom becomes agitated when he finds out about the video. Miri is rushed to the hospital.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Davidi is taken off the investigation but Morag insists on consulting him. Everyone is freaked out about Tom. Omer turns to Davidi with information.

1.title: FR - Black Space - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Davidi can't be in two places at once and abandons Miri in labor to rush to a party at the school, where he believes the killers will reveal all.

meta.plot: L’enquête qui suit une tuerie dans un lycée sans histoire.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E01 - Mile 1: The Voice in the Shed
1.plot: Twelve-year-old over-achiever Layne finds her orderly life thrown into a tailspin when she discovers a sophisticated talking car named "VIN" hidden in an abandoned shed.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E02 - Mile 2: Paid to Drive
1.plot: Layne and Zora race against time to find the money to replace VIN’s control unit before his memory is lost forever.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E03 - Mile 3: VIN Goes Wild
1.plot: Despite having just uncovered a big secret, Layne attempts to stay focused on her school campaign event.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E04 - Mile 4: Changing Laynes
1.plot: Vin tries to pinpoint his purpose. Layne struggles to perform a physical challenge presented by her presidential rival Jasper.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E05 - Mile 5: Road Trip
1.plot: When Layne’s entire locker goes missing, she, Zora and VIN go on a road trip to search for it. Mel goes overboard while trying to repay his “life debt” to Cody.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E06 - Mile 6: Code Orange
1.plot: Layne misses VIN when her parents block her from spending time with him, and she’s distracted as the school election day nears.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E07 - Mile 7: On the Run
1.plot: To keep VIN safe, Layne and Zora hide him in the woods; VIN grapples with the realization that he might be a burden to Layne.

1.title: FR - Fast Layne - S01E08 - Mile 8: Helicopter Parents
1.plot: Layne must make the biggest decision of her life when both VIN and her parents are endangered.

meta.plot: Layne Reed, une jeune fille de 12 ans à la vie très organisée résidant dans la ville fictive de Cedarville, découvre, aux côtés de sa voisine Zora, l'existence d'une voiture ultra-sophistiquée dotée d'une intelligence artificielle et douée de parole dénommée V. I. N. (acronyme de Vehicle Integrated Nanotech), cachée dans un hangar sous-terrain secret situé sous une cabane abandonnée adjacente à sa maison. Elle finira par se rendre compte qu'elle est liée au véhicule et qu'elle semble donc être par conséquent la seule à pouvoir l'activer et le contrôler mais également que d'autres personnes cherchent à s'en emparer par tous les moyens et qu'elle devra tout faire pour empêcher cela.

1.title: FR - Le Mystère Kendrick - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Investigations into the deadly house fire reveal something sinister and the villagers must pick through the ashes to find answers. Was it a tragic accident or something more troubling?

1.title: FR - Le Mystère Kendrick - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The residents of Kirkdarroch come out in force for Kate and the girls' funerals. Jess meets an old friend of Kate's and is deeply shocked by what she discovers.

1.title: FR - Le Mystère Kendrick - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Armed with new evidence, the case looks cut and dried, but a new revelation raises doubt. The emotional effects of the fire are taking their toll on those closest to the tragedy.

1.title: FR - Le Mystère Kendrick - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: In the final episode, as the villagers try to rebuild their lives, they have to learn to be honest with themselves and each other. But will they ever get to the truth?

meta.plot: Tom Kendrick, médecin, est marié à Kate, institutrice, ensemble, ils ont trois enfants. Le couple est ami avec Jess et Steve, respectivement une collègue de Kate et son compagnon, agent de police. La ville est confrontée à un incendie terrible qui cause la mort de Kate et de ses enfants...

Memorial photographer Brock Blennerhasset makes a living out of photographing the dead in Victorian Ireland. When a series of murders threatens to sully Blennerhasset's reputation, a tenacious detective drags him into an investigation of Dublin's criminal underbelly.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E01 - Photochemistry
1.plot: When a series of murders threatens to sully Blennerhasset's reputation, a tenacious detective drags him into an investigation of Dublin's criminal underbelly.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E02 - Development
1.plot: Blennerhasset and his new assistant Molloy have been commissioned to travel out to Kingstown to photograph a young boy who recently drowned. However a heavy storm kicks up, forcing the men to stay overnight with their hosts, the mourning Breslin family.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E03 - Daguerreotype
1.plot: When Blennerhasset discovers that some of his camera equipment has gone missing, he and Nancy travel to an unsavory part of Dublin to track down Molloy, who has also disappeared. Meanwhile, Detective Regan follows up on a lead regarding the illicit photos circulating in Dublin's black market.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E04 - Camera Obscura
1.plot: When Nancy's grandmother dies, Molloy is introduced to Blennerhasset's difficult family during their memorial photography session. After a meeting with Henry's eccentric friends, Molloy brings Blennerhasset and Nancy to a séance to capture a photograph of a ghost.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E05 - Snuff
1.plot: After yet another dead body turns up, Regan tries to piece together the events of the séance and discovers Blennerhasset and his associates were in attendance. Blennerhasset and Molloy take a job out in the country, but when Molloy realizes the illicit photo album is in their possession, they rush back, worried that they could be suspects in a crime.

1.title: FR - Dead Still - S01E06 - Only Memories Remain
1.plot: Reeling from a murder, Blennerhasset sends Molloy and Nancy away, but the pair refuses to give up on him. When his life is threatened, Blennerhasset reveals he knows who created the album, but his silence has already put Nancy in danger.

meta.plot: Lorsque Scott, un père aimant de quatre enfants, a mis à l'épreuve le plan de sa vie entière par un diagnostic de cancer, il appelle quelques-uns de ses plus proches alliés à intervenir en tant que papas de secours pour chaque étape de la vie de sa famille en pleine croissance. Scott rassemble un groupe fiable de modèles de rôle qui comprend Anthony, son plus vieil ami; Larry, son commanditaire AA; Et Oliver, son chirurgien et meilleur ami de sa femme, Robin. Ces hommes conviennent de se consacrer à soutenir et à guider l'incroyable famille de Scott à travers tous les triomphes et les défis que la vie a à offrir, au cas où il ne pourrait jamais être là pour le faire lui-même.

1.title: FR - Conseil des papas - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The Perry family comes together to deal with dad Scott Perry’s health crisis. Scott reveals he has a plan to create a “Council of Dads” that would be there for the family if anything should happen to him.

1.title: FR - Conseil des papas - S01E02 - I'm Not Fine
1.plot: Robin grapples with how a "Council of Dads" could really function in their day-to-day life as Larry takes on his responsibilities with passion. Luly has an unexpected meeting with her birth mom and learns about her early life with Scott.

1.title: FR - Conseil des papas - S01E03 - Who Do You Wanna Be?
1.plot: Larry presents an offer to Robin that will impact the future of the Crab Shack, catching Anthony and everyone else by surprise. Luly endeavors to make an impression in her writing group, digging deep into personal experiences for a piece. Evan contemplates a return to school. Oliver makes strides with Theo but finds himself torn from his own family duties

1.title: FR - Conseil des papas - S01E04 - The Sixth Stage
1.plot: Robin contemplates romantic life after Scott. Luly and Evan make a risky investment with their loan money, Anthony prepares for the transition of the Crab Shack and develops a surprising friendship. Larry confronts his past failures.
