1.title: FR - Alias - S01E17 - Q & A
1.plot: While the FBI detains and questions Sydney about her past and possible ties to a mysterious Rambaldi doomsday prophecy, Vaughn and Jack must race to free her and find a way to clear her name before her cover is blown and SD-6 is made aware of the situation. Once the rescue op has been launched, in her quest to prove her innocence, Sydney shocks even her usually unflappable father when she makes a chilling discovery that may unravel the mystery of the 500-year-old prophecy – she finds proof that Rambaldi's writings may hold more truth about an alleged weapon of mass destruction - and the fate of her own family.

1.title: FR - Alias - S01E18 - Masquerade
1.plot: While on a case to track the activities of Khasinau, a.k.a. "The Man," Sydney runs into her ex-lover, Noah Hicks, who broke her heart and left without saying goodbye five years earlier. Meanwhile, Sydney tells Sloane that she wants to find her mother; Jack is ordered to see CIA psychiatrist Dr. Barnett to help him deal with his churning emotions after discovering that his wife may still be alive; and Will and Francie become suspicious of Sydney's activities after finding one of her airline ticket stubs.

1.title: FR - Alias - S01E19 - Snowman
1.plot: Sloane begins to question where Noah's true allegiances lie, as passion ignites between Sydney and Noah. Meanwhile, Sydney continues to uncover new information about her mother, which disturbes Jack. A rogue assassin known as the Snowman is dispatched by K-Directorate to kill Khasinau, a.k.a. "The Man." Will and Francie confront Sydney about the mysterious airline ticket stub found in her jacket.

1.title: FR - Alias - S01E20 - The Solution
1.plot: In order to catch Khasinau and get closer to finding her mother, Sydney and Vaughn set up an undercover transaction for a Rambaldi artifact with Khasinau's representative, Mr. Sark. But Sydney's cover may be compromised when a SD-6 agent is sent in to thwart the sale. Meanwhile, Will is enticed to continue his investigation of SD-6 when he learns the identity of one of his kidnappers. Emily tells Sydney that she knows about SD-6, which forces Sloane to make the most difficult decision of his life.

1.title: FR - Alias - S01E21 - Rendezvous
1.plot: Will's life is about to change as he is sent to find the person responsible for leaking information to him about SD-6. Meanwhile, Sloane finds himself on the cusp of finally tracking down Khasinau when SD-6 captures "The Man's" right-hand man, Mr. Sark. Dixon becomes suspicious of Sydney's activities.

1.title: FR - Alias - S01E22 - Almost Thirty Years
1.plot: In order to save Will's life, Sydney and Vaughn must destroy a familiar looking Rambaldi device, while Jack makes a risky deal with Khasinau's representative, Mr. Sark. Meanwhile, the CIA believes that one of their own is a mole for "The Man"; the Alliance comes to a decision regarding the fate of Emily Sloane; Dixon's suspicions about Sydney intensify; and Sydney finds herself face-to-face with "The Man."

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E01 - The Enemy Walks In
2.plot: Sydney finds herself face-to-face with her mother, whose intentions for her daughter are made chillingly clear. Meanwhile Sydney continues her search for Vaughn, not knowing if he is dead or alive after being swept away by a wall of water in Taipei. Will's life is forever changed when he learns the truth about SD-6 and Sydney's life as a double agent. Dixon must decide whether or not to inform Sloane of Sydney's suspicious activities.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E02 - Trust Me
2.plot: Sydney must decide whether her mother's goodwill gesture was sincere or an attempt to kill her. Will witnesses Francie discussing her restaurant plans with a man whose affiliations are questionable, and Sloane is made a full partner in the malevolent Alliance of Twelve.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E03 - Cipher
2.plot: Sydney must outwit Sark in order to find a crucial piece of intel. Meanwhile, Jack faces Sydney's mother for the first time in almost 20 years. Will finally meets Vaughn and Sloane is haunted by his wife's death.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E04 - Dead Drop
2.plot: Sydney's dealings with her mother lead Jack to take drastic measures to ensure his daughter's safety. Meanwhile Will is confronted by a mysterious woman about resurrecting his story on SD-6.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E05 - The Indicator
2.plot: Sydney discovers a terrifying secret when she's sent on a case to track down a new generation of weapons. Meanwhile, Vaughn suspects Jack of setting up Sydney's mother to take a fall. Sloane tells Jack the truth about Emily's death.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E06 - Salvation
2.plot: Sydney's trust in her father begins to fade. Meanwhile, Sydney and Vaughn may have been exposed to a deadly virus while in Taipei; Sloane haunted by Emily's death begins to unravel. Vaughn enlists Will to help research a case.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E07 - The Counteragent
2.plot: Sydney races to find a cure for Vaughn, but in order to find the antidote, Sydney must make a deal with Sark that could endanger Sloane's life. Meanwhile, Will continues his research for Vaughn and discovers some disturbing inconsistencies involving 20-year-old standardized IQ tests.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E08 - Passage (1)
2.plot: Sydney, Jack and Irina must put aside their differences and go undercover as a loving family in order to seize six nuclear warheads from an unfriendly nation. Meanwhile, Sloane announces to a suspicious staff that Mr. Sark will be working with SD-6, and later he is contacted by an unknown group claiming that Emily is still alive.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E09 - Passage (2)
2.plot: While continuing on a mission to take control of six nuclear warheads, Sydney and Jack discover where Irina's loyalties lie when she meets up with Gerard Cuvee. Meanwhile, Sloane informs the Alliance that Emily may still be alive.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E10 - The Abduction
2.plot: Jack meets Alliance counterintelligence head Ariana Kane, who is sent in to investigate Emily's disappearance and to discover who is trying to blackmail Sloane. Meanwhile, Marshall is sent on his first mission with Sydney as his partner. Vaughn schedules Will to take a CIA psych test. Francie gets suspicious over Sydney and Will's secretive behavior.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E11 - A Higher Echelon
2.plot: After completing his first mission with Sydney, Marshall's life is placed in mortal danger. Meanwhile, Ariana Kane suspects Jack as being the prime suspect in the disappearance of Sloane's wife. Vaughn learns the truth about Jack's involvement in the murder of CIA agent Haladki and Sydney confides in Francie about her feelings for a fellow co-worker.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E12 - The Getaway
2.plot: While Alliance counterintelligence head Ariana Kane tracks Sydney in order to catch her fugitive father, Jack elicits Irina's help in finding Sloane's blackmailer. Meanwhile, Sydney and Vaughn risk exposing their covers to SD-6 when they share a romantic dinner together while on a case in France.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E13 - Phase One
2.plot: Sydney and Jack are confronted by the new director of SD-6 who replaces Sloane, whose whereabouts and intentions are unknown. Meanwhile, romantic sparks begin to fly between Francie and Will.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E14 - Double Agent
2.plot: Sydney, Vaughn and Jack must determine whether CIA agent Lennox is who he says he is after his deep cover mission is compromised.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E15 - A Free Agent
2.plot: Sydney must make a life-defining decision regarding her future with the agency, while Sloane re-emerges and continues his obsessive quest to piece together the mysterious Rambaldi artifacts - with the reluctant aid of a kidnapped scientist. Meanwhile, Dixon's marriage is put to the test after he tells his wife the truth about his occupation.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E16 - Firebomb
2.plot: A mysterious Rambaldi device's powers are finally revealed and Sloane has its secrets. Meanwhile, Vaughn begs Dixon to aid the CIA in rescuing Sydney, Will is called upon to participate in a crucial CIA briefing session, and Sydney senses that Francie is keeping secrets.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E17 - A Dark Turn
2.plot: Sydney begins to question where Vaughn's allegiances lie when she learns through CIA Agent Yeager that he is under investigation by the Agency. Meanwhile Irina and a crucial Rambaldi manuscript are used as bait to try to catch Sloane, and Sydney welcomes Dixon to the CIA.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E18 - Truth Takes Time
2.plot: Sydney faces off with her mother, while Emily must decide whether to side with her husband or betray him.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E19 - Endgame
2.plot: Sydney defies her father in her attempt to rescue a kidnapped scientist, while Sloane, seeking revenge, becomes more dangerous than ever. Meanwhile, Francie manipulates an unsuspecting Will for his agency connections.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E20 - Countdown
2.plot: A Rambaldi artifact prophesizes that an apocalyptic event will soon take place, and Dixon's grief leads Vaughn and agency psychologist Dr. Barnett to question his intentions, as his thirst for revenge on Sloane intensifies. Meanwhile Sloane receives a life-changing revelation from a mysterious monk in Nepal, Sydney and Dixon hunt for the killer who stole the heart from his victim.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E21 - Second Double
2.plot: Sydney begins to question Will's identity when he's arrested for espionage, under suspicion of being a double. Meanwhile Sark and Irina plot to recover the Rambaldi heart, and Sloane makes Jack a business proposal.

2.title: FR - Alias - S02E22 - The Telling
2.plot: Sydney finally confronts her mother, who reveals her true motivation. Sloane, for his part, begins to execute his new grand plan and Will struggles to figure out who's behind his set-up.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E01 - The Two
3.plot: Sydney tries to piece together the last two years of her life and discovers the fates of her friends and family. She confronts Vaughn about his marriage and learns the shocking fates of Jack and Sloane. Meanwhile, she is granted temporary CIA clearance on a case that may help her regain her memory.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E02 - Succession
3.plot: Sydney's search for her past leads to a jailed Sark, but their Q&A is cut short when he becomes the ransom for a pair of abducted CIA scientists, whose kidnappers may be tied to the murder of his father. Jack contacts an old friend of sorts for info on Sloane's new world-peace project, and Vaughn makes a decision about his future as an operative.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E03 - Reunion
3.plot: Sydney and Vaughn are reunited again as a team to prevent Sark from destroying the nation's satellite communications system. Meanwhile, Jack must find a way to stop Marshall from uncovering the identity of a familiar murderer. Sydney accompanies Vaughn and Lauren as they meet with Sloane to ask for a favor.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E04 - A Missing Link
3.plot: Sydney discovers a link to her missing two years in the form of Simon Walker, the dangerous and sexy leader of a group determined on retrieving deadly biological weapons. Meanwhile, Vaughn struggles with his own feelings of jealousy and longing while Sydney is on her mission, aware of the pressures his job is putting on his marriage to Lauren. Jack takes matters into his own hands to protect his daughter, purposefully revealing Sydney's deadly secret to Dixon in order to preserve her position inside the CIA.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E05 - Repercussions
3.plot: While Vaughn's life hangs in the balance, Lauren butts heads with Sydney after learning the part she played in his stabbing. Meanwhile, Sydney further questions Sloane's allegiances after he is kidnapped by Kazari Bomani, a kingpin in The Covenant; Jack's cover is jeopardized when he meets with Simon to dig up information on Sydney's missing two years; and Marshall is sent on his second mission with Sydney, posing as a high-stakes, southern gambler.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E06 - The Nemesis
3.plot: Sydney's emotions are turned inside-out when she comes face-to-face with Allison, Francie's doppelgänger, who was presumed dead but is now a key figure in The Covenant. Meanwhile Lauren's search for Lazarey's murderer leads her closer to discovering a connection to Sydney, and Sydney begrudgingly is assigned as Sloane's CIA handler.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E07 - Prelude
3.plot: Jack takes drastic measures to ensure that the NSC never finds out the truth about Sydney's murder of a Russian diplomat. But his actions place a heavy strain on Vaughn's marriage, as Lauren gets closer and closer to the truth about Sydney. Meanwhile, Sydney agrees to go on a mission with Sloane in order to thwart plans to obtain the operating system to a deadly weapon -- and she discovers an unlikely ally in the hunt for her missing two years.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E08 - Breaking Point
3.plot: When Sydney is taken into custody by the NSC, Jack and Vaughn have no choice but to ally themselves with Sloane to rescue her. But with only hours to spare before she is forced to undergo a radical surgery to recover her memories, they must put togther an extraction team, headed by freelance operative Brill (Richard Roundtree, "Shaft"). Meanwhile, Lauren faces an impossible choice -- side with the NSC, who she wants to believe is doing the right thing, or with her husband.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E09 - Conscious
3.plot: After making a shocking discovery in the desert, Sydney agrees to submit to an experimental procedure conducted by an eccentric doctor, designed to retrieve her lost memories. But while Jack and Vaughn look on, Sydney's mind proves surprisingly resistant to letting her remember her missing time -- and the process of recovering it could end up killing her. Meanwhile, Lauren makes a great sacrifice in order to make her alibi believable to Lindsey after breaking Sydney out of NSC custody, and Sloane finds himself boxed in by an unlikely enemy -- one who wants to see Sydney Bristow eliminated permanently

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E10 - Remnants
3.plot: The identity of the mysterious "St. Aidan" forces Sydney to pull a stunned Will out of witness protection. But the pursuit sends the two old friends on a collision course with Allison -- the woman who ruined both their lives. Meanwhile, a zealous Lindsey arrests Jack and Vaughn as conspirators in Sydney's escape from NSC custody, Sloane, still under pressure from Lindsey, puts a plan in motion to eliminate Sydney, and Dr. Brezzel has an unpleasant run-in with Sark.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E11 - Full Disclosure
3.plot: Sydney finally learns the shocking truth about her missing two years from an unlikely source.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E12 - Crossings
3.plot: Jack contacts a mysterious woman with ties to Irina to help him free Sydney and Vaughn, who have been captured and face a North Korean firing squad. But Jack is faced with a curious conundrum when the woman tells him that she will not put the rescue plan in motion until he fulfills a favor - assassinate Sloane.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E13 - After Six
3.plot: Sydney and Vaughn are sent to retrieve the Doleac Agenda to gain an advantage over The Covenant. For this, Sydney and Weiss must convince rogue security systems designer Toni Cummings to help the CIA break into a Lethal Response System. Meanwhile, Sark approaches an unlikely ally to kill the Covenant's Cell leaders.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E14 - Blowback
3.plot: While trying to retrieve a bomb, Sydney and Vaughn are ambushed by unidentified assailants. Meanwhile, Lauren and Sark continue to solidify their new partnership, Sloane divulges a dark secret to Dr. Barnett and Marshall shows the strains of new fatherhood.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E15 - Façade
3.plot: Sydney and Vaughn must convince bomb maker Daniel Ryan that they are part of The Covenant in order to find out where he has hidden one of his devices. But Sydney discovers that her ties to the bomber could lead him on a suicide mission.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E16 - Taken
3.plot: Sydney attempts to rescue Dixon's kids after they are kidnapped by Sark, Lauren's status as a double agent is put to the test when she learns that she has to work with her father, and Sloane is framed as a CIA mole.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E17 - The Frame
3.plot: Sydney and Vaughn must track Kazari Bomani down to get hold of a piece of the Rambaldi puzzle. Meanwhile, Jack reveals his suspicions to Senator Reed about his daughter Lauren's allegiances, and Vaughn decides what to do about his marriage.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E18 - Unveiled
3.plot: Sydney and Jack warn a disbelieving Vaughn about their suspicions of Lauren being the CIA mole. Meanwhile, Bomani and Sark take possession of the Rambaldi machine, Sydney and Vaughn must stop a Covenant virus that's crippling medical facilities around the world, Sloane's secret is revealed to Jack, and Bomani begins to lose faith in Lauren's ability to carry out her Covenant missions.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E19 - Hourglass
3.plot: After finding out that Lauren is working for the Covenant, Vaughn is told to keep up the façade of a happy marriage in order to keep tabs on his wife's activities. But he's in for a shock when he uncovers the truth about Lauren's mother, Olivia. Meanwhile, Jack refuses to help exonerate Sloane of his crimes and put in motion a stay of execution, and a monk discloses the identity of the Rambaldi "Passenger" to Sydney.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E20 - Blood Ties
3.plot: After discovering the identity of the Rambaldi "Passenger," Sydney and Jack seek the aid of Sloane, to track the "Passenger" down. Meanwhile, after learning a secret about his father from Thomas Brill, Vaughn is kidnapped and tortured by Lauren and Sark, who are about to track "The Passenger" down themselves.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E21 - Legacy
3.plot: With the aid of Katya Derevko and CIA imprisoned security systems designer Toni Cummings, Sydney and Vaughn attempt to track down Sloane and Nadia. But Lauren and Sark are also in hot pursuit of them in order to uncover the secrets of Rambaldi. Meanwhile, Vaughn's obsession with tracking down Lauren is beginning to consume him, Sydney and Vaughn turn the tables on an old foe, and Katya expresses her attraction to Jack.

3.title: FR - Alias - S03E22 - Resurrection
3.plot: Lauren stages a stunning betrayal to steal classified materials from the CIA. Meanwhile, Vaughn comes face to face with his darkest demons in pursuit of his wife; Nadia must decide whether or not she can trust her father, Sloane, in the pursuit of Rambaldi's most priceless artifact; and Sydney receives a shattering revelation that will make her question everything - and everyone - she thought she could trust.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E03 - The Awful Truth
4.plot: Sydney must seduce a murderous arms dealer in order to track down a stolen NSA code-breaker. Meanwhile, Vaughn fears for Weiss's life, and Sydney and Jack argue about telling Nadia the truth about her mother.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E04 - Ice
4.plot: Sydney and Vaughn go undercover to track down a deadly new bio-weapon. Meanwhile, Sydney is concerned about Vaughn not having yet put Lauren behind, and Nadia turns to a Jack to find out the truth about her mother.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E05 - Welcome To Liberty Village
4.plot: Sydney and Vaughn go undercover as a married couple so as to find a weapon that could bring back the Dark Ages. However, the neighborhood they've infiltrated is not as charming as it seems.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E06 - Nocturne
4.plot: After being infected with a hallucinogen, Sydney starts to lose touch with reality. Vaughn and Jack must rush to find an antidote before Sydney puts her life - and others next to her - into danger.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E07 - Détente
4.plot: While Sydney and Nadia argue about Nadia's acceptance of Sloane's fatherly concerns, Sloane worries about Nadia's well-being when she and Sydney go undercover as wealthy, irresponsible young heiresses to uncover the whereabouts of a deadly chemical.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E08 - Echoes
4.plot: Sloane temporarily steps down as Director of his Task Force and gives Jack full authority over the next assignment, which involves Anna Espinosa, Sydney's old foe. However, Anna turns the tables on APO when she captures Nadia and forces Sydney to do her biddings. Sydney tells Nadia about the Rambaldi's prophecy which dictates that two sisters will fight and only one will survive. Meanwhile, Vaughn visits Sark and tries to trick him into helping them to catch Anna. In the end, one of the sisters is mortally wounded by Anna.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E09 - A Man of His Word
4.plot: While Nadia is in a coma, Sark is taken into APO to help them infiltrate Cadmus Revolutionary Front and retrieve the bomb, but in return he demands to see Lauren's corpse and that Vaughn opens her coffin for him. Nadia may be the only person with the intel they need to intercept the bomb, so Jack is forced to prematurely wake Nadia from her coma, endangering her life, which doesn't please Sloane when he finds out.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E10 - The Index
4.plot: Dixon enlists Sydney to help him prove that Sloane is double-crossing the CIA and using APO to steal the Blackwell Index, a master blackmail list, and to reconstruct the Alliance. Sydney makes her way into Sloane's house so as to copy the encryption key from his secure phone and crack his calls. When Nadia finds her, she becomes disappointed in her sister. Meanwhile, Vaughn discovers something disturbing about his father when he visits his comatose uncle.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E11 - The Road Home
4.plot: Sydney must protect the life of a civilian, whom she unintentionally put in danger. Meanwhile, Jack plans a visit with an old friend, and Vaughn uncovers more disturbing secrets about his father.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E12 - The Orphan
4.plot: Nadia puts her own life - as well Sydney's and Weiss's - in danger after failing to unveil her past through a dangerous criminal. Meanwhile, Vaughn finds a person who is somehow connected to his father and Nadia as well.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E13 - Tuesday
4.plot: When a mission goes wrong, Sydney's is placed in danger and Marshall is the only one who can save her. Meanwhile, Dixon is exposed to a deadly pathogen released inside APO.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E14 - Nightingale
4.plot: Sydney and Vaughn risk their lives trying to find out the truth about Vaughn's father. Finally, we find out why Jack and Sloane seem to be conspiring together against Sydney and Vaughn.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E15 - Pandora
4.plot: In an attempt to talk to Sydney, Katya Derevko deliberately poisons herself and is temporally taken out from her cell. Once Nadia tells her sister about this, Sydney visits her aunt to tell her to stay away from Nadia. However, Katya unsettles Sydney by telling her that someone framed her mother as a means of getting her killed. Sydney sets off in search of the truth behind this story. Meanwhile, Vaughn becomes a rogue agent by getting involved with the people who might know his father's whereabouts. In the end, he and Sydney find out that the man behind these two plots is no other than A. Sloane. However, things are not exactly as they seem to be.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E16 - Another Mister Sloane
4.plot: Sydney and Vaughn tell Jack about Sloane's alleged involvement in Vaughn's search for his father and Irina's contract on Sydney's life. After cornering Sloane, they both conclude that someone is framing him. The APO team set a trap to catch the fake A. Sloane, but they fail. Once they realize what "Arvin Clone" is after, Sloane suggests he should step down temporarily. However, Sydney reluctantly convinces him to stay on the case, since he may the only person able to anticipate "Arvin Clone's" next move. But Nadia fears that this pursuit may revive her father's past obsession – Rambaldi.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E17 - A Clean Conscience
4.plot: Nadia's former caretaker, Sophia, has been severely beaten. She contacts Nadia and asks to meet her. Sloane is told by Sophia that she was beaten up, because someone is trying to track Nadia down, so he and Jack decide to tell their daughters the truth – Elena Derevko, the third and the most cruelest of the Derevko sisters, has been surveilling both Sydney and Nadia for a decade. Meanwhile, Jack's doctor advises him to tell Sydney about his illness.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E18 - Mirage
4.plot: Jack's illness has caused him to hallucinate about a cure. Sydney must recreate the time when Jack was working for the CIA and hid the only man who might be able to help him now. For this, Sydney must play her own mother. Meanwhile, Sophia moves in with Sydney and Nadia.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E19 - In Dreams...
4.plot: The team captures the Sloane Imposter and questions him to find a rare Rambaldi orchid. The real Sloane must relive a painful memory in order to get the Imposter to reveal the orchid location.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E20 - The Descent
4.plot: After a tactical group infiltrates the DSR and steals Rambaldi artifacts, CIA director Hayden Chase discovers that the alarms at the DSR were disabled from Nadia's computer, allowing the raid to happen, and shows up at the apartment to question her.  Soon Sloane and Jack arrive and suspect that Sophia, who had access to the computer while she was living with Syd and Nadia, is Elena Derevko.  They follow her trail to a dead Rambaldi follower, a stunning betrayal, and a presumed dead family member...

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E21 - Search and Rescue
4.plot:
Rambaldi's catastrophic endgame begins to fall into place as a giant version of the Circumference/Mueller device is found floating over city in Russia, driving the citizens made. After a wounded Dixon reveals that Irina is alive, Sydney, Nadia, and Jack set off to find her. Irina had been captured, and then duplicated using Project Helix, in order to give the impression that she was dead.

Sydney and Nadia discover Irina is being held inside a camp in Tikal, safely in the clutches of Elena's army. Irina had apparently been working to counter Elena's organization, the Covenant, and actually PREVENT the Rambaldi endgame. Irina tells of a page she destroyed, a page that was key to Rambaldi's endgame. Under torture, she finally broke and recreated it for Elena. After a short respite, the transport turns towards Russia, and Sydney, Vaughn, Jack, Nadia, and Irina parachute down, towards Elena, Sloane, the Circumference....and destiny.

4.title: FR - Alias - S04E22 - Before the Flood
4.plot: Jack, Sydney, Irina, Vaughn and Nadia parachute into Sovogda. They're supposed to dismantle a giant red ball turning people into zombies. At APO, Marshall and Weiss use the Blackwell Index to blackmail the Russian minister into giving them the access codes to a Russian satellite, they discover that Elena is uplinking the satellite. A CIA agent, Brodien reminds them that the Rambaldi device is broadcasting a subaudible frequency that physiologically alters people who drink it and it is irreversible. Elena learns of the APO team's arrival.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E01 - Prophet Five
5.plot: After learning that the man she has known as Michael Vaughn is under investigation and suspected of being a double agent, Sydney begins to question whether their business and personal relationship over the years had all been a lie.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E02 - ...1...
5.plot: Sydney teams up with Renée - a fugitive on the CIA's most wanted list -- to track down the murderer of a close friend before the killer can strike again. Meanwhile, Jack enlists a reluctant new agent, Thomas Grace (Balthazar Getty), and Weiss struggles to decide whether or not to accept a promotion that would force him to leave his colleagues.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E03 - The Shed
5.plot: Sydney is forced to partner on a mission with new APO agent Thomas Grace. They discover that Rachel Gibson -- a spy suspected of being involved in activities against the U.S. -- has something shockingly in common with Sydney.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E04 - Mockingbird
5.plot: While Sloane awaits the outcome of his sentencing, Sydney's life is put in grave danger when Gordon Dean discovers that Rachel is still alive.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E05 - Out of the Box
5.plot: Sydney and Tom discover that Renie has stolen the cryo container, and soon find themselves under siege by a group of mercanaries who want the contents of the container. Meanwhile, Sloane takes matters into his own hands to get himself back into APO.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E06 - Solo
5.plot: Rachel receives a little help from Syd for her first solo mission while Sloan is back at APO in frequent contact with Gordon Dean.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E07 - Fait Accompli
5.plot: Sydney and APO attempt to discover whom Gordon Dean is working for and what their end game is. Meanwhile, when the group claiming to have a cure for daughter Nadia continues to play mind games with him, Sloane struggles for control.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E08 - Bob
5.plot: Rachel and Sydney have to join forces with Julian Sark to prevent a deadly micropulse bomb from falling in the hands of a dangerous mercenary.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E09 - The Horizon
5.plot: Sydney teams up with Vaughn after being kidnapped and being placed in a hypnotic. What Sydney doesn't know is that the kidnapper is a very familiar face with an obscure interest in her unborn child.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E10 - S.O.S.
5.plot: The entire APO gang is trapped inside the CIA offices and Weiss saves them. However, Weiss will not be returning to APO, he will just be helping the others on a mission to obtain information regarding Sydney.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E11 - Maternal Instinct
5.plot: Sydney gives birth to the baby, but Sloane may need something from the newborn. Nadia awakens.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E12 - There's Only One Sydney Bristow
5.plot: One month after the baby is born, Sydney is taking time off from work. Will is what pulls her back in the field while she's on maternity leave. The enemies realize that the best way to hurt Sydney is through her friends. Anna Espinosa also returns.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E13 - 30 Seconds
5.plot: While the gang starts to learn more about the Prophet 5, Sloane is distressed to learn that Prophet Five's cure for Nadia is just as likely to kill her. Meanwhile, Devlin returns, the search for Anna Espinosa continues, Rambaldi's prophetic Page 47 resurfaces, and Sydney offers Renée a job at APO.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E14 - I See Dead People
5.plot: Marshall reports to Jack that a microchip, found in Renée Rienne's body, is etched with the name 'Andre Micheaux'. Peyton tells Sloane that Sydney is being sent to Nepal to meet with someone regarding the chip. Sloane sends Anna, now Sydney's doppelgänger, to intercept. When Marshall discovers that the APO office is bugged, Jack frantically tries to reach Sydney to warn her before it is too late.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E15 - No Hard Feelings
5.plot: Sydney now posing as Anna, brings Peyton a microchip with a device hidden in it. Meanwhile Sloane finishes translating page 47 and reports that only the chosen one can complete the circle, which leads Sark and Sydney on a dangerous mission to a prison. Rachel finally discovers Tom's secret about what happened to his wife.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E16 - Reprisal
5.plot: In the first part of [the] Alias two-hour finale event, 'Reprisal,' Sloane takes Marshall and Rachel hostage in order to discover a crucial clue to Rambaldi's ultimate endgame, as Sydney, Vaughn and APO race to stop him.

5.title: FR - Alias - S05E17 - All The Time In The World
5.plot: Peyton tells Sloane that she has made a deal for the Rambaldi Sphere with an ally in China. Sloane arranges for stolen missiles to be sent to Hong Kong. Sloane's plan is revealed to the APO members, who race to stop him before he can use the Rambaldi Sphere to put the plan in motion. But this all leads to a long awaited confrontation between Sydney and Irina.

meta.plot: Un ancien professeur se voit offrir un second souffle lorsqu'une détective privée le recrute pour une mission d'infiltration dans une maison de retraite de San Francisco.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E01 - Tinker Tailor Older Spy
1.plot: Encouraged by his daughter to try something new, widower Charles Nieuwendyk answers an ad from a private eye seeking a mole at a retirement community.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E02 - The Man Who Knew Too Much About Bridges
1.plot: Charles charms his fellow residents at happy hour while finding his footing as a sleuth. But will a mysterious warning end the case before it even begins?

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E03 - The Emily Always Rings Twice
1.plot: Charles has some explaining to do when Emily unexpectedly arrives in town — and another missing item lands him in Elliott's cranky crosshairs.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E04 - The Curious Incident of the Dog in the Painting Class
1.plot: Pacific View's group activities give Charles the perfect opportunity to narrow down his list of suspects, but his chumminess raises concerns for Julie.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E05 - Presents and Clear Danger
1.plot: While Julie uses a lavish gift as bait, Charles tries to connect with Gladys. Virginia encourages Florence to splurge on something she's always wanted.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E06 - Our Man in Sacramento
1.plot: As the Pacific View community reels from a sudden loss, Charles goes on an emotional journey with Emily. Didi weighs an intriguing offer from corporate.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E07 - From Russian Hill with Love
1.plot: On a tour of San Francisco's historic sites, Charles and Calbert bond while talking about the past, present and future. Didi and Julie lock horns.

1.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S01E08 - The Spy Who Came In from the Cold
1.plot: When the pieces click into place, Charles faces the difficult task of revealing his true purpose at Pacific View. Emily helps him unpack the past.

2.title: FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - Espion à l'ancienne - S02E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: Durant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, des histoires intimes sur fond d'événements qui sont entrés dans l'Histoire.

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When war breaks, translator Harry Chase vows to help his Polish lover Kasia flee Warsaw, but how will he explain this to his sweetheart Lois, waiting for him at home in Manchester?

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A month after the outbreak of war, Warsaw is unrecognisable, while Manchester, on the surface, appears very much the same. Will there be a warm welcome home for Harry?

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: December 1939, and Tom fights for his life on board the HMS Exeter at the Battle of River Plate. Meanwhile, Harry and Lois have a more personal battle to fight.

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Harry’s courage is tested at Louvain as he comes face to face with a German sniper, and Kasia’s resistance activity in Warsaw intensifies.

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Harry leads his unit on the route to Dunkirk as they fight to make it onto the beach and aboard a ship. Grzegorz and Tom also struggle to survive the chaos of the evacuation.

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: June 1940. The Nazis have taken Paris with not a bullet fired. Webster and Albert's life in the city they love will never be the same again.

1.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: On a Polish mission as part of the SOE, Harry grasps a second chance at saving Kasia from the horrors of Warsaw, while Lois looks set for happiness with new love, Vernon. Season finale.

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: The war reaches the sands of the Egyptian desert while bombs fall on Manchester, and Harry introduces an explosive force into Robina’s household, leaving her reeling.

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: As Harry struggles to adapt to the reality of desert combat, Lois still longs to leave home. In Paris, Henriette is in grave danger, and a mysterious stranger arrives at Robina’s.

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: As Stan and Rajib make a hasty retreat across the desert, Marga reasserts her commitment to the führer. Meanwhile, David is in peril in the skies over France.

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: As Kasia takes on her first assignment as an agent, Rajib’s military values are tested. Meanwhile, a familiar face comes to David’s aid

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Tragedy strikes at the heart of Harry’s unit as the siege drags on in Tobruk. In Manchester, Kasia is confronted by more of the horrors of the war. In France, romance blossoms between David and Henriette.

2.title: FR - Un monde en feu - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Harry returns to Manchester, but Kasia is determined to leave. In Europe, Marga and Henriette must each make their escape, while north Africa becomes even more brutal for Rajib.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E01 - Fingerprint
1.plot: In 1865 two young adventurers, Anna Wetherell and Emery Staines, meet on the last day of their voyage to New Zealand.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E02 - The Place You Return
1.plot: Lydia and Carver hatch a plan to free Carver from his convict past. Emery sets sail to the goldfields in search of Anna. In 1866, the results of Crosbie Wells' autopsy are revealed.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E03 - Leverage
1.plot: Anna's suspicions are aroused as Lydia prepares to host a party. Lauderback is blackmailed. In 1866, Crosbie Wells is buried.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E04 - The Other Half
1.plot: In 1865, Emery and Anna have a disastrous reunion in Hokitika, Emery learns about Carver's past and Quee makes a rewarding discovery. In 1866, hope is fading for Anna - in desperation she takes matters into her own hands.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E05 - Paradox
1.plot: A stranger arrives in town and interrupts a secret council between the men of Hokitika. The events from the night Crosbie Wells died are pieced together.

1.title: FR - The Luminaries - S01E06 - The Old Moon in the Young Moon's Arms
1.plot: Anna is tried for murder. New evidence reveals a connection between Lauderback and Crosbie Wells.

meta.plot: Entre Londres et la Nouvelle-Zélande, une histoire d'amour, de meurtre et de revanche vue par le prisme de deux amants.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: On a solo trip to the Poconos, writer and pundit Muncie Daniels meets a mysterious new neighbor — then finds him dead under shocking circumstances.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E02 - Djibouti
1.plot: As the net tightens around him, Muncie moves to protect his family and offload incriminating evidence. An FBI photograph contains an important clue.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E03 - Discord
1.plot: A trip to an anarchist gun commune turns up a promising lead. Muncie asks Elena for a favor. Quiñones reveals what — and who — he's really investigating.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E04 - Radioactive
1.plot: With his face all over the headlines, Muncie is forced into hiding. But he's running out of options to clear his name and keep his loved ones safe.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E05 - Icarus
1.plot: Lucie revisits her past and reconnects with old friends. Muncie and Quiñones hatch a plan to expose Magnusson and bring him down.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E06 - Loco
1.plot: Quiñones and Khalil arrive at Magnusson's, only to find Muncie gone. They eventually track him to a nearby hospital... but someone else got there first.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E07 - DNA
1.plot: Muncie mourns the loss of a friend — and learns to accept help from the people he loves. All the while, a stealthy assassin is hunting him down.

1.title: FR - The Madness - S01E08 - No More Madness
1.plot: A late-night break-in threatens everything Muncie holds dear. Meanwhile, he has proof of his innocence — but will the world ever hear the whole truth?

meta.plot: Muncie Daniels, un consultant politique devenu présentateur TV, ne sait plus trop où il en est. Mais lors d'un congé sabbatique dans les Poconos pour écrire son grand roman américain, il devient le seul témoin du meurtre d'un suprémaciste blanc notoire… et est bientôt accusé à tort du crime. Muncie se retrouve soudain en cavale, obligé de se battre pour se disculper et démêler un complot mondial avant qu'il soit trop tard. En cours de route, il va renouer avec sa famille, trouver des alliés inattendus et lutter contre la désinformation à l'époque de l'infox.

1.title: FR - Sarah Scazzi – Le meurtre qui a déchiré l’Italie - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Sarah Scazzi – Le meurtre qui a déchiré l’Italie - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Sarah Scazzi – Le meurtre qui a déchiré l’Italie - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Sarah Scazzi – Le meurtre qui a déchiré l’Italie - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Le 26 aout 2010, Sarah disparait à Avetrana. Les habitants sont tourmentés, surtout sa cousine Sabrina. Cela ressemble à une fugue mais ce n’en est rien. Pendant que tout le monde la recherche, Sarah s’est simplement volatilisée sans laisser de trace. C’est l’un des cas les plus médiatisés dans l’histoire des crimes italiens, l’histoire troublante d’une disparition, que l’on suit à travers les yeux des protagonistes.

1.title: FR - Docteur Odyssey - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: The Odyssey's new onboard doctor, Max Bankman gets acquainted with Capt. Massey and his medical team, Avery and Tristan, while treating crises miles from shore.

1.title: FR - Docteur Odyssey - S01E02 - Singles Week
1.plot: It's Singles Week on The Odyssey, and lust is in the air. As Max, Tristan and Avery navigate their relationship, the crew fends off advances from passengers. With rising desire and quickly spreading ailments, Max and the team rush to restore order.

meta.plot: Max et son équipe restreinte, mais experte, doivent gérer des cas médicaux uniques en haute mer.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E01 - Spaceship
1.plot: Gabby and Pandy unbox their first surprise, show off their shrinking skills and take to the dollhouse for a meowt-of-this-world mission.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E02 - Gabby Gets the Hiccups
1.plot: It’s time for another dollhouse delivery! Gabby and Pandy share their new Meow Meow Mail with Cakey and work on a cure for a sneaky case of hiccups.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E03 - Hamster Kitties
1.plot: A fuzzy delivery contains a cuddly surprise for Baby Box. In the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy attempt to keep up with some cute and crafty critters.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E04 - Kitty School
1.plot: As Floyd settles in for a tasty treat, Gabby grabs a new piece of mail from the Meow Meow Mailbox and prepares for an action-packed day at kitty school.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E05 - Kitty Cat Cam
1.plot: Fun is only a snapshot away as Gabby and Pandy set out to take a group photo — and make time for a picture-perfect scavenger hunt!

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E06 - Dollhouse Defenders
1.plot: Super Gabby and Super Pandy shrink down to save the day from a mischievous CatRat. Can they solve his playful puzzles? Let the marvelous missions begin!

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E07 - Mixed-Up Dollhouse
1.plot: A sparkly Meow Meow Mailbox surprise leads to a mysterious dollhouse mix-up. Can Gabby and the kitties find a fix... and some bubbly fun?

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E08 - Game Show
1.plot: Ready. Set. Compete! CatRat takes center stage and hosts a series of dazzling dollhouse games. Will the crew win enough tickets to take home prizes?

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E09 - Kitty Pirates
1.plot: Gabby and Pandy delight in a day of pirate-themed adventures, featuring music, maps and magical travel. Cakey leads a tasty treat tutorial.

1.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S01E10 - MerCat Gets Her Sparkle Back
1.plot: Mush, mash and mix in a dash! Gabby and her friends prepare for a spa day. Meanwhile, MerCat deals with a sparkle disaster. Can the gang find a fix?

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E01 - Itty Bitty Blossom
2.plot: A darling delivery leads to a garden adventure when Gabby and Pandy call on Kitty Fairy and crew to help grow and soothe an itty bitty blossom.

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E02 - Dollhouse Store Day
2.plot: It’s almost time to get groovy at the music store grand opening! Can Gabby and Pandy earn enough kitty coins to buy an instrument?

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E03 - Kitty Fairy’s Sleepover
2.plot: As Floyd snuggles up for bedtime, Gabby, Pandy and Pillow Cat prepare for a sleepover in Kitty Fairy’s garden, complete with a magical pajama tree.

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E04 - Let's Make a Movie!
2.plot: Lights, camera, CatRat! Gabby and the gang help turn a beloved fairy tale into a movie and get crafty with costumes, props and sound effects.

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E05 - Pete the Polar Bear
2.plot: A frosty friend from the North Pole pays a visit to the dollhouse and learns all about the splish-splash spirit on his very first beach day.

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E06 - Kitty Rangers
2.plot: Gabby and Pandy receive special sashes and start their journey as kitty rangers! Can they use their new skills to solve a missing mama mystery?

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E07 - The Meow-Mazing Games
2.plot: Get ready to race, jump and fly as Gabby, Pandy, Carlita and the DooDads compete for a big, beautiful Meow-Mazing Games trophy!

2.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S02E08 - Pandy's Birthday
2.plot: Next stop: Birthday Island! In honor of Pandy’s big day, Gabby prepares a heartfelt gift, and the dollhouse friends celebrate with a series of surprises.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E01 - The Dollhouse Hotel
3.plot: A tiny suitcase surprise leads to a fancy hotel stay for Gabby and Pandy, featuring "cat-abulous" spa treatments and a popping pool party.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E02 - A Knight’s Tail
3.plot: Gabby and Pandy become knights in training and practice bravery by crossing a moat, mixing potions and more.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E03 - DJ's Glow Ride
3.plot: It's time to light up the night with a glow-in-the-dark delivery; Gabby, Pandy and DJ Catnip get to work on a train-building project.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E04 - Rainy Day Banana
3.plot: Inspired by a sparkly banana, Gabby and her friends make the most of a rainy day in the dollhouse and craft songs and snacks.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E05 - CatRat the Bandit
3.plot: Gabby and Pandy say "howdy" to a cowboy adventure as they hit trails and rails to protect a pouch of golden nuggets from CatRat.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E06 - DJ Catnip Gets His Groove Back
3.plot: Gabby, Pandy and DJ Catnip are ready to make music and search high and low for moving and grooving sounds.

3.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S03E07 - Kitty Fairy Gets Sick
3.plot: After Kitty Fairy catches a cold, Gabby and Pandy deliver dandelion soup and step in to save the day.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E01 - Cakey’s Cupcake Cousins
4.plot: It's cousin time; Bakey, Flakey, Marshapan, and Paddycake visit Cakey and the dollhouse gang for a "sprinkle-rific" day of yummy snacks and hug attacks.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E02 - It’s Purrsday!
4.plot: Gabby and friends go all out for an extra special holiday, throwing a "paw-tastic" party, complete with homemade decorations and dessert.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E03 - Dollhouse Safari
4.plot: Gabby, Pandy and their curious crew set out on an animal safari to find a mysterious creature.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E04 - Fluffy Flufferton
4.plot: Glittery and glamorous Fluffy Flufferton is the most "a-meowzing" pop star; the gang helps her shake things up before a big concert.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E05 - Abra-CAT-Dabra!
4.plot: A tiny top hat delivery leads to a dazzling day for new magician Baby Box; meanwhile, her closest friends help her perform a boppin'-and-hoppin' trick.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E06 - The Fairy Festival!
4.plot: It's fairy o'clock and the start of a fantastic festival, featuring rides, games, cotton candy, and a new friend with a flower contest dream.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E07 - Dollhouse FairyTales
4.plot: Tall tales come to life with a king, a mermaid and so much more as Gabby and the gang create and celebrate enchanting fairytales in a storybook castle.

4.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S04E08 - The Easter Kitty Bunny
4.plot: Gabby and Pandy practise patience as they wait for a super cute egg to hatch; luckily, Kitty Fairy, MerCat and DJ Catnip are there to lend helping paws.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E01 - Gabby, I Shrunk the Kitties!
5.plot: When Gabby and Pandy turn tiny from one of MerCat's potions, they'll need to gather the right ingredients to help them grow back to their usual size.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E02 - Mission to CATurn
5.plot: Gabby and Pandy blast off to Planet Caturn after CatRat gets stuck there looking for space cheese.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E03 - Doodlebook
5.plot: Gabby finds a book with the same doodle on every page; inside the dollhouse, the Gabby Cats use their imagination to add their own spin to the drawings.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E04 - Cupcake Tree
5.plot: Cupcake expert Cakey helps Gabby and Pandy shrink down a giant cupcake tree to rescue CatRat and the Gabby Cats from its overgrown branches.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E05 - Dollhouse Detectives
5.plot: Gabby and Pandy play detectives when things start to suddenly and mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse.

5.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S05E06 - Happy CAT-O-Ween!
5.plot: Everyone's in the Cat-O-Ween spirit; Gabby and Pandy make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for treats with MerCat, and make banana ghosts with Cakey.

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E01 - A CAT-Tabulous Christmas
6.plot: Meow-y Christmas! Gabby and Pandy have some Christmas wishes — but first they need to help Figgy the Elf learn from her present-wrapping mistakes.

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E02 - CatRat's Puzzle Hunt
6.plot: CatRat takes Gabby and Pandy on a puzzle hunt through the dollhouse, where they solve riddles, play games and find fun surprises along the way.

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E03 - Super Thinkers!
6.plot: While completing an obstacle course to become superheroes, Gabby and Pandy learn how to use their bodies — as well as their minds!

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E04 - Paper Cup Popper
6.plot: After Gabby finds a box of paper cups, the friends get creative making paper cup animal crafts, telling stories and playing fur-tastic games.

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E05 - Dollhouse Dress-Up Chest
6.plot: Gabby uses the power of dress-up to travel to the Wild West, outer space and even underwater to help solve her friends' problems.

6.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S06E06 - Kico the KittyCorn
6.plot: On a rainy day, Gabby and friends must take care of Kico — a baby KittyCorn who's part kitty, part unicorn — until it's time for her to meet her family.

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E01 - Planes, Trains, and Kitty Balloons!
7.plot: Gabby and Pandy take a travel adventure using a train, plane, cruise ship and hot air balloon — but they can't forget to take pictures for CatRat.

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E02 - True Fairy Friends
7.plot: A glowing lantern leads Gabby and Pandy to a Fairy Fly House! But to meet their new neighbor, they'll need to prove they're helpful, kind and welcoming.

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E03 - Googly Eyes
7.plot: When Gabby and Pandy find a magical jar of googly eyes, they're in for a troublemaking surprise. Luckily MerCat knows just how to burst trouble's bubble.

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E04 - Spongey-Saurus
7.plot: Roar! Stomp! When Spongey-Saurus gets wet, he grows. When he dries out, he shrinks. Can Gabby and Pandy keep their new dino-pal the perfect size?

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E05 - Baby Box’s Meow-Seum Day!
7.plot: The Gabby Cats need to make a special art project for Baby Box's Meow-Seum Day. But with many different ways to make art, who knows what they'll create!

7.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S07E06 - Carlita the Ice Cream Truck!
7.plot: Carlita has transformed into an ice cream truck! Before she can deliver sweet treats to all the Gabby Cats, she'll need ice cream, a menu and a song.

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E01 - The Magical Mermaid-Lantis
8.plot: SunnyCat invites Gabby to a Mermaid Sparkle Party in Mermaid-Lantis! But to attend, she needs to bring MerCat's blue crystal — and her special sparkle.

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E02 - Snow Cruise
8.plot: Gabby and Pandy learn all about snow science when they take a cruise to the North Pole to see a rainbow igloo that Pete the Polar Bear and CatRat built.

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E03 - Baby Benny Box Is Here!
8.plot: The Box Family welcomes its newest member: Benny Box! When Mama Box needs a nap, Gabby and Pandy teach Baby Box how to babysit her new brother.

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E04 - The Mermaid Cruise Ship
8.plot: Gabby's going on a mermaid cruise! There are a ton of fun activities to do aboard the ship, like making mer-mazing crowns, tails and treats.

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E05 - Charm Bracelet Treasure Hunt
8.plot: Gabby and Pandy follow clues and solve riddles to find sparkly treasures on an a-meow-zing Dollhouse Treasure Hunt. Can they find all three?

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E06 - CatRat’s KittyFish
8.plot: When Gabby receives a fishbowl in her Meow Meow Mailbox, CatRat wants to use it as a home for his itty bitty kittyfish. But they keep hiding!

8.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S08E07 - The Mermaid Christmas Cruise
8.plot: Santa Kitty is on his way to the Mermaid Christmas Cruise to give the first present of the year to MerCat's baby sister Hsiu Hsiu — and we're invited!

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E01 - Music Festival
9.plot: When Gabby and Pandy score party passes to DJ Catnip's music festival, they board a groovy bus to watch shows featuring all their favorite Gabby Cats.

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E02 - Cakey's Birthday
9.plot: Cakey runs out of sprinkles on the most sprinkle-riffic day of the year: his birthday! Can Cakey's friends figure out a way to bring his sprinkles back?

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E03 - Pandy's Bad Day
9.plot: After messing up his hug attack and getting a hole in his Pandy Pack, Pandy realizes he's having a bad day — but things just keep getting worse.

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E04 - Baby Box's Crafty-riffic Adventure
9.plot: Gabby receives a Crafty-riffic Adventure Kit in her Dollhouse Delivery, which comes in handy when CatRat spends the day crafting silly bad guys.

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E05 - Silly Kitty Cubes
9.plot: Gabby brings her Silly Kitty Cubes with her to the dollhouse, where all the Gabby Cats play along by making up fun stories based on what they've rolled.

9.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S09E06 - Carlita's Ameowzing Race
9.plot: It's the day of Carlita's A-meow-zing Race! After choosing their racers, Gabby and her friends speed around solving puzzles to win a special surprise.

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E01 - Happy Birthday, Gabby!
10.plot: CatRat wants to plan a party for Gabby's birthday, but Gabby can't decide on a theme. Will she make up her mind in time for his big surprise?

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E02 - Marty the Party Cat
10.plot: There's a new Gabby Cat in town: Marty the Party Cat! Gabby and Pandy show Marty all the fun features in the party room to make him feel welcome.

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E03 - You Wish!
10.plot: Gabby gets a wishing fountain and helps make the kitties' wishes come true, but Pandy can't decide what he wants — until CatRat gets into a pickle!

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E04 - CatRat's Birthday Surprise
10.plot: It's CatRat's birthday! Help Gabby and the gang plan a super-secret surprise party for their feline friend and his very special guest, Fluffy Flufferton.

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E05 - Craft Bot
10.plot: Baby Box's Kitty Bots cause confusion in the dollhouse when they wind up in the wrong rooms. Can you help the cat pals find where the robots belong?

10.title: FR - Gabby's Dollhouse - S10E06 - Grandma CatRat
10.plot: CatRat wants everything to be perfect for his grandma's visit. But when things don't go as planned, the day is full of new and exciting surprises.

meta.plot: This colorful series leads preschoolers room to room through a fantastical dollhouse of delightful mini-worlds and irresistible kitty characters.

For as long as he can remember, Ichigo Kurosaki has been able to see ghosts. But when he meets Rukia, a Soul Reaper who battles evil spirits known as Hollows, he finds his life is changed forever. Now, with a newfound wealth of spiritual energy, Ichigo discovers his true calling: to protect the living and the dead from evil.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E01 - The Day I Became a Shinigami
1.plot: Fifteen-year-old Ichigo Kurosaki has the uncanny ability to see ghosts, but otherwise lives an ordinary life. However, once a Shinigami named Rukia Kuchiki appears before him, everything changes.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E02 - A Shinigami's Work
1.plot: After becoming a Shinigami, Ichigo Kurosaki refuses to help Rukia Kuchiki with her work as the local Shinigami of Karakura Town.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E03 - The Older Brother's Wish, the Younger Sister's Wish
1.plot: When a Hollowfied Sora Inoue attacks his younger sister, Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki set out to save her.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E04 - Cursed Parakeet
1.plot: When Yasutora Sado receives a parakeet that contains the Soul of a young boy, it is up to Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki to protect him from the Hollow that is after them.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E05 - Beat the Invisible Enemy!
1.plot: Rukia Kuchiki and Yasutora Sado team up to take on the Hollow Shrieker.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E06 - Fight to the Death! Ichigo vs. Ichigo
1.plot: At Rukia Kuchiki's behest, Ichigo Kurosaki puts an artificial soul in his body to take care of it and not arouse suspicion while he carries out his Substitute Shinigami duties, but the artificial soul has its own agenda.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E07 - Greetings from a Stuffed Lion
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki becomes friends with the Modified Soul, Kon, and puts him into a plushie.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E08 - June 17, Memories in the Rain
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki goes to his mother's grave with the rest of his family.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E09 - Unbeatable Enemy
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki battles against Grand Fisher.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E10 - Assault on Trip at Sacred Ground!
1.plot: While grudgingly attending Don Kanonji's show with the rest of his family, Ichigo Kurosaki is forced to fight a Hollow inadvertently created by Don Kanonji himself.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E11 - The Legendary Quincy
1.plot: Ichigo Kurosaki and Rukia Kuchiki meet Uryū Ishida, a Quincy.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E12 - A Gentle Right Arm
1.plot: As Ichigo Kurosaki begins his duel with Uryū Ishida, Yasutora Sado gains a new power.

1.title: FR - Bleach Thousand Year BloodWar - S01E13 - Flower and Hollow
1.plot: Orihime Inoue gains a new power in order to protect Tatsuki Arisawa.

meta.plot: L'ex-détective de Scotland Yard, Millie-Jean Black, retourne à Kingston pour aider la police jamaïcaine à résoudre des affaires de personnes disparues depuis longtemps.

1.title: FR - Get Millie Black - S01E01 - Millie
1.plot: After decades in the U.K., ex-Scotland Yard detective Millie Black has returned home to Jamaica and joined the local police force. As she attempts to reconnect with her sibling, Millie and her partner Curtis are assigned the case of a missing schoolgirl that puts them on a collision course with both a powerful Kingston family and a U.K. detective.

1.title: FR - Get Millie Black - S01E02 - Hibiscus
1.plot: With Curtis in the hospital and Hibiscus recovering from the attack on the Gully, Millie throws herself into her work. Initially suspicious of U.K. Detective Luke Holborn, Millie is compelled to team up with him when Janet's case leads to a disturbing discovery.

1.title: FR - Get Millie Black - S01E03 - Holborn
1.plot: Millie reluctantly agrees to work with Holborn in the short term. Meanwhile, Hibiscus and Millie find a new balance in their relationship, and Curtis contemplates a change. Then, when Millie and Holborn make a breakthrough, Millie finds herself on a dangerous path.

1.title: FR - Get Millie Black - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Get Millie Black - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Melbourne dans les années 1960. Peregrine Fisher hérite d'une grande fortune lorsque sa célèbre tante, qu'elle n'a jamais connue, a disparu sur les hautes terres de Nouvelle-Guinée. Peregrine a pour ambition de devenir une détective privée de classe mondiale, dirigée par un groupe de femmes exceptionnelles du club des aventurières, dont sa tante était également membre.

1.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S01E01 - Just Murdered
1.plot: Summonsed from her coastal home to claim her rightful inheritance, the unstoppable Peregrine Fisher manages to inveigle her way into a murder investigation.

1.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S01E02 - Dead Beat
1.plot: When a pop star singer and his back-up singer are electrocuted during their surf-inspired spot on a TV music show, Peregrine's ex-boyfriend Eric is under suspicion for their deaths.

1.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S01E03 - Space for Murder
1.plot: Peregrine ventures into the world of a top-secret science facility run by the government where Cecile Armand, an old comrade of Birdie's, is found frozen to death in a crashed car.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E01 - Death by Design
2.plot: An architect and his lover are found dead after a party; Peregrine and James retrace the partygoers' movements, but it's proving difficult.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E02 - Come Die with Me
2.plot: Peregrine's excitement over her upcoming nuptials is short-lived, when a woman's body is discovered during flight attendant training.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E03 - Blood Wedding
2.plot: James investigates the murder of a farmhand the day before a wedding at an estate where James's father works; Peregrine tries to help.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E04 - A Killer Unleashed
2.plot: At the Melbourne Kennel Club's dog show, a competitor dies and her prized collie is framed for the murder; Peregrine considers a canine companion.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E05 - Death Alley
2.plot: A brawl at a bowling alley between rockers and mods leads to decapitation; when the police arrest Violetta's nephew for the murder, Peregrine tries to prove his innocence.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E06 - Coop de Grâce
2.plot: On race day, the president of the Sandridge Pigeon Club is discovered dead in the coop, covered in feathers and choked by birdseed. While Peregrine works the case with James, Birdie has her own mysterious mission to complete.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E07 - Reel Murder
2.plot: The gang gather at the river to relax and distract themselves from their assorted heartaches, but when Samuel hooks a corpse with his fishing rod, a day in the sun turns deadly.

2.title: FR - Les Nouvelles Enquêtes de Miss Fisher - S02E08 - New Year's Evil
2.plot: A singer is found dead at Peregrine's New Year's Eve party at the Adventuresses' Club.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E01 - Compassion
1.plot: Pathologist Virchow tries to uphold his liberal values in a time of upcoming nationalism. Doctor Koch continues his work on battling the rampant tuberculosis. Von Behring tries, in vain at first, to join his lab while Jewish Doctor Ehrlich is welcomed for his work on colorizing cells. Ms. Lenze recovers after an appendicitis but has to work off the fees for her treatment by working as a nurse.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E02 - Sunny Weather
1.plot: Spinola repays Behring for saving a life. Ida is urged to pursue an ambitious dream. Koch receives two visitors: a Tokyo doctor and the new emperor.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E03 - The Light of the World
1.plot: Koch reveals big news at the congress while Ehrlich struggles to find a doctor to deliver his wife's breech baby. Tischendorf and Ida's romance blooms.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E04 - Miracle Cure
1.plot: Nurse Therese falls ill. Koch tests tuberculin on humans, starting with himself. Behring reaches a breakthrough in his work on a diphtheria cure.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E05 - Twilight of the Gods
1.plot: Despite worrying results, demand for tuberculin overwhelms the Charité. Behring's diphtheria cure is put to the test. Ida meets Tischendorf's father.

1.title: FR - Charité - S01E06 - Turning Point
1.plot: Koch fails in one aspect of his life, but succeeds in another. Ehrlich faces a betrayal and increasing anti-Semitism. Ida rethinks her future plans.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E01 - Blighty Wound
2.plot: In 1943, a medical student seeks to use a soldier's case for her psychiatry dissertation, while her brother tries to prevent the man's court-martial.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E02 - A Difficult Birth
2.plot: In hospital, Anni gets a high-profile roommate. Dr. Sauerbruch welcomes forced recruit Dr. Jung, who shares shocking news he heard on the forbidden BBC.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E03 - Last Hope
2.plot: Anni and Artur secretly treat Karin. A colleague begs Sauerbruch to rescue his ill son-in-law from jail. Martin tells Otto why he reports to the police.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E04 - Buried
2.plot: Margot and Jung catch Miss Fritsch and Kolbe red-handed. Anni and Artur suffer a setback. Sauerbruch goes to Switzerland, leaving Dohnanyi vulnerable.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E05 - Underground
2.plot: Nurse Christel presses Otto for an engagement. Artur makes arrangements for Karin behind Anni's back. A coup attempt has consequences for Sauerbruch.

2.title: FR - Charité - S02E06 - Zero Hour
2.plot: As German defeat becomes inevitable, the Charité staff struggle to treat patients without supplies and await the Russians' arrival with mixed feelings.

meta.plot: La vie du célèbre hôpital Charité à Berlin, à la fin du XIXème siècle, lieu d'expérimentations médicales célèbres.

Dans le contexte des superbes sons de Marlborough en Nouvelle-Zélande, Maggie et Tom arrivent pour échapper à sa famille oppressive et créer une entreprise. Lorsque Tom disparaît, les secrets enfouis et les intrigues familiales rendent le paradis moins que parfait.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E01 - Open Water
1.plot: Maggie Cabbott arrives in New Zealand's idyllic Marlborough Sounds to reunite with her husband, but disaster strikes.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E02 - Find the Money
1.plot: Maggie is under more pressure when the Cabbott family envoy Esther Ishikawa arrives; Tom's problems escalate.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E03 - Not Tom
1.plot: Maggie identifies Jack’s daughter Zoe as the woman in the photographs on Tom’s phone, but Zoe has fled town. The search-and-rescue team makes a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E04 - Playing the Odds
1.plot: Stranded and injured, Tom reluctantly accepts help from Ryan, a passing bushman who has secrets of his own. Maggie works to track down a sleezy environmental specialist.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E05 - Not for Sale
1.plot: Desperate to pay back the $330,000, Zoe comes to Maggie with a surprising proposal, dragging Maggie into negotiations with a dangerous crime family. Tom and Ryan learn each other's true identities, leading to a tense confrontation.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E06 - Stick to the Plan
1.plot: Maggie reunites with Tom at the shrine, but they disagree about what to do next. As they recount the events that led them to New Zealand, the couple grow more and more at odds with each other.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E07 - Help
1.plot: Maggie heads back to town after the confrontation with Tom, while Jack delivers the bad news about Ryan. Esther makes an unexpected ally in her search for the Cabbotts' missing money.

1.title: FR - The Sounds - S01E08 - Make Amends
1.plot: As Esther puts together the final pieces of the puzzle, Maggie makes a decision about the business. After a threat from Frank, Maggie prepares to leave Pelorus, but Tom has other ideas.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Spring 1945: Peace in Europe poses great challenges for three young people. The factory owner's daughter Klara looks after young concentration camp survivors in the refugee home. Her husband Johann wants to avert the ruin of the family company. And his brother Egon is hunting down Nazis who are hiding in Switzerland.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Egon is looking for a German who is on an Allied blacklist. When looking for a loan for his synthetic fiber project, Johann encounters seemingly insurmountable hurdles and gets advice from an influential lawyer. And Klara wants to fulfill a longing wish for the residents of the home.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Johann brings the German engineer Schneider and his family to Switzerland - the first important step to save the family business. Egon learns that Scholz was a wanted object in the highest Nazi circles. Can he put him in jail? And Klara is looking for a thief in the refugee home.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Klara falls out with Johann and acts dangerously stupid. Johann's synthetic fiber project is about to break through. With that he could save the family business. And Egon gets to feel it firsthand during his investigations: he has messed with very dangerous people.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Johann learns from Egon that Wilhelm Scholz and Carl Frey robbed Jewish families. The young entrepreneur realizes that his synthetic fiber project was probably financed by criminals. And because of the closure of the home, Klara has to find a new home for Jenkele.

1.title: FR - Le Prix de la Paix - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Jenkel's disappearance ends in tragedy. Klara finds out that she is pregnant. Egon is about to arrest Scholz and Frey. And Johann is in a dilemma: if he works with the authorities, he will lose the company. If he doesn't, he loses Klara and Egon.

meta.plot: A travers une histoire de famille, la série se penche sur un pan important de l'histoire suisse, peu connu du public. C'est aussi le portrait d'une génération qui a joué un rôle majeur dans la mise en place des bases de la Suisse d'aujourd'hui. Une histoire sur la volonté de changement de cette génération et sur la façon dont elle a perdu son innocence dans le processus.

Dans une utopie où la paix et la stabilité règnent grâce à l'interdiction de la monogamie, de la vie privée, de l'argent, de la famille et de l'histoire, les membres du collectif commencent à remettre en question les règles.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Welcome to New London, a utopia governed by three rules -- no privacy, family or monogamy -- where everyone belongs to everyone else.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E02 - Want and Consequence
1.plot: Bernard Marx is preoccupied with recent events in New London as he and Lenina Crowne take a trip together; John struggles with a dilemma.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E03 - Everybody Happy Now!
1.plot: Danger awaits Bernard and Lenina in the Savage Lands, where the world is flipped on its head; John grapples with staying true to himself as paths entwine.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E04 - Swallow
1.plot: Bernard introduces John to New London while Lenina struggles with reintegration after their visit to the Savage Lands.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E05 - Firefall
1.plot: Lenina tests the limits of her emotional self-regulation while Bernard seizes an opportunity; John observes New London conditioning.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E06 - In the Dirt
1.plot: Lenina has an unexpected collision; John becomes the center of attention as he embraces his surroundings.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E07 - Monogamy & Futility (1)
1.plot: Lenina juggles separate lives as fantasy and reality converge; Mustafa Mond makes a terrifying discovery.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E08 - Monogamy & Futility (2)
1.plot: John takes integration to the next level as monogamy poses new problems; while Bernard realizes his potential, Lenina questions assumptions.

1.title: FR - Brave New World - S01E09 - Soma Red
1.plot: Bernard copes with an unexpected tragedy, while Lenina draws ire at the Hatchery; John’s exile pushes New London to the brink.

1.title: FR - H - S01E01 -
FR - H - S01E02 -
FR - H - S01E03 -
FR - H - S01E04 -
FR - H - S01E05 -
FR - H - S01E06 -
