4.plot: The bombing of a Los Angeles police station puts the city on edge, leading the team to a final showdown with a group of domestic extremists. Also, Hondo faces the fallout from a bold decision that threatens his future, and Tan takes a big step in his personal life.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E01 - Vagabundo
5.plot: In the aftermath of his decision to speak out in the press, Hondo retreats to a quiet town in Mexico to reassess his life and professional future, only to find himself reluctantly drawn into one local family's fight for justice.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E02 - Madrugada
5.plot: Still in Mexico, Hondo teams up with a local cop for a dangerous rescue mission, only to find himself with a target on his back. Also, back in Los Angeles, Hicks considers disbanding the team for good.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E03 - 27 David
5.plot: When a robbery crew holds up the iconic downtown Los Angeles library, the team discovers that stolen architectural drawings could lead to a major threat against the city. Also, the squad is surprised by the arrival of a new leader, longtime LAPD veteran and former S.W.A.T. member Rodrigo Sanchez.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E04 - Sentinel
5.plot: As the team races to stop a violent band of armed robbers, the search is complicated by civilians using a public safety app that encounters vigilantism; Street receives difficult news that alters his future.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E05 - West Coast Offense
5.plot: When the team responds to a home invasion call, they uncover a murderous plot against a famous pro football quarterback; Hicks gets a long-awaited lead on a Jane Doe case he worked 20 years ago.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E06 - Crisis Actor
5.plot: When armed gunmen storm the set of a controversial cable news show that promotes conspiracy theories, the team races to prevent a hostage situation from escalating on live TV. Also, Chris supports Street as he prepares for his mother’s funeral.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E07 - Keep the Faith
5.plot: Hondo returns as leader; the team is pulled into a dangerous case involving a large stockpile of cash and the Russian mob; Daniel Sr. opens up to Hondo about a painful time in his past.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E08 - Safe House
5.plot: When an undocumented woman is violently abducted, the team forms an unlikely alliance to try and bring her home alive.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E09 - Survive
5.plot: When Deacon enlists Chris’ help on an off-duty private security detail, they struggle to survive when they’re attacked by a drug cartel looking to kidnap their wealthy VIP client, on the new day and time.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E10 - Three Guns
5.plot: The SWAT team partners with the DEA to locate stolen rocket launchers smuggled into Los Angeles, high-power weapons with new technology capable of cutting through armored tanks. Also, a personal issue for Tan arises when a colleague is hurt in the field; Hondo's inquiry into the arrest of a homeless veteran for Leroy, Darryl's father, sparks an idea for a new policing initiative; and Luca suspects the mother of his mentee, Kelly, wants to date him.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E11 - Old School Cool
5.plot: Hondo and the team race to locate the hacker responsible for accessing LAPD's computers and revealing the identities of undercover officers; Street is forced to reckon with past misdeeds.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E12 - Provenance
5.plot: After an armed robbery crew invades a downtown auction house, the case quickly turns personal for Hondo when his sister, Winnie (April Parker Jones), is taken as one of the hostages.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E13 - Short Fuse
5.plot: A terminally ill inmate escapes from a hospital determined to settle old scores before he dies; Nichelle faces a life-changing event that affects her relationship with Hondo.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E14 - Albatross
5.plot: When the team busts a group of dangerous robbery suspects; Tan is confronted with a pivotal figure from his past; Luca is tapped to temporarily stand in for Hicks.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E15 - Donor
5.plot: When hospital employees are targeted by a gunman, the SWAT team races to find a grieving father whose son was denied a kidney transplant; Hondo searches for evidence behind an alarming rise in Los Angeles stash houses.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E16 - The Fugitive
5.plot: When bodycam footage left at a local news station seems to show Hondo shooting two police officers, he is forced to go on the run while the team works to clear his name.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E17 - Cry Foul
5.plot: When a series of deadly explosions hits oil derricks across Los Angeles, the team must hunt down an activist-turned-terrorist; Deacon and his wife work to free a reformed drug dealer who they believe was sent away for a murder he didn't commit.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E18 - Family
5.plot: When Hicks witnesses the assassination of his longtime friend, the team races to find the shooter and determine why he was targeted; Luca struggles with how to help his brother after he's arrested.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E19 - Incoming
5.plot: When a plane carrying Street and the dangerous prisoner he's transporting is hijacked, the team races to save the innocent passengers onboard -- and one of their own; Hondo takes a big step in his relationship with Nichelle.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E20 - Quandary
5.plot: When the team discovers an illegal weapons dealer has sold stock to someone targeting a high-level politician, they rush to stop a deadly ambush.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E21 - Zodiac
5.plot: When a home invasion turns deadly, the team embarks on a race to track down priceless antique artifacts before any more lives are lost; Leroy enlists Hondo's help after an overdose hits close to home.

5.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S05E22 - Farewell
5.plot: When control of a university chemistry lab is seized, the team races to thwart a devastating terror attack.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E01 - Thai Hard
6.plot: During a trip to Bangkok to train alongside Thailand’s premiere S.W.A.T. team, Hondo and his former military buddy Joe (guest star Sean Maguire) stumble upon a wide-ranging heroin operation with ties to Los Angeles and find themselves on the run from a powerful drug kingpin.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E02 - Thai Another Day
6.plot: Hondo, Deacon and Tan team up with Thailand’s elite S.W.A.T. team to stop a ruthless drug lord whose heroin operation has far-reaching ties to Los Angeles.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E03 - Woah Black Betty
6.plot: When the team's armored vehicle is stolen, they must stop the vehicle from being used in a potential terrorist attack; Hondo and Nischelle prepare for their baby's gender reveal party.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E04 - Maniak
6.plot: When a convicted killer makes a prison break, the team works to protect the people on his hit list; Hondo unexpectedly crosses paths with an old flame.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E05 - Unraveling
6.plot: When the team stops the flash-mob robbery of a department store, they fear the crime was designed to distract from something more sinister – murder. Also, Hondo enlists Street to connect with Powell after she ignores orders in the field.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E06 - Checkmate
6.plot: When a cop on the verge of shutting down a major drug operation is abducted, Hondo and the squad race to save one of their own before it's too late; Luca grows concerned about sudden changes in Hicks' behavior.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E07 - Sequel
6.plot: When an intruder breaks into the home of a Hollywood actress, Hondo and the team are forced to partner with an old nemesis to track down a dangerous criminal; Tan struggles to find the perfect anniversary gift for his wife.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E08 - Guacaine
6.plot: When violence erupts at a popular food truck festival, the team must contend with a deadly cartel determined to recover a large lost drug shipment at any cost.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E09 - Pariah
6.plot: When faced with a series of random shootings, one SWAT member’s family connections could be the key to stopping the next attack. Also, Hondo prepares to meet Nichelle’s parents for the first time, and Tan helps Luca navigate a sensitive situation.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E10 - Witness
6.plot: The SWAT team races to locate a young boy abducted from a homeless shelter. Also, Street allows his personal history to cloud his judgement on the kidnapping case, and Hondo and Nichelle find themselves at odds over their spiritual beliefs.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E11 - Atonement
6.plot: The team participates in a joint task force with the FBI when a car bombing has ties to a terrorist group planning an attack in Los Angeles; a tragedy from Deacon’s past gives insight into the origins of his faith.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E12 - Addicted
6.plot: The SWAT team races to stop a gunman targeting rehab centers and those he considers responsible for his brother’s death. Also, Deacon is caught off guard when his wife, Annie, makes a parenting decision that has unexpected consequences for their daughter.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E13 - Lion's Share
6.plot: The team races to stop a violent rampage with ties to a painful chapter from Hicks' past.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E14 - Gut Punch
6.plot: SWAT teams with Major Crimes for a high-stakes mission to extract an undercover officer from a dangerous crime ring.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E15 - To Protect and To Serve
6.plot: When Hicks insists SWAT participate in Patrol Day in an effort to engage more meaningfully with the community, Hondo and Deacon have their hands full mentoring the newest members of the team; a suspended Tan investigates a mystery close to home.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E16 - Blowback
6.plot: When classified information falls into the wrong hands, the team races to stop a dangerous plot targeting former members of the U.S. military; Luca is faced with a challenging choice when a family member suddenly falls ill.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E17 - Stockholm
6.plot: The team works with the FBI to hunt one of its most-wanted fugitives; Hondo and Nichelle are faced with an unexpected development in her pregnancy.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E18 - Genesis
6.plot: When an armored truck heist ends in bloodshed, the team races to track down priceless jewels before more lives are lost; Hondo's mother, Charice, visits.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E19 - Bunkies
6.plot: The team races to uncover the identities of kidnappers holding a prison guard's family hostage; Tan is faced with a difficult personal decision.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E20 - All That Glitters
6.plot: Following a string of violent home robberies, the team rushes to stop a crew targeting elderly victims; Hondo's longtime friend and former Marine squad leader Danny Wright turns to Hondo for help when his daughter goes missing.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E21 - Forget Shorty
6.plot: SWAT teams up with the DEA, led by Mack Boyle, to conduct a massive gang sweep, only to discover that a vicious cartel is planting roots in the city and endangering numerous lives. Also, Hicks marks an important anniversary.

6.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S06E22 - Legacy
6.plot: The team works with the DEA and their iron-jawed leader, Mack Boyle, to stop a ruthless cartel boss waging war on the streets of Los Angeles as he exacts revenge on those who killed his son.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E01 - The Promise
7.plot: The team heads to Mexico to escort a fugitive back to the States when things go awry and Hondo has to save an old witness tied to the case.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E02 - Peace Talks
7.plot: Hondo and Hicks desperately search for Powell, who's gone missing in Mexico City along with a thermobaric bomb capable of killing thousands. Deacon's pride gets injured in a boxing match with Rocker.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E03 - Good for Nothing
7.plot: 20-Squad must leap into action when Yakuza assassins descend on L.A., targeting a number of mysterious Japanese ex-pats. Meanwhile, Nichelle finds her job on the line at the inspector general's office when a colleague accuses her of taking bribes.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E04 - Spare Parts
7.plot: SWAT hunts down a Chilean arms dealer after he kidnaps a woman and her daughter from a party in L.A. with unexpected intentions. Crossing paths with his brother, Tan is forced to come clean to his family about his divorce from Bonnie, while Hondo discovers that Hicks has received a job offer that could lure him away from SWAT.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E05 - End of the Road
7.plot: While training with Long Beach SWAT, Street discovers a biker club has stolen a cache of armor-piercing bullets and brings 20-Squad into the hunt for the gang before they can pull off a daring and deadly heist. As Hondo struggles with changes at work, Nichelle finds herself at odds with her former colleague Bruce.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E06 - Escape
7.plot: After a prison transport van overturns, Hondo and the team hunt down three female fugitives, including a serial killer on the verge of a rampage. Also, with Annie’s return to work, Deacon struggles to maintain a work life balance, and Luca does his best to teach Kelly to drive.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E07 - Last Call
7.plot: After the shocking shooting of a member of 20-Squad, Hondo and the team launch a citywide manhunt for the robbery crew responsible. Meanwhile, Deacon's plans for his future hit a snag, and Powell and Alfaro clash over a tricky issue.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E08 - Family Man
7.plot: The SWAT team faces off with a family of doomsday preppers barricaded inside their fortress of a home, and Deacon finds himself at the center of the storm. Also, Tan clashes with a reporter covering the situation and Powell grapples with meeting the child she gave up for adoption 18 years ago.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E09 - Honeytrap
7.plot: When a female robbery crew "honeytraps" and kills several rich VIPs, Hondo and 20-Squad are called in to assist FBI Agent Jackie Vasquez in capturing the dangerous fugitives before the death toll rises. Commander Hicks is shocked when his new love, Maggie, abruptly ends their relationship without rhyme or reason. With help from Deacon and Dr. Wendy, Hicks makes an important decision about his romantic future.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E10 - SNAFU
7.plot: As 20-Squad scrambles to track down a cold-blooded sniper terrorizing Los Angeles, Hondo discovers a link to his own South L.A. neighborhood that brings a personal twist to the hunt for the deadly shooter. Meanwhile, Tan finds himself questioning his leadership abilities while Powell and Alfaro compete in a classic game of SWAT tag.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E11 - Whispers
7.plot: Tan finds himself on a one-man mission to save his new love interest and her journalist co-workers when mercenaries take over a black-tie correspondents' dinner. After the group escapes, it's up to SWAT to track down the well-trained gunmen.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E12 - Allegiance
7.plot: When a crew of violent eco-terrorists abducts the teenage son of an energy company executive, SWAT must untangle the kidnappers' twisted motives before carrying out a high-stakes rescue mission. Meanwhile, Hondo's involvement in a shooting draws outrage from the very community he's dedicated his career to protecting. And, as Deacon is called on to help with the escalating crisis, he's forced to confront nagging doubts about his retirement.

7.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S07E13 - Twenty Squad
7.plot: SWAT faces their deadliest adversary yet when a violent cell of extremists looks to extract vengeance by blowing up half of Los Angeles, potentially killing thousands.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E01 - Vanished
8.plot: SWAT tackles a mission with personal ties for Hondo when they race to find a group of missing students and their bus driver, Hondo's former high school football coach. Also, Hicks has reservations regarding Hondo's new 20-Squad team addition, Devin Gamble, a cop with a family background deeply entrenched in crime.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E02 - Gang Unit
8.plot: When a spree of brutal stash house robberies spills into L.A., 20-Squad must team up with the sheriff's department's gang unit to unmask a violent crew who leaves no witness alive.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E03 - Life
8.plot: 20-Squad faces down a prison hostage situation, only to be thrown into deeper danger when a bomb explodes, freeing maximum-security prisoners from their cells, including someone with a personal grudge against Hondo.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E04 - The Sepulveda Protocol
8.plot: A blackout throws the city into chaos, forcing 20-Squad onto the streets for an emergency patrol day, which quickly escalates when Hondo and team uncover a terror threat.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E05 - Human Interest
8.plot: Tan is left reeling when his girlfriend is kidnapped, and 20-Squad must race to track down a violent cartel leader who may be behind the abduction.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E06 - Hot Button
8.plot: When back-to-back shootings at women's clinics leave two healthcare providers dead, Hondo and the team investigate whether the shooting were politically motivated.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E07 - Home
8.plot: When two students are brutally attacked, 20-Squad contends with a possible honor killing. Meanwhile, Hondo and Nichelle have their first parenting dispute while searching for a suitable daycare.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E08 - Left of Boom
8.plot: Hondo and the S.W.A.T. team race to stop a nuclear attack on Los Angeles when radioactive material is stolen from a local lab.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E09 - Open Season
8.plot: When Hondo learns there’s a $1 million bounty on his head, 20-Squad must race to uncover the mysterious enemy from Hondo’s past who’s intent on revenge. Also, Deacon and Tan butt heads over Tan’s changes to S.W.A.T. academy.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E10 - The Heights
8.plot: 20-Squad contends with a hostage crisis. Also, Hondo receives a family visit.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E11 - AMBER
8.plot: The squad races to find a missing child who was abducted from her front yard; Hicks is faced with a difficult decision concerning Gamble.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E12 - Deep Cover
8.plot: While working undercover for 20-Squad, Alfaro encounters associates from a previous undercover case in Long Beach, embarking on a dangerous mission that stirs up unresolved issues from the past.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E13 - High Ground
8.plot: While hiking, Powell and Gamble discover an illegal marijuana farm and end up confronting a dangerous cartel.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E14 - The Santa Clara
8.plot: When violent robbers loot a museum vault, Hondo and 20-Squad must chase down the thieving killers before they flee the country; Tan reckons with the fallout from a SWAT Academy accident; Gamble nervously awaits the verdict of her lA investigation.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E15 - Hostages
8.plot: S.W.A.T.'s anti-terror sting operation at a bus station is thrown into chaos when felons, fleeing the police, burst in and take the bus station hostage; Bennett redoubles her efforts to force Hicks out as S.W.A.T.'s  commander.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E16 - Hail Mary
8.plot: The abduction and brutal torture of two college football stars puts S.W.A.T. on the trail of a violent drug dealer looking to extract vengeance for a drug deal gone bad, while Deacon’s heroics bring unexpected attention on S.W.A.T.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E17 - The Enemy Within
8.plot: When three of L.A.'s finest are targeted and gunned down in the street, the team enlist the help of an LAPD psychologist to stop a murderous rampage, reopening old wounds tied to the department's failed response to a school shooting.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E18 - Exploited
8.plot: When a violent shooting rocks a Los Angeles nightclub, Hondo and 20-Squad are thrust into the dark world of sex trafficking, going head-to-head with a notorious biker club as they race to find a missing girl.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E19 - Run to Ground
8.plot: After an explosive accident at a fruit-packing facility staffed by prison workers, six inmates escape and scatter across the city. Tasked with chasing down the fugitives, Hondo and 20-Squad discover that the worksite explosion was no accident, and that the escapees are working together to carry out a high-stakes robbery. Also, Commander Hicks packs up his office, preparing to vacate the SWAT commander's post, and Gamble gets sobering news about her jailed father.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E20 - Devil Dog
8.plot: When Hondo’s cousin goes AWOL from his Marine base during basic training, Hondo, Deacon and Daniel Sr. take a road trip to get the kid in line; Alfaro plots to work outside the law when he discovers that his mother’s abusive ex is back in her life.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E21 - Ride or Die (1)
8.plot: When an auto carrier truck gets hijacked by a high-speed crew, Hondo encounters a ghost from his past - a violent car thief thought to be long-dead. The brutal road warriors tear across L.A. in pursuit of a mysterious $60 million car.

8.title: FR - S.W.A.T. - S08E22 - Return to Base (2)
8.plot: The SWAT team undertakes its final mission when a violent crew of ex-pat Russian mercenaries holds LA hostage after planting hundreds of explosives across the city.

meta.plot: 19 septembre 1985, un séisme de magnitude 8,1 secoue Mexico, provoquant une des plus grandes tragédies du pays. Dans les premières heures, un médecin et ses infirmières font preuve d’un héroïsme inattendu en faisant tout pour sauver les personnes piégées sous l’Hôpital Général, une journaliste traverse la ville pour rendre compte du désastre et une famille essaie de se retrouver sous les décombres.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E01 - 7:19 AM
1.plot: Thursday, September 19, 1985. 7 AM, Mexico City. At the General Hospital, Dr. Ángel is handling a complicated delivery. In downtwon, Camila, an amateur journalist, is working on an independent report. In Tlatelolco, Gabriela heads to work while her husband and children get ready to start the day. The minutes slowly approach 7:19 AM... the hour that changed the course of an entire nation.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E02 - 8:00 AM
1.plot: A year earlier, Camila tells her family about her dream of becoming a journalist and leaves Guadalajara. In 1985, an hour after the earthquake, signs of life are found under the rubble at the General Hospital. Gabriela, worried about her children, heads back to Tlatelolco amidst the chaos. Meanwhile, Camila discovers a group of women trapped in a garment factory.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E03 - 9:00 AM
1.plot: In the 1950s, Ignacio promises his dying mother that he will always take care of his younger brother, Ángel. In 1985, two hours after the earthquake, Ángel continues his rescue efforts when Ignacio visits him. Camila encounters Gabriela near Tlatelolco, where the police are not allowing anyone to enter. Beneath the rubble, Alberto finds another survivor.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E04 - 10:00 AM
1.plot: Gabriela confronts her past and the issues affecting her crumbling marriage. Three hours after the earthquake, Ángel discovers a new way to reach the babies and nurses trapped under the rubble with Pepín's help. Gabriela and Camila each make their way into the collapsed building in Tlatelolco. Meanwhile, Alberto and Regina get closer to the surface.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E05 - 11:00 AM
1.plot: Some time ago, Ángel was starting a family, but the mistakes he made in the past continue to haunt him. Now, four hours have passed since the earthquake. Rescue operations at the hospital are ongoing with the help of students. Efforts to rescue survivors in Tlatelolco continue. Deep within the rubble, someone is calling for help.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E06 - 12:00 PM
1.plot: For Camila, surviving and adapting to the world of news in the capital was not easy, but everything has prepared her for the present, where five hours have now passed since the earthquake. An incident involving Ángel, Ignacio, and Camila triggers a race against time to request foreign aid. The government's intentions and Ignacio's alignment are finally revealed.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E07 - 01:00 PM
1.plot: Six hours after the earthquake, Chave and Pepín find themselves caught off guard by a crucial decision. In Tlatelolco, the relentless efforts and hours spent removing rubble are paying off; Gabriela and Alberto are getting closer to their children. Beto searches for a way out, while Pablo and Lucía hold on as best they can. Meanwhile, in the hospital rubble, the nurses begin to lose hope.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E08 - 02:00 PM
1.plot: One year earlier, Alberto triggers a conflict with the construction company he works for, claiming that the infrastructure of his building is in poor condition. By 1985, seven hours have passed since the earthquake. Beneath the rubble, Hilda and Toña are faced with a life-or-death operation. Camila arrives at the airport, with Ignacio and Guillermo hot on her heels.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E09 - 03:00 PM
1.plot: Months earlier, Lucía and Pablo fall in love during a band rehearsal, with Lucía providing Pablo refuge from his home problems. Now, eight hours after the earthquake, they remain trapped under the rubble, running out of oxygen. At the General Hospital, a miracle amidst the tragedy occurs. Meanwhile, Camila, deprived of her freedom, may receive help from an unexpected source.

1.title: FR - Chaque minute compte - S01E10 - 04:00 PM
1.plot: Nine hours have passed since the earthquake that shook Mexico City. Camila remains a target of the government, with Ignacio issuing orders to prevent anyone from entering the rubble, despite being so close to rescuing Rosario and the baby. Ángel faces a critical decision. In Tlatelolco, Lucía and Pablo’s lives hang by a thread, but unexpected help might change everything.

meta.plot: Amélia Delcourt est une policière intrépide, fraîchement intégrée à la Crim’. Trop pressée de faire ses preuves, elle commet une faute lors d’une opération, ruinant des mois de travail pour tenter de débusquer Shakespeare, un serial killer qui sème la terreur dans le nord de la France. Décidée à se rattraper et empêcher le tueur de frapper à nouveau, elle décide de suivre son instinct et d’enquêter clandestinement à la disparition d’une adolescente de 15 ans . Mais elle n’est pas seule sur la piste. À chaque détour de son enquête, elle croise sur son chemin Daniel Hansen, un ancien expert médiatique des serial killers, qui lui aussi paye aujourd’hui le prix du rejet. Malgré leurs efforts pour s’éviter et se semer l’un l’autre, Amélia et Daniel vont finalement devoir faire équipe pour sauver l’adolescente des griffes de Shakespeare, qui semble mystérieusement lié au passé trouble du profiler.

1.title: FR - Murder Club - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Murder Club - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Murder Club - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Murder Club - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E01 - The Fuller Dogfight
1.plot: Ohio State astrophysicist Dr. Allen Hynek is recruited by the Air Force into their top-secret program investigating UFOs called Project Blue Book. Partnered with Captain Michael Quinn, they investigate the case of a military pilot who survived a dogfight with an alien craft. Based on the "Gorman Dogfight" case.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E02 - The Flatwoods Monster
1.plot: Dr. Hynek and Captain Quinn investigate a West Virginia case of a woman and her two children who witnessed a flying saucer crash near their farm and an alien being emerge from the fiery wreck; based on the Flatwoods Monster case.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E03 - The Lubbock Lights
1.plot: When the citizens of Lubbock, Texas witness a mysterious V-shaped craft in the night sky, Hynek and Quinn are brought in to investigate the mass sighting. Based on the “Lubbock Lights” case.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E04 - Operation Paperclip
1.plot: Quinn and Hynek are lead into a secret program involving the Operation Paperclip.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E05 - Foo Fighters
1.plot: Quinn and Hynek follow clues that lead them to a secret group who have witnessed strange lights.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E06 - The Green Fireballs
1.plot: Mysterious green fireballs nearly cause a nuclear disaster during a weapons test, and Hynek and Quinn must investigate how it could have occurred.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E07 - The Scoutmaster
1.plot: After a Scoutmaster vanishes when he and his troop witness a strange craft hovering in the woods, Hynek is sent to investigate for Project Blue Book, while Quinn is pulled into a rogue mission for General Harding.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E08 - War Games
1.plot: When a film emerges documenting an Army platoon under UFO attack, the Generals send Hynek and Quinn in to investigate, where they find the soldiers not only suffer from physical effects of war, but psychological ones as well.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E09 - Abduction
1.plot: Hynek is drawn into a case from which he literally can't escape when a man arrives at Blue Book headquarters with his wife. The man claims he was abducted by aliens, and he plans to hold Hynek and Quinn hostage until he learns the truth.

1.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S01E10 - The Washington Merry-Go Round
1.plot: Washington D.C. is invaded by UFOs, and Hynek and Quinn must uncover the true nature of the threat before it's too late.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E01 - The Roswell Incident (1)
2.plot: Hynek and Quinn follow General Harding to Roswell, New Mexico, where an anonymous townsperson has threatened to expose evidence to the world of an extraterrestrial crash-landing six years ago.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E02 - The Roswell Incident (2)
2.plot: Hynek and Quinn nearly reach a potential culprit, which could take them to just where they need to be to discover the truth behind the famous Roswell incident.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E03 - Area 51
2.plot: Hynek and Quinn investigate reports of a soldier who was allegedly taken inside a flying saucer at a remote military base in Nevada, where they subsequently learn about the several reasons why the secrets contained in Area 51 should not be released.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E04 - Hopkinsville
2.plot: A supposed alien invades a rural home in Kentucky, which prompts the CIA to give Hynek and Quinn access to their top-secret program known as MK Ultra, which asserts that the alien attack has the potential to be the beginning of a larger plan.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E05 - The Men in Black
2.plot: The mysterious Man in Black kidnaps Hynek, which sends Quinn on a mission with the CIA to follow him and rescue Hynek.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E06 - Close Encounters
2.plot: While reminiscing on the set of `Close Encounters of the Third Kind', Hynek recounts his experiences with the infamous Robertson Panel and the eccentric alien contactee for whom he put everything on the line.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E07 - Curse of the Skinwalker
2.plot: Hynek and Quinn head to a Utah ranch to investigate a young family’s claims of unexplainable and dangerous phenomena.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E08 - What Lies Beneath
2.plot: When sensitive material is stolen from Generals Harding and Valentine, Hynek and Quinn realize that their culprit is far closer to home than they could imagine, but so is undeniable evidence of a UFO conspiracy.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E09 - Broken Arrow
2.plot: When Hynek and Quinn track down a mysterious plane that has vanished in the Canadian wilderness, they must embark on a dangerous mission to recover its missing cargo.

2.title: FR - Projet Blue Book - S02E10 - Operation Mainbrace
2.plot: Strange interlopers in the sky and sea, and the actions of a rogue admiral, threaten to turn a naval exercise into World War III. It's up to Hynek and Quinn to stop the rogue admiral.

meta.plot: Un brillant scientifique, le professeur J. Allen Hynek, est recruté par l'armée de l'air américaine pour mener des enquêtes non résolues, de simples faits divers à des théories plus farfelues, comme l'existence d'extraterrestres.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After meeting the twins' parents, Lisa is shocked to discover that her connection to the family might be more than just professional.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With the Meredith family reeling from Dylan’s death and Sean’s arrest, Lisa is charged with finding his alibi and makes a game-changing discovery. Abbie grows closer to newcomer Vincent, whilst Rob agrees to take on a risky dare.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When the main suspect goes missing, Lisa is concerned about Sean’s possible involvement.  Abbie falls deeper into Vincent’s world, bringing Sam with her.  Meanwhile, Sean’s vigilante justice leads him down a dangerous path.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: With Nick seriously injured in hospital, Lisa furiously seeks out Sean, while Med feels increasingly side-lined. Meanwhile, Rob attempts to leave the online forum, but finds that it is not as easy as he had hoped, and Sam tries to offer Abbie a way out from Vincent.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: A confession to Lisa shines a possible new light on Dylan's killer. Meanwhile, Abbie has a terrifying experience with some local addicts, and Rob's escalating actions begin to impact on his family. Elsewhere, Med starts to suspect Lisa is hiding something from him and begins to make his own investigations.

1.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Despite Holly's confession that she killed her brother, the team are convinced there's more to the story than she's telling them.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: DC Lisa Armstrong is asked to assist a murder investigation in Morecambe. The team try to uncover why the victim was targeted, but meanwhile, Lisa and her family are unknowingly stalked by a mysterious figure who has an agenda.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Determined to ignore Andy's unexpected arrival the night before, Lisa throws herself into the case and discovers a significant lead from her only eyewitness. The new information opens up the investigation and the team uncover vital evidence.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: As the team press on with the investigation, Lisa and Med dig deeper into the family.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Following an unexpected turn in the case, Lisa and the team accept help from a new unit.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Lisa pursues a new line of investigation, uncovering a far-reaching secret.

2.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: As a confession brings the team closer to the truth, Lisa identifies a suspect.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: DS Jenn Townsend, Morecambe's new Family Liaison Officer, is immediately thrown into the deep end when a body washes up in the bay on her first day on the job.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: An uncooperative suspect causes difficulties for the team, and a frustrating turn in the case causes tensions to rise within the community, leading to an unexpected altercation.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: Several major developments in the case point the team towards suspects in surprising places. Meanwhile, Erin offers an olive branch to Conor.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: It's the day of Saif's funeral, and as Jenn watches closely for any suspicious behaviour, divisions within the Rahman household widen.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: Shazia's explosive revelation threatens to destroy the Rahman family. The police investigation grinds to a halt until a vital clue offers a glimmer of hope.

3.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Jenn remains determined to find out the truth about Saif's murder. With one suspect arrested, the race is on to find the missing pieces of the puzzle before the killer escapes.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E01 - Episode 1
4.plot: Jenn is working late when an emergency is called in - she races to the scene to find horror unfolding for a broken family... and must now uncover the truth behind it.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E02 - Episode 2
4.plot: The Morecambe community rallies around the grieving Metcalf family, but Jenn and the MIU team find key evidence that all was not well in their home.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E03 - Episode 3
4.plot: The Metcalf kids struggle with their loss while CCTV evidence leads to a development in the case, and an unexpected arrival causes tensions in the victim's family to resurface.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E04 - Episode 4
4.plot: Under pressure to solve the murder, Jenn fails to see the troubles her own family is facing. New evidence comes to light from an unexpected source that could completely change the course of the case.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E05 - Episode 5
4.plot: An old case puts the MIU under further pressure. Jenn must track down a key suspect before it's too late but when trouble follows her home, it leaves her whole family in danger.

4.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S04E06 - Episode 6
4.plot: A prominent Morecambe family arouses suspicion through their aggressive business dealings, while in the MIU, a chance meeting for Jenn leads the team closer to the truth.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E01 - Episode 1
5.plot: DS Jenn Townsend returns to the Morecambe MIU after her father's death but when a new case challenges the team she has to put her own grief aside.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E02 - Episode 2
5.plot: The victim's boyfriend is found and Jenn struggles when the family she's helping starts to point the finger of suspicion at each other.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E03 - Episode 3
5.plot: New information leads to a major development in the case, but the Morecambe community are looking for reassurance, intensifying the pressure on the MIU.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E04 - Episode 4
5.plot: A vital clue leads the MIU to take a closer look at a member of the victim's family but when red tape stops the team, frustrations reach an all-time high.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E05 - Episode 5
5.plot: A new SIO is called in to lead the MIU while Jenn's family feel the full force of the grief she's been trying so hard to contain.

5.title: FR - Enquête à Morecambe - S05E06 - Episode 6
5.plot: The team discovers someone has been withholding information and as they set to piece together the truth Jenn's left contemplating her future in the MIU.

meta.plot: Assignée au service des personnes disparues à Morecambe Bay, Lisa Armstrong doit apporter son soutien aux familles au pire moment de leurs vies. Entraînée à ne jamais s'impliquer émotionnellement, il lui faut rester attentive au moindre indice susceptible d'aider à faire avancer l'enquête. Sa situation est cependant compromise quand elle découvre qu’elle a un lien de parenté avec deux jumeaux disparus...

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E01 - Dogs
1.plot: Imagine a future where AI fully translates animal language and behavior for pet lovers — and picture how it will transform life with our fur babies.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E02 - Dating
1.plot: Swipe left, right — or forward? In the future, finding the perfect match could rely on AI, biometric data and wearables that gauge compatibility.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E03 - Houseplants
1.plot: From pollution monitoring to data storage — biologists and botanists explore the potential of plant modification and its effect on our everyday lives.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E04 - Gaming
1.plot: Specialists discuss the next level of augmented reality, its potential to transform mundane places and the downsides of immersive experiences.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E05 - Space Vacations
1.plot: Business leaders and astronauts delve into the practical challenges of making space travel less time-consuming and more accessible.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E06 - Cheeseburgers
1.plot: Driven by ethical and environmental concerns, food tech startups are using smart engineering to reimagine a comfort food classic: the cheeseburger.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E07 - Life After Death
1.plot: Holograms, voice cloning, human composting: Experts examine end-of-life services and the physical, digital and spiritual remains we leave behind.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E08 - Sports
1.plot: Athletes and engineers examine new developments in artificial intelligence and robotics that can make career-ending injuries a thing of the past.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E09 - Fashion
1.plot: Disposable fashion comes into focus for designers and researchers, who also delve into compostable garb merging personalization with sustainability.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E10 - Skyscrapers
1.plot: From vertical cities to sustainable skyscrapers — inventors and designers envision a future of ambitious architecture that could reimagine our cities.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E11 - Health
1.plot: Experts break down 3D-printed super organs, genetic upgrades and other medical breakthroughs that will revolutionize health care as we know it.

1.title: FR - The Future Of - S01E12 - Headphones
1.plot: Musicians, neuroscientists and futurologists talk about the power of sound and emerging tech that can interpret brain activity in real time.

meta.plot: Avec l'aide d'experts, cette série documentaire innovante explore les tendances technologiques nouvelles et émergentes pour imaginer des possibilités révolutionnaires.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E01 - SEIYA
1.plot: After exhibiting special powers, Seiya is approached by the enigmatic Alman Kido, who urges him to fulfill his destiny and become a Bronze Knight.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E02 - Burn Your Cosmo
1.plot: Seiya obtains the Pegasus Armor with ease, but to be a true Knight of Athena, he must first prove himself in the Galaxian Wars tournament.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E03 - Enter the Dragon
1.plot: Believing in the dark prophecy, Magnus confronts Lady Sienna. Seiya faces his toughest opponent yet: Dragon Long.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E04 - Nebula Chain
1.plot: Reluctant to fight, Andromeda Shaun takes a defensive approach against Unicorn Jab using her Nebula Chain. Meanwhile, Vander's army attacks.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E05 - The Black Knights
1.plot: Seiya takes down a helicopter to retrieve the stolen Gold Armor from Phoenix Nero, only to be confronted by Vander's Black Knights.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E06 - Phoenix Rising
1.plot: Phoenix Nero has built up his overwhelming power with hate. To stop him, the Bronze Knights must combine their strength to reclaim the Gold Armor.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E07 - The Silver Knights
FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E08 - The Rising Tide
FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E09 - To Fight for Athena
FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E10 - The Challenge
FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E11 - The Prophecy
1.plot: Graad assembles his own Black Knights to protect mankind from the gods. When his forces abduct Sienna, the Bronze Knights set out to rescue her.

1.title: FR - Les Chevaliers du Zodiaque - Saint Seiya - S01E12 - One War Ends, Another Begins
1.plot: The Bronze Knights face Graad's upgraded Black Knights. Though Seiya and the others gain the upper hand, Graad proves to be a formidable foe.

meta.plot: Seiya et les Chevaliers du Zodiaque s'unissent à nouveau pour protéger la déesse Athéna, mais une sombre prophétie pèse sur leurs destins.

1.title: FR - The King Who Never Was - S01E01 - A Shot in the Dark
1.plot: In the summer of 1978, a one-day trip to a Mediterranean island takes a tragic turn when visitors get into an argument with Vittorio Emanuele of Savoy.

1.title: FR - The King Who Never Was - S01E02 - Chain Reaction
1.plot: After her brother's death, Birgit seeks for justice. When every attempt seems vain, a lawyer from Paris willing to help finally shows up.

1.title: FR - The King Who Never Was - S01E03 - Confessions
1.plot: Years later, Vittorio Emanuele goes to trial. Birgit hopes that the truth will be finally unveiled, but unexpected witnesses show up for the Prince.

meta.plot: Cette série documentaire fait la lumière sur l'homicide d'un adolescent allemand en 1978 à travers le témoignage de sa sœur et de la famille royale impliquée dans l'affaire.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When the bodies of seven minors wash ashore, detective Darius Asram contacts a troubled young woman with ties to a pro-suicide sect.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Darius and Lesky trace the anonymous message to a youth center. Meanwhile, Christa contends with a surprise visitor and painful reminders of her past.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Christa begins decrypting the documents, Darius receives a tip about Linus. Back at the ward, Christa asks Lana for help with a secret plan.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: A gruesome discovery prompts Darius and Christa to reconstruct Linn Gonzales's journey along a desolate bus route.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Flashbacks reveal what happened the night of the stadium suicides. Ten years later, Caron finds his secret -- and his life's work -- in danger.

1.title: FR - Ad Vitam - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Forced off the case, Darius works alone to connect the dots between the Future Foundation, the bodies at the beach and Christa's disappearance.

meta.plot: Alors qu’on pense avoir vaincu la mort, sont découverts les corps de sept suicidés, tous mineurs. Dérive sectaire, acte politique, cri d’alarme d’une jeunesse sans repères ? Darius, flic de 120 ans, mène l’enquête avec Christa, jeune fille révoltée et suicidaire. Une descente vertigineuse dans les entrailles d’un monde qui dérive vers l’infini ou le néant...
Cette adaptation documentaire de l'unique œuvre non fictionnelle de Grisham soulève des questions troublantes sur deux affaires de meurtre en Oklahoma dans les années 80.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E01 - Debbie and Denice
1.plot: A young woman is found brutally murdered in 1982 in Ada, Oklahoma. Two years later, another woman goes missing, sparking rumors of a connection.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E02 - In Dreams
1.plot: Tommy recounts his conversation with police about Denice's disappearance. Authorities pursue leads in Debbie's murder while her mom struggles to cope.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E03 - Rotten to the Core
1.plot: Citing new and previously withheld evidence, lawyers from the Innocence Project appeal the murder convictions of Ron and Dennis.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E04 - Corpus Delicti
1.plot: An autopsy reveals a stunning contradiction to Tommy and Karl's confession. Also, an investigative reporter canvases Ada for leads.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E05 - Smoking Guns
1.plot: While investigating the other possible suspects in Denice's murder, a reporter learns that getting people to talk can be tricky.

1.title: FR - The Innocent Man (2018) - S01E06 - Snow Storm
1.plot: Tommy's attorneys prepare a new appeal. John Grisham speaks about what drew him to the stories surrounding the murders in Ada.

meta.plot: À Barcelone, au 14e siècle, le jeune et entreprenant Hugo Llor cherche à se faire un nom tout en respectant le serment qu'il a fait à la famille Estanyol.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E01 - Fate
1.plot: Arnau and Mar worry about their safety should a new king take the throne. A tragedy separates Hugo from his family, and he takes on an apprenticeship.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E02 - Penance
1.plot: Bernat receives distressing news and returns, vowing vengeance. Arnau's friends help provide Hugo with a home, where a young woman catches his eye.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E03 - Retaliation
1.plot: Hugo is advised to forget his feelings for Dolça and seeks out his family. Meanwhile, horrors abound as Jews are persecuted across the kingdom.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E04 - Wound
1.plot: Roger Puig asks that Hugo work in his palace cellar, which provides the winemaker with a unique — and dangerous — opportunity for vengeance.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E05 - Slave
1.plot: With Hugo in custody, Regina begs for his release. However, her love for him is a double-edged sword and comes with its own set of consequences.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E06 - Beatriz
1.plot: Bernat fulfills his promises to Hugo. Caterina expresses her feelings. Barcha's earnest action has devastating repercussions for Mercè and her family.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E07 - Poison
1.plot: Caterina urges Hugo not to lose hope as he desperately searches for Mercè. When Bernat learns the truth about his wife, the church forces his hand.

1.title: FR - Heirs to the Land - S01E08 - Redemption
1.plot: Guerao asks Hugo and Caterina to help him save Arnau, whom he suspects is being poisoned by Marta. Mercè reaches out to her birth mother.

1.title: FR - High on the Hog - S01E01 - Our Roots
1.plot: The hunt for African American food's roots goes to Benin, where okra and yam rule the market and pre-enslavement fish and corn plates reign at a table.

1.title: FR - High on the Hog - S01E02 - The Rice Kingdom
1.plot: In the Carolinas, Stephen looks at the human cost of rice and goes whole hog with Gullah chef BJ Dennis and those preserving Black culinary traditions.

1.title: FR - High on the Hog - S01E03 - Our Founding Chefs
1.plot: From mac and cheese to Virginia ham: Jefferson's and Washington's renowned enslaved chefs James Hemings and Hercules left the nation hungry for more.

1.title: FR - High on the Hog - S01E04 - Freedom
1.plot: Barbecued brisket meets Senegalese lamb and a Juneteenth feast as Stephen heads to Texas to ride with Black cowboys and take in Jerrelle Guy's cakes.

2.title: FR - High on the Hog - S02E01 - Food for the Journey
2.plot: From black-eyed peas to gumbo, African ingredients define New Orleans' signature dishes. Up north, the Great Migration inspires Chicago's culinary style.

2.title: FR - High on the Hog - S02E02 - The Black Mecca
2.plot: In Harlem, chef Charles Gabriel shares the secret to his pan-fried chicken and other trailblazers tell stories of their ancestors' connections to food.

2.title: FR - High on the Hog - S02E03 - The Defiance
2.plot: Stephen meets former student activists in Atlanta and honors the legacy of the chefs and bakers who fueled and funded the Civil Rights Movement.

2.title: FR - High on the Hog - S02E04 - Feeding the Culture
2.plot: A Black Panther reflects on the pivotal free breakfast program. Luminaries gather for a special dinner and layered conversation about race and food.

meta.plot: Black food is American food. Chef and writer Stephen Satterfield traces the delicious, moving throughlines from Africa to Texas in this docuseries.

Dan Chase absconded from the CIA decades ago and now lives off the grid. When an assassin arrives and tries to take Chase out, the old operative learns that to ensure his future he now must reconcile his past.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E01 - I
1.plot: When Dan Chase's past catches up to him, he must flee the town he's called home for three decades.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E02 - II
1.plot: Chase finds a temporary hideout, but Harold Harper and the authorities are still after him.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E03 - III
1.plot: Forced to flee, Chase finally tells Zoe the truth about his past, but it might be too late.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E04 - IV
1.plot: Both Chase and Harper try to move forward with their plans, but their choices backfire.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E05 - V
1.plot: Chase and Harper face decisive tests. Zoe finds a new path forward as old stories resurface.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E06 - VI
1.plot: Chase and Zoe enter the lion's den. As Harper ends one partnership, another begins.

1.title: FR - The Old Man - S01E07 - VII
1.plot: Chase is forced to face the consequences for his past choices. Harper learns an impossible truth.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E01 - VIII
2.plot: Now in Afghanistan, Dan Chase and Harold Harper have to evade the Taliban in order to save Emily.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E02 - IX
2.plot: Emily Chase learns of her true identity as the daughter of Faraz Hamzad while outside forces threaten her and her new family.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E03 - X
2.plot: Dan and Emily Chase reunite for the first time in many years and must protect the Hamzad village from the Taliban.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E04 - XI
2.plot: Chase and Harper try to convince Morgan Bote to help Emily, but when Zoe McDonald resurfaces, they realize the story's much bigger than they thought.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E05 - XII
2.plot: Chase, Harper, and Zoe take refuge in Harper's house only to receive tragic news.

2.title: FR - The Old Man - S02E06 - XIII
2.plot: Chase and Zoe must track down Hamzad's lawyer in London, while Harper must recruit an unlikely partner.

meta.plot: Soccer player Senzo Meyiwa was a national hero before his killing shocked South Africa. Who did it, and why? This docuseries dives into the evidence.

1.title: FR - Senzo: Murder of a Soccer Star - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: First episode

1.title: FR - Senzo: Murder of a Soccer Star - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Senzo: Murder of a Soccer Star - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Senzo: Murder of a Soccer Star - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Senzo: Murder of a Soccer Star - S01E05 - Episode 5

meta.plot: Martin Riggs, flic texan et ancien de la Marine, perd sa femme et son bébé et déménage à Los Angeles pour repartir de zéro. Il devient le co-équipier du détective Roger Murtaugh, qui a récemment subi une crise cardiaque "bénigne" et doit à tout prix éviter les situations de stress. Un duo de choc qui risque de faire des étincelles.Adaptation de la célèbre franchise cinématographique L'Arme fatale avec Mel Gibson et Danny Glover.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A slightly unhinged former Navy SEAL lands a job as a police officer in Los Angeles where he's partnered with a veteran detective trying to keep maintain a low stress level in his life.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E02 - Surf N Turf
1.plot: A noise complaint at a boxer's home leads Riggs and Murtaugh to a case involving illegal gun runners and Riggs becomes personally invested in the outcome when one of their targets reminds him of his late wife. Trish worries about Murtaugh's health.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E03 - Best Buds
1.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh's investigation of a drug cartel reunites Murtaugh with his former T.O. Riggs avoids the reality of Miranda's death by diverting himself with outside vices. Murtaugh and Trish struggle to find alone time.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E04 - There Goes the Neighborhood
1.plot: A string of burglaries hits close to home for Murtaugh when one occurs in his own neighborhood, and it gets just as personal for Riggs when another break-in ends in a casualty. Roger Junior connects with an old friend who might be twisted up in some criminal action of his own.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E05 - Spilt Milk
1.plot: Murtaugh delves deep into the psyche of a former navy seal who is wanted for criminal activity, and draws parallels between him and his partner, Riggs, who also served in the military. Riggs' connection to the suspect threatens to interfere with the case, but it also forces him to open up to Murtaugh.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E06 - Ties That Bind
1.plot: The investigation of a young model's murder leads Riggs and Murtaugh to one of L.A.'s wealthiest families and Riggs is jolted when an old friend of his wife's is also linked to the case. Murtaugh is shocked to discover that his daughter is sending racy photos to her new boyfriend.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E07 - Fashion Police
1.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh look into the murder of one of L.A.'s fashion expeditors and discover an underground DEA operation. With Trish and the kids away, Murtaugh goes on a 'bender'. Riggs has all-too-real dreams of Miranda.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E08 - Can I Get a Witness?
1.plot: When a million dollar casino heist takes a deadly turn, Riggs befriends the only credible witness, an eight-year-old boy, and takes him into his care. Murtaugh pulls some dangerous stunts in an attempt to prove to everyone that he can be a motorcycle guy. Riggs contemplates what to do with the money he received from selling his home in Texas.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E09 - Jingle Bell Glock
1.plot: The whole precinct’s holiday celebrations are cut short when they’re called to examine a ruthless homicide.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E10 - Homebodies
1.plot: After investigating the murder of a millennial 'designer drug' dealer, Riggs and Murtaugh find themselves in a violent turf war between a new generation of drug dealers and a Koreatown gang. Murtaugh finds some comfort in a temporary new partner. Trish attempts to set up Riggs with her co-worker.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E11 - Lawmen
1.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs suspect misuse of power in the LA Sheriff's department when they investigate the killing of a Texas Ranger.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E12 - Brotherly Love
1.plot: When a car containing massive amounts of cocaine is stolen from an impound lot, Riggs and Murtaugh become embroiled in a notorious car theft ring. Murtaugh experiences some frightening chest pains. If Riggs' driving isn't enough of a trigger, the lead defense attorney on the case is none other than the terrifyingly brilliant Trish Murtaugh.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E13 - The Seal Is Broken
1.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh examine a series of violent crimes with one thing in common—the victims are all members of the same church. Riggs faces a moral dilemma when the one-year anniversary of Miranda's death sends him to a new low. Trish and Roger disagree with RJ about his future.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E14 - The Murtaugh File
1.plot: A brutal car crash reveals that Cahill is the target of a murderous stalker, causing Riggs and Murtaugh to turn the tables and start asking her questions for a change. After finding Murtaugh's file in Cahill's office, Riggs becomes obsessed with finding out about his. Roger and Trish reel over their daughter's newfound fake ID.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E15 - As Good as It Getz
1.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh are forced to work with DEA agent Karen Palmer—again— to protect Leo Getz, an ambulance-chasing attorney who was linked to the Cartel. As the three delve further into the case, they begin to realize that Leo may not be the only one with a target on his back. Riggs begins to view Agent Palmer in a new light. Murtaugh is left worried after Trish makes a spontaneous decision.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E16 - Unnecessary Roughness
1.plot: A murder involving a high school football phenomenon draws Riggs and Murtaugh into the lucrative—and corrupt—world of college recruiting. Murtaugh considers a big change in his professional life. Riggs contemplates an even bigger shift in his personal life as he spends more time with Karen Palmer.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E17 - A Problem Like Maria
1.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh team up again with Palmer, and together they gain inside knowledge of dangerous new cartel operations. As Riggs’ attachment to Palmer deepens, so do his impulsive actions, further worrying Avery and Delgado. Trish explores the potential of an amazing new career opportunity.

1.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S01E18 - Commencement
1.plot: Riggs makes a shocking discovery about Miranda’s death that leads him back to the cartel in a frantic search for answers. His wild desperation leaves Murtaugh torn between his commitment to his partner and his commitment to his family.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E01 - El Gringo Loco
2.plot: Murtaugh follows Riggs down to Mexico, where he plans to avenge his wife's death and finish off Tito Flores once and for all. Once back in the States, they have a few people to answer to during the ongoing investigation around Flores, including Murtaugh's family. Avery is questioned by Internal Affairs about the integrity of his department.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E02 - Dancing in September
2.plot: A doctor is found dead in the pool of a wellness clinic. Riggs suspects a drug angle and asks Agent Palmer for help.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E03 - Born to Run
2.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs investigate the mysterious death of famous singer Shaye's bodyguard. Murtaugh turns to his daughter—a fan of the singer—to learn more about Shaye's background and uncover the possible suspects. Riggs learns the responsibilities that come with being in a relationship with help from Murtaugh.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E04 - Flight Risk
2.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs respond to a robbery that takes place 20,000 feet in the air. The investigation turns into an ongoing hunt for an unreliable father, with his daughter being their main witness. Murtaugh faces hostility from his daughter as he tries to connect with her.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E05 - Let It Ride
2.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs investigate a death that occurs moments before the victim's bet wins a horse race. Leo Getz insists it's a homicide and aids in the investigation. Murtaugh updates his will. Riggs struggles to come to terms with his past.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E06 - Gold Rush
2.plot: Riggs is reunited with childhood friends and comes to realize they might be mixed up in the robbery-homicide case he and Murtaugh are investigating. Murtaugh finds a joint stashed in his kitchen that he brings to Scorsese for testing in effort to bust one of his kids.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E07 - Birdwatching
2.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh investigate the death of a surfer. Murtaugh grows suspicious of Trish's new friend, with whom she's been working on a charity event—and then learns it's NBA champion Scottie Pippen. Riggs has violent nightmares that bring up scars from his childhood.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E08 - Fork-Getta-Bout It
2.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh are led into the underground mob world as they investigate a murder in a hospital. Murtaugh learns that Riana is secretly dating his neighbor and nemesis' son. Riggs spends more time with his childhood friend. Scorsese's real name is revealed.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E09 - Fools Rush In
2.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh are drawn into a fatal world of conspiracy theories. Riggs' relationship with Molly evolves. Murtaugh and Trish attempt to get Harper into a fancy pre-school.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E10 - Wreck the Halls
2.plot: It's Christmas time and the Murtaugh family is headed to Hawaii. Murtaugh's vacation is put on hold when he and Riggs are called to a homicide and the victim is an old friend. Riggs gets a surprise phone call from a relative just in time for Christmas.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E11 - Funny Money
2.plot: Riggs and Murtaugh are thrown into the world of counterfeit money. When a group of teenagers inadvertently gets involved, it strikes a chord with Murtaugh, who is dealing with his own issues regarding his son. Riggs decides to pay a visit to someone from his past.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E12 - Diggin' Up Dirt
2.plot: Riggs takes a trip down memory lane while visiting his father-in-law in prison, which reminds him about an old secret regarding his deceased wife.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E13 - Better Living Through Chemistry
2.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs respond to the murder of an escaped patient of Dr. Cahill's who mysteriously goes off the rails. Riggs' anger gets the better of him once again, causing Avery to consider whether or not he is fit to serve. Family tension runs high between Murtaugh and Trish, who have to make big decisions about R.J.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E14 - Double Shot of Baileys
2.plot: Bailey's sister runs into trouble with the law, and she must decide how far she'll go to protect her family. Murtaugh must help Riana navigate boy problems. Riggs deals with the fallout of a night of heavy drinking.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E15 - An Inconvenient Ruth
2.plot: Murtaugh and Riggs search for the culprit of a local jewelry heist. Murtaugh gets called 'grandpa' by another parent while at the playground with Harper, sending him into a tizzy. Riggs deals with withdrawal from drinking.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E16 - Ruthless
2.plot: After the city's gun buy-back program is robbed, the team is on a hunt for those responsible. Murtaugh walks on thin ice with Trish. Riggs finds an unlikely friend in Ruthie. Avery is reunited with a college 'frenemy' who has key information about the case.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E17 - The Odd Couple
2.plot: After the fatal end to an argument on a construction site, the squad works to untangle facts about the incident. Riggs struggles to rekindle his relationship with Molly. Trish's job is on the line as she tries to close a big deal at work. Murtaugh gets one last chance to make it right at home.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E18 - Frankie Comes to Hollywood
2.plot: The duo sets out to unlock a case about a veteran hitman who Murtaugh has followed for years. Riggs struggles to find a connection with his father. Murtaugh scares Riana with his overprotective driving lessons. The team members finds themselves wedged in a dangerous incident that tests their trust.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E19 - Leo Getz Hitched
2.plot: When Riggs and Murtaugh attend Leo Getz's surprise wedding, they end up investigating a missing person. Riggs comes face to face with someone from his past. Murtaugh receives news that might change his life forever.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E20 - Jesse's Girl
2.plot: After a mansion break-in turns into a homicide, Murtaugh and Riggs set out to find the culprit. Murtaugh and Trish question their trust in Riana as she gets into some trouble with new friends. Riggs recalls his troubling childhood and finds a true family with Molly and Ben.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E21 - Family Ties
2.plot: On Murtaugh's first day on the job as interim captain, the wife of a popular businessman is abducted and the squad finds a connection in the case to Rigg's father. Riggs is left to grapple with his family and work.

2.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S02E22 - One Day More
2.plot: The squad is on high alert after an apparent threat is made on Riggs' life. With Murtaugh taking on more responsibility at work, he and Riggs have to deal with their changing relationship. Trish gets caught up in some trouble. Molly asks Riggs to make a big decision about their future.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E01 - In the Same Boat
3.plot: Former international CIA operative, Wesley Cole returns home and assumes duty as a police officer with the LAPD. Cole will find himself navigating a new partnership with Murtaugh, as he adjusts to life in Los Angeles. Avery continues his campaign for city council.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E02 - Need to Know
3.plot: New partners Murtaugh and Cole attempt to find a steady rhythm as they work to solve the murder of a finance executive. Cole navigates his role with his ex- and his daughter. Avery grapples with the outcome of his campaign for city council.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E03 - A Whole Lotto Trouble
3.plot: Cole juggles the realities of his job and his duty to be a good parent, as he and Murtaugh work together to bust a gang running a lottery scam. Murtaugh gets ready to celebrate his 30th anniversary with the LAPD and receives a surprise visit from his competitive father-in-law.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E04 - Leo Getz Justice
3.plot: Cole reflects upon his time working for the CIA, as a person from the past makes a startling reappearance. Murtaugh struggles with his own mistakes, after a murder raises questions about a suspect he put away years prior. Leo Getz returns as the attorney on the case and tries to convince Trish to join his team.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E05 - Get the Picture
3.plot: Murtaugh and Cole investigate a robbery of a truck filled with fine art. Cole deals with lingering feelings for Natalie following a new development in her life. Riana blackmails Murtaugh into letting her go to a concert after she catches him in a lie that he told Trish.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E06 - Panama
3.plot: Cole confronts his past when his former mentor delivers alarming news, as he and Murtaugh investigate a robbery of safe deposit boxes. Murtaugh clashes with Trish's new client and enlists Bailey's help to investigate her.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E07 - Bali
3.plot: Murtaugh turns to Cole's former mentor for help on a high-stakes cartel case. Murtaugh and Trish meet Natalie and Maya for the first time. Tensions mount between Bailey and 'The Gute' as the new partners begin to work together.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E08 - What the Puck
3.plot: Cole wants to talk to Natalie about their relationship before it's too late, but a wrench is thrown in his plans after he bumps into a new ADA, Erica. After being kicked out of the house for Trish's girl's night, Murtaugh finds himself an unlikely friend.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E09 - Bad Santas
3.plot: While Cole gets into the holiday spirit for his first Christmas with Maya, Murtaugh hopes he can convince RJ to come back home from Costa Rica for the holidays. Cole and Murtaugh are saddled with a complicated burglary and home invasion case. Avery's holidays are a bit blue. Bailey is still trying to figure out her new partner.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E10 - There Will Be Bud
3.plot: Cole finds himself on the rebound after Natalie's engagement, and his new romantic interest, Julie, has an unexpected connection to A.D.A. Erica, complicating things at work. Meanwhile, Murtaugh worries about the connection between the murder he's investigating and a new opportunity for Trish to serve as co-counsel on a high-profile lawsuit with Leo Getz.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E11 - Dial M for Murtaugh
3.plot: Murtaugh takes a family vacation, but is pulled back into work when he witnesses an alleged abduction. Cole is left to investigate a murder himself, but the two cases begin to intersect. Meanwhile, Erica's mother, Senator Malick, comes to town and stirs things up between Erica, Cole and the case at hand.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E12 - The Roger and Me
3.plot: Murtaugh and Cole investigate the murder of an underground MMA fighter when Murtaugh realizes his fighting moves aren't as sharp as they once were. Meanwhile, Trish is unfulfilled by her practice and considers running for a public office. Also, Cole and Erica try to keep things casual and uncomplicated but their plan backfires when Maya reacts to her family changes in a negative way.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E13 - Coyote Ugly
3.plot: When Cole and Murtaugh investigate a case involving a father and daughter crossing the Mexican border, they end up uncovering a major issue with California Boarder Patrol. Meanwhile, Trish prepares her campaign for D.A. and must face parts of her past, before they find their way into the media spotlight. Cole also confronts his past when he experiences flashbacks as a result of an injury.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E14 - A Game of Chicken
3.plot: Against Murtaugh's advice, Cole reaches out to Tom Barnes to help with a case that hits close to home, putting Murtaugh and Cole's partnership to the test. Meanwhile, Trish prepares to announce her campaign for District Attorney.

3.title: FR - L'Arme fatale - S03E15 - The Spy Who Loved Me
3.plot: When Cole is investigated by the FBI, Murtaugh is forced to question his loyalty to his own partner. Meanwhile, Cole works a case that puts Natalie's fiancé, Andrew, into the crosshairs right before their wedding day.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: While on assignment, agent Michael Westen gets a "Burn Notice" and becomes untouchable. Having no idea what or who triggered his demise, Michael returns to his hometown, Miami, determined to find out the reason for his sudden termination.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E02 - Identity
1.plot: Michael helps Madeline's friend retrieve money from a swindler, and in return he receives information about some visitors that came to his mother's home.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E03 - Fight or Flight
1.plot: A drug dealer is witnessed brutally beating up a man by a single mother. Oleg asks Michael to help the woman, Cara, his best waitress, after she stops showing up for work.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E04 - Old Friends
1.plot: Michael's friend, Bill, asks for the spy's help in freeing his daughter from a prostitution ring. Meanwhile, Michael dodges multiple assassination attempts.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E05 - Family Business
1.plot: Michael takes on arms dealers for an airport worker, while Nate obsesses about the car and their dad's will together.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E06 - Unpaid Debts
1.plot: Michael discovers a surprise aboard a boat he has retrieved from Jamaican gangsters. Meanwhile, a CSS agent urges Michael to stop his investigation into who burned him.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E07 - Broken Rules
1.plot: Michael works to rid a community in little Havana of a crime boss, all the while baiting Jason Bly at the risk of his family and friends.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E08 - Wanted Man
1.plot: With Michael's assistance, Fiona helps a man who has been framed for the theft of an expensive brooch.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E09 - Hard Bargain
1.plot: A slightly dim house sitter's fiancée has been kidnapped, and Sam guilts Michael into a rescue while he's negotiating with a D.C. bureaucrat to stop the burn notice.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E10 - False Flag
1.plot: Michael is hired to track down a woman's estranged husband, who has disappeared with their son. Michael soon finds himself pitted against somebody just as skilled and dangerous as he is.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E11 - Dead Drop (1)
1.plot: Sam takes on a case for a woman named Gillian, who is being blackmailed into using her security clearance to help smuggle heroin into the United States. Meanwhile, Michael is busy trying to arrange a meeting with Philip Cowan.

1.title: FR - Burn Notice - S01E12 - Loose Ends (2)
1.plot: Michael must rescue Sam from heroin smugglers, who happen to be ex-Special Forces, while also evading agents who are out to get him.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E01 - Breaking and Entering
2.plot: Having been recruited by the people who burned him, Michael's new handler, Carla, tasks him with helping a computer tech, whose wife and daughter were kidnapped, liberate some information that is guarded by mercenaries.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E02 - Turn and Burn
2.plot: While Michael's new handler asks him to locate a Tunisian counterfeiter, Sam asks him to help a woman who says she is being stalked by a drug dealer, and his mother asks him to join her in seeing a therapist.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E03 - Trust Me
2.plot: Andy, a cell-phone salesman, was conned into investing in a fake Cuban nightclub. Michael helps Andy when the people he borrowed the money from come knocking.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E04 - Comrades
2.plot: Michael helps a Russian woman, Katya, whose sister was smuggled into the U.S. by gangsters; however, Katya cannot afford their extortionate demands and her sister is being held captive.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E05 - Scatter Point
2.plot: Michael poses as a safe cracker to help out a reformed ex-con who is unwillingly part of a heist, and tries to sneak into the heavily-guarded office of his handler. Meanwhile, Sam gets an unexpected proposition from his girlfriend.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E06 - Bad Blood
2.plot: When someone's suspected of embezzling from a hip-hop mogul's charity, Michael attempts to trick the thief into stealing a larger sum.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E07 - Rough Seas
2.plot: Michael is hired to track down nearly a million dollars worth of pharmaceuticals that were stolen by thieves on their way to Tanzania.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E08 - Double Booked
2.plot: Michael and Sam discover the location of Bill Johnson (Joe Kimble) by going through his trash and finding laundry bluing, a staple among spies to prevent snooping in trash. Michael returns to his loft to find Larry Sizemore (Tim Matheson), a former mentor of Michael's. Larry offers Michael $20,000, but then Michael raises it to $30,000, to kill a nurse named Jeannie (Amy Pietz) who stands to gain a lot of money when her ailing husband dies. Michael and Fiona track down Jeannie and inform her that Drew (Zachery Ty Bryan), her stepson, has placed out a bounty on her head. Michael protects Jeannie by faking her poisoning, aided by Fiona's new boyfriend, Campbell (Gary Weeks), a paramedic. Larry kills Drew to cover his tracks and leaves Miami. Michael and Sam follow Bill Johnson into a building and find out that Carla has been using Michael for tactical support for an unknown operation. Michael had collected the ID card for entry into the building (Episode 2), and the rifle that sniper Bill Johnson would be using. Michael also attends family counseling with his mother.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E09 - Good Soldier
2.plot: Hired by Fiona's boyfriend's friend Henry, Michael poses as a disgruntled bodyguard to thwart a kidnapping plot masterminded by a ruthless man named Lesher.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E10 - Do No Harm
2.plot:
Michael prevents a man from committing suicide, whose son suffers from a heart condition. He had lost his savings in a scam after investing in a "miracle drug" for his son, so Michael decides to get him his money back.

Meanwhile, he has to deal with an explosion at his place and his brother in jail.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E11 - Hot Spot
