2.plot: Sam calls in a favor and asks Michael to talk to Sean Martin, a football coach who helps impoverished kids. Sean wants Michael's assistance helping one of his players, Corey Jensen, who's being targeted by gangsters.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E12 - Seek and Destroy
2.plot:
Michael, under the alias of Miles Parker, is hired by Scott Chandler to investigate strange activity - log-ins at odd hours, unusual computer activity and telephone bugging - at an art gallery. But after being attacked by the the gallery's receptionist, Michael finds himself working against Chandler.

Meanwhile, Michael needs to find the person who planted the bomb at his loft, therefor he turns to arms dealer Seymour for help.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E13 - Bad Breaks
2.plot: A federal agent with a knack for giving Michael trouble returns to Miami to force Michael to hand over blackmail materials; the two enemies must work together during a bank robbery.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E14 - Truth & Reconciliation
2.plot: Michael takes on a sympathy case for a Haitian man whose daughter was murdered by a corrupt government official he believes is hiding in Miami. Michael gets closer to tracking down the person who tried to kill him.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E15 - Sins of Omission
2.plot: Michael's ex-fiancé seeks the spy's help in freeing her son, who was kidnapped by a disillusioned ex-spy named Brennen.

2.title: FR - Burn Notice - S02E16 - Lesser Evil
2.plot: Michael gets to know Victor's motivation and his connection to Carla after capturing him. When the truth about Carla's organization is revealed, everyone is put in danger.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E01 - Friends and Family
3.plot: Michael is bailed out of jail by an old friend who asks for his help in return.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E02 - Question and Answer
3.plot: Michael faces a new foe in Detective Paxson, who has tracked down some explosives Michael has been hiding in a storage facility, forcing Michael to surreptitiously get them out before Paxson gets a warrant.  Meanwhile, Michael and team must rescue a kidnapped child by using reverse interrogation.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E03 - End Run
3.plot: Arms trader Brennen returns and kidnaps Nate, forcing Michael to help him pull off an elaborate heist. Michael must also contend with Paxson's ongoing investigation.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E04 - Fearless Leader
3.plot: Michael gets a hold of a crime lord who seems to be the prime suspect in a Miami PD investigation, so he wants to hand him over in return for being left alone.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E05 - Signals and Codes
3.plot: A paranoid mathematician enlists Michael's help to stop the vice president of a defense firm from selling company secrets; Michael tracks down a new contact in the intelligence community.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E06 - The Hunter
3.plot: When he hears about an operative from his past who is hunting him, Michael turns to a prominent member of Miami's underworld for help; a man approaches Michael with an offer.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E07 - Shot In The Dark
3.plot: Michael convinces an abusive stepfather of a young boy to leave town by telling him he is the target of an assassination plot. Elsewhere, Strickler makes a promise to Michael that he will help him get back into the intelligence community if they can work together.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E08 - Friends Like These
3.plot: Barry enlists Michael's help in tracking down his money-laundering client list, which has been stolen by a vicious thief. Michael goes after the thief, only to find that there's a lot more to the situation than he realized. Fiona tries to be supportive of Michael's efforts to reconnect with the intelligence community, but she and Michael find that their differences on the subject may not be reconcilable.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E09 - Long Way Back
3.plot: A dangerous man from Fiona's past resurfaces in Miami after years of hiding, with deadly intentions. Teaming up with Fiona's ruthless brother, Michael will do whatever it takes to save her... even if that means crossing a few lines.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E10 - A Dark Road
3.plot: When a recently widowed woman hires Michael and Fiona to get her away from a group of violent con men, Michael turns to Madeline for help — but he may ask her to go too far. Meanwhile, a mysterious contact goes to extreme lengths to get Michael's attention.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E11 - Friendly Fire
3.plot: When Sam gets an unexpected visit from a former Seal buddy asking for help, Michael must infiltrate a protected urban barrio and hunt down a child predator. Michael also befriends a psychotic former spy runner in order to learn more about his destructive plans while in town.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E12 - Noble Causes
3.plot: Michael is caught off guard by a visit from his drug dealing neighbor Sugar. But to Michael’s surprise, Sugar isn't looking for trouble; He needs Michael's help fending off a crew of notorious thieves. Meanwhile, Michael struggles with working beside an unexpected partner.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E13 - Enemies Closer
3.plot: When Michael's old acquaintance Larry shows up unannounced, it is up to Michael to clean up his mess. Meanwhile, Michael's brother Nate shows up with his new wife Ruth.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E14 - Partners in Crime
3.plot: Sam convinces Michael to investigate a robbery at a chic fashion house, but they quickly realize the world of design isn't always pretty. Meanwhile, Michael and Fiona gain the trust of a Polish intelligence officer to get information on an unlisted "black flight," transporting dangerous cargo.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E15 - Good Intentions
3.plot: Fiona deals with a paranoid kidnapper who's hiding a secret. Elsewhere, Michael tries to take down a black operative, but the mission soon gets out of control.

3.title: FR - Burn Notice - S03E16 - Devil You Know
3.plot: International fugitive Simon is loose and Michael's on the run from the FBI for his role in Simon’s escape. When Simon confronts Michael and threatens to blow up a Miami Beach hotel, Michael must call on his friends and an old enemy to help him avoid disaster and put Simon back in the dark hole where he belongs.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E01 - Friends and Enemies
4.plot: Michael helps Fiona and Sam protect a lawyer against the city's most dangerous biker gang. Meanwhile, he must team up with an unlikely ally to stop a looming terrorist threat... but quickly finds that no mission is without its price.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E02 - Fast Friends
4.plot: Michael meets Jesse, a recently burned counterintelligence agent looking for Michael's help. Michael agrees to help Jesse clear his name, but first must get him out of the crosshairs of a ruthless drug trafficker seeking revenge.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E03 - Made Man
4.plot: When dangerous mobsters threaten a port worker, Michael takes on the case. With Jesse, Michael also looks for intel on an underground-artillery operation.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E04 - Breach of Faith
4.plot: A hostage situation at a local bank. Meanwhile, Fiona helps Jesse track down information about a recently deceased weapons runner.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E05 - Neighborhood Watch
4.plot: A doctor seeks help when drug dealers terrorize his clinic; Michael is drawn into a game of cat and mouse with a killer.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E06 - Entry Point
4.plot: Sam and Jesse interrogate a captured contract killer in order to find out who ordered a recent assassination. Meanwhile, Michael and Fiona pose as security consultants to stop a notorious antiquities thief from stealing a priceless artifact.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E07 - Past & Future Tense
4.plot: Michael helps an ex-CIA operative who has become a target of Russian spies.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E08 - Where There's Smoke
4.plot: Michael, Sam, and Jesse must try to rescue Fiona when their plan to protect a wealthy business bigwig at his house party go horribly awry.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E09 - Center of the Storm
4.plot: Michael impersonates a hitman in order to protect the target who is a crucial witness to criminal activity.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E10 - Hard Time
4.plot: Michael infiltrates a high-security prison in order to protect an inmate (a good friend of Sam’s) who is marked for death by a fellow prisoner

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E11 - Blind Spot
4.plot: Michael and team come to the aid of a woman who has her entire life savings wiped out by a sleazy womanizer.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E12 - Guilty As Charged
4.plot: Fiona attempts to find Jesse and convince him to meet with Michael. Meanwhile, Michael helps a criminal defense attorney rescue his daughter after she is kidnapped by one of his clients.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E13 - Eyes Open
4.plot: Michael tries to prevent a bombing arranged by a lawyer out for revenge against a local gang. Elsewhere, Michael and Jesse must track down a highly sensitive document that's been stolen.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E14 - Hot Property
4.plot: Michael must work with an enemy to keep chemical weapons out of the wrong hands.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E15 - Brotherly Love
4.plot: When Nate gets in over his head tracking down a stolen car filled with a drug kingpin's merchandise, Michael brings back an old alias to save his brother's life.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E16 - Dead or Alive
4.plot: Sam tries to help a friend who's been deemed a dirty cop clear his name. Elsewhere, Michael plans to meet with Jesse's former handler in order to make sure government documents end up in the right hands.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E17 - Out of the Fire
4.plot: Michael's enemy Brennen and Michael's former friend Larry team up to pressure Michael into killing the individuals on the stolen NOC list.  Meanwhile, Sam, Jesse, and Fiona try to help Michael turn the tables on Brennen and Larry.

4.title: FR - Burn Notice - S04E18 - Last Stand
4.plot: Michael, Fiona, and Jessie try to keep the NOC list away from Vaughn and his strike team.  Meanwhile Sam and Madeline try to convince Congressman Cowley to pass the list higher up.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E01 - Company Man
5.plot: Michael works with his old agency to go after the people who burned him in a case that leads the group to Venezuela.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E02 - Bloodlines
5.plot: Michael has to balance his new agency duties and helping a woman recover her cousin, who is one of many being trafficked into the U.S. by the Yakuza. Against Michael's wishes, Madeline becomes a critical component of the plan to find the girls.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E03 - Mind Games
5.plot: Nate returns to Miami to seek Michael's help to go after a loan shark who's harassing a widow. The guys soon discover that the loan shark is not all that he seems, however.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E04 - No Good Deed
5.plot: The team searches for a super-computer to clear Barry's brother of a server heist.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E05 - Square One
5.plot: Michael plays a key role in a CIA murder investigation. Meanwhile, the team helps a client who reminds them of Michael — a former army sniper who wants revenge on the men who put his sister on the hospital.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E06 - Enemy of My Enemy
5.plot: The CIA abandons Sam after he goes undercover with a heroin dealer while trying to recover a weapon. Meanwhile, Pearce continues searching for Max's killer.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E07 - Besieged
5.plot: Michael and Sam try to retrieve a boy from an armed compound. Fiona and Jesse babysit a day laborer.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E08 - Hard Out
5.plot: Michael and Jesse go on an extraction mission on a Caribbean island but end up trapped there by mercenaries. Meanwhile, Fiona tries to get information out of an ex by doing a favor for him.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E09 - Eye for an Eye
5.plot: Fiona and Jesse work together for a pharmaceuticals magnate, but soon realize that he is hiding something. Meanwhile, Michael and Sam take on a bomb-maker involved in Max's death.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E10 - Army of One
5.plot: Michael goes undercover with a group of hijackers in order to assist Jesse with a security job, but he changes the plan when the hijackers take hostages at the airport. Madeline assists Michael by organizing the hostages and trying to lead them to safety.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E11 - Better Halves
5.plot: Michael and Fiona pose as a wealthy couple at a South American resort in order to extract a bioweapons specialist. Elsewhere, Sam and Jesse try to trap Max's killer.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E12 - Dead to Rights
5.plot: With convincing from Sam and Jesse, Pearce begrudgingly lets Michael take drastic measures attempting to clear himself of Max's murder. Meanwhile, Larry returns, having kidnapped a government psychiatrist, and insists that Michael help him with a job.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E13 - Damned If You Do
5.plot: Michael and Fiona plan to abduct a hacker in Puerto Rico in order to obtain his software, but the man has several other enemies to contend with. Elsewhere, Madeline learns to retrieve information from the police under the tutelage of Sam and Jesse.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E14 - Breaking Point
5.plot: When gang warfare claims the life of one of Michael's childhood friends, he teams up with the victim's brother to entrap the gang in Fiona's weapons scheme.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E15 - Necessary Evil
5.plot: Michael leads a rescue mission for a scientist abducted by an African warlord, while Sam and Jesse get in trouble during an undercover mission. Meanwhile, Madeline discovers that someone close to her is keeping secrets.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E16 - Depth Perception
5.plot: Sam reunites with Beatriz after an attempt is made on her life by a Russian spy, and Michael is forced to trust Anson in order to save her. Jesse and Fiona must travel to the Cayman Islands to track down a banker in order to obtain financial information for Anson.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E17 - Acceptable Loss
5.plot: A friend of Jesse asks the team to help take out his boss, who has been smuggling blood diamonds into the country with the help of diplomatic immunity. Michael asks Pearce for help transferring a prisoner who may be able to provide him with information on Anson.

5.title: FR - Burn Notice - S05E18 - Fail Safe
5.plot: As the team reaches a breaking point with Anson and his sinister plans, Pearce puts Michael in charge of his biggest CIA mission yet.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E01 - Scorched Earth
6.plot: Michael pursues Anson in Miami. Meanwhile, Fiona is taken into custody and interrogated by a former foe.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E02 - Mixed Messages
6.plot: Michael reconnects with his mentor and offers to help go after a drug cartel in exchange for visitation privileges with Fiona. Meanwhile, Fiona leans on a new friend for help fending off a gang leader in prison.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E03 - Last Rites
6.plot: Pearce asks Michael to help her track down her fiancee's murderer. Fiona investigates the group that tried to get her killed in prison.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E04 - Under the Gun
6.plot: Michael, Sam and Jesse head to the Everglades to track the guard trying to kill Fiona in prison. Fiona has to do another favor for Ayn in order to get herself out of trouble.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E05 - Split Decision
6.plot: Michael takes on a gangster with help from an unlikely ally. Card offers Fiona a deal to become a CIA asset, an arrangement that would prevent her from being extradited.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E06 - Shock Wave
6.plot: Michael finally gets a solid lead on Anson, but the plan to get Fiona out of prison hits a snag when an MI-6 agent tries to prevent her release. Across town, Sam must protect Barry after a cold-blooded assassin traps them in a secluded beach house.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E07 - Reunion
6.plot: Sam agrees to help his girlfriend's son, who is in deep trouble with a loan shark. Michael and Fiona reconnect while searching for the saboteur.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E08 - Unchained
6.plot: Michael intentionally gets arrested in order to help an FBI agent take down a vicious mobster. Jesse and Pearce follow up on the gun sale that put the weapon in the hands of Nate's murderer, but run into danger.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E09 - Official Business
6.plot: The CIA recruits Fiona to break into a guarded safe after a civilian asset winds up in over her head. Meanwhile, Sam and Jesse visit a mercenary training camp to track the sniper who killed Nate.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E10 - Desperate Times
6.plot: The team travels to Panama to capture an assassin; Madeline tries to obtain difficult answers.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E11 - Desperate Measures
6.plot: After finding themselves stranded in Panama, Michael and the team are forced to hijack a plane in order to get home. Before they can leave, however, Michael must first escape the clutches of a sadistic Panamanian drug-runner.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E12 - Means & Ends
6.plot: Fiona is surprised by a visit from a smuggler she met in prison, who needs her help bringing down a corrupt Miami detective. Meanwhile, Michael teams up with a former adversary in order to turn the tables on a more treacherous foe.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E13 - Over the Line
6.plot: Michael is accused of a crime at a local hotel. Elsewhere, Olivia questions Sam in an attempt to get to Michael.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E14 - Down & Out
6.plot: Michael arranges to be captured by a Syrian intelligence officer in order to rescue an inept smuggler; Riley offers Madeline a deal in hopes of tracking down Michael.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E15 - Best Laid Plans
6.plot: Michael brokers a deal selling an expensive piece of technology to a ruthless thief, but things become complicated when Sam is dragged in as part of a high stakes robbery. Meanwhile, Madeline goes to Barry to ask for a dangerous favor.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E16 - Odd Man Out
6.plot: Michael seeks refuge in a warehouse when he's caught in the middle of a smuggler's attempt to get revenge on his former client. Survival becomes a challenge as supplies run low and the exits are blocked.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E17 - You Can Run
6.plot: Michael is nearly killed when a powerful enemy sends a crew of cartel assassins after his entire team. Michael realizes that in order to protect the ones closest to him, he must eliminate the threat once and for all.

6.title: FR - Burn Notice - S06E18 - Game Change
6.plot: Michael attempts to leave the country, but when the escape is ambushed, Sam and Jesse are taken captive. Racing against the clock to save Sam, Michael must also figure out how to rescue Jesse before time runs out.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E01 - New Deal
7.plot: Michael's deal with the CIA sends him to the Dominican Republic to infiltrate a terrorist organization headed by an old contact. Sam, Fiona, and Jesse try to move on with their lives, but are drawn back in when someone starts asking questions about Michael's whereabouts. Maddie tries to get custody of her grandson.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E02 - Forget Me Not
7.plot: Michael returns to Miami to track down someone who is trying to blow his cover; Michael is forbidden from contacting his crew.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E03 - Down Range
7.plot: Sam and Jesse travel to the Dominican Republic to help Michael with a high-stakes trade; Fiona intervenes when a bookie tries to extort Madeline.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E04 - Brothers in Arms
7.plot: Michael tries to learn about Burke's underground network; Fiona and Madeline must frame a corrupt Russian bureaucrat for treason.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E05 - Exit Plan
7.plot: Michael meets a former Russian operative who now works as part of Burke’s mysterious organization. In order to get out of Cuba, they’ll have to outwit a bloodthirsty counterintelligence expert who’s locking down the island. Strong convinces Fiona to help Michael’s mission by making her an offer she can’t refuse.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E06 - All or Nothing
7.plot: Michael and Fiona pose as hackers at a malicious programming syndicate in order to steal information for Sonya. But Michael’s life gets complicated when working with Fiona again brings back painful memories. Meanwhile, Sam and Jesse help Barry track down a former girlfriend in exchange for falsified documents.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E07 - Psychological Warfare
7.plot: Michael finally meets with the head of the organization he’s been assigned to dismantle, but things get dicey when the leader drugs him at gunpoint in order to learn his deepest secrets. In danger of exposing his cover, Michael soon realizes that in order to protect his future... he'll have to face his past first.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E08 - Nature of the Beast
7.plot: Michael goes after a drug smuggler at the bidding of the organization he's trying to infiltrate. Elsewhere, Fiona, Jesse and Strong visit a mental hospital in a search for more information about James.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E09 - Bitter Pill
7.plot: The team look for an antidote at the manufacturer's lab in order to save a poisoned Middle Eastern diplomat. Elsewhere, Madeline takes action when she suspects she's being followed.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E10 - Things Unseen
7.plot: When Michael discovers an old friend digging up secrets that could expose his cover, he must decide just how far he will go to protect the mission. Meanwhile, Sam and Jesse are thrust in the middle of a street war involving a decade-old murder after Fiona’s boyfriend is targeted by a coldblooded gang member.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E11 - Tipping Point
7.plot: As Michael becomes ever more conflicted with his mission, he travels to Mexico with Sonya in order to help James with an important job. Anxious to finish the operation, Strong hires freelance mercenaries to extract James on site... but brings along an unexpected guest.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E12 - Sea Change
7.plot: Michael must expose his identity to James and Sonya. Meanwhile, Fiona, Sam and Jesse form a plan to retrieve Michael.

7.title: FR - Burn Notice - S07E13 - Reckoning
7.plot: Series Finale. Michael must regain the trust of those closest to him in order to finish what he started.

meta.plot: Lorsqu'un agent secret est viré, il ne reçoit pas une lettre des ressources humaines, mais une "Burn Notice". Sans en connaître la raison, l'ex-espion Michael Weston en a été victime et le gouvernement en a fait un indésirable. Aidé de son ex petite amie et de son ancien partenaire, Michael cherche à savoir pourquoi il a été mis sur la touche, pourquoi il a été ainsi éliminé. Pour parvenir à ses fins, il ne peut employer les méthodes habituelles et doit éviter à tout prix d'attirer l'attention de ses anciens collègues espions. Afin de financer son enquête personnelle, il propose ses services à ceux que le police ne peut pas, ou ne veut pas, aider...

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E01 - Lyra's Jordan
1.plot: Orphan Lyra Belacqua's world is turned upside-down by her long-absent uncle's return from the north, while the glamorous Mrs Coulter visits Jordan College with a proposition.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E02 - The Idea of North
1.plot: Lyra starts her new life in London, determined to find Roger with Mrs Coulter’s help. The Gyptians continue their search for the missing children and the elusive Gobblers.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E03 - The Spies
1.plot: From the clutches of the Gobblers, Lyra finds help from an unlikely place. It helps her put together more about her past and keep safe from Mrs Coulter and the Magisterium.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E04 - Armour
1.plot: Lyra and the Gyptians arrive in the North and seek the help of the Witches’ Consul, Texan aeronaut Lee Scoresby and an armoured bear in service to the town.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E05 - The Lost Boy
1.plot: The alethiometer sends Lyra and Iorek on a new path, leading to a shocking but vital clue in her search to find her friend Roger and the other missing children.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E06 - The Daemon-Cages
1.plot: Lyra discovers the horrific truth behind the Gobbler’s activities in the North. She must use all her wits to help free those around her and avoid suffering a terrible fate.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E07 - The Fight to the Death
1.plot: Separated from her friends, Lyra must use all of her methods of deception to thwart a formidable foe. Meanwhile, Mrs Coulter plots her next move.

1.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S01E08 - Betrayal
1.plot: As the Magisterium closes in, Lyra learns more about Asriel’s rebellion. But her assistance to him comes at great personal cost.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E01 - The City of Magpies
2.plot: Lyra and Will find themselves in a strange new place. The Magisterium take action as Mrs Coulter interrogates a suspected heretic witch, and Lee Scoresby embarks on a mission.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E02 - The Cave
2.plot: Lyra crosses into Will's world, and they set off to find answers about Dust. Will is shocked to discover he has grandparents, but quickly realises he can’t trust them.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E03 - Theft
2.plot: Lyra ignores the alethiometer, with dangerous consequences for her and Will. Lee Scoresby’s search for Grumman brings an unlikely ally, and the witches seek answers.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E04 - Tower of the Angels
2.plot: In search of the knife, Will and Lyra try to gain entry into the Torre Degli Angeli. Lee finds Grumman - or Jopari, as he is now known - and they take to the sky in search of the knife bearer.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E05 - The Scholar
2.plot: Will and Lyra plan to steal the alethiometer from Boreal but are set back by an unforeseen guest. MacPhail takes decisive action, and Mary takes a leap of faith.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E06 - Malice
2.plot: Lyra and Will find allies who can help them in their search for Will’s father. The Magisterium learn something shocking, and Mrs Coulter meets a formidable foe.

2.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S02E07 - Æsahættr
2.plot: As all paths converge on Cittàgazze, Lee is determined to fulfil his quest, whatever the cost. Mrs Coulter’s question is answered, and Will takes on his father’s mantle.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E01 - The Enchanted Sleeper
3.plot: Held captive by Mrs Coulter, a dreaming Lyra finds herself in a mysterious place with someone familiar - Roger. Will continues his quest to find Lyra, meeting unexpected allies along the way.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E02 - The Break
3.plot: Will tries to save Lyra from her mother and the Magisterium, but it comes at a great personal cost. Asriel’s plans change when unexpected angelic visitors crash into his republic.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E03 - The Intention Craft
3.plot: Lyra and Will seek help from Iorek to fix the Subtle Knife before reaching an agreement to go to the Land of the Dead together. Mrs Coulter goes on trial in Asriel’s republic.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E04 - Lyra and Her Death
3.plot: As Lyra and Will head to the Land of the Dead, Mrs Coulter tries to thwart MacPhail. Mary is buoyed by the unexpected appearance of a very unusual creature.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E05 - No Way Out
3.plot: In the world of the mulefa, Mary makes a heartbreaking discovery. Lyra and Will journey through the Land of the Dead in search of Roger.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E06 - The Abyss
3.plot: As Metatron's abyss rips through the worlds, sucking Dust into its depths, Lyra and Will attempt to lead the ghosts out of the Land of the Dead.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E07 - The Clouded Mountain
3.plot: As the Clouded Mountain approaches, Mrs Coulter, Asriel and his council discuss their battle strategy. In the Land of the Dead, Lyra and Will deliberate their next move.

3.title: FR - His Dark Materials : À la croisée des mondes - S03E08 - The Botanic Garden
3.plot: Lyra and Will reunite with Mary and hear a story that changes everything. Now they must decide what they are willing to sacrifice if they are to save the worlds.

meta.plot: Courageuse et futée, Lyra se retrouve embarquée dans une folle aventure dans les contrées du Nord, à la recherche de son meilleur ami disparu. Pourquoi cette jeune fille orpheline, élevée dans l'atmosphère austère et confinée du prestigieux Jordan College, fait-elle l'objet de tant d'attentions ? Serait-elle investie d'une mystérieuse mission ? Sur les traces de ravisseurs d'enfants aux motivations obscures, Lyra va faire d'étonnantes rencontres et surmonter de multiples dangers...
Deux danseuses colombiennes que tout oppose s'affrontent sur la piste de danse et en dehors, portées par une volonté de réussir qui les conduit sur un chemin dangereux.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E01 - To Hell With It
1.plot: To impress the Royal's new artistic director, Antonia draws inspiration from urban dance group Pura Kaye. Karina and her crew receive a job offer.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E02 - The Barrio
1.plot: Karina agrees to help Antonia. Mateo follows Antonia to Karina's place. Sparks fly between Checho and Antonia after he sees her on the dance floor.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E03 - The Royal
1.plot: Karina helps Antonia get on Jacobo's good side. After Bombita causes a mishap, repaying the money for the trip becomes a matter of life and death.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E04 - Intruders
1.plot: Checho's debt puts Ximena in a perilous situation. After a fight with Pura Kaye, Karina joins the play's rehearsals. Mateo takes revenge on Checho.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E05 - The Chosen One
1.plot: Antonia helps Checho escape. Karina upsets the dancers when she accepts the lead role. Antonia makes a business proposition to Bombi, Chama and Ximena.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E06 - Goodbye
1.plot: Antonia focuses on finding a chance to work with Joy. Karina struggles with the acting side of the role. A goodbye party for Ximena proves eventful.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E07 - The Betrayal
1.plot: Mateo makes an impulsive decision. Checho and the women help Ximena escape a risky situation. Pura Kaye auditions for singer Guaynaa’s music video.

1.title: FR - Savage Rhythm - S01E08 - Sabotage
1.plot: After Antonia accepts Miranda's deal, Karina decides to exact revenge on the Royal. A tragedy occurs during the filming of the music video.

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E01 - Conspiracy
1.plot: A giant castle in a mysterious world. Two shady Majin, Gomah and Degesu, watch a monitor. The monitor shows Goku and the others having a fierce battle against Majin Buu. Gomah and Degesu head to Earth to execute a certain conspiracy.

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E02 - Glorio
1.plot: Goku and his friends have been turned small due to Gomah's scheme. They begin preparing to go to the demon world. Goku collects his Nyoibo and looks forward to a new adventure. Then the mysterious young Majin Glorio appears!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E03 - Daima
1.plot: Goku, Supreme Kai, and Glorio head out to the "Demon Realm" first. Their plane travels through space and a mysterious dimension. They arrive at the entrance to the Demon Realm, the "Third Demon World"!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E04 - Chatty
1.plot: Forced to make their way through the Third Demon World on foot, Goku and his companions stop by a lone drive-in on the way. There they encounter some strange souvenirs and a rather chatty and quirky Majin woman and her husband!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E05 - Panzy
1.plot: The masked Majin who appeared before Goku and his companions is a young girl named Panzy! While Glorio gives her the cold shoulder, Panzy insists on acting as their guide. The group reaches a suspicious castle!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E06 - Lightning
1.plot: After encountering the Gendarmerie, the wardens of the Demon Realm, the four are forced to camp in a cave where they encounter further trouble! The enigmatic Glorio unleashes lightning magic against Goku to resolve the situation!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E07 - Collar
1.plot: Goku and his companions continue their journey. But the Gendarmerie appear and bar their way again, perhaps due to them knowing the location of the Magic Collar around Panzy's neck. Can the bond with her friends save Panzy from peril?!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E08 - Tamagami
1.plot: The fight with a Tamagami begins! The Tamagamis are the undefeated guardians of the Dragon Balls. Seeing Goku fight toe-to-toe with one, Panzy and the others are unable to hide their surprise. As the battle heats up, what will happen?!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E09 - Thieves
1.plot: Rumors of what Goku did in the Third Demon World spread across the Demon Realm. To avoid trouble, Goku wears a disguise at the hotel, but they can't let their guard down in the Third Demon World. Thieves see through his disguise!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E10 - Ocean
1.plot: Goku and his companions arrive at the mystic Second Demon World where a giant ocean spreads as far as the eye can see! The party is amazed at the new world but is immediately attacked by Gendarmerie that have been sent by Gomah!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E11 - Legend
1.plot: Having regrouped with Vegeta and the others, Goku and his companions arrive at a planet that seems familiar. As they move to head out, a suspicious shadow approaches! It's the Legendary Namek who remained alone in the Demon Realm!

1.title: FR - Dragon Ball DAIMA - S01E12 - True Strength
1.plot: Vegeta’s battle with the Tamagami is evenly matched, but forced underwater where he's not used to fighting, he finds himself struggling! Vegeta is cornered and sinks to the ocean floor. But then he finally unleashes his true strength!

meta.plot: Goku et ses amis menaient une vie paisible quand, tout à coup, ils redeviennent petits ! Ils découvrent que l’origine de cette conspiration trouve sa source dans un monde connu sous le nom du “Royaume des Démons". C’est alors qu'apparaît un jeune et mystérieux Majin nommé Glorio...

Fondé sur une légende, " DISTRICT Z " propose un format unique et jamais vu auparavant. Une création 100% française où des personnalités devront, dans ce jeu d'aventure familial nouvelle génération, se surpasser pour leurs associations en échappant aux créatures et en réussissant des épreuves dans des décors grandioses. Le tout sous l'œil avisé de Denis Brogniart !

1.title: FR - District Z - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - District Z - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - District Z - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - District Z - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - District Z - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E01 - Meet the Lord
1.plot: Henry Shackleford, a young slave living in the Kansas territory in 1856, has a run-in with abolitionist John Brown, who mistakes him for a girl and promptly “frees” him. Believing Henry to be his good luck charm, Brown welcomes him into his ragtag army and nicknames him “Onion.” Donning a dress for the first time while dodging bullets, Onion quickly awakens to the life or death stakes in the battle over human bondage and witnesses Brown’s divinely inspired violent agenda: to free the land of slavery by any means necessary.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E02 - A Wicked Plot
1.plot: Separated from Brown’s army, Onion and fellow slave Bob leave the fight in Kansas only to cross paths with pro-slavery “red shirts” who escort them to the slave-trading town of Pikesville, Missouri. Onion is taken under the wing of Pie, a mixed-race prostitute working out of the local hotel, who instructs him in the ways of the world despite her discovering his dangerous secret. Onion soon finds himself enmeshed in a mounting slave insurrection where he learns the consequences of his own actions.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E03 - Mister Fred
1.plot: Following the battle in Pikesville, John Brown, now one of the most wanted men in America, travels north with Onion to raise funds for the abolitionist cause. They take refuge at the home of famed orator and “King of the Negroes” Frederick Douglass and his two wives. When Brown and Douglass clash over methodology, Onion discovers just how complex the fight for justice and human equality really is.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E04 - Smells Like Bear
1.plot: John and Onion continue their fundraising mission, this time heading to Canada on foot. After seeing true freedom for the first time and frustrated with Brown’s increasingly irrational behavior, Onion demands freedom from Brown’s army. But, when the legendary Harriet Tubman endorses Brown in a room full of new recruits, Onion realizes that he may be more invested in the cause and the "old man" than he thought.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E05 - Hiving the Bees
1.plot: Onion and new recruit John Cook head to Harper’s Ferry to prepare for the arrival of John Brown and his army. However, Onion quickly struggles to perform his mission of recruiting more African-American soldiers from the area when Cook’s reckless behavior threatens their exposure to suspicious neighbors. After several weeks of waiting, Brown, his army and his daughter Annie finally arrive—creating a new distraction for Onion: true love.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E06 - Jesus is Walkin'
1.plot: The plan to take control of the nation’s largest armory at Harper’s Ferry is finally put into action. However, a crucial mistake by Onion threatens the success of the entire operation. John Brown’s army takes hostages, grabbing the attention of an angry mob and local militia. With shots firing, Onion is sent out to get reinforcements.

1.title: FR - The Good Lord Bird - S01E07 - Last Words
1.plot: John Brown and his remaining army take a last stand as more federal troops descend upon Harper’s Ferry. With John Brown captured and held for public execution, Onion, truly on his own, risks his life to say his goodbyes to Brown. Series finale.

meta.plot: Enslaved teenager Henry Shackleford, aka Little Onion, becomes a member in abolitionist John Brown’s motley family during the Bleeding Kansas era before the Civil War.

In Shanghai in 1943, Chen Qian, a military agent, was ordered to assassinate the Japanese, but fell into the trap of Yujiro Ida, the head of Japan's plum agency. Born on the day, and accidentally learned of the Japanese conspiracy. In order to stop the sinister plan of the invaders, Chen Qian began to receive special training, disguised as a Japanese envoy to visit Mei's agency again. Chen Qian, who went deep into the enemy's camp, walked step by step in the dark, walking on thin ice, and with the help of the Communist Party member Chun Yang, he repeatedly avoided danger.

meta.plot: L’histoire vraie du terrible tueur en série britannique des années 80, Dennis Nilsen, connu sous le nom « Des », racontée de trois points de vue différents : le tueur lui-même, l’enquêteur Peter Jay et le biographe Brian Masters…

1.title: FR - Des - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: On 9 February 1983, Detective Chief Inspector Peter Jay discovers a drain clogged with rotting flesh and bones. The culprit, Dennis Nilsen, freely admits to the police that it's not just one or two bodies, but "15 or 16, I think".

1.title: FR - Des - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With limited resources, Jay and the police continue to dig into Nilsen's memories in an effort to convict him for the murder of every one of his victims. But when Des withdraws his cooperation and stops talking, Jay fears justice will be lost.

1.title: FR - Des - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Reeling from Des' change in plea, Jay and the police throw themselves into proving premeditation. If they can show the court that Des was undoubtedly of sound mind when he committed his crimes, he will go down and never be released.

meta.plot: In August 2005, through a tunnel almost 80 meter long, thiefs invaded the bank vault of Brazil's Central Bank in Fortaleza and stole over 160 milions reais, ou or nealy 3,5 tons of cash. This documenty explores that spectacular and historic heist.

1.title: FR - Hei$t: The Great Robbery of Brazil's Central Bank - S01E01 - The Crime
1.plot: Authorities scramble to piece together an audacious heist after criminals tunnel into the vault at Fortaleza's Central Bank and rob it of millions.

1.title: FR - Hei$t: The Great Robbery of Brazil's Central Bank - S01E02 - The Hunt
1.plot: The hunt for culprits takes detectives to Boa Viagem in Northeastern Brazil. Later, the police unearth an unfolding caper and close in on a mastermind.

1.title: FR - Hei$t: The Great Robbery of Brazil's Central Bank - S01E03 - Cursed Money
1.plot: More money, more problems: The cursed cash tantalizes corrupt officers as the thieves turn into kidnapping targets — and meet suspicious ends.

meta.plot: Sous forme de guide sombre et satirique, cette série explore l'ascension et la chute des gangsters les plus célèbres de l'histoire, ainsi que leurs tactiques pour réussir.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E01 - Land Your Dream Job
1.plot: How does a barber's son from Brooklyn become king of the Chicago underworld? Infamous gangster Al Capone offers a lesson in unlocking your own potential.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E02 - Build a Better Operation
1.plot: Ready to earn street cred and protect your profits? Follow heroin kingpin Frank Lucas' cutting-edge business plan to make sure your crimes do pay.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E03 - Dominate Through Terror
1.plot: Master the art of fear and steamroll your rivals by retracing Salvatore "Totò" Riina's blood-soaked rise through the ranks of the Sicilian Mafia.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E04 - Don't Go Rogue
1.plot: For a lesson in what not to do, look no further than John Gotti, "The Dapper Don" who flashed his ill-gotten wealth and orchestrated his own downfall.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E05 - Play the Long Game
1.plot: Cover your tracks and play the long game by studying Whitey Bulger, Boston's most notorious — and successful — criminal, who spent 16 years on the run.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Mob Boss - S01E06 - Break the Mold
1.plot: Drug lord. Narcoterrorist. Politician. Pablo Escobar reached a level of fame and power most criminals could only dream of. Here's how he did it.

meta.plot: Look inside the cult leader's playbook for achieving unconditional love, endless devotion and the power to control people's minds, bodies, and souls.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E01 - Build Your Foundation
1.plot: Embrace your calling and reinvent yourself by studying the life of petty criminal and folk rock troubadour-turned-murderous legend Charles Manson.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E02 - Grow Your Flock
1.plot: Build a fervent following by retracing the steps of Jim Jones, whose messiah complex turned a small healing grift into a dangerously loyal congregation.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E03 - Reform Their Minds
1.plot: Return to Buddhafield and unlock the mastery of manipulation with Jaimie Gomez, a failed actor who built an army of servants by promising enlightenment.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E04 - Promise Eternity
1.plot: Apocalypse, anyone? Create credible danger and consolidate power by studying the spiritual, sci-fi narrative of Heaven's Gate leader Marshall Applewhite.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E05 - Control Your Image
1.plot: Leverage media coverage to cultivate a pious image like Shoko Asahara, who built the doomsday cult Aum Shinrikyo on positive PR and deadly methods.

1.title: FR - How to Become a Cult Leader - S01E06 - Become Immortal
1.plot: Avoid unhappy endings and cement your legacy by studying Sun Myung Moon, who transformed the Unification Church into a still-thriving economic machine.

meta.plot: Love it or hate it, the government plays a huge role in our lives. Adam Conover explores its triumphs, failures and how we might be able to change it.

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E01 - Food
1.plot: Adam unpacks the origins of the USDA, the ways in which it keeps food safe, its challenges, and how it's directly responsible for stuffed-crust pizza.

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E02 - Weather
1.plot: How's the weather? The answer could mean life or death. Adam meets with those tasked with predicting the weather and handling its fallout.

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E03 - Money
1.plot: From bank bailouts to stimulus checks: Adam digs into the ways in which the government keeps people in the black — or shortchanges them.

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E04 - Future
1.plot: "Hey, Siri. Who created GPS, drones, Roomba and you?" "A military defense agency responsible for some amazing — and awful — advancements in tech."

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E05 - Disease
1.plot: Adam examines the US government's helpful and harmful approaches to sickness and finds that incompetence and indifference are all too contagious.

1.title: FR - The G Word with Adam Conover - S01E06 - Change
1.plot: A disillusioned Adam visits Barack Obama to see if the man who made “hope and change” a thing can explain how to make an actual impact in government.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E01 - This Could Be a Real Adventure
1.plot: Kids from an ordinary planet discover a surprising secret.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E02 - Way, Way Out Past the Barrier
1.plot: A surprising first stop marks the beginning of an unexpected journey.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E03 - Very Interesting, as an Astrogration Problem
1.plot: A mysterious stranger offers to help our heroes.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E04 - Can't Say I Remember No at Attin
1.plot: Our heroes face a surprise in a familiar setting.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E05 - You Have a Lot to Learn About Pirates
1.plot: A seemingly pleasant world will test our heroes like no other.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E06 - Zero Friends Again
1.plot: Relationships fray under the pressures of a difficult journey.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E07 - We're Gonna Be in So Much Trouble
1.plot: Our heroes have never felt further from home.

1.title: FR - Star Wars: Skeleton Crew - S01E08 - The Real Good Guys
1.plot: A journey filled with adventure comes to a surprising end.

meta.plot: Four ordinary kids search for their home planet after getting lost in the Star Wars galaxy.
The experiences of four British men and women who leave their lives behind to join ISIS in Syria.

1.title: FR - The State - S01E01 - Part One
1.plot: Four young British male and female ISIS recruits are excited to begin their new lives in Syria. Jalal and Ziyaad enjoy the male camaraderie as they are trained and equipped for battle, while Shakira and Ushna are taught the strict rules women must obey. They take oaths of allegiance to ISIS, convinced they’ve made the right decision to come, but are soon confronted by the harsh realities of life under ISIS which don’t match their expectations.

1.title: FR - The State - S01E02 - Part Two
1.plot: The recruits are forced to reflect on their new lives in The State. Jalal and Ziyaad experience bloody frontline battle, while Shakira witnesses the horrifying aftermath of a barrel bomb and Ushna is shocked at the brutal treatment of women. Shakira must persuade a dangerous commander to set aside ISIS rules and allow her to work in hospital and Jalal has a conversation which makes him question the whole rationale for his journey to Syria.

1.title: FR - The State - S01E03 - Part Three
1.plot: Marriage to a foreign fighter proves challenging for Ushna but she is determined to make it work. Shakira too must marry to continue working, but turns down a proposal from Abu Akram with brutal consequences. Jalal is horrified by the treatment of young Yazidi women being sold as sex slaves and buys a mother and daughter to rescue them. He and Ziyaad are sent back to the frontline where a commander is calling for the ultimate sacrifice.

1.title: FR - The State - S01E04 - Part Four
1.plot: Jalal is given a new role by ISIS, and witnesses barbaric punishments and mock executions to feed its propaganda machine. With the noose tightening around him, he decides to risk his own safety to help Ibitsam and Narin escape. As Ushna’s commitment deepens, Shakira’s concern that Isaac is being readied for frontline battle makes her contemplate the unthinkable – whether there is any way out of The State.

meta.plot: Dans cette série, la star du stand-up Gabriel Iglesias endosse le rôle d'un prof d'histoire sympa décidé à donner un coup de pouce à des lycéens doués mais inadaptés.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E01 - Some Children Left Behind
1.plot: On the last day of class before summer break, Gabe learns several of his students are being transferred out of Woodrow Wilson High School.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E02 - Summer School
1.plot: Told to find an impartial teacher to grade his class's oral reports, Gabe worries when the most morally upstanding member of the faculty volunteers.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E03 - Full Hearts, Clear Backpacks
1.plot: As part of his new security initiative, Carlos institutes a clear backpack policy that doesn't sit well with Gabe or his students.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E04 - The Wagon
1.plot: While dealing with the transfer of a star athlete into his class, Gabe experiences an inadvertent stumble on the road to sobriety.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E05 - Everybody Hates Gabe
1.plot: Marisol questions Gabe's sense of fair play when a football player seems to receive preferential treatment before Wilson High's big game.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E06 - Bullying
1.plot: Gabe intervenes when he believes one of his students is being bullied. Meanwhile, new school guidelines regarding inclusive language dismay Marisol.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E07 - Talent Show
1.plot: To get his class comfortable with being in the spotlight, Gabe persuades them to perform in the school's talent show. The catch? He must perform, too.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E08 - Teachers' Strike
1.plot: When a teacher's strike threatens his students' chances in an academic decathlon, Gabe looks for ways to help them without crossing the picket line.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E09 - Oh Boy, Danny
1.plot: After falling back under the spell of her two-timing ex, Abby turns to Gabe for support. Marisol declines to participate in the class's college tour.

1.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S01E10 - Academic Decathlon
1.plot: On the eve of the annual academic competition, Principal Madison, Marisol and Gabe all face tough choices involving loyalty and ambition.

2.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S02E01 - True Calling
2.plot: Gabe gives his class a college prep pep talk that backfires so spectacularly he begins to question his own career path.

2.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S02E03 - Party of One
2.plot: Gabe meddles in Paula's love life when she scores a date with a coach who's a well-known player, while Marisol balks at starring in the school play.

2.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S02E04 - Generation Why
2.plot: No good deed goes unpunished for Gabe when he champions Marisol's plan to join a district-wide Green Week competition, unaware of the price he'll pay.

2.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S02E05 - Food for Thought
2.plot: Citing cultural appropriation, Marisol goes after Gabe's favorite taco truck. Paula attempts to censor the school's production of "Romeo and Juliet."

2.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S02E06 - Where Art Thou Counselor?
2.plot: As Gabe's friends nudge him back into the dating pool, he pushes Paula to hire a new guidance counselor. Mikey worries about kissing Marisol onstage.

3.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S03E01 - Technically Speaking
3.plot: To connect or disconnect? That's the question Gabe asks when his class receives new tablet devices. Mikey tries to overcome his shyness with Marisol.

3.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S03E02 - Good Things
3.plot: To counter his students' pessimism about the future, Gabe makes them create vision boards of what they want in life, an assignment he takes to heart.

3.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S03E03 - Playing Favorites
3.plot: Gabe overcompensates after a parent calls him out for having a favorite student. Tony wheels and deals to inflate his scores on faculty peer reviews.

3.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S03E04 - You're Dad to Me
3.plot: Gabe meddles in Marisol's relationship with her estranged father, and a yoga class unleashes Paula's pent-up feelings over her upcoming college reunion.

3.title: FR - Mr. Iglesias - S03E05 - The Big Dance
3.plot: When his students seem reluctant to attend the holiday dance, Gabe looks for ways to boost their confidence — until he learns what the real issue is.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E01 - Osorio
1.plot: A van of six riot police is sent to carry out an eviction in the center of Madrid. Normally two or three teams attend, but it is August, there are few troops and they must go alone. The eviction is difficult and hard, but just when they believe that everything is under control, the most violent and youngest of the six makes a bad decision that makes everything explode and a Senegalese immigrant falls from a height of two stories, dying within hours . The six policemen believe that they are innocent and that their bosses will support them, but on the other side of the city, an Internal Affairs team begins an investigation. Agent Laia Urquijo, the only woman on the team, senses that she is facing an important case and is going to leave her skin on it.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E02 - López
1.plot: The six riot police continue with their lives unrelated to being investigated. But the Internal Affairs team advances without discovering anything special. Only Laia believes that there is more than bad luck after the death of the immigrant. When the team leader asks that the investigation be closed and everything is about to end, Laia discovers the loose end that leads her to discover that the riot police deleted a video that included the entire incident. Although they deleted it to avoid being lynched on the networks, now that makes them look guilty. Just after helping to break up a violent disturbance in the dead immigrant's neighborhood, the six policemen are called to their superior's office. Everyone will pay the consequences for their actions. All except Alex, the nephew of a big boss in the body.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E03 - Revilla
1.plot: As they face the reality of potential jail time, the riot police decide to take drastic action by turning the story around on the victim.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E04 - Úbeda
1.plot: Revilla's maneuvers bear fruit and the riot police are no longer in the spotlight. Diego and Laia find a pattern of urban corruption and Laia pulls the thread until she finds the businessman at the forefront of the plot. When he learns that the immigrant's criminal report is false, he realizes that he has made a mistake in wanting to save the riot police. Laia faces new interrogations ready to destroy them, but Álex's uncle alerts the riot police and they agree on a coherent response. When the Internal Affairs team has already given up the interrogations, Laia detects the weakest and gets him to confess. That same night her direct boss takes her out of the house at dawn to teach her something. A safe house where a secret police commission investigates the urban plot that affects high-ranking police officers. A case that she has nearly ruined by disobeying his orders and making inquiries on her own.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E05 - Parra
1.plot: While the Riot Police pay the consequences of their deal with Revilla, Laia begins to collaborate with the special commission that investigates the plot. They soon discover that there was a riot police chief involved and that this is none other than Rosales, Álex's uncle. To prove their theory, they need the testimony of the riot gear in the van. Diego collaborates, but Álex closes in band. He does not intend to betray his uncle, he refuses to believe that he is corrupt. And without your statement, Laia has nothing. On the day of the great Champions League game, after a pitched battle against the ultras, Álex looks at his uncle and suddenly the whole truth comes to him. That same night he decides to expose him.

1.title: FR - Antidisturbios - S01E06 - Urquijo
1.plot: Laia manages to get Álex to turn her over to her uncle, who collaborates with them by wiretapping a meal with all the senior officials investigated. The operation could not go better and Laia begins the procedures to deliver their heads. Two hooded men steal all the information on the case and beat him up. The six riot police meet for a dinner that ends in a drunken drunkenness that lets out everything that has been kept quiet in these tense months. Diego leaves the restaurant forever: his companions are no longer his family. Laia knows that Revilla was responsible for the robbery. They make a deal: he returns the case to her in exchange for her giving him some information from Internal Affairs. The riot police are free, although they will never know that it was thanks to Laia having sold her soul to the devil, and they go on with their lives: Diego has left the police and is now a security guard, his former colleagues are heading towards a new mission.

meta.plot: Ce thriller coup de poing relate l'histoire d’une bavure qui plonge des policiers au cœur d’une affaire qui les dépasse.

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: John Beecham, a handsome ex-soldier of the East India Company, arrives in Delhi in 1800 determined to make a new life for himself, but will the secret he is carrying be revealed?

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With the arrival of his mother Henrietta from London and the discovery of his younger brother Daniel in a military camp close by, John has finally fulfilled his dream of having his family reunited. But, the arrival of the mysterious Chandrika throws the household into chaos and threatens to break the family apart.

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: A murder throws John's plans of staying in Delhi into jeopardy, while a member of the household reveals a treacherous side to their nature that proves dangerous. However, John soon finds that he has people around him he can trust when Margaret places herself at great personal risk to help him.

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Margaret is devastated when she finds out a secret and resolves to leave Delhi. John realises his only hope of persuading her to stay is to reveal the truth about his past and the baby's identity - even if it puts the child's safety in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: John is shocked to discover that Margaret has left Delhi, but before he can react there is worse news at home.

1.title: FR - Beecham House - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: John has spent several days and nights in his cell and has finally worked out who betrayed him. Daniel, Margaret and Chandrika desperately try to help release him, but only the Emperor can let him go free - and this will only happen when he is told a hard truth. Back home, the house is attacked.

meta.plot: La vie de la famille du commerçant britannique John Beecham dans une impressionnante demeure en Inde, durant la seconde moitié du XIXe siècle.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E01 - Sterile
1.plot: They have money, career and family. They have everything. But they are bored. Hermione wants children with Adam. It's just that Adam is sterile, but Hermione doesn't know that.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E02 - Whores and Lobster at Hankø Island
1.plot: Two prostitutes run off with Williams' wallet just before the big party he and Celine are holding at their country house. William approaches the breaking point when a guest annoys him.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E03 - You or Me
1.plot: The boys go on sick visits to William, who has a big bandage on his head and is really out to drive. Adam thinks Hermione is too upset about her missing pregnancy and asks Henrik for an unusual friend service.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E04 - Face Off
1.plot: Jeppe invites Henrik and William to a boy's evening with little food and lots of drinks and baptisms. Henrik tells Hermione about the deal with Adam, and Hermione immediately takes the opportunity to take revenge.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E05 - She's a Whore
1.plot: Adam must shut up until he finds out how to get Hermione to lose face. William is discharged from the hospital, but Celine has plans other than taking care of someone who has tried to kill her.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E06 - Cute and Sweet Boys
1.plot: The guys are gathered for a wedding. William opens up to them and for a moment the mood is top, but Hermione's talk with the guests causes Adam to fire up.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E07 - The Day After
1.plot: Jeppe and Adam head to Saint-Tropez to clean up William's financial mess, only to find that everything is even messier than they thought. Henrik and William fool a journalist who wants to write about them.

1.title: FR - Exit - S01E08 - It Was Me
1.plot: William is left to himself by Celine, and badly needs someone to take care of him and get his company back on their feet. Hermione plays a high game to ensure an independent and financially good life.

meta.plot: Inspirée de la vie réelle d'hommes d'affaires fortunés et de leurs épouses glamour, Exit explore la vie de quatre amis qui cherchent à combler le vide de leur vie bourgeoise par une débauche hédoniste et des soirées inconsidérées. Tentant d'échapper à leurs obligations et à leur famille, ils abusent des drogues, des prostituées et de leur propre sens de la morale.
A saga in four episodes that plunges us into the Dakar of the end of the 1930s and up to 1960. A story of passion at a time when life was lived to the rhythm of love, hate and war.

1.title: FR - Black and White - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Black and White - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Black and White - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Black and White - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Le corps de Mali Pryce est repêché dans une rivière au nord du pays de Galles. La capitaine Cadi John et son équipier Owen Vaughan, chargés de l’enquête, découvrent que la jeune victime, disparue depuis plusieurs années, a été séquestrée. Les enquêteurs se penchent sur d’autres cas de disparitions non résolus…

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The body of a young woman is found in a stream. DI Cadi John a DS Owen Vaughan investigate her identity.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Cadi and Owen investigate a possible link to another girl who disappeared. Megan hides her difficulties from friends and family. Dylan takes an interest in Lowri.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Cadi and her sister Elin have an opportunity to discuss their father's future, and Dylan and Megan's lives collide when they are in the same place at the same time.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Iona's temper worsens as she punishes Nia and the police visit Dylan to question him.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Alun Pryce's anger boils over and he lashes out at a drug dealer, while Cadi and Vaughan take a step forward in their investigation as they visit a local reclamation yard.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Cadi goes to visit Endaf Elwy in prison, and Megan is reported missing, leaving the police convinced she is the latest victim.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The police finally succeed in getting the required information and this leads to some explosive events.

1.title: FR - Hidden - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Will Cadi and Vaughan catch their man in the last in the series?

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: When the body of an old man is discovered in a house on the outskirts of Blaenau Ffestiniog, D.C.I. Cadi John and D.S. Owen Vaughan are called upon to lead the investigation.

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: D.C.I. Cadi John and D.S. Owen Vaughan pay Karl Lewis a visit. Mia tries to draw Connor closer to her.

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: The community comes together to pay its respects to Geraint Ellis. Mia succeeds in drawing Connor closer to her.

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: DCI Cadi John has to release Karl Lewis because of a lack of evidence. Mia, Connor and Lee cause trouble for Hefin, Beca and Sion at the petrol station.

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Hefin discover Sion Wells' body at the petrol station and now D.C.I. Cadi John and D.S.Owen Vaughan have to deal with two separate murders.

2.title: FR - Hidden - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: DCI Cadi John and DS Owen Vaughan succeed in apprehending Mia, Lee and Connor, but there is only a hollow sense of victory.

1.title: FR - Le Noël de trop - S01E01 - Home Is Where the Tree Is
1.plot: After a disappointing audition, Bastian heads home for the holidays to small-town Eifel. There, a shocking reveal leads to a rumble with his brother.

1.title: FR - Le Noël de trop - S01E02 - Sausages and Potato Salad
1.plot: A new day dawns and Basti fires back with his own personal update. Meanwhile, a mysterious tension brews between his mother and father.

1.title: FR - Le Noël de trop - S01E03 - The Most Wonderful Christmas of the Year
1.plot: On Christmas, Basti grapples with the fate of his family and explores his lyrical feelings for Karina. Will he make music... or a new set of mistakes?

meta.plot: Au bout du rouleau, le musicien Bastian se bat contre son cafard alors qu'il se rend chez ses parents pour Noël, où une série de surprises peu réjouissantes l'attendent.

Ancienne flic haut gradé de la police de New York, Abigail Thomas, surnommée Tommy, devient la première femme à se retrouver à la tête de la police de Los Angeles. Pour faire appliquer la loi et régler les problèmes politiques, sociaux ou d'ordre national qui éclatent chaque jour, elle va devoir user de son honnêteté légendaire et ne pas hésiter à employer les grands moyens lorsque c'est nécessaire.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E01 - In Dreams Begin Responsibilities
FR - Tommy - S01E02 - There Are No Strangers Here
1.plot: Tommy works to keep her officers in line when one of their own turns up dead, and some want to take extreme measures to find the perpetrator. Also, Mayor Buddy Gray and Deputy Mayor Doug Dudik are concerned about what damaging information Arturo Lopez (Arturo Del Puerto), a recently arrested acquaintance of Buddy's, may have on him.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E03 - Lifetime Achievement
1.plot: Mayor Buddy Gray asks Tommy to personally oversee the investigation when a Hollywood producer is attacked during a party at his home by a woman who claims he tried to sexually assault her first. Also, Tommy prepares for the LAPD recertification process to demonstrate her fitness for her position.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E04 - 19 Hour Day
1.plot: Tommy must decide how to deploy the LAPD’s resources when a climate change protest brings riots and a bomb threat at the same time as a mudslide shuts down a major freeway.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E05 - To Take a Hostage
1.plot: When a concert promoter who is accused of defrauding his customers and vendors takes hostages in a restaurant, Tommy sends Cooper and Diaz to manage the situation until she can arrive. Also, Tommy must navigate the politics of the L.A. City Council when two members refuse to sign on to her new budget proposal.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E06 - The Ninth Girl
1.plot: Mayor Buddy Gray puts added pressure on Tommy to quickly solve a high-profile kidnapping when a baby is taken from a prominent local businessman, capturing the attention of the citizens of L.A.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E07 - Vic
1.plot: Tommy faces a political powder keg when racial tension arises between the LAPD and the African American community, following the murder of a notable community activist. While the victim's death initially looks to be a gang-related hit connected to his past, his death soon seems linked to a local dispute over highly coveted real estate.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E08 - The Swatting Game
1.plot: Tommy and the LAPD race to find an online "swatter," a digital criminal targeting the LAPD and a rising online gamer by making dangerous fake 911 calls. As Tommy deploys the department's full resources to the search, the perpetrator threatens to reveal private information about members of the police force.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E09 - Free to Go
1.plot: Tommy tries to help Norah Fayed, a young woman who intentionally gets arrested to buy time for her political asylum request to be approved, and prevent her parents from forcing her to return home abroad. Also, a reporter friend of Blake's asks her for internal information potentially connected to the prison murder of Mayor Gray's former campaign donor, Arturo Lopez.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E11 - This is Not a Drill
1.plot: Tommy launches an informal investigation into a possible LAPD and city government-related conspiracy just as she prepares to fight for her job in front of an ethics committee.

1.title: FR - Tommy - S01E12 - Cause of Death
1.plot: Tommy and her inner circle fight back against an LAPD and city government conspiracy to have her removed as police chief.

meta.plot: Second spin-off de l'univers The Walking Dead consacré cette fois à la première génération de survivants ayant vu le jour et grandi après le déclenchement de l'apocalypse. Si certains trouveront en eux la force de se comporter en héros, d’autres basculeront dans le camp du mal. Au final, tous en sortiront changés à jamais, plus mûrs et ancrés dans leurs bons et mauvais côtés.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E01 - Brave
1.plot: Iris welcomes an enigmatic ally to their community while Hope questions the visitor's motives. A message upends the sisters' worldview, forcing them to decide between the safety of their home and the uncertainty of the world beyond.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E02 - The Blaze of Gory
1.plot: The group adjusts to the reality of life beyond the walls of their community. Iris tries to take over, despite Hope's reservations. Felix and Huck follow the teenagers, while Felix is ​​forced to face unwanted memories.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E03 - The Tyger and the Lamb
1.plot: Overwhelmed by the past, group members adopt opposite strategies to deal with a huge obstacle. Pressure on the group to return home.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E04 - The Wrong End of a Telescope
1.plot: The group seeks shelter from a storm inside an abandoned school. While supplying, they imagine what life was like in high school and encounter new threats, both alive and dead.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E05 - Madman Across the Water
1.plot: While the group works together to cross the Mississippi River, a plot to take the teenagers home hits an obstacle. A group member must overcome past traumas to save others from an oncoming threat.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E06 - Shadow Puppets
1.plot: When an unexpected newcomer reveals information that can help them reach their destination, the group makes a deal. While some are intrigued by the new arrival, others are suspicious.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E07 - Truth or Dare
1.plot: While the group is looking for something to advance their search, one of them remembers their struggles in the early days of the apocalypse. A game of truth or challenge brings emotions to the surface.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E08 - The Sky Is a Graveyard
1.plot: A horrible discovery finds the group at a crossroads and leads one of them to revisit past traumas.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E09 - The Deepest Cut
1.plot: A series of setbacks causes a member of the group to reevaluate their role in the mission. Someone makes an amazing discovery. A surprising revelation casts everything in a new light.

1.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S01E10 - In This Life
1.plot: A divided group struggles to get together. Others turn to the greater good.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E01 - Konsekans
2.plot: Hope's commitment to the future is put to the test, jeopardizing a potential reunion. Iris and Felix meet a new group. Startling revelations are made.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E02 - Foothold
2.plot: While some members of the group enact a plan to cover their tracks, others attempt to acclimate to their new surroundings.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E03 - Exit Wounds
2.plot: An attempted grift leads to a precarious situation. Huck is given an ultimatum as she readjusts to her old life.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E04 - Family Is a Four Letter Word
2.plot: Tensions rise as the group questions past events and plans for the future. Things get explosive as someone's abilities and loyalties are put to the test. A surprising discovery is made.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E05 - Quatervois
2.plot: Members of the group put a dangerous plan into motion, while others have serious reservations as more startling revelations come to light.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E06 - Who Are You?
2.plot: A member of the group becomes the target of an investigation. While some grow further apart, others begin to grow closer.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E07 - Blood and Lies
2.plot: As the group searches for answers, some struggle to find common ground while others question who can be trusted. A shocking message sets a new mission into motion.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E08 - Returning Point
2.plot: The group sets a new plan into motion as a relationship is leveraged and a betrayal forces others to take action.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E09 - Death and the Dead
2.plot: As the plan continues to unfold, tensions between the group and the CRM come to a dramatic head. While some rush to save an ally, difficult truths are brought to light.

2.title: FR - The Walking Dead : World Beyond - S02E10 - The Last Light
2.plot: The remaining members of the group fight back enemies, both living and dead, on their quest to save the future.

meta.plot: Alors qu'un vaisseau spatial a été retrouvé au beau milieu du désert du Sahara, à des milliers de kilomètres de là, dans les environs de Washington D.C., plusieurs enfants semblent comme possédés par une force invisible qui les pousse à commettre des actes meurtriers sur leur entourage. Deux agents du FBI sont alors chargés de mener l'enquête, ignorant que la course contre une invasion extra-terrestre vient de commencer...

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E01 - X Marks the Spot
1.plot: FBI child specialist Claire Bennigan investigates when kids are persuaded to play dangerous games.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E02 - Hide & Seek
1.plot: As John pursues his mission, Claire looks into his identity. Drill keeps playing a dangerous game.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E03 - Collision
1.plot: John Doe holds Dr. Maria Benavidez hostage as an unknown entity continues to blindly lead him to an undisclosed location. Claire and Wes further their investigation into John Doe’s past whereabouts and begin to uncover his next target.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E04 - Meltdown
1.plot: While Minx tries to persuade a disillusioned Henry to play one more game for Drill, the race is on for Claire and Wes to thwart John Doe from causing a major incident that could potentially kill millions of people.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E05 - What Lies Beneath
1.plot: Claire speaks with Sean, who has no memories of her or their life together, and tries to get him to remember something…anything about his past; Wes has an epiphany and heads back to Mali to take another look at the fulgurite, and Lena keeps a watchful eye on Minx to make sure that her conversations with Drill have ceased.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E06 - The Archer
1.plot: An astonishing breakthrough is made about Drill while Claire gathers together and talks to a group of children who have been contacted by it — and while studying the mysterious rock Wes found in Mali, a chilling discovery is made about Drill’s possible mission.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E07 - Whatever It Takes
1.plot: Wes meets with the President of the United States to discuss what his team has discovered about a mysterious object that may pertain to Drill. Meanwhile, Sean faces a possible prison sentence for his collaboration with Drill, and Lena attempts to communicate with Drill, with the help of daughter, Minx.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E08 - A Hollow Man
1.plot: Claire and Sean track down a man who had his own deadly encounter with Drill — over 30 years ago.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E09 - Broken Child
1.plot: Claire, Sean, Wes and Lena attempt to unravel the past of a man who first encountered Drill over 30 years ago, which could lead to a way to kill it — before Drill finds a way to murder the man first.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E10 - Darkest Fears
1.plot: A plan is put into place to trap Drill and attempt to drain away its energy, thus killing it in the process. But if unsuccessful, Drill could seek retribution in a most deadly way.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E11 - Homesick
1.plot: While Drill loses strength, all of the children he has contacted are becoming ill.  Thinking they might actually be able to defeat this unseen foe, Wes convinces the President to let him round up all of the children in a protected zone in the hopes that Drill will wither and fade away.  Meanwhile, one of the team mourns the loss of a love one.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E12 - Traveller in the Dark
