1.plot: One of the children is taken over by Drill, but not everyone is sure which one it is, leading to confusion and fear.

1.title: FR - Whispers - S01E13 - Game Over
1.plot: Drill’s mysterious end game is put into motion and the team must do their utmost to stop it before it reaches its final – and possibly deadly – conclusion.

meta.plot: Barkskins est situé à Wobik, une petite colonie dans ce qui est maintenant la province canadienne de Québec. Alors que l'Église catholique envoie des prêtres jésuites pour convertir les peuples autochtones, la France envoie des serviteurs sous contrat pour peupler son territoire, ainsi que des «Filles du Roi», des jeunes femmes pour être jumelées à des maris, fonder des familles et Aidez les colonies à prospérer. Ce groupe disparate de parias, de voleurs et d'innocents doit traverser des épreuves brutales, des intérêts concurrents et des loyautés enchevêtrées au carrefour de la civilisation: Nouvelle-France des années 1690.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E01 - New France
1.plot: A group of outcasts battle to escape their pasts while navigating the brutal frontier and tangled loyalties of the New World.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E02 - The Turtle King
1.plot: Duquet escapes indentured servitude and finds himself at the mercy of the vast forest. Elsewhere, Goames and Yvon make a chilling discovery.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E03 - The Sugared Plum
1.plot: Mathilde gets back to business after her attack, while Goames hunts for answers. Trepagny joins the eligible men of Wobik for a night of matchmaking.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E04 - The Law of Two
1.plot: The Iroquois come to Wobik to collect their dead. Trepagny leads Melissande back to the Doma. Delphine embarks on a new life with Pierre Gasquet.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E05 - Buttermilk
1.plot: Mathilde encourages Bouchard to reestablish his authority in Wobik before the arrival of the intendant. Melissande and Mari quarrel over Trepagny.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E06 - The Wobble
1.plot: Trepagny and Bouchard attempt a daring rescue mission and incite war with the Iroquois. Cross tells Goames and Yvon a secret and plots his leave.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E07 - Bees in a Bottle
1.plot: Cooke and Mother Sabrine embark on a dangerous quest as Trepagny and Melissande are reunited. Cross leads Goames and Yvon deeper into the woods.

1.title: FR - Barkskins : Le sang de la terre - S01E08 - The Black Sun
1.plot: Preparations begin for Trepagny and Melissande's wedding as Delphine and Cooke explore a future together. Goames' loyalty to the company is tested.

meta.plot: Trois pays européens, Trois villes post-communistes, Odessa, Varsovie et Prague, Trois jeunes femmes assassinées. En quelques jours, leurs corps - ou des parties d’eux - sont retrouvés. Leurs corps sont mutilés et il manque toujours un bras, coupé au-dessus du coude. Une chose est claire : ces meurtres brutaux sont évidemment liés...

1.title: FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E08 - Episode 8
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Géométrie de la mort - S01E10 - Episode 10
FR - Beforeigners - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A dead woman floats ashore at Tjuvholmen and Lars Haaland need to investigate the matter with his new partner, Alfhildr Enginnsdottir from the Viking Age.

1.title: FR - Beforeigners - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The investigation leads Lars and Alfhildr into Oslo's new and multi-temporal underground world.

1.title: FR - Beforeigners - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lars and Alfhildr have a new main suspect in the Tjuvholmen murder: a rich entrepreneur from the Stone Age.

1.title: FR - Beforeigners - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Lars's daughter is involved in a mysterious accident at sea, Alfhildr has to seek Norse help to continue the investigation.

1.title: FR - Beforeigners - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: In the hunt for answers in the Tjuvholmen case, Lars becomes his own worst enemy.

1.title: FR - Beforeigners - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The hunt for the Tjuvholmen killer is coming to an end, and Alfhildr must face a hard truth.

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Alfhildr and Lars reunite for a murder case that raises the question: could Jack the Ripper have timeigrated to the present?

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: A gruesome letter sends Lars and Alfhildr’s investigation in a new direction.

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: The hunt for the fake policemen, Ben Joseph, takes Alfhildr and Lars to London, where they gain important information about the New-Luddites' methods. Ingrid decides to tell the Norse weatherman Sturla about her pregnancy.

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: The disappearance of a fortune teller puts Alfhildr and Lars on the killer’s trail.

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: With a timeigrant’s life on the line, Alfhildr and Lars resort to unorthodox methods to get closer to the truth.

2.title: FR - Beforeigners - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Alfhildr wakes up in a highly unexpected situation. Is she ever going to make her way home? Pushed to the limit, she makes a profound discovery about herself.

meta.plot: A cause d'une faille spatio-temporelle, des " visiteurs du passé " surgissent aujourd'hui dans les rues d'Oslo. Parmi eux, des vikings combattifs. Le détective, Lars, est chargé de comprendre ce qui a pu permettre cet incident. Il s'associe alors à Alfhildr Enginnsdóttir, une guerrière viking...

Après la réussite de son stage à la CIA, la jeune et jolie Annie Walker obtient enfin la promotion tant attendue : devenir agent de terrain. Tout d'abord persuadée que son ascension précipitée dans le monde de l'espionnage est due à ses capacités et à son talent, la jeune femme polyglotte comprend vite que les hautes instances de l'agence n'ont rien fait au hasard. Effectivement, la cible de sa première mission n'est autre que Ben Mercer, l'homme qui lui a brisé le cœur par le passé.  

Bien décidée à faire ses preuves, Annie Walker continue son enquête sans se laisser submerger par ses sentiments. Mais au fil de ses découvertes, elle va s'apercevoir que Ben n'était en rien l'homme qu'il prétendait être. Pour l'épauler dans ses recherches, elle peut compter sur la complicité d'August "Auggie" Anderson, un officier de la CIA devenu aveugle en Irak et qui assure désormais son travail depuis un bureau. Elle est également assistée par Jai Wilcox, le fils d'une ancienne huile de l'agence. Annie Walker va devoir redoubler d'audace, mais aussi cacher sa vie d'agent secret à ses proches.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Annie Walker is removed from CIA training and thrust into the inner sanctum of the Agency for what appears to be their need of her exceptional linguistic skills, but there may be something or someone from her past that her CIA bosses are really after.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E02 - Walter's Walk
1.plot: New CIA agent Annie Walker is still forced to work on low-key cases until she is tipped off that a IRA cell operates in America.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E03 - South Bound Suarez
1.plot: Annie is tasked with getting close to Diego, a college student, in the hopes that his sister, Julia, will provide the CIA with intel on Victor Ponces, a corrupt Venezuelan government official. But when the CIA station agent looking into Ponces goes missing, Diego's trust in Annie means that she's going to have to finish the job.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E04 - No Quarter
1.plot: After a "simple brush pass" goes sour, Annie is stranded and on the run in Zurich with Eyal, a Mossad agent who can't be trusted. Meanwhile, as Auggie works to bring Annie home safely, Arthur and Joan are busy trying to track a leak coming from within the CIA ... and Auggie is near the top of the list

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E05 - In the Light
1.plot: In order to stop a weapons shipment, Annie asks a former operative for help and attracts Henry Wilcox's and her former lover Ben Mercer's attention.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E06 - Houses of the Holy
1.plot: Annie is tasked with investigating a potential national security leak originating from the Senate Intelligence Committee. Elsewhere, Auggie is assigned as a stateside handler for his old special ops unit, and Annie is worried that her brother-in-law, Michael, is cheating on Danielle.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E07 - Communication Breakdown
1.plot: When communication systems throughout D.C. are shut down by a hacker, Auggie is put in the field to obtain the code for the CIA. But his excitement to be doing field work is tempered when he learns that the hacker responsible is Natasha Petrova ... who happens to be his ex-girlfriend.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E08 - What Is and What Should Never Be
1.plot: After Annie witnesses a suspicious purchase at an art auction, her follow-up brings a surprise visitor  -- Ben Mercer -- back into her life.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E09 - Fool in the Rain
1.plot: An Iranian trade delegation member attending the WTO conference in Toronto escapes his handlers and contacts the CIA, hoping to parlay stolen intelligence into safe passage to the United States.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E10 - I Can't Quit You Baby
1.plot: Annie needs to be recruited by smugglers; Arthur and Joan must bring Henry Wilcox back into the fold.

1.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S01E11 - When the Levee Breaks
1.plot: Annie is forced to confront her past when Ben Mercer walks into CIA Headquarters.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E01 - Begin the Begin
2.plot: When Annie and Ben go back to Washington DC, Ben goes missing. Annie is assigned to keep a professional tennis player from Estonia safe.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E02 - Good Advices
2.plot: Annie meets Mossad agent Eyal Lavin again when they both try to turn a secretary working at the Syrian embassy in Paris into an asset.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E03 - Bang and Blame
2.plot: The leak of a CIA Trainee's name brings Annie back to The Farm with the sensitive task to find the culprit without being exposed herself which would end her own CIA career.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E04 - All the Right Friends
2.plot: Annie runs into a set up when she tries to exchange a spy named Carlo Reni in Argentina. They escape the assassin and go on the run, trying to find the one responsible before the assassin can finish the job.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E05 - Around the Sun
2.plot: Annie looks into a potential leak at NASA, which could threaten the U.S.'s spy satellites. During the mission, she must also adjust to working with a new tech operative after Auggie moves to a new position.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E06 - The Outsiders
2.plot: Annie and Reva are captured near the Polish-Belarusian border by a man (Peter Stormare) working for the secret Soviet police when they try to deploy surveillence cameras in the Bialowieza Forest. Meanwhile Jai assembles an extraction team to rescue them in Belarus.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E07 - Half a World Away
2.plot: Auggie is aided by a flight attendant (Rebecca Mader) while on his vacation to the international jazz festival in Istanbul. His trip turns into a mission when he inadvertently records the voice of the man who injured him during the war in Afghanistan.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E08 - Welcome to the Occupation
2.plot: When a covert CIA operative and friend of Joan's gets caught up in a hostage crisis in Mexico, Annie and Joan are sent to assess the situation under the cover of being a news team. But when Arthur decides that they need additional backup, he sends Ben Mercer to assist them.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E09 - Sad Professor
2.plot: Annie learns that her college professor Mark Ramsay was secretly working for the CIA when he was killed tracking a Pakistani spy ring. The CIA asks Annie to find the missing intel using her connection to Ramsay's widow Safia.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E10 - World Leader Pretend
2.plot: While Annie runs the extraction of a Chinese scientist named Shen Yue who is willing to defect, she runs into complications and is forced to make a difficult choice.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E11 - The Wake-Up Bomb
2.plot: Annie feels lonely during some downtime following a failed mission in Venice. Another assignment soon comes up, however, involving a chef tied to a Basque separatist movement.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E12 - Uberlin
2.plot: While on the trail of Isaak Von Hagen, a known money launderer, Annie prepares to turn his wife, Elsa, into a CIA asset.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E13 - A Girl Like You
2.plot: Annie is sent to find Mossad agent Eyal Lavin after it's discovered he's in Washington D.C. posing as a CIA operative.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E14 - Horse to Water
2.plot: Annie keeps tabs on the daughter of a CIA analyst imprisoned for selling intelligence. After an asset is killed in Russia, the CIA suspects the woman could be helping her father.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E15 - What's the Frequency, Kenneth?
2.plot: A MI6 operative asks Annie for access to the Smithsonian. Since he doesn't know that Annie's a CIA agent, she decides to cooperate in order to find out what he's after.

2.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S02E16 - Letter Never Sent
2.plot: Annie and Danielle's vacation in Stockholm turns dangerous when Danielle is mistaken for a spy, putting her life in danger.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E01 - Hang on to Yourself
3.plot: After tragedy shakes up the CIA, Annie and the rest of the DPD find themselves in an unfamiliar situation.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E02 - Sound and Vision
3.plot: Annie and Auggie are brought together for a DPD assignment, sending them to Spain to acquire a computer virus that China also wants to obtain.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E03 - The Last Thing You Should Do
3.plot: When a situation develops while Auggie is visiting Parker in Africa, Annie, Joan and Lena have to find a way to work together to bring him back safely.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E04 - Speed of Life
3.plot: Annie investigates a break-in at a high-tech company and reaches out to the FBI for help. But her plan is complicated by Simon's unexpected arrival in town.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E05 - This is Not America
3.plot: When proprietary American technology is found in an Iranian missile, Annie is sent to Israel where, along with Eyal Lavin, she attempts to discover who leaked the technology.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E06 - Hello Stranger
3.plot: When the Prime Minister of Yemen arrives in the US for emergency heart surgery, Annie takes on a near-impossible assignment: with a three-hour window, no back-up, and the State Department warning the CIA not to interfere, Annie attempts to turn the Prime Minister's Chief of Staff into a CIA asset.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E07 - Loving the Alien
3.plot: When Simon invites Annie on a trip to Cuba, she accepts, knowing this is her best opportunity to learn what Simon has been planning. But going to Cuba means Annie won't have any backup if she gets caught.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E08 - Glass Spider
3.plot: After it's discovered that Jai was investigating Simon Fischer when he was killed, bringing Simon in becomes Arthur's top priority. In the hopes of protecting Simon, Annie requests that she be allowed to bring him in herself.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E09 - Suffragette City
3.plot: As the life of one the Agency’s best hangs in the balance, the team works to discover the truth after it’s revealed that one of their own might not be who they thought.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E10 - Let's Dance
3.plot: The CIA attempts to obtain proof that an enemy is hiding in Russia, in the hopes of bringing them to justice.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E11 - Rock 'n' Roll Suicide
3.plot: When Annie's mission in Russia goes awry, landing her in prison, Auggie, Joan, and Arthur work with an old friend to bring her home safely.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E12 - Wishful Beginnings
3.plot: Things become complicated for Annie when Eyal Lavin and his boss, Rivka Singer, request the CIA's assistance tracking down a Mossad asset.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E13 - Man in the Middle
3.plot: After receiving intel from Mossad warning that two suspected terrorists are planning to meet, Annie finds herself in a race against the clock to track down the meeting location before the targets get away.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E14 - Scary Monsters (and Super Creeps)
3.plot: When a crucial CIA asset disappears from protective custody, Annie and Eyal work to find her before they lose her forever.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E15 - Quicksand
3.plot: With Auggie in Iraq and Joan out of the office, Annie turns to Eyal to help her track down Khalid Ansari.

3.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S03E16 - Lady Stardust
3.plot: When a fellow spy is taken hostage, Annie travels to Amsterdam to eliminate Khalid once and for all.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E01 - Vamos
4.plot: Annie forges a professional relationship with Henry Wilcox while also adjusting to her new romance with Auggie. But when Annie and Auggie head to Columbia searching for a new person of interest: the Puma, the spy game gets serious.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E02 - Dig for Fire
4.plot: After a bombshell revelation rocks the CIA, Annie and Auggie combine forces with Arthur in an attempt to bring Henry’s hidden agenda to light. Joan finds a personal moment to confide in Annie.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E03 - Into the White
4.plot: Annie returns to Colombia and must determine Teo Braga’s true allegiances in order to thwart a potential act of terrorism. Joan begins a round of interviews that could significantly alter her career trajectory within the CIA.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E04 - Rock a My Soul
4.plot: As Annie and Auggie’s romance heats up, both begin to notice how it strains their working relationship within the CIA. Arthur and Henry almost come to blows.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E05 - Here Comes Your Man
4.plot: Annie is sent to Vienna, and must cut all communication with Auggie. Meanwhile, Joan and Arthur decide to bring in reinforcements.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E06 - Space (I Believe In)
4.plot: Annie gets involved in an FBI investigation in order to cover her tracks. Elsewhere, Henry presents Annie with a major opportunity.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E07 - Crackity Jones
4.plot: Annie finds she has met her match when she has to work to halt the illegal sale of deadly weapons and is teamed up with a seasoned operative. Meanwhile, circumstances force Auggie to deal with past demons' and Calder's suspicions of Annie Walker grow.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E08 - I've Been Waiting for You
4.plot: Annie convinces Teo to turn on one of his men, while Joan makes a decision. Elsewhere, Calder shows his true colors and Auggie faces trouble.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E09 - Hang Wire
4.plot: Annie must stop Teo from committing a terrible act. Elsewhere, Auggie discovers Calder's allegiances and Arthur seeks help in defending the Campbell name.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E10 - Levitate Me
4.plot: Annie makes a desperate attempt to take down Henry. Elsewhere, Calder and Annie finally face off.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E11 - Dead
4.plot: Annie begins her first deep cover operation completely on her own. Meanwhile, Auggie, Joan, Arthur and the rest of the CIA manage the fallout from Annie’s "death" at Calder’s hands.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E12 - Something Against You
4.plot: Despite his misgivings, Auggie decides to work with Calder on an alternate method to destroy Henry. Joan confronts Auggie about this alliance.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E13 - No. 13 Baby
4.plot: Henry reaches out to his only ally within Langley, Calder. Joan reveals something during her deposition that puts a wedge between herself and Arthur. An old flame reveals she still holds a torch for Auggie.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E14 - River Euphrates
4.plot: Annie travels to New York after receiving new intelligence. Elsewhere, Arthur's court date looms nearer, and Joan finds a solid lead.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E15 - There Goes My Gun
4.plot: Annie, Auggie and Calder go on an unauthorized mission to Hong Kong in the hope of apprehending Henry's courier. Meanwhile, Joan and Arthur reveal a traitor who's been hiding in plain sight.

4.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S04E16 - Trompe le Monde
4.plot: Calder wonders if Joan is the only person he can trust when he returns to the United States with good news. Elsewhere, Annie and Auggie continue their work to bring Henry to justice.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E01 - Shady Lane
5.plot: Annie and Auggie consider their future just as a connection from the past resurfaces and leads Annie on a race against time to prevent a terrorist attack on U.S. soil. Elsewhere, tension mounts between Calder and Joan as they wait to see who will become the new DCS and Arthur considers about a career in the private sector.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E02 - False Skorpion
5.plot: Annie thinks about working with Ryan McQuaid in an effort to catch a terrorist in Venezuela. Auggie is questioned by the NCTC.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E03 - Unseen Power of the Picket Fence
5.plot: After a botched escape attempt, Annie and McQuaid combine forces to get out of Venezuela. Joan works with Arthur and his new co-worker, Caitlyn Cook, to extract their fellow operatives. Calder’s clandestine affair takes on a new dimension.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E04 - Silence Kit
5.plot: Annie begins a stake out which ends less than routinely after the CIA discovers that a member of the intelligence community may have leaked confidential intel. Joan and Arthur both vie for a piece of government funding, as Calder’s personal and professional lives collide.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E05 - Elevate Me Later
5.plot: Auggie's emotional history with a potential asset complicates a mission when he and Annie switch roles as operative and handler in Paris. Joan attempts to play matchmaker for Calder. Arthur heads on his first operation abroad for McQuaid Security.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E06 - Embassy Row
5.plot: While on an undercover mission, Annie must keep her guard up after she accepts an invitation to the Russian Embassy in Paris. Auggie attempts to juggle more than one relationship, while Joan unravels the details of Arthur’s most recent business trip.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E07 - Brink of the Clouds
5.plot: Annie and McQuaid search for an off-grid ex-CIA agent in Azerbaijan; Auggie learns upsetting information about an old friend; Calder has a confrontation with Joan.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E08 - Grounded
5.plot: Annie and Auggie dig into a conspiracy theory about the attack on the CIA; Joan and Calder must make a difficult decision.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E09 - Spit on a Stranger
5.plot: Annie begins an operation without support from the agency; Calder interrogates Auggie; McQuaid Security has a new recruit.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E10 - Sensitive Euro Man
5.plot: Annie helps McQuaid with a difficult mission, against Auggie's wishes; Hayley's hunt for the truth becomes more dogged.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E11 - Trigger Cut
5.plot: McQuaid's health hangs in the balance; Annie seeks information in Istanbul; Arthur takes control of McQuaid Security; Calder has a new recruit.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E12 - Starlings of the Slipstream
5.plot: Annie searches for a rogue chemist in Germany; questions about Joan's time in the Balkans.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E13 - She Believes
5.plot: After a startling revelation, Annie works with a new ally; McQuaid and Joan go into the field.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E14 - Transport Is Arranged
5.plot: Annie and McQuaid must sneak into Russian territory in pursuit of Belenko.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E15 - Frontwards
5.plot: Annie and McQuaid's relationship deepens while tracking down Belenko's next target.

5.title: FR - Covert Affairs - S05E16 - Gold Soundz
5.plot: With Russian Vega Force assassins on their trail, Annie and McQuaid work together to escape.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E01 - Pilot, Part 1
1.plot: A disabled former NYPD detective joins a team of specialists working for the International Criminal Court. While trying to juggle his own personal demons, he must to corner a psychotic killer.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E02 - Pilot, Part 2
1.plot: Tommy follows the trail of the serial killer’s earlier victims When Sebastian tracks down the killer the team must race to apprehend him but a sudden tragedy changes the teams’ lives forever.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E03 - The Terminator
1.plot: Detective Eva Vittoria discovers a pattern of murders when wealthy businessmen begin dying from a mysterious virus and the ICC team’s investigations lead them to a group of art thieves. Meanwhile, a confrontation with the killer puts the whole team’s lives in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E04 - Long-Haul Predators
1.plot: An abandoned car leads Sebastian and the ICC team to Poland where technology reveals a shocking secret. The investigation uncovers a bizarre scenario in which families are pitted against each other in a fight to the death. When Eva and Tommy go undercover, their lives are in peril, and it’s up to Hickman and Louis to reach them in time.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E05 - Special Ops, Part 1
1.plot: When a wealthy teenager is taken hostage, the ICC team has to move fast to track the kidnappers. Meanwhile, Anne-Marie finds a connection to a similar case in Florence as the team races to rescue the boy. Elsewhere, Dorn and Louis soon discover an unexpected link to their arch enemy Alexander Dimitrov, which puts their lives in danger.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E06 - Special Ops, Part 2
1.plot: While in Florence, Eva finds something amiss when she discovers another similar kidnapping. While confronting her former partner in the Italian Police, a secret is discovered that may put Sebastian's career at risk. Back in Cannes, a search of the financial records from the missing boy's father shows that not everything is as it seems.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E07 - The Animals
1.plot: Hickman's search for a criminal mastermind leads him to a bank where he is suddenly taken hostage and soon realizes that the thieves may not be after the money. Outside the bank, the ICC team must work against time to figure out the real motive behind the crime and when part of the truth is revealed, Tommy must confront a secret from his past that could jeopardize his career.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E08 - Desperation & Desperados
1.plot: When Anne-Marie is away working on an old case, the ICC team must figure out the reason behind a series of shootings in Italy and Slovenia. Meanwhile, two young men have stolen money and drugs from an Italian drug lord and unknowingly kidnap the drug lord's daughter. Eva's past family connections to the drug lord reveal hidden details from her past which may be able to help save the girl.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E09 - New Scars, Old Wounds - Part 1
1.plot: Louis and his wife, who have never recovered from the death of their son at the hands of arch enemy Alexander Dimitrov rely on Dorn, who discovers new information that may lead to the capture of the Russian. Meanwhile, a woman is found dead and another missing, and all the evidence points to Hickman prompting Tommy and a Dutch detective to track down who framed him. Elsewhere, Louis returns home to a shocking discovery.

1.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S01E10 - New Scars, Old Wounds - Part 2
1.plot: Hickman's life hangs in the balance and he is forced to find a way to survive. Elsewhere, Sebastian and Eva search for Anne-Marie, who has not returned from Italy. Meanwhile, Eva must reveal that she has broken her trust with Sebastian and that his personal secrets could be exposed. Dorn may have tracked Dimitrov, which in the process leads to many mysteries being solved.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E01 - The Rescue
2.plot: Louis' and Rebecca's lives hang in the balance. Meanwhile, Dorn tries to take down Dimitrov.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E02 - The Homecoming
2.plot: Genovese returns to New York and becomes involved with human trafficking.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E03 - The Kill Zone
2.plot: The team hunts a sniper who is randomly killing innocent people.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E04 - Everybody Will Know
2.plot: A string of teen suicides that may be linked to Internet bullying are investigated.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E05 - Home Is Where the Heart Is
2.plot: A German biker gang embarks on a home-invasion spree. Meanwhile, Sebastian goes undercover for the first time.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E06 - Freedom
2.plot: As Genovese awaits trial, he offers the ICC an attractive bargain.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E07 - The Velvet Glove
2.plot: The team goes after a gang of black widows who seduce wealthy men into marriage and then poison them.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E08 - Family Ties
2.plot: A string of deaths are traced to toxic cocaine in London.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E09 - Truth & Consequences
2.plot: The ICC tries to protect a movie star after a string of murders involving a film director, agent and journalist take place.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E10 - The Long Way Home
2.plot: The disappearances of several backpackers may be linked to a serial killer.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E11 - The Team, Part 1
2.plot: The gang escalates their deadly rampage. Meanwhile, the team deals with tragedy and deception.

2.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S02E12 - The Team, Part 2
2.plot: The gang escalates their deadly rampage. Meanwhile, the team deals with tragedy and deception.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E01 - Redux
3.plot: When one of Michel Dorn's prosecutors is kidnapped, he recruits new team members and reactivates the unit to tackle the case.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E02 - Whistleblower
3.plot: New leads suggest Wombosi is not behind the murder and kidnapping. Rather the person who gave Sophie the evidence is the real target of a much more complex plot.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E03 - Dragon
3.plot: The team takes on the case of a young girl believed to be a victim of human trafficking.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E04 - In Loco Parentis
3.plot: The cross borders unit investigate the death of a bus driver and student of a prestigious European school.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E05 - Recoil
3.plot: The Cross boarders unit travel to Italy to investigate the assumed assassination of a prestigious judge.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E06 - Executioner
3.plot: When a known murderer restarts his killing spree, a twist of events leads the team to investigate a group espousing social justice.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E07 - Lost and Found
3.plot: A known criminal is attacked but dies from a contagious disease rather than his wounds, leading the team to track down everyone in contact with him.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E08 - Heat
3.plot: During the search for a cargo of lethal polonium Carine faces a former researcher at the school, and make her question her ability to lead the ICC.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E09 - Expose
3.plot: The mysterious death of a journalist who is about to give an exclusive to Dorn’s unit has to do with the world of drug, counterfeit and terrorist weapons.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E10 - Enemy of the People
3.plot: The investigation on the death of key figures of a controversial Hydro-Electric project exposes the secret life of a contractor.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E11 - Penalty
3.plot: When the locker room of a football team is bombarded, the research leads to a racist motive and exposes a dark secret of the profitable owner.

3.title: FR - Crossing Lines [MULTI-SUB] - S03E12 - Obscura
3.plot: The team investigates the murder of the press attaché of the Romanian Freedom Party. Marco follows a new lead on his missing sister's case.

meta.plot: Le commissaire Louis Daniel, membre d'Europol, recrute des membres pour faire partie d'une unité d'élite composée des meilleurs spécialistes européens. Louis demande à un ancien collègue, Carl Hickman -- un ex-policier de New York, qui est tombé en morceaux après qu'un criminel international lui ait tiré sur la main -- de diriger cette équipe composée de cinq jeunes policiers. Grâce à une disposition particulière du tribunal pénal international, la brigade a le pouvoir d'appréhender les criminels partout en Europe et de les présenter à la justice.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: An Upper East Side socialite dramatically blows up her perfectly instagrammable life and runs off to join the Renaissance Faire after her fairy tale wedding goes awry.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E02 - Just Boob Stuff
1.plot: Amanda tries to find a job at the Renaissance Festival until she can plan her next move. David suffers an injury that hinders his performance in the mud pit, while Maggie is visited by an old flame.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E03 - Down There
1.plot: Amanda attempts to win Maggie's respect with the help of Delilah, David and the other Rennies. Meanwhile, Brian tries to loosen up at promotional events for the Renaissance Festival.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E04 - Why Are You Romeo?
1.plot: Amanda has surprise visitors who struggle with the hyper-sexuality on display at the Renaissance Festival. Brian develops a crush and Maggie leads a Royal Pub Crawl.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E05 - A Period Piece
1.plot: Amanda’s family lures her back to New York City. Delilah plans a party to celebrate Lulu and Shart’s daughter, Breeze. Maggie wrestles with Brian’s new romance, while David, Stick and Shart have a “man” outing.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E06 - Queen, Interrupted
1.plot: Amanda tries to make some changes at the Royal Renaissance Festival but bumps up against the old guard. Juan Andres wants to take Brian out on a date, while David, Stick, and Shart discover an uncomfortable truth.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E07 - The Tempest
1.plot: When rain washes out the festival day, Amanda and David get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Maggie revels in Amanda's failures, Brian wallows in his heartbreak, and it's revealed Delilah has been holding on to a secret.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E08 - Fairemily Matters
1.plot: Amanda arranges for Brett to help Delilah, while David tries to figure out what he really wants. Maggie's frustration with the Festival's changes makes her reconsider some old dreams. Brian and Helen form an unlikely bond.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E09 - You Can Always Trust Your Vaganya
1.plot: Amanda and David are forced to take a corporate group around the Renaissance Festival together. Brian and Juan Andres double date with Natasha, Phil and Stephen. Delilah manages her residual emotions from the trial, and Maggie seeks guidance from the faire fortune teller.

1.title: FR - American Princess - S01E10 - Faire Well
1.plot: Amanda and David discuss plans for the future. Brian and Juan Andres help Maggie tape another audition. Delilah deals with the end of the faire season by honoring a dearly departed friend. The Rennies close out the faire season with a bang.

meta.plot: Les aventures d'Amanda, une femme mondaine installée à New York dans le Upper East Side. Elle va s'enfuir de son mariage, quelques heures avant, lorsqu'elle découvre que son futur mari la trompe. Dans sa fuite, en rase campagne, elle se retrouve sans téléphone ou moyen de regagner son domicile. Elle ne va pas tarder à faire la une de la presse à scandale...

Élevée par sa mère en marge de la société après l'obscure disparition de son père, la jeune Kim Noakes sort de sa retraite pour honorer la mémoire de ce dernier au cours d'une mystérieuse mission secrète. Elle fait alors la rencontre de Nicky et de son frère Dave, avec lesquels elle se retrouve confrontée à la police et à un dangereux gangster.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Kim sets out into the real world for the first time on a secret mission. But after encountering hapless brothers Nicky and Jay at their local pub, a seemingly harmless prank sets in motion a series of events that sees them all on the run from murderous gangsters.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Kim faces her dad's killer in an epic showdown while Jay tells a disapproving Nicky that he plans to propose to his girlfriend, Beth. As Kim appears battered and bloody from the fight, having learned from Jimmy that the world is not about to end, she confronts Nicky who comes clean with disastrous consequences.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After kidnapping her daughter from Jimmy's, Tina is forced to return to the gangster's mansion with Kim, just in time to save Nicky and Jay from being executed.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Unaware they're now being hunted by Brooks and Thompson on the orders of Jimmy's daughter, the mysterious Terri, Kim finally stands up to her mum.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Before Kim has a moment to cope with the fallout of her mother's deception, Brooks and Thompson's plan to use Jay to track them down backfires.

1.title: FR - Two Weeks to Live - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: As the gang reach the safety of the cabin, Kim finds herself back where she started, her plans now shattered and her mum's lies revealed.

meta.plot: Amy, une étrange petite fille de 10 ans, est le seul espoir de l'humanité dans un monde post-apocalyptique envahi par des vampires assoiffés de sang.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: As an imminent flu epidemic threatens the U.S., Federal Agent Brad Wolgast is tasked with bringing in the experiment's latest chosen test subject, a ten-year-old girl, Amy Bellafonte. But, after meeting Amy, Brad's loyalties to Project NOAH are tested.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E02 - You Owe Me a Unicorn
1.plot: Amy and a wounded Brad continue on the run from Richards and attempt to seek refuge with an elusive, ex-military instructor of Brad's, while Lila tries to help from afar. Meanwhile, at Project NOAH, Dr. Lear reflects on the decisions that compelled him to involve Fanning in his research, and testing of the virus on Anthony Carter begins, as the epidemic in China spreads and the race for a cure intensifies.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E03 - That Never Should Have Happened to You
1.plot: Brad strikes a deal with Sykes and Richards to stay with Amy at Project NOAH, as they begin to test the virus on her. Upon learning the harsh truth regarding the state of inmates in 4B, Brad forms an alliance to get more information. Meanwhile, Babcock sheds light on her past.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E04 - Whose Blood Is That?
1.plot: In an attempt to protect Amy, Wolgast convinces Sykes and Lear to let them outside of the facility for exercise. As emotional flashbacks reveal Carter's life leading up to his death-row sentencing, Fanning's hold on those kept inside Project Noah grows stronger. Meanwhile, the virals gain power over the facility's staff, leading Richards and Wolgast to reunite so they can take down a rogue soldier.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E05 - How You Gonna Outrun the End of the World?
1.plot: With the sudden arrival of a high ranking official, Horace Guilder, to Project NOAH, Brad and Amy begin to strategize a possible escape plan with the help of an unlikely accomplice. Meanwhile, Sykes and Richards begin to question each other's motives, and a shaky past between Lear, Elizabeth and Fanning is revealed.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E06 - I Want to Know What You Taste Like
1.plot: Tensions are high with a viral on the loose outside Project NOAH, as Guilder and Richards hurry to mobilize a search party. Amy volunteers to help in an unexpected way, causing friction between her and Brad. Lear tries to help a lucid Elizabeth understand the tough decisions he's made while at NOAH. A surprising connection between Sykes and Babcock is revealed.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E07 - You are Like the Sun
1.plot: Brad and Lila flash back through their history together as they plan to save Amy. The Secretary of Defense gives Horace Guilder full authority over Project NOAH, leaving Sykes and Richards terrified for what his plan of attack might entail. Meanwhile, the bond between Amy and Carter is stronger than ever, as he prepares her for Fanning's grand plan, and Lear fights to help Elizabeth before it's too late.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E08 - You are Not That Girl Anymore
1.plot: As Amy experiences symptoms of the virus that indicate she is close to turning, Brad brings everyone together, and Lila and Sykes race to perfect an anti-viral medicine to save her from Fanning. Meanwhile, Richards tries to keep Project NOAH contained when Guilder makes a mysterious decision to let go of most of the staff while also trying to ward off Babcock's attempts to get in his head.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E09 - Stay in the Light
1.plot: When the only way to stop Fanning and the virals' escape from Project NOAH involves a dangerous explosion that could leave Brad, Sykes, and the cure for the virus caught in the crossfire, Amy must be the one to decide what's best for humanity. In the wake of this, surprising alliances form and a key figure returns to instill confidence, convincing everyone to fight for their lives.

1.title: FR - The Passage - S01E10 - Last Lesson
1.plot: When the only way to stop Fanning and the virals' escape from Project NOAH involves a dangerous explosion that could leave Brad, Sykes, and the cure for the virus caught in the crossfire, Amy must be the one to decide what's best for humanity. In the wake of this, surprising alliances form and a key figure returns to instill confidence, convincing everyone to fight for their lives.

meta.plot: Anthony Templet a tiré sur son père et ne l'a jamais nié. Mais pourquoi il l'a fait est une question complexe aux implications profondes. Explorez la psyché d'Anthony avant les événements du 3 juin 2019 et le parcours de ses conséquences mentales et émotionnelles.

1.title: FR - I Just Killed My Dad - S01E01 - I'm Not A Killer
1.plot: Family members, police and others involved with the case describe what happened before and after Anthony called 911 to say he'd killed his own father.

1.title: FR - I Just Killed My Dad - S01E02 - I Found My Son
1.plot: Anthony’s parents and his inheritance of abuse come into sharper focus, while a grand jury indictment dramatically changes the stakes of the case.

1.title: FR - I Just Killed My Dad - S01E03 - Big Bad Burt
1.plot: Preparing for a trial where nothing is black and white, Anthony’s defense team works to show the subtle forms abuse can take and the damage inflicted.

meta.plot: L’action se déroule dix ans après la fin tragique de Star Wars : La Revanche des Sith. Obi-Wan y a subi sa plus grande défaite et a assisté à la déchéance de son meilleur ami, l’apprenti Jedi Anakin Skywalker, qui a rejoint le Côté Obscur en devenant le seigneur Sith Dark Vador.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E01 - Part I
1.plot: Obi-Wan Kenobi lives a humble existence on Tatooine. Despite the dangers of being a Jedi survivor at the height of the Empire, Kenobi is forced to emerge from hiding.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E02 - Part II
1.plot: Obi-Wan’s mission brings him to a crime-ridden world, home to all manner of scum and villainy.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E03 - Part III
1.plot: Obi-Wan searches for allies as he attracts the attention of the Empire, threatening the locals.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E04 - Part IV
1.plot: Obi-Wan Kenobi plots a daring mission into enemy territory.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E05 - Part V
1.plot: Obi-Wan plans his next move as the Empire, closing in, tries to draw him out.

1.title: FR - Obi-Wan Kenobi - S01E06 - Part VI
1.plot: Obi-Wan is drawn into a confrontation with Vader, as Luke's fate hangs in the balance.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E01 - Spidey to the Power of Three
1.plot: When Miles and Gwen each think their skill set is the best to track down Rhino, Peter reminds them that teamwork is the best way to save the day.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E02 - Panther Patience
1.plot: After Doc Ock steals a chunk of vibranium from a Wakandan museum exhibit to power her suit, Spidey and Black Panther must work together to get it back.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E03 - Superhero Hiccups
1.plot: Miles gets discouraged when his hiccups keep the team from stopping Green Goblin.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E04 - Lost and Found
1.plot: Peter is in over his head when he needs to put an end to Rhino’s stomping rampage, retrieve his lost backpack and make it back to Aunt May in time for movie night.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E05 - Doc Ock’s Super Octopus
1.plot: When Doc Ock’s growth serum is used on a baby octopus, the Spidey team must stop it from rampaging into the city.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E06 - Attack of the Green Giggles
1.plot: When Green Goblin blasts goblin gas all over the city, Spidey and Ms. Marvel work together to ensure that he doesn’t have the last laugh.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E07 - Bug in the System
1.plot: Doc Ock sends her favorite octo-bot to infiltrate WEB-Quarters with a new invention that can steal everything Spidey’s ever invented.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E08 - Test Your Super Strength
1.plot: Spidey reminds Hulk to use self-control after Rhino challenges him to a strength contest.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E09 - Pecking Prankster Pigeons
1.plot: Green Goblin uses a remote to control the city’s pigeons so they will steal for him.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E10 - Green Thumb
1.plot: Green Goblin invents a weather machine to wreak havoc on the city.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E11 - Mother's Day Mayhem
1.plot: Doc Ock's escape from jail interrupts the Spidey Team's Mother's Day picnic.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E12 - Not-So-Fun House
1.plot: Miles must make big decisions to save his mom from Green Goblin’s not-so-fun-funhouse.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E13 - Camping Conundrum
1.plot: The Spidey Team goes camping with Miles’ dad, only to find that the Old Dam is cracking and threatening to flood the park.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E14 - The Great Green Crime Spree
1.plot: When Green Goblin pins a crime spree on Hulk, Spidey and Ghost Spider must prove his innocence.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E15 - Rocket Rhino!
1.plot: A new super-powered Spidey jetpack ends up in Rhino’s hands.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E16 - Trick or TRACE-E
1.plot: Team Spidey must stop Green Goblin’s tricks at the Halloween Parade.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E17 - Gob-zilla
1.plot: Team Spidey takes on a rampaging dinosaur only to discover Green Goblin at the controls.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E18 - Speedy Spidey Delivery
1.plot: Spidey is in charge of delivering the cake to Hulk’s birthday bash, but when some sinister Super Villains get in the way, Spidey realizes cake-duty might not be a one-hero job.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E19 - Good Guy Gobby
1.plot: Green Goblin decides to quit being a villain and become a good guy!

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E20 - Spider Monkey
1.plot: Rhino steals a Spider Monkey from the zoo, and it's up to Spidey and Ghost-Spider to bring him home.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E21 - CAT-astrophe
1.plot: Bootsie gets lost at the Cat Show and Doc Ock turns her into a super-sized, monster kitty!

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E22 - Swing with a Stomp
1.plot: During the concert, Doc Ock steals the drumset and uses it to hypnotize the entire audience!

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E23 - A Very Spidey Christmas
1.plot: When Doc Ock becomes determined to steal everyone’s Christmas presents, it threatens to put a damper on an important holiday event.

1.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S01E24 - Gobby on Ice
1.plot: The Spidey team puts their fun on hold when Green Goblin creates a giant snow monster.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E01 - Electro's Gotta Glow
2.plot: Team Spidey must use their new glow tech to stop Electro from draining all the power in the city.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E02 - Black Cat Chaos
2.plot: Spidey and Iron Man work together to stop Black Cat from making a mess of things when she steals Iron Man’s Armor.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E03 - Lights Out
2.plot: Team Spidey must stop Electro and Green Goblin’s attempt to keep the citizens of New York City awake all night with a super-charged lighthouse.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E04 - Sandman Won't Share!
2.plot: Team Spidey’s beach day gets interrupted by Sandman’s need to prove he’s the best at building sandcastles.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E05 - Bootsie's Day Out
2.plot: Team Spidey searches for Bootsie after she gets captured by Black Cat.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E06 - Trouble at Tony's
2.plot: The Spidey Team protects Iron Man's Headquarters from Electro.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E07 - Sonic Boom Boom
2.plot: Team Spidey heads underwater to stop Doc Ock from disrupting sea life.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E08 - Mini Golf Goof
2.plot: Ghost-Spider teams up with Ant-Man and The Wasp to stop Green Goblin from ruining the mini golf course.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E09 - Li'l Hulk
2.plot: Team Spidey has their hands full when Gobby's device turns Hulk into a baby!

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E10 - Surprise Party Surprise
2.plot: Spidey and Spin plan a birthday surprise for Ghost-Spider, but a stream of villains get in the way.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E11 - Can't Stop Dancing!
2.plot: Spidey saves the day after Green Goblin's device forces people to dance!

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E12 - The Ant Thief
2.plot: Spin and Ghost-Spider go on a tiny adventure with Ant-Man and The Wasp after the museum is robbed by ants.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E13 - Sand Trapped
2.plot: Team Spidey gets trapped in Sandman's giant sand maze.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E14 - Too Much Fun
2.plot: The Team swings into action to bring back the fun after Electro super charges the amusement park.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E15 - Halted Holiday
2.plot: All roads to the city are blocked, keeping families from being together on Thanksgiving.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E16 - Merry Spidey Christmas
2.plot: Team Spidey uses their Glow Webs to save Christmas after baddies try to ruin it.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E17 - An Egg-Cellent Adventure
2.plot: When Black Cat steals a sparkly egg from the zoo, Team Spidey must save it before it hatches.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E18 - The Hangout Headache
2.plot: Spidey's offer to let Hulk hang out in WEB-Quarters quickly turns into a disaster.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E19 - Follow That Sea Monster!
2.plot: The Spidey Team and Reptil investigate rumors of a sea monster.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E20 - It's Bad to be Gooed
2.plot: Team Spidey finds out that Green Goblin converted the dam to pump out polluting goo.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E21 - Liberty on the Loose
2.plot: It's up to Miles, Ant-Man, and The Wasp to save the Statue of Liberty after Black Cat shrinks it and steals it.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E22 - Green Goblin's Dino Disaster
2.plot: Spidey and Reptil team up against Green Goblin's new Dino Mech.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E23 - Spidey Tidies Up
2.plot: Spidey and Iron Man must fix their new invention before Sandman turns Central Park into Sandman Park.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E24 - Oh No, Tomatoes!
2.plot: Miles can't let Rhino steal the tomatoes his mom grew for community dinner.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E25 - Clean Power
2.plot: Electro and her electric gauntlet have drained the power from the city's new wind turbine.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E26 - Doc Ock & The Rocktobots
2.plot: Team Spidey runs up against villains trying to stop them from performing at a concert.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E27 - Pirate Plunder Blunder
2.plot: Team Spidey must save Aunt May when Green Goblin's device makes people think they're pirates.

2.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S02E28 - Bad Bot
2.plot: Doc Ock creates a "Bad" bot version of TRACE-E to trick Team Spidey.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E01 - The Friendly Neighborhood
3.plot: After Zola steals the Community Center's party, the community works together to get it back.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E02 - Flight of the Butterflies
3.plot: Team Spidey has to figure out where Sandman is hiding a migration of butterflies.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E03 - Ock's Obey Ray
3.plot: When Hulk is hit with Doc Ock's Obey Ray, Team Spidey must stop him from helping her.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E04 - Lemur at Large
3.plot: A lemur steals Ant-Man and the Wasp's shrink and grow tech, causing trouble around the city.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E05 - Tree Trouble
3.plot: Team Spidey saves the Apple Blossom Festival from Gobby's antics.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E06 - Stuck in Space
3.plot: Zola steals the Spider Crawl-R during a space mission, stranding Spidey and The Thing on the moon.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E07 - Antarctic Adventure
3.plot: Team Spidey stops Doc Ock from melting ice while looking for treasure in Antarctica.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E08 - Let It Snowball, Let It Snowball, Let It Snowball
3.plot: When Zola claims the snowy park as his, Miles and his dad work together to take it back.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E09 - Bubble Trouble
3.plot: Spidey and Ghosty save the Bubble Festival from Gobby's super strong bubbles.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E10 - Rainy River Run
3.plot: Spidey and Ant-Man save Aunt May's doll when it gets washed down a storm drain.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E11 - The Rhino and the Goose
3.plot: Team Spidey helps a mama goose get back to its baby.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E12 - Dog vs Cat
3.plot: When Lockjaw chases Black Cat through the city causing trouble, Team Spidey must help him make things right.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E13 - Journey Through Zola
3.plot: Team Spidey, Ant-Man, and Wasp must shrink a giant Zola back to regular size.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E14 - Villaintines Day
3.plot: Gobby and Rhino try to ruin Valentine's Day.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E15 - Now You See Me, Now You Don't
3.plot: Team Spidey stops invisible Rhino from doing sneaky crimes all across town.

3.title: FR - Spidey et ses amis extraordinaires - S03E16 - Meet Squirrel Girl
3.plot: Team Spidey teams up with hero Squirrel Girl to stop Green Goblin's Naughty Nutty Ray.

meta.plot: Spidey, notre voltigeur préféré, s'associe à Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) et Miles Morales pour former l'équipe Spidey. Ils seront tous les trois assistés par Trace-E, l'amusant et fidèle Spider-robot de Spidey. Et Si Spidey se retrouve dans une situation délicate qui nécessite encore plus de super-pouvoirs, nul doute qu'un ami Avenger se précipitera pour l'aider. Que l' équipe Spidey agisse seule ou assistée par un Avenger, ces super-héros vont unir leurs forces pour sauver la situation !

Andy dreams of becoming the greatest pro wrestler of all time. Assuming the wrestler alias: "Fight Girl", Andy sets out into the bizarre and colorful Wrestling World, determined to make a name for herself.

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E01 - I Am
1.plot: Far away from the excitement of the Wrestling World, on the humble Accountant Isle-- we meet Andy. A jr accountant in the making who dreams of instead, becoming a great wrestler…

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E02 - Dreamers and Busters
1.plot: With her parents' reluctant blessing, Andy embarks on the first step of her wrestling journey: finding a teacher. Her task takes her away from home and into the Big City, where she's confronted with the reality of following one's dreams.

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E03 - Friends
1.plot: After Quesa Poblana refuses to train her, Andy encounters Craig, a weaselly con artist, and Mikey, a young man with a dream in need of a helping hand.

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E04 - The Way of the World
1.plot: Andy faces off against Mikey's formidable brother: Mbrandon. She'll do whatever it takes to come out on top to preserve Mikey's dream.

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E05 - The Perfect Strike
1.plot: Poblana will teach Andy under one condition: Andy must perform 10 Perfect Strikes in one week's time. The task is difficult and the team is desperate.

1.title: FR - Invincible Fight Girl - S01E06 - Behind the Wall: The Finger and the Toe
1.plot: In search of those who hold the secret to the Perfect Strike, Andy and her friends are caught in a town divided by grudges and differing philosophies.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E01 - Leo Nardo Stands Alone
1.plot: The Ninja Turtles are on the run and... alone. Leonardo is a leader who is without anyone to lead. Leo now has to stop Bishop and her Mechazoids while trying to save his brothers.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E02 - Mikey Does the Right Thing
1.plot: To save his brothers, Mikey needs the help of Bishop's intern, Rod. But Rod wants something in return... to be turned into a MUTANT! To save the day, Mikey has to become... RESPONSIBLE.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E03 - Raphael Thinks It Through
1.plot: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to het out of this one.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E04 - Donnie Hangs Tough
1.plot: It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil 4/5/24 August 2, 2024 Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E05 - Bishop Makes Her Move
1.plot: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E06 - Night of the Mechazoids
1.plot: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BISHOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E07 - Raph vs. Water
1.plot: The Turtles and Mutanimals are caught in the Storm of the Century! But when a new group of SEA MUTANTS threaten the city... Raph will be forced to use his WORDS to save the day.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E08 - Mikey Takes Charge
1.plot: Mikey and Genghis Frog are sent into the storm on a supply run to the local market when they encounter the electrifying LEE THE EEL! Now Mikey has to step up and be a LEADER!

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E09 - Splinter and April Fight a Goldfish
1.plot: When the Lair floods, April goes to save Splinter... but he won't leave the sewer! To make matters worse, the mutant called GOLDFIN comes with a warning... stay out of his way, or else!

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E10 - Donnie Goes Deep
1.plot: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E11 - Leonardo Saddles Up
1.plot: The mutant seahorse called MUSTANG SALLY is going to flood the city... and the only thing standing in his way are LEO and Pigeon Pete. Being the leader isn't all it's cracked up to be.

1.title: FR - Tales of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles : Légendes des Tortues Ninja - S01E12 - The Pearl
1.plot: The East River 3 are on the verge on victory! The Turtles and Mutanimals must team up to stop them, but not everything is as it seems... what is the PEARL and why does Goldfin want it?

meta.plot: Les tortues, Leo, Raph, Donnie et Mikey, font cavalier seul pour la première fois et sont confrontées à de nouvelles menaces tout en gérant les pressions liées à l'entrée au lycée de New York.

La mort soudaine de sa mère ramène Sydney Strait, brillante avocate, dans sa ville natale de Memphis. Brouillé depuis quelques années avec sa fille, Elijah lui propose de rejoindre son cabinet dans l'espoir de se rapprocher d'elle. Malgré leur relation tumultueuse, la jeune femme accepte l'offre, sachant que travailler sur des affaires de grande ampleur à ses côtés est l'occasion rêvée de réellement changer la donne.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In the aftermath of her family tragedy, top corporate attorney Sydney Strait puts aside years of conflict with her father Elijah to rejoin his legendary civil rights firm and take on a chemical company whose product may cause cancer.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E02 - You Don't Need a Weatherman...
1.plot: Elijah and daughter Sydney must put personal feelings aside to help a group of farmers who are in danger of losing everything to an insidious corporate scheme. Anthony and Jake team up to take on a seemingly light-hearted case about a stolen barbecue sauce recipe that actually would have a deeper impact on the city than anyone knows.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E03 - 25 Years to Life
1.plot: The fate of an innocent man is in the hands of Elijah and Jake. Meanwhile Sydney and Anthony take a case brought to them by old professor which may be more than it seems.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E04 - Fire in a Crowded Theater
1.plot: After a young woman is murdered Elijah and Anthony take on hate-speech in a case against a controversial leader who is represented by Elijah's old friend and attorney Rachel Madsen.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E05 - When the Levee Breaks
1.plot: Sydney and Elijah help a twelve-year-old girl find justice for the failed levee system that flooded her town. Della and Anthony fight for an old blues musician's song rights.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E06 - The All-American
1.plot: Sydney and Elijah try two separate cases for ex-college football star Marcus Wright, who is dying. Della is presented with a lifetime achievement award from the LGBTQ community.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E07 - American Epidemic
1.plot: Sydney, Elijah and Briana take on a pill mill owner responsible for creating an addiction epidemic in a small Tennessee town. Jake helps George move forward in his post-prison life.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E08 - Need to Know
1.plot: Emerson's mother, General Virginia Howe, arrives in town with a life-or-death case she wants Sydney and Elijah to take. Delia helps her son deal with her father's meddling behavior in the family business.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E09 - Ave Maria
1.plot: Elijah and Sydney help a Catholic teacher who is fired from her school after undergoing IVF treatment. Anthony gets involved with Briana's nephew when he is prohibited from competing on the high school wrestling team.

1.title: FR - Bluff City Law - S01E10 - Perfect Day

meta.plot: Set in the 1960s; Paranormal follows the adventures of Dr. Refaat Ismail, a professor of hematology, as he comes up against various supernatural events with the help of his Scottish old flame, Maggie.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E01 - The Myth of the House
1.plot: Refaat's old flame Maggie returns from Scotland, and he reluctantly invites her to a party in honor of his birthday. A sighting exacerbates the tension.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E02 - The Myth of the Curse of the Pharaoh
1.plot: After a supposedly cursed mummy is autopsied, a black cloud looms over Cairo. Refaat refuses to believe they're linked — until a loved one is affected.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E03 - The Myth of the Guardian of The Cave
1.plot: When all fails, Refaat and Maggie search for a cure in the Libyan Desert. Joined by their ex-colleague, they must first get past a mythical creature.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E04 - The Myth of the Naiad
1.plot: After an alarming tarot reading, Refaat visits his hometown to resolve a family emergency. As he jumps to the rescue, an alluring voice hypnotizes him.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E05 - The Myth of the Incubus
1.plot: Overcome with grief, Refaat’s health deteriorates. Convinced that Shiraz is behind all tragedies, he chases her around a haunted maze in his dreams.

1.title: FR - Paranormal - S01E06 - The Myth of the House: The Return
1.plot: Refaat uses his brain's faculties to decipher the real story behind Shiraz’s death, taking him back to where it all began.The third tarot card is shown.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E01 - The Spaniard
1.plot: Antonio gets arrested in Colombia so he can track his daughter's kidnapper. But Angelita, his public defender, tries to get him extradited to Spain.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E02 - A man with foresight
1.plot: Antonio tries to get close to Cruz, the kidnapper, but he's pummeled every time. His mother and Inma, his ex-wife, try to decipher his disappearance.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E03 - Teo
1.plot: Once, Angelita struggled to save a pregnant client, only to wind up adopting her baby after she died by suicide. Back in prison, Antonio gets good news.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E04 - Reunions
1.plot: Antonio makes contact with Cruz, who gives him new info about Soledad, his kidnapped daughter. Inma shows up at his hearing, then stays to investigate.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E05 - Traitor
1.plot: Cruz's sister, La Grilla, kidnaps Inma. Angelita dives deeper into darkness. And at La Brecha, war ensues, with Antonio in the crosshairs.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E06 - Details matter
1.plot: Inma hides with Sebastián, the cop who investigated Soledad's disappearance, and they figure out Quitombo's weak link. Antonio tries to flee La Brecha.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E07 - Breakout
1.plot: After the prison riot, Antonio goes missing. Meanwhile, Soledad continues her investigation into her past and finds a startling new clue.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E08 - Dead man walking
1.plot: Inma manages to get on a call with Milena, which prompts her to pressure Quitombo. In turn, he puts the screws on Angelita. Soledad plots her escape.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E09 - Ibagué
1.plot: The prison riot puts both Antonio and Cruz at risk. Quitombo's birthday party goes off the rails when Soledad makes her move and Inma ends up helping.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E10 - Wheeling and dealing
1.plot: Inma begins to tell Soledad all about her past when they’re cut short by La Grilla, who wants to use them to free Cruz, now in the hands of the police.

1.title: FR - La disparition de Soledad - S01E11 - Father
1.plot: Antonio searches desperately for Inma and Soledad, who are hiding with Ignacio. Angelita lays a trap for Quitombo, who has been abandoned by Milena.

meta.plot: Pour retrouver sa fille enlevée, Antonio se fait volontairement emprisonner en Colombie, déclenchant une série d'événements bouleversants pour de nombreuses personnes.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E01 - The Shorter Way
1.plot: Vic, a young New Englander, discovers her supernatural abilities as the immortal Charlie Manx lures a child into a mysterious Rolls Royce Wraith.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E02 - The Graveyard of What Might Be
1.plot: Vic meets Maggie, a medium with more questions than answers. Manx visits Haverhill to seek The Shorter Way and finds Bing, who is eager to help.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E03 - The Gas Mask Man
1.plot: Vic strives to live a normal life despite Maggie's warning. Charlie Manx puts Bing Partridge to work.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E04 - The House of Sleep
1.plot: Vic seeks the Wraith and learns she must trust her gift. A body surfaces in Haverhill.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E05 - The Wraith
1.plot: Vic is questioned by the police and cannot fill the holes in her story. Manx lays out his plan for Vic, but things go awry.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E06 - The Dark Tunnels
1.plot: Vic meets another strong creative who gives her some advice. Manx receives an unexpected visitor.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E07 - Scissors for the Drifter
1.plot: Vic finds herself trapped. Manx runs into trouble and calls Bing for help.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E08 - Parnassus
1.plot: Vic finds herself in danger after an argument with Linda. Manx seeks advice from an old friend.

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E09 - Sleigh House
1.plot: Despite Maggie's warning, Vic strives to rescue a loved one. Manx learns something new about Vic

1.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S01E10 - Gunbarrel
1.plot: Vic enlists a local biker to help her try to stop Charlie Manx. Manx makes a pitstop on his way to Christmasland.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E01 - Bad Mother
2.plot: Eight years on, Vic McQueen receives shocking news about Charlie Manx. Maggie consults her tiles at great risk. Bing hunts down the Wraith, but hits a roadblock. Millie Manx discovers a new aspect of Christmasland.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E02 - Good Father
2.plot: Charlie Manx fights for his life. Millie Manx determines to never let the lights go out in Christmasland again. Bing receives a long awaited call. Wayne McQueen, attempting to understand his mother, walks headlong into danger.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E03 - The Night Road
2.plot: Vic McQueen takes the Shorter Way to Haverhill. Lou and Wayne face a terrible threat in her absence. Charlie Manx engages an old friend for a mysterious favor. Millie Manx confronts the past.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E04 - The Lake House
2.plot: With Charlie Manx on the hunt, Vic and her family go into hiding with Maggie. Wayne suffers mysterious nightmares while Tabitha chases a lead on Bing.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E05 - Bruce Wayne McQueen
2.plot: Vic McQueen returns to the Lakehouse only to ride straight into a deadly trap; Charlie Manx cashes in his favor; the Hourglass Man, a powerful strong creative, appears.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E06 - The Hourglass
2.plot: Maggie puts herself in danger attempting to take a dark strong creative off the board; Vic and Lou work to repair Vic's knife; Linda and Chris grapple with Vic's gift; Wayne makes a mysterious friend.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E07 - Cripple Creek
2.plot: Bing Partridge has some questions for Charlie Manx. Manx revisits his difficult childhood. Millie meets an old friend. Wayne is put to a choice.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E08 - Chris McQueen
2.plot: Vic and Chris take the Shorter Way to a junkyard. Chris loses his temper. Bing leverages a secret to seek forgiveness. Vic, Lou, Maggie and Chris hatch a plan. Tabitha impresses her boss.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E09 - Welcome to Christmasland
2.plot: Vic and Maggie embark on a dangerous journey. Charlie Manx confronts his deepest fears. As her world falls apart, Millie must choose between freedom and her father.

2.title: FR - NOS4A2 - S02E10 - Bats
2.plot: Vic McQueen makes her final stand against Charlie Manx. Lou and Tabitha solve a Christmasland riddle. Millie Manx wrestles with regret.

meta.plot: Vic McQueen se découvre le précieux don de retrouver les choses perdues. Celui-ci va se révéler très utile pour traquer le diabolique et immortel Charlie Manx, un serial-killer enlevant des enfants pour les emmener dans le monde fantastique de Christmasland.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E01 - Friday - The Father
1.plot: After Sam, a London family man in crisis, rescues a troubled young girl in the woods, he brings her home to the ominous Osea Island, where inhabitants are preparing for a curious annual festival involving the island's history. As he meets Osea's secretive locals, Sam grows increasingly desperate to return to the mainland to make an important call - but the island proves difficult to escape.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E02 - Saturday - The Son
1.plot: Plagued by a disturbing dream, Sam awakes to find himself in a compromising situation and, having missed the morning crossing to return to the mainland, spends the day trying to learn more about the islanders’ beliefs. After a series of confusing and terrifying events leaves him shaken, Sam quickly plots a way off Osea with Jess, but is convinced to stay put as the islanders prepare for a dry run of their big event.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E03 - Sunday - The Ghost
1.plot: Sam is shocked to learn the truth about his connection to Osea and the islanders’ intentions for his future. Later, in a fight for his life, Sam tries desperately to escape their clutches and make it back to the mainland in one piece.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E04 - Monday - The Mother
1.plot: Winter. Helen surprises her two daughters, Tallulah and Ellie, with a trip to Osea Island for Ellie's birthday. After finding that the cottage she booked is suspiciously no longer available, Helen scours the island for a place to stay, but finds resistance at every turn.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E05 - Tuesday - The Daughter
1.plot: As the islanders prepare for a fateful birth, Helen reveals her true intentions in coming to Osea and, after joining a search party, is pressed on her past. A peculiar girl befriends Ellie and offers to take her to a mysterious place closed off to outsiders.

1.title: FR - The Third Day - S01E06 - Last Day - The Dark
1.plot: Helen protects her family as tensions come to a dramatic conclusion.

meta.plot: A unique story told over two distinct halves, "Summer" follows Sam, a man drawn to a mysterious island off the British coast where he encounters a group of islanders set on preserving their traditions at any cost. "Winter" follows Helen, a strong-willed outsider who comes to the island seeking answers, but whose arrival precipitates a fractious battle to decide its fate.

Dogged investigator Allegra Dill returns to her border-town Texas home after her sister is murdered. What begins as a search for a killer turns into an all-consuming fight to bring her corrupt hometown to its knees.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E01 - First Time in Saint Disgrace
1.plot: Allegra Dill returns to Texas after her sister is murdered.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E02 - Snap, Crackle, Pop
1.plot: A new suspect emerges. Allegra meets Chief of Police Eve Raytek. Jake brings snowcones.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E03 - Terrible, Shocking Things
1.plot: Jake throws a party, Allegra discovers a secret, and a newcomer offers warnings and cocktails.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E04 - Breadknife Weather
1.plot: Sad thing, funerals. Well, I will shut up now.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E05 - Behind God's Back
1.plot: Allegra and Singe investigate Packingtown. Jake decides to take things to the press. Pudding day arrives.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E06 - The Most Sinful Mf-er Alive
1.plot: Lights out, guns out!

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E07 - Butterscotch
1.plot: The Senator returns to town. Allegra and Singe decide to investigate someone new. The Colders have a party.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E08 - Most Likely to Succeed
1.plot: Jake decides to enjoy himself by playing some croquet. A plan is hatched. The class of '99 is looking ninety-fine.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E09 - Game Theory and Mescaline
1.plot: Jake and Allegra make the most of a bad situation. Singe needs to get creative. The Senator takes a meeting.

1.title: FR - Briarpatch - S01E10 - Felicity
1.plot: Allegra decides to line them all up and knock them down in a special way that only she knows how to do.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E01 - Chapter One - The Beginning
