1.plot: Madeleine recounts her nightmarish visions to Élise. An unsettling truth rears its head during an encounter between Joseph and Oka, a prisoner.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E02 - Chapter Two - The Revenant
1.plot: Someone unexpectedly reaches out to Élise through Madeleine. Joseph begins to dissect the mystery behind Rebecca's death.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E03 - Chapter Three - The Innocents
1.plot: The Brotherhood convinces Joseph to help them infiltrate the prison. Ophélie coerces Father Maxence into divulging details on the man in Élise's locket.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E04 - Chapter Four - The Executioners
1.plot: With his newfound abilities as a blue-blood, Donatien tracks down Guy de Montargis, who makes a searing confession. Albert faces a tragic dilemma.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E05 - Chapter Five - The Blue Blood
1.plot: As the origin of the blue blood comes to light, Élise must form an alliance between nobles and rebels to avert its spread.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E06 - Chapter Six - The Alliance
1.plot: Joseph and Katell fall prey to Donatien's sinister scheme. Charles orders Pérouse to track down Élise and Lariboise.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E07 - Chapter Seven - The Dilemma
1.plot: As Joseph continues his search for a cure, tensions come to a head between Charles and Donatien, and Madeleine defies Donatien's attempt to destroy her.

1.title: FR - La Révolution - S01E08 - Chapter Eight - The Rebellion
1.plot: Ophélie glimpses into Madeleine's alarming power, Oka and Albert part ways, and Élise faces betrayal.

meta.plot: Dans une version revisitée de la Révolution française, le futur inventeur de la guillotine découvre une maladie qui pousse les nobles à assassiner les gens du peuple.

Elida, an orphaned queen who refuses to accept her true title, prefers to scavenge and get into scrapes throughout the galaxy as the Republic government seeks to snuff out her royal bloodline. Elida's existence is turned upside down when her friend from way back, Isaac, claims that Elida's mother, Xevelyn, is still alive.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E01 - A Royal Ass-Kicking
1.plot: Former queen Elida is cornered by her nemesis, so an old friend comes to her aid, bringing big news.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E02 - Yippee Ki Yay
1.plot: The team is forced to stop for repairs, but the cannibals who reside there have other plans.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E03 - Nobody's Queen
1.plot: Elida deals with the life she left behind. Isaac and Amae find themselves in risky territory.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E04 - In a Sticky Spot
1.plot: A stealth mission through the Republic border becomes a fight for survival as Lazaro closes in.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E05 - Temple of Doom
1.plot: The team arrive on Wix to unexpected revelations and betrayal leads to a bloody showdown.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E06 - Requiem For Republic
1.plot: The team must fix their ship while avoiding the dangers of Wix. Lazaro begins his ascent to power.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E07 - Sunshine Express Yourself
1.plot: Elida leaves the team to take a scavenger job while Isaac and Amae battle hijackers on a train.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E08 - No Clue
1.plot: Adrift in space, the team find themselves in the middle of a very strange murder mystery.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E09 - All Old Things Must Pass - Part 1
1.plot: The team arrive on Arriopa to take down Lazaro. A face from the past unexpectedly returns.

1.title: FR - Vagrant Queen - S01E10 - All Old Things Must Pass - Part 2
1.plot: Arriopa is in chaos. Elida makes a final push to stop Lazaro, but a shocking new threat arises.

meta.plot: Marriage, family, career, everything in Claude's life is a success. Mayor of his town, he is almost certain to become senator. For his beloved grandson Lucas, life is much less cheerful: his parents are divorcing and he's awkward and ill at ease. One day he accuses his grandfather of rape.

1.title: FR - Le Mensonge - S01E01 - The fall
1.plot: Everything in Claude Arbona's life has been a resounding success. Already mayor of Castel-sur-Mer, he's about to become senator. But the toughest challenge in his life comes from the person he loves the most: his grandson Lucas, who accuses him of rape.

1.title: FR - Le Mensonge - S01E02 - The infernal spiral
1.plot: The scandal becomes even greater when Lucas accuses a second man. From his prison cell, Claude fights to prove his innocence and manages to gain his freedom. But his grandson maintains his accusations and Claude is sent for trial at the Crown Court.

1.title: FR - Le Mensonge - S01E03 - The dead end
1.plot: Ten years later, on the eve of the trial, Lucas is struggling to build a life for himself. Deeply wounded but still fighting, Claude succeeds in being re-elected as mayor. But his criminal conviction and prison sentence tolls the knell for all he has built.

1.title: FR - Le Mensonge - S01E04 - The last fight
1.plot: Having matured, Lucas begins to have doubts about the accusations he levelled against his grandfather. In a complete about-turn he withdraws his allegations. But the unwieldy legal machine has difficulty in changing direction and Lucas will have to fight alongside his grandfather to have him acquitted.

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Sisters Kat and Jo realize a Zombie Apocalypse has started in Birmingham and plan to escape it in a boat. Sunny and Amar flee from the Train station when the find themselves a Zombie, will they make it to safety or succumb to the zombies?

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Kat and Jo want Amar and Sunny off the boat. Jo is upset about ex-boyfriend Rob and decides to get her phone to call him. Amar joins her, determined to find a car.  Kat meets her online gaming idol, BIGDAMEHERO, and doesn’t listen to Sunny’s words of warning.

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Our gang arrive at the hotel where Sunny and Amar spent their stag weekend. Amar insists they check if their mates are alive. Kat makes Jo stay and guard Dorothy.

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Amar and Jo head to the supermarket where she used to work - where they meet Chloe, Jo's former colleague. However, things soon take a troubling turn.

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Kat worries about sharing a kiss with Sunny with Zombie Jude still on their trail. Meanwhile, the gang encounter another boat, which Jo decides to stay on to avoid Kat's bossiness.

1.title: FR - Zomboat! - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The gang are taken to the evacuation centre, where they meet Rob, who is looking for Jude, who he thinks is patient zero. Soon, Jo is bitten, but she shows no zombie symptoms...

meta.plot: We follow two sisters contending with the recent zombie apocalypse.
Devin, un père de famille, replonge dans son obsession des baskets quand son ami Bobby l'entraîne dans une combine pour mettre la main sur une paire légendaire.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E01 - 100% Pure Adrenaline
1.plot: A deception begins when Devin sneaks off for a special pair of size 13s and finds a long line, his old friend Bobby and other rude surprises.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E02 - Hustling Backwards
1.plot: Nori gives the guys a flipping master class. Bobby pitches a quest to find a legendary — and lucrative — pair of sneakers that may or may not exist.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E03 - The Match
1.plot: A wake-up call at work links Devin back up with Nori, Bobby and Stuey — plus an A-list celebrity he hates. A tense tennis match yields a big score.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E04 - CSI: Sandwich
1.plot: A sketchy source comes through with a tantalizing clue, leading the group to an unsavory encounter with a sandwich shop owner — and Christine.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E05 - Jason F**king Statham
1.plot: After unboxing cryptic new hints, Bobby and Devin fly to Hong Kong to find a one-of-a-kind boy band fan. Christine goes on a hunt of her own.

1.title: FR - Sneaker Addicts - S01E06 - Dick Pic
1.plot: Back in LA, Devin, Bobby, Nori and Stuey hit the pavement in search of their payday — and make some much more valuable discoveries.

meta.plot: Dans les bureaux anglais d'une grande banque américaine, Massimo Ruggero se retrouve pris dans une guerre financière et doit choisir entre soutenir ou affronter son mentor, le PDG Dominic Morgan.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Massimo Ruggero makes his bank millions by speculating on the Greek crisis in the hope of getting the vice-CEO position; however, CEO Dominic Morgan denies him the promotion because of a scandal involving his past.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Feeling betrayed and abandoned, Massimo devises a plan to create a scandal against NYL and leave it after cashing in; as he is about push the button on his exposé, Massimo learns that Dominic is hiding something.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Massimo tries to determine if Dominic is secretly handling business for Gaddafi, against whom the Libyan War has now been launched; Detective Vicky Bale suspects that Massimo is involved in his colleague's death.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Massimo's traders fall into a trap set up by Dominic, who intervenes to save the bank; Massimo is about to discover why Dominic denied him the promotion but Vicky's investigation is suddenly shut down.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Dominic reveals that he knows about his wife and Massimo's indiscretion; after NYL's near miss with the Irish bank, Dominic feels he cannot trust Massimo and suspends him as head of trading.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Professionally wounded, Massimo cuts a deal with Vicky to obtain the secret dossier in exchange for the capture of Duval, the elusive head of counterinformation platform and Sofia's employer, Subterranea.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Massimo discovers that the secret dossier hides a liquidity recycling scheme between NYL and a big German bank, used by Dominic to implement an intercontinental plot to preserve the dollar's hegemony.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Massimo and Sofia make a hurried journey to Cetara to see his ailing father; he and Massimo make an emotional peace at his bedside, and in the process Massimo is able to exorcise the personal demons that have plagued him.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Determined to stop Dominic, Massimo forms an unlikely alliance with Subterranea to hack NYL's servers in his search for "smoking gun" evidence of Dominic's plans.

1.title: FR - Devils - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Armed with the dossier, Massimo defeats Dominic and uncovers the identity of the killer responsible for his colleague's death; with Dominic disgraced and his own name cleared, Massimo takes his place as CEO of the bank.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: Dominic Morgan warns Massimo Ruggero that a new geo-political data war between China and the West has begun.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Massimo and his team vow to discover the truth about Brexit's tragic aftermath, and Dominic tries to convince Massimo that the Chinese are behind it.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: As Massimo's suspicions over Wu Zhi and Liwei grow, Oliver discovers that his chance of a future outside NYL has been sabotaged.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: The battle lines are drawn between NYL and Dominics's new company - with former colleagues and friends pitted against one other.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: An accident outside of a private Mayfair bank creates a once in a lifetime opportunity to discover the creator of bitcoin.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Now knowing that he is a target, Massimo tries to retrieve the stolen evidence against him and creates a new plan to protect Europe and its citizens.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: In the final battle of the data war, Massimo has to finalise a new 5G deal with the EU and face the true threat to democracy.

2.title: FR - Devils - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: After years in exile, Massimo sees the opportunity presented by the COVID-19 pandemic to finally get justice.

meta.plot: Dans le huis clos d'une salle d'interrogatoire londonienne, l'heure tourne et les enquêteurs doivent faire parler trois suspects, chacun soupçonné d'un crime grave.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S01E01 - Edgar
1.plot: As time runs out, interrogators turn up the heat on a stone-faced doctor suspected of sexually assaulting and slaying his teenage stepdaughter.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S01E02 - Stacey
1.plot: With a shadowy colleague looking on, the team starts poking holes in the evolving story of a combative suspect accused of poisoning her brother-in-law.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S01E03 - Jay
1.plot: The team badgers a reticent truck driver to locate an abandoned trailer full of immigrants, but a new interrogator's poor decision jeopardizes it all.

2.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S02E01 - Julia
2.plot: Called in one by one on a Sunday, the team risks a legal entanglement when a routine interview with a convicted killer's wife takes a provocative turn.

2.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S02E02 - Alex
2.plot: With scarce evidence to guide them, the investigators question an arrogant businessman accused of rape by a woman who works for him.

2.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S02E03 - Danielle
2.plot: Asking increasingly pointed questions, the team tries to crack a zealous defense put forth by the head of an online group that unmasks sexual predators.

2.title: FR - Criminal: Royaume Uni - S02E04 - Sandeep
2.plot: Confronted with a shrewd convicted killer wanting to cut a deal, the investigators gamble on calling in a disgraced former colleague to help.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E01 - Episode One
1.plot: After paranoid schizophrenic Thomas Birdsey has a violent public breakdown, Dominick Birdsey finds himself stepping up to defend his identical twin brother in unexpected ways. As he navigates the fallout, Dominick reflects on their childhood growing up under the tyrannical rule of their volatile stepfather, Ray, and their desire to know the identity of their biological father.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E02 - Episode Two
1.plot: Tensions rise between Dominick and his live-in girlfriend, Joy, as the media begins to take an interest in Thomas' case. In his attempt to have Thomas released from the Hatch forensic institute for the criminally insane, Dominick finds a potential ally in social worker Lisa Sheffer, but learns that helping his brother may be more difficult than he thought.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E03 - Episode Three
1.plot: Sheffer preps Dominick for a pivotal hearing with Hatch’s review board that could decide Thomas’ fate. A chance encounter with an old classmate brings painful childhood memories to the surface. Dominick reflects on his and Thomas’ time together at college, during which he met Dessa and the signs of his brother’s illness first began to manifest. Joy attempts to remedy the problems in her and Dominick’s relationship.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E04 - Episode Four
1.plot: Despite the protestations of those closest to him, Dominick returns to work before fully recovering from his accident. Heavily medicated, Dominick recalls the disturbing incident that lead to Thomas’ first hospitalization while counting down the hours to Thomas’ hearing with the Hatch review board.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E05 - Episode Five
1.plot: Upon learning the details of his Sicilian grandfather's arrival in the early 1900s to Three Rivers, Dominick becomes convinced his family is cursed. A startling update on Thomas from an unlikely source prompts Dominick to take drastic action.

1.title: FR - La Puissance des Vaincus - S01E06 - Episode Six
1.plot: A lifetime of animosity between Dominick and Ray spills over in public at an inopportune time. After an unexpected tragedy, Dominick seeks reconciliation with those he has hurt. Series finale.

meta.plot: Le destin de deux frères jumeaux, Dominick et Thomas Birdsey, dans l'Amérique de la seconde moitié du XXème siècle.

Suivez les aventures de Bess King, jeune artiste talentueuse à la poursuite de ses rêves. Entre déboires amoureux, familiaux et professionnels, Bess doit trouver sa voix - et le courage de l’utiliser. Mis en musique par Sara Bareilles.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E01 - I Don't Know
1.plot: Young musician Bess King races from job to job in New York while trying to find the courage to perform her own material.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E02 - I Will Survive
1.plot: Taking her brother Louie's advice, Bess gets rehired at the club—and her first paying gig thanks to her friend and coworker Benny.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E03 - Dear Hope
1.plot: Bess tries creating a song about hope for a songwriting competition, but is left reeling by an incident involving her roommate, Prisha.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E04 - Love Hurts
1.plot: Bess and Samuel are awarded the opportunity to record at legendary Electric Lady Studios—and are joined by Bess’s father, Percy.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E05 - Quick, Quick Slow
1.plot: When she decides to make a music video, Bess asks Ethan to direct and enlists all of her friends to help make it a DIY masterpiece.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E06 - Tell Her
1.plot: Ethan's decision to stay with Laila causes Bess to spiral into self-destruction, which has far-reaching consequences.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E07 - Ghost Light
1.plot: Just as Benny sets up a series of meetings with record executives, Bess experiences a setback.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E08 - Sea Change
1.plot: With her family in turmoil and romantic life torn, Bess nears a breaking point.

1.title: FR - Her Voice - S01E09 - Sing What I Can't Say
1.plot: A secret is revealed about Bess’ past—and she faces her fears.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Former thief Cat Chambers returns home to the Pacific island paradise known as The Reef as she finds herself in the center of a kidnapping, when the daughter of the island’s most prominent resident goes missing.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E02 - Lost and Found
1.plot: When modern-day pirates hijack a yacht and steal a laptop containing information that could take down the governor, Cat Chambers jumps into action and finds much more than she expected.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E03 - Buried Things
1.plot: When the wreckage of a plane crash is discovered in the jungle, it sparks the search for its passenger and a race to find Petra before it’s too late.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E04 - Welcome to the Jungle
1.plot: When the Deputy Governor asks Cat to accompany her to visit an island owned by an old friend of Cat's, Dylan Sawyer, the pair become embroiled in a plot to take over Dylan's pot business and, instead, manufacture Yaba.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E05 - The Green Tide
1.plot: When a refinery explosion threatens countless lives on The Reef, Cat Chambers is determined to find out who is behind it before it's too late.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E06 - The Two O'Clock Flight
1.plot: When a group of criminals hijacks a plane and lands on The Reef, Cat Chambers jumps into action formulating a quick-thinking plan to save the passengers on board before it's too late.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E07 - Despot
1.plot: When a mysterious general arrives on The Reef with a secret collection of stolen art and jewelry, chaos and murder ensue leaving Wyatt to question Cat's involvement and who she is really working.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E08 - The Comeback
1.plot: When Tori Eastland hosts The Reef's first women's surf competition, the stakes quickly become deadly for all involved, and a former surfer-rival of Cat Chambers is at the center of it all.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E09 - The Hohenzollern Collection
1.plot: When Betty Ann Miller arrives on The Reef, she presents Cat Chambers an offer too good to refuse, but when Cat considers turning back to her old ways, she turns the tables on the situation.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E10 - Blue Skies
1.plot: Petra unknowingly finds herself in the center of illegal activity involving Regina, the younger sister of criminal Doug O'Casey; and Cat Chambers works to free Petra and comes face-to-face with an old adversary on the Reef.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E11 - Dream Lover
1.plot: It's Cat Chambers' birthday. Everyone on The Reef is getting together to celebrate, but Cat quickly becomes ill resulting in her most dangerous and life-threatening situation yet.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E12 - Prison Break
1.plot: Doug O'Casey involves Cat Chambers in a prison break scheme, and no one is sure who Cat is really working for.

1.title: FR - Reef Break - S01E13 - Endgame
1.plot: Cat Chambers is on the run and fearing for her life and freedom. Hearts are broken and futures are uncertain as Cat faces her toughest case yet—to clear her own name.

meta.plot: Dans un petit archipel du Pacifique, une ex-cambrioleuse met ses talents et son expérience au service de la justice pour résoudre des crimes.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E01 - If I Hadn't Met You
1.plot: Husband and father of two Eduard suffers a sudden and devastating tragedy. In his grief, he meets a strange woman who offers him a unique opportunity.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E02 - The Key
1.plot: Eduard travels to a second parallel universe to change the fate of his loved ones, but is disturbed by the type of man he is in this alternate reality.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E03 - They Won't Meet
1.plot: Dr. Everest has Eduard reflect on choices he made right before two critical moments in his life: his father's death, and the first time he met Elisa.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E04 - I Shouldn't Have Met Him
1.plot: While trying to stop his college-age self from falling for Elisa in 1991, Eduard lands in a situation that could keep him stuck in the wrong universe.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E05 - The Kiss
1.plot: In 1991, Elisa accidentally experiences universe travel and confronts Eduard with her suspicions about his true identity. A different tragedy occurs.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E06 - I Don't Go In
1.plot: In the present, Òscar reveals to Eduard a secret Clara recently told him, which reminds Eduard of a time when he and Elisa had a critical fight.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E07 - It Is And It Isn't
1.plot: Eduard travels to a universe in which Elisa is a renowned singer, living a life very separate from his. But her gain in life means a new loss for him.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E08 - The Wings of a Butterfly
1.plot: Dr. Everest warns Eduard that even a small change can have a great impact, but he ignores her for a second chance at a missed moment with his son.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E09 - Sciences Or Arts
1.plot: When Clara and Òscar become convinced Eduard is delusional, he brings them to meet Dr. Everest to prove otherwise. Joan opens up to his son-in-law.

1.title: FR - If I Hadnt Met You - S01E10 - Universe Zero
1.plot: Dr. Everest's mysterious past and scientific endeavors are finally revealed to Eduard, as she shares her own family tragedy.

meta.plot: Eduard, un mari et père qui a perdu sa famille dans un tragique accident, voyage dans des univers parallèles en quête d'un destin plus heureux pour sa femme.

Le commandant Gabriel Saint-Barthélémy a grandi dans un resort sur une île des Caraïbes. Connaissant mieux que personne les coulisses du paradis, il a la fâcheuse manie de mener ses enquêtes en se tapant l’incruste. Une méthode renversante, mais toujours payante !

1.title: FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Commandant Saint-Barth - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Auckland, 1974 - in the face of increased racial-targeting, a group of Polynesian students and street gangsters form a revolutionary movement for justice and equality.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E01 - Tahi
1.plot: Will and his gang get themselves into deep trouble after being caught stealing a giant catch.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E02 - Lua
1.plot: As Will and The Panthers' movement fires up, so too does Machiavellian politician Rob Muldoon's.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E03 - Tolu
1.plot: Lusitania enlists the help of Officer Havili to investigate her son, only to uncover more than she bargained for.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E04 - A
1.plot: Muldoon tops the polls ahead of the election and Ice puts a bounty out on Will's head.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E05 - Nima
1.plot: Piggy is the new prime minister. Will discovers the ultimate betrayal. Jimmy goes after 'the other man'.

1.title: FR - The Panthers - S01E06 - Ono
1.plot: Will goes to extreme lengths to redeem himself and put a stop to Muldoon's immigration raids.

1.title: FR - Omerta, le gang de la Brise de Mer - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Omerta, le gang de la Brise de Mer - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Omerta, le gang de la Brise de Mer - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Omerta, le gang de la Brise de Mer - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: À la fin des années 1970, dans un bar du vieux port de Bastia, le groupe criminel de la Brise de Mer se rassemble pour organiser braquages, casses ou règlements de compte sanglants. Ce clan est formé de douze gangsters corses, qui parviennent à se faire un nom en éliminant toute résistance, notamment des membres du clan du parrain de la Haute-Corse, Louis Memmi.

Le nord de la France. Des tombes profanées. Des morts qu'on déterre et qu'on installe dans des maisons-témoins. A chaque fois, une femme, un homme, une adolescente qui ne se connaissaient pas et qui forment à présent "une nouvelle famille". Au milieu des corps, des meubles immaculés et des photos de familles idéalisées, Sandra Winckler, jeune flic chargée de l'affaire, découvre la photo de Paul Maisonneuve : une ancienne légende de la PJ de Lille qui va devoir "revenir aux affaires". Qui déterre ? Qui installe ces corps ? Pourquoi et comment ? Sandra Winckler et Paul Maisonneuve. Une femme, un homme. Deux flics pour qui la vie ne sera plus jamais la même...

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Detective Sandra Winckler follows a bizarre clue to begin unraveling a ghastly crime perpetrated in a model home.

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Winckler gets a new partner, veteran detective Paul Maisonneuve, but she soon suspects that someone from his past is out to settle an old score.

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: In the model home, Detectives Winckler and Maisonneuve uncover evidence that Kaz Gorbier is still alive, but is he the man they're looking for?

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: When Kaz Gorbier takes hostages and flees, Detective Maisonneuve sets out after him -- but Gorbier has a few dirty tricks up his sleeve.

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: With the clock ticking, Detective Winckler sets out to save her partner, Detective Maisonneuve, from the clutches of Kaz Gorbier.

1.title: FR - Les Témoins - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Detective Maisonneuve discovers the culprit responsible for the harassment he has suffered and its grim connection to the unearthed bodies.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: 15 passengers are found frozen to death in a bus. They wear festive clothes, but did not know each other. Sandra Winckler starts an investigation.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Where did the bus come from? A man frozen to death and a missing woman who just had a baby. The case reminds Officer Winckler of a case ten years ago.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: At a wind turbine, the body of a young woman who just gave birth is found. Sandra believes another bus will be found in the surrounding area.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: For safety reasons, Sandra may be taken off the case. She refuses to step down. Catherine thinks she found the killer, but Sandra is not so sure.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: Antoine is kidnapped, probably by the unknown killer. Sandra and Catherine devise a plan to get Martin Souriau to lead them to the killer.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Sandra investigates the orphanage where the killer lived as a child. She has a list of names and decides to track all children down.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: Sandra is captured by the killer, who wants to 'marry’ her. The ceremony consists of killing her previous partners and lovers.

2.title: FR - Les Témoins - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: In the season finale, all questions are answered. Can Sandra prevent the wedding? Will Catherine find her missing baby? And who is the Minotaur?

meta.plot: Facing an existential threat that could bring down the Crime Lab, a brilliant team of forensic investigators must welcome back old friends and deploy new techniques to preserve and serve justice in Sin City.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E01 - Legacy
1.plot: An attack on Jim Brass kicks off a twisted conspiracy targeting the Las Vegas crime lab.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E02 - Honeymoon in Vegas
1.plot: Gil Grissom and Sara Sidle come to the aid of a former colleague who is implicated in tampering with evidence. Maxine and the rest of the CSI team work the murder of a couple slain on their wedding day, following the evidence to the salacious underbelly of the Las Vegas elite.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E03 - Under the Skin
1.plot: Grissom and Sara's investigation into charges against David Hodges heats up as Internal Affairs joins the hunt. Also, pressure rises for the CSIs when a video game developer's body is found floating in a fountain before a huge gaming tournament.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E04 - Long Pig
1.plot: The CSI team investigates when a body is dug up in the luau pit of a Hawaiian-themed hotel. Also, Internal Affairs begins to question Grissom and Sara's return to the crime lab.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E05 - Let the Chips Fall
1.plot: As Grissom and Sara close in on who framed Hodges, the CSI team investigates a lock room murder mystery at 30,000 feet, when a cargo plane lands autonomously at McCarran Airport and everyone on board has been killed.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E06 - Funhouse
1.plot: Max puts CSI on lockdown when evidence in a new murder tips Grissom and Sara to a new suspect in the crime lab. Also, Folsom and Allie investigate a series of chilling killings at a dilapidated clown-themed hotel.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E07 - In the Blood
1.plot: An abandoned horse covered in blood leads the CSI team to a halfway house for convicted murderers. Also, Grissom and Sara begin to circle their prime suspect in the David Hodges case.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E08 - Pipe Cleaner
1.plot: When the CSIs are called to investigate human remains found in a convention center owner’s bathtub, Sara and Grissom use the case to get close to attorney Anson Wix’s star forensic expert witness, just days before David Hodges’ trial begins

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E09 - Waiting in the Wings
1.plot: The CSI team looks closely at the eccentric world of sideshows when a couple of performers are discovered burned in a pit. Also, Hodges mulls a plea deal as his criminal trial kicks off, while Max, Grissom and Sara search for evidence to exonerate him.

1.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S01E10 - Signed, Sealed, Delivered
1.plot: When David Hodges goes missing, the entire CSI team searches for any piece of evidence that can help locate him, clear his name and save the reputation of the entire crime lab.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E01 - She's Gone
2.plot: The CSIs investigate the murder of a dominatrix found near her secret sex dungeon.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E02 - The Painted Man
2.plot: As Halloween descends on Sin City, the CSIs investigate when a creepy mannequin prop inside a popular haunted house turns out to be a real dead body. Also, Catherine enlists the help of Folsom to search for her friend who disappeared.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E03 - Story of a Gun
2.plot: The CSI team investigates after a group of teens discover a dead woman behind the wheel of an abandoned car in a Nevada ghost town.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E04 - Koala
2.plot: When three masked assailants invade a home and murder an entire family, including a pregnant woman, the CSIs are called to the scene to investigate. Catherine leads the team through the emotional case, which intensifies her own longing to reconnect with her estranged daughter, Lindsey.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E05 - In Harm's Way
2.plot: After all the guests attending an upscale fundraising soiree for the science department at a local university fall ill, the CSI team gears up to investigate. Also, Catherine enlists Grace’s roommate to help her find clues after Grace disappears.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E06 - There’s the Rub
2.plot: Max leads her team to investigate the death of a prestigious Michelin-starred chef found hanging in his restaurant’s walk-in freezer.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E07 - Burned
2.plot: A mysterious bigfoot-like footprint found near a crime scene puzzles the CSI team as they work to uncover who - or what - killed a father and son.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E08 - Grace Note
2.plot: Catherine’s frustration intensifies when a lead suspect in Grace’s disappearance is found murdered. The team exhausts all their skills to figure out who killed the suspect, and if his death will lead them to Grace.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E09 - In the White Room
2.plot: When the bodies of two Regency Romantic Festival attendees are discovered, the CSI team uncovers a shocking link between their murders and previous cases.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E10 - Eyeballs
2.plot: A social media influencer party ends with the brutal murder of a popular guest. Chris Park's side hustle makes him uniquely qualified to lead the CSI team in their investigation.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E11 - Trinket
2.plot: When a young, non-verbal boy is found hiding in a stranger’s garage, the CSI team searches for his missing mother. Also, Max receives a strange letter with symbols in silver ink that Folsom and Allie recognize from prior crime scenes.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E12 - When the Dust Settles
2.plot: Catherine’s day off with her granddaughter gets interrupted when a woman wakes up from a four-year coma and remembers details from the night her sister died.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E13 - Boned
2.plot: The CSI team investigates the death of an archaeologist found near the breakthrough discovery of an ancient civilization. Also, Max locates another cryptic note written in familiar silver ink after a mentally distressed woman kills her attacker.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E14 - Third Time's the Charm
2.plot: The CSIs investigate the mysterious death of a competitive eating contestant, and Chavez partners with Allie to prove where the mysterious silver ink notes have been coming from.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E15 - Ashes, Ashes
2.plot: A silver ink note threatening Maxine Roby's life is found at the crime lab, sending the entire CSI team to crack who is behind the notes and how they connect to other murder case.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E16 - We All Fall Down
2.plot: Medical examiner Sonya's life is in jeopardy when she is exposed to a mysterious poison as the CSI team races to find the antidote and the silver ink murderer who appears to be targeting the Crime Lab. Max's ex-husband, Daniel, returns to make sure that she and their son are safe.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E17 - The Promise
2.plot: When the body of a young girl who was killed over 40 years ago is discovered at the bottom of Lake Mead, Max Roby promises her mother, Raquel Williams, that the CSI team will finally find justice for her daughter. Also, Greg Sanders brings his quirky humor as he returns to the crime lab.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E18 - Fractured
2.plot: The CSI team investigates a bomb that detonated during a masquerade party for wealthy investors at the site of a new casino.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E19 - Dead Memories
2.plot: When wrongly accused former suspect Gene Farrow enters the Crime Lab covered in blood, wielding a cleaver and looking for Allie Rajan, the CSI team investigates his peculiar story about a macabre party with a fatal ending.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E20 - Shell Game
2.plot: The CSI team investigates a case where an ambitious investigative reporter is found dead at a peanut factory. Also, everyone in the crime lab buzzes over who Max will promote to day shift supervisor.

2.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S02E21 - Dying Words
2.plot: The CSI team investigates a murder case that hits close to home for Folsom. When he is forced to sit this investigation out, he does his own digging with help from Trey. Worried Folsom will do something he regrets if he gets his hands on the killer, the team find themselves racing to arrest the suspect first.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E01 - The Reaper
3.plot: With their respected colleague Josh Folsom under arrest for the death of Kahn Schefter – the man responsible for killing Folsom’s mother – the CSI team combs through every crumb of forensic evidence to determine his innocence or guilt.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E02 - Scar Tissue
3.plot: With a new piece of evidence at play, Catherine Willows reopens an investigation from her past that never got solved after a violent attack left her hospitalized. Internal affairs begins questioning Folsom.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E03 - Rat Packed
3.plot: The CSI team is called to investigate when the bodies of Frank Sinatra and Joey Bishop impersonators are discovered behind the drywall of a home construction project. Also, Folsom must face the review board about the future of his career.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E04 - Health and Wellness
3.plot: As the CSI team investigates the death of a man visiting Las Vegas for a health and wellness convention, a fiery explosion traps Allie Rajan in the basement of an abandoned hospital.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E05 - It Was Automation
3.plot: When a mechanic is found murdered in a dark factory, the CSI team investigates whether the perpetrator was human or a humanoid robot with an AI operating system.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E06 - Atomic City
3.plot: The CSI team investigates a radioactive crime scene that left a father and son dead.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E07 - Coinkydink
3.plot: When a fitness guru is found dead in a gym sauna and his soon to be son-in-law is found dead from an apparent hunting accident, the CSI team investigates to see if these deaths are unrelated tragic accidents or if they're connected.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E08 - The Artist Is Present
3.plot: The CSI team investigates when a plastinated nervous system is found hanging above a local car dealership. Also, Chavez and Max search for a missing source in their ongoing investigation of the robotics factory.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E09 - Heavy Metal
3.plot: The CSI team investigates the death of a local antique shop owner who died from an apparent gunshot wound that is missing one important clue - the bullet. Also, Max makes an important breakthrough in the ongoing case with Ocho from the robotics factory.

3.title: FR - CSI: Vegas - S03E10 - Tunnel Vision
3.plot: After an explosion in a bio lab, the CSI team races to determine which nerve agent left one of their own unconscious, while the others explore a dangerous underground tunnel to find another CSI who got kidnapped during the blast.

meta.plot: Au fil d'entretiens avec ses amis, d'autres joueurs et des initiés, ce docu-série s'intéresse à Aaron Hernandez, une star du football américain devenue un meurtrier.

1.title: FR - Killer Inside: The Mind of Aaron Hernandez - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Aaron's arrest for the inexplicable murder of Odin Lloyd shocks the sports world, and his life and relationships before stardom are explored.

1.title: FR - Killer Inside: The Mind of Aaron Hernandez - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Red flags arise during the athlete's college days in Florida, but the NFL still comes calling. Aaron's relationship with a criminal comes into focus.

1.title: FR - Killer Inside: The Mind of Aaron Hernandez - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: The spectacle of the first trial ends, and Aaron hires a celebrity lawyer for his second trial. Doctors study the impact of Aaron's concussions.

meta.plot: Ruth Clarke, a tough, supremely competent middle-aged Canadian maple syrup farmer has had it with being hemmed in by the polite, bureaucratic conventions native to her country’s identity. With the help of Remy Bouchard, a pint-sized local blockhead and an aging Mike Byrne, a low-level mobster, Ruth changes her fate — and transforms the future of her community with the theft of millions of dollars’ worth of maple syrup.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E01 - Petiole
1.plot: Canadian maple syrup farmer Ruth Landry hits back at bureaucratic exploitation by planning a syrup heist with low-level Boston criminal Mike Byrne and inside man Remy Bouchard.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E02 - Insertion Point
1.plot: As the plan for the heist comes together, Ruth is arrested for vandalizing the Association. Meanwhile, big city cop Valerie Nadeau is called in to investigate a murder.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E03 - Margins
1.plot: Ruth, Mike and Remy are involved in a white-knuckle race with the police to prevent them discovering evidence that would jeopardize the heist.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E04 - Teeth
1.plot: The gang reluctantly decide to use physical force to deal with a personnel problem, but Mike’s preference for a more permanent solution threatens to leave them all exposed to the police.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E05 - Blade
1.plot: As the police investigation into a local murder starts impinging on the plans for the heist, Mike’s past arrives with a vengeance and puts everybody in mortal danger.

1.title: FR - The Sticky (VOSTER) - S01E06 - Apex
1.plot: The long-delayed heist gets underway in the middle of a farmers’ uprising, and the gang must use all their ingenuity to improvise their way through a series of unforeseen disasters.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: When an elite assassin carries out a kill, it catches the attention of an intelligence officer, who starts to hunt him down.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: With his client backing out of payment, the Jackal's reputation is on the line, and he starts to plot his revenge.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Armed with the knowledge of his wayward client's identity, the Jackal tracks him down in Munich, determined to settle the score.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: His vengeance fulfilled, the Jackal flees Munich and tries to quell Nuria's suspicions. Bianca follows a new lead in her hunt.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The Jackal visits Norman with a special commission... but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on him.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Following his shootout with Bianca, the Jackal must escape his captors and regroup ahead of his next hit, as Bianca follows his trail.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The Jackal and Bianca head to Tallinn ahead of UDC's announcement. The Jackal must use all his wiles as he prepares to take his shot.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Bianca gains insight into a secret file. She learns the true identity of the Jackal and how he became a contract killer.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: With the release of River imminent, UDC believes himself safe. As time runs out, the Jackal must use all his skills to reach his target.

1.title: FR - The Day of the Jackal - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: A wanted man, the Jackal is on the run, desperate to get back to Nuria, but Bianca is given one last shot to bring him to justice.

meta.plot: Le Chacal, un assassin solitaire, insaisissable, et particulièrement doué, se fait payer grassement pour abattre ses cibles. Il se trouve confronté à un officier des renseignements britanniques, une femme aussi tenace que lui, qui va se mettre à le traquer. Une course passionnante à travers l'Europe commence.
Des chefs pâtissiers s'affrontent sur le thème de Harry Potter pour remporter la toute première Coupe des Sorciers de la Pâtisserie.

1.title: FR - Harry Potter : Les Sorciers de la pâtisserie - S01E01 - Platform 9 3/4
1.plot: Hosts James and Oliver Phelps welcome nine pairs of gifted professional pastry chefs and cake artists to Warner Bros. Leavesden Studios, home to the iconic sets of the Harry Potter films. For their first challenge, the bakers must create an edible showpiece that is at least 2 feet tall, includes at least one magical effect, and tells the story of their shared love of Harry Potter. Plus, each team member must make a tasting element that showcases their individual specialty. Expert culinary judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef decide which bakers will earn a ticket to board the Hogwarts Express train to the next challenge!

1.title: FR - Harry Potter : Les Sorciers de la pâtisserie - S01E02 - Gringotts Wizarding Bank
1.plot: The remaining teams enter the breathtaking world of Gringotts Wizarding Bank to face off in three head-to-head battles. Hosts James and Oliver Phelps ask the bakers to create 3-foot showpieces inspired by the resplendent main hall, the network of tunnels and carts, and the underground vaults. The creations must also include at least one enchanting effect and two tasting elements, plus a surprise hidden treasure! Judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef are joined by Harry Potter alumnus Warwick Davis to decide the winner, and one team will be sent home.

1.title: FR - Harry Potter : Les Sorciers de la pâtisserie - S01E03 - Diagon Alley
1.plot: In a salute to the famed Diagon Alley, hosts James and Oliver Phelps ask each team to create fifty identical handheld desserts, inspired by one of the many different shops, and feed them to a crowd of eager Harry Potter fans on the actual set. The bakers must present their desserts in a way that highlights an interactive, magical effect. The Potter fans will vote for a winner, while judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef decide which team must leave the competition.

1.title: FR - Harry Potter : Les Sorciers de la pâtisserie - S01E04 - The Forbidden Forest
1.plot: Inspired by the legendary Forbidden Forest outside Hogwarts, hosts James and Oliver Phelps challenge the baking teams to create a 3-foot-tall grand showpiece that celebrates the dark arts. Plus, one of the two tasting elements must have at least 10 layers and feature an enchanting effect that appears to defy gravity! Judges Carla Hall and Jozef Youssef are joined by Harry Potter alumna Evanna Lynch.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Three  years after the Bone Collector ended his career, Detective Lincoln Rhyme teams with NYPD officer Amelia Sachs to investigate a series of murders that suggest the killer's return and an unlikely team is born

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E02 - God Complex
1.plot: Lincoln and Amelia join forces to find a killer inspired by Greek mythology who is live-streaming murders. Meanwhile, the Bone Collector prepares a terrifying gift to celebrate Lincoln's return to work with his new partner.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E03 - Russian Roulette
1.plot: When a young woman from an insular Russian community who witnesses a murder comes to Lincoln and Amelia for help, the case takes a shocking turn when the mysterious murder is linked to a cold case - the tragic disappearance of a teenage girl. Meanwhile, the Bone Collector's 'secret' is discovered.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E04 - What Lies Beneath
1.plot: A bizarre murder at a university research site thrusts Amelia and Kate into the world of post-mortem forensics. Lincoln explores new possibilities with the help of Sellitto's friend.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E05 - Game On
1.plot: The Bone Collector challenges Lincoln, Amelia, and the team with a trifecta of victims across New York City. But as our team races to solve the clue trails before it's too late, Lincoln must come to terms with the Bone Collector's real target - his own ego.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E06 - 'Til Death Do Us Part
1.plot: Lincoln and the team hunt a serial killer who stages perfect murders by brilliantly framing suspects in what appear to be open and shut cases. The hunt hits home when one of Lincoln's closest friends is accused.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E07 - Requiem
1.plot: Lincoln, Amelia and the team are tasked with tracking down an anonymous bomber, targeting a string of buildings all across Manhattan. Meanwhile, the marriage between The Bone Collector and his wife, Danielle, reaches a terrifying crossroad.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E08 - Original Sin
1.plot: When a politician's teenage daughter is kidnapped for ransom, Lincoln, Amelia and the team race against time to rescue her before the unthinkable happens. Meanwhile, the team makes a startling discovery -- The Bone Collector's true identity...

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E09 - Open Warfare (1)
1.plot: Part one of a two-part finale, The Bone Collector's name and face are all over the news. Staying one step ahead of our team, The Bone Collector puts his ultimate revenge plan into action by targeting those closest to Lincoln, including Amelia.

1.title: FR - Lincoln Rhyme: Hunt for the Bone Collector - S01E10 - Mano a Mano (2)
1.plot: In the first season's terrifying conclusion, Lincoln is forced to save his son, Camden, by putting himself at risk and confronting The Bone Collector in a deadly face off, mano a mano.

meta.plot: Former NYPD detective and forensic genius Lincoln Rhyme was at the top of his game until a serious accident at the hands of a notorious serial killer forced him out of the field. When Amelia Sachs, an intuitive young officer who has a gift for profiling, finds herself hot on the killer's trail, Rhyme finds a partner for this new game of cat and mouse.

1.title: FR - Les Copains d'abord - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Les Copains d'abord - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Les Copains d'abord - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Les Copains d'abord - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Les Copains d'abord - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Deux familles, liées par une amitié avec un grand A, partagent absolument tout : les dîners, les vacances, les emmerdes et même leur palier ! Alors quand on leur demande de libérer leur appartement, ils vont tout faire pour continuer à habiter ensemble. Et si c'était la pire idée de leur vie ?

1.title: FR - Intercomédies : Un événement sportif - S01E01 - The Big Show Show: The Big Games
1.plot: The Big Show and his daughters do their best to help Cassy triumph over an arch-frenemy in a series of seriously silly family vs. family games.

1.title: FR - Intercomédies : Un événement sportif - S01E02 - Mr. Iglesias: Olympic Effort
1.plot: Inspired by the Olympics, Mr. Iglesias teaches his class about privilege — and the importance of playing by the rules — during an SAT prep class.

1.title: FR - Intercomédies : Un événement sportif - S01E03 - Ashley Garcia: Pasadena 2020
1.plot: Tensions mount as Tío Victor fights to reclaim his burrito recipe from a cross-town rival. Can a series of Coffee House Games put an end to the drama?

meta.plot: Les univers s'entrechoquent lors de cet événement spécial issu de quatre séries comiques mêlant visages connus, apparitions surprise et esprit de compétition.

Garde du corps hautement qualifié au passé criminel violent, Lemmer jouit d'une vie paisible à Loxton, en Afrique du Sud, où la tranquillité des lieux contribue à calmer son tempérament explosif. Mais quand un riche fermier réclame son aide pour faire sortir un couple de rhinocéros du Zimbabwe pour leur éviter une exécution, il a du mal à dire non. Très vite, Lemmer se retrouve en train de traverser la frontière à bord d'un petit avion, un sac pour le mal de l’air à la main et un fusil militaire à ses pieds. Bientôt, il regrettera la décision qui va l'exposer aux machinations de la CIA, aux méfaits du crime organisé, à la contrebande de diamants et à un complot terroriste d'envergure internationale.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Undercover informant Ishmael is shot trying to escape a suspected terror group. The Presidential Bureau of Intelligence agency suspects big plans in motion involving the Stadium. Milla tries to reconnect with her son Barend. Lemmer is flown into the bush and is collected up by a truck. At the border they pickup two rhino and Flea their handler. On the return they escape a gang looking for diamonds. Flea later disappears with the diamonds.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The hunt intensifies for Flea and the missing diamonds. Lucas Becker seeks payback for the car jacking. Shabangu threatens action against anyone getting in his way. The Presidential Bureau of Intelligence seeks help from CIA.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: After shooting Nkunzi, Lemmer steals a car and is pursued by the PBI. Having slept with Becker, Milla is in trouble when he comes to the attention of the PBI. When confronted Becker tells her of the hijacking but denies killing Nkunzi. Shaid continues to try and pull all the loose ends together. Janina suspects a mole in the PBI. Flea surprises Lemmer.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Still trying to prove CiA covert ops on SA soil, Milla is arrested and interrogated by Janina Mentz. Shahid is in hospital and Daoud is told about the missing laptop. Flea gets Lemmer to help with the diamond drop. Milla realises Becker is CIA. When Becker activates Shahids laptop it gives Daoud their position and an ambush ensues. The diamond drop goes wrong and there is a shootout as Daoud tries to get the plan back on track. The head of PBI suspends Janina and she meets with Lemmer.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: In the climactic finale, a raid is carried out, but the suspects have already disappeared. Some parties want to shut down the match but others insist it continue. The Bureau still suspect they have a mole, and the suspicions and actions of the various players keep turning unexpected corners.

1.title: FR - Trackers - S01E06 -

meta.plot: Une jeune fille de 16 ans disparait soudainement le jour de la fête de Castel Marciano, petit village tranquille du bord de mer où tout le monde se connait. Le commissaire de police local entame les recherches, mais lorsque le corps de la jeune fille est retrouvé en mer, un commissaire de la police criminelle de Trieste est envoyé sur place pour mener l’enquête. Le travail des deux policiers fait surgir des secrets bien gardés qui se cachent derrière la respectabilité de façade des habitants du village…

1.title: FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Le Silence de l'eau - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: William est le fils héritier du richissime propriétaire d’une chaîne d’hôtel internationale. Enfant gâté habitué au luxe depuis tout petit et n’ayant jamais eu à faire le moindre effort pour avoir ce qu’il voulait, tout change pour William quand le soir de ses 30 ans qu’il fête avec faste et décadence dans un hôtel de son père, il blesse le groom de l’hôtel après un pari stupide avec ses amis. C’est la goutte d’eau qui fait déborder le vase pour son père qui décide de lui couper les vivres en lui fixant un ultimatum, soit William remplace son groom, soit il le déshérite.

1.title: FR - Groom - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Groom - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Groom - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Groom - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Groom - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Groom - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Groom - S01E09 - Episode 9
FR - Groom - S01E10 - Episode 10

meta.plot: Dans les années 1940, un luxueux paquebot relie l'Espagne à Rio de Janeiro. À son bord, deux sœurs inséparables, un bel officier, et quelques cadavres mystérieux...

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E01 - The Albatross
1.plot: Two sisters bring a stowaway on board a ship traveling from Spain to Brazil, but the situation turns mysteriously fatal once they are out at sea.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E02 - The Rings
1.plot: Eva accuses Fernando of lying. When a passenger suddenly confesses to the murder, she and First Officer Nicolás suspect something is being covered up.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E03 - Sofía
1.plot: After a passenger's life is put in danger, the captain makes a bold decision. Carolina asks her uncle about a woman in a photo. Dimas mourns a loss.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E04 - Change of Destination
1.plot: Carolina hears shocking claims about her family. Nicolás worries the ship is headed into a storm. The captain's decision spurs Aníbal to take action.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E05 - The Storm
1.plot: In the midst of a turbulent storm, Dr. Rojas and Eva try to save Nicolás. Sebastián asks Dimas to help him win back Verónica. Luisa makes a discovery.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E06 - 527 L.
1.plot: The sisters confront their uncle with what they've deduced. Clara and Natalia work together on a cover-up. Eva tells Nicolás about the photo she found.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E07 - Three Hours
1.plot: Dr. Rojas takes drastic measures to save himself, leaving Eva scrambling. Pierre investigates the staircase death. Sebastián pursues Dimas's fuel idea.

1.title: FR - Alta mar - S01E08 - Cain
1.plot: On Carolina's wedding day, the Villanueva sisters are forced to face an upsetting truth about their family. Varela begins to suspect Natalia and Clara.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E01 - Casandra
2.plot: The ship rescues five castaways, including a woman named Casandra, who claims to have intuitive powers. Nicolás helps Eva search for her father.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E02 - From the Dead
2.plot: When Casandra's stories about ghosts start troubling Carolina, Eva begins investigating the new passenger. Natalia negotiates with Detective Varela.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E03 - Is Anybody There?
2.plot: Casandra conducts a séance and convinces more people about the presence of a ghost on the ship. Verónica feels conflicted. Natalia worries about Clara.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E04 - Change Hands
2.plot: Carolina starts to distrust Fernando. Eva attempts to learn more about Rosa Marín as strange events keep occurring. Dimas makes a startling discovery.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E05 - The Final Act
2.plot: Eva and Nicolás work together to uncover the truth about Casandra. Fernando's denials are met with doubts. Natalia starts discrediting Clara.

2.title: FR - Alta mar - S02E06 - The Other Side
2.plot: A letter and a new witness create more confusion about Rosa Marín's disappearance. Clara's grief and trauma overwhelm her.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E01 - New Course
3.plot: The Bárbara de Braganza prepares to set sail from Argentina to Mexico but, first, Eva is asked to help undercover agents find a man harboring a virus.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E02 - Masks
3.plot: When a serious crime occurs aboard the ship, Fabio warns Eva their mission is getting dangerous. Carolina becomes entangled in the mystery.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E03 - Groundswell
3.plot: As the crimes continue, Eva's involvement raises suspicions. Fabio distrusts Carolina. The crew begins to have doubts about the captain's abilities.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E04 - Chasing Shadows
3.plot: When Fabio gets detained, Eva tries to find Steve's photograph. Carmen's prisoner attempts an escape.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E05 - Locked Up
3.plot: Verónica seeks help for the bandaged woman traveling with Carmen. Nicolás wonders why the Bárbara de Braganza changed course. Fabio interrogates Ayala.

3.title: FR - Alta mar - S03E06 - The Eternal Sea
3.plot: The Bárbara de Braganza is attacked on multiple fronts just as the virus starts spreading and the passengers and crew attempt to procure a vaccine.

meta.plot: Dieu longtemps piégé dans la roche, Roi-Singe est délivré par une vaillante jeune fille qui recherche sept rouleaux sacrés pour sauver le monde des forces du mal.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E01 - Hope Must Never Die
1.plot: A girl uncovers a statue of the legendary Monkey King, but in order to release this ancient God from his stone prison she must first find his golden crown, a crown that has fallen into the hands of Demons.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E02 - The Edge Of Nowhere
1.plot: Having released the Monkey King, Tripitaka is shocked to find him indifferent to the Scholar's mission. Struggling to keep him on side, and still being pursued by Demons, she finds help in the unlikeliest of places.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E03 - The Journey Begins
1.plot: When Monkey and Sandy find themselves prisoners to Princess Locke, an escaped Tripitaka must convince Pigsy to abandon his mistress and help her rescue the two Gods.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E04 - The Monkey King Returns
1.plot: As the heroes set off to the Western Mountains they are intercepted by a gang of rebel bandits, who worship the legend of the Monkey King. When the leader discovers Tripitaka can control the crown he plans to capture Monkey.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E05 - The Breaking Ground
1.plot: Monkey, Pigsy and Sandy are glamoured by a mystical shamanic Demon and taken to a strange prison called the Breaking Ground.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E06 - A Crown Does Not Make You
1.plot: As Monkey travels further into his past Tripitaka must act quickly before he is lost forever. Using the sutra, she is able to find a way to go after Monkey, and in doing so unravels the mystery of his imprisonment.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E07 - Until I Met You
1.plot: As Tripitaka, Monkey, Pigsy and Sandy flee from the Shaman and his Demonic henchman, they seek shelter in a sprawling forest.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E08 - A Part Of You That's Missing
1.plot: Tripitaka leaves the quest to go in search of her mother, but Sandy won't let her travel alone, and the two journey to the North Water.

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E09 - In Search Of Tripitaka
1.plot: As Monkey and Pigsy hide in plain sight within the walls of Davari's palace, Tripitaka realises why Davari is so determined to translate the Sacred Scrolls. Can she stop him completing the translation before it's too late?

1.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S01E10 - A Hero To Save Us All
1.plot: While Monkey and Pigsy smuggle themselves into Davari's banquet, Tripitaka must work out the means of controlling the secret army of the Font Demons before Davari can reveal the extent of his new powers.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E01 - Graveyard of the Gods
2.plot: The Monkey King, Tripitaka, Pigsy and Sandy set out in search of the sacred scrolls. Demons learn of Monkey's return and vow to destroy him.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E02 - Quest for Knowledge
2.plot: At the Archive of Infinite Scrolls, Monkey and friends must solve — and survive — various riddles to gain access to the Scroll of Knowledge.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E03 - Village of Lost Children
2.plot: A shape-shifting demon uses her powers to assume Sandy's appearance, then kidnaps village children to make Monkey's group seem like the evil ones.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E04 - Puppet Master
2.plot: On the path to the Scroll of Creation, the demon Hagfish reveals who's pulling all the strings when he traps Tripitaka in his doll collection.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E05 - Finding Paradise
2.plot: The Monkey King and crew meet the mysterious Mycelia in a garden that's too good to be true before helping Pigsy avoid a flavorful but deadly fate.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E06 - Gladiators
2.plot: Monkey hatches a plan to retrieve the scrolls from the demon Gorm by posing as a human, while a dispute between demon generals leads to an epic battle.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E07 - Masterchef
2.plot: As the demons head to Lion Heart Rock to fight Monkey, Pigsy must sharpen his skills in the kitchen to impress General Khan as her personal chef.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E08 - The Real Tripitaka
2.plot: The scrolls foretold of only one Tripitaka ... but when Monkey and friends reach Lion Heart Rock, they discover that might not be so true.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E09 - The Spider Web
2.plot: The rebel army ignores Tripitaka's warning and ends up regretting it while on the battlefield. Hagfish creates a clone whose powers may match Monkey's.

2.title: FR - Les nouvelles légendes du Roi Singe - S02E10 - Shadow Boxing
2.plot: With the rebels scattered and the fate of the sacred scrolls still at stake, Monkey realizes he's his own worst enemy — in more ways than one.

meta.plot: Après une carrière réussie à Chicago, Elsbeth Tascioni, une avocate non conventionnelle, utilise son point de vue singulier pour coincer des criminels aux côtés de la police de New York.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When a college theater student is mysteriously found dead in her high-rise New York City apartment, Elsbeth immediately suspects foul play and enters a game of wits against the victim's popular theater director Alex Modarian.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E02 - A Classic New York Character
1.plot: After the loathed co-op board president  of a luxury pre-war building falls off her balcony to her death, Elsbeth and Kaya are called to the scene to dig for a lead when they meet Joann, a high-powered Manhattan real estate broker with huge clients and even bigger secrets.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E03 - Reality Shock
1.plot: When a larger-than-life reality TV star is found dead in her bathtub, Elsbeth and Kaya investigate the circumstances around her death to determine if it was an accident or murder. As they get deeper into the events surrounding her demise, they meet Skip Mason, the mercurial producer behind the popular, guilty-pleasure reality series "Lavish Ladies," who becomes a prime suspect after he is accused of going to dangerous lengths to concoct "good TV."

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E04 - Love Knocked Off
1.plot: Things turn deadly when elite matchmaker Margo Clarke goes to extreme lengths to keep her socialite client from finding out the truth about her perfect new husband. When the husband goes missing, Captain Wagner assigns Elsbeth and Kaya to investigate.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E05 - Ball Girl
1.plot: When the world's top tennis champion drops dead on the court, Elsbeth and Kaya home in on a rising tennis star and his competitive father and coach. Meanwhile, Captain Wagner begins to suspect Elsbeth's reason for being in New York goes beyond the consent decree.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E06 - An Ear for an Ear
1.plot: After one of New York's most sought-after plastic surgeons is found dead, Elsbeth has her eye on the victim's former boss, Dr. Vanessa Holmes, who she believes has motives that are more than skin-deep. Also, Kaya keeps tabs on Elsbeth's whereabouts as her investigation into Captain Wagner heats up.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E07 - Something Blue
1.plot: Elsbeth suspects foul play after a posh country club wedding meticulously planned by an esteemed, but shady, financial advisor, Ashton Hayes, ends in the golf cart death of the hapless groom. Also, Elsbeth plans a housewarming party with some old friends.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E08 - Artificial Genius
1.plot: Elsbeth goes to battle with artificial intelligence when Quinn, the young CEO of a location-based crime alert app, murders a journalist and uses her app to divert authorities and create a phony killer. Meanwhile, Wagner hatches a plan to fight the D.O.J. investigation.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E09 - Sweet Justice
1.plot: After hearing his favorite patron talk about being bullied mercilessly in college, the charismatic owner of an exclusive cocktail bar decides to seek revenge on her behalf, but his desire for justice leads to a deadly mistake, leaving Elsbeth and Kaya to connect the dots. Meanwhile, after learning that the DOJ investigation is close to an indictment, Elsbeth and Captain Wagner join forces to expose the real criminal.

1.title: FR - Elsbeth - S01E10 - A Fitting Finale
1.plot: When an unlikable fashion photographer is murdered in the middle of a fashion show, Elsbeth and the team suspect the killer to be either the photographer's college ex - and leading model of the show, Nadine or her jealous husband.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E01 - Subscription to Murder
2.plot: When a womanizing finance executive is found stabbed to death after a night at the opera, Elsbeth suspects an obsessed opera lover was driven to murder because of a ringing cell phone. Meanwhile, Elsbeth, Captain Wagner and Kaya must adjust to changes in the precinct as the consequences of Noonan's wrongdoing continue to loom.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E02 - The Wrong Stuff
2.plot: When a billionaire dies in an accident during a space training simulation, Elsbeth suspects a fellow magnate and wannabe astronaut named Neal is responsible. Elsbeth's day is turned upside down when she is reunited with a former colleague.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E03 - Devil's Night
2.plot: When a former child star turned party girl Mac wakes up on Halloween after a wild night on the town with no recollection of her whereabouts and afraid she may have committed murder, Elsbeth and the team retrace her steps to find the truth. Meanwhile, Captain Wagner must address low morale at the precinct.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E04 - Diamonds Are for Elsbeth
2.plot: While investigating the death of an employee at New York's most exclusive jewelry store, Elsbeth and the team uncover plans for a gala heist orchestrated by a chic VIP customer.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E05 - Elsbeth Flips the Bird
2.plot: Elsbeth investigates the death of a devious kitchen staffer after he causes havoc in New York's hottest restaurant and enrages one of America's most revered chefs.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E06 - Gold, Frankincense, and Murder
2.plot: Celebrity Christmas curators Dirk and DeeDee Dashers go from tinsel to tragedy after Dirk is killed in a freak accident and Elsbeth begins to suspect his wife is behind the death. Meanwhile, Elsbeth gets a holiday surprise courtesy of Wagner and Kaya.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E07 - One Angry Woman
2.plot: Elsbeth finally makes it as a true New Yorker when she is summoned to jury duty and lands on a murder trial where she faces off with the unusually difficult Judge Milton Crawford, who will prove a formidable adversary.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E08 - Toil and Trouble
2.plot: Elsbeth is thrown into the world of television after the showrunner of a long-running police procedural is brutally murdered in his office, and although it appears to be the act of a disgruntled fan, she begins to suspect the show's longtime star Regina Coburn, who yearns for artistic fulfillment. Meanwhile, Judge Crawford continues to be a thorn in Elsbeth's side.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E09 - Unalive and Well
2.plot: When a young man is found dead in his car, Elsbeth visits the holistic wellness center he'd just left, and begins to suspect its charismatic founder.

2.title: FR - Elsbeth - S02E10 - Finance Bros
2.plot: A murder in the world of finance leads Elsbeth to the company Hepson Capital, where she suspects Peter and Bill Henderson, twins known for their dominance in the hedge fund space.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E01 - Part One
1.plot: After she settles to the village where she was born, Dr. Busra meets some strange villagers. On the other side, teacher Selim finds a injured mute girl.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E02 - Part Two
1.plot: Dr. Busra sends injured girl back to her family. Teacher Selim suspects that she came to village for some reason and hears from some people that she is here for him.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E03 - Part Three
1.plot: Busra learns Selim's story and about his missing fiancee. This story makes her angry with Selim. Village headman Davud has 2 missing grandchild and deals with sorcery.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E04 - Part Four
1.plot: Ali is one of Selim's student and his mother is dying from cancer. Selim wants help from offended Dr. Busra and he gets. Davud's spell is broken and he wants help from a sorcerer woman.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E05 - Part Five
1.plot: Peasantry start to spread gossip about Dr. Busra. They believe that she is cursed. Stranger things occur around the fountain and one creature from that fountain roams inside the village.

1.title: FR - Possesions - S01E06 - Part Six
1.plot: Selim learns the truth about himself and his mother's death. Busra is no longer wanted by the village people. Busra and Selim get closer and this intimidates both.

meta.plot: Five women and Paris. Five ways of being, crying, screaming and laughing, missing the bus, grinding teeth, enjoying, not enjoying, drinking too much, growing up, resisting, making a child or not, do not wanting to go home... Five ways to love. Five everyday heroines across Paris, from the start of the school year to the Christmas holidays.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E01 - Back to school
1.plot: Marianne and Nora are faced with two very different, yet equally complex issues with their children. Mathilde is at a standstill with her boyfriend, while Allison struggles with fitting in. Elsewhere, Gil relaxes in a tropical paradise.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E02 - Loss of benchmarks
1.plot: Mathilde confides in her clients about a pillow-talk issue with Bruno. Meanwhile, a conservative Allison struggles with communicating with her liberal roommates. Nora and Julien have an argument over their son’s education, while Marianne questions her life choices. Gil makes a grand return to Paris.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E03 - White Nights
1.plot: Nora’s curiosity gets the best of her, and Julien struggles with rising to the occasion. Allison becomes infatuated with Leo, and she confides in her roommate about her marital guilt. Marianne continues to have doubts about her relationship with Fred, but after taking a peek at his phone, she makes a snap decision.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E04 - Call a cat a cat
1.plot: Marianne tries to move forward by taking driving lessons, and her first lesson gets off to a rocky start. Mathilde tries to fix the burnt bridge between her and her sister. Meanwhile, Gil finds herself at the centre of a family crisis, while Nora has a hard time adjusting back to normal after the accident.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E05 - Air
1.plot: Nora has a startling dream about Tony Lee Walker, and reality turns out to be much less exciting. Gil pays her estranged daughter, Manon, a visit. Meanwhile, Allison begins to come into her own and she slowly begins to shake off her strict beliefs. Marianne finds love in an unexpected place.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E06 - We drop the moorings
1.plot: Leo and Gil continue to clash with the legalities around his child, and Gil decides to blow off some steam. Meanwhile, Mathilde hears some unsettling news, and she begins to feel lost. In a heated argument, Nora tells Julien the truth, while Allison starts to break out of her comfort zone.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E07 - In the void
1.plot: Allison wakes up to a surprise, and her gradual self-transformation is starting to get to her head. Meanwhile, Mathilde moves back in with her parents, but something doesn’t feel right. Marianne goes on a romantic trip with Loic, but news from home turns her cold. Elsewhere, Gil runs into some trouble with her ex-husband, Jacques.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E08 - The cream of the crop
1.plot: Nora and Julien happen upon a new school for Theodore. Meanwhile, Marianne stands up against a creepy man. Mathilde, Marianne, and Fred share an awkward moment, while Gil meets with a worked-up Victoria. Elsewhere, Allison busies herself with work in an attempt to become more independent.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E09 - We float
1.plot: Mathilde has a change of heart towards men as she starts to mature, and her career soon begins to blossom as well. Allison and Sami struggle with their ambiguous relationship. Meanwhile, Gil and Jacques reconcile after he makes a startling confession. Elsewhere, Marianne’s situation with Fred goes from bad, to worse.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E10 - Surprise!
1.plot: Gil meets with her old friend, Tao, who intends to bring her home to Tahiti. Mathilde pursues a new love connection, but their timing is nothing short of inconvenient. Marianne wakes up on the wrong side of the bed, not ready to celebrate her 45th birthday. Nora begins her new assignment, while Allison’s time in Paris is coming to an end.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E11 - The race
1.plot: Marianne wakes up to yet another mistake, and she makes a startling confession. Meanwhile, Mathilde makes a difficult decision, while Nora tries to save her relationship. Elsewhere, Allison wraps up the last of her catering gigs, while Gil makes a surprising choice.

1.title: FR - Paris etc. - S01E12 - Love always
1.plot: Marianne makes a startling discovery about Fred, and she leaves to blow off steam. Nora and Julien start to face the facts about their dwindling relationship. Meanwhile, Gil’s family reunites in a time of crisis. Elsewhere, Allison makes her way home, where she hopes to start a new life.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E01 - Landman
