1.plot: A modern tale of fortune seeking amongst roughnecks and billionaires in the world of oil set in the boomtowns of Texas.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E02 - Dreamers and Losers
1.plot: Tommy deals with the aftermath of a tragedy at the oil patch. Dynamics are disrupted when Ainsley moves into the oil house

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E03 - Hell Has a Front Yard
1.plot: Cooper makes an impression at the oil patch. Things get complicated for Tommy when his ex-wife Angela comes to town.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E04 - The Sting of Second Chances
1.plot: After a rocky first impression, Rebecca comes to Tommy's defense. Cooper gets an unexpected call.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E05 - Where Is Home
1.plot: Tommy and his crew receive an unwelcome visit at the patch. Angela hosts family dinner at the oil house.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E06 - Beware the Second Beating
1.plot: Angela is caught off-guard when visiting Victor. The Norris family rallies around Cooper during his greatest time of need.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E07 - All Roads Lead to a Hole
1.plot: Tommy's cartel problem continues to escalate. Meanwhile, Angela and Ainsley get to know their community.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E08 - Clumsy, This Life
1.plot: Tommy gets connected to the National Guard. Rebecca becomes increasingly suspicious of Cooper.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E09 - WolfCamp
1.plot: After a health scare, Monty puts Tommy in a tough position. Cooper comes up with a plan.

1.title: FR - Landman - S01E10 - The Crumbs of Hope
1.plot: Tommy and Cami discuss whether to gamble or play it safe. The cartel makes a move.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E01 - Death and a Sunset
FR - Landman - S02E02 - Sins of the Father
2.plot: Cami is blindsided; Tommy warns Cooper about his shady entanglements.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E03 - Almost a Home
2.plot: Tommy confronts Cami about finances; Cooper's success draws attention.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E04 - Dancing Rainbows
2.plot: A tragic crash sets off a day of reckoning for the Norris family.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E05 - The Pirate Dinner
2.plot: Tommy juggles multiple crises; Angela throws a dinner to welcome T.L.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E06 - Dark Night of the Soul
2.plot: Tommy negotiates a risky offshore drilling deal as tensions rise with Cami.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E07 - Forever Is an Instant
2.plot: Tommy and Angela's getaway turns chaotic; Cami's plans face scrutiny.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E08 - Handsome Touched Me
2.plot: Tommy hires help for his father as Cami makes a risky move.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E09 - Plans, Tears and Sirens
2.plot: Angela rescues Ainsley; Cooper asserts his leadership at a drill site.

2.title: FR - Landman - S02E10 - Tragedy and Flies
2.plot: Amid the chaos, Tommy regroups with Cooper.

meta.plot: Dans l'ouest du Texas, les champs pétrolifères peuplent le paysage et régissent l'économie locale et la géopolitique. Tommy Norris est un landman, un employé par une compagnie pétrolière chargé de régler les problèmes et de dénicher de futurs terrains. Tommy est épuisé par les épreuves de la vie et par son travail. Père de de deux enfants, il est divorcé d'Angela. Ce redneck invétéré et cynique n'aime pas obéir aux règles et se laisse rarement dicter sa conduite1.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After a nuclear disaster caused by several terrorist attacks wipes out most of North America, residents of a small Kansas town have to come to terms with a very different reality.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E02 - Fallout
1.plot: The fallout from the nuclear blast in Denver will hit Jericho in an hour and Jake has to get the residents inside.  The official shelter is not adequate and Jake must find another shelter to protect them. Emily faces troubles of her own while being picked up by who she thinks are two officers.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E03 - Four Horsemen
1.plot: After seeing a broadcast via satellite from Asia, Jake gathers a group of people together for information gathering.  After finding out that there is information out there, Jake suggests having four search parties to go out to get a better understanding what is going on outside of Jericho.  The search parties set off in four different directions.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E04 - Walls of Jericho
1.plot: Jake finds a stranger who is sick with radiation poisoning and he must make a decision whether or not to help him.  The hospital’s generator is running out of gas and the residents find that their supplies are also running low.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E05 - Federal Response
1.plot: The children of Jericho start to return back to school. A power line that has fallen causes an accident on the playground when the power returns. Jake has an argument with his mother regarding a secret that Jake hasn't disclosed to his dad.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E06 - 9:02
1.plot: Hawkins must step in when an argument between Jake and an adversary becomes heated.  After an electromagnetic pulse leaves Jericho in the dark crime runs rampant. Later, Jake is held at gunpoint and is rescued.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E07 - Long Live the Mayor
1.plot: The slick gang leader Jonah bails Mitchell out of jail and agrees to give back the food that his bandits stole and agrees to keep out of Jericho. This plan strays off-course as Jonah negotiates new terms involving Jake and Emily.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E08 - Rogue River
1.plot: Jake and Eric head out of Jericho to the nearby town of Rogue River to try and acquire some medicine for their father.  While the brothers are at the hospital they encounter a combative group of individuals who call themselves Ravenwood. The brothers find that they’re trapped and must find a way back to Jericho.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E09 - Crossroads
1.plot: The residents of Jericho receive a visit from a group of questionable outsiders and they realize that they need to form a plan to keep the outsiders out. Emily has a dream about her wedding morning to Roger. She wakes up and realizes that he is probably dead.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E10 - Red Flag
1.plot: Supplies are dropped by air into Jericho and the Green's and Hawkins think that they know where they came from. Jonah Prowse returns to Jericho causing even more trouble.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E11 - Vox Populi
1.plot: Some of the residents of Jericho are concerned that Gray's actions may actually make Gray the new mayor. In other news, Mitchell claims that Jonah is the killer under much speculation.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E12 - The Day Before
1.plot: The lives of Jake and Hawkins are explored during this flashback episode. This episode begins 36 hours before the bombs went off. Sarah is introduced and is associated to Hawkins. Jake had been living in San Diego.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E13 - Black Jack
1.plot: Jake, his dad, Heather and Dale visit Black Jack to try and find the parts needed to fix the windmill. Sarah goes home with Hawkins against the rest of his family's wishes.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E14 - Heart of Winter
1.plot: While on a hunting trip outside of Jericho, Jake, Stanley and Mimi find themselves in a dangerous situation when they run into some strangers.  Meanwhile, Hawkins realizes that his family is in danger because of him. Emily and Roger work on their relationship.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E15 - Semper Fidelis
1.plot: After a company of Marines show up, the town of Jericho has hopes that life will finally start to return to normal. However, their behavior raises Jake's and Johnston's suspicions.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E16 - Winter's End
1.plot: After April collapses and goes into early labor, Jake makes Kenchy face his problems so that they can save April. The wind turbine arrives from New Bern but Heather does not return. Jericho makes a deal with New Bern to send ten of their people to New Bern to make more wind turbines as long as New Bern receives a percentage of their spring crop.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E17 - One Man's Terrorist
1.plot:
Roger gets desperate after Gray kicks the refugees out of Jericho. Dale and Skylar collect on some debts. Hawkins continues his quest to find Sarah's contacts.

Meanwhile, Hawkins begins the process of finding who's coming after him.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E18 - A.K.A.
1.plot: Jake finds that Hawkins has not been honest with the residents of Jericho about his past and holds him at gunpoint for answers.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E19 - Casus Belli
1.plot: Jake believes something more is wrong after Eric doesn’t return from New Bern. Jake and Hawkins go to New Bern and discover that Jericho is in danger.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E20 - One If By Land
1.plot: The hostility mounts between the citizens of Jericho and New Bern. A handful of residents of New Bern are shot and injured after getting caught trying to steal from the Jericho salt mine.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E21 - Coalition of the Willing
1.plot: The residents of Jericho and New Bern fight over precious resources and Gray  must make a tough decision after the streets of Jericho are bombed.

1.title: FR - Jericho - S01E22 - Why We Fight
1.plot: The battle with New Bern ensues, with Jericho residents out-manned and out-gunned, but not outsmarted. Jericho gains the upper hand but suffers a significant casualty. A friend of Jake's sends help from an unexpected source.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E01 - Reconstruction
2.plot: Following the battle of New Bern, Jericho begins the rebuilding process, while the Cheyenne government shows a particular interest in the town. While the dispute between Jericho and New Bern is being sorted out by the Cheyenne government, Heather returns. Meanwhile, an old friend of Rob comes to Jericho.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E02 - Condor
2.plot: Jericho gets ready for a very important visitor from the new Cheyenne government.  Meanwhile, Hawkins and Chavez work to find the new leaderships secrets.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E03 - Jennings & Rall
2.plot: The deadly Hudson River virus hits the area and a vaccine is being withheld from the citizens by a government official. Jake and the Rangers find a way to protect Jericho.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E04 - Oversight
2.plot:
Hawkins receives a call on from someone who knows who he is, where he is and lets Hawkins know exactly when he'll be caught.

Meanwhile, tragedy strikes.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E05 - Termination for Cause
2.plot: Jake and the Rangers take on Goetz and Ravenwood while a Jericho Ranger makes a choice that will alter his life. Meanwhile, an old friend comes to warn Heather that her loyalties to Major Beck have placed her in serious danger.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E06 - Sedition
2.plot: Following the Rangers' decision to take justice into their own hands, Major Beck goes to extreme measures to prove he's in complete control of the town, while Hawkins receives a call from Chavez telling him that it's time to transport the bomb.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E07 - Patriots and Tyrants
2.plot: Jake and Hawkins have one chance to expose the conspiracy behind the Cheyenne government to the independent Texas administration. However, getting there proves to be the most difficult part of their plan.

2.title: FR - Jericho - S02E08 -

meta.plot: Une catastrophe nucléaire plonge les habitants d'une petite ville du Kansas dans le chaos. Le pays est-il complètement ravagé ? Y a-t-il d'autres survivants ? Les doutes, les peurs et le désespoir commencent à gagner le petit groupe de survivants. Mais face à cette épreuve, le pire comme le meilleur peut surgir en chaque être humain...

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E01 - Kash with a K
1.plot: Coming off a devastating heartbreak, Maya travels to London for her best friend Ainsley’s wedding. While in town, Maya reconnects with her old college friends, Craig and Duffy, and finds herself thrust into their personal crises.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E02 - Hounslow
1.plot: Maya and Ainsley struggle to get over their respective breakups. After moving back home with his dad, Kash runs into an old friend he lost touch with. Zara makes a startling discovery that threatens her and Craig’s future.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E03 - We Broke
1.plot: After Ainsley’s mother cuts her off, Ainsley struggles to save her business. Maya attempts to find a job, but realizes it may be harder to escape her past than she anticipated. Duffy and Tabby’s new relationship hits a bump in the road. Kash’s acting ambitions are derailed by a family emergency.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E04 - The Winner Takes It All
1.plot: An impending funeral stirs up old feelings for Maya. Haroon pressures Kash to consider an arranged marriage. Gemma makes a difficult parenting decision. Duffy and Tabby take a big step in their relationship.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E05 - Love, Chalet
1.plot: Craig becomes obsessed with Zara's reality show.  Duffy tries not to screw things up with Maya.  Ainsley meets an exciting new client who could help save her business... as well as the client's horrible ex-husband, Bryce.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E06 - Lights, Camera, Wedding
1.plot: Ainsley doubles down on her fight with Craig; Duffy stumbles on a secret love letter that gives him hope; Kash considers taking the next step with Fatima.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E07 - The Sound of Music
1.plot: Maya feels guilty that her work is forcing her to interact with Ainsley's ex; Andrew and Tony 2 realize that they have an unexpected connection; Bryce tries to take his professional relationship with Ainsley to the next level.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E08 - Game Night
1.plot: Maya and Kash get to know each other behind Ainsley's back. Tony 2 realizes he and Andrew come from very different worlds. Ainsley and Craig play matchmaker, as do Gemma and Duffy.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E09 - Four Friends and a Secret
1.plot: Maya struggles to tell Ainsley about Kash. Fearing their relationship may be getting too friendly, Gemma fires Duffy.  Zara finds a way for Craig to reconnect with his daughter. Andrew has a surprising change of heart.

1.title: FR - Quatre mariages et un enterrement - S01E10 - New Jersey
1.plot: A year after Maya and Ainsley's blowup, the fractured friend group hopes that a wedding may be the perfect occasion for a reunion.

meta.plot: Quatre mariages et un enterrement suit quatre amis américains - Maya, Craig, Ainsley et Duffy - qui se réunissent pour un fabuleux mariage à Londres. Mais après qu’une révélation soit faite devant l’autel, leur vie basculent et ils devront surmonter une année tumultueuse. Des relations se forgent et se brisent, des scandales politiques sont exposés, la vie sociale londonienne gronde, les histoires d'amour vont s'enflammer et s'étendre, et bien sûr, il y a quatre mariages ... et un enterrement

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E01 - Get On It
1.plot: Bannerman Independent School’s known for its reputation and status. Only DGM, made up of four disparate but determined students, dare to reveal the truth.

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E02 - Get In Deep
1.plot: DGM get to work on a new mission, bringing down Ronny Kent. Olivia’s relationship with Donte is put at risk because of it.

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E03 - Get It Together
1.plot: Shocking news shakes the students of Bannerman to their core. Could DGM be in the frame for a terrible crime they didn’t commit?

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E04 - Get Over It
1.plot: Margot’s past comes back to haunt her, Bree’s forced to spend quality time with Rex, and DGM set to work investigating their number one suspect.

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E05 - Get What You Want
1.plot: Kitty is faced with a personal dilemma as the pressure mounts on DGM to expose the truth about a criminal, but not a murderer…

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E06 - Get A Clue
1.plot: Bree gets benched, Ronny’s memorial gig prompts many to seize the day and a suspect makes their way to the top of DGM’s list.

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E07 - Get Out of Hand
1.plot: Olivia’s secret is revealed, Kitty competes in a fencing match, Bree realises she has a boyfriend and a loss means DGM rethink their main suspect.

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E08 - Get Through It
1.plot: We flashback to when DGM began, while in the present they organise their most joyous prank yet. But then a suspect is arrested…

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E09 - Get It Out
1.plot: The Police are satisfied they’ve found the culprit despite a number of loose ends. Can DGM keep investigating when fractures threaten to tear them apart?

1.title: FR - Les Justicières - S01E10 - Get Justice
1.plot: DGM finally learn the truth, but not without great personal risk and devastating consequences…

meta.plot: En surface, Kitty, Margot, Bree et Olivia semblent n'avoir rien en commun - mais il y a une passion qui les unit: dénoncer l'injustice. Ils forment leur propre société secrète, DGM - ils ne se fâchent pas, ils ...
An antiquities expert teams up with an art thief to catch a terrorist who funds his attacks using stolen artifacts.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E01 - The Curse of Cleopatra
1.plot: A brilliant antiquities expert and a cunning art thief team up to catch a ruthless terrorist who funds his attacks through stolen treasure.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E02 - Code of the Hawaladar
1.plot: Danny poses as arms dealer Aiden Shaw in order to extract information on the location of terrorist Karim Farouk from a middleman who owes Shaw money. Also, Farouk obtains a clue to the location of the sarcophagus of Cleopatra, and Lexi bonds with Father Chuck when she seeks his help to decipher encoded information.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E03 - The Secret of Macho Grande
1.plot: A vital clue leads Danny and Lexi to an Austrian castle where the Germans may have hidden Cleopatra’s sarcophagus during World War II. Also, Fabi rescues Dr. Castillo’s kidnapped assistant, Max, and Hardwick reveals information to Fabi and Gwen about others who are searching for Cleopatra.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E04 - The Brotherhood of Serapis
1.plot: An unlikely ally reveals to Lexi that an Egyptian official has files which could lead her to Farouk. But in order to get to the information, she must enlist Danny in a dangerous plan while lying to him about the source of her lead. Also, Farouk takes a risk to get back the items he stole from the Pyramids, which he needs in order to fund his operations.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E05 - The Ghost Train of Sierra Perdida
1.plot: Danny and Lexi follow a clue to the mountains of Spain in search of a lost train car that may have been carrying the sarcophagus of Cleopatra when it disappeared. Also, Lexi crosses paths with antiquities dealer Simon Hardwick, who offers her new information on the Brotherhood of Serapis.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E06 - Escape from Casablanca
1.plot: Danny and Lexi must improvise in order to stay alive and out of jail when they’re stuck in Casablanca with both law enforcement and their enemies hot on their trail. Also, Hardwick’s personal investigation into the Brotherhood of Serapis lands him in a dangerous situation.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E07 - The Lunchbox of Destiny
1.plot: The FBI offers Danny and Lexi information that will help them in their search for Cleopatra, but only if Danny is able to get his incarcerated father, Patrick, to give up the location of paintings that he helped steal 20 years earlier. Also, Farouk deals with a loose end and takes a big step forward in his master plan.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E08 - The Shadow of Projekt Athena
1.plot: Danny and Lexi seek out a famed Nazi hunter whose research leads them to Montreal, where they suspect that the last of the Nazis who escaped with Cleopatra may still be alive and in hiding. Also, tensions between Gwen and Fabi come to a head.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E09 - The Wages of Vengeance
1.plot: After nearly capturing Farouk in a sting operation, Danny and Lexi enlist Hardwick to tap into his underworld contacts in hopes of cornering Farouk before he disappears again. Also, Gwen, fed up with Danny and Lexi’s tactics, arrests Father Chuck for aiding them.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E10 - Return of the Queen
1.plot: The trail of Cleopatra’s sarcophagus leads Danny and Lexi to the Bermuda Triangle, where a contact of Shaw’s offers assistance tracking down a smuggler’s plane that vanished years earlier. Also, Gwen attracts unwanted attention when she investigates a suspicious money transfer.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E11 - Legacy of the Father
1.plot: As Hardwick helps Danny and Lexi try to outmaneuver the Brotherhood, Danny learns shocking revelations that shatter everything he thought he knew about his past.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E12 - The Revenge of Farouk
1.plot: Secrets are exposed, fates are sealed, and Danny and Lexi’s lives will never be the same after Farouk’s master plan is put into action.

1.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S01E13 -

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E01 - The Soul of Genghis Khan
2.plot: As Danny and Lexi finish tracking down the last of Farouk's black market antiquities, they begin to make plans for their future. But their plans are derailed when the Vatican is attacked by terrorists. A person from Danny's past returns, leading them on a new hunt to recover one of the greatest lost treasures of Asia, the Spirit Banner of Genghis Khan.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E02 - Tales of the Golden Tiger
2.plot: The search for Kate Reece takes Danny and Lexi to Vietnam, where they reunite with none other than Aiden Shaw. Lexi's fighting skills are put to the test as the team infiltrates the dangerous Black Lotus - an underground fight club - where they learn about a vicious new terrorist.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E03 - Spoils of the Red Empire
2.plot: A visit with Simon in prison yields new information on the Spirit Banner's last whereabouts, sending the team to Russia.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E04 - Into the Forbidden Zone
2.plot: Danny and Lexi join forces with Levchenko's gang as they journey to Mongolia. Levchenko hopes to find the Spirit Banner for himself, even with the Great Khan's horde in hot pursuit.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E05 - Enter the Dragon Gate
2.plot: In search of the Spirit Banner, Simon attempts to make a deal, unaware that Lexi, Danny and Shaw are on his tail. What they uncover leads them to Hong Kong while Danny becomes increasingly concerned with Violet's control over Lexi.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E06 - Mystery at Poison Island
2.plot: With a trail of new clues, Danny, Lexi and Violet travel across a dangerous chemical wasteland in Kazakhstan to Aralsk-7, an abandoned bio-weapons facility. Meanwhile, Chuck begins his investigation about how the Vatican and the Spirit Banner are connected.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E07 - The Ravens of Shangri-La
2.plot: Danny enlists his estranged father, Patrick, in their quest for the Spirit Banner. Patrick leads them to a secret base in Laos, where he makes a startling admission to Lexi about the secret he's hiding from his son.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E08 - The Lost City of Sana
2.plot: After crash-landing in the jungles of Laos, Lexi is gravely injured, leaving Danny and Patrick in a rush to find refuge. Meanwhile, Chuck uncovers new information on the relationship between the Vatican and the CIA.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E09 - The Throne of the Khan
2.plot: While their team gets closer to unlocking the location of the Spirit Banner, Danny is forced to pick sides between Lexi and Kate.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E10 - The Secret History of the Mongols
2.plot: The recovered scroll's translation takes Danny, Lexi, Kate and Violet to the snowy tundra of Mongolia, with deadly results.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E11 - Raid on the Hidden Fortress
2.plot: Lexi is kidnapped after making a shocking discovery. Shaw uses an underworld contact to help him and Danny discover her location and face off against the Khan's interconnected gang of criminals.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E12 - The Year of the Rat
2.plot: The pieces of the Khan's end-game fall into place as Danny and Lexi must put their differences aside in order to stop the Khan and Simon before it's too late.

2.title: FR - Blood & Treasure - S02E13 - Showdown in Hong Kong
2.plot: Realizing they've taken the Khan's bait - and putting the lives of millions in jeopardy - Danny and Lexi come face-to-face with the Khan in one final battle above Hong Kong.

meta.plot: Six mois après l'invasion de la Terre par des extraterrestres, la planète est en ruine et les survivants humains tentent de faire face. Les résistants s'organisent pour combattre les forces ennemies. Tom Mason, un ancien professeur d'histoire, se retrouve propulsé en tant que commandant en second du 2ème Régiment du Massachusetts. Si le but des survivants est d'essayer de subsister, certains d'entre eux vont également essayer de comprendre la raison de cette invasion.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E01 - Live and Learn
1.plot: The world is left in tatters after a sudden, unprovoked and unexplained invasion by aliens, leaving the planet’s remaining human population to fight for survival against the occupiers. History professor Tom Mason has been named second in command for the 2nd Mass, but his real focus is on his three sons, one of whom has been captured by the aliens for an unknown purpose.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E02 - The Armory
1.plot: While scouting for supplies, Tom, Hal and their squad encounter a gang of marauders determined to get their hands on the 2nd Massachusetts’ weapons. Leading the gang is an ex-con named John Pope, who decides to use his hostages as bargaining material.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E03 - Prisoner of War
1.plot: Dr. Michael Harris joins the 2nd Mass with a theory about what might save the teenagers abducted by the aliens. But the plan could be derailed when Tom starts digging for answers to questions that have haunted him since the early days of the invasion. The 2nd Mass comes face to face with skitters and mechs when they attempt to rescue Ben.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E04 - Grace
1.plot: Tom and his team head out to track down more motorcycles for the 2nd Mass., relying on Pope to guide them to a good location. They hit the jackpot until they meet some skitters and harnessed teenagers at the bike shop. Back at the base, Dr. Harris and Anne disagree over the best method to gather more intelligence on the aliens.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E05 - Silent Kill
1.plot: Hal comes up with a risky new plan to rescue captured teenagers from the aliens, but it might require putting someone at risk. Meanwhile, a sudden tragedy causes Anne to make an enormous discovery that proves instrumental to Hal’s risky plan.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E06 - Sanctuary (1)
1.plot: Lt. Terry Clayton of the 7th Mass arrives with word that the aliens are on their way to attack the 2nd Mass. Clayton’s plan to lead the children to a safe haven while the adults remain behind to fight is met with some resistance from the parents, including Tom.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E07 - Sanctuary (2)
1.plot: Hal takes the lead fighting an unexpected threat against the children of the 2nd Mass. Anne has her hands full when Sarah goes into labor while the 2nd Mass base is being evacuated.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E08 - What Hides Beneath
1.plot: The 2nd Mass prepares to take the fight to the invaders with an assault on one of their bases. But Weaver’s increasingly strange behavior worries Tom that he might not be fit to command. Hal and Tom encounter a left-behind woman who employed a suspicious means of surviving the invasion, making it unclear whether they can trust her.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E09 - Mutiny
1.plot: As the 2nd Mass. prepares for a major assault, divisions within the ranks threaten to tear the group apart. Tom has difficulty processing the profound implications of Anne’s latest discovery.

1.title: FR - Falling Skies - S01E10 - Eight Hours
1.plot: With Weaver leading several squads of fighters against the aliens, Tom remains behind to help protect the civilians as they evacuate. But a major breach in security endangers both the soldiers and the civilians. Tom is confronted with a decision that may lead him to discovering what the aliens want with the captured teenagers, humankind and the planet.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E01 - Worlds Apart
2.plot: Weaver is still in command of the 2nd Mass, while Anne continues to serve as medic. They have seen many battles and are a much leaner unit now. Pope has taken command of the Berserkers, a renegade group within the 2nd Mass that Weaver doesn’t fully trust.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E02 - Shall We Gather at the River?
2.plot: Tom is haunted by memories of his time with the aliens. Pope plants seeds of doubt about him among the group. Ben’s hatred for skitters grows. The 2nd Mass locate a bridge that will help them cross the river to safety ahead of an impending attack.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E03 - Compass
2.plot: The 2nd Mass moves into an airport hanger. The Berserkers plan to get rid of Tom. While dealing with a loss of one of its own, the 2nd Mass receives a promise of hope from a mysterious visitor.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E04 - Young Bloods
2.plot: While on patrol together, Ben and Hal try to help a young boy and wind up having their bikes stolen. The hunt to recover them leads them to the discovery of something much bigger. Also, Matt is put in danger, and Weaver is reunited with a family member.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E05 - Love and Other Acts of Courage
2.plot: A familiar face returns to the 2nd Mass, but his intentions remain unknown. Meanwhile, a skitter is captured and brought back to the camp as a prisoner. And Hal bonds with Maggie as she begins to open up about her past.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E06 - Homecoming
2.plot: Hal stumbles across bodies of de-harnessed kids and finds someone from his past. Tom and Anne grow closer. And Weaver’s health deteriorates just as Tom discovers he may have been keeping important matters from the group in order to protect them.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E07 - Molon Labe
2.plot: Ben is endangered by someone who he thought he could trust. Tom captures another hostage. Weaver offers Matt a job to lift his spirits. The 2nd Mass are trapped in a basement and face a new enemy.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E08 - Death March
2.plot: The 2nd Mass pushes on to Charleston, but some are still grieving the group’s recent losses. Weaver learns more about Tector’s background before the invasion. And Matt begins to bond with a harnessed girl who was found recently.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E09 - The Price of Greatness
2.plot: The 2nd Mass meets new faces, while Tom comes across his former mentor, but it’s difficult to know whom to trust. Maggie realizes that Pope may not be sticking with the group very long. Tector embraces his military past.

2.title: FR - Falling Skies - S02E10 - A More Perfect Union
2.plot: When skitters approach the newly combined resistance force, the groups’ interaction surprises everyone. Meanwhile, Tom finds out life-changing news just as the 2nd Mass comes face-to-face with their most dangerous threat to date.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E01 - On Thin Ice
3.plot: Season three of Falling Skies opens seven months after the 2nd Mass arrived in Charleston. In the interim, Tom has been elected to political office, but he has his hands full as the resistance continues to battle the alien invaders. Tom’s decision to have the rebel skitters fight alongside humans creates tension and raises suspicions that someone may be feeding secrets to the enemy. Meanwhile, Hal struggles with nightmares that seem so real, he has difficulty knowing if he’s awake or dreaming. And Tom and Anne prepare to welcome their baby.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E02 - Collateral Damage
3.plot: With hostilities escalating between the resistance and the alien invaders, Tom calls on a nuclear specialist known as "The Rat King" to come up with a plan that will strip the aliens of their power. As suspicion continues to mount about a mole within the resistance, Tom and his leaders make a drastic decision that jeopardizes trust among the group. Anne, meanwhile, has a feeling that all is not right with her newborn.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E03 - Badlands
3.plot: The two-year anniversary of the alien invasion is fast approaching as the people of Charleston prepare for another potentially devastating offensive. A sniper attack by an unlikely gunman creates questions and doubts within the new government. Hal believes he knows the identity of the mole. And Anne’s concern for her baby continues to grow.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E04 - At All Costs
3.plot: After the people of Charleston defeat another alien attack with the help of new advanced weaponry, Tom is invited to meet with a powerful leader. While Hal wrestles with an invasive evil, Ben struggles with his identity and the notion of being human again. And Anne uncovers startling new information that puts everyone in jeopardy.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E05 - Search and Recover
3.plot: When a mission goes terribly awry, Tom and Pope must rely on each other to survive. Meanwhile, Weaver and company search desperately for two members of the 2nd Mass who have gone missing. And Marina takes matters into her own hands in Charleston, disregarding Tom’s authority.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E06 - Be Silent and Come Out
3.plot: Hal finally reveals his internal struggle to everyone, and it doesn’t bode well for the Masons. Lourdes experiments with a risky new medical procedure. And Charleston’s government sees a massive shift in leadership when a group breaks away on a search and rescue mission.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E07 - The Pickett Line
3.plot: The Masons run into trouble on the road when a family of outlaws intercepts their search-and-rescue mission. Meanwhile, looming doubts over the construction of a massive alien weapon ignite a conflict of interests. And an investigation to apprehend a killer on the loose hits a road block.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E08 - Strange Brew
3.plot: Things seem much too calm for Tom, making him suspicious of his surroundings. On his way back to Charleston, he makes a number of discoveries, some incredibly surprising and others utterly horrifying. Meanwhile, Weaver and Pope butt heads over how to handle the suspected mole.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E09 - Journey to Xilbalba
3.plot: Tom uncovers confidential intelligence about the heart of the alien operation. Meanwhile, Charleston prepares to mount an offensive against the Espheni, but a massive explosion brings the operation to a halt. And the identity of the mole is finally uncovered, but not before more blood has been shed.

3.title: FR - Falling Skies - S03E10 - Brazil
3.plot: When the 2nd Mass destroys a crucial Espheni base, a relentless enemy is taken down and the Mason family is reunited with those who had been lost. But the arrival of more interstellar players puts the fate of the Earth’s remaining survivors in doubt.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E01 - Ghost in the Machine
4.plot: On the outskirts of Charleston, just steps away from perceived safety, The Mason Clan and the remaining 2nd Mass suddenly find themselves under brutal attack by a new Espheni war machine – and a new, deadly creation unlike anything previously encountered. Divided like chattel and spread to the winds, The Masons must each forge new relationships and abilities to survive. myserial.ge

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E02 - The Eye
4.plot: The Espheni reveal their new plan to Tom, and he is faced with an impossible decision. Meanwhile, Weaver and Pope investigate a way out of the Espheni prison, while Matt struggles to hide his true allegiance from the “Team Leaders” at the Espheni Youth Camp. Elsewhere, Anne leads an exhausting search for her daughter Lexi, while Ben’s concerns about Lexi’s increasing powers uncovers a devastating secret she’s been keeping.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E03 - Exodus
4.plot: Tom and the 2nd Mass hatch an elaborate plan to escape the confines of the Espheni Ghetto. Meanwhile back in Chinatown, after learning from Ben that Lexi has been keeping a deadly secret, Maggie confronts Lexi publicly. At the Espheni Youth Camp, Matt tries to talk Mira out of a dangerous escape plan. While trekking through the woods with her guerilla fighters, Anne has a flashback to her time in the Espheni Tower with Karen, where a terrifying secret about Lexi is revealed.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E04 - Evolve or Die
4.plot: After breaking out of the Espheni Ghetto, Tom and the 2nd Mass seek refuge in a Volm hideout, where tensions run high between the Volm and humans. Tom sets off with Weaver and Cochise to find Matt, leaving Hal in charge. Meanwhile in Chinatown, Anne is reunited with Lexi, and comes to realize that the little girl she saw 6 months ago is now a grown woman.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E05 - Mind Wars
4.plot: After freeing Matt from the Espheni Youth Camp, Tom encounters two mysterious strangers in the woods, who attack his family before embarking with him on a violent journey. Hal faces almost insurmountable odds as he tries to lead the remaining Volm and 2nd Mass to a place of perceived safety. Lexi and Anne have a difference of opinions – resulting in dangerous consequences.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E06 - Door Number Three
4.plot: After months apart, Tom finally reunites with his family and the 2nd Mass. But the joyous reunion is cut short as Lexi undergoes a health crisis tied to her hybrid DNA. The crisis pits family members against one another as they fight over how to deal with Lexi’s illness. Anne goes to great lengths to save her daughter.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E07 - Saturday Night Massacre
4.plot: Lexi emerges more powerful and ruthless than ever. Tom and the 2nd Mass must work together with the Volm to hold off the invading Espheni forces in what becomes the bloodiest battle of the series.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E08 - A Thing With Feathers
4.plot: The 2nd Mass picks up the pieces after a devastating alien attack leaves Maggie fighting for her life…and Hal fighting for Maggie. Meanwhile, Tom and Dingaan are cut off from the rest of the group, buried under tons of rubble, where they must rely on an Enemy Ship to rescue them.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E09 - Till Death Do Us Part
4.plot: While members of the 2nd Mass attempt to dig out a shot-down Beamer, Tom and a small team follow the Volm to a supply cache in search of equipment to expedite the process. Along the way, they encounter a friend, and must decide whether or not to trust her. Back at camp, Maggie and Ben grow closer as he teaches her to hone her new skills, while Pope and Sara continue to clash, resulting in a fight from which they may never recover.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E10 - Drawing Straws
4.plot: Tom and the remnants of the 2nd Mass learn to pilot a Beamer as part of their plan to destroy the Espheni Power Core, and the group draws straws to see who will embark on the dangerous mission. The threat of death hanging over everyone triggers long-simmering confrontations between many of our main characters, ultimately bringing the 2nd Mass closer together.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E11 - Space Oddity
4.plot: Tom’s mission to destroy the Espheni Power Core is complicated by Lexi’s return. Lexi is forced to take extreme measures to save her father’s life – and her own – after a Beamer malfunction. Meanwhile, the 2nd Mass fears an impending Espheni strike by the scorched Overlord.

4.title: FR - Falling Skies - S04E12 - Shoot the Moon
4.plot: With the weight of humanity’s survival on Tom and Lexi’s shoulders, they must defeat Tom’s mortal enemy and find a way to destroy the omnipotent Espheni Power Core. Meanwhile, a new, terrifying Espheni Bomb is dropped onto Chinatown, immobilizing the 2nd Mass and preparing them for Human Skitterizaton.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E01 - Find Your Warrior
5.plot: Tom's life hangs in the balance as his beamer drifts into space. Tom encounters a surprising guest.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E02 - Hunger Pains
5.plot: A surprise skitter attack leaves the 2nd Mass without food. In desperation, Maggie, Ben, Pope, and Sara go on a dangerous mission hoping to find supplies.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E03 - Hatchlings
5.plot: The 2nd Mass discovers the source for the seemingly endless supply of enemy forces. Hal disobeys his father.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E04 - Pope Breaks Bad
5.plot: A mission to procure vehicles and fuel goes awry, and a desperate Pope takes things into his own hands. Cochise shares troubling news with Anne.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E05 - Non-Essential Personnel
5.plot: The 2nd Mass leaves Chinatown en route to what they hope will be the final Espheni battle. Along the way, they encounter a deranged and desperate gunman who takes a hostage. Meanwhile, Tom sets off to rescue Hal.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E06 - Respite
5.plot: Injured, Tom takes refuge with a unique family who has distanced themselves from the fight, giving him a glimpse of life without war. Hal and Isabella's romance grows as they search for a missing Tom. Meanwhile, The 2nd Mass locates an Espheni device that could be a linchpin to winning the war if they can figure out how to use it. And Maggie makes a decision that has consequences for her and the entire 2nd Mass.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E07 - Everybody Has Their Reasons
5.plot: The 2nd Mass arrives at a safe haven. As the two groups make plans for the final assault on the Espheni, the 2nd Mass begins to realize that things aren't exactly as they seem.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E08 - Stalag 14th Virginia
5.plot: Weaver discovers a shocking truth about an old friend and must decide how to best protect the 2nd Mass. Maggie and Isabella are forced to work together.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E09 - Reunion
5.plot: Tom gains a powerful new weapon. Ben puts his life on the line to extract enemy plans. Pope discovers that Tom is alive. Meanwhile, the 2nd Mass must reassess their situation when an unexpected visitor appears.

5.title: FR - Falling Skies - S05E10 - Reborn
5.plot: The final standoff brings the Masons, the 2nd Mass, and their new allies into the bowels of an iconic American location, wrought with new and unpredictable obstacles. Despite great loss along the way, they must persevere with hopes of once and for all reclaiming Earth and humanity.

meta.plot: Des entretiens avec des amis, la famille et Sally McNeil elle-même retracent le mariage mouvementé d'un couple de culturistes - et sa fin choquante dans un meurtre de la Saint-Valentin.

1.title: FR - Killer Sally - S01E01 - Valentine's Day
1.plot: Sally and Ray McNeil meet and fall in love via a shared interest in bodybuilding. But their seemingly happy marriage masks a life of violence and abuse.

1.title: FR - Killer Sally - S01E02 - The Death of Mr. California
1.plot: After Ray's death, lurid details of the McNeils' volatile marriage emerge and Sally's claims of self-defense meet new scrutiny.

1.title: FR - Killer Sally - S01E03 - The People vs. Sally McNeil
1.plot: Sally's trial attracts a media frenzy when it begins on Valentine's Day, 1996. Later, following Sally's testimony, the jury renders a verdict.

1.title: FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E01 - Winner's Blood
1.plot: Joe's father passes away, and Joe's inheritance depends on Joe beating his rival in the upcoming Competitive Aerobics Championship.

1.title: FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E02 - The Dancing Criminals
FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E03 - What's in the Box
FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E04 - Lycra-Virgin
FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E05 - Paybacks a Bitch
FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E06 - The Double-Double Cross
FR - Let's Get Physical - S01E07 - Angel Barry

meta.plot: Middle-aged slacker Joe Force inherits the family gym from his late father, who was the “Godfather of Aerobics.”

When Andrea, a damage regulator from Benthos Oil, is sent out to Rig 45 two days before Christmas to investigate a fatal accident, the rig is hit by a hurricane and all communications lost. Soon, the crew realize that the accident is in fact a murder, and they now know that they are in real danger.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: It is right before Christmas and Andrea is called in by an insurance company to investigate a death on board of an oil rig. Once aboard the rig, Andrea starts suspecting something more sinister may be going on.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: A hurricane has hit the area and the crew is stuck on the rig with no help in sight. After a second accident Andrea is convinced there is a saboteur on board, but getting answers is turning out to be difficult as some secrets are uncovered.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: There has been a murder on the rig, confirming the suspicions that someone on board has been causing the accidents. The rig has been damaged and disconnected from the outside world, increasing tensions between the crew members.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The rig has been damaged so severely that the crew are forced to turn the power off in order to secure it as the investigation goes on. The number of victims increase as the crew are working to re-establish contact with the outside world.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: The remaining crew is split into two groups as everyone suspects each other of being the murderer. Tensions rise and as the crew buckles down, waiting for help to arrive, they realize they must start talking in order to solve the mystery.

1.title: FR - Rig 45 - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: A game of cat and mouse erupts among the people on the rig as the hurricane seems to be moving away from the area. Who is guilty and who will survive until rescue are able to reach the rig?

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E01 - The Investigation
2.plot: After an accident that takes the life of a worker on an oil platform, a security researcher begins to suspect that the situation is more sinister than it seems.

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E02 - She's Out There
2.plot: Bentos employees refuse to cooperate with Emma and Trevor, which raises suspicions about employee motivation; Trevor begins to doubt Emma's ability to lead the investigation.

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E03 - Someone Else on Board
2.plot: A murder aboard the platform confirms suspicions that someone is behind the accidents; tensions between crew members increase.

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E04 - One Of Us
2.plot: The crew does its best to reestablish communications with the outside world; the number of victims increases.

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E05 - The Escape
2.plot: The remaining crew members are separated into two groups, and suspicions abound about who is the killer.

2.title: FR - Rig 45 - S02E06 - Settlement at Sea
2.plot: The hurricane begins to move away from the area, and a dangerous chasing game begins on board the platform among the crew members.

meta.plot: Ashley Garcia, 15 ans, déménage à l'autre bout des États-Unis afin de poursuivre une carrière dans la robotique, tout en explorant l'univers infini de l'adolescence.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E01 - Breath Mint
1.plot: Ashley’s journey begins as she settles in with Tío Victor, reconnects with an old friend and attempts to dabble in romance — for better or worse.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E02 - Spin, Doctor
1.plot: Brooke invites Ashley to a girls’ night full of gossip, glamour … and occasional panic. Elsewhere, Tío Victor recruits Stick for an impromptu mission.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E04 - The Search for Intelligent Life
1.plot: Stick searches for an out after Tad volunteers to be his Quiz Bowl partner. Meanwhile, Tío Victor takes an interest in one of Ashley's mentors.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E05 - No Scientific Basis Whatsoever
1.plot: Tío Victor works on his image for a Sports Illustrated interview. Stick shares some peculiar research. Ashley grapples with her feelings for Tad.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E06 - Me Caes Bien
1.plot: After Brooke fails to show support, Ashley forges a new bond. Victor and Ava make a secret plan. Stick’s feelings become a topic of discussion.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E07 - Hasta La Vista, Baby
1.plot: As Tad battles a mysterious injury, Victor preps for Ava’s next chapter. Stick agrees to help Brooke with a project — and Ashley’s feelings evolve.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E08 - Go to a High School Dance
1.plot: Ashley indulges in glitz and glam when she attends the Fall Ball dance. But who will be her date? Elsewhere, Victor revisits an old passion.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E09 - In Tad We Trust
1.plot: After a sweet night of surprises, Ashley attempts to find a new normal with Tad … and Bella. Elsewhere, Stick struggles with Brooke's big plans.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E10 - Failure Is Not an Option
1.plot: In hopes of joining a JPL mission, Ashley presents Ichabod, her new robot. Brooke revamps her fashion T-shirt line. Tío Victor stirs up drama.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E11 - Unintended Consequences
1.plot: Tío reignites an old feud with NFL legend Terrell Owens. Brooke finds a new passion. Ashley and Tad have a dazzling — and disastrous — date night.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E12 - Count Me In
1.plot: After Tad’s tumble, Ashley plays caretaker and grapples with a guilty secret. Stick perfects his fancy footwork for school musical auditions.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E13 - Rewriting Girl Code
1.plot: The musical cast list is officially posted — and full of surprises for Brooke, Tad and Stick. Elsewhere, Tío Victor meets his new office mate.

1.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S01E14 - Another Trip Around the Sun
1.plot: It’s Ashley’s 16th birthday! But a last-minute musical dilemma leaves her feeling less than festive. Can an unexpected twist turn the day around?

2.title: FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S02E01 -
FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S02E03 -
FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S02E04 -
FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S02E05 -
FR - Ashley Garcia : Géniale et amoureuse - S02E06 -

meta.plot: La famille idéale et le duo mère-fille qui va chambouler leur vie...

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E01 - The Spark
1.plot: Artist Mia Warren and her daughter arrive in Shaker Heights, OH.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E02 - Seeds and All
1.plot: Elena’s relationship with Mia grows increasingly strained.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E03 - Seventy Cents
1.plot: At Mirabelle McCullough’s first birthday, Mia makes a bombshell discovery.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E04 - The Spider Web
1.plot: Mia and Elena find themselves at odds, resulting in an epic showdown.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E05 - Duo
1.plot: Lexie finds out upsetting news and turns to Pearl for help.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E06 - The Uncanny
1.plot: In 1981, Mia makes a decision that changes the course of her entire life.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E07 - Picture Perfect
1.plot: Izzy’s relationship with Elena reaches a boiling point.

1.title: FR - Little Fires Everywhere - S01E08 - Find a Way
1.plot: The jury reaches a verdict which triggers a series of explosive events.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Kaye's world is shaken up when her sister Ruby returns with her boyfriend Michael. Eleswhere, as night falls, the Donahue family prepare nervously for the formidable race ahead.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: The race is on and the road ahead is packed with dangers. The Donahues face up to a huge setback. Then, things go wrong on the Thames.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: London's huge wall presents the racers with another massive obstacle, while the General and Faith hatch a sneaky plan and Jenny grows increasingly anxious.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Roman confesses to Meg the real reason they joined the deadly street race. Kaye and Michael clash over whether to fight or flee.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Lou and Hanmei crash into each other while vying for position on a country lane, forcing them to venture to a nearby farm to search for spare parts.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The ambulance, the hot hatch and the Volvo all chase an impenetrable Brookeheath prison truck containing some important cargo, heading towards the badlands of Manchester.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: The remaining racers near the finish line as they approach the Highlands, and Kaye reveals a secret she has been keeping for years when she makes a shocking confession to Michael.

1.title: FR - Curfew - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: An act of sabotage causes all hell to break loose. From the chaos, the final contenders emerge. Season finale.

meta.plot: Afin de remporter le prix ultime qui leur permettrait de se libérer du gouvernement totalitaire dans lequel ils vivent et qui leur impose chaque jour un couvre-feu, des gens tout ce qu'il y a de plus normal s'affrontent dans une course de voiture effrénée et illégale entre Londres et l'Ecosse.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E01 - Honour Amongst Thieves
1.plot: British police officer DC Miranda Blake is reluctantly paired with wise-cracking German detective Max Winter to investigate a criminal gang based in Mallorca.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E02 - King of the Mountains
1.plot: When top Mallorcan cyclist Esteban Domenech disappears during a routine training session, Miranda and Max take advantage of Ines's absence to investigate.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E03 - The Oligarch's Icon
1.plot: When the famous icon of St Nicholas is stolen by a masked assailant in front of a shocked crowd, Miranda and Max enter the world of Russian oligarchs.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E04 - Number One Fan
1.plot: When a supermodel goes missing, Max and Miranda sashay into the world of fashion and design to try to discover how someone can vanish from a moving train.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E05 - Sour Grapes
1.plot: Miranda and Max head out into wine country to investigate the killing of a dog at one of Mallorca's most famous vineyards. It transpires that the shooting is just one of an increasingly dramatic series of threats faced by property owner Hans Webber.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E06 - To Kill a Stag
1.plot: When a groom-to-be is found dead in the swimming pool of a luxury villa, Miranda and Max believe it's the work of a prostitute who stuns her clients and then robs them.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E07 - Friend Henry
1.plot: Miranda and Max investigate the death of a world-famous DJ after he plays at Mallorca's most popular nightclub, leading the detectives to investigate a sophisticated drug network.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E08 - Death in the Morning
1.plot: The brutal murder of a famous British author and anti-bullfighting campaigner brings Max and Miranda to Cazador in the wild interior of Mallorca.

1.title: FR - Mallorca - S01E09 - Mallorca's Most Wanted
1.plot: An apprehended drug dealer tips off Miranda and Max that a fugitive on Mallorca's most wanted list is back on the island to visit his dying father.

meta.plot: Détachée pour une mission de courte durée, Miranda Blake, une inspectrice anglaise, accro à son travail et sans une once d’humour, est contrainte de prolonger sa collaboration sur l’île de Majorque ; pire encore, elle se voit imposer comme partenaire Max, un flic allemand, débonnaire et jovial. Ce tandem mal assorti s’occupe des affaires impliquant des ressortissants étrangers.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E01 - True Story with Jonathan Cohen
1.plot: Natoo and Ludovik receive Jonathan Cohen. The comedian confides with humor in the incredible and 100% true story that happened to him in Los Angeles.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E02 - True Story with Geraldine and Olivier Nakache
1.plot: Norman and Cyprien receive Géraldine and Olivier Nakache. The director and the actress tell the worst experience of their lives.The story takes place before the two movie stars become famous.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E03 - True Story with Zahia
1.plot: McFly and Carlito receive Zahia. The apprentice actress tells the insane story full of twists and turns that enabled her to live her dream, to participate in the Venice Carnival.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E04 - True Story with Julie Gayet
1.plot: Norman and Cyprien receive Julie Gayet. The actress and film producer tells the incredible and 100% true story that allowed her to realize her dream, to shoot in a genre film.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E05 - True Story with Antoine de Caunes and José Garcia
1.plot: McFly and Carlito receive Antoine de Caunes and José Garcia. The legendary duo tells the story of a merciless battle that has pitted them for 20 years.

1.title: FR - True Story Avec - S01E06 - True Story with Fianso
1.plot: Natoo and Ludovik receive Fianso. The comedian rapper tells the amazing story of his first fan, the one who inspired him the title of one of his biggest successes.

2.title: FR - True Story Avec - S02E01 - Episode 1
FR - True Story Avec - S02E02 - Episode 2
FR - True Story Avec - S02E03 - Episode 3
FR - True Story Avec - S02E04 - Episode 4
FR - True Story Avec - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - True Story Avec - S02E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Six des plus célèbres YouTubeurs français Natoo, Cyprien, Norman, Ludovik, Mcfly & Carlito, vont donner la parole à des célébrités venues leur raconter une histoire étonnante, surprenante, drôle et - surtout - vraie, qui n’a encore jamais été révélée au grand public.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E01 - Hell Week (1)
1.plot: At Belgrave University, Jack pledges a secret society steeped in mystery and magic. Soon, a series of strange murders sets the campus on edge.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E02 - Hell Week (2)
1.plot: Pops shares a theory about the attacks. Jack and Alyssa try to keep an eye on the other pledges. At the Temple, Jack encounters a notorious figure.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E03 - Introduction to Ethics (1)
1.plot: Jack learns he's been selected for a rival secret society. Later, he gets a lesson in magic -- and discovers that every spell has a price.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E04 - Introduction to Ethics (2)
1.plot: Jack proposes an alliance with the Knights, and Randall teaches him how to harness his powers. Meanwhile, Edward takes Alyssa under his wing.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E05 - Homecoming (1)
1.plot: As the Order prepares to conduct a dangerous, sinister spell, the Knights enlist Jack to sabotage their plans.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E06 - Homecoming (2)
1.plot: While the Order hunts for werewolves on campus, Jack and Alyssa flee with Renee's necrophone, a tool used to communicate with the dead.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E07 - Undeclared (1)
1.plot: Alyssa confronts Jack about his secret. Headmistress Vera questions Edward about the Vade Maecum and sends Gabrielle on a truth-seeking mission.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E08 - Undeclared (2)
1.plot: Alyssa helps the Knights search for Randall and stumbles upon a doctor's twisted experiment. Edward is visited by the Vade Maecum's previous owner.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E09 - Finals (1)
1.plot: Consumed by ambition, Edward clashes with Vera -- and Alyssa is caught in the middle. Jack's brush with the Vade Maecum ignites a painful ordeal.

1.title: FR - The Order - S01E10 - Finals (2)
1.plot: The Knights plot to thwart Edward's plan by kidnapping his son. Gabrielle and the Hermetic Counselor interrogate Lilith.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E01 - Free Radicals (1)
2.plot: After having the Knights' memories wiped, Vera plans to induct them into the Order. But her new pledges prove hard to control.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E02 - Free Radicals (2)
2.plot: While the Knights look for ways to protect themselves, Alyssa gives Jack a job: find the "magic tourist" who's been wreaking havoc on campus.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E03 - Fear Itself (1)
2.plot: The Knights raid the Order’s magic vault, Alyssa confides in Randall about her fading powers, and romance blooms between Lilith and Nicole.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E04 - Fear Itself (2)
2.plot: Vera leads the Order in a spell to summon Rogwan, a powerful demon. But when her plan goes awry, she needs the Knights on her side.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E05 - The Commons (1)
2.plot: Vera negotiates a deal with the Sons of Prometheus — a rival magic society — and sends Jack and Alyssa to their compound as hostages.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E06 - The Commons (2)
2.plot: Amid a standoff with the Prometheans, Alyssa goes into withdrawal. Meanwhile, Randall, Hamish and Gabrielle track professor Foley.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E07 - Spring Outbreak (1)
2.plot: The Knights weigh whether to join the Order. Alyssa suspects that her feelings for Jack might be blocking her magic. Kepler pulls rank on Vera.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E08 - Spring Outbreak (2)
2.plot: The Knights try to prevent a strange affliction from spreading. Kepler schemes to strip Vera of her power, and Alyssa searches Vera's house.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E09 - New World Order (1)
2.plot: Nicole finds a spell that could bring back Lilith, but it hinges on Alyssa’s cooperation. Jack tries to broker a deal between Vera and Salvador.

2.title: FR - The Order - S02E10 - New World Order (2)
2.plot: As chaos reigns, the Knights must convince Vera and Alyssa to work together to seal the eruption and save Lilith from the demon realm.

meta.plot: Jack Morton, nouvel élève à l'Université, rejoint une société secrète légendaire appelée l'Ordre. Il est alors plongé dans un monde magique, de monstres et d'intrigues.
Gosse de riches, Payton est persuadé depuis toujours qu'il sera président. Mais avant la Maison-Blanche, un paysage politique encore plus perfide l'attend : le lycée.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: After a charismatic candidate joins the race for student body president, Payton searches for a running mate who will make him seem more authentic.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E02 - The Harrington Commode
1.plot: Amid escalating concerns about his vice presidential pick, Payton gets plunged into a family crisis that stokes long-seething resentments.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E03 - October Surprise
1.plot: While Payton plays hardball with Harvard admissions, shocking betrayals and a scandalous videotape take the election to a new level of ruthlessness.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E04 - Gone Girl
1.plot: With the election just days away, Payton faces tough questions about just how far he's willing to go to defeat his opponent.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E05 - The Voter
1.plot: Payton makes an eleventh-hour push to lock down the school's undecided voters, including one student who has other things on his mind besides politics.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E06 - The Assassination of Payton Hobart
1.plot: As Payton confronts hard truths about his ambition following an election day bombshell, he reconnects with a former ally -- and becomes a target.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E07 - The Assassination of Payton Hobart: Part 2
1.plot: Payton faces his darkest hour and the fight of his life as transgressions are revealed, backs stabbed and confessions made.

1.title: FR - The Politician - S01E08 - Vienna
1.plot: Payton reevaluates his life after a reckoning, but when a window of opportunity opens, he grapples with a big decision about his political aspirations.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E01 - New York State of Mind
2.plot: Frustrated with his polling numbers, Payton goes to Georgina for help as he weighs using his opponent's hush-hush love life to score political points.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E02 - Conscious Unthroupling
2.plot: As Astrid pumps Payton for details about their long-ago dalliance, Hadassah hatches a cover-up for Dede, and McAfee seeks a healthier work-life balance.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E03 - Cancel Culture
2.plot: Payton scrambles to salvage his campaign when he suffers a credibility crisis over a compromising photo and his commitment to fixing climate change.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E04 - Hail Mary
2.plot: McAfee's prurient sleuthing uncovers an explosive secret, Payton's tangled affairs turn fruitful, and Georgina's link to Tino proves problematic.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E05 - The Voters
2.plot: On Election Day, a mother and daughter argue over whether Payton or Dede is the better pick, motivating each to spend time with her chosen candidate.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E06 - What's in the Box?
2.plot: A shocking ballot-box twist positions Payton at a moral and ethical crossroads that could define the rest of his political career — and life.

2.title: FR - The Politician - S02E07 - Election Day
2.plot: With the senate race up for grabs, Payton and Dede prepare for an unconventional showdown, but a last-minute decision suddenly changes everything.

1.title: FR - Ladies First: A Story of Women in Hip-Hop - S01E01 - Shaping Hip-Hop
1.plot: Sha-Rock, Roxanne Shanté and MC Lyte claim space for women in the early days of hip-hop, delivering rhymes with unique perspectives and bold messages.

1.title: FR - Ladies First: A Story of Women in Hip-Hop - S01E02 - What Are They Up Against?
1.plot: In a male-dominated industry, women face criticism, colorism and other obstacles as they set out to define their own narratives, both on wax and off.

1.title: FR - Ladies First: A Story of Women in Hip-Hop - S01E03 - What Have They Lost?
1.plot: Artists, producers and writers recount stories of abuse and erasure while working in hip-hop amid contract disputes, acts of violence and more.

1.title: FR - Ladies First: A Story of Women in Hip-Hop - S01E04 - What's Changing?
1.plot: As women reflect on their journeys across decades of hip-hop, they spotlight the sisterhood in rap — and celebrate being stronger together than apart.

meta.plot: Rappeuses, écrivaines et expertes expliquent l'influence des femmes sur la musique et la culture hip-hop dans cette série documentaire dédiée aux pionnières et aux novatrices.
Après avoir pris une nouvelle drogue, Nora se réveille d'un coma sans aucun souvenir. A la recherche de sa mémoire perdue, la jeune femme découvrira les dessous d'une conspiration extraterrestre.

1.title: FR - Spides - S01E01 - Bliss
1.plot: When Nora sets out to discover what happened to her, she begins to unravel a conspiracy of aliens who are using a synthetic drug to infiltrate humans to use as host bodies. The more truth Nora uncovers, the more of her own dark secret is revealed: she is the key to the invasion she is fighting.

1.title: FR - Spides - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Spides - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Spides - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Spides - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Spides - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Spides - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Spides - S01E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Cette série suit les enquêtes criminelles du capitaine de police Alan Banks secondé par le lieutenant Cabbot et le capitaine Morton.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E01 - Playing with Fire: Part 1
1.plot: In the first episode, DCI Alan Banks is taken to a canal where there has been a fatal fire. The crime is far from straightforward, and as another body is discovered the motive, as well as the intended victim, become increasingly unclear. However, the discovery of what appears to be a Turner landscape suggests that at least one of the victims was involved in an art forgery scam.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E02 - Playing with Fire: Part 2
1.plot: After Tom McMahon becomes the third victim following some suspicious fires, Alan realises that he is now attempting to catch a serial killer. His superiors warn him to keep his distance from the Aspern family who are trying to lodge an official complaint against him. Banks is determined to locate the ringleader of the art forgery scam which links two of the victims. Annie continues to see Mark Keane, despite Banks’ warnings. After Banks finally discovers the true identity of ‘Morrison’, he quickly realises that Annie could be in real danger.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E03 - Friend of the Devil: Part 1
1.plot: DCI Banks assigns DS Cabbot as SIO when the mutilated body of a woman is found on the Yorkshire Moors, while he investigates the murder of a teenaged girl whose body has been found in a storage room. Annie discovers that her victim was Lucy Payne.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E04 - Friend of the Devil: Part 2
1.plot: DC Templeton's body is discovered, and Annie becomes convinced that the murder is connected to that of Lucy Payne. The suspect in the Daniels murder case is cleared, so DCI Banks must establish how the real murderer was able to avoid detection.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E06 - Cold is the Grave: Part 2
1.plot: Emily Rydell has apparently been brutally beaten to death and DCI Banks quickly ends up being in the middle of a murder investigation with many suspects. After a surveillance operation establishes a link between the murder of Charles McKay and Brian Clough, Banks and Annie soon work out that the two cases have to be connected.

1.title: FR - DCI Banks - S01E07 -
FR - DCI Banks - S01E08 -

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E01 - Strange Affair: Part 1
2.plot: A mysterious phone message leads Banks to Harrogate to search for his estranged younger brother, while the team investigate the murder of a young woman.

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E02 - Strange Affair: Part 2
2.plot: When a body found at Halton quarry turns out to be his missing brother, Banks must return to his childhood home to inform his parents of the terrible news.

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E03 - Dry Bones That Dream: Part 1
2.plot: When a hitman bursts into the luxury home of Keith Rothwell and shoots him dead in cold blood, Banks is struck by the strange reactions of his family.

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E04 - Dry Bones That Dream: Part 2
2.plot: With Pamela Jeffries in a coma, Banks is even more determined to find Rothwell's killer. And against orders he decides to question MP Martin Fleming.

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E05 - Innocent Graves: Part 1
2.plot: Banks and his team investigate the murder of the daughter of an internet entrepreneur. The prime suspect is quickly identified, but Morton is not so sure.

2.title: FR - DCI Banks - S02E06 - Innocent Graves: Part 2
2.plot: In spite of the trial of Owen Pierce collapsing, Banks still believes that he is the murderer. But Morton tries to persuade him to keep an open mind.

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E01 - Wednesday's Child: Part 1
3.plot: When two bogus social workers come to Katy Heath's house and take her son away, Banks is drawn into a massive search for the boy - but is Katy telling the truth?

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E02 - Wednesday's Child: Part 2
3.plot: An 11-year old's body is found and Banks wonders if there is a connection between his death and Kyle's disappearance.

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E03 - Piece of My Heart: Part 1
3.plot: When a journalist is found dead in a remote village, Banks notices a connection between the case and a mysterious death in the 1980s.

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E04 - Piece of My Heart: Part 2
3.plot: Banks races to locate a mysterious recording that appears to connect Jack Barber and the members of The Crystal Kiss together.

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E05 - Bad Boy: Part 1
3.plot: The discovery of a gun in the bedroom of a neighbour sees Banks involved in an internal investigation which could break up the team.

3.title: FR - DCI Banks - S03E06 - Bad Boy: Part 2
3.plot: While Helen's career hangs in the balance, Banks risks everything to rescue his daughter who has been taken hostage by Jaff Kitson.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E01 - What Will Survive: Part 1
4.plot: A young Estonian woman is found dead on a piece of waste-ground, suspected of being buried alive. As the team piece together her movements, they uncover a world of prostitution and drugs hidden behind a respectable veneer.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E02 - What Will Survive: Part 2
4.plot: The team are dismayed to discover that an arson attack at the Osgood's house has injured Michael and killed his autistic son Robbie.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E03 - Buried: Part 1
4.plot: A husband and daughter struggle to come to terms with their grief when the body of wife and mother Anaan Kamel is found washed up by an underground river.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E04 - Buried: Part 2
4.plot: Geoff has become a marked man and Banks decides to put both him and his daughter Evie under watch at an anonymous hotel whilst he increases the search for Mullen.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E05 - Ghosts: Part 1
4.plot: When the body of an undergraduate is found dumped in a ravine, the investigation into his stabbing reveals he was far from being a model student.

4.title: FR - DCI Banks - S04E06 - Ghosts: Part 2

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E01 - To Burn in Every Drop of Blood: Part 1
5.plot: When a young man is found brutally murdered, Banks' instinct drags his team into a world of organised crime.

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E02 - To Burn in Every Drop of Blood: Part 2
5.plot: The apparent suicide of a young girl drags Banks deeper into the dark world of 'untouchable' criminal Steve Richards.

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E03 - A Little Bit of Heart: Part 1
5.plot: When a devoted husband and father goes missing, a ransom demand takes Banks and his team on a journey into the Chinese community.

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E04 - A Little Bit of Heart: Part 2
5.plot: Following the murder of a recently rescued hostage, Banks and his team must untangle secrets and lies from the closed world of the Chinese community.

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E05 - Undertow: Part 1
5.plot: Banks and the team begin the painful job of finding out exactly who was responsible for Annie's death, an incident that has affected all their lives.

5.title: FR - DCI Banks - S05E06 - Undertow: Part 2
5.plot: Banks' mission to solve Annie's murder is made all the harder by the fact he has been taken off the case and sent on gardening leave - but that won't stop him.

meta.plot: La vie d’une famille est à jamais bouleversée lorsque le fils est accusé du meutre d’un camarade de classe.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Assistant District Attorney Andy Barber is assigned as the lead prosecutor in the case of his son's murdered classmate.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E02 - Everything Is Cool
1.plot: When new evidence is discovered, Andy is taken off the case.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E03 - Poker Faces
1.plot: Andy admits a family secret to Laurie before it becomes public.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E04 - Damage Control
1.plot: Andy takes matters into his own hands. Laurie reexamines the life she knew.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E05 - Visitors
1.plot: Andy visits his father, and learns some troubling information from Jacob’s friends Derek and Sarah.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E06 - Wishful Thinking
1.plot: Andy and Klein explore two last-ditch efforts to prove Jacob's innocence.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E07 - Job
1.plot: As the trial begins, Jacob's fate hangs in the balance.

1.title: FR - Défendre Jacob - S01E08 - After
1.plot: The trial comes to an end, but with unexpected consequences.

meta.plot: Profitant d'une visite dans son pays natal, un avocat mafieux italo-coréen s'attaque à un puissant conglomérat pharmaceutique et rend justice à sa manière.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Vincenzo Cassano's homecoming is met by distrusting tenants and eager fraudsters. Hong Yu-chan relinquishes his parental rights to Hong Cha-young.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Warned about a scheduled demolition of Geumga Plaza, Vincenzo contrives to thwart the attack. Yu-chan receives a call from a whistleblower.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Vincenzo warns an impassioned Yu-chan about the dangers of a new drug and its even more harmful pharmaceutical company. Choi Myung-hee shows her claws.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Fighting fire with fire, Yu-chan's supporters unite their efforts to carry out his vision of justice. Vincenzo employs Myung-hee's tactics against her.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Jang Joon-woo reminds Jang Han-seo who's the boss. The tenants rally around Vincenzo and Cha-young, who team up to take down Babel Group.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Both sides use every trick in the book to cause disturbances in and out of the courtroom. Han Seung-hyuk and Myung-hee are introduced to Babel's CEO.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Stumped by surprise witnesses, Joon-woo and Myung-hee direct their rage toward Cha-young. The tenants gain new appreciation for their building.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Angered by another conglomerate and its generations of unpunished crimes, Vincenzo tries to charm a young bank president out of investing in Babel.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Joon-woo wields his power to force loyalty from his partners. Cha-young finds refuge in Vincenzo's apartment following a break-in.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Seeking revenge instead of liability for the loss of more innocent victims, Vincenzo puts his life on the line to lure Babel's CEO out of hiding.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: The search for Jang Han-seok begins with torturing his lackeys for information. An Gi-seok flashes his work badge to free Vincenzo from prosecution.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: Han-seo faces unintended consequences when he takes a shot at Babel's throne. Vincenzo and Cho Ju-yeong finally get Geumga Plaza to themselves.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Episode 13
