1.plot: Ju-yeong reveals his true motive. As incoming CEO, Han-seok is met with admiration, applause and a mafia-styled surprise from Vincenzo.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: To expose Han-seok’s paper company, Vincenzo and Cha-young go undercover as an enamored couple. Seo Mi-ri reveals her high-tech tricks.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: With ample evidence to lock up Han-seok, Jung In-kuk holds a press conference. Vincenzo channels spirits to turn an ill-famed newspaper against Babel.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: Maddened by Vincenzo's ability to slip out of another one of his bloody traps, Han-seok goes after what Vincenzo cherishes the most.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E17 - Episode 17
1.plot: A grieving Vincenzo crashes a party to bleed Babel Group dry of its powerful allies. Seung-hyuk reaches out to a high-level commander for help.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E18 - Episode 18
1.plot: Fearing for his life, Han-seok goes to jail to bide some time. A visitor from Italy tells Vincenzo his help is urgently needed back home.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E19 - Episode 19
1.plot: Vincenzo and Cha-young present damning evidence against Babel Tower and its influential cronies. Myung-hee proves her loyalty toward Han-seok.

1.title: FR - Vincenzo [VOSTFR] - S01E20 - Episode 20
1.plot: Han-seok lets nothing stand in his way of revenge. Seeking justice the mafia way, Vincenzo gives his enemies a slow and painful death.

meta.plot: The boundaries between military discipline and human desire are tested on a U.S. Army base that houses an elite unit of helicopter pilots trained to perform clandestine international and domestic missions. The drama unfolds in the present as well as in flashbacks to a failed mission involving one of the first female pilots in the unit, ultimately uncovering layers of personal and government/military secrets and leading to a season-long plan to rescue a group of MIA soldiers.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When a top-secret mission in Somalia goes awry, only Nora and Gallo return to the states; it's discovered that their missing teammate Jimmy is being held captive by terrorists; Nora and Gallo are determined to rescue him.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E02 - Espirit de Corps
1.plot: Nora and Gallo, with the secret still hanging over them, seek further information on the escaped prisoner from Somalia and perform a demo mission for Ian’s mother, who is a public figure with great power. Meanwhile, Jess struggles to work through her feelings.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E03 - Soldier Ready
1.plot: Nora starts relying more and more on vices to help calm her nerves, while searching for the truth about what happened in Somalia. Meanwhile, Ian and CIA officer Thea work together to figure out the next step in the rescue mission.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E04 - Zero Visibility
1.plot: While the Shadow Raiders prepare for the next step in their mission, Nora struggles to get her demons under control. CIA Officer Thea becomes increasingly more involved with the mission, creating even more tension in the group. Meanwhile, Gallo realizes that his relationship with Anna might be putting her in jeopardy.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E05 - Full Battle Rattle
1.plot: While the team scrambles for a new plan, Gallo puts himself in danger for the sake of the mission. Nora makes a decision that surprises and angers Gallo. Meanwhile, Ian clashes with CIA Deputy Director Magnus. Lastly, Thea realizes she has a lot to prove.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E06 - I Got Your Six
1.plot: While Nora prepares to prove herself to Gallo, she also considers confessing the truth to Ian. Jimmy and Crank’s actions have devastating consequences. Meanwhile, a frustrated Jess considers taking matters into her own hands.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E07 - Blurred Lines
1.plot: The Shadow Raiders finally get a lead; Nora makes a shocking discovery and must make a difficult decision; Gallo becomes distraught after receiving bad news; Jess feels more alone than ever.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E08 - About-Face
1.plot: Nora and Ian reach a critical point in their relationship. Gallo finds himself wrestling with PTSD. Meanwhile, Jess is forced to make a difficult choice.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E09 - Stay Frosty
1.plot: The Shadow Raiders are sent out on a mission which, if successful, could mean a dire outcome for Nora and Gallo. Meanwhile, Jimmy makes a choice that could result in big consequences for both he and Jess.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E10 - Ciphers
1.plot: Gallo and Thea join forces to try to decode an important message. Feeling disappointed, Col. Haskins considers making a big change.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E11 - Command & Control
1.plot: When Col. Haskins chooses Nora’s plan over Gallo’s, the tension between them reaches a boiling point.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E12 - Oscar Mike
1.plot: The Shadow Raiders are sent on the mission they’ve been waiting for. Nora and Gallo get separated from their crew and find themselves in a precarious situation. Trapped, everyone fears for their safety.

1.title: FR - Valor - S01E13 - Costs of War
1.plot: Season Finale. Nora is ready to confess despite the consequences. Meanwhile, Ian is blindsided by an evil truth.

meta.plot: L'univers et le quotidien d'une équipe de l'unité d'élite du "Special Air Service" qui luttent contre criminels et terroristes...chaque jour, ils risquent leurs vies pour sauver leur pays et rester dans cet escadron du SAS.

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E01 - The Killing House
1.plot: It's a baptism by fire when new recruits Jamie Dow and Alex Leonard join the SAS's elite fighting force team. Hot on the heels of an explosive hostage-rescue exercise in the regiment's Killing House, Red Troop led by charismatic Sergeant Henno Garvie is called to take command of a bank siege. This time the life or death situation is dramatically and tragically real.

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E02 - Just a Target
1.plot: As Red Troop bury Sam Leonard, a gunman shoots at a prominent European banker using an awesomely powerful sniper's rifle. He misses and the SAS are scrambled to find the gun and the British anti-globalist group suspected of carrying out the shooting. Jamie infiltrates the eco-warriors, convincing them of his skills as a sniper. But when things go wrong, it's not just a banker's life that is threatened.

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E03 - Natural Selection
1.plot: Ten hopeful recruits to the SAS face their final and toughest challenge yet - a three-day combat survival course in the Welsh mountains, where they must evade capture by 40 Paras while navigating rough terrain and swollen rivers. Mick Sharp hopes to join his mate Jamie in the regiment, but Henno is out to make life difficult for him. But when two soldiers are found dead, it appears an even greater danger lurks in the woods.

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E04 - Breakout
1.plot: Red Troop is called to a pharmaceutical laboratory after three Chechens break in to an area where scientists are working on a vaccine for a deadly form of anthrax. The gang threaten to release the anthrax, killing thousands, unless they are given money. Caroline gains access by posing as a doctor but Henno is captured and shot. Is blowing up the building and everyone inside it the only solution?

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E05 - The Killing of a One-Eyed Bookie
1.plot: Jamie is kidnapped during a violent ambush in Northern Ireland while impersonating Bill Gracey, a politician whose life is in danger. Henno is furious, knowing his protégé faces torture and likely death. Breaking orders, he heads off into the Republic with Caroline in search of Cullen, a republican double agent, while Jem and Twamley do some digging of their own. Can they find Jamie before time runs out?

1.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S01E06 - Something to Do with Justice
1.plot: Henno and Twamley are kicked out of the regiment, despite saving Jamie's life in Ireland. The others, under Johnny Bell's command, are sent on a classified mission to Bosnia to 'lift' wily war criminal Glasnovic. To their surprise, Henno and Twamley are also there, training militia men. Reunited, Red Troop close in on Glasnovic but the blood bath leaves one of them fighting for their life.

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E01 - Communication
2.plot: Red Troop of the SAS is back in action when a ship docks at Southampton with a suspicious crew. Jamie and Henno sneak on board to plant a tracker, but the operation goes wrong - they lose radio contact with base and are forced to kill a man. Caroline poses as a customs officer to help them escape, but events get out of control and a tremendous gun battle leaves Red Troop in the firing line.

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E02 - Mad Dogs
2.plot: The firefight against French Special Forces aboard the Dowager Joan has left Jem dead and Caroline in a coma, while the rest of Red Troop face a full judicial inquiry that could land them in jail. Dempsey tries to rally the troops but Louis and Jamie don't want to toe the party line. And the men are shaken up by the arrival of a tough new troop commander, Captain Ian Macalwain.

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E03 - Wannabes
2.plot: Red Troop targets a hard-right group of suicide bombers who are responsible for blowing up a nightclub and cafÃ©. The Soldiers of Destiny want to 'repatriate' non-Aryans and outlaw homosexuality, and give the government just 48 hours to meet their demands. Then Jamie discovers that Suzi, a leader of the group, is a lesbian. But can the SAS find her before more innocent people die?

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E04 - The List
2.plot: Red Troop is offered an unofficial black bag heist to steal a list of terrorist targets from a vault. Controlled by an American diplomat, the deadly list is held in a virtually impenetrable security centre, accessible only through sewers and an old wartime bunker. With help from expert safe-cracker John Magnusson, all except Macalwain agree. But if they are caught, the SAS will disown them.

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E05 - What in the Name of God...
2.plot: Red Troop is called to a siege at a religious commune where Gulf War veteran Omega is holed up with his disciples after shooting dead two police officers. Henno is reluctant to attack with children in the house, but then Omega turns his guns on a follower. Going through an underground culvert, the SAS must act silently and decisively. But things are getting messy in their personal lives...

2.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S02E06 - Dead Is Forever
2.plot: The SAS face losing their leader when Dempsey is taken captive while protecting Overseas Development Minister Nicky Strong on a Top Secret visit to Tblisi, Georgia. Red Troop is scrambled to the rescue but they unwittingly play into the hands of the kidnapper. In such dangerous terrain the odds are stacked against them - and Dempsey. And Henno has a personal score to settle.

3.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S03E01 - Deadlier than the Male
3.plot: Terrorists take a passenger plane to Hong Kong hostage and three new members join Red Troop.

3.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S03E02 - Never Go Back
3.plot: Red Troop are caught in a battle between rival forces while on an unofficial visit to Zimbabwe

3.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S03E03 - Class of 1980
3.plot: Henno comes face to face with Al Qaeda when terrorists seize the Italian Consulate. The notorious Al Djouf threatens to blow up a truck using his mobile phone, unless all prisoners held in Guantanamo Bay are released. The SAS attack and mobile networks are shut down, but Al Djouf has friends on both sides - and the clock is ticking towards an explosion in the capital. This episode features the Italian Consulate Siege

3.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S03E04 - Weapon of Choice
3.plot: The SAS is sent to Chechnya to find rebel leader Movzar Mazayev. Henno mistrusts Russian Special Forces agent Vasily who is assigned to help them. The soldiers close in on Movzar's fiery sister Sapiyat but intelligence officer Kathy is taken hostage. In this conflict where political ideals and personal tragedy overlap, can Red Troop bring down their targets and rescue Kathy? This episode also features the Battle of Galashki

4.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S04E01 - Changing of the Guard
4.plot: With newly appointed Captain Fleming in place, Red Troop are dispatched to a former Soviet state in a race to save the kidnapped daughters of a British diplomat. As the rest of the troop track the armed rebels through dense forest, an injured Henno is left behind at base where he comes to suspect there is a mole amongst them...

4.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S04E02 - Charlie Bravo
4.plot: Red Troop fly to Colombia to train a hapless contingent of local soldiers for an upcoming assault on a cocaine factory. Without warning, the mission is brought forward and Henno begins to suspect a hidden agenda. Will Red Troop be able to save this shambolic platoon from certain death?

4.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S04E03 - The Dividing Line
4.plot: Red Troop are drafted in with their American counterparts to apprehend an infamous Al-Qaeda terrorist in the White Mountains of Afghanistan. Tensions run high as the troops battle for control. Can they overcome their rivalry in time to stop the terrorist before he implements his co-ordinated attacks against the West? This episode features the Hunt for Hassan.

4.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S04E04 - Violent Solutions
4.plot: Red Troop monitor a suspected weapons dealer Stuart Dicken who leads them into an armed stand-off with an East End drugs gang. When the gang hijack a tour bus, Becca places herself in the line of fire. Can Red Troop stop the hijackers before Becca's true identity is revealed?

4.title: FR - Ultimate Force - S04E05 - Slow Bomb
4.plot: When a routine security check on a nuclear power plant goes disastrously wrong, Red Troop find themselves hunting the mercenaries responsible for stealing a can of glow in the dark Cobalt 90. As London is shut down, Red Troop race to stop the detonation of a dirty bomb and the certain devastation of the capital. The Troop then had to spend a large amount of time on the run

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Cha Dal-geon encourages his nephew to go to Morocco with the taekwondo demonstration group. Go Hae-ri walks in late to a meeting at the Korean embassy.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Cha Dal-geon makes a disquieting announcement to the other bereaving families and implores Go Hae-ri for help, but she seems to be hiding something.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Hae-ri remains skeptical about the flight-deck voice recording but is told that the evidence points to a faulty aircraft. Dal-geon is ambushed.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Dal-geon gets a call from someone out of the blue and is approached by a journalist, who claims to be pursuing a story about the plane crash.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Dal-geon attempts to alert the press about what he knows -- but someone interferes. Hae-ri contacts Gi Tae-ung to get answers about the flash drive.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: The NIS takes Dal-geon to a safe house. Tae-ung questions O Sang-mi about her husband’s involvement in the plane crash but is ordered to release her.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Dal-geon sees someone who’s supposed to be dead. Hae-ri and Tae-ung head to Morocco to capture their suspect. The NIS takes Jessica Lee into custody.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Dal-geon runs into trouble while trying to carry out his own search. Tae-ung is displeased that the operation in Morocco doesn’t go as planned.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Dal-geon and the agents try to keep Kim Woo-gi alive, and request NIS backup. Jessica moves to pin the plane crash on someone else.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: After running from the embassy, Dal-geon and the others head back to Korea another way. Min Jae-sik confronts Gang Ju-cheol.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E11 - Episode 11
1.plot: Dal-geon and Hae-ri make contact with Jae-sik. Jessica and Yun Han-gi see a big win at the National Assembly. Tae-ung undergoes scrutiny.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: The plan to get Woo-gi safely to the courthouse takes an unanticipated turn -- and throws the Blue House into panic mode.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: Dal-geon's explosive on-air accusation toward the president sparks a media storm. Jessica's press conference goes south quick.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: When O Sang-mi disappears, Dal-geon and Hae-ri realize there's more to the situation. Meanwhile, Hong Sun-jo takes advantage of the crisis.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: Sang-mi leaves behind a warning about a shady figure named Samael, putting everything Dal-geon thought he knew about the crash into question.

1.title: FR - Vagabond [VOSTFR] - S01E16 - Episode 16
1.plot: When Jessica asks for NIS protection in exchange for Samael's identity, Hae-ri heads to prison undercover. In hiding, Dal-geon plans his next steps.

meta.plot: La poursuite de vagabonds qui tentent de percer le mystère national pour révéler la vérité cachée à l'arrière-plan d'un accident d'avion de ligne qui a tué des innocents.

1.title: FR - Rêves Productions - S01E01 - Part 1: The Dream Team
1.plot: Now that Riley is a teenager, dream director Paula needs to age up her glitter-filled productions.

1.title: FR - Rêves Productions - S01E02 - Part 2: Out of Body
1.plot: Paula and her new assistant director Xeni struggle while Janelle's debut dream is a huge hit.

1.title: FR - Rêves Productions - S01E03 - Part 3: Romance!
1.plot: Paula and Xeni's production goes off the rails, leading to dangerous behavior when Riley sleepwalks.

1.title: FR - Rêves Productions - S01E04 - Part 4: A Night to Remember
1.plot: Paula and Xeni team up to stop a nightmare, creating a new dream that may give Riley what she needs.

meta.plot: Riley grandit et ses souvenirs méritent parfois un traitement de faveur. Le quartier cérébral envoie ces souvenirs à Rêves Productions, où la célèbre réalisatrice Paula Persimmon doit faire face à un véritable cauchemar : réaliser le prochain rêve à succès de Riley aux côtés de Xeni, un réalisateur de rêveries prétentieuses, qui cherche tant bien que mal à entrer dans la cour des grands en matière de rêves.
Tara Webster rêve d'être danseuse. Après une audition réussie, l'adolescente intègre la prestigieuse académie de danse de Sydney, en Australie. C'est le début d'une incroyable aventure...

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E01 - Learning to Fly
1.plot: Country girl Tara Webster travels to Sydney to audition for the prestigious National Academy of Dance. It's a tumultuous week as she realises her dream is going to be a lot more difficult than she thought.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E02 - Week Zero
1.plot: Tara arrives at the Academy excited about the year ahead. As she struggles to fit in, she learns the hard way to respect her teachers and find true friends.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E03 - Behind Barres
1.plot: Tara's crush on Ethan threatens her friendship with Kat; Abigail wins a decisive victory; Christian finds himself in police custody and, with nowhere else to go, has to accept his place at the Academy.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E04 - Mine Field
1.plot: Tara is frustrated when Christian refuses to participate in trust exercises, Kat feels betrayed by Tara's secret crush on Ethan, and Sammy finds himself tied to Abigail for 24 hours.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E05 - Real Men Don’t Dance
1.plot: Sammy is forced to choose between dance and his father when compulsory Saturday ballet classes clash with his Synagogue services; and Christian struggles to accept the rules of the Academy.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E06 - Perfection
1.plot: Tara is stunned to learn Kat's mother is a world acclaimed ballerina and Tara's greatest idol. Meanwhile, Sammy's perfect girlfriend Mia has unexpectedly returned from an overseas exchange.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E07 - Crush Test Dummies
1.plot: Christian shows Ethan some real Australian street hip-hop. Meanwhile, Tara is the self-proclaimed expert on crushes and is happy to educate Kat in every aspect of the mysterious art form.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E08 - Growing Pains
1.plot: Tara is overjoyed by a rumour that she and Damien Lang are dating. Meanwhile, Abigail is unwilling to accept the changes in her developing body.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E09 - Heartbeat
1.plot: Kat creates a video of her dancing that becomes an internet success. Meanwhile, Ethan views Christian as a friendly rival and the two boys begin to compete with each other.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E10 - Through the Looking Glass
1.plot: Christian's best mate Aaron comes to stay and reveals the truth about the robbery they committed. Meanwhile, Abigail's control issues are spiralling out-of-control and she is caught shoplifting.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E11 - One Perfect Day
1.plot: Tara is elated when Ethan asks her to dance in his choreographic assessment piece. She hopes that he is finally beginning to see her as romantic potential.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E12 - Pressure
1.plot: Pressure is building at the Academy as the students prepare for exam week.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E13 - Family
1.plot: It's Open Week at the Academy when parents watch their children in a series of demonstration classes.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E14 - Turning Pointes
1.plot: Kat introduces Tara to her new boyfriend; Abigail struggles to convince her therapist to allow her to return to ballet classes and Sammy tries to convince Abigail to help him with ballroom dance classes.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E15 - My Life En Pointe
1.plot: Petra Hoffman arrives at the Academy on exchange from the Berlin Ballet School; Kat has been ditching class to spend time with her new boyfriend; and Tara kisses Christian behind Ethan's back.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E16 - Free Falling
1.plot: Kat is upset when her parents ignore her 16th birthday and in revenge throws herself a huge party at their harbour front home. The house quickly fills with people and events spiral out of control.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E17 - A Midsummer's Night Dream
1.plot: It is school camp and everyone is dreading the trip away, especially Tara who has been made an outcast following the party.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E18 - Betty Bunheads
1.plot: German exchange student Petra Hoffman is thrilled when she is invited to stay at the Academy; Abigail is making more trouble for Tara; and Sammy and Abigail have begun secretly kissing.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E19 - Fairest and Best
1.plot: Junior footballers from the Institute of Sport have been sent to the Academy for some specialised training. The challenge is on between the dancers and the footballers to prove which is the toughest sport.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E20 - Ballet Fever
1.plot: When the Board decides to cut hip hop and jazz from the curriculum Kat goes on the warpath. Tara and Christian find themselves together at the beach and their spark is rekindled.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E21 - FOMO: Fear of Missing Out
1.plot: It's a month since Tara's injury and her plaster is due to come off, but Tara seems more focused on her new boyfriend and planning the school formal than she is in attending her doctor's appointments.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E22 - Flight or Fight Response
1.plot: The date for Christian's robbery hearing has been set but his defence strategy relies on his best mate, Aaron. However Aaron has vanished. Meanwhile the time has come for Tara to go back to dancing.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E23 - Best Friends Forever
1.plot: Christian's conscience gets the better of him and he changes his story to protect his friend. Meanwhile, Ethan has received interest from a dance company in Spain.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E24 - Heatwave
1.plot: In the weeks since the court hearing, Sammy and Christian have been inseparable, but when Christian ditches Sammy to spend time with Tara, what Sammy feels is uncomfortably a lot like jealousy.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E25 - The Deep End
1.plot: Rehearsals for 'The Nutcracker' are underway and Tara discovers that being the star is not all it's cracked up to be. Sammy is forced to admit that his feelings for Christian have changed.

1.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S01E26 - Learning to Fly, Part 2
1.plot: The end of year production has arrived. Things don't go smoothly when the director is not happy with Tara's performance and Abigail hides her costume.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E01 - In the Middle, Somewhat Elevated
2.plot: It's a rollercoaster year for Tara and her friends as they begin Second Year at the National Academy. Relationships fall apart as new ones are forged and shaking things up are two new students.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E02 - Dream Life
2.plot: Tara finds a new mentor to admire in Saskia Duncan, the youngest principal dancer in the Company's history. Saskia takes Tara under her wing, but gives her a few things to worry about such as if there's a future with Christian.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E03 - Faus Pax de Deux
2.plot: Kat finally makes friends with the coterie of outcast girls at school, but despite having sworn off dancing, finds herself helping them choreograph a piece for drama class. Meanwhile, Ben Tickle is upgraded into second year.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E04 - Legends
2.plot: Tara's ecstatic when her mentor Saskia is appointed to teach the second years at the Academy. But Tara rapidly discovers that 'perfect' Saskia may not be the supportive teacher she hoped for...

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E05 - Showcase
2.plot: After Sebastian questions his son Ethan on the impressiveness of his piece at the Showcase, Ethan takes it out on Abigail, his soloist, in an attempt to create a spectacular performance.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E06 - Like No One's Watching
2.plot: Sammy's little brother Ari arrives at the Academy throwing Sammy's hectic life schedule into havoc. Kat auditions to be a football cheerleader, happily encouraged by Ben. And Tara is having self esteem issues.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E07 - A Choreographed Life
2.plot: Tara feels the time she spends with Christian is impacting on her dance study and suggests they 'pause' their relationship.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E08 - Connectivity
2.plot: Tara decides to take action after realising that Saskia's continual critique of her dancing could jeopardise her mid-year exams, while Christian ditches his partner exam to hang out with Kat.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E09 - The Break
2.plot: With exams finally over, both the boys and girls go out to let off some steam. However, Sammy is tense after failing his exams, Tara's still hurting from her breakup, and Grace decides to stir up trouble.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E10 - A Good Life
2.plot: Sammy returns home for his Grandpa Morrie's funeral and to ask his father to support his Academy tuition. An act of sabotage severs frenemies Tara and Abigail.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E11 - Self Sabotage
2.plot: Grace encourages Tara to take action against Saskia's spiteful treatment of her; Kat commences training for the Moulin Rouge which leads her to a big realisation; and Sammy is assigned a tutor.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E12 - Breaking Pointe
2.plot: Tara's preparations for the Prix de Fonteyn are struck a devastating blow when Saskia's bullying results in an injury. Meanwhile, Kat convinces Miss Raine to grant her an audition to return to the Academy.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E13 - Backstab
2.plot: Determined to prove Saskia wrong, Tara risks serious injury and possible expulsion from the Academy by competing in the Prix de Fonteyn Preliminary round.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E14 - Rescue Mission
2.plot: Tara runs into Ben who's volunteering in the hospital leukaemia ward performance. Tara discovers Ben's deepest secret. Back at the Academy, Kat struggles with the culture shock of First Year.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E15 - Moving On
2.plot: Tara negotiates her return to the Academy after being expelled. Meanwhile, Ethan's search for ongoing employment leads him to a position choreographing a fringe musical.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E16 - Origins
2.plot: Sammy gets a second chance at the Prix de Fonteyn when he takes a road trip with Ollie to audition for the regional round. Sammy's feelings resurface and Christian invites himself along on the trip.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E17 - Love and War
2.plot: The rivalry escalates between the first and second year students resulting in a dance battle; and Tara becomes unhinged when Grace entices her to become less serious.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E18 - Catch Me If I Fall
2.plot: During an excursion to the circus, Christian's dad makes promises he's unable to keep; Tara tries to repair her friendship with Kat, and Sammy goes public with his new romance.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E19 - The Naturals
2.plot: Tara opens herself up to love again and hunts for a new crush, Finn tries to convince Abigail to be the star of his new show, and Grace goes to extreme lengths to get Zach's attention.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E20 - Tick, Question Mark, Cross
2.plot: Abigail's forced to make a choice between her ballet and the fringe musical. Her situation intensifies when her mother Anthea unexpectedly arrives. Meanwhile, Sammy tires of Ollie's persistent criticism.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E21 - Ladder Theory
2.plot: Ben attempts to out-psych Christian during the National Prix de Fonteyn round, and Sammy's father is attending the Prix to watch him dance for the first time in years.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E22 - Win or Lose
2.plot: Grace's father retracts a promise to visit her at the Academy: her self-assurance plummets. Christian's bounce back from his Prix de Fonteyn elimination drives him towards some reckless behaviour.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E23 - Live It or Fight It
2.plot: During rehearsals of 'Peter Pan' Ben uses various tactics to prove to Tara he's a leading man, while Kat's efforts to research her character in the production lead to a realisation about her relationship.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E24 - The Prix De Fonteyn
2.plot: The Prix de Fonteyn is two days away. Tara is stunned as Grace has returned to Sydney as a representative for the UK Prix team. The students' lives are changed forever when a tragedy strikes the Academy...

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E25 - The Second
2.plot: After a sudden tragedy, the Academy students must find a way to come together and help each other out in this time of darkness.

2.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S02E26 - The Red Shoes
2.plot: Abigail and Tara join forces to go head-to-head with a formidable enemy. Christian has to choose between the girl he loves and his desire to escape and Ben is offered an opportunity of a lifetime.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E01 - Glue
3.plot: It's three weeks into Third Year and Tara and her friends are already feeling the pressure. Speculation bubbles when the National Ballet Company announces it needs three temporary fill-in roles in the corps de ballet.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E02 - New Rules
3.plot: On their first day as fill-in dancers, Tara, Grace and Ben encounter cliques in the corps de ballet. Meanwhile, Christian has no interest in going back to the Academy.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E03 - Second Chances
3.plot: Kat struggles to stay positive and her determination to advance into Third Year is morphing into dangerous patterns. Meanwhile, Grace plays match-maker, and Christian's lost his place at the Academy.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E04 - Short Cut Clause
3.plot: Ben is flattered when Saskia offers to be his mentor and it becomes clear there's potential for them to dance together brilliantly; and Abigail and Christian disturb everyone with their unlikely friendship.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E05 - Negative Patterns
3.plot: Saskia arranges a special audition with the Company's artistic director for her protégé, Ben; Grace's world implodes; and Zach allows Christian to participate in a music video Ollie is producing.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E06 - Fake It Until You Make It
3.plot: The Academy goes a little Hollywood when a film crew uses their building as a location for a new indie movie; and Grace tries to undermine a new relationship to guarantee her position on the tour.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E07 - Graceland
3.plot: The Third Years are having the time of their lives on the road, but are prioritising fun over performance. Back at the Academy, Kat clashes with the movie's third assistant director, Jamie.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E08 - Travelling Light
3.plot: On the final leg of their tour, the Third Years are invited to a traditional Indigenous ceremony and return the hospitality by offering a dance class to the local kids. Christian finds he is an unexpectedly good teacher.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E09 - Don't Let Me Down Gently
3.plot: A career-making performance opportunity brings out the best and worst in everyone, and an injury that sidelines Ollie prompts him to use someone to get ahead.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E10 - N'FEKTD
3.plot: Christian and Ollie prepare for Streetbeatz, a major hip hop competition; Kat prepares to audition for a minor role in Coppelia; and Ben takes a stab at revenge.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E11 - Start of an Era
3.plot: The countdown to the final Company auditions has begun when suddenly it becomes a whole new playing field; and Christian and Tara come to a final resolution about their relationship.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E12 - A Perfect Storm
3.plot: Auditions for the National Ballet Company have arrived bringing superstitions, old competitive battle lines and the performances that will determine the rest of their lives.

3.title: FR - Dance academy : danse tes rêves - S03E13 - Not for Nothing
3.plot: It's judgment day. The Third Years sit before the Company panel and learn their fate - who will be offered a professional contract with the National Ballet Company and who will have to find a new dream?

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E01 - Original Sin
1.plot: The Medici family suffers a great loss with the death of its patriarch Giovanni. When the designated heir Cosimo discovers that his father was poisoned, he decides to put Marco Bello on the assassin's trail.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E02 - The Dome and the Domicile
1.plot: The war is throwing Florence into chaos. Piero, Cosimo's only son, is eager to fight. Meanwhile, Cosimo manages to "buy" the withdrawal of Milan's troops, thus saving the city, but in the meantime Florence has again fallen into the plague.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E03 - Pestilence
1.plot: Albizzi has managed to foment the citizenry against Cosimo, accusing him of the crime of usury. When Cosimo learns of the situation, he decides to return to Florence. Albizzi then invents a ploy to get Cosimo arrested and held for trial.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E04 - Judgement Day
1.plot: From prison, Cosimo asks Contessina to try bribing a member of the Signoria, to buy votes in his favor. Albizzi starts poisoning Cosimo's food through his prison guard. Contessina negotiates exile rather than the death penalty.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E05 - Temptation
1.plot: While the Medici are in exile in Venice, the situation deteriorates day by day in Florence, with Albizzi imposing his rule over a city gravely depleted by the absence of the Medici.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E06 - Ascendancy
1.plot: The return of the Medici to Florence is an out-and-out triumph, with Albizzi in prison for his attempt to become the city's "tyrant".

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E07 - Purgatory
1.plot: The Signoria now has a vacant chair, and Cosimo is asked to choose who should occupy it. Piero thinks that his moment has now come, but the banker Pazzi, too, has his eyes set on that seat.

1.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S01E08 - Epiphany
1.plot: Pazzi has managed to convince the Pope to remove the Medici as Church bankers, but Cosimo is disinclined to surrender what he has worked so hard to attain.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E01 - Old Scores
2.plot: After a surprise attack, Lorenzo and Giuliano search for the culprits. The trail leads the brothers to the Pazzis, but treachery lies closer at hand.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E02 - Standing Alone
2.plot: Lorenzo's power play comes at a cost and stirs up outrage. With leadership comes sacrifice as he travels to Rome and weighs an advantageous match.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E03 - Obstacles and Opportunities
2.plot: The death of the pope brings strategic challenges as Lorenzo negotiates with the Duke of Milan and welcomes his new bride, Clarice, to Florence.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E04 - Blood with Blood
2.plot: Lorenzo aims to strengthen ties with the Pazzis and proposes a treaty with Venice. Clarice appeals to Lucrezia and learns the way to Lorenzo's heart.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E05 - Ties That Bind
2.plot: In opposition to the pope, Lorenzo moves quickly to acquire the strategic city of Imola. A forbidden love flowers between Giuliano and Simonetta.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E06 - Alliance
2.plot: The papal army advances as important coalitions shift. Meanwhile, Lorenzo negotiates a crucial treaty, and Jacopo attempts a major power grab.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E07 - Betrayal
2.plot: As forces threaten a fragile alliance, the Pazzis embark on a murderous plan to destroy the Medicis while Lorenzo seeks to make peace with Rome.

2.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S02E08 - Mass
2.plot: The day of reckoning arrives as the circle of conspirators tightens around the Medicis during Mass, and rivals attempt to take control of Florence.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E01 - Survival
3.plot: A few months after the Pazzi Conspiracy, Lorenzo is still animated by the spirit of revenge. There is a distant clash between Lorenzo and Pope Sixtus IV; the cruel count Riario - the last of the conspirators left alive - tries to take advantage of this conflict. A Dominican friar arrives in Florence who seems capable of reading Lorenzo's heart: Girolamo Savonarola.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E02 - The Ten
3.plot: The entry into the field of the Kingdom of Naples alongside the papal troops is likely to mark the end of Florence. Among the Priors there are those who doubt Lorenzo, but the Magnificent, determined not to let Florence fall into the hands of his enemies, finds a stratagem to deprive the Priors of authority. Lorenzo decides to leave for Naples to try to break the encirclement and restore peace.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E03 - Trust
3.plot: Arriving in Naples with Bernardi, Lorenzo finds it difficult to convince King Ferrante of Aragon to abandon the alliance with the Pope. While the Magnificent tries to win the king's trust, Florence remains under siege: the people and Clarice herself fear that Lorenzo has abandoned them.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E04 - Innocent
3.plot: Seven years have passed and Lorenzo hopes to close the accounts with the Pope by obtaining the signing of a peace treaty between the various Italian rulers. Riario hopes to induce Lorenzo to return to open war. While the Magnificent faces this new diplomatic crisis, his mother Lucrezia involves Clarice in the management of the bank. Worn out by the constant clash with Sixtus IV, Lorenzo decides to start his son Giovanni on an ecclesiastical career hoping to increase the influence of the Medici in the Roman Curia. The Treaty of Bagnolo, signed by all the Italian rulers, marks the triumph of the Medici family and Lorenzo, who has become the deciding vote of Italian politics.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E05 - The Holy See
3.plot: Sixtus IV is dead. Lorenzo and Clarice travel to Rome to support the election of their candidate for the papal throne, but they have to deal with the plots of Riario. The Medici find an unexpected ally in Caterina Sforza, Riario's wife. Despite the family's efforts, the new Pope Cybo proves difficult to control. In Florence, Savonarola harangues against Lorenzo for his influence in the conclave.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E06 - A Man of No Importance
3.plot: Lorenzo begins to show the first symptoms of a serious illness while his political enemies decide to attack him, questioning the solidity and provenance of Medici Bank's capital. Among these, Tommaso Peruzzi, once a supporter of the family, is now eager to bring to light a scandal that would condemn the Medici to exile. To cover up the crime and avoid losses, the Magnificent risks a new war and plans to kill Peruzzi.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E07 - Lost Souls
3.plot: Savonarola, who had taken Tommaso's confession, denounces his killing and openly accuses Lorenzo, who however continues to deny. Clarice begins to suspect the truth. To continue his strategy of control over the Holy See, the Magnificent makes a promise that triggers a family crisis.

3.title: FR - Les Médicis : Les Maîtres de Florence - S03E08 - The Fate of the City
3.plot: Lorenzo allows Bernardi to convince him that the only solution not to lose everything is to kill Savonarola, whose following gets bigger and bigger. By now, the friar openly preaches the overthrow of the established order to found a new Jerusalem. Lorenzo's plan is ready and the assassins recruited ...

meta.plot: La mort du patriarche est un coup terrible pour le clan Médicis. Lorsque son héritier et successeur, Cosimo, découvre que son père a été empoisonné, il décide de garder l’information pour lui et charge son fidèle ami Marco Bello de remonter la piste de l’assassin. Cosimo, qui a depuis longtemps fait son deuil de son rêve d'être artiste, reprend alors la tête de la banque familiale et le siège de son père à l’assemblée florentine, la Seigneurie, où il doit faire face à l’hostilité des familles nobles menées par Rinaldo Degli Ablizzi. Lorsque le Duc de Milan annexe la ville de Lucques jusqu'ici sous contrôle florentin, Cosimo doit faire un choix: soutiendra-t-il Albizzi et les nobles sur le chemin de la guerre, comme Giovanni l’aurait fait, ou s’affranchira-t-il de l'ombre de son père?

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E01 - Dulcinea
1.plot: In the outer solar system near Saturn, James Holden and the crew of the ice-freighter Canterbury, investigate a distress call from a mysterious derelict ship, the Scopuli. On Ceres Station, Detective Miller begins an off the book investigation of a missing heiress, Julie Mao.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E02 - The Big Empty
1.plot: Holden and crew are trapped in badly damaged shuttle. On Ceres, Miller uncovers clues about Julie Mao. On Earth, Chrisjen Avasarala questions a terrorist.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E03 - Remember the Cant
1.plot: Holden and the crew are taken prisoner by the Martian Congressional Republic Navy. Miller deals with unhappy rioters. Avasarala plays politics and gets severely burned.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E04 - CQB
1.plot: Holden and crew find themselves in the middle of a desperate battle while still aboard the Martian battleship. Miller’s partner, Havelock, goes missing.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E05 - Back to the Butcher
1.plot: Holden finds an unlikely ally. Miller’s obsession with Mao intensifies.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E06 - Rock Bottom
1.plot: Miller gains valuable information from a hidden data cube. Holden and his crew learn their host’s agenda.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E07 - Windmills
1.plot: Holden and his crew face a Martian military blockade. Miller finds a new reason to forge ahead. Avasarala visits Holden’s family.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E08 - Salvage
1.plot: A derelict vessel holds a potentially devastating secret. Holden and his crew cross paths with Miller on Eros. Avasarala receives bad news.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E09 - Critical Mass
1.plot: Julie's origin story ends up revealing her trajectory. Holden and Miller work together as they take a look at a strange emergency happening on Eros.

1.title: FR - The Expanse - S01E10 - Leviathan Wakes
1.plot: Avasarala uncovers a game-changing secret while the future of the human race might be in Holden and Miller's hands.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E01 - Safe
2.plot: Unlikely allies Joe Miller and the crew of the Rocinante led by Jim Holden uncover more about the conspiracy to release the protomolecule on Eros station.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E02 - Doors & Corners
2.plot: With the help of Fred Johnson and the OPA, Miller, Holden and the crew stage a raid for information on the protomolecule. On Earth, Avasarala learns a truth about Fred Johnson.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E03 - Static
2.plot: Holden and Miller butt heads about how the raid was handled.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E04 - Godspeed
2.plot: Miller devises a dangerous plan to eradicate what's left of the protomolecule on Eros.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E05 - Home
2.plot: The Rocinante chases an asteroid as it hurtles towards Earth.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E06 - Paradigm Shift
2.plot: Earth and Mars search for answers in the aftermath of the asteroid collision.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E07 - The Seventh Man
2.plot: Preparations for the Earth/Mars peace conference tighten the tension on Erringwright.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E08 - Pyre
2.plot: Naomi tracks down signs of the protomolecule; Fred Johnson's control over the OPA collapses.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E09 - The Weeping Somnambulist
2.plot: Bobbie becomes a political pawn in the struggle between Earth and Mars.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E10 - Cascade
2.plot: Holden leads his crew through the war-torn station on Ganymede.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E11 - Here There Be Dragons
2.plot: Bobbie makes a decision that changes her life forever.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E12 - The Monster and the Rocket
2.plot: A discovery pushes Naomi and Holden apart and sets the Rocinante crew against each other.

2.title: FR - The Expanse - S02E13 - Caliban's War
2.plot: The Rocinante crew must fight to save the ship.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E01 - Fight or Flight
3.plot: The Rocinante crew deals with the fallout over Naomi's betrayal while caught in the middle of the war between Earth and Mars while Avasarala and Bobbie hatch an escape plan.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E02 - IFF
3.plot: The Rocinante answers an unexpected distress signal. Bobbie and Avasarala find themselves being hunted by a mysterious captor. UN Secretary-General Sorrento-Gillis brings in a colleague from his past to lend an ear during this crucial time of war.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E03 - Assured Destruction
3.plot: As Earth strategizes a costly ploy to gain advantage in the war against Mars, Anna struggles to convince Sorrento-Gillis to do the right thing. Avasarala and Bobbie seek refuge aboard the Rocinante.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E04 - Reload
3.plot: The Rocinante tends to wounded Martian soldiers in exchange for supplies. Avasarala struggles with how to disseminate a key piece of evidence despite being in hiding.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E05 - Triple Point
3.plot: The search for Prax's daughter comes to a head. Admiral Souther's men plan for mutiny aboard the Agatha King

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E06 - Immolation
3.plot: The final battle between Earth and Mars threatens the very future of humanity. A new monster is unleashed on Prospero Station. Anna receives the smoking gun she needs.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E07 - Delta-V
3.plot: All eyes turn to the edge of the solar system as a mysterious new presence emerges; Naomi recommits to her roots; Drummer butts heads with a seasoned new commander aboard the Behemoth; and a young Belter makes a name for himself.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E08 - It Reaches Out
3.plot: An old friend taunts Holden with the answers he seeks. Naomi struggles to fit in. A mysterious low-level tech aboard the Thomas Prince enacts a terrifying plan.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E09 - Intransigence
3.plot: The Rocinante seeks a new gameplan as they attempt to avoid capture. Melba's true motives are revealed. Naomi is torn between identity and ideal. Anna seeks a way to stay aboard the Thomas Prince.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E10 - Dandelion Sky
3.plot: Holden sees past, present, and future. A ghost from Melba's past threatens her mission. Bobbie struggles to trust an old friend as she leads a group into unchartered territory.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E11 - Fallen World
3.plot: Drummer and Ashford find themselves trapped with few options for survival; Anna tends to the wounded masses as Melba continues to hunt down her prey; the Rocinante crew struggles to survive as Naomi reunites with her true family.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E12 - Congregation
3.plot: As survivors arrive to the Behemoth, two factions form over how to handle a life-or-death threat. Holden grapples with what he's seen and the choices he must make.

3.title: FR - The Expanse - S03E13 - Abaddon's Gate
3.plot: Holden and his allies must stop Ashford and his team from destroying the Ring, and perhaps all of humanity.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E01 - New Terra
4.plot: The crew of the Roci investigates a strange protomolecule ruin on an alien planet. Bobbie copes with civilian life on Mars. Drummer and Ashford battle with piracy in the Belt.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E02 - Jetsam
4.plot: Avasarala is blindsided while on a visit to Mars. The Roci crew continue their protomolecule investigation while tensions between the RCE and Belters reach a tipping point. Drummer and Ashford track down a terrorist.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E03 - Subduction
4.plot: New alien threats emerge on Ilus as Naomi battles health challenges on the planet. Bobbie searches for a missing person on Mars. Avasarala faces a new challenge in the UN.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E04 - Retrograde
4.plot: Drummer and Ashford confront a dangerous person from Naomi's past. Murtry hunts down a target. Bobbie's makes a life-changing confession.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E05 - Oppressor
4.plot: As tensions on Ilus reach a boiling point, Holden reveals a secret. Avasarala debates Nancy Gao while an emergency on the Roci forces Alex and Naomi into action.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E06 - Displacement
4.plot: The Roci crew prepares for an incoming disaster on Ilus. Ashford and Drummer close in on an enemy within the Belt. Bobbie takes on a dangerous job.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E07 - A Shot in the Dark
4.plot: Naomi and Alex work to keep the Barbapiccola in orbit amidst a power outage. Avasarala faces a tough decision. Holden and Elvi race to find a cure for a disease spreading on Ilus.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E08 - The One-Eyed Man
4.plot: Avasarala faces fallout for the UN's military mission. Ashford and Drummer makes big decisions about their future within the OPA. A spreading illness on Ilus takes a toll on Amos. Alex and Naomi's attempt to rescue the Barb turns desperate.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E09 - Saeculum
4.plot: Holden and Miller race to save Ilus. Murtry puts his endgame into motion, putting the Roci crew's lives at risk.

4.title: FR - The Expanse - S04E10 - Cibola Burn
4.plot: Ashford closes in on an enemy while uncovering a dangerous plot. Avasarala faces a crossroads in her personal and political life. The Roci crew works to reestablish life on Ilus in the wake of a deadly catastrophe.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E01 - Exodus
5.plot: Holden tries to convince Fred Johnson to destroy the last sample of protomolecule. Naomi gets an important lead to her son. On Luna, Avasarala begins to hunt for Marco Inaros.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E02 - Churn
5.plot: Holden and Fred deal with infiltrators on Tycho. Drummer's past comes back to haunt her. Amos returns to Baltimore. Alex and Bobbie's investigation on Mars leads to rogue soldiers.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E03 - Mother
5.plot: Naomi comes face to face with Filip. Holden and Fred turn the tables. Avasarala closes in on Marco's plot.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E04 - Gaugamela
5.plot: Marco's grand plan shocks Earth, Mars and the Belt.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E05 - Down and Out
5.plot: Amos and Clarissa are trapped in a collapsed building. Naomi contends with her old family. Holden assembles a new crew on the Roci. Alex and Bobbie make a dangerous discovery in the Belt.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E06 - Tribes
5.plot: Holden and the Roci go on the hunt. Amos and Clarissa seek shelter on a devastated Earth. Bobbie and Alex fight a desperate battle. Marco makes Drummer an offer she can't refuse. Avasarala returns to a position of power.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E07 - Oyedeng
5.plot: Naomi makes a desperate attempt to save her son from Marco. On the Roci, Holden battles for the last sample of protomolecule.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E08 - Hard Vacuum
5.plot: Amos returns to Baltimore with Clarissa. On Luna, Avasarala's alliances begin to shift. Alone and adrift, Naomi becomes a deadly lure.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E09 - Winnipesaukee
5.plot: Amos, Clarissa, and a gang of thieves work together to leave Earth. Avasarala tries to head off a brutal military strike. Drummer's new family bonds are tested as Naomi's life hangs in the balance.

5.title: FR - The Expanse - S05E10 - Nemesis Games
5.plot: Holden and the Roci face off against Marco's forces and Drummer, while Alex and Bobbie attempt a dangerous rescue of Naomi, and the balance of power in the Solar System shifts.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E01 - Strange Dogs
6.plot: The Rocinante crew make a startling discovery on an asteroid. Avasarala and Bobbie contend with the devastation on Earth. Drummer and her family must make a heartbreaking decision. On Ceres, Marco and Filip's struggles turn inward.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E02 - Azure Dragon
6.plot: With an unexpected passenger aboard the Rocinante, Holden and crew undertake a dangerous mission that could shift the balance of power in the war. Drummer decides to make an uneasy alliance. Filip wrestles with his guilt.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E03 - Force Projection
6.plot: Avasarala, with the Combined Fleet of Earth and Mars, takes the war to Marco. Filip and Marco's relationship is tested. The war becomes more perilous and personal for Holden and Naomi when the Rocinante is suddenly forced into a battle.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E04 - Redoubt
6.plot: Holden finds himself at odds with his crew when a controversial decision is uncovered. On Ceres, Avasarala struggles to contain an escalating humanitarian crisis. Drummer's growing faction stage a daring raid with dire stakes. Filip, demoted to repair skiff duty, makes an unexpected discovery.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E05 - Why We Fight
6.plot: Paths converge on Ceres when Drummer and her fleet arrive to aid the relief effort. Holden tries to convince Avasarala to release crucial information that might avert catastrophe, but she has her own request of him. As Amos and Bobbie get a little R&R at the station, Naomi has a difficult and long-awaited reunion.

6.title: FR - The Expanse - S06E06 - Babylon's Ashes
6.plot: In the thrilling season finale, Inners and Belters fight side by side with the crew of the Rocinante in a last, massive, desperate battle with Marco and his Free Navy, with the fate of the Solar System, the Ring Gates, and of all humanity hanging in the balance.

meta.plot: A thriller set two hundred years in the future following the case of a missing young woman who brings a hardened detective and a rogue ship's captain together in a race across the solar system to expose the greatest conspiracy in human history.

Julia Bechley, fille unique, voit sa vie basculer lorsqu'elle apprend que son père, médecin pionnier dans la fertilité, a utilisé son propre sperme pour concevoir une centaine d'enfants. La jeune femme découvre alors qu'elle a de nombreux frères, dont deux soeurs, avec lesquelles elle est bien décidée à construire des liens...

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Only child Julia finds her life turned upside-down when her father makes a startling revelation.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E02 - Related AF
1.plot: Julia is haunted by her new reality, while Roxy embraces it by spending quality time with Leon. As Edie and Tim prepare for their trial, Tim notices interactions between Edie and the prosecutor, Amanda, that make him uneasy. Meanwhile, Dr. Isaac Abadi steps up to the plate at the clinic.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E03 - Notorious AF
1.plot: When a video goes viral, Julia must team up with Isaac to combat the situation. Roxy forms a bond with 11-year-old Izzy. Edie meets with Dr. Bechley about his case.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E04 - Fake AF
1.plot: The sisters meet a new sibling who helps them secure one of the most exclusive reservations in New York. Edie and Tim discuss starting a family, but Edie is conflicted. Roxy invests her time in training her gymnastics protégé.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E05 - Risky AF
1.plot: Julia is forced to make a drastic decision when she finds out that Isaac has been secretly working with Leon for advice on his current patients. Meanwhile, Roxy takes her new protégé back to her old gym, where she runs into old enemies from her gymnastics days, Tim is on high alert when Edie misses a family event to "work" all weekend and Julia steps back into the dating scene.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E06 - Kosher AF
1.plot: Another Bechley baby comes to the clinic looking for information about Leon and then invites her new family over for Shabbat to get to know them. Meanwhile, Julia is developing feelings for Donovan, but as the topic of children arises, they seem to disagree. Amanda suggests that she and Edie go on a weekend getaway, as Tim's suspicions grow deeper. In court, Edie catches Amanda off-guard getting a key piece of evidence dismissed. Dr. Isaac develops suspicions regarding Roxy's past and current drug usage, but when he confronts her, she gets defensive.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E07 - Thankful AF
1.plot: In an attempt to start a new tradition, Julia hosts Thanksgiving dinner for her ever-growing family, but things go awry when she invites both Leon and the new guy she’s been seeing, and Roxy let’s a new half-sibling tag along. Meanwhile, with Tim’s parents in attendance, relentlessly homing in on the idea of children, Edie finds herself at a crossroads.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E08 - Fertile AF
1.plot: Julia enquires about her own fertility options and entrusts Dr. Isaac to help her explore possibilities. Meanwhile, Edie struggles to tell Tim the truth and Roxy deals with concerns from her family, old and new, regarding her drug usage.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E09 - Rehabilitated AF
1.plot: Roxy is released from rehab and begins to make amends with those she hurt. In apologizing to Natalie, Roxy finds out that Izzy is now coached by Nick, which enables her to reveal the truth behind their relationship. Donovan decides it's time for Julia to meet his kids, but Julia quickly realizes teenagers are trickier to win over than she thought. Edie and Amanda's personal relationship blossoms, but Edie struggles to make a worthwhile deal for Leon's sentence.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E10 - Courageous AF
1.plot: Roxy takes her first steps in speaking out against Nick, but quickly realizes the hardships that come with going public, especially when her rival attempts to discredit her story. Julia, frustrated with the lack of knowledge about her family history, meets up with her mom's cousin who explains a whole other side to her mom she never knew. Worried she might get cold feet later down the line, Amanda challenges Edie to explore her sexuality. Meanwhile, Leon tries to convince Edie to work a pro-bono case for her half-brother.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E11 - Generational AF
1.plot: Julia searches for more information about her mom, with added help from Nate . When Edie is granted approval to take on her half-brother's pro bono case, she realizes Tim might have had something to do with Chad's change of heart. Meanwhile, Amanda confronts Roxy with suspicions of witness tampering regarding Dr. Bechley's trial and the search for character witnesses continues.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E12 - Permanent AF
1.plot: The trial against Dr. Bechley begins with a powerful opening statement from the prosecution, leaving Leon scared and Tim wondering if Edie should rejoin the defense team. Meanwhile, Julia begins to take the option of having a baby seriously, asking for Isaac's help. Also, Roxy joins a commentary segment on the show that had previously blindsided her and makes a drastic decision in an attempt to help Isaac.

1.title: FR - Almost Family - S01E13 - Expectant AF
1.plot: Tensions rise when Chad makes a threat to bring Edie and Amanda's affair to the judge's attention. Meanwhile, Julia gains the confidence to approach Donovan again about her desire for a family. Then, Roxy makes a drastic decision in an attempt to help Isaac.

1.title: FR - Réunions - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Réunions - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Réunions - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Réunions - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Réunions - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Réunions - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Lorsque Chloé apprend que Jérémy, son compagnon, a hérité de l’hôtel de son père " inconnu " à la Réunion, elle y voit l’occasion de commencer une nouvelle vie avec sa famille recomposée, loin de Roubaix et de leurs soucis financiers…

1.title: FR - Below the Surface - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Below the Surface - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Below the Surface - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Below the Surface - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Below the Surface - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Below the Surface - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Below the Surface - S01E07 - Episode 7
FR - Below the Surface - S01E08 - Episode 8

2.title: FR - Below the Surface - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: The recently returned Syrian warrior, June al-Baqee, is taken hostage by four Islamist terrorists, several of whom are believed to be returning Syrian warriors who – unlike June – fought ISIS in Syria. Philip Nørgaard, currently is on leave from TTF, June knows from the past and, unlike PET, believes that a major crime lies behind her disappearance. He decides to investigate the case on his own.

2.title: FR - Below the Surface - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Philips’ hunt for June has led them both aboard the Swedish ferry in the Sound. As June opportunistically manages to escape the hostages and hide, they now have to panic search the ferry before it reaches land. Meanwhile, Philip manages to alert the Ferry Captain, who activates the terrorist alarm. Soon PET and the Defense Intelligence Service are realizing that a highly tense and apparently Islamist terrorist campaign is underway. The police anti-terror unit TTF is activated, but this time without Philip to lead it.

2.title: FR - Below the Surface - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: The hostages have hijacked the ferry and taken passengers and crew hostage. While the ship is stationary in the middle of the Sound, the TTF from their position at Kronborg tries to get an overview of the situation. Negotiation and attack strategies are evaluated and the attackers motive investigated. On the ferry, the hostages still find June unsuccessful, and they must now use other means to lure her out of her hiding place. But Philip is also looking for June.

2.title: FR - Below the Surface - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: With Philip trapped in the ferry’s freezer room, the hostages use harsh methods to grab June’s cell phone, which turns out to be the object of their kidnapping and hijacking. On land, investigators SP and Simon quickly try to get closer to the hostages’ identities, motives and possible conspiracies, while the TTF with the government in the back sets for an armed surprise attack to get all the hostages released and the situation shut down once and for all.

2.title: FR - Below the Surface - S02E05 - Episode 5
FR - Below the Surface - S02E06 - Episode 6
FR - Below the Surface - S02E07 - Episode 7
FR - Below the Surface - S02E08 - Episode 8

meta.plot: Dans un métro de Copenhague, quinze innocents sont pris en otages par un groupe de terroristes . Alors que le gouvernement refuse de payer la rançon, les familles des victimes se tournent vers les médias pour faire pression. L'événement tragique tourne en débat politique national.

Conciliant romanesque et rigueur historique, cette superproduction européenne retrace l'histoire d'une souveraine exceptionnelle qui, de 1745 à 1780, dirigea l'Empire austro-hongrois en vivant au grand jour sa vie amoureuse et familiale.

1.title: FR - Marie-Thérèse d'Autriche - S01E01 - Part 1
FR - Marie-Thérèse d'Autriche - S01E02 - Part 2

2.title: FR - Marie-Thérèse d'Autriche - S02E01 - Part 1
FR - Marie-Thérèse d'Autriche - S02E02 - Part 2

meta.plot: Alain Delambre est un homme que le chômage a détruit. Contre toute attente, sa candidature est retenue pour un poste de DRH. Alain veut y croire à tout prix, quitte à mettre sa famille en danger. Quand il comprend qu’il n’est qu’un faire-valoir pour conforter une candidature déjà retenue, il profite de l’épreuve finale pour dynamiter le système. Alain n’a alors plus rien à perdre...

1.title: FR - Dérapages - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Dérapages - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Dérapages - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Dérapages - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Dérapages - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Dérapages - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: L'ancien catcheur professionnel Big Show quitte le ring et se prépare pour un challenge encore plus difficile : élever ses trois filles avec son épouse, en Floride.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E01 - Prototype
1.plot: The Big Show's teenage daughter from a previous relationship comes to live with him, his wife, Cassy, and their two younger daughters in Florida.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E02 - The Big Punisher
1.plot: The Big Show's real estate career gets off to a bad start; Mandy moves in with Lola.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E03 - The Big Brain
1.plot: JJ struggles to recognize that she's smart; Mandy runs for president; the Big Show fights his fear of mascots; Cassy bonds with Lola -- maybe too much.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E04 - The Big Sinkhole
1.plot: The Big Show and Lola compete in the kitchen; Cassy embroiders the truth at an open house; Mandy learns that not all politicians play dirty.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E05 - The Big Process
1.plot: While Cassy struggles to adjust to life with no job, Lola seeks to keep her father from spending too much time with her new boyfriend.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E06 - The Big Party
1.plot: While the Big Show takes Cassy on a wrestling cruise for their anniversary, Lola, Mandy and JJ throw a wild house party in their absence.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E07 - The Big Surprise
1.plot: Lola's best friend from Minnesota comes for a visit; Mandy and Taylor engage in a debate in front of the school; the Big Show gets back in the ring.

1.title: FR - Le Show de Big Show - S01E08 - The Big Decision
1.plot: Mandy and JJ hide a dog from their parents; Lola practices for her driving test; Cassy hires an assistant; the Big Show wrestles with a decision.

meta.plot: Reboot de la série anthologique culte des années 1980 créée par Steven Spielberg. A chaque épisode, le public est transporté dans des contrées où l'imaginaire et l’émerveillement se rencontrent, à travers le prisme des cinéastes, réalisateurs et scénaristes les plus talentueux du moment.

1.title: FR - Histoires fantastiques - S01E01 - The Cellar
1.plot: While restoring an old Iowa farmhouse, Sam discovers a time portal in the storm cellar that transports him to 1919.

1.title: FR - Histoires fantastiques - S01E02 - The Heat
1.plot: Tuka and Sterling are best friends whose bond transcends the physical world as they follow their dreams after tragedy strikes.

1.title: FR - Histoires fantastiques - S01E03 - Dynoman and the Volt
1.plot: An awkward young boy and his grandfather are transformed by the arrival of a mysterious ring ordered from a comic book 60 years ago.

1.title: FR - Histoires fantastiques - S01E04 - Signs of Life
1.plot: When her mother awakes from a six-year coma, teenage Alia struggles to reconnect with this stranger who can’t remember her old life.

1.title: FR - Histoires fantastiques - S01E05 - The Rift
1.plot: When a WWII pilot crashes in modern-day Ohio, a young widow and her stepson are swept up in his search for home. Season finale.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E01 - People Can Change
1.plot: Helena and her twin sister Siri have long lived separate lives. When a reunion approaches, Helena thanks and travels to an idyllic resort in the Italian Alps, but it quickly turns out that Siri has her own agenda with her invitation.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E02 - The Truth Will Set You Free (And Other Lies)
1.plot: Helena becomes painfully aware of Himmelsdalens main activity. Desperately, she tries to prove her true identity, but the staff of the institution dismiss her claims as another of Siri's manipulative tricks.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E03 - The Jackals Are Circling
1.plot: Doctors disagree on how to interpret "Siris" sudden behavioral improvement. Helena realizes that she can take advantage of her fellow prisoners' fear of Siri and get to know a secret organization that can pave the way for a possible escape.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E04 - Suffer The Little Children
1.plot: The doctors' actions suggest that they are beginning to take Helena's story seriously, but in fact they are just looking to confirm their own theories of treatment. Enzo understands that Helena speaks truth and shares her escape plan.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E05 - The Lord Giveth, And The Lord Taketh Away
1.plot: The young guide turns out to be anything but trustworthy, but confidence in Enzo exists. Helena gets valuable information about her sister during the sessions with Silva and a new plan to prove her identity is beginning to take shape.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E06 - Staying Alive
1.plot: Helena gets a life sign from Siri for the first time, which apparently has no plans to return. The flight is close, but first another risky mission awaits, as Helena refuses to leave the Valley of Heaven without having found the hammer.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E07 - Hail Mary
1.plot: Helena's newly won expectations are crushed when she is reached by the news of her own death, but suddenly Margot emerges with a new spark of hope. At the same time, Redpath and Fischer are trying to clear evidence in the hope of saving the facility's reputation.

1.title: FR - Sanctuary - S01E08 - Will The Circle Be Unbroken?
1.plot: Season finale. Helena wins over Silva on her side, but an accident happens when he tries to leave the facility. Now it remains only for Helena and Enzo to carry out their escape attempt - and they are both prepared to do so at all costs.

meta.plot: Siri et Héléna sont des jumelles qui ont été séparées à la naissance du fait de leur relation conflictuelle. Des années plus tard, Héléna rend visite à Siri dans une station balnéaire des Alpes. Mais, une fois sur place, elle se rend compte qu'elle a été piégée et qu'elle va se retrouver au sein d'un établissement psychiatrique désireux de faire des expérimentations...
Une adolescente cubano-américaine de douze ans souhaite devenir la future présidente des Etats-Unis. Mais, pour le moment, elle confie son quotidien de collégienne dans son journal intime.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E01 - Hello World
1.plot: Elena battles a series of curve balls at school, as she forgets to do a homework assignment for the first time ever and struggles with whether or not to keep a secret about her former best friend. Meanwhile her mom, Gabi, struggles to tell her kids about her new boyfriend, Sam.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E02 - The New Deal
1.plot: After learning Gabi has a new boyfriend, Elena worries about maintaining her role in the family. Bobby meets his match on the tennis court, and Sam helps Gabi deal with the loss of her favorite sandwich when it’s abruptly taken off the lunch menu.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E03 - Disaster Relief
1.plot: In an attempt to find her “reason for being,” Elena tries to become Orange Bay Middle’s Hurricane Watch Captain. Bobby prepares to go to “Miami Second Base” with new crush Monyca-with-a-Y. Gabi is excited to have her first real date with Sam, but family obligations keep getting in the way.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E04 - The National Mall
1.plot: In an effort to stop waiting for womanhood to come to them, Elena and Sasha stray from their usual mall stores to the forbidden Intimates & More – which leads Elena to become an accidental criminal. Bobby’s friends throw a kickback to try to help Bobby get more alone time with Monyca. Gabi tries to prove to her boss that she’s perfect for the new case at work.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E05 - Whistleblower
1.plot: When Elena learns her school mascot honors a man with a horrific past, she makes it her mission to have the mascot changed. Bobby grapples with his heritage when an opposing team member makes fun of him for the way his name is spelled. Gabi tries to find the work-life balance between a case she’s thrilled to be working on and a boss who doesn’t have boundaries.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E06 - Habeas Corpus
1.plot: When Elena gets detention, she discovers a new group of kids who are so much more than their reputation. Bobby is psyched to watch a cult classic with his buddies, but is surprised when the movie forces him to reveal an aspect of his life that he wasn’t prepared to share. Meanwhile, Gabi is bummed to have lost an important case to a bigger firm, only to be significantly cheered up by Sam.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E07 - Foreign Relations
1.plot: Elena desperately wants to go to her first middle school dance with Joey, only to find out that he would rather go with an eighth-grade girl. Bobby and Liam go to Jupiter to compete in a tennis tournament, but find their plans thwarted. Gabi is finally ready to donate the last of her late husband’s belongings, but her feelings change when she finds an old memento.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E08 - Matters of Diplomacy
1.plot: As she prepares for the big dance, Elena is shocked to discover she has a “mustache.” Attempts to fix it only make it worse, forcing her to “own” her look. Bobby and his buddies plan a prank for the dance, but when it doesn’t go the way Bobby expected, he lashes out at Liam. Gabi’s discomfort with her new relationship only grows when her mother invites the entire family over to meet Sam.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E09 - State of the Union
1.plot: Elena is shocked to discover that Sasha wants to switch roommates for the Tallahassee field trip. Desperate to run from her problems, she misses the bus on purpose, only to be driven by Gabi – who’s fleeing from her own issues with Sam. Bobby, still confused by his behavior at the dance, tells his girlfriend that he loves her.

1.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S01E10 - Two Party System
1.plot: In Tallahassee, Elena has unresolved issues with Jessica, and she decides to take a Senator’s inspiring advice, to find a solution. Bobby struggles with expressing himself and finds comfort in Sam’s guidance. Gabi tries to pretend like everything is fine at work, despite her new normal with Sam.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E01 - Back In Session
2.plot: Elena thinks she has it all figured out, but soon realizes that’s not the case.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E02 - Strategic Alliance
2.plot: Elena joins the school play to spend time with Sasha, but is dismayed when Claude also signs up.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E03 - Pleading the Fifth
2.plot: Elena enlists her Ñeñe (and Gabi’s mother) Francisca to help get her mom off her back.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E04 - United Nations
2.plot: Elena gets a lower-than-expected grade on a test and tries to get her grades up.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E05 - The National Stage
2.plot: When Sasha is overcome with stage fright, Elena to takes on the role to save the play.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E08 - Supreme Court Injustice
2.plot: Elena creates a new rebellious internet persona and loses herself a little in the process.
