2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E09 - First Gentleman
2.plot: Elena discovers that all of her friends have already had their first kisses.

2.title: FR - Journal d'une Future Présidente - S02E10 - October Surprise
2.plot: Elena finally gets the school to change its mascot, but students turn against her in the process.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E01 - Contamination
1.plot: An epidemic looms. Anne-Marie Leclerc, director of the Emergency Public Health Laboratory, must deal with an outbreak, an overzealous cabinet minister, and a media storm. To top it off, she discovers that her husband has been deceiving her. All this is trivial compared to what’s in store...

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E02 - The Invisible Threat
1.plot: The disease continues to spread silently. For now, Anne-Marie has other worries. She sets out to prove to the Minister that her lab is effective. She’s still hesitant to confront Marc. Françoise organizes a celebration for Xavier. It’s a small gathering – with immense consequences.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E03 - Suspicion
1.plot: Nelli tells Anne-Marie that a strange illness is affecting people she’s close to. Anne-Marie initiates an investigation into the deaths of the two homeless people. The young girl infected by Nelli’s cousin risks infecting others. In the lab, the arrival of a new staffer affects Anne-Marie’s work.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E04 - The Finger on the Trigger
1.plot: The dead can’t talk. Anne-Marie needs to know if people close to the victims are suffering from the disease. The clock is ticking. The lab team does all it can to break the chain of transmission and discover the nature of the virus.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E05 - The Last Card
1.plot: Unaware that the epidemic is developing a second hot-spot, Anne-Marie focuses her energy on finding medication that will help patients. Will she go as far as breaking the law? Françoise is now in contact with Marcellin, a friend of Xavier’s who’s suffering from the same “flu.”

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E06 - Out of Control
1.plot: Cases of COVA are multiplying; enforced home quarantines number in the hundreds. Anne-Marie redoubles her efforts to contain the epidemic and limit deaths. Confined to her home, Geneviève hides her symptoms. She has one wish – to be near her hospitalized son – even if that means breaking the rules.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E07 - Consequences
1.plot: Anne-Marie combats the misinformation prompting irrational behavior. The minister no longer has faith in her and wants to be directly involved in the experimental treatment. At the lab, Nelli follows up a new lead in the investigation. Will she find the source of the virus?

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E08 - Fear
1.plot: The 200th COVA death is about to be announced. How can public panic be minimized? Montrealers are fleeing the city and ignoring symptoms. Anne-Marie needs a new strategy.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E09 - The Hens
1.plot: A drop in the number of new cases heralds the end of the epidemic. Will there be a second wave? Anne-Marie is suddenly confronted with several cases of sick people who have had no contact with infected individuals. The team works to solve the puzzle. Sabrina and Juliette sell their first ferret.

1.title: FR - Épidémie - S01E10 - Scars
1.plot: Two days before the official announcement that the epidemic is over, the infection of two little girls brings Anne-Marie back to square one. The epidemiological investigation resumes, but the girls are uncooperative. Will Nelli get them to talk and prevent COVA from claiming more victims?

meta.plot: Un dangereux virus se répand à Montréal dans un groupe d’itinérants ostracisés et vulnérables. Combien de temps Anne-Marie Leclerc, infectiologue et directrice du Laboratoire d’urgence sanitaire, prendra-t-elle avant de réaliser l’existence de cette maladie hautement contagieuse ? Sera-t-il trop tard pour empêcher qu’une épidémie mortelle se propage dans l’ensemble de la population ?

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Pervin faces a treacherous dilemma after moving to Raqqa with her husband, a member of ISIS. SÄPO officer Fatima seizes the chance for a career boost.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As Ibbe lures Kerima, Sulle and Miryam into his scheme, Fatima pressures Pervin to access Husam's notebook, which contains details of the attack.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Pervin scrambles to cover her tracks after a fateful deed. Fatima stumbles upon a clue. Ibbe introduces Sulle and Kerima to a persuasive recruit.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Miryam sets Ibbe's plan in motion. Fatima's investigation hits a snag. Dolores makes a shocking discovery as hidden agendas come to light.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Calle visits with Suleiman and Tuba. Fatima arranges for Pervin's escape from Raqqa. Kerima hands Sulle a surprise from Ibbe.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Fatima tracks down a man who could be an important lead, but he's one step ahead. At wits' end, Suleiman heads for the Syrian-Turkish border with Calle.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: With Lisha's fate in her hands, Pervin enlists Husam's help. Fatima tails Jakob and Emil and turns to her last resort.

1.title: FR - Kalifat - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Nadir reveals an unexpected truth. Kerima prepares to deal the final blow. Fatima fulfills her end of the bargain with Pervin — at a price.

meta.plot: L'agent de sécurité nationale Fatima reçoit une information selon laquelle une attaque terroriste contre la Suède est en cours de planification. Pendant ce temps, Sulle, une adolescente de Stockholm, s'intéresse à son assistante étudiante qui ouvre les portes d'un monde nouveau et fascinant - le vrai chemin. Kalifat est un thriller sur les destins entremêlés de cinq jeunes femmes qui sont prises dans la force séduisante et destructrice du fondamentalisme religieux.

Chip Baskets rêve de devenir clown en France. Malheureusement, il est sans cesse rattrapé par la réalité : entre ses problèmes d'argent et le fait qu'il ne parle pas français, il finit par laisser tomber et rentrer à Bakersfield, plein d'espoir. Devenu clown dans un rodéo, il est forcé d'affronter son passé et de rivaliser avec ses frères pour plaire à leur mère.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E01 - Renoir
1.plot: A strong command of French is needed to really excel in French Clown School, which Chip Baskets finds out the hard way.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E02 - Trainee
1.plot: Chip takes a new clown under his wing at the rodeo. Mad clown love ensues.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E03 - Strays
1.plot: One of Martha's best friends is murdered and Chip comes to her aid.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E04 - Easter in Bakersfield
1.plot: Family drama brews over Easter brunch in Bakersfield.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E05 - Uncle Dad
1.plot: As Dale attempts to make a good deal on some furniture he leaves his daughters in Chip's care.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E06 - DJ Twins
1.plot: All the free bottled water in the world can't soften the sting of rejection during an evening with the family.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E07 - Cowboys
1.plot: Eddie drags Chip and Martha on a road trip to deliver some cowboy justice.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E08 - Sugar Pie
1.plot: Chip takes a sugar pie to his book club meeting.

1.title: FR - Baskets - S01E09 - Picnic
1.plot: Chip follows a turtle around Paris and meets Penelope.

meta.plot: Le Petit Nicolás a infiltré les milieux réservés aux politiciens, aux millionnaires et à la famille royale. Des témoins clés s'expriment dans cette série documentaire.

1.title: FR - Little Nicholas: Life of a Scoundrel - S01E01 - Fran
1.plot: Francisco details how he went from organizing exclusive parties for teens to arranging political and business deals in a house he never bought.

1.title: FR - Little Nicholas: Life of a Scoundrel - S01E02 - Nicolay
1.plot: How did Francisco attend Felipe VI's coronation? Two opposing stories try to explain. As his ambition grows, his world crumbles and the police burst in.

1.title: FR - Little Nicholas: Life of a Scoundrel - S01E03 - Francisco Nicolás Gómez Iglesias
1.plot: Francisco becomes a public figure and starts living in fear. His case soon implicates Commissioner Villarejo and airs Spain's dirty laundry.

meta.plot: À la recherche de la femme promise par Aphrodite, le berger Pâris découvre sa véritable identité, s'éprend d'Hélène de Sparte… et déclenche la guerre de Troie.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E01 - Black Blood
1.plot: Following a fateful encounter with the gods, the life of young herdsman Paris changes forever. At the Troy city games, he discovers something extraordinary, and on a trip to Sparta, he falls in love with unpredictable and far-reaching consequences.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E02 - Conditions
1.plot: The elopement of Helen and Paris causes chaos for the Greeks and the Trojans. Priam and Hecuba debate whether to send Helen back or risk the consequences. The goddess Artemis presents Agamemnon with an even more agonising dilemma.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E03 - Siege
1.plot: With the Greeks' grip on the city tightening, Hector and Paris embark on a dangerous journey to a nearby ally to ask for help. Relying on each other for survival tests and strengthens their bond, but a familiar face reappears to tell Hector the disturbing truth about his brother.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E04 - Spoils of War
1.plot: Achilles' shock attack on Troy's ally Cilicia devastates the Trojans and puts the spotlight on Helen. Andromache receives both good news and bad. A bitter dispute erupts between Agamemnon and Achilles.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E05 - Hunted
1.plot: Paris is hunted by the Greeks and returns to his former life, leaving Helen without an ally in Troy just as Pandarus's investigation gathers momentum. The Trojans attempt to take advantage of the divisions within the Greek camp.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E06 - Battle on the Beach
1.plot: The Trojans receive a message from the gods and embark on a daring raid with new allies. Helen's situation remains precarious. Achilles is provoked into returning to battle.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E07 - Twelve Days
1.plot: King Priam takes his life into his hands to visit Achilles and a truce is agreed, but will it hold? Helen faces a personal crisis as her relationship with Paris comes under strain.

1.title: FR - Troie : La chute d'une cité [MULTI-AUDIO] - S01E08 - Offering
1.plot: The Trojans are stunned to discover that all that remains of the Greek army in Troy is an offering to the gods in the form of a wooden horse. They believe the war may finally be over, and celebrations begin. But perhaps too soon.

meta.plot: Dans cette série produite par le prince Harry et Meghan Markle, des personnalités aspirant à faire bouger les choses livrent un récit inspirant de leurs vies.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E01 - Ruth Bader Ginsburg
1.plot: In one of her final interviews, the late Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg reflects on her tireless pursuit of equality for women — and for all.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E02 - Greta Thunberg
1.plot: Young Swedish activist Greta Thunberg's solitary protest for climate change became a reverberating call to action — and inspired a global movement.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E03 - Bryan Stevenson
1.plot: Human rights lawyer Bryan Stevenson fights for wrongly condemned prisoners and strives to change the narrative of racial equality in America.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E04 - Jacinda Ardern
1.plot: New Zealand Prime Minister Jacinda Ardern focuses on the power of love, kindness and empathy as she navigates national crises and barriers to leadership.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E05 - Siya Kolisi
1.plot: After growing up in poverty, Siya Kolisi led South Africa to win a Rugby World Cup as the team's first Black captain and began a philanthropic foundation.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E06 - Gloria Steinem
1.plot: As a writer and trailblazing feminist, Gloria Steinem sparked a movement among women while pushing for a future of equality, authenticity and respect.

1.title: FR - Live to Lead - S01E07 - Albie Sachs
1.plot: Freedom fighter Albie Sachs recounts his activism journey, the struggle to end apartheid in South Africa and how a car bomb nearly cut his life short.

meta.plot: La vie de huit familles sans papiers se trouve bouleversée par les changements de politique d'immigration aux États-Unis.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E01 - A Prayer in the Night
1.plot: Luis drives his girlfriend Kenia's son Noah to be reunited with his mother, so the two might be deported together. Alejandra awaits her fate.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E02 - The World Is Watching
1.plot: ICE traps Luis, and Alejandra's appeals are denied. Meanwhile, Ron and Karen's Israeli-born daughter, Bar, gets DACA status and a work permit.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E03 - The Deportation
1.plot: Alejandra is deported to Mexico with her daughter. Luis gets released as Kenia and Noah make a dangerous trek. Vinny, who once had asylum, worries.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E04 - The Crossing
1.plot: While Vinny takes a chance and checks in with ICE, Luis reunites with Kenia and Noah. The Dunoyer family struggles in a legal limbo.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E05 - A Family Torn Apart
1.plot: Vinny gets another chance as Eddie and Tyler move to Canada. Separated from their niece, "Miguel" and "María" are too scared to use their real names.

1.title: FR - Living Undocumented - S01E06 - Home Sweet Home
1.plot: Awa's father is detained after his asylum is revoked. Eddie and Tyler say goodbye. "Miguel," "María" and their niece wait on their asylum filing.

meta.plot: Chef de la police locale, Jo prend en charge une fillette amnésique qui a été retrouvée près d'un lieu où un mystérieux accident s'est produit. Pour résoudre cette affaire, il lui faut absolument découvrir l'identité de cette petite fille. Ce qu'elle découvrira sera bien au-delà tout compréhension...

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A police chief who takes in a young child she finds near the site of a mysterious accident who has no memory of what has happened.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E02 - Camera Wheelbarrow Tiger Pillow
1.plot: As Jo and Chris attempt to identify the sinister forces coming after Piper, a mysterious man hinders their search and brings danger too close to home. Meanwhile, Abby works with Piper to trigger her lost memory, while Jo makes a shrewd deal with Benny to secure Piper’s future safety.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E03 - 2 MG CU BID
1.plot: A mysterious illness takes hold of Piper, while Jo and Benny investigate a powerful tech mogul, Richard Kindred. As Piper’s health deteriorates, Jo weighs accepting help from an unknown source. Meanwhile, Alex works to decipher a radio frequency code from Piper’s plane crash, and Ed has a follow-up oncology appointment.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E04 - No Outlet
1.plot: After learning more about Piper’s origins, Jo struggles with the decision to shelter her. Benny enlists a friend to hack Kindred’s secret files, and Chris clashes with a headstrong informant he’s assigned to protect.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E05 - RDZ9021
1.plot: Jo is determined to prove Kindred was behind the attack on Benny and April.  Meanwhile, Piper experiences intense, confusing visions.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E06 - Mile Marker 14
1.plot: Jo and Benny investigate the death of Kindred’s former business partner. Meanwhile, Mia and Piper experiment with Piper’s powers, and Alex confronts Ed about his health.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E07 - Fatal Exception
1.plot: Jo and Chris rush to find Piper before she’s put in harm’s way. Meanwhile, Jo faces new challenges at home after betraying Alex and Ed’s trust.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E08 - American Chestnut
1.plot: The FBI arrives in Southold, complicating Jo’s efforts to find Emily. Meanwhile, Alex and Piper hunt for answers on a road trip, and the family celebrates Mia’s birthday.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E09 - Where You Belong
1.plot: Jo and Chris must evade the FBI as they investigate an elusive group of cyber terrorists. Ed’s presented with a cancer treatment that seems too good to be true, and a mysterious woman’s attempt to reach Piper puts the entire Evans family in danger.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E10 - 15 Years
1.plot: After months of dead ends, the Evans family receives information that could finally lead them to Piper; Ed helps Mia as she tries to send Piper a message; Alex and Chris stumble upon a mysterious shipment in the harbor.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E11 - Applied Sciences
1.plot: Jo and Brooks assemble an unlikely team as they attempt to communicate with Piper. Meanwhile, Piper is intent on saving Benny from Helen’s mysterious mission, and Alex receives a life-changing offer.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E12 - Killshot (1)
1.plot: Jo makes a high-stakes deal to take down Helen and keep Piper safe. Meanwhile, Helen attempts to replicate Piper’s powers for herself, and Benny struggles to earn back Jo’s trust before it’s too late.

1.title: FR - Émergence - S01E13 - Killshot (2)
1.plot: In the season finale, Jo and Brooks are in danger, and Piper’s determined to help. With Helen’s mysterious plan nearly realized, Piper recruits an unexpected team of allies to find them before it’s too late.

meta.plot: A veteran bookie struggles to survive the impending legalization of sports gambling, increasingly unstable clients, family, co-workers, and a lifestyle that bounces him around every corner of Los Angeles, high and low.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E01 - Always Smell the Money
1.plot: While collecting debts from clients around LA, Danny and Ray attempt to track down actor Charlie Sheen.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E02 - Making Lemonade
1.plot: After a violent run-in leaves them shaken, Danny and Ray attempt to talk a client off the ledge, while Hector aims to weasel his way onto the team.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E03 - Trust Your Sphincter
1.plot: While Lorraine's side-hustle backfires, Danny takes a series of high-risk, high-reward bets that could make or break his business.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E04 - Some Whales Nix the Vig
1.plot: Having been forced to take an enormous bet, Danny and Ray look for a way out, while Hector and Lorraine pursue running a psychedelic shaman business.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E05 - Beware the Family Jewels
1.plot: When a client settles his debts with a bounty of stolen jewelry, Danny and Ray use the baubles to appease the women in their lives.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E06 - Nepo Bookies
1.plot: After the passing of his beloved uncle and mentor, Danny faces increasing threats from his estranged cousin, Viggy.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E07 - The Super Bowl: God's Gift to Bookies
1.plot: The biggest night in sports brings a windfall of cash to Danny and Ray, but Hector makes a mistake that threatens the money and their lives.

1.title: FR - Bookie - S01E08 - A Square Job in a Round Hole
1.plot: A violent showdown causes Sandy to issue Danny an ultimatum: get legit or risk losing his family for good.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E01 - Mahnanga
2.plot: Danny heads to Modesto in search of Sandra, but soon finds himself at odds with his eccentric mother-in-law.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E02 - Go to the Labia
2.plot: While Lorraine takes Walt on a spiritual business trip, Hector recruits Danny and Ray to help collect on a soccer bet from a notorious drug lord.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E03 - Boom, Done, Hello Jesus
2.plot: Wendy finds herself at the center of a twisted love triangle. Lorraine pivots away from Hector. Danny and Ray hire a very odd banker.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E04 - Make It Look Like an Accident
2.plot: As Hector, Walt, and Lorraine squabble over their fledgling psychedelic business, Danny looks for a way to get Wendy out of his life.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E05 - Fruit's for Partners
2.plot: After an untimely personal loss, Ray's home life spirals out of control, causing Danny to take Hector under his wing.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E06 - Spooning Is Not Necrophilia
2.plot: When a client bets big on the WNBA, Danny and Ray realize their banker – and money – have gone missing.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E07 - Sphincter Money
2.plot: After Walt takes ownership of Danny's book, Danny and Ray take off for Costa Rica to assess the future of their business.

2.title: FR - Bookie - S02E08 - A Whale in Pomona
2.plot: A violent showdown in Costa Rica leads to a breakthrough for Danny and Ray. Back in LA, Danny and Marian have realizations of their own.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E01 - Code of Umbrellas
1.plot: In an ancient kingdom, a vicious warlord is on the hunt for a magical sword. Forced to escape his soldiers, the young girl who guards the sword is hunted until she receives some unexpected help from a pair of odd strangers.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E02 - Attack of the Xuán Guǐ Zōng!
1.plot: Shāng Bù Huàn has no intention of following the sly Lǐn Xuě Yā's advice and helping in the quest to protect the mystical Tiān Xing Jiàn sword, but when finds himself targeted by the evil sect that is trying to take it, he finds he might not have a choice.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E03 - The Woman In Night Devil Forest
1.plot: To defeat the villainous Miè Tiān Hái, Dān Fěi and her party will need to get through an army of bloodthirsty undead. The safest way to do this would be to recruit the help of a necromancer, but the person that Lǐn Xuě Yā has in mind makes the others very nervous, for a good reason...

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E04 - The Whereabouts of the Soul Echo Flute
1.plot: After an attempt to recruit the otherworldly Night's Lament, the group moves to rendezvous with the owner of the Soul Echo Flute. What they find in his place spells big trouble for the enigmatic Guǐ Niǎo...

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E05 - The Sword Devil, Shā Wú Shēng
1.plot: After the group returns to their inn, they talk about confronting the Screaming Phoenix Killer. Cán Yún is determined to fight Wú Shēng in a duel the next morning, because he considers himself expendable and because, if he wins, then he would make a name for himself. Xíng Hài offers her help in the form of spells. Guǐ Niǎo, however, feels that confrontation should only be used as a last resort. Bù Huàn gets tired of the talk and decides to head off on his own. He goes to the Devilwood Flower Garden himself and asks Wú Shēng to hand over the Soul Echo Flute. Wú Shēng refuses and they prepare to battle, but Guǐ Niǎo diffuses the situation and asks Wú Shēng the favor of becoming the performer of the Soul Echo Flute; in exchange, Guǐ Niǎo propositions Wú Shēng his head once they have reached the summit of the Demon Spine Mountains. Wú Shēng agrees. Meanwhile, Miè Tiān Hái suspects that Guǐ Niǎo's group will head to him.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E06 - Seven Comrades
1.plot: Bù Huàn is worried that the group cannot work together, as everyone is suspicious of each other. However, he still accompanies them as they ride a boat to the Demon Spine Mountains. Upon arrival to shore, the group encounters the Xuán Guǐ Zōng, led by Liè Mèi and Diāo Mìng. Cán Yún is motivated by Wú Shēng to attack and takes care of the "cannon fodder," while Hài and Yún Xiāo work together to raise the dead created by Cán Yún. Wú Shēng finally attacks after all the soldiers have been taken care of, killing Liè Mèi. Suddenly, Miè Tiān Hái shows up.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E07 - Demon Spine Mountains
1.plot: The group arrives at the Demon Spine Mountains, encountering the Valley of the Dead, the first trial.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E08 - The Enigmatic Gale
1.plot: After Bù Huàn storms off, Fěi admonishes the groups and runs after him. Guǐ Niǎo also follows her. The remaining four comrades decide to pass through the Labyrinth of Darkness using the Soul Echo Flute. Guǐ Niǎo and Fěi find Bù Huàn spying on some Xuán Guǐ Zōng soldiers, who are trying to catch more demon birds. The three of them ambush the Xuán Guǐ Zōng and use a bone-whistle to call the demon birds and ride them to the Seven Sins Tower. Once they arrive, they find Tiān Hái waiting for them. Fěi immediately attacks him, seeking vengeance for her brother and to obtain the hilt of the Tiān Xíng Jiàn. However, Guǐ Niǎo sprays Fěi with smoke, causing her to attack Bù Huàn instead. Diāo Mìng then knocks out Fěi and arrests Bù Huàn. They are then thrown into cages, where they are found by the other four. Yún Xiāo reveals Guǐ Niǎo's other name, Enigmatic Gale (Lüè Fēng Qiè Chén), while Fěi reveals his real name, Lǐn Xuě Yā.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E09 - The Essence of a Sword
1.plot: Yún Xiāo and Xíng Hài reveal that their letters from Lǐn Xuě Yā asked them to swindle Fěi of her crossguard. Wú Shēng affirms this with the letter he stole from Xuě Yā's teacher, Lián Qí. Cán Yún is shaken up by this turn of events, but still follows the other three as they leave Bù Huàn and Fěi in their cells. Wú Shēng returns to the Tower, though, seeking Xuě Yā's head as promised. Meanwhile, Xuě Yā and Miè Tiān Hái are having a discussion about the Tiān Xíng Jiàn. Wú Shēng interrupts this discussion, though, and before going after Xuě Yā, challenges Tiān Hái to a duel. Tiān Hái slays Wú Shēng, and explains his swordsmanship to Xuě Yā. While this happens, Bù Huàn breaks out of his cell.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E10 - A Thief's Pride
1.plot: After Bù Huàn exits his cell, he sees Wú Shēng fighting through endless streams of Xuán Guǐ Zōng fodder. Bù Huàn picks up a sword from a dead soldier and continues searching the Seven Sins Tower for Lǐn Xuě Yā. He then spots Xuě Yā and Diāo Mìng, and hides. Bù Huàn confronts Xuě Yā after Diāo Mìng leaves. Xuě Yā then explains his plan to Bù Huàn, and explains that both Yún Xiāo and Xíng Hài are villains that would take the Tiān Xíng Jiàn for themselves. All Xuě Yā wants to do is make Miè Tiān Hái despair. Xuě Yā also reveals the hiding place of the crossguard—the Limitless Temple. Bù Huàn then meets with Fěi and tells her the plan and to stay in the cell. Meanwhile, Xuě Yā sets up a deal with Tiān Hái. Afterwards, Xuě Yā meets with Bù Huàn again and gives him a hood that changes his appearance to that of Xuě Yā. They then begin to carry out Xuě Yā's plan. At the same time, Cán Yún breaks Fěi out of her cell.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E11 - A Proud Life
1.plot: Bù Huàn, disguised as Xuě Yā, meets with Tiān Hái, who becomes very suspicious, and together with the Xuán Guǐ Zōng, ride their demon birds to the Limitless Temple. As this happens, Xuě Yā discovers that Yún Xiāo and Xíng Hài also met with Tiān Hái. He then goes to unlock the safe containing the hilt of the Tiān Xíng Jiàn, transforming his pipe into chopsticks. Erstwhile, after Bù Huàn receives the gold agreed upon for the crossguard of the Tiān Xíng Jiàn, he is questioned by Tiān Hái and Diāo Mìng, who have already seen through his disguise. Bù Huàn then acts as bait to allow Xuě Yā to finish his part. However, Tiān Hái had kept the hilt on him the entire time. Meanwhile, Cán Yún and Fěi also head to the Limitless Temple by way of a Spirit Tree.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E12 - A Blade That Doesn't Cut
1.plot: After escaping, Bù Huàn happens upon Cán Yún and Fěi. He learns Yún Xiāo and Hài stole the crossguard and intend to sell it to Tiān Hái. Suddenly, Diāo Mìng and the Xuán Guǐ Zōng show up and attack the three of them. Bù Huàn shows his true colors and fights with a wooden branch. After killing Diāo Mìng and the Xuán Guǐ Zōng, Bù Huàn explains his philosophy as the three of them head to the Duàn Jiàn Cí. Meanwhile, Yún Xiāo and Hài meet with Tiān Hái at the Duàn Jiàn Cí. After removing the sword from the pedestal, Yāo Tú Lí is revealed, the lost demon god. Hài then kills Yún Xiāo for trying to prevent the awakening of the demon god. Xuě Yā confronts Tiān Hái outside the Duàn Jiàn Cí after Hài leaves.

1.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S01E13 - A New Duty
1.plot: Xuě Yā duels Tiān Hái, with Xuě Yā crushing Tiān Hái's spirit. Because of this, Tiān Hái destroys the Tiān Xíng Jiàn, releasing Yāo Tú Lí from the binding. Bù Huàn decides to face Yāo Tú Lí. He defeats the demon god by channeling the power of one of the thirty-six swords he collected from his travels, and banishes the demon god to the far reaches of space, ending the threat once and for all. He leaves the sword in the care of Cán Yún and Fěi, and departs, but not before receiving a parting gift from Xuě Yā.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E01 - Xian Zhen Fortress
2.plot: The Sorcerous Sword Index is a collection of 35 magical swords wielding otherworldly powers, many of which have the potential to bring ruin to the human realm. Shang Bu Huan has fled his homeland of Xi You with the index in order to keep it from falling into the wrong hands... but trouble has a way of finding him.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E02 - The Stolen Sorcerous Blades
2.plot: The Princess of Cruelty Xie Yingluo has managed to make off with a pair of blades from the Sorcerous Sword Index, and now she plots to use them and her mastery over poison to seize the rest from Shang Bu Huan.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E03 - The Princess of Cruelty
2.plot: Shang Bu Huan is stricken by the Princess of Cruelty's poison, leaving him and Lang Wu Yao on the run. Between the toxic temptress' attack and the and the ruthless pursuit of magistrate Xiao Kuang Juan, their quest to protect the Sorcerous Sword Index might be impossible... without some help.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E04 - Close Foes
2.plot: Lin Xue Ya and Shang Bu Huan are reunited, while the fugitive hunter Xiao Kuáng Juan approaches the Princess of Cruelty with an offer she can't refuse.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E05 - Hellfire Valley
2.plot: With his health recovered, Shang Bu Huan takes a stand against the poisonous Xie Yīngluo and the treacherous Xiao Kuang Juan.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E06 - A Poisoner’s Pride
2.plot: With his health recovered, Shang Bu Huan takes a stand against the poisonous Xie Yingluo and the treacherous Xiao Kuang Juan.

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E07 - Bewitching Whispers
2.plot: Xie Yīngluo has been bested, beaten, betrayed, and brutalized, and at this point she has nothing to lose. What will happen when the cornered scorpion is presented with a means of turning her doomed luck around?

2.title: FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E08 - The Song That Dooms Evil
FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E09 - The Path of the Strong
FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E10 - Demonic Swords/Holy Swords
FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E11 - The Dignity of Evil
FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E12 - The Hunting Fox
FR - Thunderbolt Fantasy (VOSTFR) - S02E13 - A Bizarre, Bloodstained Ballad

meta.plot: Thunderbolt Fantasy est un projet mené par Gen Urobuchi qui fait appel à l'art taiwanais des spectacles de marionnettes. Animation manuelle de marionnettes et effets visuels numériques se marient pour conter les aventures d'une valeureuse prêtresse pourchassée par une secte maléfique. Rencontres, trahisons et combats épiques jalonneront sa quête d'une relique volée.

meta.plot: Pouvoir voir les fantômes et autres esprits surnaturels est une lourde responsabilité. Le prince Lee Rin (Jung Il Woo), comme son père avant lui, découvre qu'il est capable de voir des fantômes et d'autres êtres surnaturels. Fort de ses nouvelles capacités, Lee Rin devient le chef d'un groupe de gardes de nuit qui patrouillent dans les rues du crépuscule à l'aube pour protéger les habitants de la dynastie Chosun contre les mauvais esprits. Moo Seok (Jung Yun Ho) est le meilleur épéiste du pays, qui est le fidèle garde du corps du prince. Mais leur loyauté sera mise à l'épreuve lorsqu'ils tomberont amoureux l'un de l'autre de la même femme - Do Ha (Go Sung Hee), successeur de la tribu des Ma Go, qui cherche leur aide pour protéger les esprits de la montagne Baek Do. Mais Park Soo Ryun (Seo Ye Ji), fille d'un officier de justice, ne recule devant rien pour épouser le prince Lee Rin. «Le gardien de nuit», également connu sous le nom de «Journal d'un gardien de nuit»

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E01 - Her Boy
1.plot: Julia and Benjamin meet by chance and start dating. When Julia introduces him to her grown-up children, they question if Benjamin's intentions are financially motivated.

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E02 - Her Daughter
1.plot: Julia realises she's in love with Benjamin. Patrick and Della, who are suspicious of Benjamin, follow him and catch him in a compromising situation. Is he really who he seems?

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E03 - Her Rival
1.plot: When Julia's children accuse Benjamin of infidelity it threatens to split them up. But their relationship grows stronger as they move in together and Benjamin proposes.

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E04 - Her Husband
1.plot: When Julia tells Ted about her engagement to Benjamin it causes unexpected consequences. Meanwhile Patrick entreats Julia to get Benjamin to sign a pre-nup to protect her wealth.

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E05 - Her Baby
1.plot: When Benjamin's half-brother turns up, Julia goes on a quest to find out what Benjamin's hiding. When she discovers his secret, will she still marry him?

1.title: FR - Le Doute - S01E06 - Her Love
1.plot: Julia is reeling from the revelations about Benjamin's past. But the future is up to her.

meta.plot: Julia et Benjamin se rencontrent par hasard et entament une histoire d'amour passionnée, malgré la différence d'âge. Benjamin a en effet 25 ans de moins que Julia. Quand celle-ci présente son nouvel amour à ses enfants, ces derniers se posent des questions sur son honnêteté.

Le livre de cuisine magique atterrit à Bay City entre les mains de deux demi-frère et soeur et de leur voisin. Pour résoudre un mystère centenaire, Zoe, Leo et Ish s'embarquent dans une incroyable aventure à travers les rues de la ville pour dénicher une recette secrète. Spin-off de Just Add Magic (2016).

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E01 - Just Add Opposites
1.plot: Three new protectors have the book in Bay City. The first thing Zoe, Ish and Leo learn is that the magic doesn't always work like you want it to.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E02 - Just Add Numbers
1.plot: A clue sends Ish and Zoe to a mysterious section of the library while Leo uses the magic to bond with his family.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E03 - Just Add Dad
1.plot: In attempt to connect with a relative, Zoe cooks a recipe that will allow her to relive memories from when she was a baby.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E04 - Just Add Coin
1.plot: The trio must hide a magical coin from the Wesson family. In the process, the spell begins to hide other important items from their life.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E05 - Just Add Volume
1.plot: The protectors cook a super-hearing spell in order to hear what song a silent music box is playing.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E06 - Just Add Grown-Ups
1.plot: Zoe, Ish, and Leo pretend to be adults for the day to obtain information about the Wessons and Zoe's dad.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E07 - Just Add Foresight
1.plot: The trio cooks up a magic recipe that allows them to see into the future in order to stay one step ahead of the Wessons.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E08 - Just Add Color
1.plot: Everything turns to black and white while the protectors find out what the three magic coins are for.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E09 - Just Add Waffles
1.plot: Zoe, Ish, and Leo are joined by Kelly, Hannah and Darbie to discover the location of the magical starter.

1.title: FR - Just add Magic : Mystery City - S01E10 - Just Add Goodbyes
1.plot: Bay City is in danger after the Wessons get the final ingredient to a powerful spell. Can our protectors stop them in time?

meta.plot: Dans une société qui valorise les gagnants, comment gérer l'échec ? Cette série s'intéresse aux athlètes qui ont transformé leur défaite cuisante en triomphe humain.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E01 - The Miscast Champion
1.plot: Forced into boxing by his abusive father, Michael Bentt became a world champ. But a knockout loss changes his life and helps him find his true passion.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E02 - The Jaws of Victory
1.plot: On the verge of relegation — and perhaps extinction — English soccer club Torquay United gets a final chance at survival thanks to a police dog.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E03 - Judgement
1.plot: Surya Bonaly dazzled figure skating fans with her skill, but being black in a mostly white sport made it tough to be fairly judged on the world stage.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E04 - Stone Cold
1.plot: An unbelievable loss in the 1985 Canadian championship leads curling legend Pat Ryan to perfect a dominant strategy that changes the sport forever.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E05 - Lost in the Desert
1.plot: After a sandstorm takes him off course, Olympian Mauro Prosperi's attempt to finish a brutal desert endurance race turns into a battle for survival.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E06 - Aliy
1.plot: Sled dog musher Aliy Zirkle spent years chasing a title in the famous Iditarod, but a harrowing experience on the trail in 2016 tested her fortitude.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E07 - Black Jack
1.plot: Playground hoops legend Jack Ryan’s shot at a pro career was sunk by a bad attitude and poor discipline, but he persevered to make a life in basketball.

1.title: FR - Losers - S01E08 - The 72nd Hole
1.plot: Golfer Jean van de Velde reflects on both the heartbreak and positives that came from his epic failure on the last hole of the 1999 Open Championship.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E01 - Friends and Enemies
1.plot: Young swordsman d'Artagnan arrives in Paris seeking the man responsible for killing his father – a quest that brings him into conflict with one of the king's guards. But as he quickly discovers, when you take on one Musketeer, you take on them all. It's soon back to business when the swashbuckling heroes are ordered to find a missing soldier who was carrying important letters on behalf of King Louis, while the dastardly Cardinal Richelieu plots to increase his political power.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E02 - Sleight of Hand
1.plot: Notorious criminal Vadim seeks to make life unbearable for the authorities that have imprisoned him. When he engineers a full-scale riot, it falls to the Musketeers to protect those whom he seeks to destroy.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E03 - Commodities
1.plot: The Musketeers must escort a merchant trader back to Paris and thwart his enemies.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E04 - The Good Soldier
1.plot: Aramis helps an old friend to uncover the truth behind a disastrous mission.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E05 - The Homecoming
1.plot: Porthos wakes up after his drunken birthday celebrations with a dead body next to him. The Musketeers must prove his innocence as he gets sentenced to death.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E06 - The Exiles
1.plot: Aramis and the other Musketeers help a young mother rescue her abducted baby son.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E07 - A Rebellious Woman
1.plot: The musketeers help save an enlightened woman who has been accused of witchcraft.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E08 - The Challenge
1.plot: A contest between the Musketeers and Red Guards gives D'Artagnan a chance to prove himself.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E09 - Knight Takes Queen
1.plot: The Musketeers come under siege in a convent whilst protecting the queen's life.

1.title: FR - The Musketeers - S01E10 - Musketeers Don't Die Easily
1.plot: Milady seeks her revenge against the Musketeers. Will the Musketeers outwit her or will she destroy them by manipulating their weakest link, D'Artagnan?

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E01 - Keep Your Friends Close
2.plot: The Musketeers must rescue a French general from an impenetrable Spanish prison.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E02 - An Ordinary Man
2.plot: D'Artagnan must protect King Louis when a notorious criminal kidnaps them both.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E03 - The Good Traitor
2.plot: The Musketeers help rescue an enemy's daughter in exchange for a deadly gunpowder formula.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E04 - Emilie
2.plot: A woman claims to have visions from God which instruct her to start a war with Spain.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E05 - The Return
2.plot: Athos must confront his past to protect the people he left behind.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E06 - Through a Glass Darkly
2.plot: An astronomer gathers the royal party to see an eclipse, but events take a dramatic turn.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E07 - A Marriage of Inconvenience
2.plot: The King’s cousin is ambushed while under Musketeer escort as she travels from Mantua to Sweden to make a political marriage that will be advantageous to France.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E08 - The Prodigal Father
2.plot: Porthos uncovers the truth about his past and questions his allegiance to the Musketeers.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E09 - The Accused
2.plot: The Musketeers must put their lives on the line when the queen is accused of treason.

2.title: FR - The Musketeers - S02E10 - Trial and Punishment
2.plot: The Musketeers must risk everything to save France from Rochefort's treacherous plan.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E01 - Spoils of War
3.plot: Athos, Porthos and D'Artagnan are fighting on the battlefront while Aramis has trouble living in contemplation as a monk. The Musketeers' search for missing gunpowder lead them to follow bandits to Aramis' monastery, where circumstance force them to collaborate to save the monastery's children and brothers. Aramis' finally accepts his true calling as a Musketeer and rejoins his brothers-in-arms in Paris.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E02 - The Hunger
3.plot: The corrupt Governor of Paris conspires with the Duke de Beaufort, primary provider of food for Paris, to stage a robbery of the city's granary and pin it on the refugees, only to later sell the stolen grain back to the King at an inflated price. D'Artagnan is taken captive along with the rioting refugees, and the other Musketeers (along with D'Artagnan's wife Constance, now in charge of the Musketeer garrison) must rescue them from the hands of the Red Guard before they are executed.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E03 - Brother in Arms
3.plot: King Louis tasks the Musketeers with bringing his exiled brother, the Duke of Orléans, back to Paris in order to mend bridges. On the way, the Duke is robbed of dangerous letters which could destroy Orléans. The Duke informs the corrupt Governor of this, and the Governor's Red Guard must race the Musketeers in the hunt for the thief.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E04 - The Queen's Diamonds
3.plot: Bonnaire is back, and the Musketeers need him to save the future of the English Crown.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E05 - To Play the King
3.plot: The Musketeers battle to restore order in Paris after Grimaud and Feron stage an ambitious Châtelet breakout, setting free a lunatic with murderous designs on the Louvre.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E06 - Death of a Hero
3.plot: It's the day of reckoning, as Grimaud vows to kill the Musketeers in a series of savage co-ordinated attacks and puts Feron to the ultimate test in his bid for power. The furious battle for survival sparks a series of revelations that threaten to destroy Paris. Before the day is out, a hero falls, there’s a traitor on the rise and the Musketeers will be changed forever.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E07 - Fool's Gold
3.plot: Chasing Grimaud, the Musketeers make a troubling discovery in a village ruled by women.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E08 - Prisoners of War
3.plot: The Queen's reputation is on the line after Grimaud kidnaps Aramis.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E09 - The Prize
3.plot: When death strikes the Louvre, Treville takes controversial steps to protect the Dauphin from the unholy alliance of Grimaud, Gaston and the Duke of Lorraine. His secretive tactics isolate the Queen and threaten to drive even his loyal Musketeers apart.

3.title: FR - The Musketeers - S03E10 - We Are the Garrison
3.plot: Following Treville's funeral the musketeers survive an attempt by Grimaud to kill them when their garrison is torched, leaving many casualties, and gunpowder and weapons stolen. To lure the musketeers into a trap Grimaud takes hostages including Sylvie but the four comrades stage a rescue, and the queen and Dauphin are restored to the palace with Milady as the royal spy master, her first task being to take care of Gaston. However, the mortally wounded Grimaud escapes and the musketeers must stop him from blowing up the city with the stolen gunpowder.

meta.plot: Dans la France du XVIIe siècle, les aventures d'Athos, Porthos, Aramis et d'Artagnan, mousquetaires du Roi déjouant les complots organisés par le Cardinal de Richelieu et la mystérieuse Milady de Winter...

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E01 - The Pilot Episode Sanction
1.plot:
Wendy Watson is thrust into the middle of a science experiment gone wrong while temping at a laboratory. Fortunately for Wendy, The Middleman, a crime fighting comic-book-like superhero, shows up to save the day.

Impressed by how Wendy handles herself when faced with danger, and in need of a colleague, the Middleman recruits Wendy into his secret organisation.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E02 - The Accidental Occidental Conception
1.plot: Wendy and The Middleman attempt to stop a revived Terracotta Warrior from unleashing a hail of fire upon Earth.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E03 - The Sino-Mexican Revelation
1.plot: Sensei Ping is abducted by a band of Mexican wrestlers. The Middleman benches Wendy who failed to stop Ping's abduction and embarks on a solo rescue mission. However, despite The Middleman's efforts, he too is captured, which leaves Wendy to save the day.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E04 - The Manicoid Teleportation Conundrum
1.plot: A group of peaceful aliens with an addiction to plastic surgery are being hunted down by a homicidal entity. Meanwhile, Ben puts his and Wendy's break-up video on the internet: Wendy is not thrilled. Recap: Wendy is working on a painting of a gorilla with a gun and shows it off to Lacey. Lacey is less than thrilled but has to admit that Wendy is enthusiastic about her work. However, she also...

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E05 - The Flying Fish Zombification
1.plot: Wendy and The Middleman work to contain a trout-eating zombie outbreak.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E06 - The Boy-Band Superfan Interrogation
1.plot: The Middleman and Wendy investigate a haughty 14-year-old named Cindy who has a dangerous obsession with Drysea, "the world's most popular boy band".

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E07 - The Cursed Tuba Contingency
1.plot: Wendy and The Middleman don Edwardian clothing to destroy a cursed tuba from the RMS Titanic before it can harm innocent civilians. Elsewhere, The Middleman and Lacey share a movie together and consider dating.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E08 - The Ectoplasmic Panhellenic Investigation
1.plot: Wendy goes undercover as a sorority sister to investigate ghost sightings at a university. Meanwhile, Tyler resurfaces and mistakes Lacey for the woman he met on the day of the Lucha Libre attack.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E09 - The Obsolescent Cryogenic Meltdown
1.plot: A former Middleman, Guy Goddard, is revived from his cryogenic slumber to do battle with his arch-foe, The Candle.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E10 - The Vampiric Puppet Lamentation
1.plot: To prevent the resurrection of every vampire that has ever lived, The Middleman and Wendy search for a possessed puppet that once belonged to Vlad the Impaler. Meanwhile, Noser pulls a disappearing act.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E11 - The Clotharian Contamination Protocol
1.plot: A malign Ida who has been infested by nanobots from outer space dupes The Middleman and Wendy into initiating a lockdown at Middleman HQ.

1.title: FR - The Middleman (VOSTFR) - S01E12 - The Palindrome Reversal Palindrome
1.plot: Wendy is abducted by The Palindrome, a supervillain, and taken to a mirror universe that is run by the ironfisted Fatboy Industries.

meta.plot: Deux amis de longue date, tous deux flics avec des méthodes très opposés, se retrouvent colocataires avec leurs ados respectifs. Ils vont intégrer la même brigade à la PJ.

meta.plot: Natalie, jeune française expatriée en Israël, est accusée d’avoir assassiné son mari le soir de ses noces. Karim, un diplomate français chargé d’apporter sur place son aide à des ressortissants en difficulté, est peu à peu fasciné par Natalie. Mais il ne parvient pas à savoir si la jeune femme est profondément perdue et vulnérable, ou redoutablement manipulatrice. Obsédé par cette affaire, Karim va plonger dans le passé mystérieux de Natalie et de sa famille.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Natalie is a young French expatriate who lives in Israel with her family.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Detectives Esti and Rafi conduct a crime scene reconstruction. Natalie’s memories of the event are confused.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: When Karim asks one of his French friends to investigate Natalie’s past life in the city of Nice, on the Riviera, he makes some disturbing discoveries.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Karim suspects Natalie’s ex, Alex Perretti, of Eran’s murder, and informs the police that Perretti has been spotted in the area.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Natalie doesn’t find the answers she’s looking for, but she doesn’t give up.

1.title: FR - Possessions - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Detective Esti questions Natalie’s mother and gets her to confess.

1.title: FR - Magnus - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: After a relatively large fad during an action at the brewery hall, Magnus is set to solve a big case against all odds. The neighbor Nikolai and the depressed colleague Dan join.

1.title: FR - Magnus - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Magnus - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Magnus - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Magnus - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Magnus - S01E06 - Episode 6

meta.plot: Magnus - perhaps the police's worst investigator - is set to solve a murder from another world, and then we mean a completely different world.
Seemingly the perfect crime, the murder of a cop by a fellow Detroit detective activates forces that will forever alter the detective's life, and pull him into the heart of the Detroit underworld.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: When Detectives Frank Agnew and Joe Geddes murder a fellow cop, the Detroit Police Department launches an investigation that filters through more than just the homicide department. Rising crime lord Damon Callis learns how far he will go to make a name for himself on the streets of Detroit.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E02 - The Goat Rodeo
1.plot: The DPD searches McCann's house; Frank finds game-changing evidence; Maya and Damon reevaluate plans.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E03 - No Rounds
1.plot: Frank and Geddes work to cover up the evidence in McCann's murder; Damon's crew prepares for the opening.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E04 - Catacombs
1.plot: Frank searches for Katia; Geddes deals with family issues; tension rises in the Blind Pig.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E05 - Cake on the Way
1.plot: The DPD's investigation intensifies when a low-level murder is linked to McCann. Damon has to pay the cost of his ambitions.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E06 - The Way Things Are
1.plot: Frank searches unfamiliar territory for Katia; Damon must ask an enemy for help; Nick proves his worth.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E07 - There Was a Girl
1.plot: The DPD catches a break on the case; Damon and Maya's freedom is in jeopardy; Geddes and Frank have a confrontation.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E08 - Revelations
1.plot: Frank testifies; Geddes and his family take a trip; Damon and Maya start their new lives.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E09 - Ann Arbor
1.plot: Frank grapples with his sanity as the realities of his actions start to take their toll. Meanwhile, the DPD catches a major break in the McCann case.

1.title: FR - Low Winter Sun - S01E10 - Surrender
1.plot: While the DPD gets close to solving McCann's murder, Frank is forced to make a critical decision. Damon makes his boldest move yet.

meta.plot: Quinze ans après avoir perdu Gabriel, le père de son fils, dans le tsunami qui ravagea la Thaïlande en 2004, Claire, récemment installée à Abu Dhabi, croit le reconnaître au cours d’une soirée. Elle part à sa recherche dans cette ville inconnue et mystérieuse. C’est sous le feu des balles qu’elle retrouve Gabriel, faux mort et vrai agent secret. Brutalement, la vie de Claire bascule dans le monde clandestin de l’espionnage...

FR - Mirage - S01E02 - Episode 2

meta.plot: En 2016, Jacques Hamelin est devenu le 4e Président de l’histoire du Québec indépendant. Il est confronté à de nombreux défis, dont un qui n’est pas le moindre: 25 ans après sa séparation acrimonieuse du Canada, la nation est toujours coincée dans un débat identitaire : est-ce que le Québec devrait retourner au sein du Canada? Plus de 150 ans après l’Acte d’Amérique du Nord britannique, après des décennies de disputes constitutionnelles et malgré la création d’un État souverain, le débat semble simplement s’être inversé.

meta.plot:
Chris Colorado is a French animated television series consisting of 26 episodes, created by Thibaut Chatel, Franck Bertrand and Jacqueline Monsigny, with original series music is written by Fabrice Aboulker. It was first aired in France on 18 December 2000 on Canal+, and later on FR3, and it is broadcast regularly on the Mangas channel.

Each episode is approximately 26 minutes long. DVD copies of the show are almost impossible to find, as it had a very low release rate. One DVD containing the first four episodes has been released in France.

meta.plot: Rebecca et Romain sont mariés. Un bonheur apparemment sans nuage jusqu'à l'arrivée du frère de Romain, Mickaël et de sa petite amie Émilie. Une nuit, Romain et Rebecca surprennent Mickaël chargeant un tapis roulé dans son coffre. Le lendemain, ils réalisent qu'Emilie a mystérieusement disparu…
