meta.plot: In the very near future, a team of eight astronauts embarking on a six-year journey to explore Venus and other planets in the solar system, find their lives and destinies intertwined and carefully directed, not only by Mission Control officials on Earth, but also by an unseen force which is much closer and far more powerful.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Eight Astronauts-four men and four women-prepare for a six year journey aboard the Antares.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E02 - Natural Selection
1.plot: A secret element in Storage Pod 4 affects the crew which leads to a dangerous crisis. Meanwhile, Ted's wife Eve Shaw reveals the true nature of the mission to him.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E03 - Threshold
1.plot: Personal and professional relationships get more intense on Earth and aboard the Antares. In the meantime, the Antares' crew undergoes cellular and psychological transformations which is caused by the unseen power behind the mission.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E04 - H2IK
1.plot: The Antares crew loses control over power, heat and gravity after a series of system failures and has to face its first major crisis.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E05 - Rubicon
1.plot: The Antares crosses a point of no return and turning back to Earth is no longer an option. In the meantime, each of the crew members has to cope with a personal point of no return.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E06 - Bacon
1.plot: While getting closer to Venus, some crew members are confronted with memories of past actions and struggle with guilt. When one of them gets into a life-threatening situation, the team unites to save her.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E07 - Fear
1.plot: Hallucinations put crew members' lives in danger just as they are about to start a promotional event.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E08 - Love, Honor, Obey
1.plot: An impending solar flare puts the crew in danger; the strange force in Pod 4 sends out an irresistible siren call.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E09 - Eve Ate the Apple
1.plot: The crew of the Antares learns about Pod 4 and the real reason for their mission to Venus.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E10 - Deja Vu
1.plot: It's election day but the crew aboard the Antares is still processing the news about their real mission on Venus.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E11 - Solitary
1.plot: The Antares crew has to face the isolation and loneliness of space during the final hours before the Venus landing.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E12 - Venus
1.plot: The day of the landing on Venus has come. The day that will change their lives eventually.

1.title: FR - Defying Gravity - S01E13 - Kiss
1.plot: After landing on the burning surface of Venus, Zoe walks toward a sound only she can hear, drawn by her destiny into almost certain destruction.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Dash is a quiet, idealistic precog secretly living among society, who tries to use his ability to see future murders to save lives by teaming up with the brash, but shrewd, Detective Lara Vega.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E02 - Mr. Nice Guy
1.plot: Dash and Vega team up again to find a killer who is currently down on love. Meanwhile, Dash continues to reach out to his siblings for help.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E03 - Hawk-Eye
1.plot: With the initiation of Hawk-Eye, a new police program monitoring suspicious behavior, Vega seeks help from Akeela to get Dash in as the new program analyst. Meanwhile, Vega and Dash begin to suspect that Arthur may have a bigger plan up his sleeve.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E04 - Fredi
1.plot: Dash goes undercover to catch a woman suspected of having a vendetta against her sister's killers. Meanwhile, Agatha begins to set her own plans in motion.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E05 - The Present
1.plot: After Dash and Vega realize that Vega is the victim in Dash's latest vision, they team up with someone who played a key role in the murder of Vega's father many years ago. Meanwhile, Arthur digs further into his and his siblings' memories.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E06 - Fiddler's Neck
1.plot: Arthur and Dash team up to help a young girl in poor health whom they fear is the victim they see in their next vision. Although modern technology could save her, the community in which she lives prohibits the use of such equipment. When Vega and Agatha jump into the case, everyone must work together.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E07 - Honor Among Thieves
1.plot: Dash endeavors to investigate a murder on his own, but when things don't go as planned, Vega is forced to reluctantly recruit Arthur and his underworld connections to help out Dash. Meanwhile, details of Agatha, Arthur and Dash's pasts are uncovered.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E08 - The American Dream
1.plot: Dash and Vega follow a vision to the Southside, encountering distrust from the community. Meanwhile, Blake's suspicion of Vega and Dash intensifies.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E09 - Memento Mori
1.plot: Blake withholds information from the Defense Intelligence Agency when he learns they are on the precogs' trail, and Arthur takes matters into his own hands to save them. Meanwhile, Dash gets a vision of a political assassination that intrudes into Vega's personal life.

1.title: FR - Minority Report - S01E10 - Everybody Runs
1.plot: The precogs and Vega must come together to thwart a chemical attack by Memento Mori, meanwhile Blomfeld is determined to get the precogs back in the milk bath.

meta.plot:
En 2040, Agatha et ses deux frères jumeaux Dash et Arthur ont la capacité unique de prédire le futur, notamment de prévoir les meurtres avant qu'ils ne soient perpétrés. 

Sous la supervision de scientifiques, Precrime les a isolé pour exploiter leurs dons et ainsi stopper de nombreux crimes avant qu'ils ne surviennent. 

En 2065, maintenant dans leurs trentaines, la fratrie a été libérée et Precrime démantelé. 

Arthur a malheureusement été séparé de son frère et sa soeur. 

Toujours hanté par des flashs lui montrant le sort funeste de nombreuses victimes, Dash tente en vain d'en sauver au moins une. 

Mais sans son frère, son don est incomplet. 

Un enchaînement de circonstances l'amène à collaborer avec une enquêtrice, Lara Vega. 

Ensemble, ils vont s'efforcer d'arrêter les criminels, tout en préservant le secret de Dash.

Bien des années avant la légende de Superman, la Maison El était couverte de honte et ostracisée. La série suit Seg-El, le grand-père de l’Homme d’Acier, au moment où il apporte l’espoir et l’égalité sur Krypton, transformant une planète en plein désarroi en un lieu digne de donner naissance au plus grand super-héros jamais connu.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: Superman's grandfather, Seg-El, learns Krypton is in danger of being destroyed so that his future grandson will never be born.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E02 - House of El
1.plot: After suffering a tragedy, Seg must adjust to a new life, a new rank and a new threat.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E03 - The Rankless Initiative
1.plot: During a military crackdown on Seg's home district, Seg and Adam Strange race to find a deadly Sentry.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E04 - The Word of Rao
1.plot: Seg is approached by a Black Zero leader as Rao finds a scapegoat for the failed Rankless Initiative.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E05 - House of Zod
1.plot: Jayna grapples with her torn loyalties as Seg fights for survival within the heart of Black Zero.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E06 - Civil Wars
1.plot: Seg is faced with an impossible choice that will shape the El legacy and the fate of the universe.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E07 - Transformation
1.plot: After a failed coup, Daron punishes the conspirators. Lyta and Dev go in search of Jayna.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E08 - Savage Night
1.plot: A resistance movement begins to form to impede the Voice of Rao's increasing power and influence.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E09 - Hope
1.plot: Seg must decide if he can make the ultimate sacrifice in service of the greater good of Kandor.

1.title: FR - Krypton - S01E10 - The Phantom Zone
1.plot: Seg races to save his city from being overtaken as the bottling of Kandor begins.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E01 - Light-Years from Home
2.plot: Seg-El is stranded far from home, where his grandfather leads a rebellion against General Zod.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E02 - Ghost in the Fire
2.plot: Adam Strange and Seg evade a bounty hunter, while General Zod uses Nyssa to further his cause.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E03 - Will to Power
2.plot: The Rebels gain advantage against General Zod, as Seg goes head-to-head with Brianiac.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E04 - Danger Close
2.plot: Seg and Adam return to a very different Kandor. Val and his Rebels prepare a major offensive.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E05 - A Better Yesterday
2.plot: Amidst a hostage negotiation that could end the war on Krypton, Seg seeks answers about Lyta.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E06 - In Zod We Trust
2.plot: In the wake of tragedy, Seg helps Nyssa rescue their son. Alliances on Wegthor fracture.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E07 - Zods and Monsters
2.plot: General Zod pushes for control of a dominating weapon. Seg and Nyssa fight to save Seg's life.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E08 - Mercy
2.plot: Dev and Jayna help Seg and Nyssa target General Zod's fleet, when they make a shocking discovery.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E09 - Blood Moon
2.plot: Zod brings Doomsday to heel and unleashes him on the Rebels, and Seg, Val, and Kem fight a last-ditch battle to hold the creature back while their compatriots escape.

2.title: FR - Krypton - S02E10 - The Alpha and the Omega
2.plot: The future of Krypton is at stake as Seg faces off against his enemy, General Zod, with the help of his allies.

meta.plot: À sa mort, l'égocentrique Eleanor Shellstrop se retrouve par erreur dans un monde paradisiaque. Déterminée à y rester, elle va tenter de devenir une meilleure personne.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E01 - Everything Is Fine
1.plot: Newly-deceased Eleanor Shellstrop is sent to the Good Place, but only by mistake; Eleanor is determined to become a better person in her afterlife with help from friends Chidi and Janet; Eleanor tries to prove to Chidi that she's worthy of his help.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E02 - Flying
1.plot: Eleanor tries to prove to Chidi that she is worthy of his help. Meanwhile, Tahani and Jianyu try to help Michael feel better about the unknown flaw in his Neighborhood.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E03 - Tahani Al-Jamil
1.plot: Chidi begins formally teaching Eleanor about ethics, and lesson No. 1 is: be kind to your neighbor. Michael and Janet help Chidi find a new, exciting hobby.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E04 - Jason Mendoza
1.plot: Eleanor has a hard time remaining hidden.  Michael asks Tahani to assist a neighbor in finding her true purpose.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E05 - Category 55 Emergency Doomsday Crisis
1.plot: Eleanor's eagerness to learn ethics from Chidi becomes the full-time job he never wanted. Meanwhile, Michael and Janet focus their attention on a Neighborhood emergency.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E06 - What We Owe to Each Other
1.plot: Eleanor is enlisted to help Michael with an important task that could determine her fate in the Good Place. Meanwhile, Chidi agrees to be the third wheel in an effort to help out his friend.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E07 - The Eternal Shriek
1.plot: Eleanor puts Janet in her crosshairs to save Michael from eternal suffering.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E08 - Most Improved Player
1.plot: Michael has a private meeting with Eleanor, who is put to the test. Also, Chidi harbors a secret and mulls over what to do.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E09 - ...Someone Like Me as a Member
1.plot: Michael faces a challenge when he tries to resolve an unprecedented situation. In addition, Chidi makes a connection, to Eleanor's chagrin, and a different side of Janet emerges.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E10 - Chidi's Choice
1.plot: Eleanor makes a surprising personal discovery. Meanwhile, Michael tasks an indecisive Chidi with coming to an important decision and Jianyu makes a big announcement.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E11 - What's My Motivation
1.plot: Eleanor and Tahani hatch a plan while Michael makes a startling discovery. Meanwhile, Chidi confides in Eleanor after learning some interesting news.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E12 - Mindy St. Claire
1.plot: With the help of Chidi and Tahani, Michael faces his biggest challenge yet. Meanwhile, Eleanor, Jianyu and Janet are faced with a monumental decision.

1.title: FR - The Good Place - S01E13 - Michael's Gambit
1.plot: Eleanor, Jason, Chidi and Tahani argue about which two of them should go to the Bad Place. Eleanor has a shocking realization about the Good Place.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E01 - Everything Is Great!
2.plot: Having had their memories erased by ambitious master architect Michael, Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani and Jason again settle into the Good Place, unaware of what has previously transpired...except that Eleanor discovers the one clue she had left for herself and attempts to piece things together.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E02 - Dance Dance Resolution
2.plot: Michael continues to work out the kinks in his grand plan. Meanwhile, Eleanor stumbles across a secret.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E03 - Team Cockroach
2.plot: Michael approaches things from a new angle. Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani and Jason struggle to make a collective decision.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E04 - Existential Crisis
2.plot: Tahani throws a dinner party to impress. Eleanor and Jason both have to lend a hand when things don't go as planned.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E05 - The Trolley Problem
2.plot: Chidi and Eleanor tackle a famous ethical dilemma, leading to a conflict with Michael. Meanwhile, Tahani harbors a secret and confides in Janet.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E06 - Janet and Michael
2.plot: When the Neighborhood experiences a small glitch, Michael has to resolve the issue with Janet before it gets out of control.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E07 - Derek
2.plot: Janet creates a big problem for Michael. Meanwhile, Eleanor lets Chidi  in on a secret, and Jason puts Tahani in a difficult position.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E08 - Leap to Faith
2.plot: Michael receives a surprise visitor. Meanwhile, Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani and Jason attempt to solve a riddle.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E09 - Best Self
2.plot: Michael finds himself in a bind. Meanwhile, Eleanor sparks an idea that has Chidi, Tahani, Jason and even Janet laying their feelings on the line.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E10 - Rhonda, Diana, Jake, and Trent
2.plot: Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani, Janet, and Jason head to a destination that may have lasting implications.

2.title: FR - The Good Place - S02E11 - The Burrito
2.plot: Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani, and Jason consider just how much they have (or have not) improved. Michael is left to deal with the consequences of his recent actions.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E01 - Everything Is Bonzer!
3.plot: Michael intervenes in the near-death accidents of Eleanor, Chidi, Tahani and Jason on Earth, in hopes that a second chance at life allows them to become better versions of themselves.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E02 - The Brainy Bunch
3.plot: Michael's grand scheme hits an unexpected snag and forces him to take drastic measures.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E03 - The Snowplow
3.plot: A surprising announcement from one of the humans threatens to dissolve the group.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E04 - Jeremy Bearimy
3.plot: The group explores the three main branches of ethical thought.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E05 - The Ballad of Donkey Doug
3.plot: Jason visits with some people from his past while Chidi gets help in resolving a problem.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E06 - A Fractured Inheritance
3.plot: Eleanor makes a startling discovery that tests her resolve, Tahani looks to make amends and Janet does some bonding.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E07 - The Worst Possible Use of Free Will
3.plot: Eleanor recalls some forgotten events from her past.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E08 - Don't Let The Good Life Pass You By
3.plot: Michael and Janet visit the person they believe to be the blueprint for how to live a good life on Earth; Eleanor turns to Tahani for advice.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E09 - Janet(s)
3.plot: While Eleanor and the gang contend with an intense out-of-body experience, Michael hatches a plan with Janet's help.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E10 - The Book of Dougs
3.plot: Michael's resolve is put to the test. Meanwhile, Jason wrestles with his feelings and Chidi surprises Eleanor.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E11 - Chidi Sees the Time-Knife
3.plot: Michael arranges an important meeting and Janet makes a reconnection.

3.title: FR - The Good Place - S03E12 - Pandemonium
3.plot: Michael's crisis forces Eleanor to assume the title of the neighborhood architect. Tahani makes a discovery about the new humans.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E01 - A Girl from Arizona (1)
4.plot: With Eleanor assuming the role of the architect, the group adapts to the challenges facing them when four test subjects inhabit a new neighborhood under their supervision.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E02 - A Girl from Arizona (2)
4.plot: Eleanor, Michael, Janet and Tahani have their hands full when the new residents begin to show their true colors. Jason receives some unsettling news.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E03 - Chillaxing
4.plot: Michael and Eleanor discover something troubling and turn to an unusual source for help. Tahani lends her expertise to assist with one of the new residents.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E04 - Tinker, Tailor, Demon, Spy
4.plot: As the group deals with a frustrating lack of progress, a visitor arrives and makes a shocking claim that causes them to question who can be trusted.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E05 - Employee of the Bearimy
4.plot: Michael and Jason sneak into Demon-Con. Left in charge of the neighborhood, Eleanor copes with Derek's ineptitude and Tahani's dissatisfaction.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E06 - A Chip Driver Mystery
4.plot: After Brent writes an offensive book, Eleanor, Michael and the others try to help him evolve. One of the humans discovers Jason's true identity.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E07 - Help is Other People
4.plot: With one day left in the year, Simone reveals that she's suspicious about the neighborhood -- and her investigation could derail the entire experiment.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E08 - The Funeral to End All Funerals
4.plot: As the Judge hears Michael and Shawn's arguments about the results of the experiment, Janet and the humans give each other the funerals they deserved.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E09 - The Answer
4.plot: With time running out to find answers, Chidi must sort through his life -- and afterlives -- before he can provide the help everyone needs.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E10 - You've Changed, Man
4.plot: The group scrambles to devise a new afterlife system that the Good and Bad Places can agree on before it's too late. Chidi has a newfound confidence.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E11 - Mondays, Am I Right?
4.plot: While the humans search for test candidates, Michael trains a group of architects. Eleanor doesn't want Chidi to learn too much about her past.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E12 - Patty
4.plot: Arriving at a new place, Michael receives an unexpected honor. Meanwhile, the rest of the group explores — and learns a shocking truth.

4.title: FR - The Good Place - S04E13 - Whenever You're Ready
4.plot: Michael works with the Joint Council of Afterlife Affairs to smooth out kinks in the system. Jason and Tahani move on. Eleanor tries to influence Chidi.

meta.plot: Pour la liberté retrace l'histoire du Lt Sodhi et de ses troupes d'hommes et de femmes qui se sont battus héroïquement pour l'indépendance de l'Inde, au sein de l'Armée Nationale Indienne. Armée formée à la suite de la défaite Britannique à Singapour, pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale, et menée par le chef charismatique qu'était "Netaji" Subhash Chandra Bose.

1.title: FR - Le Combat Oublié - S01E01 - Shonan
1.plot: An introverted old man (Old Sodhi) has come to visit his sister (Urmila) and her family, Subhash (Urmila’s son) and Amar (Subhash’s son) in Singapore. In an intervention by his older sister, Old Sodhi is catapulted into his past, the war of ’42, the past he was running away from. He narrates the controversial outcome of the Battle of Singapore and fate of the soldiers of the British Indian Army.

1.title: FR - Le Combat Oublié - S01E02 - POW
1.plot: After surrendering, the fate of the soldiers depended on the mercy of the Japanese Army. The Indian soldiers transformed when Netaji gave the call to form the Indian National Army. Maya, an aspiring photographer, is driven to join this freedom army. Sodhi and Arshad realise that India is their motherland and that they have to fight to free her from British raj.

1.title: FR - Le Combat Oublié - S01E03 - Chalo Dilli
1.plot: Maya and Rasammah enroll in the women’s regiment. Rajan and many other civilians also enroll in the INA. Rigorous training sessions begin for all the recruits. In 1996, Amar reaches Burma with Old Sodhi and they meet Rani (Amar’s Burmese friend). Circumstances lead to Old Sodhi shooting a Burmese soldier which paves way for a chain reaction of dangerous events.

1.title: FR - Le Combat Oublié - S01E04 - Harakiri
1.plot: Maya and Sodhi along with the INA soldiers do not give hope even after their trains are bombed by planes. Old Sodhi finds himself in Rangoon that leads to an array of past events - the struggles of the Indian soldiers and the rains that destroyed everything. Under such a situation, the Japanese were ordered to retreat.

1.title: FR - Le Combat Oublié - S01E05 - Maya
1.plot: There is an attack on the advanced base camp by the British Air Force but that doesn't deter the soldiers from marching ahead to stop the British from advancing. Sodhi orders all the wounded to retreat along with the Rani Jhansi Regiment. Old Sodhi injures his leg in the jungle and is unable to walk any further. Amar leaves with Rani to get help but are stopped on the tracks by a loud blast.

meta.plot: Plusieurs années ont passé depuis que Sali et Paul Aloka, un couple noir, ont adopté Benjamin, un enfant blanc. C’est aujourd’hui un garçon de 14 ans, qui a aussi un petit frère de 13 ans, Noé, conçu de manière naturelle. Autant dire que les Aloka ne passent pas inaperçus...

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: It's back to school for Benjamin and Noé who find themselves in the same class. Sali is job-hunting, whilst Paul is still a florist. When Lazare, to whom Paul hasn't spoken for years, arrives unexpectedly from the Côte d'Ivoire, the happy balance of the family is put under considerable strain.

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Lazare's arrival awakens a desire in Benjamin to find his biological parents. Noé falls secretly in love with Emma, but she seems to only have eyes for Benjamin. Paul discovers the real reason for Lazare's sudden arrival. Sali is torn between her search for a job and her family life.

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: It's bad news for Benjamin in his search of his biological parents. Sali sees her professional hopes dashed one after another. And as for Paul, he decides to let Lazare live with them.

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Sali, Lazare and Mamita try to obtain confidential information about Benjamin's biological parents. The latter heads off to the country with Manu and learns more about is his relationship with Prune. Noé rehearses for his piano audition and tries to find a way to make Emma like him.

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Sali and Paul discover the true identity of Benjamin's biological mother. Noé is upset when he realizes that Emma doesn't return his feelings. Lazare risks deportation from France and Paul does everything he can to help him.

1.title: FR - Il a déjà tes yeux - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Benjamin wants all his immediate family to come with him to Normandy to meet his biological mother, Ève. During the journey, Paul and Sali see their relationship tested time and again. Parents and children both need to get their family back on a more stable footing.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E01 - Epic 1: The Gosei Angels Descend
1.plot: A boy named Nozomu encounters Alata, a Gosei Angel in training who tries to help give him confidence even as he and his four teammates face the onslaught of the invaders of Warstar.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E02 - Epic 2: Fantastic Goseigers
1.plot: Hyde tries to take advantage of a rare opportunity to return to Gosei World even as Nozomu and other humans become abducted by another Warstar Insect Monster.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E03 - Epic 3: Landick Power, Divided
1.plot: Moune desperately tries to prove herself to her older brother Agri, even as it leads to trouble for the Landicks against a freezing Warstar Insect.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E04 - Epic 4: Echo, Song of the Angels
1.plot: A musical Warstar Insect disables the Skyick duo with its noise, even as Eri may have the key to stopping its destructive concert.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E05 - Epic 5: Magical Hyde
1.plot: The analytic Hyde and the impatient Agri help a doctor try to find the cure to a Warstar Insect malady changing kids into Bibi Soldiers.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E06 - Epic 6: Breakout Goseigers
1.plot: Alata tries to learn a gymnastic move to prove to Nozomu he can do it too even as Dereputa begins targeting him once again.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E07 - Epic 7: Protect the Land!
1.plot: After losing Eri in a bet, Agri is forced to work for an old farmer in order to get her back from him.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E08 - Epic 8: Gosei Power, Out of Control
1.plot: The bizarre ability of a Warstar Insect makes Alata lose complete control of his invocation abilities, making his Gosei Cards become unpredictable!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E09 - Epic 9: Gotcha☆Gosei Girls
1.plot: The incompatible Eri and Moune are stuck working together to save the male Goseiger after they become captured by a dominating female Warstar Insect.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E10 - Epic 10: Hyde's Partner
1.plot: When the enemy who killed his partner re-emerges, Hyde decides to pursue him at the cost of losing the concept of what he is fighting for as a Goseiger.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E11 - Epic 11: Spark, Landick Power
1.plot: Moune's desire to support a girl undergoing surgery is threatened when a Warstar Insect steals the electricity from the hospital, forcing her and Datas to use a unique method to overcome this.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E12 - Epic 12: The Miraculous Gosei Headder Great Assembly
1.plot: When the Goseiger become too worked up when both Mons Drake and Dereputa come down to destroy Earth, Master Head pulls them away to force them to discover what is on their side.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E13 - Epic 13: Run! The Mystic Runner
1.plot: When Eri discovers a Skick ability only Alata knows, she undertakes a surprising training regiment in order to learn how to do it.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E14 - Epic 14: Birth of the Ultimate Tag!
1.plot: Moune and Hyde must put aside their differences when they become trapped within a powerful Warstar Insect's dimensional gate with no apparent means of escape.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E15 - Epic 15: Countdown! The Life of the Earth
1.plot: When Mons Drake performs a final act which gives the Earth 24 hours before its end, the Goseiger must confront the leader of Warstar to save their planet before Earth is destroyed!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E16 - Epic 16: Dynamic Alata
1.plot: As the Goseiger celebrate the end of Warstar, a powerful enemy returns to destroy the team and to finish off his greatest rival: Alata!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E17 - Epic 17: A New Enemy! The Yuumajuu
1.plot: A foreboding discovery and the mysterious deaths of famous celebrities force the Goseiger to face a powerful, ancient opponent, while gaining unexpected assistance from a mysterious warrior who once fought them!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E18 - Epic 18: The Earth Purifying Knight of Destiny
1.plot: The Goseiger try to understand Gosei Knight and his desire to destroy human society for its ills as a propeganda-spewing Yuumajuu takes over the airwaves.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E19 - Epic 19: Gosei Knight Will Not Allow It
1.plot: Agri feels sorry for himself when he lets a family become separated by a Yuumajuu working with Buredoran to manipulate Gosei Knight's power for themselves.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E20 - Epic 20: Fall In Love Goseigers
1.plot: The Goseiger take on a challenge to help a boy get a girl to go out with him as a Yuumajuu uses its power to ruin lovers.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E21 - Epic 21: Elegant Eri
1.plot: When a baker is hurt during a Yuumajuu attack, Eri takes over the shop to make a particular cake for a special customer.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E22 - Epic 22: Over the Rainbow
1.plot: When the Yuumajuu who sealed away Gosei Knight 10,000 years ago returns, the rogue Headder tries to handle the battle on his own while continuing to see the modern Goseiger in his way.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E23 - Epic 23: Burn! Goseigers
1.plot: The male Goseiger must come to the rescue of the females and the Amachi when a Yuumajuu makes them overheat on vacation in a plot to burn Earth.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E24 - Epic 24: Miracle Attack Goseigers
1.plot: The Goseiger try to prevent Buredoran from obtaining an ancient Gosei power known for its destructive potential but remaining untamed.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E25 - Epic 25: Nostalgic Moune
1.plot: Moune lets her guard down when a Yuumajuu takes the form of her mother in order to lure her away from the other Goseiger.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E26 - Epic 26: The Laughing Gosei Angels
1.plot: Hyde and Gosei Knight become an unlikely combo who must save the other Goseiger from a Yuumajuu who captures anyone who laughs.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E27 - Epic 27: Wake Up Agri!
1.plot: A Yuumajuu exposes Agri's insecurities making him believe that the other Goseiger find him worthless to their team.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E28 - Epic 28: A Father's Treasure
1.plot: Professor Amachi worries about the welfare of Nozomu after a Yuumajuu hypnotizes him into becoming one of its emotionless servants.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E29 - Epic 29: The Goseigers are Sealed!
1.plot: Buredoran gains access to the Yuumajuu's Erurei Box in order to seal the Goseiger's Miracle Headders, but also to prepare for even bigger ambitions.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E30 - Epic 30: Romantic Eri
1.plot: Eri becomes trapped within a dream-stealing Yuumajuu where she becomes the only hope of those who have lost their way.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E31 - Epic 31: Never Give Up, Goseigers!
1.plot: Makuin merges his power with the Erurei Box, creating an indestructible platoon that can only be defeated if the Goseiger can stop him!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E32 - Epic 32: Perform the Ultimate Miracle!
1.plot: Kingong releases the final phase of the Yuumajuu's ultimate plot, forcing the Goseiger to enter into a risky scenario in order to stop their plan once and for all!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E33 - Epic 33: The Dreadful Matrintis Empire
1.plot: Nozomu inquires the Goseiger about their current status after the fall of the Yuumajuu while a new enemy uses their research of the Goseiger to start their own invasion schemes.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E34 - Epic 34: Gosei Knight Justice
1.plot: Nozomu makes GoseiKnight question his purpose in order to convince him to help the Goseiger face down the Matrintis forces.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E35 - Epic 35: Find the Perfect Leader!
1.plot: When a Matroid criticizes the Goseigers' lack of hierarchy, they decide to figure out which of them should be the leader of their team.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E36 - Epic 36: Run, Agri!
1.plot: Agri undergoes special training in order to protect a runner from a Matrintis plot to turn athletes into mecha-humans.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E37 - Epic 37: Excited Moune
1.plot: Moune must find a way to keep her calm after she obtains a brace from a Matroid which will petrify her if she gets too emotional.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E38 - Epic 38: Alice vs. Gosei Knight
1.plot: Gosei Knight tries to comprehend the importance of connections as Metal Alice goes on a rampage to destroy human society the Goseiger must put a stop to.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E39 - Epic 39: Epic Zero
1.plot: A time-controlling Matroid and a familiar opponent leads to a battle where Alata is thrown back to before the destruction of Heaven's Tower and the formation of the Goseiger team!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E40 - Epic 40: Strong Alata
1.plot: While the Goseigers deal with an onslaught from Robogog in the present, Alata must unite the three tribes to show their common bond to defeat Bakutofūji-ER in the past.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E41 - Epic 41: Exploding Bonds of Friendship!
1.plot: Eri takes in an abandoned Matroid which she tries to teach the concepts of friendship to, even with Metal Alice's true purpose for it.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E42 - Epic 42: Passionate Hyde
1.plot: Datas is abducted by Metal Alice for further Matrintis study, pushing Hyde into trying to get him back.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E43 - Epic 43: The Empire's General Attack
1.plot: When Robogog announces his final campaign for conquering Earth, the Goseiger respond in facing Matrintis' forces, even with the unexpected moves and sacrifices needed to do so!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E44 - Epic 44: The Ultimate Final Battle
1.plot: The Goseiger launch a final assault on Robogog to prevent Matrintis from conquering Earth; but the confrontation leads to a final twist and an unexpected conclusion!

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E45 - Epic 45: The Messiah is Born
1.plot: The Goseiger go over all their known knowledge of Buredoran in order to figure out who he really is as he prepares to begin his own ultimate plans for conquering Earth.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E46 - Epic 46: Gosei Knight is Targeted
1.plot: Brajira targets his former Headder Gosei Knight in order to force him to work for him again; while Agri and Moune must use their siblings abilities to defeat a threat that keeps healing itself.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E47 - Epic 47: The Trap of the Earth Salvation Plan
1.plot: Hyde takes offense at Brajira treating his Headders, including the now brainwashed Gosei Knight, as tools instead of as partners to work together with.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E48 - Epic 48: The Fighting Gosei Power
1.plot: As Eri takes care of Nozomu, Alata and the other Goseiger try to handle Dark Gosei Knight, believing that he is the final key required for Brajira's Nega-End ceremony.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E49 - Epic 49: Fight Towards the Future
1.plot: Brajira begins the ceremony for his ultimate destruction and recreation of Earth, forcing the Goseiger to face him in one final showdown to prevent everything they protect from being lost.

1.title: FR - Tensou Sentai Goseiger - S01E50 - Epic 50: Protecting the Planet is an Angel's Duty
1.plot: The Goseiger fight to prevent Brajira's final destruction of Earth in order to finish their apprenticeship and prove themselves as true guardian Gosei Angels protecting the planet and all life upon it.

meta.plot: Un jour, l'Armée universelle d'annihilation Warstar décide d'envahir la Terre. Cinq membres des anges Gosei sont alors envoyés sur cette planète pour lutter contre cette menace en tant que Goseigers.

1.title: FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: A tough lady detective joins forces with a streetwise New York cabbie to solve crimes and investigate her father's murder in the series premiere of this police series.

1.title: FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E02 - Brooklyn Heights
1.plot: A notable handbag designer hires Cat to find her missing son, a notorious socialite, in a case that exposes family secrets. Elsewhere, a betrayal leads to Leo's arrest.

1.title: FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E03 - Cherchez les Femmes
1.plot: Cat and Leo investigate the beating death of Leo's friend, a survivor of the Holocaust. Elsewhere, Cat becomes Leo's sponsor to help him with his immigration problem.

1.title: FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E04 - Precious Cargo
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E05 - Ambush
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E06 - Love Hurts
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E07 - Black Widow
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E08 - Deadline Brooklyn
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E09 - Double Identity
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E10 - The Longest Night
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E11 - Frenchmen Can't Jump
FR - Taxi Brooklyn - S01E12 - Revenge

meta.plot: Caitlin "Cat" Sullivan is an NYPD detective working in Brooklyn. After her driving privileges are suspended, she relies on Leo Romba, a highly skilled Brooklyn cab driver from France. Leo becomes Cat's driver and a consultant on her cases. While solving crimes with Leo, Cat is also running her own unauthorized investigation into the death of her father, an NYPD detective thought to have been executed by the Capella crime family. In doing so, she clashes with her boss, Captain Baker, and her ex-husband Gregg, who has picked up the case for the FBI.

Capi, un garçon de douze ans tout à fait ordinaire, survit à un terrible accident et présente les symptômes d’un trouble de stress post-traumatique. Alors que ni sa famille, ni ses amis, ni son école ne sont capables d’expliquer ce qui s’est passé, le psychologue chargé de son traitement est déterminé à découvrir la vérité.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E01 - The Invisible Boy
1.plot: Capi suffers a terrible accident that leaves him with PTSD and the power of invisibility.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E02 - The Girl of a Hundred Bracelets
1.plot: Kiri struggles to visit Capi, who begins to tell of his problems at high school.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E03 - Wasp Boy
1.plot: Capi tells how he got the power to make himself invisible by going the MM's party: the Olympics.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E04 - The Boy with the Scar on His Eyebrow
1.plot: Capi, with the power to become invisible, distances himself from his friends, especially Zaro.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E05 - The Boy with the Wound on His Chest
1.plot: Guilt eats away at MM, who isolates himself, as the school begins to investigate the accident.

1.title: FR - Invisible - S01E06 - The Girl with the Dragon on Her Back
1.plot: Capi tells the truth about his accident. The teacher unveils the mystery of the dragon on her back.

meta.plot: Une inspectrice de la police irlandaise enquête sur le meurtre d’une jeune migrante. L'intrigue se développe au cœur d'un Dublin contemporain, capitale d'un pays en pleine mutation, qui rompt avec ses traditions et doit composer avec le monde d'aujourd'hui.

1.title: FR - Escale fatale - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Escale fatale - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Escale fatale - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Escale fatale - S01E04 - Episode 4

meta.plot: Retour à East High où les lycéens de la nouvelle promotion se livrent à une course contre la montre pour être au point au moment de la présentation de leur spectacle devant toute l’école. En coulisses, des romances fleurissent ; des rivalités voient le jour ; des amitiés sont mises à l’épreuve ; et d‘autres apparaissent. Grâce au théâtre, la vie de ces adolescents va changer à jamais.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E01 - The Auditions
1.plot: Ricky decides to audition for East High's fall musical, "High School Musical," in an effort to rekindle his relationship with his ex-girlfriend Nini.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E02 - The Read-Through
1.plot: E.J. is jealous and reeling after losing the leading role of "Troy" to Ricky, and Miss Jenn tells the conflicted leading lady, Nini, to "trust the process."

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E03 - The Wonderstudies
1.plot: After “losing” her phone and missing an important rehearsal, Nini suspects who is responsible for her bout with bad luck and surprisingly retaliates. EJ confronts Ricky about a heartfelt voicemail left for Nini. Meanwhile, Mr. Mazzara becomes suspicious of Miss Jenn's past.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E04 - Blocking
1.plot: After Nini discovers that E.J. isn’t who she thinks he is, Ashlyn gets caught in the middle. Gina and E.J. team up as “wonderstudies,” and Ricky gets an unexpected visitor at home.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E05 - Homecoming
1.plot: Miss Jenn organizes a girl’s night out with Kourtney and Nini to help Nini shake off the boy drama, while the rest of the theater kids attend the East High Homecoming dance, where Carlos learns to dance like everyone’s watching.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E06 - What Team?
1.plot: When Miss Jenn is placed on temporary leave and rehearsals are put on hold, the students rally together to defend their drama teacher.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E07 - Thanksgiving
1.plot: A rambunctious Thanksgiving "cast party" at Ashlyn's ends with surprising news for Gina, while Miss Jenn and Mr. Mazzara accidentally spend the holiday together at East High.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E08 - The Tech Rehearsal
1.plot: When the cast and crew unexpectedly need to find a new location to "tech" their production, Carlos secures a spooky theater downtown, forcing Miss Jenn to confront old demons.

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E09 - Opening Night
1.plot: After months of rehearsals, the theater kids gear up for an unforgettable opening night. But when unexpected audience members show up to shake the cast to its core, will the show "go on" if the Wildcats aren't all in this together?

1.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S01E10 - Act Two
1.plot: It's Act Two of opening night, and the stakes have never been higher. After last-minute cast changes in Act One — and so much left unsaid between Ricky and Nini — there's more drama offstage than on

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E01 - New Year's Eve
2.plot: Flying high after the triumph of opening night, Ricky, Nini, Gina, and the Wildcats gather at Ashlyn's for a New Year's Eve party. Miss Jenn runs into the new North High rival theatre teacher—a.k.a her ex-boyfriend—and at the stroke of midnight, shocking revelations come to the surface.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E02 - Typecasting
2.plot: Kourtney, Carlos and Big Red decide to join their friends and audition for on stage roles in "Beauty and the Beast," while Nini experiences FOMO from afar. When new competition shows up to the tryout, Gina tries to shake off some old habits.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E03 - Valentine's Day
2.plot: Big Red and Ashlyn celebrate their first Valentine's Day together, amidst drama. Kourtney spars with a co-worker while Gina contends with being single. Meanwhile, Ricky and Nini's plans to surprise each other turn into a comedy of errors, leading to new revelations and a surprise song.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E04 - The Storm
2.plot: When a blizzard barrels down on Salt Lake City, the Wildcats are stranded at East High after hours, just as E.J. receives some bad news. As cabin fever sets in, Miss Jenn inspires Nini to make a bold choice about her future; Kourtney's coworker Howie makes a surprising move; and Gina and Carlos come to blows.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E05 - The Quinceañero
2.plot: Gina and Seb rally the group to throw Carlos the music and dance-filled Quinceañero he never had. Meanwhile, Ricky accidentally oversteps in more ways than one, and Miss Jenn gets a wild idea about how to get Nini back onstage at East High.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E06 - Yes, And...
2.plot: After rival school North High releases a viral video to undermine the Wildcats, Miss Jenn hosts a weekend improv intensive to build up her kids' confidence. Meanwhile, Nini works on a new song at Salt Lake Slices, where she finds inspiration in Kourtney's approach to life.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E07 - The Field Trip
2.plot: When the Wildcats suspect that North High has stolen a key costume piece, they infiltrate their rival school and end up in a competitive dance-off. Miss Jenn goes face to face and toe to toe with Zack Roy. And an emboldened Nini takes a big risk.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E08 - Most Likely To
2.plot: When the Wildcats are benched from rehearsal for a week, tensions rise to the surface during Career Day. Big Red questions if Ashlyn understands his dreams; Howie makes a surprising move with Kourtney; E.J. shocks his dad with a revelation; and Ricky and Nini visit an old haunt.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E09 - Spring Break
2.plot: When Gina finds herself stranded at the airport over Spring Break, a surprise run-in changes her mind about what she wants. Meanwhile, the separated Wildcats find a way to bond over song during their break, as Ricky finally sees his mom again after their opening night run-in at "High School Musical."

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E10 - The Transformation
2.plot: After rehearsals fall flat, the cast breaks into separate sleepovers to brainstorm Broadway-worthy ideas to outdo North High. But as the countdown to opening night looms, secrets rise between Nini and Gina, Seb and Carlos suffer their first fight, and Ricky receives an unexpected FaceTime call.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E11 - Showtime
2.plot: It's opening night, and Nini hypes up her anxious castmates for their performance in front of the competition judge. But no East High opening night is complete without unexpected visitors, second chances, and big decisions about everyone's futures—together and apart.

2.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S02E12 - Second Chances
2.plot: While the Wildcats head to Salt Lake Slices to digest the excitement of opening night - and a pizza or two - Miss Jenn continues to experience tunnel vision over the Menkie Awards. Mr. Mazzara shows his softer side; Ricky reevaluates a party crasher; Gina speaks her truth; and Nini makes a life-altering call.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E01 - Happy Campers
3.plot: After a momentous year at East High, the Wildcats head to Camp Shallow Lake for two weeks of fun in the sun. With a high-stakes production of “Frozen” looming and new campers threatening to shake up the Wildcats’ dynamic, the campers are in for an unforgettable summer of highs, lows, and “Let It Go’s.”

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E02 - Into the Unknown
3.plot: A reluctant E.J. takes the reins in a surprisingly new role on "Frozen". New campers bring vocal chops—and competition—to the auditions. In Los Angeles, Nini makes a potentially life-changing discovery of her own.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E03 - The Woman in the Woods
3.plot: After the cast list is revealed, the campers embark on Maddox's favourite camp tradition: Newbie Initiation Night. The centrepiece of the night is a spooky tale that sends Gina and Ricky on a quest into the unknown.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E04 - No Drama
3.plot: After a spooktacular night in the woods, the cast of "Frozen" have their first read-through. But the Wildcats are in disarray from Corbin Bleu's documentary crew and a camper's sudden disappearance.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E05 - The Real Campers of Shallow Lake
3.plot: After promising juicy drama for the "Frozen" documentary, E.J., Carlos and Val plan to turn rehearsals into "The Real Campers of Shallow Lake". But E.J. realizes he may have gone too far when the fake drama pushes some real buttons.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E06 - Color War
3.plot: After an explosive rehearsal, the Wildcats are divided into rivalries for an annual all-camp competition known as Color War.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E07 - Camp Prom
3.plot: A throwback '70s-themed prom unexpectedly inspires everyone to look to the future.

3.title: FR - High School Musical : La Comédie Musicale : La Série - S03E08 - Let It Go
3.plot: Nerves run high on the opening night of "Frozen" as the documentary's release quickly approaches.

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: The Hawkins, a loving but troubled family decide to buy a 'Synth' called Anita, but they start to suspect there's something unusual about her...

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Laura feels increasingly threatened by the presence of Synth Anita, and Leo's quest for information takes him to dangerous places.

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Laura is begrudgingly forced to keep Anita when she saves Toby from a road accident. George is planning an escape with Odi and Pete's hot temper earns him a suspension from work.

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Laura insists the family take Anita for testing when Mattie tells her that she's seen Anita acting strangely, while Hobb is on Niska's trail.

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Killer Synth is the breaking news story, and public panic is growing. Karen is hot on Niska's tail, but are her motives for finding her more personal than professional?

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Things are at the lowest possible ebb for the fractured Hawkins family. With Joe in exile and the kids tired of their parents' lies, Laura decides it's time to tell the truth

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Rejected and alone, Karen sets out to George's house to find Niska. Meanwhile Pete is determined to find out who Karen really is. The hunted Synths take refuge at the Hawkins.

1.title: FR - Humans - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: With the Synths in captivity, the devastated Hawkins' realise how much Mia and her family mean to them and are determined to help them.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E01 - Episode 1
2.plot: The Hawkins family try to get their lives back on track. Niska is driven to a fateful decision while on the run in Berlin. Leo, Max and Mia are living in hiding near a coastal town when they are threatened by a mysterious organization.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E02 - Episode 2
2.plot: Laura must decide whether to accept Niska's request, while Karen and Pete learn about a special Synth being sold for unprecedented amounts on the black market. Hester uses questionable means to gain information from her prisoner, and Leo faces a new mission. Mia takes a risk to help Ed but is her secret now in jeopardy?

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E03 - Episode 3
2.plot: Athena travels to the UK and her tragic secret is revealed. Niska's consciousness assessments begin. With more time at home Joe notices Sophie's increasingly eccentric behaviour. As Karen returns to work with Pete, cracks start appearing in their relationship. The Synths are forced to leave their hideout but Mia shocks them with a huge decision.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E04 - Episode 4
2.plot: Mia and Ed get closer but their relationship is thrown into jeopardy when their secret is discovered. Toby gets closer to Renie but offends her when he breaks through her synthie mask. Things look bleak for Niska until Laura brings in a surprise witness. When Milo  confronts Athena about her secret agenda, she persuades him her research could be mutually beneficial. Karen and Pete delve deeper into the mysterious 'seraphim' investigation. As Hester's influence over Leo becomes clear, cracks appear between him and Max.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E05 - Episode 5
2.plot: When Mia risks falling into the hands of a mysterious organisation, she is forced to take drastic action. Odi struggles to find meaning, while Sophie is awestruck by Renie's 'Synthie' lifestyle. As Pete recovers from his assault, Karen makes an admission that rocks their relationship. Hester and Leo stake out the Silo and track down the sniper who killed Ten. Hester agrees to deal with her peacefully, but can she be trusted? Mattie leaves home to reconnect with Leo.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E06 - Episode 6
2.plot: Athena challenges Milo's ethics and is shocked when he reveals his real plan. Mia's surprise return has ramifications for the Hawkins family. Mattie finds Leo but can she trust him with her secret? Max resolves to begin a new community of Synths; when he learns how far Leo is prepared to go to complete his mission, he takes matters into his own hands.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E07 - Episode 7
2.plot: When Mattie reveals that the Synths are planning to break into the Silo, Laura is determined to find Niska and ask for her help. Mattie asks Max to help save Leo from Hester's influence. Toby receives a disturbing message from Renie. Karen seeks out Athena's expertise and makes a life-altering decision. Mia and Hester break into the Silo, but things don't go according to plan.

2.title: FR - Humans - S02E08 - Episode 8
2.plot: The acclaimed drama concludes. In the aftermath of the Silo tragedy Karen feels she and Sam have no future and takes matters into her own hands. Niska and Astrid prepare to return to Berlin, but can Niska really walk away from her family? Joe leaves Laura shell-shocked with a frank admission. Hester seeks revenge and will stop at nothing to hurt Leo.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E01 - Episode 1
3.plot: When fractures within the Synth community start to appear, all hope of stability comes under threat, and both families are brought back to fight for the Green-Eyes' survival.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E02 - Episode 2
3.plot: A grieving Max must face the consequences of his painful decision. Laura discovers she's not being told everything at the Dryden Commission, while Joe uncovers Karen's shocking secret.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E03 - Episode 3
3.plot: As Leo struggles to come to terms with being human, Mattie takes him back to the Hawkins' home, where a surprise night out allows them to confront their feelings for each other. Laura is determined to uncover the truth about the too-secret Operation Basswood and tries to enlist Dr. Neil Sommer's help, only for things to take an unexpected turn. Joe reluctantly decides to help Karen with Sam, and Niska receives a mysterious message.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E04 - Episode 4
3.plot: Laura leads a tense Dryden Commission on a visit to the Railyard, but will Agnes' anger threaten its success? Mia comes face to face with Ed forcing her to confront her past, while an evening out for Karen, Sam and Joe turns to tragedy.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E05 - Episode 5
3.plot: While Sam reels from the events of Waltringham and Joe struggles to help him through it, truths are revealed and dangerous plans put into action at the Railyard.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E06 - Episode 6
3.plot: Laura discovers a shocking truth that threatens her life and those around her. Niska continues on her mysterious journey, and must defy all her instincts to survive.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E07 - Episode 7
3.plot: Laura reels from her heartbreaking decision. Niska's journey takes an unexpected turn. And Leo races to be by Max's side, but walks into danger.

3.title: FR - Humans - S03E08 - Episode 8
3.plot: In a dramatic showdown, humans and Synths go head-to-head - but will Mia and Max's peaceful protest cost them their lives? Laura, Niska and Mattie face major decisions.

meta.plot:
Dans un présent alternatif, le "Synth" est le dernier gadget à la mode. Ce robot ultra-développé ressemble tellement aux humains que leur mode de vie en est transformé.

Quand un père de famille achète un "Synth" d'occasion, il espère que la machine le soulagera dans ses tâches domestiques et l'aidera à préserver son mariage. Mais le robot possède un secret extraordinaire...

Remake de Real Humans (Äkta Människor).

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E01 - Behold...The Inhumans
1.plot: After a military coup leaves the Royal Family stranded in Hawaii, they must find a way to reunite with each other and return home before their way of life is destroyed forever.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E02 - Those Who Would Destroy Us
1.plot: After a military coup leaves the Royal Family stranded in Hawaii, they must find a way to reunite with each other and return home before their way of life is destroyed forever.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E03 - Divide and Conquer
1.plot: After fleeing their home, The Inhumans desperately search for each other in the wake of Maximus’ coup. Now they must learn who they can trust on Earth.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E04 - Make Way For... Medusa
1.plot: The search for Black Bolt continues on Earth; meanwhile, Maximus makes bold moves to cement his status as the new ruler of Attilan.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E05 - Something Inhuman This Way Comes...
1.plot: On the run from Auran’s forces, Black Bolt and Medusa reluctantly work with Louise to help locate the rest of their family. Back on Attilan, Maximus’ actions change the game completely.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E06 - The Gentleman's Name is Gorgon
1.plot: Gorgon and Karnak take on Auran and her Inhuman army with disastrous results.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E07 - Havoc in the Hidden Land
1.plot: The Royal Family returns to Attilan and comes face to face with Maximus.

1.title: FR - Marvel's Inhumans - S01E08 - ...And Finally: Black Bolt
1.plot: It’s brother versus brother as the final showdown between Black Bolt and Maximus takes an unexpected turn – one with lasting consequences for all of Inhumanity.

meta.plot: Sur la face cachée de la Lune, la cité d'Attilan cache une communauté d'Inhumains vivant depuis plusieurs générations loin de la Terre. Alors que des Inhumains réapparaissent sur Terre après que des cristaux tératogènes ont été libérés en mer, le règne du roi Blackagar Boltagon, à la voix destructrice, est menacé par son frère Maximus, un Inhumain sans pouvoirs qui aspire à ce que ses semblables reprennent leur place sur Terre. La conspiration va forcer le roi, la reine Médusa, son conseiller Karnak et le chef de la garde royale Gorgone à trouver refuge sur Terre, sur l'île d'Oahu, pendant que Maximus prend le pouvoir.

1.title: FR - Criminal: France - S01E01 - Émilie
1.plot: As a woman recounts her memories of the attack at the Bataclan, which killed her boyfriend, detectives become convinced that she's hiding something.

1.title: FR - Criminal: France - S01E02 - Caroline
1.plot: After a casualty at a building site, the team interrogates a construction executive who seems to know more about the victim than she's letting on.

1.title: FR - Criminal: France - S01E03 - Jérôme
1.plot: Summoned to work before dawn, the team questions a sales manager suspected of a violent hate crime. Audrey makes a bid to win the trust of her colleagues.

meta.plot: De sombres affaires se dénouent dans une salle d'interrogatoire de la police parisienne tandis que suspects et enquêteurs s'affrontent selon une chorégraphie complexe.
Policiers et suspects jouent au chat et à la souris dans une salle d’interrogatoire sur-tendue où seule compte l'obtention de la vérité, quel qu'en soit son prix.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Espagne - S01E01 - Isabel
1.plot: When detectives interrogate Isabel, she talks about love, sex and her Dalmatian, forcing Chief Inspector María to take a risk to try and solve a murder.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Espagne - S01E02 - Carmen
1.plot: As Luisa, María and Rai question Carmen, whose younger sister was found drowned in a bathtub, they become suspicious the woman is hiding something.

1.title: FR - Criminal: Espagne - S01E03 - Carmelo
1.plot: Tensions flare between the detectives when an interrogation ventures into morally ambiguous territory regarding a suspect personally connected to María.

meta.plot: Lise Stocker et Clovis Bouvier doivent faire face à une nouvelle menace totalement inédite. Plusieurs personnes sont atteintes d’un mal mystérieux et mortel. Un virus est en train de se répandre à Annecy. Une course contre la montre s’engage pour trouver l’origine de ce virus et tenter de stopper sa propagation. Est-ce un accident ? Un acte criminel ? Terroriste ? Ce virus a-t-il un lien avec la disparition mystérieuse d’une petite fille et de son père ? Chaque minute compte car déjà le nombre de victimes augmente… Spin-off des séries "Le Mystère du lac" et "Le Tueur du lac".

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Captain Lise Stocker takes on the mysterious case of the sudden death of a local jeweler in Lake Annecy. Meanwhile, Commander Clovis has to deal with a court trial involving a hold-up that resulted in the death of two civilians.

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Commander Wagner, a military doctor, is dispatched to conceal the horrifying autopsy results of the man who died on the lake. Meanwhile, Lise finds out that a research scientist and his daughter have mysteriously disappeared.

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Lise and Clovis prepare to search a housing project where numerous cases of the virus have been reported. As the existing vaccines are very few and ineffective, their only chance at stopping the epidemic is to track down Milanian.

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: As the city of Annecy enters a state of quarantine, panic is growing and incidents of violence multiply. Meanwhile, Lise and Clovis discover a surprising link among the first victims of the virus and the death of a little girl.

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Even though a heart-wrenching death leaves the team grief-stricken, they still have to deal with the epidemic which is spreading fast. And as Milanian is finally arrested and questioned, Tom is hospitalized urgently with a fever.

1.title: FR - Peur sur le lac - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Mini-series finale. Terrified of getting the virus too, Lise is starting to break down. But Clovis and she need to keep going, as Maya and Lily are still missing and the epidemic has brought the whole city on the brink of chaos.

meta.plot: Sam is an atypical teacher who has been cured of cancer and faces life's challenges through her outspoken manner, especially from her three children, who don"t look upon her as reverentially as Sam's students.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E01 - We Had a Good Trip
2.plot: Jérémie is back from her mysterious trip. The joys of homecoming are quickly eclipsed by reality: the gulf between her and her loved ones is getting wider. Fortunately, Jérémie finds comfort close to the one who makes her heart flutter. But the calm doesn’t last. A piece of news comes and upsets her.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E02 - Oli is Oli
2.plot: Olivier is trying to escape his past, but reality catches up to him. His family problems lead him to come back to the Domaine and face Jérémie. Olivier couldn’t have guessed that his troubles would be far from over: Maxime has a bitter surprise for him.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E03 - I am your Daughter
2.plot: While Olivier’s father is still missing, Jérémie is afraid of missing her chance to meet Elliot, her biological father. She doesn’t know how their first meeting will go, but she finds the courage to face the unknown.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E04 - I Don't Want to Force You
2.plot: Since the death of a swimmer, Jérémie hasn’t been doing well. Max organizes a surprise expedition for her. Olivier is also struggling. His father hasn’t been found and he feels guilt towards Jérémie. Raphaëlle is the only who’s perfectly happy. Only one thing: her boyfriend doesn’t seem to like her friends…

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E05 - How Do I Do This?
2.plot: Jérémie is torn between love and friendship. To prove to her boyfriend that she’s completely committed to the relationship, she has supper with Max and his parents. But Olivier receives bad news and would have needed her… Camille, for her part, has trouble getting respect as lead lifeguard.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E06 - Do I Look Like I Play Tennis?
2.plot: Max tries hard to hide it, but the complicity between Jérémie and Olivier is royally getting on his nerves! Following advice from her friends, Jérémie works hard to reassure her boyfriend. But the arrival of an unexpected visitor turns the lovers’ plans upside down.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E07 - There's No Rush
2.plot: Max has a big proposition for Jérémie, who doesn’t seem too thrilled. Raphaëlle wants to work on her career, but her boyfriend is doing nothing to support her! Camille, completely taken by her relationship with Étienne, doesn’t see any of this. But is he really the right guy for her?

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E08 - You Look So Much Like My Mother
2.plot: Jérémie has all her plans disrupted by Mathieu, who’s embedded himself in her private life. Thomas’s ego is wounded when Benjamin ridicules him in front of his harem. But not as wounded as Camille. She never imagined she’d find herself in this situation! Fortunately, she does not let herself be treated that way!

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E09 - What I Want
2.plot: Olivier’s father is finally ready to see his son again. Olivier is anxious about this reunion. But now is the time for him to face up to the demons from his past. It’s the only thing he can do to regain his confidence, in the future… and in love.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E10 - You Can't Have It All
2.plot: Jérémie feels fragile in her feelings for Olivier. She is doing everything she can to avoid him. An idea from Max is making this easier for her when he proposes a flirting contest between Thom and Oli. Camille is wondering about her future. Studying pharmacology is a simple option, even if it makes her feel sick to her stomach…

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E11 - We're Leaving
2.plot: Jeremiah is forced to ask his father for a favor. Thomas is selected to take part in a preliminary training camp.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E12 - Tell Me It's All In My Head
2.plot: Jérémie refuses to think about Olivier, but, unfortunately for her, everything seems to force her to spend the day alone with him.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E13 - You Ran After It a Little
2.plot: Jeremy wants to explain himself to Max, but he won't listen. Jeremy finds comfort with Raphaëlle and Mathieu.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E14 - The Mistake of Our Summer
2.plot: The mood at the beach is tense. The lifeguards put aside their differences to celebrate Thomas's departure for Stanford.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E15 - Question Mark!
2.plot: The anniversary of Fanny's death shakes Jérémie and forces her to get closer to those she loves, or rather to the one she loves.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E16 - Team Max vs. Team Oli
2.plot: Jérémie hesitates between Maxime and Olivier. Max presents Jérémie with a heartbreaking ultimatum. The friendship between all the rescuers is in jeopardy.

2.title: FR - Jérémie - S02E17 - I'll Wait for You
2.plot: Jeremy wants to change Max's mind. Olivier is growing impatient. Raph makes an important choice that will not be without consequences.

meta.plot: Jérémie avait le vent dans les voiles. Le vent est tombé... Cet été, elle tente de le retrouver dans une base de plein air, le Domaine du lac. Hantée par un douloureux secret, la jeune femme se joint à une équipe de sauveteurs. Son arrivée brise l'équilibre entre Olivier, Raphaëlle, Thomas, Camille et Maxime. Entre les partys, les dates et les escapades, les six amis seront confrontés aux petits tracas, aux grands remous et aux responsabilités du monde des adultes. Alcool, amours difficiles, relations familiales complexes et hormones qui leur jouent des tours : ils exploreront des terrains encore méconnus et testeront leurs limites!

meta.plot: Juliette est une ancienne policière devenue religieuse sous le nom de Sœur Thérèse. Son ex-compagnon, le lieutenant de police Gérard Bonaventure, fait souvent appel à elle pour qu'elle l'aide à résoudre des affaires criminelles, ce qu'elle accepte, soutenue par la Mère Supérieure, férue de romans policiers. Il est généralement assisté par Gabriel, dont chaque visite au couvent est l'occasion de voir Sœur Clémence et, après son départ pour l'Afrique, Sœur Florence. Après le départ de Gabriel, Gérard a un nouveau stagiaire, Brice, qui fait craquer Sœur Suzanne. Lucie, la compagne de Bonaventure, désapprouve quant à elle les incursions de Juliette dans sa vie. Les religieuses doivent par ailleurs faire face à un propriétaire véreux désireux de récupérer son terrain, Monsieur Roche. Pour payer les loyers, elles fabriquent des couettes faites à la main, qu'elles vendent sur le site www.soeurtherese.com.
