1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E01 - The Munaciello Is Back
1.plot: The Wonderboys set off to search for a mysterious figurine in underground Naples.

1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E02 - A Matter of Chemistry
1.plot: The Wonderboys join forces with Tonino, while the Old Hag's henchmen are on their heels.

1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E03 - The Royal Crocodile
1.plot: The Wonderboys' adventure seems over, but someone at Nino D'Angelo's mansion can help them.

1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E04 - True Love
1.plot: The Old Hag searches for Clemente while Antonia, Tonino and the Wonderboys end up in a solfatara.

1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E05 - The Mermaid's Song
1.plot: While Tonino and Antonia are at the museum, the Wonderboys find themselves in danger once again.

1.title: FR - Wonderboys - S01E06 - A Magical Night
1.plot: It's New Year's Eve and the Wonderboys know that their treasure hunt is far from over.

meta.plot: À Naples, alors que le réveillon du Nouvel An approche, Aniello, Teresa, Gennaro, Raffaele et Sasà, les Wonderboys, sont sur le point d’être expulsés de leur logement par leur propriétaire, une vieille dame aigrie, qui a décidé de vendre les appartements en échange d’une figurine de Maradona. Cependant, la figurine est volée par le nouveau Munaciello, Tonino Wonderboy, une véritable légende pour les enfants, qui ont donné son nom à leur groupe. Lorsqu’Aniello s’aventure dans les souterrains de Naples à la recherche de la figurine, son inséparable groupe d’amis le suit, s’embarquant dans une véritable chasse au trésor remplie de légendes, de mystères et de découvertes à couper le souffle. Pendant ce temps, la propriétaire et ses hommes de main sont à leurs trousses, prêts à tout pour retrouver en premier la figurine perdue.
A series of violent murders paralyze Stockholm. Private investigator Fredrika Bergman and her colleagues seek out to solve these crimes, but soon their existence is put under threat.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E01 - Unwanted (1)
1.plot: After an accident, the musician and studied lawyer and criminologist Fredrika Bergman to the Stockholm police in the team for serious crimes. Together with her team leader Alex Recht and the policeman Peder Rydh, Fredrika is set on the first day for the case of a missing girl - which is not easy for the young woman. She finds comfort in her partner Spencer. When five-year-old Lilian disappears without a trace at Stockholm Central Station, everything points to an abduction. Fredrika and her colleagues Alex Recht and Peder Rydh work around the clock to find the girl alive. When the second child is kidnapped, everyone is aware: It is a serial offender. The team starts a race against time.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E02 - Unwanted (2)
1.plot: Tragedy strikes, another child goes missing and Fredrika, Alex and the others have a race against time to find the serial offender before any more children are harmed.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E03 - Bloodline (1)
1.plot: An elderly pastor couple is shot dead in his summer house. What initially looks like a double suicide proves to be murder. Fredrika Bergman and her colleagues Alex Recht and Peder Rydh determine in the summer house of the killed couple. The two daughters of the dead, Johanna and Karolina, could also be in danger. But who wants to harm the family? The Pastorenhepaar was active in helping refugees. Together with their two daughters, they led the aid organization "Aktion Freundschaft", which helps refugees to enter Sweden. The Stockholm Police Department believes that there is a radical right-wing group behind the crime. Then another body is found, and at the same time several shops are attacked. Fredrika Bergman and her colleagues are at a loss. How do the incidents fit together?

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E04 - Bloodline (2)
1.plot: A priest and his wife, who work with refugees, are murdered in their home and a series of robberies is linked to the murders, but how and why? Meanwhile, Alex's marriage is in trouble.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E05 - Paper boy (1)
1.plot: Fredrika is very pregnant with her first child. The abduction of two Jewish boys is particularly close to her. In this case, the investigator reaches its limits. The two boys are found murdered a little later. They pulled a paper bag over their heads before placing their lifeless bodies in the snow. The incident recalls the story of "Paper Boy," an ancient fairy tale from Israel. "Paper Boy" wanders around at night, killing innocent children. A few days later, a young teacher is shot dead at a Jewish school. But it remains unclear how the killings fit together. Fredrika flies to Belgium to the grandparents of one of the boys to learn more about the tragic past of the family. However, only with moderate success. As the over-dedicated security chief of the Jewish school, Efraim, investigates on his own, the case for the investigator team becomes more and more opaque. And then the sister of one of the dead boys disappears: Can the team find Polly in time?

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E06 - Paper boy (2)
1.plot: An Israeli legend tells of the Paper Boy who comes alive at night and takes his victims. What initially appears to be a racist hate crime seems like it could be connected to this myth. He is alive again and wants revenge.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E07 - Cinerama (1)
1.plot: The body of the young Rebecca Trolle, who had been missing for three years, is found on a construction site in Stockholm. During the investigation, it turns out that the student was working on a sensitive topic for her exam: The murder that the well-known composer Thea Aldrin allegedly committed to her husband Niels decades ago. The police investigation found: Rebecca thought Thea Aldrin was innocent. Did anyone want to stop the young woman doing her research? Rebecca had old video footage from the then “Cinerama” club, which included Spencer Lagergren, Fredrika's partner and father of her daughter. The video shows a murder of a young woman. The clique is suspected and the police are also looking for Spencer - which puts Fredrika in a predicament.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E08 - Cinerama (2)
1.plot: Fredrika's private life is dragged into the investigation when Spencer is implicated. Meanwhile, Peder's brother sees more than he should and takes off, and developments in the case prove fatal.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E09 - Eye for an Eye (1)
1.plot: Inexplicable murders occur: Richard Benke, who was suspected of murdering his wife six months ago but was then let go again, is found murdered. Efraim Kiel and a diplomat are also shot. The perpetrator apparently has inside knowledge of the police, because all victims were involved in murder cases. Alex and Fredrika suspect their colleague Torbjörn and search his house. But then the police officer is shot and seriously injured in the bureau's underground car park. Johanna, who was involved in the murder of her parents and sister, is also killed. The perpetrator apparently wants to ensure justice and order and leaves an inexorable blood trail.

1.title: FR - Stockholm Requiem - S01E10 - Eye for an Eye (2)
1.plot: Peder tries to get back on the investigation team as the body count mounts but he is not accepted any more. A dangerous killer is at large: could an insider be involved?

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E01 - Hour One: Pilot
1.plot: A white teenager is killed by a black cop during a police shooting, leading an expert investigator and a special prosecutor to examine the case and grapple with media attention, public debate and the social unrest.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E02 - Hour Two: Betrayal of Trust
1.plot: A controversial video leaks that features Deputy Beck, creating a new challenge for Ashe and Preston. Suspicions rise around Pastor Janae when it's revealed that she had a run-in with Joey and a witness goes missing in the case of Joey's murder.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E03 - Hour Three: Somebody's Son
1.plot: Ashe and Preston examine evidence in both cases and go on a dangerous manhunt for credible witnesses. The political implications of both cases begin to rise and Eamons' biggest competition seeks out Jesse'e mother.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E04 - Hour Four: Truth
1.plot: After Cory opens up about what he witnessed the night of Joey Campbell's death, Ashe and Preston must decide if his word will be enough to go up against the entire sheriff's department. To help demonstrate the worthiness of their case, the two go after any substantial evidence they can find that will prove the deaths of Joey Campbell and Jesse Carr are somehow linked.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E05 - Hour Five: Before the Storm
1.plot: Cory reveals some key details about the night Joey Campbell was murdered, allowing Preston and Ashe to zero in on the people whom they believe were involved in his death. Their list of suspects grows significantly when they realize a long-standing program in place at the Sheriff's Department may have taken some liberties in the town of Gate Station.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E06 - Hour Six: The Fire This Time
1.plot: The tension heats up in Gate Station as a violent riot erupts between the citizens and the police. Meanwhile, Ashe and Preston confront Governor Eamons regarding their latest suspicions in Joey's murder, Ashe takes matters into her own hands when it comes to Javier and Preston sits down with Beck.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E07 - Hour Seven: Content of Their Character
1.plot: Another team is tasked with investigating the case, but Preston remains dedicated to finding out the truth as a witness is placed in potential danger.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E08 - Hour Eight: Rock Bottom
1.plot: Preston and Ashe discover a possible murder weapon for the Joey Campbell case and are feel pressured to use it to find the identity of Joey's killer.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E09 - Hour Nine: Come to Jesus
1.plot: In light of a surprising discovery about the Auxiliary Deputy program, the investigation puts the Sheriff's Department under further scrutiny.

1.title: FR - Shots Fired - S01E10 - Hour Ten: Last Dance
1.plot: In the series finale, the hearings for both cases are held and, as Preston presents the facts to the jurors, the truth behind each shooting is revealed. Meanwhile, Pastor Janae and other petitioners gather outside the courtroom in anticipation of the results, hoping for a better future. After the Sheriff's Department loses one of its own, it becomes clear who is really to blame.

meta.plot: A media storm sets off when an African-American cop kills a white teenager in a small North Carolina town.

1.title: FR - Prise au piège - S01E01 - Episode 1
FR - Prise au piège - S01E02 - Episode 2
FR - Prise au piège - S01E03 - Episode 3
FR - Prise au piège - S01E04 - Episode 4
FR - Prise au piège - S01E05 - Episode 5
FR - Prise au piège - S01E06 - Episode 6
FR - Proven Innocent - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: There is no one who understands the power of setting an innocent person free more than Madeline. At age 18, she was wrongfully convicted, along with her brother, Levi, in a sensational murder case that made her an infamous media obsession, a household name and a national cause célèbre.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E02 - The Burden of Truth
1.plot: The Injustice Defense Group opens a case with Tamara Folsom, a rape victim convicted unjustly of murder. In addition to Tamara’s case, Madeline comes to Levi’s defense after he lands himself in hot water, but she uncovers a secret about his past that makes her question him.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E03 - A Minor Confession
1.plot: Easy’s church recruits the team to retry the case of William Hurston, a man convicted of murder at the age of 14 due to a coerced confession. Meanwhile, Bellows retaliates against Madeline using Rosemary’s family.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E04 - The Shame Game
1.plot: Madeline accepts the cast of a woman who got a 25-year-long prison sentence for the supposed murder of her newborn child. Gore Bellows persists in his efforts to hinder Madeline's pursuit of justice. A new lead could prove promising for Madeline.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E05 - Cross to Bear
1.plot: The team is torn when a white supremacist beseeches the Injustice Defense Group to get his wrongful conviction overturned.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E06 - A Cinderhella Story
1.plot: The Injustice Defense Group accepts a case about a girl who was convicted for her mother's murder; Madeline faces unavoidable drama as he tries to stop Bellows, keep up with her and Dylan's relationship and investigate shocking news.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E07 - Living and Dying in East Cleveland
1.plot: Madeline takes a road trip alongside civil rights activist Amina Jackson, to fight for justice for Davon Watkins, a man on death row for killing a police officer. Meanwhile, Madeline attempts to save Levi from another sticky situation, while Bellows and Sanchez deliberate re-opening the case against them both.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E08 - The Struggle for Stonewall
1.plot: The team tries to exonerate Cindy Whitman, a transwoman who is wrongfully convicted of murdering her fellow trans-friend and activist, Vanessa. Meanwhile, Violet has guest star NPR's Ira Glass on her podcast, and Bellow's latest campaign manager finds new evidence in the Rosemary's murder case. Inspired by the cast, Madeline embraces a part of her identity she once hid from her family.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E09 - Acceptable Losses
1.plot: When the Injustice Defense Group is approached to exonerate a former frat boy, Daniel Hernandez, who is charged with rape and murder, a turn in Davon Watkins' case forces Madeline to head back to Ohio, leaving Easy and Bodie to solve this case alone before Easy's mentor, Judge Fry. Meanwhile, Bellows struggles with the values of his campaign, Levi follows up with a high school classmate to find out more about Rosemary's past and Wren is up for parole.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E10 - SEAL Team Deep Six
1.plot: When a Navy SEAL is charged with murdering her superior, Madeline and the team are determined to prove her innocence. Levi presses harder for insight on Rosemary's life in high school, as Bellows takes a drastic step in re-examining her murder.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E11 - Shaken
1.plot: The team takes on the case of a mother, Gabrielle Parcell, who is serving a life sentence for shaking her infant daughter, leading to her death. Meanwhile, Levi and Madeline uncover more truths about Rosemary's past and their high school class, while Bellows and his team continue their mission to send Madeline back to prison.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E12 - In Defense of Madeline Scott (1)
1.plot: Easy takes on an immigration case to help a young DREAMer, Hector Costa, who was convicted of murder. Madeline, Bodie, Wren, Levi and Violet double down on their investigation into who killed Rosemary. Meanwhile, the showdown between Madeline and Bellows begins.

1.title: FR - Proven Innocent - S01E13 - In Defense of Madeline Scott (2)
1.plot: With Madeline's freedom at stake, Easy's defense hits a bump in the road. The team must band together to focus on solving Rosemary's murder once and for all before time runs out. Meanwhile, as Bellows closes in, new evidence and old enemies come into play.

meta.plot: Une avocate impitoyable en quête de justice est à la tête d'un cabinet spécialisé dans les affaires de condamnations injustifiées. Avec son équipe, elle rouvre d'anciens dossiers et mène l'enquête pour disculper les personnes condamnées à tort. Sa motivation lui vient de son triste passé. Quelques années auparavant, la jeune femme a été reconnue coupable avant d'être disculpée un peu plus tard lors d'une affaire très médiatisée dans laquelle la presse a traîné son nom dans la boue. Depuis, elle met un point d'honneur à défendre les autres comme elle se battrait pour prouver sa propre innocence.

A chaque épisode, la série relate le récit en huis-clos de personnages séjournant dans la chambre 104 d'un hôtel. Les différentes histoires explorent divers registres, du thriller au surnaturel, en passant par la comédie.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E01 - Ralphie
1.plot: Things go horribly awry when a babysitter arrives at Room 104 to watch an unusual boy named Ralph.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E02 - Pizza Boy
1.plot: A pizza delivery boy gets caught up in a couple’s twisted games.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E03 - The Knockadoo
1.plot: A woman seeking salvation is visited by a cult priest promising to help her transcend the ordinary world for another realm.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E04 - I Knew You Weren't Dead
1.plot: A visitor in Room 104 seeks advice about his marital troubles from a long-lost friend.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E05 - The Internet
1.plot: In 1997, a son must teach his mother how to use the Internet over the phone after leaving behind an important document on his laptop.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E06 - Voyeurs
1.plot: The past and present come face to face when a housekeeper reconnects with her younger self.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E07 - The Missionaries
1.plot: Two young Mormon missionaries test the boundaries of their faith.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E08 - Phoenix
1.plot: In 1969, the sole survivor of a plane crash is faced with a decision: go back to the life she had or seize the opportunity to start anew.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E09 - Boris
1.plot: When an aging Croatian tennis player reveals memories of his tortured past to a housekeeper, an unlikely bond is formed.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E10 - Red Tent
1.plot: Two young men plotting to disrupt a political convention are interrupted by nerves, and an AC repairman.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E11 - The Fight
1.plot: Two female Mixed Martial Arts fighters work together to score a bigger payday in an upcoming bout.

1.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S01E12 - My Love
1.plot: An octogenarian couple returns to Room 104 to relive their first night together.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E01 - FOMO
2.plot: Grace and her friends take a weekend trip to celebrate Grace’s 30th birthday, only to be surprised by the arrival of her uninvited sister.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E02 - Mr. Mulvahill
2.plot: Jim reunites with Mr. Mulvahill, his third-grade teacher, and challenges him to admit to an incident from the past that left Jim forever changed.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E03 - Swipe Right
2.plot: A powerful Russian political technologist arranges an internet first date with a veterinary nurse, who tries to figure out the truth behind his shifting identity.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E04 - Hungry
2.plot: Two strangers meet to fulfill an unusual mutual fantasy.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E05 - Woman in the Wall
2.plot: Catherine, a woman plagued by a host of ailments, is comforted by a disembodied woman's voice.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E06 - Arnold
2.plot: After waking up soaking wet and with no memory of the previous night, Arnold tries to piece together the events that got him to Room 104.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E07 - The Man and the Baby and the Man
2.plot: A couple hoping to conceive makes a video of their emotionally-charged night for their future child.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E08 - A Nightmare
2.plot: A woman finds herself trapped in increasingly terrifying versions of the same nightmare.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E09 - The Return
2.plot: Grieving the death of her father months earlier in Room 104, a young girl returns with her mother in hopes of being able to communicate with him.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E10 - Artificial
2.plot: A reporter looks to uncover the truth about a woman who claims to be a hybrid robot warning of an impending artificial intelligence takeover.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E11 - Shark
2.plot: A charismatic pool shark tries to convince his reluctant cousin to stay in the hustling game.

2.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S02E12 - Josie & Me
2.plot: A woman asks her slightly-younger self to recreate the events of one night at a college frat party.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E01 - The Plot
3.plot: An estranged brother and sister reunite at the site of their future joint investment.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E02 - Animal for Sale
3.plot: The caretaker of an exotic animal meets with a woman who'd like to take the temperamental beast off his hands.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E03 - Itchy
3.plot: On the advice of his doctor, a man with a chronic skin ailment sequesters himself in hopes that he might finally be cured.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E04 - Rogue
3.plot: After running away from home, a teen girl seeks safety in Room 104, where she encounters a woman who offers a glimmer of hope for the future.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E05 - Drywall Guys
3.plot: The tale of Greg and Randy, temporary roommates on an out-of-town drywall gig who struggle to find a solution to Randy's sleepwalking problem.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E06 - A New Song
3.plot: A singer/songwriter on tour confronts her inner turmoil while composing her next song.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E07 - Jimmy & Gianni
3.plot: In this documentary episode, father and son artists Jimmy Ray Flynn and Gianni Arone are invited to create a work of art in Room 104, where they open up about their relationship, their creative process and Gianni's history with addiction and mental illness.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E09 - Prank Call
3.plot: Left alone by her bickering parents, a bored teenage girl makes a series of prank calls, until one tests her brazen alter-ego.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E10 - Night Shift
3.plot: Two stars of a 1970s horror show talk to a podcaster about the origins of their cult TV program and the on-set jealousies that led to the demise of their friendship.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E11 - Crossroads
3.plot: A young woman sells her soul to live a life of earthly pleasures and is forced to reckon with her decision decades later.

3.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S03E12 - The Specimen Collector
3.plot: While on a layover from collecting a rare botanical specimen, a scientist wakes to find herself inside a lush, rapidly growing jungle. Season three finale.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E01 - The Murderer
4.plot: Twentysomething Logan gathers four friends for an intimate performance by the enigmatic, long-lost musician Graham Husker, per Graham’s very specific instructions.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E02 - Star Time
4.plot: An unlikely source spurs Sam to confront her history of addiction.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E03 - Avalanche
4.plot: With the help of therapeutic dolls, retired pro wrestler Raw Dog Avalanche taps into his memory of an epic bout gone wrong – along with other traumatic, repressed experiences.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E04 - Bangs
4.plot: At her divorce party, Eva overhauls her potentially life-changing decision to get bangs.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E05 - Oh, Harry
4.plot: A ‘90s family is unwittingly stuck living in Room 104 until dad Harry tries to alter the script on their current reality.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E06 - The Hikers
4.plot: Megan and Casey, two college grads embarking on a three-month hike, confront irrevocable truths about their friendship.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E08 - No Dice
4.plot: Slick gameshow host Chip Crawford wants nothing more than to keep his meet-and-greet with Enid, his eighty-something biggest fan, as short as possible, but Enid has other plans in store.

4.title: FR - Chambre 104 - S04E10 - The Night Babby Dies
4.plot: When childhood best friends Bruce and Abby meet for the first time in decades, Bruce’s eccentric plan to resurrect their friendship reopens old wounds.

meta.plot: Dans un futur proche, le cerveau de chacun est connecté à un même système. Chaque interaction, chaque émotion, chaque souvenir peut être partagé instantanément. Tom, dont le père en est l’inventeur, s’en méfie, surtout lorsqu’il apprend qu'il a l’intention de pousser les curseurs encore plus loin...

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: In the near future, people’s minds are connected to The Feed, giving them instant connectivity. When something or someone invades The Feed, it’s creator must the seek the help of his estranged son.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Concerns about Kate’s behavior lead her and Tom to uncover a horrifying invasion of their family’s privacy.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Tom and Kate escape the city and join Max and Evelyn at a digital detox farm, but is all as idyllic as it seems?

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Tom turns to his father to save Max. Kate tries to find a doctor to remove their Feeds but comes up against the Resisters.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: When Tom and Kate make an alarming discovery about Bea, they confront Lawrence and Meredith at a family dinner which exposes long held secrets.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Lawrence pushes harder to discover the truth about what is happening to The Feed with devastating consequences for the Hatfield family.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: With the Takers coming through in increasing numbers, Tom and Kate take decisive but opposing actions. Lawrence leaves one last slight for Ben.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Ben spirals out of control when his actions have fatal consequences. Tom discovers he needs Ben’s help to stop the Takers, but can he find him in time?

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: As Tom and Ben get closer to solving the mystery of the Takers, Kate and Martha are locked in a desperate struggle for survival.

1.title: FR - The Feed - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Tom and Ben fight with catastrophic consequences. Can Tom save his daughter and reunite with Kate before it’s too late?

meta.plot: Paris, 4 mai 1897. Un incendie dévastateur détruit en quelques minutes le Bazar de la Charité, l’édifice abritant une manifestation caritative très courue, faisant plus de 120 morts ; essentiellement des femmes de la haute société et leur personnel. À cette occasion, trois femmes, Adrienne De Lenverpre, Alice De Jeansin, et sa bonne Rose Rivière voient leur destin bouleversé. Usurpation d’identité, amours interdites, changement radical de vie, émancipation, cette mini-série nous plonge dans la société parisienne de la fin du 19e siècle, en suivant le destin romanesque de ses trois héroïnes.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: On a spring day in 1897, socialites Adrienne and Alice and maid Rose join the crowds at a Parisian charity bazaar, where a shocking tragedy unfolds.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: As the overwhelmed hospitals tend to the wounded, a desperate mother searches for her missing daughter, and Adrienne plots to get Camille back.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: Madame Huchon makes her captive an offer, Adrienne tries to sneak a message to Camille, and Alice is pressured by her father to marry Julien.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Adrienne resorts to drastic measures to salvage her London plan. The news about Victor leaves Alice reeling. Rose's situation grows more complicated.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: After Camille vanishes, de Lenverpré hires men to scour the city, and Adrienne learns a dark secret. Odette's husband returns from his travels.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Léo rescues Camille from danger, Alice and Victor confront the projectionist, and Adrienne visits the cabaret where Eva Schaff performed.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: A defiant Alice sets out to clear Victor's name. Rose makes a surprise announcement at a dinner party. Adrienne works to win back her husband's trust.

1.title: FR - Le Bazar de la Charité - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: As the city clamors for an execution, Adrienne, Alice and Rose put everything on the line to protect the ones they love.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E01 - Pilot
1.plot: In the series opener, we find Jack, a renowned adventure reporter transitioning to the role of a desk bound boss, overseeing a team of twentysomething journalists, after the founder of an outdoor magazine he works for decides to go to a web only publication.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E02 - Dating Apps
1.plot: Clark, Emma and Mason try to help Jack create a profile of himself for an online dating app after his first attempt is disastrous.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E03 - Step One: Shelter
1.plot: Jack faces the ultimate test of his survival skills when he’s forced to crash at Clark’s tiny apartment while he searches for a place of his own. Also, Roland sticks Brooke with telling the millennials their beloved office perks are being taken away due to budget cuts.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E04 - You Don't Know Jack
1.plot: The Millennials discover a huge secret about Jack’s love life when they clean out his decades-old storage unit. Also, Clark and Mason use Jack’s memorabilia to throw an epic ‘90s-themed party at Eddie’s bar.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E05 - No Bad Ideas
1.plot: Human Resources forbids Jack from giving his staff any feedback at all after he crushes Clark with a brutally honest performance review. Also, Emma and Mason call out Brooke for being politically incorrect when they try to help her hire a diverse intern.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E06 - Going Deep
1.plot: When Jack is clueless about how to help Eddie through the pain of his divorce, Brooke steps up to be Eddie’s interim best friend. Also, a colossal secret comes out when Clark, Emma and Mason battle each other in a fitness tracker challenge to win concert tickets.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E07 - @emma
1.plot: When Emma quits after being turned down for a raise, Jack and Roland become the magazine’s newest and worst ever social media managers. Also, in a misguided attempt to boost business, Eddie re-brands his bar as “magic-themed.”

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E08 - Office Romance
1.plot: Jack regrets convincing Human Resources to toss out a "no inter-office dating" rule when he needs an excuse to break up with his co-worker, Amy. Also, Mason closes in on uncovering Jack and Brooke's romantic history.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E09 - The Mediocre Outdoors
1.plot: Jack tests the Millennials’ survival skills when he takes them camping for the first time and leaves them alone in the woods without their smartphones.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E10 - The Explorers' Club
1.plot: When Mather, the president of the Chicago Adventure Society, accuses Roland of faking the story of the expedition that made his career, Jack, Brooke and the millennials team up to clear his name. Also, Clark is dumbfounded when he notices that Jack seeks Mather’s approval the same way he seeks Jack’s,

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E11 - Mason Blows Up
1.plot: Jack tries to reassert his dominance as a reporter after Mason scores an investigative coup that turns him into an overnight celebrity. Also, Clark's low self-esteem causes him to give Emma relationship advice about other guys.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E13 - DTR
1.plot: When Jack dates a millennial to avoid commitment, he needs Clark, Emma and Mason’s help to keep up with his new girlfriend, Kaylie, and her exhausting lifestyle.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E14 - Friends Like These
1.plot: Jack desperately begs his co-workers to pretend to be his closest friends at a dinner party after his lack of an inner circle begins to concern his girlfriend, Rachel.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E15 - Relationship Jack
1.plot: When Jack fixates on his relationship with Rachel to the detriment of the magazine and his friends, Eddie and Roland try to break him of his obsession habit. Also, as Jack’s work suffers, Clark steps up to lead the staff and displays a surprising amount of self-confidence.

1.title: FR - The Great Indoors - S01E16 - Aaron Wolf
1.plot: Jack watches the millennials’ journalistic integrity slip away when they fall under the spell of his nemesis, Aaron Wolf, a former magazine staffer turned famous outdoor reality TV host who returns to guest edit the magazine.

meta.plot: An adventure reporter must adapt to the times when he becomes the boss to a group of millennials in the digital department of the magazine.
Raised by a kind Kaingang family, adventurous young schoolgirl Luz launches a quest with her firefly companion to learn the truth about her roots.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E01 - The Girl and the Firefly
1.plot: Luz is welcomed into and raised as an equal in the Kaingang community. But a secret between Gá and Baltazar could change it all.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E02 - A Light at the End of the Tunnel
1.plot: Joca shows Luz around the school. However, keeping her a secret becomes challenging when Sabina won't stop asking questions.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E03 - Fire! Fire!
1.plot: Marcos meets Luz and tries to earn her trust. Joca's fire story grabs unexpected — and unwanted — attention, especially from Principal Isabela.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E04 - A Flame That Never Goes Out
1.plot: After meeting Gá, Marcos finds out all about Luz's past. Sabina pushes Joca to tell the truth about his friend, leading to a big revelation.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E05 - The Teacher's Indigenous Cousin
1.plot: Baltazar follows a lead in his investigation. Otávio accidentally tells Principal Isabela about Luz.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E06 - A Singular Student
1.plot: When inspectors visit Prex, Principal Isabela faces a tough decision about Luz. Marcos and Joca have a plan to help her make the right choice.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E07 - Light the Way
1.plot: Nic gets in the way of Sabina's evil plan. Marcos and Dora buy new clothes for Luz, who feels pressured to take official photos for the school website.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E08 - Number One
1.plot: Luz makes a bold move to avoid posing for Prex's website photos. Baltazar questions Isabela. Carlos tries to intimidate Gá's family.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E09 - A Dark Night
1.plot: Luz searches for a photo of her grandfather. Marcos goes on a date with Fernanda. Over the weekend, the kids gather to share stories around the fire.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E10 - Found Among the Fireflies
1.plot: Dora reminisces about her past. Chaos breaks loose during the school's play. Marcos and Dora search for Luz.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E11 - The Light That Never Goes Out
1.plot: Dora persuades Luz to return to school. Carlos instructs Valéria to deal with Baltazar. Principal Isabela makes a decision regarding the fourth grade.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E12 - The Storyteller
1.plot: New students join the fourth grade, but not everyone's happy about it. Valéria snoops around Dora's bookshop, and Otávio has a big talk with his mother.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E13 - You Are Never Alone
1.plot: Carlos pays a visit to the bookshop. Gael asks Dora an important question. Meanwhile, Cadu and Sabina compete to become fourth-grade class president.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E14 - They've Seen the Light
1.plot: Dora's storytelling activity leads to a family reunion. Baltazar confronts Valéria. Marcos tells Luz a secret about her family that changes everything.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E15 - The Secret
1.plot: After hearing shocking news, Luz starts to feel unwell. Gael's ambitious plans don't go as expected. Otávio and Sabina take the stage in art class.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E16 - Clues
1.plot: Marcos looks into Luz's father's past. Carlos shares his plans to buy the bookshop, and Dora remembers a special gift from a past love.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E17 - The Firefly Necklace
1.plot: Lia grows anxious about the art competition while Nic plots a revolution. Luz attempts to visit Dora at the bookshop, but someone gets in her way.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E18 - Monster Grandpa
1.plot: Luz makes a special request to Lia, and Sabina steps up to help a friend. Meanwhile, Gael resorts to desperate measures to clear his debts.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E19 - Parents and Children
1.plot: Dora tells Marcos she needs some time near her family. The kids don't like having their performance displayed at school — it's time to take action.

1.title: FR - Luz: The Light of the Heart - S01E20 - The Firefly and the Stars
1.plot: Marcos reveals the truth about Luz's past to Dora. Principal Isabela springs into action after a meeting, and friends and families reunite at last.

meta.plot: À peine la formation terminée, les Limandes, une équipe de sauveteurs juniors, s'installent à la plage pour des aventures riches en sensations fortes, et en bonne humeur.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E01 - Fresh Off the Bus
1.plot: A summer of fun begins as the Flounders take control of Tower 2. But Brody’s bad attitude inspires a risky plan -- and a radical transformation.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E02 - Escape from Party Beach
1.plot: After Garvin blames the Flounders for bad buzz, Tyler and the team prepare for a dazzling reputation reboot.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E03 - The Splash and the Furious
1.plot: The Flounders gear up for action-packed adventure when Junior Rescue receives new equipment. Elsewhere, Eric and Lizzie grow closer.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E04 - Sand and Deliver
1.plot: As Junior Rescue celebrates Family Day, Lizzie attempts to hide a secret, Dylan pursues a new passion, and Tyler faces his toughest critic.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E05 - Stranger Flings
1.plot: Things take a tender turn as Eric unpacks his feelings. Meanwhile, Gina encounters a new rival, and Dylan opens up to Tyler.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E06 - With a Little Kelp from My Friends
1.plot: Mystery and mischief collide as the boys partake in a super-secret project, and the girls team up for a sticky situation.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E07 - Pier Pressure
1.plot: As the sun begins to set on Junior Rescue season, a staff shake-up leads to a new normal -- and a "special assignment" -- for the Flounders.

1.title: FR - Malibu Rescue: The Series - S01E08 - Every Rose Has Its Thornton
1.plot: Dylan, Lizzie, Gina, Eric and Tyler bid farewell to summer with one last mission: to foil Thornton's devious plans.

meta.plot: Résolus à mater un complot pour suivre et contrôler les enfants, et déterminés à sauver leur monde, les jumeaux Dru et Kal s'allient avec une bande de fugueurs rebelles.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: Dru avoids a school dental check-up by persuading his twin brother Kal to go in his place. While celebrating Diwali, they notice Kal's new abilities. Could they be linked to a warning from recently disappeared classmate Tim?

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: During a fitness test, Dru struggles to keep up with his classmates. The twins look into Infinity Group, the organization behind the dental check-up, which leads them to a mysterious group of unnamed kids.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: From their tunnel hideout, the unnamed kids debate whether to meet with the twins. Meanwhile, Kal threatens to expose his double implant when he displays super strength during a kabaddi match, umpired by his Dadi.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: Having made contact with the tunnel kids, or the Unlisted, Dru and Kal attempt to piece together what they know about the Global Child Initiative and Infinity Group. But they are interrupted by a medical emergency.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E05 - Episode 5
1.plot: Tim returns to school, but he is behaving strangely. Discovery of the tunnel puts the Unlisted in jeopardy, and the twins have to decide whether they can trust their Bua when she accepts a job with the GCI.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E06 - Episode 6
1.plot: Kymara makes a mistake that places the other Unlisted in danger. The twins face increased scrutiny following a new arrival at the Sharma house, Chinese exchange student Jiao.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E07 - Episode 7
1.plot: Jiao earns the twin's trust when he helps them out of a sticky situation, but his intervention rouses the suspicion of class bully Regan. A field trip to GCI headquarters sees the boys entering the lion's den.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E08 - Episode 8
1.plot: Horrified by what has happened to Jiao, the twins team up with Bua to bring down Infinity Group from the inside. But as the GCI takeover continues at school, the boys are barely able to maintain their cover.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E09 - Episode 9
1.plot: Rose and Gemma make plans to meet with another Unlisted kid, Mack. At school, the new caste system stirs resentment among some of the students, and Kal begins to enjoy his Elite status a little too much.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E10 - Episode 10
1.plot: Captured, Rose and Mack come face-to-face with Infinity Group CEO Emma Ainsworth. On a rescue mission, the other Unlisted enlist the help of Dru, who is no longer certain that he can trust Kal.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E12 - Episode 12
1.plot: As Infinity Group's hunt for missing children ramps up, the Unlisted make themselves at home in the Sharma house. Dadi becomes a powerful ally when she stumbles across the kids. But Kal's behavior grows increasingly erratic.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E13 - Episode 13
1.plot: When they discover the true purpose of the Global Child Congress, the Unlisted hatch a plan to take down the GCI mainframe. Kal's strange behavior forces Dru to make a painful decision.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E14 - Episode 14
1.plot: The Unlisted attempt to bring down the mainframe at HQ, but walk into a trap. Under complete mind control, Kal becomes an Infinity stooge, and sets out to track Dru down.

1.title: FR - Les Anonymes - S01E15 - Episode 15
1.plot: The Unlisted and Dru make a last-ditch attempt to bring down Infinity Group. Emma Ainsworth introduces Kal to the world, and makes a surprising discovery that threatens to derail the organization's sinister plan. Series finale.

1.title: FR - The Victim - S01E01 - Episode 1
1.plot: A trial begins: on one side a grieving mother and on the other a man accused online of being her son’s killer. But who is the accused and who is the victim?

1.title: FR - The Victim - S01E02 - Episode 2
1.plot: Craig prepares for his day in court as threats against him and his family escalate and Rebecca’s doubts about her husband take root. Is he telling her the whole truth?

1.title: FR - The Victim - S01E03 - Episode 3
1.plot: As Anna takes the stand, the strain of the trial threatens to destroy her family. Her search for proof of Eddie J Turner’s identity continues, but what will she do if she gets it?

1.title: FR - The Victim - S01E04 - Episode 4
1.plot: The jury returns its verdict and Anna discovers her fate in court. Craig and Anna are brought face to face once more as part of the judicial process, and shocking new evelations come to light.

meta.plot: Quinze ans après le meurtre de son jeune fils par un enfant de 13 ans, Anna Dean milite pour que la nouvelle identité du meurtrier soit rendue publique.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E01 - Overture
1.plot: A retired judge who regrets those criminals he had to let get away arranges for Brett and Danny to meet, and then gets them arrested so that they have the choice of either helping him out in his fight against crime or staying in jail.  Their first assignment is to locate an heiress by her heart-shaped birthmark.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E02 - The Gold Napoleon
1.plot: Danny and Brett must discover whether or not Gold Napoleon coins are the originals, or replicas as a coin dealer claims them to be.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E03 - Take Seven
1.plot: Danny and Brett try to help a girl whose ""long lost brother"" has suddenly appeared, cutting her off from her inheritance.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E04 - Greensleeves
1.plot: Brett's family mansion seems to have been restored without his knowledge, and taken over by strangers.  To find out why, he pretends to be the actor they have hired to impersonate him, and ends up helping the Prime Minister.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E05 - Powerswitch
1.plot: When the Judge tricks Brett and Danny into identifying a dead woman found floating in the waters of the French Riviera, they end up investigating an international stock swindle.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E06 - The Time and the Place
1.plot: Danny runs into political intrigue when he discovers the dead body of a reporter, then can't find it until it turns up in a car crash hours later.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E07 - Someone Like Me
1.plot: After Brett loses seven days, Danny thinks Brett is acting strange but Brett thinks someone is impersonating him. They both can't be right.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E08 - Anyone Can Play
1.plot: Danny has to go on the run from enemy agents after his gambling winnings at a Brighton casino turn out to be part of a communist plot to pay off spies when they use the right code words.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E09 - The Old, the New and the Deadly
1.plot: It seems that everyone including a former Nazi wants a German Eagle statuette, and they think that Danny is the one who has it.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E10 - Angie... Angie
1.plot: An childhood friend of Danny's from the Bronx turns out to be a hit man hired to kill an American labor leader on holiday at the Cannes Film Festival.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E11 - Chain of Events
1.plot: While out camping at Brett's family estate, Danny gets chained to a brief case which he can't get off that contains a bomb.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E12 - That's Me Over There
1.plot: In order to catch a war criminal, Danny must impersonate the kidnapped Brett, but how will he explain an English Lord with a Brooklyn accent?

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E13 - The Long Goodbye
1.plot: When Danny and Brett find the decade-old dead body of a scientist in a crashed plane in the Scottish Highlands, several women claiming to be his daughter offer them various inducements to part with the formula they found.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E14 - The Man in the Middle
1.plot: When Brett's plan to capture a traitorous British spy by pretending to be him results in his own capture, Danny enlists the aid of one of Brett's relatives to rescue him.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E15 - Element of Risk
1.plot: At a London airport, a gang of crooks who are planning a bullion heist mistake Danny for a criminal mastermind when the man's suitcase accidentally ends up in Danny's luggage cart.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E16 - A Home of One's Own
1.plot: Danny buys a `handy man's special' cottage in England and discovers that his neighbors are into the occult.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E17 - Five Miles to Midnight
1.plot: Trying to open a travel business, Danny and Brett encounter a New York hoodlum who needs to be smuggled out of Italy after he killed an Italian gangster.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E18 - Nuisance Value
1.plot: After Danny is accused of kidnapping his blind date, a rich man's spoiled daughter, Brett and Danny decide to help rescue her from the real kidnappers but have problems keeping her rescued.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E19 - The Morning After
1.plot: Brett wakes up one morning and discovers that he got married the night before.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E20 - Read and Destroy
1.plot: Seeking sanctuary with his old friend Brett is a spy who plans to publish his memoirs, which contain the name of every NATO, SEATO, and ANZUS agent.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E21 - A Death in the Family
1.plot: Brett's relatives are being killed off one by one, so Brett and Danny decide to find the killer before he gets to Brett.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E22 - The Ozerov Inheritance
1.plot: To retain the family jewels, an elderly Russian duchess must present proof of her marriage into the Russian Royal Family, which  she says she can do with the help of a journal kept by one of Brett's uncles.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E23 - To the Death, Baby
1.plot: Brett and Danny both end up wooing an heiress after they are asked to break up a romance between a her and a gigolo who is courting her.

1.title: FR - Amicalement vôtre - S01E24 - Someone Waiting
1.plot: Brett resumes race car driving, only to become the target of someone who is willing to kill him in order to make him stop.

meta.plot: Lord Brett Sinclair, un aristocrate britannique, et Danny Wilde, un riche self-made-man américain, n'ont rien en commun, si ce n'est leur fortune, leur goût pour les femmes et leurs fonctions secrètes au service de la justice. Tous deux aident en effet le juge Fulton, un magistrat en retraite, à appréhender les bandits ayant échappé à la justice. Avec pour seules armes leurs poings et leur sens de l'humour, Brett et Danny finissent par intervenir dans toute l'Europe, de préférence sous le soleil de la Côte d'Azur ou dans les meilleurs palaces du continent, où pullulent margoulins, maîtres-chanteurs et espions.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E01 - I Need Light
1.plot: A young woman is discovered brutally murdered in the fashion of Jack the Ripper. Chief Inspector Frederick Abberline believes The Ripper has returned, but Reid, the new head of the precinct, believes a different kind of evil may be at work.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E02 - In My Protection
1.plot: When a toy-maker is murdered, a 14-year-old boy is the suspect but Reid digs deeper and discovers a vicious child gang and its brutal master. Jackson's gambling may expose his American past.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E03 - The King Came Calling
1.plot: Deliberate contamination is suspected in a sudden cholera outbreak . Emily's search for a charity patron proves difficult.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E04 - The Good of This City
1.plot: The brutal clearing of a local slum for the underground railway reveals an almost indecipherable murder scene and an unreliable slum girl witness. Lucy Eames, beautiful and disturbed, is the unlikely key to a Byzantine web of conspiracy.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E05 - The Weight of One Man's Heart
1.plot: A string of brilliantly masterminded robberies keeps Reid and his team busy and leads to a blast from the past for Drake when he is confronted by his former army colonel. As the net closes in on the robbers, the sergeant finds his loyalties put to the test.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E06 - Tournament of Shadows
1.plot: As the dock strike of August '89 takes hold of the city, the killing of a Jewish anarchist leads Reid and the team into the heartless chicanery of the British government's fight against distant empires and global terrorism.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E07 - A Man of My Company
1.plot: International haulage tycoon TP Swift arrives in town to acquire an ailing shipping line, accompanied by a team of private detectives, who proceed to cut a violent swathe through the borough on a mission of vengeance. As Reid focuses on the murder of an engine inventor, Jackson and Susan's past comes back to haunt them, bringing their future in Whitechapel - and their very lives - into question.

1.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S01E08 - What Use Our Work?
1.plot: Reid is adrift, his team in pieces and Leman Street shaken to its foundations following recent events. A kidnapping offers him cause to assemble his men and tackle the white slavery ring operating in their midst. But Reid is gripped by a growing obsession that this leads back to the terrible secret from his own past.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E01 - Pure as the Driven
2.plot: Jack the Ripper may be fading into memory, but east London has found no peace. An investigation into the assault of a policeman leads DI Reid and the men of H-Division to the newly-emergent Chinatown, where Jackson discovers evidence of a new and devastatingly powerful opiate. Reid fears a new kind of hell is to be released onto his streets.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E03 - Become Man
2.plot: The abduction of a prominent member of the London County Council introduces Reid to Councilor Jane Cobden, the first woman appointed to the LCC - because it appears the kidnappers are radical supporters of Cobden's aims. Long Susan is taken by force to the gang's hideout, and she soon finds herself growing sympathetic to her captors' lives and aims.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E04 - Dynamite and a Woman
2.plot: An Irish bomber is sprung from prison and barely a day later a prominent opponent of the Home Rule movement is murdered. Chief Inspector Abberline is convinced that the Irish Republican Brotherhood is active once more and orders Reid to send the Irish DC Flight undercover into Whitechapel's Irish community.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E05 - Threads of Silk and Gold
2.plot: An investigation into the brutal murder of a Telegraph Boy reveal a vice racket being run from the offices of the GPO. A ledger leads Reid to the centre of the one of London’s most august financial institutions, Barings Bank.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E06 - A Stronger Loving World
2.plot: Churches and synagogues are being burnt and desecrated in Whitechapel and Reid suspects the same hand behind the various attacks. Meanwhile, the all-too-brief domestic happiness that Sergeant Drake has enjoyed is disrupted by the arrival of a friend from his wife Bella's past, the mysterious and charismatic scholar, Gabriel Cain.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E07 - Our Betrayal (1)
2.plot: A valuable symbol of the British Empire’s wealth shows up in the form of an uncut diamond. It is a jewel ‘freed’ from the diamond monopoly of De Graal by one Daniel Judge, Captain Jackson’s untrustworthy older brother. Reid and Flight find themselves being drawn to the plight of a local craftsman defrauded of his work and income by a scam that is set to return H Division to the malign influence of Detective Inspector Jedediah Shine.

2.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S02E08 - Our Betrayal (2)
2.plot: Death and violence comes to Whitechapel once again. Some decayed and murdered bodies are discovered in a slum tenement, and the advanced stages of the police divisional boxing championship reveals the vengeful ferocity to be seen within the ranks of the police force.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E01 - Whitechapel Terminus
3.plot: Reid and Long Susan are set on a collision course after a locomotive disaster.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E02 - The Beating of Her Wings
3.plot: A murder inquiry in a curiosity shop reveals a secret dungeon and signs of a captive girl.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E03 - Ashes and Diamonds
3.plot: Alex le Shayne, a mysterious clairvoyant is found dead at the local performance place. Jackson presumes poison has a part to play. As Reid is missing Drake steps in to investigate. Elsewhere Susan continues to care for Mathilda and plans to send her to Switzerland.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E04 - Your Father, My Friend
3.plot: Ghosts of Whitechapel's past come alive, setting our heroes on a path of destruction.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E05 - Heavy Boots
3.plot: A destructive gang of youths unleash hell upon the streets, but it's not until daylight breaks that the true horror of their brutal work is revealed. The trail leads the team of H Division into the heartland of one of the city's oldest trades - the London Breweries - where conflicted loyalties reign, and grief and anger create a potent concoction.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E06 - The Incontrovertible Truth
3.plot: The recovering Reid finds the unconscious Lady Vera Montacute in Whitechapel next to the corpse of a flower seller.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E07 - Live Free, Live True
3.plot: The murder of a chemist lifts the lid on a backstreet abortion racket.

3.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S03E08 - The Peace of Edmund Reid
3.plot: When an American journalist is killed in Whitechapel, his story threatens the peace.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E01 - The Strangers' Home
4.plot: Reid must return to Whitechapel to covertly re-investigate a case made by Drake and Jackson.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E02 - Some Conscience Lost
4.plot: Reid struggles to adapt on his first day back at H Division under Drake’s command.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E03 - A White World Made Red
4.plot: Jackson feels the heat when a double murder throws light upon his recent illicit activities.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E04 - Men of Iron, Men of Smoke
4.plot: When a footballer is brutally murdered, a key suspect is a man close to Drake's heart.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E05 - No Wolves in Whitechapel
4.plot: Drake's life unravels as he questions whether he sent an innocent man to the gallows.

4.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S04E06 - Edmund Reid Did This
4.plot: The walls close in on Reid as a secret from his past threatens to destroy his future in Whitechapel.

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E01 - Closed Casket
5.plot: Reid - on the run from the police - must find a way to bring down Assistant Commissioner Augustus Dove.

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E02 - A Brittle Thread
5.plot: Reid and Dove engage the press in their battle for the hearts and minds of the people of Whitechapel.

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E03 - All The Glittering Blades
5.plot: The serial killer - Nathaniel Dove - is hid in the Hackney Marshes, but how long can he stay out of trouble?

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E04 - The Dreaming Dead
5.plot: Thatcher discovers a fresh lead of a double murder committed by Nathaniel, giving Reid cause for hope.

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E05 - A Last Good Act
5.plot: With Reid locked in the cells it seems that all hope is lost, but is there time for one last roll of the dice?

5.title: FR - Ripper Street (VOSTFR) - S05E06 - Occurrence Reports
5.plot: Reid must finally bring Augustus Dove to justice, but also find his peace in Whitechapel.

meta.plot: A drama set in the East End of London in 1889, during the aftermath of the "Ripper" murders. The action centres around the notorious H Division – the police precinct from hell – which is charged with keeping order in the chaotic streets of Whitechapel. Ripper Street explores the lives of characters trying to recover from the Ripper's legacy, from crimes that have not only irretrievably altered their lives, but the very fabric of their city. At the drama's heart our detectives try to bring a little light into the dark world they inhabit.

1.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S01E01 - The Fledgling
1.plot: Diplomat Sir Hallam Holland moves into the iconic townhouse along with his wife, Lady Agnes. With the help of former parlormaid Rose Buck, they launch a whole new era for the sumptuous home at the heart of Upstairs Downstairs.

1.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S01E02 - The Ladybird
1.plot: With no sign of a thaw in relations between Lady Agnes and Maud, Hallam finds his diplomatic skills put to the test at home as well as at work. The servants are intrigued by a mysterious new addition to the household, while a restless Lady Persie embarks on a dangerous flirtation, and is drawn to the thrill of radical politics.

1.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S01E03 - The Cuckoo
1.plot: Sir Hallam finds himself at the centre of a national crisis when his friend, the Duke of Kent, asks for help. Meanwhile, storm clouds are gathering within 165 Eaton Place, with Lady Agnes's growing fear over the imminent arrival of her baby, and the servants' concern for Lotte, who refuses to speak. But, as the king finally abdicates, Hallam makes a discovery that will change his life forever.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E01 - A Faraway Country About Which We Know Nothing
2.plot: As 165 Eaton Place reopens its doors, two new arrivals make their mark. But whilst Sir Hallam's forthright aunt Blanche disrupts life upstairs, feisty new maid Beryl struggles to adjust to life in service. Meanwhile, Lady Agnes' concern for her children reveals a dark secret about Mr Pritchard. Sir Hallam's preoccupation with burgeoning Nazi Germany leads him into dangerous waters, and a chance meeting with an unexpected face unlocks a hidden desire within.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E02 - The Love That Pays the Price
2.plot: Lady Agnes catches the eye of charismatic American millionaire Caspar Landry but, as she and Sir Hallam look to their future, a tragic turn of events leaves their promised dreams - and a close family member - in jeopardy. Downstairs, Mrs Thackeray makes a momentous decision, which throws the running of the house into chaos. Blanche and Mr Amanjit continue to clash, until a heart-breaking cause compels them to reconsider their differences.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E03 - A Perfect Specimen of Womanhood
2.plot: Blanche comes face to face with her former lover when a scandalous novel is published and, when the passion between the pair reignites, begins to consider a life away from Eaton Place. Downstairs, Beryl's decision to take a stand causes serious ructions to the running of the house until a familiar face offers wise words. Meanwhile, when Lady Persie reveals a shocking secret to Sir Hallam, the pair get ever closer as Persie is forced to make a life changing decision about her future.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E04 - All the Things You Are
2.plot: Harry, deemed too old to participate in a local boxing championship, takes Johnny under his wing to teach him the ropes. With Lady Agnes being drawn to the charms of Caspar Landry and Sir Hallam's growing infatuation with Lady Persie, this once happy couple seems to be drifting further apart, much to the pleasure of Lady Persie who seems to be getting far too much enjoyment from the conquest of her sister's husband. Mr. Amanjit finds himself a target of racial discrimination.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E05 - The Last Waltz
2.plot: As 165 Eaton Place prepares for the Annual Servants' Ball, Mr Pritchard enjoys a romance with fellow servant Miss Whisset, and starts to wonder if there is more to life than service. With war looming, Harry has a proposition for Beryl, however, a shocking revelation threatens to thwart their plans. Meanwhile, as Lady Persie and Sir Hallam continue their torrid affair, Sir Hallam is about to discover just how destructive his actions have been.

2.title: FR - Maîtres et Valets - S02E06 - Somewhere Over the Rainbow
2.plot: On the eve of war, Beryl and Harry face a race against time to get married. Meanwhile, Mr Pritchard makes a decision which throws the running of the house into chaos, until an old face lends a helping hand. And as Lady Agnes returns to London, a dark discovery has explosive consequences for all inside Eaton Place and changes their lives forever.

meta.plot: Londres, 1936. Le 165 Eaton Place, abandonné depuis le départ des Bellamy 6 ans auparavant, reprend vie grâce à l'arrivée des nouveaux propriétaires : Sir Hallam Holland, diplomate de haut-rang et sa femme Lady Agnès. Pour redonner tout son lustre à cette somptueuse demeure, Lady Agnès consulte Rose Buck, l'ancienne gouvernante des Bellamy, pour qu'elle recrute le personnel adéquat...

Arrivé par hasard dans la ville de Two Rivers, Butch décide d’y réunir ses frères pour braquer ensemble un convoi d’or afin d’aider leur mère à reconstruire sa ferme qui a récemment brûlé. De son côté, Jack devient rapidement le Shérif de la ville et séduit la fille du Maire, la charmante Lisbeth, tandis que Cole tombe sous le charme de la “patronne” du saloon, la très étrange Miss Daisy. Peu à peu, les trois frères se réconcilient, s’intègrent et apprennent à devenir de vrais hors-la-loi en espérant monter le plan parfait pour leur futur braquage. Mais le temps presse ; ils ne disposent que de quelques semaines et les habitants de Two Rivers ne sont pas aussi honnêtes qu’ils en ont l’air...
